title: Baby's Wild Ride Episode 1
description: A woman betrayed by her family gives birth in secret, loses her child, and is forced to take the fall for her sister's crimes, vowing revenge from prison.
context:
Title: Baby's Wild Ride Episode 1
Description: A woman betrayed by her family gives birth in secret, loses her child, and is forced to take the fall for her sister's crimes, vowing revenge from prison.

INT. BEDROOM - DAY

SONG YUAN lies on the bed, screaming in pain, giving birth.

MRS. SONG and SONG XIYUE rush into the room.

MRS. SONG
(contemptuous)
Screaming won't erase your disgrace. You couldn't even name the father.

SONG YUAN
(agonized)
I don't... remember. Just save my baby.

MRS. SONG
A bastard has no place in the Song family.

SONG YUAN lets out a piercing scream. The BABY'S CRY is cut short.

FADE TO BLACK.
continuation:
INT. BEDROOM - LATER

SONG YUAN lies weakly on the bed, arm outstretched toward an empty bassinet.

SONG YUAN
Where... where is he?

MRS. SONG
(turning away)
Gone. Some things are better lost.

SONG YUAN's face shows shock and despair as she sees the empty bassinet.

INT. SONG FAMILY MANSION - DAY

SONG YUAN, wearing a thin coat, confronts MRS. SONG and SONG XIYUE.

SONG YUAN
Why am I being arrested for Xiyue's fraud?

MRS. SONG
You signed the documents. Repay your shame this way.

SONG XIYUE
(not looking up)
You're only ruining us. This makes you useful.

A POLICE OFFICER enters and handcuffs SONG YUAN.

INT. PRISON - DAY

SONG YUAN, in prison uniform, scrubs floors.

A PRISON GUARD watches, then deliberately knocks over a cleaning bucket.

PRISON GUARD
Pick that up, Song. You're nothing special here.

The GUARD walks away. SONG YUAN's jaw tightens, but she bends to clean the spill.

EXT. CAR WASH - DAY

SONG YUAN, in dirty work clothes, sits by a lamppost, looking dejected but determined.

SONG YUAN (V.O.)
For every night I spent wondering if he's still breathing... you'll pay.

SONG YUAN's eyes sharpen with cold, calculated determination.

title: Mr. Gu's Secret Criminal Wife
description: A woman serves as a living blood bank for her husband's true love, only to have her pregnancy dismissed and destroyed by the man she married.
context:
Title: Mr. Gu's Secret Criminal Wife
Description: A woman serves as a living blood bank for her husband's true love, only to have her pregnancy dismissed and destroyed by the man she married.

INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - DAY

The hospital corridor compresses into controlled chaos. NURSES and DOCTORS surge forward with XIAO YUE on a gurney, her white dress soaked crimson at the abdomen.

NURSE
Make way, make way!

GU YANCHEN keeps pace beside the gurney, his hand on Xiao Yue's shoulder. His other hand grips a phone like a weapon.

GU YANCHEN
Xiao Yue!

The emergency room doors swallow them whole.

INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR ANOTHER AREA - DAY

GU YANCHEN paces with predatory intensity, phone welded to his ear. He checks his watch: 11:47 PM.

GU YANCHEN
(angry)
What good is a mobile blood bank that doesn't answer when her one purpose is needed?

GU YANCHEN
(shouting into phone)
Where are you? Answer me.

HAN CHUYAO (O.S.)
I was at the research lab, my phone was on silent—I'm here—

GU YANCHEN
(interrupting)
Fifth floor emergency room. Now.

GU YANCHEN hangs up. HAN CHUYAO appears at the far end of the corridor, running full tilt.
continuation:
INT. EMERGENCY ROOM ENTRANCE - DAY

HAN CHUYAO runs to the emergency room entrance where GU YANCHEN is waiting.

GU YANCHEN
(impatiently)
Why did it take you so long?

A NURSE comes out pushing a medical cart, preparing to draw blood from HAN CHUYAO for testing.

GU YANCHEN
(to the nurse)
Bombay phenotype negative. She's the only match. Draw what the surgical team requests.

HAN CHUYAO looks at GU YANCHEN, something breaking behind her eyes.

MONTAGE
- Close-up: A needle pierces HAN CHUYAO's arm, blood being drawn.
- HAN CHUYAO hides a folded ultrasound report in her fist.
- Close-up of the report: 8 weeks. A tiny, bean-shaped shadow. A sticky note reads: "Dad?"
- HAN CHUYAO stands alone on a bench, pressing the photo to her abdomen. Her eyes are dry.

HAN CHUYAO (V.O.)
You were supposed to be our clean start. But I can start without him.

INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - DAY

HAN CHUYAO sits weakly on a bench. GU YANCHEN walks over and hands her a carton of milk.

GU YANCHEN
Drink this. If you bottom out, the contract's void. She can't use you then.

HAN CHUYAO looks up at him, her eyes filled with finality. GU YANCHEN turns away.

HAN CHUYAO
(trying to call out)
I kept the ultrasound. For you.

GU YANCHEN suddenly turns around, sees the ultrasound report in her hand, and snatches it away.

GU YANCHEN
(roaring)
Don't give me that look!

He crumples the report into a ball and throws it on the ground. HAN CHUYAO's expression changes from shock to resolution. GU YANCHEN looks at her coldly.

title: Post-2000s Dad's Wild Parenting Style
description: A young man travels through time, becomes a father to an 8-year-old son, and joins a parenting reality show where he challenges traditional education methods with his gaming-friendly approach.
context:
Title: Post-2000s Dad's Wild Parenting Style
Description: A young man travels through time, becomes a father to an 8-year-old son, and joins a parenting reality show where he challenges traditional education methods with his gaming-friendly approach.

INT. GAMING ROOM - DAY

Quick cuts: RGB lights syncing to a quiet hum. A gaming chair still warm. Code on a monitor shifts to a child's screensaver.

KUNHUN (O.S.)
Dad. You promised me a study desk. This is a gaming throne.

KUNHUN pulls AICHEN's hand, his expression caught between hope and disappointment. AICHEN (25, eyes still adjusting to this timeline) looks at the setup like it's evidence in a trial.

A CAMERAMAN edges into frame, capturing the moment.

SYSTEM (V.O.)
Education Master System initialized. Current reputation: 0. Demonstrate your philosophy.

A translucent UI materializes: [REPUTATION: 0]. It highlights Kunhun's frayed backpack strap, the tell of weight carried.

AICHEN
(stunned whisper)
Philosophy?

AICHEN (V.O.)
In my past life, screens were the enemy. Eighteen years of digital exile meant freedom tasted like regret. I won't build his cage from the same keys.

AICHEN looks at Kunhun. Sees the kid he could have been.

AICHEN
Desk upgrade pending. Homework—show me the damage.

KUNHUN extracts a workbook, every answer correct but the pages thin from eraser burn.

AICHEN
You did the work. You kept the promise.

He sets the book down with respect, not dismissal.

AICHEN
Now I keep mine. One mission.

KUNHUN
(suspiciously)
This is a loyalty test. For the cameras.

AICHEN
(hands him a controller)
This is a trust fall. I'll catch you.

CAMERAMAN
We're live in ninety seconds.

AICHEN
Perfect. We'll show them the tutorial.

He helps Kunhun into the co-pilot chair. They load a cooperative puzzle game. Problem-solving, not violence.
continuation:
INT. STUDIO - DAY

HOST XIAO SA faces the audience and panel.

XIAO SA
"Parenting Done Right." Three methods. One million yuan. Your vote decides which child gets the future you trust.

The central screen illuminates.

INT. ZHANG YAN'S HOME - DAY

ZHANG YAN mops with metronomic intensity. Daughter ZI HAN writes, flinching at every splash.

INT. STUDIO - DAY

AUDIENCE MEMBER A (Female)
She sacrifices everything.

OBSERVER A (Female)
Everything includes her daughter's focus.

AUDIENCE MEMBER B (Female)
I saw the girl lose her place three times.

The screen transitions.

INT. WANG LEI'S HOME - DAY

WANG LEI stands over son WANG ZIXUAN, who's clutching a phone like a lifeline.

WANG LEI
(shouting)
Run! Run from your potential! Run!

Zixuan runs. Not away—he runs stairs. Punishment laps. His face is stone.

INT. STUDIO - DAY

AUDIENCE MEMBER C (Male)
Tough love built our generation.

OBSERVER B (Female)
Tough love, or just tough?

AUDIENCE MEMBER B (Female)
First was love through labor. Second, love through fear. What could possibly be third?

The screen reveals Aichen and Kunhun.

INT. GAMING ROOM - DAY

AICHEN and KUNHUN wear headsets, but their eyes meet across the monitors. Their game—a city builder—requires planning, resource management, compromise.

KUNHUN
(into mic)
Dad, if I zone the residential wrong, the whole simulation collapses.

AICHEN
(into mic)
Then we rezone. Failure's just data.

The system UI pulses: [REPUTATION +250].

KUNHUN
Will this hurt my chances at... the good schools?

AICHEN
You're building a functional economy at eight. I'd say you're auditing college courses.

KUNHUN
(laughs)
Can we put a skate park in the university quad?

AICHEN
Design it for the kid you are. Not the resume they want.

The system UI glows: [MILESTONE: Authentic Play].

INT. STUDIO - DAY

The footage freezes on Kunhun's face—alive, deciding.

XIAO SA
Sacrifice. Authority. Or... collaboration?

OBSERVER A
The boy's hands move with purpose. Not escape.

AUDIENCE C
My son is asking me what game that is.

XIAO SA
Vote now. But remember—one child wins the fund. A million children watch the lesson.

INT. GAMING ROOM - DAY

Kunhun saves his progress. Logs off. No argument.

KUNHUN
Dad? That was the best homework ever.

AICHEN
System, status.

SYSTEM (V.O.)
[REPUTATION: 1,850]. Not trending. Enduring.

Aichen watches Kunhun drift toward bed, already sketching tomorrow's build.

AICHEN (V.O.)
Maybe the best parenting isn't a system to game.

He turns off the rig. The RGB fades to a single nightlight.

AICHEN (V.O.)
It's a campaign we choose to play together.

FADE OUT.

title: A Suona Shakes Heaven and Earth
description: Lin Chuan, a legendary musician known as the Music God, survives a car accident only to return three years later to find traditional music under threat from foreign rivals.
context:
Title: A Suona Shakes Heaven and Earth
Description: Lin Chuan, a legendary musician known as the Music God, survives a car accident only to return three years later to find traditional music under threat from foreign rivals.

INT. CONCERT HALL STAGE - NIGHT

Darkness. A spotlight ignites, cutting through swirling smoke. LIN CHUAN (30s, calloused hands, intense focus) emerges, raising a gleaming suona.

CLOSE-UP - LIN CHUAN's fingers dance across the instrument's holes with practiced precision.

The suona BLARES to life - a soaring, defiant melody that commands the hall.

INT. CONCERT HALL AUDIENCE - NIGHT

The house is packed. In the front row, MATSUSHITA SHAEKO (40s, elegant, granite composure) watches Lin Chuan's technique, her eyes sharp and assessing.

INT. CONCERT HALL STAGE - NIGHT

Lin's performance builds to a climax, every muscle coiled. The final note hangs, piercing and perfect.

He lowers the suona, breathing hard.

The audience erupts. Thunderous applause and cheers.

AUDIENCE (O.S.)
Music God! Encore!

An EMCEE appears with a golden trophy. Confetti rains down.

EMCEE (V.O.)
For the third consecutive year - Lin Chuan of Daxia.

ON SCREEN: LIN CHUAN - THREE-TIME WORLD CHAMPION

INT. SEDAN CAR - NIGHT

Lin sits in the dark backseat, trophy glinting. The DRIVER's eyes flick to the rearview mirror.

DRIVER
Mr. Lin. That sedan's been with us since the venue.

Lin turns. Headlights fill the rear window.

LIN CHUAN
Lose them.

The Driver accelerates onto a mountain highway. The pursuing car surges forward, BUMPING their rear bumper.

DRIVER
They're trying to--

The pursuing vehicle RAMS them again, harder. Tires scream.
continuation:
INT./EXT. SEDAN CAR - MOUNTAIN ROAD - CONTINUOUS

The car careens through a guardrail and plunges down the slope.

EXT. MOUNTAIN ROAD - NIGHT

The sedan lies twisted at the bottom, smoke billowing.

A figure at the roadside watches, then melts into darkness.

ON SCREEN: MUSIC GOD LIN CHUAN - ACCIDENT - FATE UNKNOWN

INT. INSTRUMENT SHOP - DAY

Sunlight illuminates dusty rows of traditional instruments. A small TV flickers silently in the corner. SU YING (30s, weary but determined) works at the counter. Her sister SU WAN (20s, fiery) polishes a pipa.

ON SCREEN: THREE YEARS LATER

The door chimes. CHEN JIANGHAI (40s, corporate polish, predatory smile) enters with TAKEDA TARO (50s, distinguished, inscrutable).

SU YING
Can I help you?

Chen picks up a suona, examining it with a slight smile.

SU YING
All our instruments are performance-grade. You're welcome to try them.

Chen sets it down with a sharp TAP. The reed cracks audibly.

Su Wan rushes over.

SU WAN
That was deliberate.

CHEN JIANGHAI
I'm Chen Jianghai, Jiangbei representative for the International Music Development Council.

He produces a card.

CHEN JIANGHAI
And this is Takeda Taro, Special Advisor to the Ishikawa Music Hall.

ON SCREEN: CHEN JIANGHAI - INTERNATIONAL MUSIC DEVELOPMENT COUNCIL

ON SCREEN: TAKEDA TARO - ISHIKAWA MUSIC HALL ADVISOR

SU YING
(frowning)
What do you want?

TAKEDA TARO
(bows slightly)
The Ishikawa Hall is establishing a cultural exchange in Jiangbei. With sponsored instruments for all major academies.

CHEN JIANGHAI
We're inviting local partners. Or competitors.

He slides a sealed black envelope across the counter.

CHEN JIANGHAI
Our proposal. Accept, and your instruments reach three hundred students. Refuse...

He glances at the broken suona.

CHEN JIANGHAI
...and we demonstrate why some traditions belong in museums.

SU YING's hand trembles as she reaches for the envelope.

title: Hunting Relationship
description: A woman with a scarred past uses a staged confrontation at a blind date banquet to catch the attention of her real target, a powerful and elusive businessman.
context:
Title: Hunting Relationship
Description: A woman with a scarred past uses a staged confrontation at a blind date banquet to catch the attention of her real target, a powerful and elusive businessman.

TITLE CARD: HUNTING RELATIONSHIP

EXT. LUXURIOUS ROOM - DAY (FLASHFORWARD)

JIANG MUSHENG, wearing sexy pajamas, walks barefoot on the floor, light and shadow dappled across her.

JIANG MUSHENG
Come here.

JIANG MUSHENG sits in a chair. ZHOU CHAOXUAN walks toward her.

JIANG MUSHENG
Help me take off my clothes.

ZHOU CHAOXUAN
I am willing to become your slave.

JIANG MUSHENG's hand caresses the scar on her chest, her eyes filled with pain.

JIANG MUSHENG (V.O.)
That cut really hurt.

ZHOU CHAOXUAN looks at JIANG MUSHENG affectionately and lifts her chin.

ZHOU CHAOXUAN
You are the most perfect woman I have ever seen in this world.

The two kiss passionately.

TITLE CARD: ONE MONTH AGO
continuation:
INT. LUXURIOUS BANQUET HALL - NIGHT

A grand banquet is underway. JIANG MUSHENG, wearing a gorgeous evening gown, stands to the side on the phone.

FRIEND (V.O.)
This blind date banquet your stepmother arranged for you today has no good intentions. That Chen family second generation heir is not a good person.

JIANG MUSHENG
I know. So he's not my target at all. He can't get what I want.

JIANG MUSHENG's gaze moves past the crowd and locks onto ZHOU CHAOXUAN, who is conversing with someone.

JIANG MUSHENG
And he is my prey.

FRIEND (V.O.)
You mean Zhou Chaoxuan? He's not easy to approach. Can you really take him down?

JIANG MUSHENG
Special people require special methods to attract attention.

JIANG MUSHENG hangs up the phone, picks up a glass of red wine from a passing waiter's tray, and walks elegantly toward the center of the banquet. She passes by ZHOU CHAOXUAN, and the two briefly make eye contact.

ZHOU CHAOXUAN
(to the person beside him)
Continue.

JIANG MUSHENG walks up to CHEN LIN. CHEN LIN looks her up and down.

CHEN LIN
The scar's a shame. But I suppose every commodity has its flaws.

JIANG MUSHENG
At least my flaws are visible. Yours just cost your company three points in today's market.

Chen's face darkens—she's struck true.

JIANG MUSHENG
Your father sent you here to prove you can handle a wife. But you can't even handle a conversation.

CHEN LIN is enraged.

CHEN LIN
You little bitch!

CHEN LIN suddenly strikes, grabbing JIANG MUSHENG by the throat and pushing her against a table. JIANG MUSHENG struggles painfully—real fear mixing with calculation.

ZHOU CHAOXUAN sees this and immediately steps forward, grabbing CHEN LIN's wrist.

ZHOU CHAOXUAN
You're making a scene. In my hotel.

ZHOU CHAOXUAN forcefully pushes CHEN LIN away. CHEN LIN stumbles, and seeing it's ZHOU CHAOXUAN, immediately puts on an ingratiating smile.

CHEN LIN
President Zhou—it's a misunderstanding. We were—

ZHOU CHAOXUAN
Leave.

Chen retreats.

JIANG MUSHENG touches her reddened neck, looking at ZHOU CHAOXUAN with lingering fear and dawning recognition.

JIANG MUSHENG
Thank you.

ZHOU CHAOXUAN studies her exposed scar for a beat too long.

ZHOU CHAOXUAN
Hunt more carefully. Some predators bite back.

He walks away. She watches him go, her triumph edged with uncertainty.

JIANG MUSHENG (V.O.)
The predator sees the hunter.

TITLE CARD: TO BE CONTINUED

title: Rise Against All Odds: A Life of Dominance
description: A young man wrongfully imprisoned for murder discovers his parents were killed while trying to clear his name, and a mysterious inmate offers him a chance to escape and seek revenge.
context:
Title: Rise Against All Odds: A Life of Dominance
Description: A young man wrongfully imprisoned for murder discovers his parents were killed while trying to clear his name, and a mysterious inmate offers him a chance to escape and seek revenge.

INT. PRISON SOLITARY CONFINEMENT CELL - DAY

A SIGN on the wall reads: "SOLITARY CONFINEMENT AREA."

CHEN XUEWEN, a young prisoner in a torn uniform with healing injuries, sits motionless against the concrete. The food slot opens.

DU LAO, a middle-aged prisoner with glasses, peers through.

DU LAO
Your parents stopped coming. Three weeks ago.

CHEN XUEWEN
(voice hollow)
They gave up.

DU LAO
Or someone made them stop. Forever.

Chen jerks toward the bars.

CHEN XUEWEN
What are you saying?

DU LAO
They were coming to see me. About your case. Then they died. Car accident.

CHEN XUEWEN
(quietly)
That's what I was told.

DU LAO
In Black Water, accident and execution look the same on paper. You want truth? Stay alive. Ghosts don't get answers.

The slot slams shut.

CUT TO:

FLASHBACK - ONE MONTH AGO

INT. PRISON CORRIDOR - DAY

GUARDS shove CHEN XUEWEN through intake. He's clean-cut, terrified.

CHEN XUEWEN
(shouting)
Officer! The timeline doesn't match—check the library cameras!

GUARD #1
Save it for your appeal, kid.

They throw him into GENERAL POPULATION. The door CLANGS shut. SCARFACE, prisoner leader with a scar, watches from his bunk.

SCARFACE
Fresh meat thinks he's special.

Chen is knocked to the ground.

INT. PRISON CELL - DAY

Prisoners surround newcomer CHEN XUEWEN.

PRISONER A
Kid.

PRISONER B
I heard you're in here for raping and killing a college girl. That true?

CHEN XUEWEN
(terrified)
No—I was at the library—

PRISONER B
(sneering)
Sure.

SCARFACE steps forward. Punches Chen in the stomach. Chen doubles over.

CHEN XUEWEN
(gasping)
Coward...

SCARFACE
(contemptuously)
You talk back?

SCARFACE kicks him down.

SCARFACE
Beat him until he learns.

Prisoners rush forward. DU LAO watches coldly from his bunk.
continuation:
INT. PRISON CAFETERIA - DAY

Prisoners line up for food. CHEN XUEWEN, thinner now, approaches TRUSTEE GUARD RAMOS.

CHEN XUEWEN
Sir. My parents visited every other day. Now nothing. Please—can you check?

RAMOS
(avoiding eye contact)
Stop talking. Eat your food.

RAMOS moves off. Chen stands frozen. Behind him, OLD MAN WU (70s), a lifer, murmurs.

OLD MAN WU
They won't tell you official. But word travels. Car accident. Both of them. Last Tuesday.

The food tray falls. Spills across the floor.

CHEN XUEWEN
(repeating)
My parents... are dead?

He stares at the mess. His hands shake—not with grief. With something colder.

SCARFACE and followers approach, surrounding Chen.

SCARFACE
(mocking)
College boy's learning his place. On the floor.

SCARFACE spits on the spilled food.

SCARFACE
Show us how sorry you are.

Prisoners laugh. Chen raises his head. His eyes are different now—empty of fear.

CHEN XUEWEN
(quietly)
My parents are dead because of you people.

SCARFACE
What'd you say?

Chen's hand darts out—grabs a broken shard. He launches at Scarface, drives him onto a table, shard at his throat.

SCARFACE
(terrified)
I'm talking to you! Can't you hear me!

CHEN XUEWEN
(roaring)
YOU THINK I'M EASY TO BULLY! FRAMING ME, KILLING THEM! I'M ALREADY DEAD—BUT I'M TAKING YOU!

PRISON WARDEN BASONG arrives with guards.

BASONG
(shouting)
STAND DOWN!

Guards rush forward. Tasers crackle. Chen convulses. They drag him off. Through chaos, DU LAO watches.

CHEN XUEWEN
(struggling)
Let me die! Let me die!

DU LAO
(to a guard)
I'll calm him.

Du Lao locks Chen in a chokehold. Whispers.

DU LAO
(whispering)
Not here. Not like this.

Chen goes limp.

GUARD
Take him to the hole!

INT. PRISON SOLITARY CONFINEMENT CELL - NIGHT

CHEN XUEWEN curls up in the corner, covered in fresh wounds, eyes vacant.

CHEN XUEWEN
(muttering)
Mom... Dad... I'm coming...

DU LAO appears at the cell door holding a broom and dustpan. He unlocks it.

DU LAO
Young man. Three days without food. You keep this up, you'll die. And no one will know why your parents were murdered.

CHEN XUEWEN suddenly looks up. Grabs the bars.

CHEN XUEWEN
(urgently)
What do you know?

DU LAO
I know they were silenced. I know who gave the order. And I know you have a choice.

(beat)

Become a ghost or become a weapon. But you can't be both.

FADE OUT.

title: Carefree Medical Immortal in the City
description: A swordsman's romantic practice session with his junior sister is interrupted by a powerful War Goddess bearing a marriage contract.
context:
Title: Carefree Medical Immortal in the City
Description: A swordsman's romantic practice session with his junior sister is interrupted by a powerful War Goddess bearing a marriage contract.

EXT. LAKESIDE MEADOW - DAY

MONTAGE:

YE CHENYANG and JUNIOR SISTER, dressed in ancient costumes, practice swordsmanship on a misty lakeside meadow.

The two display elegant sword techniques, exchanging moves, their eyes full of affection. Between strikes, YE CHENYANG's fingertips emit brief pulses of green healing energy that correct JUNIOR SISTER's form.

Cut to: The two face each other closely, sword tips touching, smiling at each other.

Overhead shot: The two spin on the meadow, sword light flashing. Their blades leave trails of faint green light.

They stop their movements. YE CHENYANG's sword gently rests on JUNIOR SISTER's neck as she looks up at him.

The two spar again, their movements fluid and graceful.

END MONTAGE

YE CHENYANG and JUNIOR SISTER stop their practice. YE CHENYANG blocks JUNIOR SISTER's hand with his palm.

YE CHENYANG
Junior Sister, you've practiced the Tender Affection Sword well.

JUNIOR SISTER
That's because you taught me well, Senior Brother.

YE CHENYANG
Then let me teach you something else.

YE CHENYANG takes JUNIOR SISTER's hand, pulls her into his arms, and strikes a romantic pose.

JUNIOR SISTER
(shyly)
Senior Brother, you're so naughty.

YE CHENYANG
Junior Sister, don't we look just like the Divine Eagle couple right now?

JUNIOR SISTER
We do, but Senior Brother...

JUNIOR SISTER glances to the side.

JUNIOR SISTER
There's a big rooster over there watching us.

YE CHENYANG follows her gaze. A majestic black rooster stands in the distance, watching them. Its eyes glow with faint crimson light.

YE CHENYANG
(turning back, gently)
No problem. I'll slaughter it later and make you soup to nourish your body.

JUNIOR SISTER
(quietly)
The City sent another one.

JUNIOR SISTER shyly lowers her head and leans into YE CHENYANG's embrace.
continuation:
JUNIOR SISTER
Senior Brother, you're so good to me.

The two embrace tightly. The rooster in the distance turns and quickly runs away, dissolving into smoke.

Suddenly, powerful music begins to play.

XIAOYUE WAR GODDESS, wearing black combat attire and a red cape, arrives with six BLACK-CLAD SUBORDINATES, walking with imposing momentum.

YE CHENYANG and JUNIOR SISTER look at these unexpected visitors in surprise.

XIAOYUE WAR GODDESS and her group stop in front of them.

XIAOYUE WAR GODDESS
Are you Ye Chenyang?

YE CHENYANG
I am. Who are you?

SUBORDINATE
(sternly)
Insolent! How dare you speak to Lord Xiaoyue that way?

YE CHENYANG
(confused, to Junior Sister)
Xiaoyue War Goddess? Have you heard of her? Hm?

JUNIOR SISTER
Only in City reports. She never leaves the capital.

XIAOYUE WAR GODDESS
I am the only Five-Star War Goddess of the Longxia Nation. Within five years, I pacified the four seas for the nation and helped the Sovereign unify the realm. With my own power, I defeated the ten great overseas masters of our Longxia Nation. Due to my illustrious achievements, I now command the Four War Gods of the Four Territories, second in position only to the Sovereign.

XIAOYUE WAR GODDESS is about to continue.

YE CHENYANG
(impatiently interrupting)
And... alright, alright, alright, alright. Aren't you tired talking so much in one breath?

YE CHENYANG waves his hand dismissively.

YE CHENYANG
Just tell me directly. Why are you looking for me?

XIAOYUE WAR GODDESS produces a red scroll from behind her and unfurls it dramatically. It is a marriage contract.

XIAOYUE WAR GODDESS
This is a marriage contract. Come back with me to get married.

YE CHENYANG and JUNIOR SISTER are both stunned. YE CHENYANG's eyes widen, his mouth forming an "O" shape, his face full of shock.

JUNIOR SISTER
(whisper)
The contract from Qingyun Pass...

YE CHENYANG
What?

FADE OUT.

TITLE CARD: TO BE CONTINUED

title: Fill in the Blank
description: A woman discovers her husband's lingering feelings for another woman through a misdelivered bouquet of flowers.
context:
Title: Fill in the Blank
Description: A woman discovers her husband's lingering feelings for another woman through a misdelivered bouquet of flowers.

INT. FRONT DOOR - DAY

The doorbell rings.

YE WANQIU walks from inside the house toward the door.

YE WANQIU
Coming.

YE WANQIU opens the door. A cascading bouquet of white roses rests at the doorstep. She lifts it with hesitant joy and closes the door.

YE WANQIU (V.O.)
Four years. He's never once remembered.

YE WANQIU extracts the card with trembling fingers. It reads: "Jingyi—Welcome home." Her face drains of color, breath catching in her throat.

YE WANQIU (V.O.)
The name that haunts this marriage.

INT. LIVING ROOM - DAY

GU HANCHEN sits on the sofa, phone in hand, gaze deliberately averted. YE WANQIU approaches him.

YE WANQIU
A Chen. You're back early.

GU HANCHEN continues scrolling, unresponsive. YE WANQIU kneels before him, smoothing her features into a placating smile.

YE WANQIU
Tiring day?

GU HANCHEN remains silent. YE WANQIU presses on, voice brightening with forced cheer.

YE WANQIU
A Chen, Mrs. Liu's terrace—her peonies are blooming. She wanted me to ask your opinion on the fertilizer.

GU HANCHEN still doesn't look up. YE WANQIU rises, reaching for his empty teacup.

YE WANQIU
A Chen, your favorite soup is still warm—

GU HANCHEN
(impatiently interrupting)
continuation:
If you're that desperate to be useful, sort the dry cleaning. Spare me the chatter.

YE WANQIU lowers her head, wounded. Her eyes land on a faint coral smudge on GU HANCHEN's collar—lipstick. She freezes, the cup nearly slipping from her grasp.

YE WANQIU
(tentatively)
A Chen, a florist delivery came today. For a Jingyi Su. Wrong address?

GU HANCHEN
(without looking up)
Mistake. Return it.

YE WANQIU
Oh. Of course. A mistake.

YE WANQIU
(gathering courage)
A Chen, did you... spend the day with her?

GU HANCHEN's head snaps up, eyes blazing. He hurls his phone onto the sofa cushion, the crack of impact echoing.

GU HANCHEN
(shouting)
Get out!

He shoves his jacket into her arms, fabric bunched like an accusation.

GU HANCHEN
Now!

YE WANQIU stumbles back, clutching the jacket, and flees.

INT. HALLWAY - DAY

YE WANQIU holds the jacket and her phone, back pressed against the wall for support. GU HANCHEN's phone buzzes in her pocket—she must have grabbed it unconsciously. She answers.

SU JINGYI (O.S.)
Mrs. Gu? It's Jingyi. I assume the roses arrived.

YE WANQIU
(shocked)
You—how—

SU JINGYI (O.S.)
Four years, and he still uses our code. 'Welcome home.' Tell me, does he still call you by my name when he dreams?

The line cuts. YE WANQIU's hand drops, phone clattering to the floor. She sinks down, the wall holding her up as betrayal settles into her bones with quiet, final weight.

title: Untitled Hospital Drama
description: A woman saves her husband's life with her blood, only to be met with cold rejection and disgust.
context:
Title: Untitled Hospital Drama
Description: A woman saves her husband's life with her blood, only to be met with cold rejection and disgust.

INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - DAY

Two DOCTORS push a stretcher carrying LU BOCHUAN at high speed. His abdomen is bleeding profusely, and he is unconscious.

DOCTOR
The patient has lost too much blood, we can't stop the bleeding!

ANOTHER DOCTOR
His wife's a rare match—get her prepped!

INT. HOSPITAL LABORATORY - DAY

A DOCTOR is drawing blood from JIANG ZIXI. JIANG ZIXI's face is pale, her body weak.

DOCTOR
Mrs. Lu.

JIANG ZIXI
(weakly)
I'm fine.

JIANG ZIXI
(firmly)
Keep drawing. Saving my husband is what matters.
continuation:
INT. HOSPITAL ROOM - DAY

LU BOCHUAN lies on the hospital bed, still unconscious. JIANG ZIXI sits beside the bed, gently caressing his cheek. A medical BANDAGE covers the crease of her elbow.

LU BOCHUAN slowly opens his eyes. His gaze falls on the bandage.

LU BOCHUAN
(coldly)
...Don't.

JIANG ZIXI
(stunned)
Yunxi.

LU BOCHUAN
Where is Yunxi?

LU BOCHUAN struggles to get up. JIANG ZIXI quickly holds him down.

JIANG ZIXI
Bochuan, you just woke up after losing so much blood. Don't try to get out of bed yet.

LU BOCHUAN
(staring at her bandage)
Lost too much blood. Is that your new refrain?

JIANG ZIXI
I didn't—

LU BOCHUAN
(angrily)
You never do. Always the accident. I'm exhausted watching you perform. Every drop of your blood in my veins feels like a chain.

JIANG ZIXI
(hurt)
Bochuan...

JIANG ZIXI looks at him, her eyes filled with shock and pain.

title: Urban Hero's Soul
description: A man diagnosed with a terminal illness at 38 drowns his sorrows in alcohol, only to mysteriously wake up back in his high school classroom.
context:
Title: Urban Hero's Soul
Description: A man diagnosed with a terminal illness at 38 drowns his sorrows in alcohol, only to mysteriously wake up back in his high school classroom.

INT. BAR - NIGHT

A dimly lit bar. CHU FENG sits alone at the bar counter, fingers tracing a hospital envelope.

CHU FENG
(subtitle: Unlucky Chu Feng)
Something with teeth.

The BARTENDER pours a double shot of overproof whiskey.

INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - DAY (FLASHBACK)

The image is overexposed with a whitish tone.

DOCTOR (O.S.)
Pancreatic neuroendocrine carcinoma. Stage four.

CHU FENG looks shocked, staring at ghostly white lesions on a PET scan.

DOCTOR (O.S.)
Conservatively, six months. Perhaps a year if you fight.

The doctor's pager beeps—she's already leaving.

DOCTOR (O.S.)
Go live properly, Mr. Chu.
continuation:
INT. BAR - NIGHT

CHU FENG pulls a graduation photo from the envelope and taps his glass against it in a bitter toast.

INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - DAY (FLASHBACK)

CHU FENG crouches dejectedly in a corner, phone glowing with a text from "Wife."

WOMAN (TEXT)
You still want money? Your life is finished.

CHU FENG deletes his half-written reply: "For her treatment." Sends instead: "Understood."

CHU FENG (V.O.)
Thirty-eight. Senior engineer at a company that folded. Husband to a woman who couldn't wait. Father to a daughter who calls someone else Dad.

INT. BAR - NIGHT

CHU FENG painfully crumples the photo into a ball.

INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - DAY (FLASHBACK)

A WOMAN yells at him furiously, her voice echoing in the empty corridor.

WOMAN (O.S.)
You couldn't even keep us afloat! What happens to our daughter when you're gone?

CHU FENG keeps his head down, crouching on the ground in pain.

INT. BAR - NIGHT

CHU FENG lies slumped over the bar counter, emotionally broken.

CHU FENG
(to himself)
No equity. No family. No way to fix this.

He smiles bitterly, then raises his hand again.

CHU FENG
Another. Same measure.

BARTENDER
Here's your drink, sir.

CHU FENG takes the glass, downs it in one gulp, then slams it down and collapses drunk on the counter.

BARTENDER
(panicking)
Sir! Someone help! Quickly!

INT. CLASSROOM - DAY

The color tone shifts cold, turning cyan-blue.

CHU FENG suddenly wakes to find himself wearing a school uniform, sitting in a high school classroom. He looks around in confusion.

The TEACHER slams the desk hard at the podium.

The blackboard reads "100 Days Until College Entrance Exam."

CHU FENG'S eyes widen in disbelief, seeing the date carved into his desk: April 5, 2005.

ON SCREEN: TO BE CONTINUED

title: My Love Begins With You
description: A young woman attends a business dinner to help her mother, only to encounter a man from her past who reveals a shocking secret.
context:
Title: My Love Begins With You
Description: A young woman attends a business dinner to help her mother, only to encounter a man from her past who reveals a shocking secret.

INT. HOTEL HALLWAY - NIGHT

CLOSE UP - A pair of nude-colored high heels walking on a carpeted hallway. The steps are measured, controlled.

Camera tilts up to reveal GU XINING in a white blouse and blue skirt. Determination barely masks her tension.

GU XINING (V.O.)
For Mom's sake. Just get through tonight.

GU XINING arrives at a door marked 1958, swipes her card with a trembling hand, and enters.

INT. HOTEL PRIVATE ROOM - NIGHT

GENERAL WANG stands too close to GU XINING, his hand a weight on her shoulder. GU XINING holds a wine glass like a shield.

GENERAL WANG
The Fangyuan project is yours. Your mother would be proud.

GU XINING
(frozen smile)
I'm grateful for the opportunity.

The door opens.

JIN BEICHUAN stands motionless in the doorway. His gaze locks with GU XINING's.
continuation:
GENERAL WANG
(standing quickly)
Jin! We didn't expect—

JIN BEICHUAN
(entering)
My plans changed. How fortunate.

His eyes note GENERAL WANG's hand, GU XINING's rigid posture.

JIN BEICHUAN
(to GU XINING)
Jingbei taught us negotiation, didn't it? Some tactics shouldn't require repetition.

GENERAL WANG
Both Jingbei alumni—perfect for the project!

JIN BEICHUAN
A collaborative partnership. That's what we called it.

He moves closer. GU XINING's knuckles whiten on her glass.

JIN BEICHUAN
Six months of research. Shared resources. Shared space.

JIN BEICHUAN
Shared a bed.

CLOSE UP - GU XINING's face. Shock flickers, then something harder: recognition of a trap. Her jaw sets.

title: Blood Wolf Hall
description: A former heir to a powerful organization is called back after being betrayed and exiled years ago, only to find himself drawn into a conspiracy involving a stolen artifact and danger to his loved one.
context:
Title: Blood Wolf Hall
Description: A former heir to a powerful organization is called back after being betrayed and exiled years ago, only to find himself drawn into a conspiracy involving a stolen artifact and danger to his loved one.

EXT. HELIPAD - DAY

A helicopter touches down. ZHUQUE, sharp-suited, steps onto the tarmac.

Three black SUVs screech to a halt, dust billowing.

CHEN TIANQI, white jacket, stands surrounded by CAMOUFLAGE SOLDIERS.

ZHUQUE walks straight toward CHEN TIANQI.

ZHUQUE
Zhuque, Guardian of Blood Wolf Hall, greets the Young Master!

The SOLDIERS kneel as one.

SOLDIERS (in unison)
We greet the Young Master!

CHEN TIANQI
Blood Wolf Hall is dead to me. You've wasted a trip.

ZHUQUE
The Old Hall Master issued twelve Blood Wolf Orders before his death. You must return and take charge.

CHEN TIANQI
(coldly)
The same man who ordered my execution? If Second Master Ye hadn't bartered his life for mine, I'd be dust in a mass grave. You have Chen Tianyu. Find him.
continuation:
INT. DARK ROOM - NIGHT (FLASHBACK)

CHEN TIANQI, bound and bleeding, crumples from a blow.

His brother, CHEN TIANYU, watches with a cold smile.

CHEN TIANYU
A bastard who steals secrets deserves a dog's death.

CHEN TIANQI
(struggling)
Grandfather, I was framed!

The OLD HALL MASTER, stone-faced, turns away.

OLD HALL MASTER
Beat him until he stops breathing. Feed him to the dogs.

SECOND MASTER YE, old but steady, steps between them.

SECOND MASTER YE
Hall Master, executing him without proof will split the council.

OLD HALL MASTER
Then leave with him. Your life's work for his.

CHEN TIANYU
(angrily)
Rebellion! Out! All of you!

EXT. HELIPAD - DAY

ZHUQUE
Young Master, you may not know. After the Old Hall Master died, Chen Tianyu disappeared. The Blood Wolf Talisman was stolen.

She moves closer.

ZHUQUE
That talisman controls our global shipping network. Without it, Blood Wolf Hall shatters. Wars will ignite.

CHEN TIANQI
Then let it burn.

He turns to his electric scooter.

A SOLDIER runs up, thrusting a phone at ZHUQUE.

SOLDIER
Lady Zhuque, from the Fan asset!

ZHUQUE takes it. Her face pales. She rushes toward CHEN TIANQI.

ZHUQUE
Young Master, your wife is in danger!

CHEN TIANQI
(grabbing her arm)
What happened to Qingcheng?

ZHUQUE hands him the phone. The screen shows QINGCHENG unconscious. A man with a syringe kneels beside her.

CHEN TIANQI watches, his grip crushing the phone's frame.

title: The Nation's Mighty Dragon
description: A powerful commander returns to eliminate an international criminal who traffics children and threatens national security.
context:
Title: The Nation's Mighty Dragon
Description: A powerful commander returns to eliminate an international criminal who traffics children and threatens national security.

INT. HELICOPTER - DAY

SOUND of helicopter blades whirring.

A helicopter flies over a coastal city at dusk.

Inside, MU SHAOFENG, dressed in a black leather coat, sits calmly. He opens a vintage pocket watch, revealing a photo of a young girl—his daughter.

CAN LANG (V.O.)
Sir, we've confirmed the location. Port 7 warehouse. Six children inside.

MU SHAOFENG
Land. This ends tonight.

He closes the pocket watch with a determined look.

EXT. AIRFIELD - DAY

CAN LANG leads a group of soldiers in tactical gear. They stand in formation as the helicopter lands.

MU SHAOFENG exits the helicopter with a commanding presence.

SOLDIERS
(in unison)
Welcome, General!

The soldiers kneel on one knee in two rows, creating a path for MU SHAOFENG.

MU SHAOFENG walks forward, followed by CAN LANG.

MU SHAOFENG
All units, extract the children. Poison Fang is mine.

SOLDIERS
(in unison)
Yes, sir!
continuation:
INT. ABANDONED WAREHOUSE - NIGHT

Two terrified CHILDREN are huddled together inside a large metal cage.

POISON FANG, with a distinctive wolf tattoo, crouches by the cage, taunting them.

POISON FANG
Such clear eyes. Such healthy organs. You'll make me rich.

A SUBORDINATE approaches him.

SUBORDINATE
Boss, everything's ready for tomorrow's shipment.

Suddenly, a voice echoes through the warehouse.

MU SHAOFENG (V.O.)
Poison Fang. You traffic children, collude with foreign powers, threaten national security.

POISON FANG and his men look around, startled.

POISON FANG
Who's there? Show yourself!

MU SHAOFENG (V.O.)
Three crimes. One sentence.

MU SHAOFENG walks into the light, confronting them.

POISON FANG
You're a dead man walking.

MU SHAOFENG
(smiles)
Justice doesn't wait.

ON SCREEN: TO BE CONTINUED

title: The Prince's Awakening
description: A modern man finds himself transported into an ancient painting, awakening as the Crown Prince of the Great Qin Empire, only to discover a conspiracy against him.
context:
Title: The Prince's Awakening
Description: A modern man finds himself transported into an ancient painting, awakening as the Crown Prince of the Great Qin Empire, only to discover a conspiracy against him.

INT. MODERN OFFICE - DAY

A young man in a suit (THE PRINCE) sits in a luxurious office chair, slowly unrolling an ancient scroll painting.

THE PRINCE (V.O.)
Seventy million yuan for a painting. The board wants my head, but the Jade Maiden... she recognized me.

He traces the woman's face with his finger. The silk seems to breathe beneath his touch. The lights flicker—then die. The city skyline dissolves into darkness.

The woman in the painting turns her head. Looks at him.

THE PRINCE
(whisper)
That's not—

ZHAO RUI (O.S.)
Am I beautiful?

THE PRINCE recoils. ZHAO RUI stands before him—identical to the painting, but alive. Breathing.

Reality warps. The office dissolves like ink in water.

INT. ANCIENT PALACE CHAMBER - DAY

THE PRINCE snaps awake in ancient robes, his head pillowed on ZHAO RUI's lap. The scent of sandalwood fills his lungs.

THE PRINCE
(struggling upright)
I was just—

ZHAO RUI
(gently)
Your Highness. You fainted.

She holds a calligraphy brush, ink still wet on the tip.

ZHAO RUI (CONT'D)
(leaning close)
There's a mark I've been meaning to show you. A mole, here.

THE PRINCE
(fighting dizziness)
My office. The painting—

Pain lances through his skull. Memories bloom: a crown, a throne room, this woman's face at a court ceremony.

THE PRINCE (V.O.)
Hostile takeover. I'm wearing another man's sins.

ZHAO RUI
continuation:
Your Highness?

THE PRINCE looks at her—really looks. The careful way she holds herself. The rehearsed blush.

THE PRINCE
Show me.

ZHAO RUI
(breath catching)
Your Highness...

She reaches for her collar.

THE PRINCE (V.O.)
Six months ago, she entered the Eastern Palace. The old me treated her like a goddess. Untouchable. But her pulse is too steady.

THE PRINCE grabs her wrist.

THE PRINCE
Tell me, Zhao Rui... if you were truly mine, what would you give up for me?

ZHAO RUI
Everything. I am devoted—

THE PRINCE
Even your clan? The Prime Minister's ambitions? The Empress's favor?

ZHAO RUI
(panicking)
I don't understand what you—

THE PRINCE
You understand perfectly. They sent you to make me weak. Distracted. To prove I'm unfit for the succession.

ZHAO RUI
(voice shaking)
I'm just a woman.

THE PRINCE
(finger to her lips)
No. You're a battlefield. And I intend to win.

THE PRINCE tears her garment slightly at the shoulder. The silk whispers.

ZHAO RUI
(startled)
They'll say you're depraved.

THE PRINCE
(smiling)
Then let them. Let them see exactly what they wanted.

THE PRINCE leans in. The screen fades to black.

title: Dragon Hall of Great Xia
description: The master of Dragon Hall discovers his long-lost granddaughter has been imprisoned and abused, and immediately mobilizes his forces to rescue her.
context:
Title: Dragon Hall of Great Xia
Description: The master of Dragon Hall discovers his long-lost granddaughter has been imprisoned and abused, and immediately mobilizes his forces to rescue her.

INT. DRAGON HALL GREAT CHAMBER - DAY

A magnificent great hall with a long red carpet. Black-clad GUARDS stand on both sides in solemn formation.

ZHUGE XUANYI
Martial God, Zhuge Xuanyi, pays respects to the Hall Master.

GUIGU YONG leads a group of disciples up the red carpet, bowing collectively.

GUIGU YONG
Medical Saint Guigu Yong, pays respects to the Hall Master.

ALL
(in unison)
We pay respects to the Hall Master!

LONG WANNIAN sits on the throne at the end of the hall, gripping a surveillance photograph that shows a distinctive birthmark.

LONG WANNIAN
The mark convinces.

HAN XIAO kneels on the ground, reporting with controlled urgency.

HAN XIAO
Hall Master, we've verified her location. Young Miss Chen Yao is detained at Jiangcheng Women's Prison. Three years served.

INT. JIANGCHENG WOMEN'S PRISON - DAY

In a dim cell, CHEN YAO leans against the wall. Several FEMALE PRISONERS eye her with mixed fear and greed.

FEMALE PRISONER LEADER
Boss Li's offering triple for your face. Says your fiancé wants his new wife's name carved across that birthmark.

CHEN YAO
Eight years, and this is his goodbye.

Two PRISONERS grab Chen Yao's arms.

INT. DRAGON HALL GREAT CHAMBER - DAY

LONG WANNIAN rises slowly, the photograph trembling.

LONG WANNIAN
Three years of concrete while I sat on silk. My failure.

The assembly holds its breath.

LONG WANNIAN
Han Xiao.

HAN XIAO
(quietly)
Awaiting orders.

LONG WANNIAN
Deploy the Dragon Wing. Jiangcheng Prison. Bring back the girl with the Lingyun birthmark. No delays.

ALL
(in unison)
By the Master's will.

LONG WANNIAN studies the photo—Chen Yao's hardened eyes.

LONG WANNIAN (V.O.)
Granddaughter first. Heir second.
continuation:
INT. JIANGCHENG WOMEN'S PRISON - DAY

CHEN YAO is slammed against the wall, blood at her lip. Eyes defiant.

CHEN YAO
Tell Lu Jin I don't need his wedding gift.

FEMALE PRISONER LEADER
He insisted. Three characters across your mark.

INT. LUXURIOUS BEDROOM - DAY

LU JIN massages CHEN YAOYAO's legs. She watches him coldly.

CHEN YAOYAO
Your fiancée's release is today. Our announcement goes live in six hours.

LU JIN
(tightly)
Eight years looking at that birthmark. Like she was marked for something greater than me.

CHEN YAOYAO
So you'll carve my name into it. Forever.

LU JIN
The Imperial Grand Hotel is booked. Our debut as man and wife.

INT. JIANGCHENG WOMEN'S PRISON - DAY

The FEMALE PRISONER LEADER heats a metal shank. CHEN YAO is pinned.

FEMALE PRISONER LEADER
Don't flinch. "Yao Yao." Right across the stain.

INT. LUXURIOUS BEDROOM - DAY

CHEN YAOYAO traces LU JIN's jaw.

CHEN YAOYAO
Post it: Imperial Grand Hotel refuses entry to marked women.

LU JIN
She'll hide forever.

They embrace, her smile predatory.

INT. JIANGCHENG WOMEN'S PRISON - DAY

The metal touches CHEN YAO's skin. She screams, not from pain, but betrayal.

CHEN YAO (V.O.)
Eight years of letters... ended with a branding.

Her birthmark pulses golden light.

INT. PRISON CORRIDOR - DAY

HAN XIAO leads Dragon Hall's elite through the prison. Guards scatter.

HAN XIAO
(announcing)
Chen Yao. Your grandfather sent us.

ALL
(in unison)
Young Miss, we're taking you home.

INT. CELL - DAY

The FEMALE PRISONERS hear the shouts from outside and look up in terror. Behind them, Chen Yao's birthmark emits a sudden golden flash.

title: Love Ends
description: A man confronts his estranged wife in the rain, where her desperate plea for help reveals buried truths about their past, while their critically ill daughter's life hangs in the balance.
context:
Title: Love Ends
Description: A man confronts his estranged wife in the rain, where her desperate plea for help reveals buried truths about their past, while their critically ill daughter's life hangs in the balance.

EXT. ROAD IN THE RAIN - NIGHT

Torrential rain hammers the asphalt. A black Rolls-Royce cuts through the downpour, headlights catching a figure ahead.

YIN HUI sits collapsed on the roadside, drenched, her thin dress plastered to her frame. She shields her eyes against the blinding lights.

The Rolls-Royce stops inches from her. The passenger door opens.

A YAN emerges, immaculate in a tailored suit. A BODYGUARD immediately holds an umbrella over him, keeping the rain at bay.

A YAN pulls a thick envelope from his breast pocket. He fans the cash—hundreds, thousands—then lets the wind scatter them across the wet pavement.

A YAN
For your performance.

YIN HUI
(whispering)
A Yan...

A YAN
Get up. You're embarrassing yourself.

YIN HUI
(struggling to stand)
She's dying. Our daughter—

A YAN
(flinching at "our")
Don't.

YIN HUI
Please. Just one test. One DNA test. Yiyi is yours. She has your eyes, your—

A YAN
I said don't.
(beat)
Five years ago, you vanished. With my child inside you. Now you return with a dying daughter and a new story?

YIN HUI
It wasn't a story. Yao Qiaoqiao threatened—she had evidence that could ruin you. She forced me to leave, to sign those papers—

A YAN
(laughs, sharp and hollow)
Of course. The villainess. And the man you were photographed with?

YIN HUI
(voice breaking)
A friend. Only a friend who helped me hide. I kept our baby, A Yan. I kept her.

A YAN
And lost her. Just like you lost us.

He moves to leave. Yin Hui lunges forward, grasping his sleeve. The bodyguard tenses.

YIN HUI
If you ever loved me...

A YAN
(quietly, not turning)
That man died five years ago.

He shakes free. The car door closes. The Rolls-Royce melts into the darkness.

Yin Hui watches the taillights fade, then slowly, methodically, begins gathering the soaked bills from the pavement.

YIN HUI
(to herself)
Mommy has the deposit. Mommy's coming.
continuation:
INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - DAY

The specialized oncology ward is painfully bright. YIN HUI, now in clean but faded clothes, clutches a hospital admission form in one hand and the damp envelope in the other.

She approaches the CHARGE NURSE at the reception desk.

YIN HUI
The deposit. It's here. Fifty thousand. Please, can we start Yiyi's treatment?

The nurse scrolls through a tablet, expression neutral.

CHARGE NURSE
Yin Yi, room 403. Balance due: three hundred fifty thousand. Without full payment by end of day, they can't proceed with the marrow extraction.

YIN HUI
(desperately)
She'll be gone by then. The fever's consuming her.

CHARGE NURSE
(policy-weary)
I need to unbook the OR. There are other children.

The nurse turns away. Yin Hui stands frozen, the envelope trembling in her grip.

From down the corridor, a doctor's phone rings. He answers, listens, then looks directly at Yin Hui.

DOCTOR
(into phone)
Confirmed. We'll prepare transfer papers.

He hangs up, approaches Yin Hui. His professional mask slips, revealing something colder.

DOCTOR
You're Yin Hui? The mother?

YIN HUI
Yes—has something changed?

DOCTOR
Your daughter's being transferred to a private facility. Full coverage. Though God knows why anyone would invest in that outcome.

YIN HUI
(confused)
What? Who?

A hand clamps on her shoulder from behind—firm, immovable.

A YAN
(voice low)
I would.

Yin Hui whirls. A Yan stands there, no umbrella, no guards, just the raw aftermath of the storm in his eyes.

A YAN
(to Doctor)
Take her. Now.

The doctor nods, moving toward Yiyi's room. Yin Hui tries to follow, but A Yan's grip tightens—not cruel, but unyielding.

A YAN
She'll receive the best care. You and I have paperwork to settle.

YIN HUI
(struggling)
Let me go to her!

A YAN
(quietly fierce)
You wanted me to believe? Fine. But belief comes with a price. And you're going to pay it.

The doctor wheels a gurney past them. A small, frail form lies beneath sterile sheets. Yin Hui reaches out, fingers brushing the fabric as it passes.

A Yan watches her face—not with triumph, but with something that might be grief, might be vengeance, might be both.

He doesn't release her arm.

title: The Blind Young Master of a Wealthy Family Cannot Be Bullied
description: A blind massage therapist discovers his ex-wife's betrayal when he is humiliated by a wealthy hotel manager during what he thought would be a routine service call.
context:
Title: The Blind Young Master of a Wealthy Family Cannot Be Bullied
Description: A blind massage therapist discovers his ex-wife's betrayal when he is humiliated by a wealthy hotel manager during what he thought would be a routine service call.

INT. MASSAGE PARLOR HALLWAY - DAY

A hushed corridor lined with gilt-framed paintings. Potted palms cast long shadows across marble floors.

LIN YU (30s, composed, wearing sunglasses and a crisp white coat) taps his cane with practiced efficiency. A blue toolkit hangs from his shoulder, its leather worn from years of expert use. He trails his fingers along the wallpaper, not groping—memorizing.

INT. HOTEL ROOM - DAY

A luxury suite's living area. LIU TIANHAO (40, predatory grace) reclines on a velvet sofa, his silk shirt unbuttoned. LIU YIYI (28, brittle beauty) sits stiff beside him, her hand resting on his chest like a caged bird.

LIU TIANHAO
(subtitle: Wanhao Hotel General Manager Liu Tianhao)
Your blind ex-husband has a booking. Shall we make it memorable?

LIU TIANHAO
(low, intimate)
I've always wanted to see a man massage his own coffin.

LIU YIYI
(subtitle: Lin Yu's Ex-Wife Liu Yiyi)
(quietly)
Don't. Please.

LIU TIANHAO
(smiling)
Too late, my dear. The game's begun.

The door opens. LIN YU enters, stopping precisely three paces inside.

LIN YU
(subtitle: Massage Therapist Lin Yu)
Technician 66. I'm here for the deep tissue booking.

LIN YU
(handing over a card)
My certification includes sports rehabilitation and circulatory therapy.

LIU TIANHAO
(ignoring the card)
Wonderful. Start with my feet. While kneeling.

LIN YU
Sir, my service includes a portable table. I'll set it up—

LIU TIANHAO
continuation:
No. You misunderstand. This isn't a negotiation.

LIU TIANHAO
rises, circling Lin Yu like a shark.

LIU TIANHAO
(softly poisonous)
A blind masseur is a contradiction. You can't see what you're doing, and I can't trust what I can't see. So you'll work where I can observe you. On your knees.

LIN YU
I am a licensed therapist, not a servant. If you require a different—

LIU TIANHAO
You are whatever I pay you to be.

LIN YU's jaw tightens—a brief, controlled reaction. He reaches for his toolkit.

LIN YU
Then I'll arrange for another technician.

LIU YIYI
(studying her nails, voice strained)
He really is quite good, Tianhao. When he can focus.

LIN YU
freezes. His cane stops mid-tap.

LIU TIANHAO
(leaning close to Lin Yu's ear)
Focus now. She moans exactly like that when I touch her neck. Perhaps you taught her that.

LIU YIYI
(voice cracking)
You promised you'd only humiliate him. Not—

LIU TIANHAO
Not what? Not tell him he's been massaging his replacement's ego for six months?

LIU TIANHAO
(to Lin Yu)
Your ex-wife, Liu Yiyi, prefers my suite to your studio apartment. She says the lighting flatters her.

LIU YIYI
(turning away)
Lin Yu, I... it wasn't supposed to be like this.

LIN YU
(very quietly)
No. It never is.

title: The Young Healer Disciple
description: A young herbalist is seduced by his senior brother's widow when he comes to deliver medicine.
context:
Title: The Young Healer Disciple
Description: A young herbalist is seduced by his senior brother's widow when he comes to deliver medicine.

INT. BEDROOM - DAY

JIN LIANZI (32) wears a faded red robe, sits by the window, lost in grief.

HUANG XIAOYAO (19) enters with herbs, stops short, surprised.

HUANG XIAOYAO
Sister-in-law? The shop was closed—

JIN LIANZI rises, looks at him, walks toward him with measured steps.

JIN LIANZI
Three years today. Since Meng Sheng left.

HUANG XIAOYAO
Sister-in-law, the medicine.

HUANG XIAOYAO hands it over. JIN LIANZI takes it, sets it aside, her fingers brushing his.

HUANG XIAOYAO
(flustered)
I should go. Xiao Lian expects me.

JIN LIANZI
You've become the man he dreamed. While I've been alone. Watching.

JIN LIANZI steps closer. HUANG XIAOYAO stands firm, torn.

JIN LIANZI
(soft)
The village whispers about this widow. They're right. I'm hungry.

JIN LIANZI suddenly embraces him—desperate, not seductive.

HUANG XIAOYAO
(startled)
Sister-in-law, please...

JIN LIANZI
(whispered)
Just hold me. Pretend he's here.
continuation:
HUANG XIAOYAO
(struggling)
I can't. I'm not his ghost.

JIN LIANZI kisses him—grief, not lust. He doesn't yield, but doesn't push her away.

JIN LIANZI
(broken)
Teach me to feel alive again.

Her hands tremble on his robes. He gently pries them off.

HUANG XIAOYAO
(quiet strength)
He asked me to care for you. Better than this.

JIN LIANZI
(laugh that becomes a sob)
That girl is blessed.

She lunges again—a collapse. He catches her.

JIN LIANZI
(whispered in his ear)
I'm afraid I'll forget his face.

HUANG XIAOYAO
(soft)
Let me help you remember. Properly.

He guides her to sit, places the medicine in her hands.

HUANG XIAOYAO
These calm the heart. I'll come daily. As family.

JIN LIANZI's face shows pain crumble into relief.

JIN LIANZI
(voice breaking)
Don't leave me.

HUANG XIAOYAO
I'm here. Not as him. As me.

He sits beside her, a healing hand on her shoulder. Grief shared is grief halved.

title: The Paranoid Wife of the Obsessed CEO Gu
description: A pregnant woman fleeing in the rain gives birth, only to be accused by her husband of murder and adultery, leading to her arrest.
context:
Title: The Paranoid Wife of the Obsessed CEO Gu
Description: A pregnant woman fleeing in the rain gives birth, only to be accused by her husband of murder and adultery, leading to her arrest.

EXT. HIGHWAY - NIGHT

Rain slashes across the asphalt. JING YAN (28, drenched hospital gown, bleeding leg wound) stumbles along the shoulder, clutching her belly.

A taxi emerges through the downpour. Jingyan waves frantically, nearly collapsing in its path.

INT. TAXI - NIGHT

JING YAN sprawls in the back seat, water pooling beneath her.

JING YAN
(gasping)
Hospital... please—

The taxi accelerates into the night.

ONE WEEK LATER

INT. LIVING ROOM - DAY

JING YAN lies on the sofa, pale but smiling down at a bassinet. Afternoon light filters softly.

The door opens. GU SHEN (35, tailored suit, dark circles under his eyes) enters with two BODYGUARDS. He freezes at the sight.

JING YAN
(gently)
Gu Shen... come see her.

GU SHEN's expression hardens. He pulls a document from inside his jacket.

GU SHEN
(cold)
The DNA results came back.
continuation:
JING YAN
(quietly)
What?

GU SHEN
She's not mine.

JING YAN
(confused)
What are you—

GU SHEN
(to bodyguards)
Take her.

JING YAN
(panicked)
Gu Shen, wait—

GU SHEN
(furious)
Xinyi died from an overdose. Your prescription. Your handwriting. And this child...

His voice cracks slightly, eyes not leaving the baby.

GU SHEN
...isn't mine. Detectives are downstairs.

The bodyguards lift JING YAN from the sofa. She struggles weakly.

JING YAN
(desperate)
Please... just look at her—

GU SHEN turns away, his expression unreadable. The BABY begins to CRY.

GU SHEN remains motionless, his eyes closed.

title: Love Found Around the Corner
description: A wealthy CEO finally gets his chance when the woman he has loved for three years breaks off her engagement and begins searching for a husband.
context:
Title: Love Found Around the Corner
Description: A wealthy CEO finally gets his chance when the woman he has loved for three years breaks off her engagement and begins searching for a husband.

EXT. PARK PATH - DAY

A black Rolls-Royce stops by the roadside, the Spirit of Ecstasy hood ornament slowly rising. YE NANXI, in a suit and tie, gets out of the back seat, his ASSISTANT following behind.

ON SCREEN: YE NANXI, CEO OF SHENGSHI GROUP

ASSISTANT
She's been at the matchmaking event for an hour. Three rejections so far.

YE NANXI
Has she spoken to anyone?

ASSISTANT
Only to turn them down.

EXT. CIVIL AFFAIRS BUREAU MARRIAGE REGISTRATION OFFICE - DAY

A banner reads "ELITE SINGLES MATCHING EVENT." SU AN, wearing a white wedding dress, offers a card to a man on his phone.

ON SCREEN: SU AN, MISS OF THE SU FAMILY

SU AN
Su An. 25. Seeking marriage.

MAN ON PHONE
(impatiently)
With your scandal? Don't waste my time.

The man swats the card away. Papers flutter. SU AN's expression hardens—pride, not fragility.

EXT. PARK PATH - DAY

YE NANXI (V.O.)
Three years I've waited. Watched him destroy her piece by piece. Today, she stopped letting him.

ASSISTANT
Young Master, the board will say she's—

YE NANXI
(sternly)
She survived alone. What does that make us?
continuation:
EXT. OUTSIDE CIVIL AFFAIRS BUREAU - DAY

SU AN crouches on the ground, picking up the scattered cards. Her fingers brush a locket at her throat.

SU AN (V.O.)
Mom's inheritance or my freedom. Same thing now.

SU AN
(quietly)
Keep going. Always keep going.

YE NANXI walks over and crouches down to pick up a card.

YE NANXI
(reading the flyer)
"Must value loyalty above all."

SU AN looks up and sees YE NANXI. She freezes—recognition flickering.

SU AN (V.O.)
Those eyes. I've seen them in business journals.

YE NANXI
You're looking in the wrong place.

SU AN
And you're the right one?

YE NANXI
I don't scare easy.

SU AN
(simultaneously)
Got your ID?

YE NANXI
(smiling)
And the rings.

SU AN
(taking out a marriage certificate)
Express appointment. My treat.

YE NANXI
(smiling)
Su An, this time I'm not letting you escape.

The two walk out of the Civil Affairs Bureau holding red marriage certificates.

YE NANXI
One more signature needed.

SU AN
Where?

YE NANXI
What, are you scared?

SU AN
In broad daylight, you can't possibly sell me off, can you?

YE NANXI takes SU AN's hand and leads her toward the Rolls-Royce, opening the car door for her.

INT. MANSION MAIN HALL - DAY

YE NANXI leads SU AN into a magnificent, luxurious mansion. A row of MAIDS bow in unison.

MAIDS
(in unison)
Welcome home, Young Master. Welcome home, Young Madam.

SU AN stares at everything before her—not in shock, but with sudden understanding. Her fingers tighten on the marriage certificate.

SU AN (V.O.)
So this is what three years of patience buys you. A throne. Good thing I brought my own crown.

title: Wife's Return
description: A woman fights for survival while her estranged husband races to save her, forcing both to confront the cost of their choices.
context:
Title: Wife's Return
Description: A woman fights for survival while her estranged husband races to save her, forcing both to confront the cost of their choices.

INT. WAREHOUSE - NIGHT

SU MO, 26, kneels in a torn gold dress, suspended by chains. She forces shallow breaths, scanning the warehouse.

ASSISTANT (V.O.)
(phone filter)
Tracker confirms Chenglin warehouse. But sir, Mrs. Huo—

HUO SIHAN (V.O.)
(phone filter)
She knew the risks.

A WHIP cracks across Su Mo's back. She chokes back a scream.

The KIDNAPPER, 40s, checks his phone.

KIDNAPPER
Your husband's not responding. Maybe I need to be more persuasive.

SU MO
(strained)
He won't pay. We're separated. Bad intel.

KIDNAPPER
(showing screen)
This says Mrs. Huo. This says two million pending.

SU MO
(desperate)
Not his money. Please, I can explain—

KIDNAPPER
Wrong answer.

He raises the whip.

EXT. HIGHWAY - NIGHT

Rain pelts the road. A white sports car weaves through traffic.

INT. SPORTS CAR - NIGHT

HUO SIHAN, 32, watches Su Mo's location pulse on his phone. His jaw is tight.

The ASSISTANT balances a tablet.

ASSISTANT
Company funds are ready, but the prenup—paying legally validates the marriage.

HUO SIHAN
Use the offshore account. Not mine.

DRIVER
Seventeen minutes out. Police are slower.

HUO SIHAN
Drive faster.
continuation:
INT. WAREHOUSE - NIGHT

Su Mo's head lolls. She counts silently, eyes tracking exits.

KIDNAPPER
(into phone)
You guaranteed he'd pay.

SU MO
(whisper)
Huo Sihan... don't.

KIDNAPPER
Rich bitches always think you're special.

SU MO
(looking up)
I was leaving him. That's why he—

CRACK. The whip again.

INT. SPORTS CAR - NIGHT

Red brake lights fill the windshield. The Driver hits the horn.

DRIVER
Accident ahead. Detour?

Huo Sihan checks the map—five minutes out.

HUO SIHAN
Take the shoulder.

DRIVER
Sir—

HUO SIHAN
Now.

INT. WAREHOUSE - NIGHT

Su Mo spits blood, defiant.

SU MO
Wrong account. The two million is mine. Pre-marriage.

The Kidnapper freezes, rechecks his screen.

SU MO
He's not coming.

The Kidnapper's face hardens.

KIDNAPPER
Then you're dead.

He draws a knife. Su Mo's breath catches.

INT. SPORTS CAR - NIGHT

Huo Sihan's phone BUZZES. A text from Su Mo: "Don't come."

He stares. Then locks the screen.

HUO SIHAN
South entrance. Go dark.

DRIVER
Yes sir.

The car veers off-road.

INT. WAREHOUSE - NIGHT

The knife glints. Su Mo shuts her eyes—

A SHOT rings out. The knife hits concrete.

HUO SIHAN (O.S.)
She's not dead yet.

The Kidnapper whirls. Huo Sihan stands in the doorframe, weapon raised, rain-soaked.

SU MO
(barely breathing)
You shouldn't have.

Huo Sihan's eyes stay on the Kidnapper.

HUO SIHAN
We need to talk.

ON SCREEN: TO BE CONTINUED

title: Mr. Fu Still Has Lingering Feelings
description: A woman diagnosed with terminal lung cancer seeks closure with her estranged husband, only to be confronted by her best friend who has become his mistress.
context:
Title: Mr. Fu Still Has Lingering Feelings
Description: A woman diagnosed with terminal lung cancer seeks closure with her estranged husband, only to be confronted by her best friend who has become his mistress.

INT. HOSPITAL CONSULTATION ROOM - DAY

LIN WANWAN sits across from the DOCTOR, staring at the scan images. Her fingers trace the shadow on her lung.

DOCTOR
The biopsy confirms stage four. It's metastasized.

LIN WANWAN
(quietly)
Treatment options?

DOCTOR
Palliative care. We can manage pain, but...

The Doctor slides a pamphlet across the desk. Wanwan doesn't touch it.

LIN WANWAN
Timeline?

DOCTOR
Four to six months. Maybe less.

EXT. SEASIDE - DAY

LIN WANWAN stands alone by the crashing waves, her phone glowing in her hand. She dials. One ring. Two.

FU SHIQIAN (V.O.)
(recorded voice)
You've reached Fu Shiqian. Leave a message.

The call disconnects. Wanwan's thumb hovers over the keypad, then types: "At the cove. Remember?"

She hits send. No reply.

LIN WANWAN (V.O.)
We always said this is where we'd say goodbye.

WANWAN turns toward the tide pools where they once collected sea glass.

FLASHBACK:

EXT. SEASIDE COVE - DAY (PAST)

Young FU SHIQIAN, soaked to the knees, holds up a piece of sea glass smoothed by the waves.

FU SHIQIAN
Found it. Just like you—rough edges worn beautiful.

He places the glass in YOUNG WANWAN's palm, not a ring box. His hands cover hers.

FU SHIQIAN
Promise we'll come back here. No matter what.

YOUNG WANWAN
Promise.

They clasp hands, the glass cutting slightly between their palms.

END FLASHBACK.
continuation:
EXT. SEASIDE - DAY

WANWAN opens her palm. The same sea glass, now dull and cloudy, rests there. She lets it fall into the water.

YE SHENGER (O.S.)
You shouldn't be here alone.

WANWAN turns. YE SHENGER stands twenty feet away, wind whipping her designer coat. Not angry—exhausted.

LIN WANWAN
How did you—

YE SHENGER
(shrugs)
Shared location. From his phone. He didn't even notice when I borrowed it.

LIN WANWAN
You borrowed it. Or you took it?

YE SHENGER
Does it matter? You're the one trespassing.

LIN WANWAN
This was our place.

YE SHENGER
(walking closer)
Was. Just like the company shares were yours. Just like the house was yours. Everything was yours.

She stops near the water's edge. The waves splash her heels.

YE SHENGER
(quietly)
You left, Wanwan. You retreated into that silent, sick house for two years. Did you think he'd wait forever?

LIN WANWAN
You were my friend.

YE SHENGER
I was your assistant. Your confidante. The one who read your medical reports when you were too scared to open them.

Wanwan's face goes pale.

LIN WANWAN
You knew?

YE SHENGER
About the recurrence? Yes. Three months ago. About the divorce papers you drafted but never served? Yes.

She pulls a folded document from her bag—Wanwan's unsigned petition.

YE SHENGER
You were already letting him go. I'm just making it official.

LIN WANWAN
(snatches it away)
This isn't about him. This is about us.

YE SHENGER
There is no us. There's survival.

She grabs WANWAN's wrist, her grip tight but not violent. The sea glass cuts into their palms again.

YE SHENGER
You think dying makes you noble? It makes you reckless.

In the distance, FU SHIQIAN's car screeches to a halt. He runs toward them, phone in hand.

FU SHIQIAN
(shouting)
Shenger! Let go!

YE SHENGER
(whispering to Wanwan)
You want closure? Let's see what he chooses.

She twists, pulling Wanwan toward the water's edge. A large wave crashes over them both.

YE SHENGER
(calling out)
Shiqian!

FU SHIQIAN
(shouting in terror)
No!

title: Mr. Ming, Your Wife Only Sees You as a Substitute - Episode 1
description: A bride is publicly accused at her wedding of being a murderer by her groom, who reveals himself to be the brother of her deceased former lover.
context:
Title: Mr. Ming, Your Wife Only Sees You as a Substitute - Episode 1
Description: A bride is publicly accused at her wedding of being a murderer by her groom, who reveals himself to be the brother of her deceased former lover.

INT. DRESSING ROOM - DAY

FU XIN wears a wedding dress, smiling at her reflection. MING HAO appears behind her.

MING HAO
Hello.

FU XIN
(startled)
You shouldn't—

MING HAO
See you soon. Save your surprise for the altar.

He exits. Her smile fades.

EXT. WEDDING VENUE - DAY

A sunny lawn wedding venue. Guests murmur expectantly.

OFFICIANT
Miss Fu Xin, do you take Mr. Ming Hao to be your husband?

FU XIN
(happily)
I do.

OFFICIANT
Mr. Ming Hao, do you take Miss Fu Xin to be your wife?

MING HAO
(quietly)
I do not.

The crowd gasps. FU XIN's face drains of color.

MING HAO
(loudly)
I have an announcement!
continuation:
A funeral wreath crashes at the altar. FU XIN stares, frozen.

CHEN MEILING and SUN WEIWEI arrive with bodyguards. CHEN MEILING holds a memorial portrait of GU TONG.

FU XIN
(whispering)
Aunt Chen?

CHEN MEILING
(trembling with rage)
She burned my son for our fortune!

MING HAO
(to Fu Xin)
Today's the anniversary. You remember, don't you?

SUN WEIWEI
Sister. You haven't forgotten Brother Gu Tong's death day?

FU XIN
(in disbelief)
You're his brother? The one who disappeared after—

MING HAO
(slams lectern)
Don't you dare speak his name. That fire was no accident.

FU XIN
(voice breaking)
I never meant—

CHEN MEILING rushes forward and slaps FU XIN. FU XIN falls, veil tearing.

CHEN MEILING
(crying out)
He died fetching your birthday gift!

FU XIN
(on the ground, trembling)
It was an engagement ring. I wanted—

MING HAO
(coldly)
You gave us a cremation instead.

title: Impostor Goddess
description: A novelist celebrating her book publication discovers a glowing copy of her own novel in a restroom and is mysteriously transported into the world of her story.
context:
Title: Impostor Goddess
Description: A novelist celebrating her book publication discovers a glowing copy of her own novel in a restroom and is mysteriously transported into the world of her story.

EXT. ROOFTOP - NIGHT

City night view, tall buildings everywhere, lights shining brightly.

A group of friends are having a party on the rooftop, celebrating XIE WANQING's novel publication.

FRIEND A
Let's toast to our Wanqing, the great author, for her novel publication, cheers!

EVERYONE
Cheers!

Everyone raises their glasses and drinks them down.

FRIEND B
I wish your novel becomes a bestseller.

XIE WANQING
A bestseller.

FRIEND B
It will definitely be a bestseller.

XIE WANQING drinks, appearing somewhat tipsy. She continues drinking and celebrating with her friends.

After a while, XIE WANQING feels a bit dizzy and stands up.

XIE WANQING
I'm going to the restroom first. You guys keep drinking, I'll be right back.

XIE WANQING walks somewhat unsteadily.

FRIEND C
Are you okay?

XIE WANQING
I'm fine, fine, fine.

FRIEND D
Don't drink too much.

XIE WANQING
I'm fine.

XIE WANQING leaves the party alone.
continuation:
INT. RESTROOM - NIGHT

XIE WANQING enters the restroom, tidies up her appearance in the mirror, then walks to the sink to wash her hands.

She fixes her hair and turns to leave when she notices a glowing book on the floor.

Curious, she walks over and crouches down to pick up the book.

The cover has her name written on it: "XIE WANQING."

XIE WANQING
(to herself)
How is my book here?

She opens the book. Golden text floats around her, all plot points and character names from her novel, such as "Male Lead: BAI SHAN," "Female Lead: LUO XI."

A flash of white light appears, and XIE WANQING disappears.

INT. UNKNOWN LOCATION - DAY

Two men's shadows are projected on the wall. One of them is on the phone.

MAN A (V.O.)
Alright, we don't need to discuss this anymore.

MAN A (V.O.)
By the way, is there any news about her?

INT. INDOOR SWIMMING POOL - DAY

A woman in a white dress (looking identical to XIE WANQING) struggles in the pool, about to drown.

DROWNING WOMAN
Ah!

A man (BAI SHAN) quickly jumps into the water and swims toward the drowning woman.

BAI SHAN rescues the woman and brings her to the poolside, laying her flat.

He immediately performs CPR and mouth-to-mouth resuscitation on the woman.

As he performs mouth-to-mouth resuscitation, a golden light flashes.

FADE OUT.

title: Rejuvenation
description: A man afflicted with premature aging awakens from a three-year coma to protect his devoted wife who sacrificed everything for him.
context:
Title: Rejuvenation
Description: A man afflicted with premature aging awakens from a three-year coma to protect his devoted wife who sacrificed everything for him.

INT. ANCIENT STYLE COURTYARD - DAY

A classical courtyard dusted with snow. NING CHEN (30s, but appears 80: frail, white hair, weathered skin) sits motionless in a wheelchair. Behind him, his wife SU LAN (28, elegant, tired eyes) adjusts his blanket.

A COUPLE passes the pavilion, slowing at the sight.

PASSERBY WOMAN
(to Su Lan)
Your father? How wonderful you take him out.

SU LAN
My husband.

The couple's smile fades. They glance at Ning Chen, then quickly away.

PASSERBY MAN
We... see. Enjoy your day.

They retreat, their whispers just audible.

PASSERBY WOMAN
(O.S., hushed)
Must be the money. Why else?

SU LAN's knuckles whiten on the wheelchair handles. She kneels beside Ning Chen, pouring tea with trembling hands.

SU LAN
(softly)
I remember my grandfather's words. "A man of destiny." When our families arranged our meeting, I saw your portrait. You were... you.

She takes his gnarled hand—contrasting sharply with her smooth skin.

SU LAN
The Zhao family has a trial drug. Experimental. They say it could... reverse this.

Her voice cracks. She touches her stomach, a reflexive, protective gesture.

SU LAN
They need a test case. And I need a guarantee. So I made a bargain. A marriage contract.

A single tear falls on their clasped hands.

SU LAN
(whispering)
I'm sorry, Ning Chen. I can't watch you die.

She kisses his forehead and leaves, shoulders shaking. The JADE PENDANT on Ning Chen's chest flickers—once, twice—then floods with golden light. Energy pulses into him.

His fingers twitch.

FLASHBACK
continuation:
INT. WEDDING CHAPEL - DAY (THREE YEARS EARLIER)

Young, radiant NING CHEN (30, striking) and SU LAN in white satin exchange vows. SU HAO (60s, Su Lan's father) and her MOTHER watch, beaming.

The sky outside darkens in seconds—not clouds, but a rent in reality itself. Black energy bleeds through.

Ning Chen's hand flashes with an ancient, glowing rune. It fractures.

NING CHEN
(anguished)
The Five Decays...

He grips Su Lan's hand, desperate.

NING CHEN
Wait for me. However long.

He forces himself to release her and sprints toward the darkness. Lightning screams through the chapel windows. Su Lan collapses, clutching her abdomen. Her parents catch her as the world strobes black and white.

END FLASHBACK

INT. ANCIENT STYLE COURTYARD - DAY

Ning Chen's eyes snap open. Clear. Focused. Gone is the fog of three years.

His gaze falls on the pendant. Memories flicker behind his eyes—not his own, but images the jade absorbed: Su Lan reading to him, defending him from whispers, signing papers in a cold office.

NING CHEN (V.O.)
Three years as a prisoner in my own body. Three years she fought alone. The jade kept my spirit anchored. Now...

Ning Chen's jaw tightens. His old hands clench into fists.

NING CHEN (V.O.)
...it's her turn to rest.

INT. SONG FAMILY BEDROOM - DAY

Dim light. SONG WANYUE (20s) feeds medicine to her grandfather, SONG WANSHAN (80s, frail). A set of BRONZE WIND CHIMES suddenly vibrates—no wind, just a pure, resonant tone. Golden light shimmers across them.

SONG WANSHAN
(breathless)
He's... returned. The flow has shifted.

He clutches his own glowing wrist, eyes wide with hope and fear.

SONG WANSHAN
(urgent)
Jiang City. Find him before the others do.

INT. ANCIENT STYLE COURTYARD - DAY

Two SU FAMILY SERVANTS approach Ning Chen's wheelchair.

SU FAMILY SERVANT 1
Still breathing? Figured he'd be gone by now.

SU FAMILY SERVANT 2
Miss Su got the Zhao medicine, didn't she?

SU FAMILY SERVANT 1
"Medicine." More like poison. Untested. Young Master Zhao's been clear—if this old fossil dies, it's just data.

Servant 1 lifts an incense burner, angling it over Ning Chen's lap.

SU FAMILY SERVANT 2
Don't. If Miss Su sees—

SU FAMILY SERVANT 1
She's busy signing her life away. And who here sees him as anything but a corpse we're babysitting?

SERVANT 1 tilts the burner. A hand shoots up—gnarled but impossibly strong—gripping his wrist.

NING CHEN
(hoarse, cold)
A corpse... doesn't feel disrespect.

Ning Chen rises, lifting Servant 1 by the throat. The old man's body stands straight, years melting from his posture if not his skin. Energy crackles around him—not golden now, but raw and invisible. A pressure that hums.

The incense burner crashes to the stones.

NING CHEN
You were saying?

title: Her Son Was Targeted by the Boss
description: A woman scorned by her cheating fiancé seeks revenge at a bar, leading to a fateful encounter with a powerful man from her fiancé's own family.
context:
Title: Her Son Was Targeted by the Boss
Description: A woman scorned by her cheating fiancé seeks revenge at a bar, leading to a fateful encounter with a powerful man from her fiancé's own family.

INT. BAR - NIGHT

QIAO JING (eldest daughter of the Qiao family) sits at the bar, her phone screen showing Yan Xuan's betrayal. She drains her martini.

QIAO JING (V.O.)
Three years. A text message. "Sorry, things changed." Watch what change looks like, Yan Xuan.

A SLEAZY MAN approaches.

SLEAZY MAN
Beautiful lady, let me erase your ex for you.

QIAO JING
You're not my type.

SLEAZY MAN
(grabbing her wrist)
Let me change your mind—

YAN QIN (head of the Yan family) appears, gripping the man's wrist.

SLEAZY MAN
(terrified)
Fourth Master Yan...

YAN QIN
Disappear.

The Sleazy Man flees.

QIAO JING studies YAN QIN through her drunken haze, then drapes her arms over his shoulders.

YAN QIN
You're playing with fire.

QIAO JING
I came here to burn it all down.

She kisses him. His hand finds her waist. He doesn't pull away.
continuation:
INT. HOTEL ROOM - NIGHT

The door slams. Silk shimmers to the floor. YAN QIN and QIAO JING tumble onto the bed.

INT. HOTEL LOBBY - NIGHT

QIAO WU (second daughter of the Qiao family) strides in, YAN XUAN following.

QIAO WU
(consulting phone)
Room 1808. She's so predictably desperate.

YAN XUAN
(furious)
If she's with someone—

QIAO WU (V.O.)
Then you'll need a new fiancée. Someone loyal. Someone who knows family secrets.

She pockets her phone.

INT. HOTEL ROOM - NIGHT

QIAO JING straddles YAN QIN on the bed, her fingers tracing his scar.

YAN QIN
You know who I am?

QIAO JING
(laughing)
Your nephew's ex-fiancée. The one he fears.

YAN QIN
Are you sure?

QIAO JING
Wasn't yesterday.

She kisses his scar.

INT. HOTEL CORRIDOR - NIGHT

QIAO WU and YAN XUAN stop at Room 1808. YAN XUAN's hand trembles on the handle.

YAN XUAN
(venomous)
This ends tonight.

QIAO WU
For her, yes.

He throws the door open. Inside: empty champagne bottles, a silk tie monogrammed YQ, the bed still warm. The window drapes billow. Empty.

YAN XUAN
Where—

QIAO WU checks her phone. A new message: "With Fourth Master. Safe."

She stares at the tie. Her smile vanishes.

QIAO WU
(whisper)
You stupid girl.

ON SCREEN: THE END

title: Supreme God Emperor
description: When four evil gods threaten to destroy Yunzhou City and annihilate the Great Xia people, the legendary God Emperor Xiao Yu emerges from his statue to defend his land and people with ancient divine weapons.
context:
Title: Supreme God Emperor
Description: When four evil gods threaten to destroy Yunzhou City and annihilate the Great Xia people, the legendary God Emperor Xiao Yu emerges from his statue to defend his land and people with ancient divine weapons.

INT. YUNZHOU CITY PLAZA - NIGHT

Under a crimson sky, lightning tears through darkness. The God Emperor statue stands in a rubble-strewn plaza, its gold leaf peeling.

TEXT ON SCREEN: Great Xia, Yunzhou
