The Four Evil Gods—DEMON EMPEROR TUNTIA N, DEMON WITCH SHEMEI, DEMON MONK WUXIN, and DEMON KING GUIYU—appear as phantoms, radiating evil energy. In the plaza, two dozen SURVIVORS kneel. Among them, MEI (8) clutches a jade amulet.

DEMON EMPEROR TUNTIA N
Yunzhou's walls are dust. Once these last embers die, Great Xia's heart is next.

DEMON WITCH SHEMEI
We will annihilate the Great Xia people, destroy their nation and exterminate their race!

DEMON MONK WUXIN
(laughing maniacally)
The tender taste of hope...

DEMON KING GUIYU
(silent, raises spined fist)

Mei's GRANDFATHER whispers to her.

GRANDFATHER
The amulet holds his blood. Believe, child.

Mei looks at the statue, its eyes dark.

MEI
God Emperor... please wake up.

Other survivors take up her cry, voices ragged.

SURVIVORS
God Emperor, manifest!

DEMON WITCH SHEMEI
(laughing contemptuously)
A broken statue can't save you.

DEMON EMPEROR TUNTIA N
(raising hand)
Then let oblivion take you.

Four beams of light descend. The FOUR HEAVENLY KINGS materialize—scarred, armor scorched.

VERMILLION BIRD KING
For Yunzhou!

They charge. Magic erupts—sacred flames meet black lightning. The Kings fight as one, pushing demons back. But Wuxin's jaws unhinge, swallowing fire. Guiyu's shell turns blades. Shemei's laughter rusts steel.

One by one, the Kings fall—each blow meant for survivors.
continuation:
DEMON EMPEROR TUNTIA N
(crumpling the last King's throat)
Ants in god's clothing.

Mei's amulet BLINDS—a drop of blood evaporates into golden smoke that races to the statue. Its eyes IGNITE. Stone shatters.

XIAO YU emerges in white robes, divine majesty warring with exhaustion. He steadies himself.

DEMON WITCH SHEMEI
(shocked)
The sleep was eternal!

FALLEN KING
(bloodied, grinning)
She... believed...

XIAO YU
(quiet, building)
One child's voice... cuts through stone.

He looks at Mei—she doesn't flinch.

XIAO YU
You invaded my land. Shattered my guardians. For this...

A dragon roars. The XUANYUAN SWORD flies into his hand.

DEMON EMPEROR TUNTIA N
(gathering shadows)
You're a ghost! The Ten Artifacts are myth!

XIAO YU
Then let myths haunt you.

Around the plaza, NINE spectral Artifacts flicker—power awakening.

XIAO YU
One blow. With what strength I've reclaimed.

He swings. Sword energy streaks, remembering every death. The demons SCREAM as light unwrites them.

Xiao Yu drops to one knee—exhausted. He looks at Mei.

XIAO YU
(breathing hard)
The Ten are not yet mine. I... am not what I was.

He stands, leaning on the sword.

XIAO YU
But I am here.

He touches the statue's base. Golden light spreads—rebuilding.

FADE OUT.

title: Days to Come
description: A wealthy businessman returns to his homeland and encounters his former love, now working as a cleaner, who no longer remembers him.
context:
Title: Days to Come
Description: A wealthy businessman returns to his homeland and encounters his former love, now working as a cleaner, who no longer remembers him.

INT. LUXURY CAR - DAY

BO FENGFENG, in a sharp suit and gold-rimmed glasses, stares out the window. SHEN RUOYI, elegant and watchful, sits beside him.

BO FENGFENG
Finally back home.

SHEN RUOYI
Fengfeng, where are we going?

BO FENGFENG
I bought a house here.

EXT. SU FAMILY VILLA - DAY

A black luxury car drives toward a restored mansion.

INT. LUXURY CAR - DAY

SHEN RUOYI sees the villa and tenses.

SHEN RUOYI
The Su family estate?

FLASHBACK:

EXT. BURNING VILLA - NIGHT

Flames consume the mansion. YOUNG BO FENGFENG, desperate, carries an unconscious woman in white (SU QIANQIAN) through smoke.

END FLASHBACK.

SHEN RUOYI
You still can't forget her, can you?

BO FENGFENG
(reminiscing)
Five years ago, after I made my first fortune, I bought this place.

BO FENGFENG
To remind myself what happened here.

SHEN RUOYI
(inner monologue)
Remind yourself... or keep her close?

SHEN RUOYI
(plaintively)
Fengfeng, why can't you look at me?

BO FENGFENG
I'll have the driver take you to the hotel. The banquet's in three days.

SHEN RUOYI takes out a medicine bottle and hands it to BO FENGFENG.

SHEN RUOYI
Your health just recovered. Don't stop taking this.

BO FENGFENG
Okay.

BO FENGFENG gets out.
continuation:
EXT. VILLA ENTRANCE - DAY

BO FENGFENG adjusts his suit, looking up at the mansion.

FLASHBACK:

EXT. SNOWY FIELD - NIGHT (5 YEARS AGO)

Young BO FENGFENG in a white suit kneels in snow, holding a ring box to SU QIANQIAN, radiant in a winter coat.

BO FENGFENG (V.O.)
Qianqian...

SU QIANQIAN
(turning away)
Don't, Bo. You can't even pay my father's debts. What life can you give me?

EXT. BURNING VILLA - NIGHT (5 YEARS AGO)

The villa erupts in flames. BO FENGFENG charges toward it as SHEN RUOYI shouts.

SHEN RUOYI
Fengfeng!

INT. BURNING VILLA - NIGHT (5 YEARS AGO)

BO FENGFENG finds unconscious SU QIANQIAN, picks her up.

BO FENGFENG
Qianqian, stay with me. I'm getting you out.

He carries her out as glass shatters behind them.

INT. HOSPITAL ROOM - DAY (5 YEARS AGO)

BO FENGFENG wakes with bandaged hands. SHEN RUOYI sits nearby, her own hands bandaged.

BO FENGFENG
Qianqian?

SHEN RUOYI
She's alive. She asked me to tell you something.

BO FENGFENG
What?

SHEN RUOYI
(eyes down)
She said... don't come looking. She doesn't need rescuing.

BO FENGFENG lowers his head. Shen's grip tightens on her own bandages.

END FLASHBACK.

EXT. VILLA ENTRANCE - DAY

Five years later.

BO FENGFENG and a BUTLER walk toward the steps.

INT. VILLA - DAY

Two MAIDS polish the grand staircase.

MAID A
I heard Mr. Bo rebuilt everything exactly as it was. Down to the wallpaper.

MAID B
They say he keeps one room locked. No one's allowed inside.

SU QIANQIAN, in cleaning clothes with worn hands, mops the marble floor, concentrated.

The CLEANING SUPERVISOR approaches.

CLEANING SUPERVISOR
You're on the foyer? Mr. Bo's early. Finish within the hour.

SU QIANQIAN
Okay.

INT. VILLA FOYER - DAY (MOMENTS LATER)

BO FENGFENG enters, stopping short of the wet floor.

SU QIANQIAN
(panicked)
Sorry—I'll move—

She looks up. Their eyes meet. Bo's breath catches. Qianqian's forehead creases with vague recognition.

BO FENGFENG
Qianqian... what are you doing here?

SU QIANQIAN
You know me?

BO FENGFENG
(soft laugh, bitter)
So you really don't remember.

SU QIANQIAN
(cautious)
I think you have the wrong person. I'm just staff.

SU QIANQIAN stands to leave. BO FENGFENG blocks her path.

BO FENGFENG
(low)
Stay.

Qianqian freezes. They stand inches apart.

SU QIANQIAN
(voice small)
Why does your voice sound like tears?

BO FENGFENG
Because I've been waiting five years to ask you a question.

BO FENGFENG opens a door—the one the maids mentioned.

BO FENGFENG
After you see what's inside, you can decide if I'm a stranger.

SU QIANQIAN
(hesitant)
What's in there?

BO FENGFENG
The truth about who you were. And who we were.

He holds out his bandaged hand—the fire scars visible. Qianqian stares at it, something flickering in her eyes.

title: Rise from Humble Beginnings
description: A modern poetry champion finds himself transported to ancient times after a mysterious earthquake, waking up bound in a woodshed far from his former life of luxury.
context:
Title: Rise from Humble Beginnings
Description: A modern poetry champion finds himself transported to ancient times after a mysterious earthquake, waking up bound in a woodshed far from his former life of luxury.

INT. MODERN LOFT - NIGHT

Candlelight flickers. GU QING is tied to a chair with silk rope, smiling.

ZHANG XIAOMAN (V.O.)
Brother Gu Qing, you're so predictable when you win.

ZHANG XIAOMAN, wearing a black silk dress, walks up to GU QING.

ZHANG XIAOMAN
This year's Poetry Competition. First place. Again.

GU QING
(smiling proudly)
Winning is a habit. Understanding the price—that's the art.

LI SHISHI, wearing a red dress, approaches from behind and rests her hands on GU QING's shoulders.

GU QING
Soon you'll find out that I'm even better in other ways.

LI SHISHI
Brother Qing, you're playing a dangerous game.

ZHANG XIAOMAN sits on GU QING's lap. The three share a charged moment.

GU QING
You're both afraid of the silence after the applause.

LI SHISHI
Then show us there's nothing to fear.

GU QING
What? Can't wait already?

ZHANG XIAOMAN
The great poet has been working all day. We should help you... relax properly.

Suddenly, the room SHAKES. The floor SPLITS with a glowing seam.

GU QING
(panicking)
What the hell?

The chair TIPS backward. He VANISHES into the light.
continuation:
EXT. DALIANG CAPITAL CITY - DAY

Majestic ancient city gates. Soldiers ride horses beneath poetry banners.

INT. WOODSHED - DAY

GU QING, now wearing ancient clothing, is tied to a chair with rough hemp rope. He wakes up with a start.

GU QING
(shouting)
Xiaoman! Shishi! The floor—!

He looks around and realizes the environment has completely changed. Two men in ancient clothing enter: a bald, scarred man named ZHANG LONG and his HENCHMAN.

HENCHMAN
Boss, the thief's awake.

ZHANG LONG
(contemptuously)
Thief? He's a ghost. No record of him anywhere.

GU QING
(confused and terrified)
Where is this? Who are you people? Where are my girls?

ZHANG LONG and the HENCHMAN close in on GU QING, their expressions menacing.

title: The Billionaire CEO's Beloved Substitute Wife
description: A woman serves as a marriage substitute for two years, only to face the return of the real bride after completing one final task.
context:
Title: The Billionaire CEO's Beloved Substitute Wife
Description: A woman serves as a marriage substitute for two years, only to face the return of the real bride after completing one final task.

INT. HOTEL BEDROOM - NIGHT

SU CI stands at the door, looking at the sleeping CEO FU on the bed.

SU CI (V.O.)
This is my husband. Two years of secret marriage, and I've never heard his voice. Never seen his face. Until tonight.

SU CI holds a glass, her expression complex. Her fingers tremble slightly.

SU CI (V.O.)
Every signature, every legal document—her name, my hand. But grandmother's medical bills are paid through tomorrow. That's all that matters now.

SU CI makes up her mind, walks to the bedside, and reaches out to touch CEO FU's chest with hesitant fingers.

SU CI (V.O.)
One night. Then this borrowed life finally ends.

CEO FU suddenly wakes up, grabs SU CI's wrist, and pulls her toward him. His eyes are sharp, predatory.

CEO FU
(low, dangerous)
Name yourself.

SU CI places her index finger on CEO FU's lips. For a moment, raw vulnerability flashes in her eyes.

SU CI
(quiet)
Someone who knows you're more than headlines and stock prices.

SU CI leans closer. Their breath mingles.

SU CI
Your wife.

SU CI kisses CEO FU, and the two become entangled together. She melts into him—not with triumph, but with the exhaustion of someone reaching the end of a long road.
continuation:
INT. HOTEL BEDROOM - DAY

CEO FU gets up and dresses. The ASSISTANT stands outside the door with BODYGUARDS.

ASSISTANT
President Fu, the hotel is locked down. The woman's trail is cold—she planned her escape.

CEO FU looks at a red stain on the bedsheet, his eyes cold. But his hand lingers on the fabric, almost... curious.

CEO FU
Two years of silence. Then she appears, vanishes, and leaves only questions.

The ASSISTANT walks into the room.

ASSISTANT
We've identified her. She's the one who signed the contract. The actual signatory.

CEO FU
(surprised)
The proxy bride? Not Su Xue?

CEO FU picks up the glass, now seeing it as evidence rather than a weapon.

CEO FU
Prepare the car. We're visiting the Su family residence.

BODYGUARD (O.S.)
Yes, President!

INT. VILLA ROOM - DAY

SU CI stands at the door, speaking to someone outside. She clutches her phone like a lifeline.

SU CI
(into phone)
The task is complete. Send the photograph of Grandma—timestamped. I need proof she's safe.

She hangs up, eyes hollow. She touches her lips, remembering.

EXT. COURTYARD - NIGHT

SUPER: THREE DAYS AGO

SU XUE sits at a table, giving orders to SU CI who is standing. Rain begins to fall.

SU XUE
The fertility specialist delivered the final report. I cannot conceive. You will take my place tonight.

SU CI
(refusing)
I've played your wife for two years. Not this.

SU XUE
Grandmother's private nurse reports her condition is declining. One photo of her, alive. That's what this night buys you.

SU XUE stands up and walks to SU CI, invading her space.

SU XUE
After tonight, the contract is void. You return to being nobody. I reclaim my name, my husband, my life. That's the deal.

SU XUE reveals a triumphant smile that doesn't quite reach her eyes.

title: Deep Love, Misty Tears
description: A man slaps his wife after being manipulated into believing she orchestrated an attack on her sister at a wedding, causing a miscarriage.
context:
Title: Deep Love, Misty Tears
Description: A man slaps his wife after being manipulated into believing she orchestrated an attack on her sister at a wedding, causing a miscarriage.

INT. HALLWAY - DAY

The slap cracks like a gunshot. SU YU stumbles back, handprint blooming on her cheek. FU SINIAN's hand trembles.

FU SINIAN
Your driver. Your car. Your sister's blood on your scarf. How many coincidences make a plan?

He grabs her throat, pins her against the wall.

SU YU
(choked)
I was trying to save her. The car wasn't mine anymore.

FLASHBACK

INT. HOSPITAL ROOM - DAY

SU CI lies still, fingers curled over her flat stomach. The fetal monitor shows a flatline, then her own steady heartbeat.

SU CI
(whisper)
Promise me... tell no one...

SU YU sits beside her, a blood-stained scarf in her lap.

SU YU
Tell them I wasn't driving. Tell them it was the backup car.

SU CI's eyes fix on the scarf. She flinches back.

SU CI
(terrified)
You promised safe...

She falls. Her head cracks against linoleum.

FU SINIAN bursts in. His eyes land on the scarf in SU YU's hands.

END FLASHBACK
continuation:
INT. HALLWAY - DAY

FU SINIAN's grip tightens.

FU SINIAN
She said "you promised safe." Those were her words. You're the only one who makes her promises.

SU XIA walks over, holding a phone.

SU XIA
The police recovered Big Sister's messages. From Second Sister's number. About the driver change.

(softly)
You did delete them from your phone, didn't you?

SU YU
(dawning horror)
My phone was missing that morning.

ASSISTANT LIN walks over with a folder.

ASSISTANT LIN
President Fu. The driver's statement. And the transfer records. Half a million from Mrs. Fu's account to his wife's clinic.

FU SINIAN
(quiet fury)
You bought loyalty. Then you bought silence.

SU YU
For his daughter's surgery. You signed it.

FU SINIAN
I signed for a child to live. Not for ours to die.

He releases her. She collapses against the wall.

FU SINIAN
Dissolution papers by morning. You're dead to this house.

He walks away. SU XIA remains, watching SU YU slide to the floor.

SU XIA
(quietly)
He was always going to choose the daughter who looked like his mother. Legitimacy has its privileges.

She touches SU YU's shoulder. Her smile is winter.

SU XIA (V.O.)
The shadow daughter wins. You just never thought to look for me in the dark.

title: Return to Shanghai Bund - Rising to the Top
description: A boxer loses a match to save his wife, but arrives too late. A mystical amulet sends him back to 1847 Shanghai, where he gets a second chance.
context:
Title: Return to Shanghai Bund - Rising to the Top
Description: A boxer loses a match to save his wife, but arrives too late. A mystical amulet sends him back to 1847 Shanghai, where he gets a second chance.

INT. BOXING GYM - NIGHT

On the boxing ring, LIN YUAN and TAI SHAN are in an intense match. The audience below is excited, shouting and cheering loudly.

After several rounds, TAI SHAN pins LIN YUAN to the ground.

TAI SHAN
(whispering)
The money's already in your account. Stay down. Think of Ruo Qi.

LIN YUAN
(whispering)
Your belt... your career...

TAI SHAN
Just a belt. You keep your word.

TAI SHAN releases LIN YUAN, who stays down. The match continues.

LIN YUAN's voice echoes in TAI SHAN's mind.

LIN YUAN (V.O.)
You keep your word.

TAI SHAN knocks LIN YUAN to the ground with one punch.

The REFEREE raises TAI SHAN's hand.

REFEREE
In this boxing championship, Tai Shan wins!

The audience angrily throws things at the stage.

AUDIENCE
Refund! Refund! Can't you fight properly!
continuation:
INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - DAY

LIN YUAN runs anxiously to a DOCTOR and shows his phone.

LIN YUAN
Doctor, the transfer cleared! Start the treatment!

DOCTOR
I'm sorry, Mr. Lin. We needed it hours ago. Say your goodbyes.

LIN YUAN
(grabbing the doctor's collar)
Then why did you tell me—

INT. HOSPITAL ROOM - DAY

LIN YUAN rushes to RUO QI's bedside. RUO QI lies weakly on the bed.

LIN YUAN
Ruo Qi! I got the money. I did it.

RUO QI
You threw it... your shot... for nothing...

RUO QI takes out an amulet.

RUO QI
This is for your next fight... so you never lose again. Find me there.

RUO QI puts the amulet around LIN YUAN's neck.

The heart monitor flatlines with a long beep.

LIN YUAN
(shouting)
Ruo Qi! Ruo Qi! Ruo Qi!

The amulet around LIN YUAN's neck emits a dazzling green light.

MONTAGE

Quick flashes of outer space, Earth, ancient sailing ships, the year 1847, a time tunnel, and other images.

EXT. SHANGHAI BUND STREET - NIGHT

LIN YUAN, dressed in Republic-era clothing, sits in a rickshaw, looking bewildered.

A rickshaw puller, XIANG ZI, stands beside the cart.

XIANG ZI
Ruo Qi.

LIN YUAN
(confused)
Ruo Qi?

XIANG ZI
Ruo Qi!

LIN YUAN looks at the unfamiliar surroundings and realizes he has traveled through time.

title: The Peerless Mystic Healer
description: A man desperately tries to get his family's demolition compensation money from his girlfriend to save his dying mother, only to be humiliated and refused.
context:
Title: The Peerless Mystic Healer
Description: A man desperately tries to get his family's demolition compensation money from his girlfriend to save his dying mother, only to be humiliated and refused.

INT. SWIMMING POOL - DAY

MISS SU, in a red bikini, swims through the pool. A MEDICAL ID BRACELET glints on her wrist.

She swims to the edge and climbs out using the ladder, breathing heavily.

QING TAN, a woman in a black business suit, walks forward with a white cover-up and drapes it over MISS SU.

QING TAN
The hospital confirmed the kidney donor. Friday's surgery.

QING TAN
You'll finally be free from dialysis.

MISS SU
Another stranger's organ. Another debt.

On the other side, YE FENG anxiously looks at his phone, then rushes off.

YE FENG accidentally bumps into MISS SU, instinctively steadying her. For a heartbeat, MISS SU's fatigue seems to ease.

QING TAN (O.S.)
(angrily)
How dare you! Do you know who—

YE FENG
(apologizing)
Sorry—I'm in a hurry. My mother—

MISS SU
Qing Tan, forget it.

YE FENG
Thank you. Thank you.

YE FENG hurries away.

MISS SU (V.O.)
Strange... why did his touch make the pain disappear?

MISS SU
Qing Tan, go follow him. Help if you can.

QING TAN
Yes, Miss.

QING TAN walks in the direction YE FENG went.
continuation:
INT. SWIMMING POOL LOUNGE AREA - DAY

LILI and LILI'S MOM are leisurely lying on lounge chairs.

YE FENG runs up to them.

YE FENG
Lili. The demolition money—Mom's crashing. ICU says tonight.

LILI'S MOM
(contemptuously)
It's been in our account three days. We told you—we're using it for the house down payment.

YE FENG
(pleading)
You promised to hold it for Mom's surgery. Please—

LILI
Oh, Ye Feng. The doctors say it's fifty-fifty. Why waste it?

YE FENG
I'm begging you. It's my parents' entire life. I'll work triple shifts—

LILI'S MOM
(mocking)
With what skills? You're a delivery boy who can't even afford rent.

LILI picks up a water glass from the table and splashes the water in YE FENG's face.

LILI'S MOM
(mocking)
A useless waste like you? You're daydreaming. Today, you get nothing.

YE FENG's face is dripping with water, his eyes filled with anger and despair.

title: Seduced the Wrong Uncle: Madam's Daily Revenge
description: A secretary is framed for embezzlement and faces arrest, but she holds leverage over her boss after a night together, threatening to expose their affair to his nephew, her fiancé.
context:
Title: Seduced the Wrong Uncle: Madam's Daily Revenge
Description: A secretary is framed for embezzlement and faces arrest, but she holds leverage over her boss after a night together, threatening to expose their affair to his nephew, her fiancé.

INT. ROOM - NIGHT

ON SCREEN: President Nan

QIN KE lies on the sofa, breathless. NAN MING cages her with his arms, suit jacket gone.

ON SCREEN: Night

Their lips meet. A shattered wine glass on the floor.

ON SCREEN: One night passes

INT. OFFICE - DAY

Two SECURITY GUARDS enter the elevator.

QIN KE rises from the sofa, adjusting her red dress.

ON SCREEN: Nan Ming's Office

NAN MING touches the lipstick mark on his jaw. He turns toward QIN KE, lifting her chin.

ON SCREEN: Nanfeng Group President - Nan Ming
ON SCREEN: Nanfeng Group Secretary - Qin Ke

NAN MING
Thirty million in bribes. Police downstairs. Kneel now, and I'll cut three years from your sentence.

QIN KE
(smiling faintly)
Uncle... are you certain I'm the one who took it?
continuation:
KNOCKING at the door.

POLICE (O.S.)
Open up! Police!

QIN KE glances toward the door, blows NAN MING a kiss, then opens it.

She immediately pulls NAN MING against the door, pinning him.

NAN MING
Qin Ke—

QIN KE
Beg?

NAN MING
Your final chance.

QIN KE
Prison for peace? Perfect. But last night... you were compromised. I saved you. The five billion shares from our Liyuan merger—transfer them to Nan Yibo before my sentencing. Your nephew. Your blood. You wouldn't betray family, would you?

NAN MING
(angrily)
Still thinking about money? You have no heart.

QIN KE
I'm his woman, not yours. Whether I have a heart is none of your business.

NAN MING grabs QIN KE, pins her against the door, and kisses her fiercely.

The POLICE burst through the door.

POLICE
Don't move!

ON SCREEN: TO BE CONTINUED

title: The Runaway Bride Marries Right
description: A powerful leader in disguise as a taxi driver helps a runaway bride escape her wedding, while secretly hunting down a traitor within his organization.
context:
Title: The Runaway Bride Marries Right
Description: A powerful leader in disguise as a taxi driver helps a runaway bride escape her wedding, while secretly hunting down a traitor within his organization.

EXT. ROADSIDE - DAY

LING TIAN, the crisp yellow vest reading "Yihao Taxi" at odds with his tailored trousers, leans against his black sedan. He methodically closes a worn leather notebook as he finishes his lunchbox.

Bare feet sound on asphalt. A WOMAN in a torn wedding dress appears, veil discarded, determination etched on her face.

LING TIAN glances up, registers her, then reaches for his car door—

A nondescript van screeches to a halt behind him. DA EN steps out, alone, in a delivery uniform. He approaches casually, but his posture screams military precision.

DA EN
(flat, rehearsed)
Your delivery. Sign here.

He slides a sealed envelope across the roof of the car. Ling Tian's fingers brush it—paper thin, but heavier than it should be.

LING TIAN
How long have I been waiting for this delivery?

DA EN
Three weeks. The package is getting impatient. Thinks the recipient moved.

LING TIAN
(tucking envelope away)
Tell logistics I'll handle this one personally. No more deliveries to this address.

DA EN
Understood.

Da En nods, turns on his heel, and walks back. The van pulls away.

Ling Tian watches them go, his thumb tracing the envelope's edge. He slides into the driver's seat.
continuation:
EXT. HIGHWAY - CONTINUOUS

The Runaway Bride — MIAN — sprints toward a gap in traffic, wedding dress bunched in her fists. She spots Ling Tian's car, the only vehicle not speeding past—and the driver's calm profile.

She veers toward it.

EXT. LING TIAN'S CAR - CONTINUOUS

MIAN yanks the back door open, tumbling inside. She presses herself flat against the seat, breathing hard.

INT. LING TIAN'S CAR - CONTINUOUS

Ling Tian's eyes flick to the rearview mirror. He sees her—really sees her: trembling hands, the bruise starting to purple on her forearm. He says nothing.

Through the windshield, XIAO BEI and three SUBORDINATES fan across the highway, checking cars. Xiao Bei's designer suit is sweat-stained, his usually polished demeanor cracking.

XIAO BEI
(into phone)
She couldn't have gotten far. Not in that dress. Find her before—

He spots Ling Tian's car. Starts toward it.

LING TIAN'S HAND moves. He grabs his jacket from the passenger seat. In one smooth motion, he tosses it over Mian without looking back.

The jacket lands heavy across her. A subtle shield.

Xiao Bei peers into the car. Ling Tian meets his gaze, then deliberately turns the key. The engine purrs to life. He pulls away, smooth and unhurried.

In the rearview, Mian's eyes—wide, grateful—find his reflection.

LING TIAN
(to himself, barely audible)
Everybody's running from something.

He accelerates into traffic.

title: Reborn: Medical Hands Cover the Sky
description: A man who sacrificed everything for love is reborn after a tragic death, discovering he has returned with mysterious powers.
context:
Title: Reborn: Medical Hands Cover the Sky
Description: A man who sacrificed everything for love is reborn after a tragic death, discovering he has returned with mysterious powers.

INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - DAY

NURSES wheel a gurney with LING CHEN through the corridor. He convulses violently, foam flecking his lips.

NURSE
Make way! Poisoning case!

They crash through the OR doors.

FLASHBACK TO:

EXT. HOSPITAL PLAZA - DAY

QIAN TING collapses at LING CHEN's feet in the pouring rain.

QIAN TING
(crying)
Ling Chen... malignant tumor. I need a living donor. Can't afford the tests.

LING CHEN helps her up, his fingers pressing her pulse. His eyes shimmer with inner light.

LING CHEN
I'll get tested. Don't worry about the cost.

QIAN TING
(moved)
You'd really do that... for me?

She hugs him. Over his shoulder, her smile turns triumphant.
continuation:
INT. OPERATING ROOM - DAY

LING CHEN lies anesthetized, oxygen mask on. DOCTOR LI operates laparoscopically.

NURSE
Doctor, pressure's dropping. The tissue is regenerating as we cut.

DOCTOR LI
Note the anomaly. Increase fluids.

The monitor flickers with impossible readings.

INT. BEDROOM - DAY

LING CHEN kneels. QIAN TING packs a suitcase.

LING CHEN
Qian Ting, the doctors said I almost died on that table.

QIAN TING slaps him hard.

QIAN TING
I stayed one year. We're even.

LING CHEN
(pleading)
Don't leave me with the debt. Please.

QIAN TING
You volunteered. Sign the papers.

LING CHEN
(desperate)
I gave you my liver...

QIAN TING
(quietly)
And I gave you a year. Now get it over with.

An empty pill bottle rolls to his feet.

LING CHEN
If that's what you truly want...

He swallows the remaining pills. QIAN TING watches, frozen, as he collapses.

BACK TO PRESENT:

INT. OPERATING ROOM - DAY

DOCTOR LI attempts resuscitation. Asystole.

DOCTOR LI
Time of death, 14:37.

The monitor flatlines. The team steps back.

Suddenly, LING CHEN bolts upright, ripping off his mask. His eyes glow faintly blue.

LING CHEN
(whispering)
The tribulation... I survived?

He looks at his hands. Surgical scars fade. The monitor starts beeping—perfect rhythm.

LING CHEN
What am I now?

The room shifts. Sterile walls become a white, ethereal space.

LING CHEN
Who are you?

title: New Year's Eve
description: A desperate worker confronts his corrupt boss on a rooftop after being denied wages needed for his dying mother's surgery.
context:
Title: New Year's Eve
Description: A desperate worker confronts his corrupt boss on a rooftop after being denied wages needed for his dying mother's surgery.

INT. ROOFTOP - NIGHT

Brilliant fireworks bloom in the night sky, snowflakes falling.

ZHANG WEI, face bruised, clutches his mother's black-and-white portrait, standing at the edge of the rooftop.

A group of COWORKERS watch him anxiously from a distance.

ZHANG WEI
(roaring)
Wang Kun! Get Wang Kun up here!

A COWORKER takes a careful step forward, holding a thermos.

COWORKER
Brother Zhang... it's New Year's. We brought dumplings. Still warm.

ZHANG WEI
Stay back! I'll jump!

COWORKER
He's coming! Just hold on!

Boss WANG KUN arrives with foreman MA KAI and LI JUAN.

WANG KUN
(contemptuously)
Zhang Wei. Come down. We can negotiate.

ZHANG WEI
(pointing at Wang Kun)
Kowtow to my mother! Confess what you did!

WANG KUN
(laughing)
Confess? Your mother died of illness. Tragic, but not my concern.

ZHANG WEI
(voice breaking with tears)
You withheld my wages! Her surgery was tomorrow! You knew!

MA KAI
(stepping forward)
Spoilage penalties. It's in the handbook you signed. Legal and documented.

ZHANG WEI
(furious)
Legal? You changed the rules!

LI JUAN
(quietly)
Zhang Wei... please. Don't make this worse. For both of us.

ZHANG WEI
(turning to Li Juan, sudden realization)
You. You're wearing his watch.

LI JUAN
(defensive)
I made a choice! Someone had to be realistic!

WANG KUN
(to Zhang Wei)
You're a contractor, not family. We have procedures. Your mother—unfortunate timing.

ZHANG WEI
(despairingly)
Timing...

He looks at the portrait, then at the fireworks.

WANG KUN
I can offer 10,000. For funeral expenses. Sign the release, it's yours.

ZHANG WEI
Ten thousand. For her life.

WANG KUN
Business is business. Sign, or get nothing.

ZHANG WEI becomes agitated, his foot slips on the icy edge, and he falls from the rooftop. He crashes heavily into the snow below, blood flowing from his mouth and nose, the portrait frame shattered.

WANG KUN runs to the edge of the rooftop, looks down, then turns to face the crowd.

WANG KUN
(calmly)
You all saw. He lost his footing. Tragic accident.
(to Ma Kai)
Call Chief Liu. Get the settlement papers ready.

WANG KUN starts toward the stairs.

WANG KUN
(to Li Juan)
Come on. There's a banquet waiting.

He leaves. The fireworks continue, reflected in Li Juan's tears.

TRANSITION: Several hours earlier
continuation:
INT. FACTORY WORKSHOP - DAY

Red lanterns hang in the workshop, full of New Year atmosphere. ZHANG WEI, wearing work clothes, is on the phone.

ZHANG WEI
(into phone, gently)
Mom, doctor says deposit's due Monday. I'm getting 60,000 today. Yes, I'll be there tomorrow.

ZHANG WEI hangs up, a smile on his face. He opens a small red notebook—meticulous medical expense tallies.

Two COWORKERS chat nearby.

COWORKER A
Seven days straight. Glad this Gu Corp order's done.

COWORKER B
Boss made a fortune. Hope our bonuses reflect it.

LI JUAN walks over to ZHANG WEI, looking at his red notebook.

LI JUAN
You're really getting 60,000? Buy me that phone, like you promised?

ZHANG WEI
(awkwardly)
After Mom's surgery. She's first.

LI JUAN
(coldly)
Always your mom. What about us?

ZHANG WEI
Don't be like that.

LI JUAN
(shaking off his hand)
You don't get it.

MA KAI and WANG KUN come down from upstairs.

MA KAI
Payday! When your name is called, take your envelope. Wang Qiang! Ma Jun! Li Jun! Zhou Wei! Zhang Wei!

MA KAI throws ZHANG WEI's envelope on the ground. ZHANG WEI bends down to pick it up, looks inside, his expression changes drastically.

ZHANG WEI
(confused)
Twelve thousand? My bonus alone is sixty!

Other COWORKERS open their envelopes.

COWORKERS
(murmuring)
This is half! What's this deduction? "Equipment fees"? "Management costs"?

ZHANG WEI holds his envelope, looking up at WANG KUN in shock.

ZHANG WEI
Boss, this is wrong.

WANG KUN
(leaning on the railing)
Section 8.4. Spoilage penalties. You all signed the updated handbook.

ZHANG WEI
I never—

LI JUAN
(quietly, beside him)
Just sign it, Zhang Wei. It's how things are done.

ZHANG WEI looks at her, then at Wang Kun, then at the red notebook in his hand.

He walks toward the stairs.

WANG KUN
(calling after)
Where are you going?

ZHANG WEI
(quietly)
To see my mother.

He exits. Wang Kun watches him go.

WANG KUN
(to Li Juan)
He'll be back. They need the money.

Li Juan nods, but her fingers tremble as she touches the gold watch on her wrist.

ON SCREEN: TO BE CONTINUED

title: Four Treasures Strike: Mommy Prepares to Attack
description: A hacker child discovers his father is about to marry the woman who wronged his mother six years ago, and rallies his siblings to intervene.
context:
Title: Four Treasures Strike: Mommy Prepares to Attack
Description: A hacker child discovers his father is about to marry the woman who wronged his mother six years ago, and rallies his siblings to intervene.

INT. OFFICE - NIGHT

CONGCONG (10, Second Treasure), leather jacket swallowing his frame, types furiously. Sunglasses perch on his head. A lollipop sticks from his mouth.

Monitors glow: news footage shows LING FAMILY HEIR beside TANG QIANQIAN. Headline scrolls: "LING-TANG WEDDING: 7 DAYS."

CONGCONG (V.O.)
Dad's getting married. To the woman who buried Mom six years ago.

A young ASSISTANT enters, holding a burner phone.

ASSISTANT
Boss, DNA match confirmed. Ling Xiang is your father.

CONGCONG takes the phone, studies it. Jaw tightens.

CONGCONG
(into encrypted mic)
Big Brother, Third Brother. Target acquired. Operation Family Extraction is go.

EXT. MOUNTAIN FOREST - DAY

DAXI (11, First Treasure), meditation robes faded, sits on granite. Stillness personified.

His smartwatch vibrates. Encrypted message: "Wedding in 7 days. Tang Qianqian."

DAXI
(soft, certain)
The mountain taught me patience. Not for this.

He stands, bowing to the peaks.
continuation:
EXT. BAMBOO FOREST COTTAGE - DAY

TIANTIAN (9, Third Treasure), lab coat dragging, measures tincture drops. Round glasses magnify focused eyes.

An OLD MAN watches from a wheelchair, breathing eased.

OLD MAN
Little miracle worker. Leaving us?

TIANTIAN
(never looking up)
Family emergency. One drop at dawn, not two.

He checks his cracked tablet. Message: "Wedding. Tang Qianqian."

TIANTIAN
(whisper)
She doesn't get to finish what she started.

EXT. CITY ROAD - NIGHT

TANG YUE (28), helmet on, weaves through traffic. Precise, not reckless.

RADIO BROADCAST (V.O.)
...Ling Xiang and Tang Qianqian's Golden Moon Hotel wedding. A corporate takeover in bridal white...

She stops at a red light. Removes helmet. Face etched with exhaustion.

TANG YUE (V.O.)
Six years dead. Time to RSVP.

INT. KTV PRIVATE ROOM - NIGHT (SIX YEARS AGO)

TITLE: SIX YEARS AGO

TANG YUE (22), tentative, holds a wine glass. TANG QIANQIAN (24) pours, smile sharp as broken glass.

TANG QIANQIAN
One toast, Sister. For your birthday.

She taps the rim. Powder dissolves.

TANG QIANQIAN
(over her shoulder)
The entertainment's here.

THREE MASKED MEN enter. Corporate event masks—owl, fox, stag.

TANG YUE
(stiffening)
Qianqian, what is this?

TANG QIANQIAN
(leaning close)
Your inheritance. Drink.

The men cheer, pressing the glass to TANG YUE's lips. Not violent—insistent. Celebratory.

Her vision blurs. TANG QIANQIAN answers her phone, turning away.

TANG QIANQIAN
(into phone)
It's done. Shares transfer at midnight.

She looks back once. Not triumphant—relieved. As if closing a door.

TANG YUE collapses. The last sound: champagne cork pop. Celebration.

TITLE: TO BE CONTINUED

title: Reborn: All In (Episode 84)
description: A ruthless tycoon who lost his wife and daughter gets a second chance when he's murdered and wakes up twenty years in the past.
context:
Title: Reborn: All In (Episode 84)
Description: A ruthless tycoon who lost his wife and daughter gets a second chance when he's murdered and wakes up twenty years in the past.

INT. BEDROOM - DAY

CHEN RAN lies rigid in silk sheets, sweat staining his collar, fingers twitching.

FLASHBACK:

CHEN RAN (V.O.)
Wanqing... Yaoyao...

Twenty years ago in the family home, WANQING backs against the wall, clutching her purse. Little YAOYAO hides behind her leg.

WANQING
Chen Ran, this is for Yaoyao's school fees. You promised—

YOUNG CHEN RAN slumps on the sofa, surrounded by empty bottles. He reeks of cheap liquor.

YOUNG CHEN RAN
(slurring)
Promised? I promised a lot of things. Hand it over.

WANQING
Please. The hospital said I shouldn't donate again so soon—

He lunges, snatching the purse. Wanqing stumbles. Yaoyao's eyes fill with tears.

YAOYAO
(whispering)
Daddy, I'm hungry...

YOUNG CHEN RAN
(counting cash)
You got more than last time. Good.

He pockets the money, grabs a bottle, stumbles out. SLAM.

YAOYAO (V.O.)
I wish you weren't my daddy.

Yaoyao runs to her room, slamming the door.

CHEN RAN (muttering in sleep)
You're not my father...

END FLASHBACK.
continuation:
INT. BEDROOM - MORNING

FEMALE ASSISTANT enters, approaches the bed.

FEMALE ASSISTANT
President Chen. President Chen.

CHEN RAN wakes with a start, instinctively grabbing her wrist. For a heartbeat, his grip tightens—then releases.

FEMALE ASSISTANT
Today's schedule is arranged.

CHEN RAN sits up, straightening his clothes.

CHEN RAN
The Qingyao Charity press conference. Every media outlet in the province. I want saturation coverage.

FEMALE ASSISTANT
Yes.

EXT. CHEN FAMILY OLD HOUSE - DAY

A Rolls-Royce stops in front. CHEN RAN gets out, carrying a small velvet box.

CHEN RAN (V.O.)
Wanqing, Yaoyao. Wait for me.

INT. CHEN FAMILY OLD HOUSE - DAY

CHEN RAN enters, picks up a photo from the table: Wanqing and Yaoyao at a beach.

FLASHBACK:

WANQING (V.O.)
You said you'd take care of me for a lifetime. That's a long contract, Chen Ran.

YAOYAO (V.O.)
Daddy! This is for you!

END FLASHBACK.

Chen Ran strokes the photo, his hand trembling.

CHEN RAN
Twenty years. I've carried you both every day.

The FEMALE ASSISTANT and two BODYGUARDS follow him in.

FEMALE ASSISTANT
President Chen, the board is concerned. One hundred billion yuan in assets from Chen Corporation—are you really decided on donating it all to society?

CHEN RAN
(firmly)
It was never a question. The fund is my promise to them.

The FEMALE ASSISTANT's expression changes, revealing a vicious look.

FEMALE ASSISTANT
Then go down and join them.

A BODYGUARD strikes CHEN RAN from behind with a baseball bat. CHEN RAN falls, blood splattering on the photo frame.

FEMALE ASSISTANT (V.O.)
President Chen became ill from missing his late wife. His hundred-billion-yuan fortune will be managed by me. That's what today's press conference is really about.

The FEMALE ASSISTANT holds a document, grabbing Chen Ran's hand and pressing a bloody thumb onto his seal ring.

FEMALE ASSISTANT
Stamp it.

She stamps the document with his ring.

FEMALE ASSISTANT
Kill him.

The BODYGUARD raises the baseball bat.

INT. PAST - FAMILY HOME - DAY

CHEN RAN jolts awake on a ragged sofa. The TV blares. Bottles and betting slips surround him. A calendar on the wall: MAY 2002.

TV NEWS (V.O.)
—May 15, 2002. A ceremony commemorating the eightieth anniversary of the founding of the Communist Youth League was held at the Great Hall of the People.

CHEN RAN looks around in shock, seeing WANQING and YAOYAO standing in the doorway, looking at him fearfully.

CHEN RAN
Yaoyao... Wanqing... Am I dead? Or am I dreaming?

WANQING
(tentatively)
Chen Ran? You're home...

Yaoyao watches him, still afraid but trying to hide it.

Chen Ran stares at them, breath coming short. He looks at his hands—then their faces.

CHEN RAN
(voice breaking)
...I'm home.

title: When Will the Moon Be Full & When Will the Moon Shine on My Return
description: A young man returns to the city, leaving behind his beloved in the countryside, but tragedy strikes before their reunion.
context:
Title: When Will the Moon Be Full & When Will the Moon Shine on My Return
Description: A young man returns to the city, leaving behind his beloved in the countryside, but tragedy strikes before their reunion.

INT. FAREWELL CEREMONY - DAY

Gongs and drums echo across the village square. A banner hangs: "Farewell to Educated Youth." Villagers swarm a registration table.

LI MINGGUANG (23), red flower pinned to his shirt, clutches a worn suitcase. He checks the crowd again, his smile tightening.

LI MINGGUANG (V.O.)
Qiuyue promised she'd come. She never breaks a promise.

He signs the departure ledger with trembling fingers, then brushes dust from his suitcase—faintly embroidered: "Q.M. Forever."

LI MINGGUANG (V.O.)
Unless she's found out.

EXT. LAKESIDE - MEMORY

Young Li Mingguang and LU QIUYUE (18) sit by the lake. She threads a reed through his fingers.

LU QIUYUE
Hold this. Tighter. Like you're holding onto me.

She ties the reed into a ring, then slips a small magnolia hairpin from her braid—tucks it into his palm.

LU QIUYUE
When you see this, you'll remember. I'll come to the city. We'll build a home with real windows.

Li Mingguang clutches the pin, their foreheads touching.

BACK TO:

INT. BUS - DAY

Li Mingguang sits alone, turning the magnolia hairpin over in his fingers. The seat beside him stays empty.

EXT. COUNTRY ROAD - DAY

The bus rumbles forward. LU QIUYUE appears around the bend, sprinting, her braid coming loose. She waves a package.

LU QIUYUE
(calling out)
Mingguang! The puppy—your mother—
continuation:
INT. BUS - DAY

A PASSENGER points out the window.

PASSENGER
Isn't that your girl? Running like her feet are on fire.

Li Mingguang snaps his head around. He shoves the window open, hairpin clutched in his fist.

LI MINGGUANG
Qiuyue! Here—stop!

EXT. COUNTRY ROAD - DAY

The bus brakes. Qiuyue stumbles to the window, gasping, clutching a squirming black puppy.

LU QIUYUE
(trying to smile)
Your mother wanted you to have Dahuo. For the city. So you won't be alone.

LI MINGGUANG
(taking the puppy)
Qiuyue, listen. I've got work lined up at the steel factory. Three months. Then I'll send for you.

LU QIUYUE
I placed third in the province. On the exam. They'll announce it next week.

Li Mingguang's face lights up.

LI MINGGUANG
Third? Qiuyue, that's—

She presses the reed ring into his hand alongside the puppy.

LU QIUYUE
Keep your window open. I'll find you.

The bus lurches forward. Their hands stretch until only fingertips touch—then separate. Qiuyue stands in the dust, watching until the bus vanishes.

INT. BUS - NIGHT

Li Mingguang tucks the puppy under his coat. He threads the magnolia hairpin through the reed ring, holding it up to catch moonlight.

LI MINGGUANG (V.O.)
Third in the province. She'll get that scholarship. We'll find a place near the university.

Headlights sweep the road. Suddenly, a flock of geese scatters across the headlights. The DRIVER swerves hard.

Metal screams. The bus tilts.

EXT. VILLAGE ENTRANCE - DAYBREAK

Morning mist. Villagers cluster around a radio bulletin. LU QIUYUE pushes through, pale.

RADIO ANNOUNCER (V.O.)
...Bus Seventeen bound for the city was found overturned in the ravine. Rescue efforts continue.

An ELDERLY VILLAGER shakes his head.

ELDERLY VILLAGER
They say no survivors. Not yet.

Qiuyue's knees buckle. She catches herself on a post, then turns and walks away—steadier with each step.

CROWED
Qiuyue? Someone go with her—

INT. LU QIUYUE'S HOME - DAY

Qiuyue sits motionless on the bed. Her MOTHER hovers while an OLD DOCTOR packs his kit.

OLD DOCTOR
(quietly, to the parents)
She's carrying. Early days, but the pulse doesn't lie. And the sickness—morning and night.

FATHER
(whispering, sharp)
Who's the father?

The doctor glances at Qiuyue's steady gaze.

OLD DOCTOR
She hasn't spoken. But she's decided something. I can see it in her spine.

Qiuyue touches her stomach, her face hardening into a mask of determination.

title: Ex-Wife's Allure: Mr. Fu's Endless Devotion
description: After a night of unexpected passion with her estranged husband, a woman discovers a conspiracy and faces the consequences of a marriage arranged three years ago.
context:
Title: Ex-Wife's Allure: Mr. Fu's Endless Devotion
Description: After a night of unexpected passion with her estranged husband, a woman discovers a conspiracy and faces the consequences of a marriage arranged three years ago.

INT. BATHROOM - NIGHT (FLASHBACK)

SHENG MIAN showers, water cascading down her skin.

The door BURSTS open. FU YANCHENG stands in the threshold.

SHENG MIAN gasps, clutching a towel.

SHENG MIAN
How did you get in?

FU YANCHENG's eyes are glacial as he advances.

FU YANCHENG
You invited yourself.

He corners her against the tile, their breath mingling.

INT. HOTEL ROOM - NIGHT (FLASHBACK)

Bodies entangled in blurred motion.

INT. HOTEL ROOM - DAY

Morning light cuts across rumpled sheets. SHENG MIAN wakes first, wincing.

SHENG MIAN
(under her breath)
God...

She surveys the destruction: clothes scattered, pillows on the floor.

SHENG MIAN (V.O.)
What the hell happened?

She turns. Freezes. FU YANCHENG sleeps beside her.

SHENG MIAN (V.O.)
Him. Of all people.

She squeezes her eyes shut, fragments returning.

INT. BANQUET HALL - NIGHT (FLASHBACK)

SHENG MIAN in a shimmering gown, backing into a champagne tower. Glass shatters.

Her stepmother, SU LAN, appears at her elbow.

SU LAN
Clumsy girl. Come, use my suite to freshen up.

SU LAN presses a key card into her palm, smiling.

SU LAN
Quickly now. Before anyone notices.

SU LAN watches her go, her smile sharpening.

SU LAN (V.O.)
Let's see if you still look so smug after tonight.
continuation:
INT. HOTEL ROOM - DAY

SHENG MIAN's eyes snap open. She glares at the sleeping Fu Yancheng.

SHENG MIAN (V.O.)
Three years of silence, and this is how we reunite?

She throws off the covers, pain shooting through her.

SHENG MIAN (V.O.)
(quiet fury)
Perfect. Just perfect.

FU YANCHENG stirs. Sits up. His gaze sweeps over her with cool assessment.

FU YANCHENG
Well. You finally got what you wanted.

SHENG MIAN
Excuse me?

FU YANCHENG retrieves his wallet, pulls out a card. Drops it on the nightstand.

FU YANCHENG
Name your price.

SHENG MIAN stares at the card. Then at him. A brittle laugh escapes.

SHENG MIAN
Let me guess. That's either hush money... or a retainer?

FU YANCHENG rises, stepping into her space.

FU YANCHENG
What if I want the full service?

She holds his gaze, unmoving.

SHENG MIAN
Then you should ask for a refund.

She pushes past him, heading for the door.

FU YANCHENG
The money stays.

SHENG MIAN pauses, hand on the knob.

SHENG MIAN
Keep it. You need the practice.

She exits. The door closes softly. Fu Yancheng's jaw tightens.

INT. HOTEL CORRIDOR - DAY

SHENG MIAN hurries out in a bathrobe, nearly colliding with--

QI SHEN, briefcase in hand, who does a double-take.

INT. HOTEL ROOM - DAY

QI SHEN enters to find Fu Yancheng pulling on his shirt, the untouched bank card on the bed.

QI SHEN
Sir? Was that--

FU YANCHENG
Don't.

QI SHEN clears his throat, professional mask restored.

QI SHEN
The divorce papers. Miss Sheng wasn't at her residence. Shall we courier them to Sheng Corporation?

FU YANCHENG
Get her on the phone first. Give her forty-eight hours.

QI SHEN
Understood.

INT. HOTEL CORRIDOR - DAY

SHENG MIAN lingers near the door, her name catching her ear. She leans closer.

INT. HOTEL ROOM - DAY

QI SHEN notices the bloodstain on the sheets. Freezes.

FU YANCHENG follows his gaze. His expression shifts: surprise, then something darker.

QI SHEN
Mr. Fu... is that--

FU YANCHENG
(out of patience)
Get out.

Qi Shen retreats. Fu Yancheng stands alone, staring at the stain.

FU YANCHENG (V.O.)
Her first time. And I—

ON SCREEN: TO BE CONTINUED

title: My Dad Commands Respect Across Nine Provinces
description: A seemingly ordinary middle-aged man running a street barbecue stand is revealed to be a legendary commander when his past comes calling.
context:
Title: My Dad Commands Respect Across Nine Provinces
Description: A seemingly ordinary middle-aged man running a street barbecue stand is revealed to be a legendary commander when his past comes calling.

INT. BARBECUE STAND - NIGHT

A street-side barbecue stand under the night sky, full of smoky atmosphere.

XIANG WEIHUA, a seemingly ordinary middle-aged man, skillfully flips meat skewers on the grill and sprinkles seasoning.

XIANG WEIHUA
(to customers)
Ready.

He plates the grilled skewers and serves them to a table of customers.

XIANG WEIHUA
(smiling)
Enjoy, everyone.

The customers take the skewers. XIANG WEIHUA turns around, his smile instantly disappearing, becoming serious and alert.

A young girl eating skewers suddenly looks up, expression surprised.

CUT TO: Fantasy/Memory Sequence

On a foggy road, a female general (ZHU QUE) wearing battle armor and wielding a Green Dragon Crescent Blade rides a tall horse, followed by two rows of men in black suits and fedoras, approaching with intimidating momentum.

XIANG WEIHUA (V.O.)
They found me.

The barbecue stand customers see this scene and scatter in fear.

PASSERBY (O.S.)
Run!

ZHU QUE rides to the barbecue stand and dismounts smoothly. The men in black quickly follow.

ZHU QUE walks to XIANG WEIHUA and kneels on one knee, saluting with a fist.

ZHU QUE
Greetings, Marquis of the Nation!

All the men in black kneel in unison.

MEN IN BLACK
Greetings, Marquis of the Nation!

XIANG WEIHUA looks at them, clearly displeased.

XIANG WEIHUA
You just cleared my dinner rush.

ZHU QUE
By order of the Sovereign—the western provinces rebel. The National Guard Army needs its Commander.

XIANG WEIHUA turns around, picks up raw skewers and places them on the grill, indifferent.

XIANG WEIHUA
The provinces have governors. My army days are ash. I've guarded the Nine Provinces long enough.

ZHU QUE
Forgive me, Marquis.

ZHU QUE suddenly rises, wielding her large blade and charging at XIANG WEIHUA.
continuation:
An intense fight begins. ZHU QUE and the men in black attack XIANG WEIHUA.

XIANG WEIHUA, bare-handed, moves with lethal precision, deflecting strikes and knocking down men in black. He flings a handful of chili powder in a blinding cloud.

Finally, XIANG WEIHUA catches ZHU QUE's descending blade between two fingers. His hand trembles for an instant—an old wound.

XIANG WEIHUA
(sharp gaze)
I taught you that strike. Don't make me un-teach it.

ZHU QUE looks at him in shock.

XIANG WEIHUA
Leave. Next time I aim to kill.

XIANG WEIHUA casually picks up a bamboo skewer, flicks it forcefully, and it flies like a bullet, embedding deeply into a distant tree trunk.

ZHU QUE is completely intimidated and lowers her head.

ZHU QUE
Yes, Marquis.

ZHU QUE leads her subordinates away in defeat. XIANG WEIHUA watches them, then grips his shoulder, breathing hard.

BALD THUG (O.S.)
Xiang Weihua!

A dozen STREET ENFORCERS surround the stand. BALD THUG cracks his knuckles.

BALD THUG
Boss Tiger wants his protection fee. Come along.

XIANG WEIHUA glances at the frightened customers, then at his trembling hand. He exhales.

XIANG WEIHUA
Let me lock the register.

The BALD THUG and his men escort XIANG WEIHUA away.

INT. HOTEL LOBBY - NIGHT

A middle-aged man in a trench coat and sunglasses with a powerful aura (LEI LAOHU) stands in the center of the magnificent hotel lobby, a row of subordinates behind him.

A car pulls up to the hotel entrance. The BALD THUG escorts XIANG WEIHUA out of the car.

BALD THUG
Move.

XIANG WEIHUA is brought before LEI LAOHU.

BALD THUG
(pointing at LEI LAOHU)
Boss Tiger. He runs the Southwest.

XIANG WEIHUA looks at LEI LAOHU, eyes cold.

XIANG WEIHUA
Another tiger. The cat's getting crowded.

LEI LAOHU removes his sunglasses and locks eyes with XIANG WEIHUA.

LEI LAOHU
You cost me money, old man.

FADE OUT.

title: I Am King
description: A man disguised as a migrant worker returns home, but his true identity as a legendary military commander is revealed at a train station security checkpoint.
context:
Title: I Am King
Description: A man disguised as a migrant worker returns home, but his true identity as a legendary military commander is revealed at a train station security checkpoint.

INT. TRAIN STATION HALL - DAY

A plainly dressed man who looks like a migrant worker (JUN HOU) walks through the spacious train station hall, carrying one large checkered woven bag on his back and another in his hand.

His phone rings.

JUN HOU answers the call, a tired but genuine smile appearing.

JUN HOU
Hello, Wei. I'm at the station. Job's done—saved enough. I'll be home tonight.

A fashionably dressed WOMAN with her son (XIAO BAO) brushes against Jun Hou's bag.

XIAO BAO
Mom!

WOMAN
(catching herself, voice sharp)
Watch where you're—

She sees Jun Hou's weathered clothes. Disdain flickers, mixed with something else.

WOMAN
(to her son, quieter)
Let's go, Xiao Bao.

They leave. Jun Hou watches them, hand pressing his chest briefly. He continues forward.

INT. TRAIN STATION SECURITY CHECKPOINT - DAY

JUN HOU arrives at the security checkpoint. A young SECURITY GUARD (GUARD A) stops him.

GUARD A
Sir, step through the scanner.

Jun Hou does. The machine emits an UNUSUAL ALARM. Guard A checks his monitor.

GUARD A
Sir, you're showing embedded metal fragments. Raise your arms.

GUARD A scans Jun Hou with a handheld detector. It SCREAMS. He tries again. Same result.

Another GUARD (GUARD B) walks over.

GUARD A
(to GUARD B)
Twenty-nine fragments. Not modern alloy.

GUARD B
(shocked)
Historic?

GUARD B
(into radio)
Supervisor to Gate 3. Artifact alert.

WARNING LIGHTS flash. Two SPECIAL OFFICERS approach.

SECURITY CAPTAIN
Sir, remove your shirt. Now.

JUN HOU
(quiet)
Will this get me home?

SECURITY CAPTAIN
Just do it.
continuation:
JUN HOU removes his shirt. His torso bears twenty-nine dark circular scars, each with a metallic fragment.

All the guards stare.

SECURITY CAPTAIN
(awed)
Twenty-nine... impossible.

FLASHBACK BEGINS

An ancient battlefield. Jun Hou, in armor, fights fiercely. Projectiles strike his chest. He keeps fighting, bloodied but unyielding as wound after wound accumulates.

FLASHBACK ENDS

Back at the station, bystanders gasp.

BYSTANDER
My God...

SPECIAL OFFICER
(softly, to Captain)
Jun Lin signature confirmed.

YUE JI (O.S.)
Let him go.

A woman in a black leather jacket (YUE JI) approaches with three women. She shows a badge.

YUE JI
(to Captain)
Historical Protection Bureau. This man is under our authority.

She turns to Jun Hou, composure cracking.

YUE JI
Commander. You missed your check-in.

JUN HOU
I wanted to come home quietly.

YUE JI
Your wife?

JUN HOU
She doesn't know.

YUE JI
(nods)

YUE JI walks up to JUN HOU, kneels on one knee, salutes with cupped fist.

YUE JI
General Yue Ji respectfully welcomes the return of Commander Jun Lin Hou.

The women kneel in unison.

ALL WOMEN
We respectfully welcome the return of Jun Lin Hou!

Jun Hou looks at the kneeling soldiers, then at the crowd.

JUN HOU
(quietly)
Get up. I've spent three lifetimes earning the right to stand among you.

YUE JI
(rising)
Then let us walk with you.

They move toward the exit as the station lights seem to bend around them.

FADE OUT.

title: Reborn in the Apocalypse: Marrying My Scumbag's Rival
description: A global cold wave plunges the world into an icy apocalypse where survival means abandoning all morality, and a woman finds herself caught between her past and a desperate present.
context:
Title: Reborn in the Apocalypse: Marrying My Scumbag's Rival
Description: A global cold wave plunges the world into an icy apocalypse where survival means abandoning all morality, and a woman finds herself caught between her past and a desperate present.

EXT. FROZEN CITY - DAY

The sky is overcast. The city is covered in ice and snow, a scene of apocalypse.
FROZEN CORPSES lie in the streets, preserved like statues. A TRAIL OF BLOOD stains the snow, already freezing over. In the distance, a SMOKE PLUME rises from a burning building, the flames struggling against the cold.

NARRATOR (V.O.)
Three months. That's how long the world has been freezing.

INT. ABANDONED BUILDING - DAY

The interior of the building is dilapidated, covered in dust and debris.
FROST covers the walls. A dead RADIATOR sits in the corner. A SURVIVOR'S BREATH crystallizes in the air, visible and desperate.

VICTIM (O.S.)
(weakly)
Please... my daughter...

INT. ABANDONED BUILDING HALLWAY - DAY

A THUG in heavy black clothing drags an injured VICTIM by the collar.
The victim's hands leave bloody smears on the icy floor.

VICTIM
(struggling)
We had a deal! I gave you everything!

THUG
(quietly, almost gentle)
Everything wasn't enough.
(hefts the victim up)
The cold takes us all eventually.

The THUG throws the VICTIM out the window from the high floor. No scream—just the dull crunch of impact.
continuation:
EXT. SNOWY GROUND - DAY

The VICTIM falls onto the snowy ground. Their body is still. Within seconds, ICE CRYSTALS spiderweb across their skin. A stray dog approaches, nudges the body, then backs away as it begins to freeze solid.

EXT. SHEN YUNAN'S HOUSE ENTRANCE - DAY

Heavy snow falls. XU ZHIYI (28, exhausted but determined), XIAO LIANG (30, handsome but with hollow eyes), and CHEN MENGROU (26, nervous) huddle at the entrance. Xu Zhiyi rubs her hands, her fingers blue at the tips.

XIAO LIANG
(softly)
You're shivering.

XU ZHIYI
(avoiding his gaze)
We shouldn't be here.

CHEN MENGROU
We have to. Your ex... he's the only one with supplies left in this district. The military cleared out yesterday.

XIAO LIANG
(places a hand on Xu Zhiyi's shoulder)
Remember what he was like before all this? He'd have given you the world.

XU ZHIYI
(flinched at his touch)
That was a lifetime ago.

She stares at the door. A flicker of memory crosses her face—falling snow, a different door, a different betrayal. She blinks it away.

XU ZHIYI
(quietly)
He won't help us. Not after what I did.

XIAO LIANG
Then we give him a reason.

Xiao Liang's hand moves to his belt. The kitchen knife handle is visible. Xu Zhiyi sees it. Their eyes meet. Something passes between them—recognition, resignation.

XU ZHIYI
(dully)
I'll try.

She knocks. The sound is muffled by the cold.

XU ZHIYI
Shen Yunan. It's... it's me.

The door opens a crack. SHEN YUNAN (29, hardened, eyes sharp) appears. He sees her. His expression doesn't change, but his grip tightens on the doorframe.

SHEN YUNAN
You're still alive.

XU ZHIYI
(nods, voice breaking)
I need—

XIAO LIANG suddenly grabs Xu Zhiyi from behind, the knife blade cold against her skin. But his grip is loose, his hands trembling.

XIAO LIANG
(shouting)
Open the door, Shen! Or she freezes out here with the rest of us!

SHEN YUNAN's eyes flick from the knife to Xiao Liang's face. He sees the desperation, the calculation. He sees Xu Zhiyi's eyes—wide, but not surprised. She's been here before.

SHEN YUNAN
(stepping out, unarmed)
Let her go. Take me instead.

XIAO LIANG
(laughs, brittle)
You think I'm stupid? Inside. Now.

Shen Yunan holds Xu Zhiyi's gaze for a long moment. Something in her expression makes him pause. Then he opens the door completely.

Waiting inside, barely visible: rows of SUPPLIES. Canned goods. Medicine. And on a table, a PHOTO of Shen Yunan and Xu Zhiyi—years younger, smiling.

XIAO LIANG pushes Xu Zhiyi forward, toward the warmth, toward the past she left behind.

title: Vanished Love
description: A mother rushes her sick son to the hospital on her daughter's birthday, only to face her husband's fury and a devastating choice between her two children.
context:
Title: Vanished Love
Description: A mother rushes her sick son to the hospital on her daughter's birthday, only to face her husband's fury and a devastating choice between her two children.

EXT. HOSPITAL - DAY

A series of fast-paced hospital shots: a nurse pouring saline solution, hospital bed wheels rolling rapidly, ambulance lights flashing, surgical instruments, blood bags.

NURSE (V.O.)
Incoming acute renal failure. Six-year-old male, status post. Prep the pediatric ICU team now!

INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - DAY

ZHOU WENMEI, wearing a green dress, runs anxiously through the hospital corridor.

ZHOU WENMEI
Mingzhe, thank God—

SU MINGZHE shoves ZHOU WENMEI against the wall, his face contorted with panic.

SU MINGZHE
(low, dangerous)
Dr. Zhao said one more episode could kill him. One. And you took him to an amusement park?

ZHOU WENMEI
Tears streaming down her face, she reaches for him.

ZHOU WENMEI
(struggling for breath)
Today is Yiyi's birthday. Xiaohui begged me. He wanted to feel normal, just for one hour—

SU MINGZHE
(fingers digging into her shoulders)
Normal? My son will never be normal because you decided to have another child. The pregnancy complications weakened him. Every specialist said so.

ZHOU WENMEI
That's not how—

SU MINGZHE
(shoving her away)
Since Yiyi was born, it's been infection after infection. The fortune teller was right. She's poisoned this family.

ZHOU WENMEI
(on her knees)
She's four years old. Your daughter.

SU MINGZHE
My son is dying. My company is collapsing from his medical bills. She took everything from him before she could even walk.

ZHOU WENMEI
(crawling forward)
Mingzhe, please. I know you blame me. But they're both my babies. I can't choose—

SU MINGZHE
(turning away)
Then I'll choose for you. Where is she? I told Song to bring her.

ZHOU WENMEI
(panicking)
Yiyi was right behind me in the lobby. She promised she'd stay with the receptionist—

SONG YUANJIANG rushes over, his expression grim.

SONG YUANJIANG
Mr. Su, the receptionist says she never arrived at the desk.

ZHOU WENMEI
(frantic)
What? No, I told her "wait by the flowers, don't move"—

FLASHBACK
continuation:
EXT. HOSPITAL ENTRANCE - DAY

ON SCREEN: Twenty minutes ago

ZHOU WENMEI carries XIAOHUI toward the sliding doors, YIYI clutching her dress.

ZHOU WENMEI
Yiyi, wait by the flower pots. Right here. Don't move until I come back.

YIYI
(trembling)
Mommy, I'm scared.

ZHOU WENMEI
(fighting tears)
Be my brave girl. Just for a little while.

INT. HOSPITAL LOBBY - DAY

Through the glass doors, we see ZHOU WENMEI sprint toward the ER. YIYI stands alone, watching. A large family rushes past, knocking her small backpack off her shoulders. As she bends to pick it up, she wanders a few steps away from the designated spot. A security guard approaches.

END FLASHBACK

INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - DAY

ZHOU WENMEI
She's lost. Oh God, she's lost in the hospital—

She bolts down the corridor.

INT. HOSPITAL STAIRWELL - DAY

SU MINGZHE and SONG YUANJIANG meet with DR. ZHAO.

DR. ZHAO
Xiaohui's creatinine levels are critical. He needs a transplant within weeks, not months.

SU MINGZHE
The previous compatibility tests—Yiyi was a match?

DR. ZHAO
(hesitant)
She's a 95% match. But Mr. Su, she's under five. The ethics board will never approve harvesting a kidney from a minor without her consent and extensive evaluation.

SU MINGZHE
She can consent. She'll do anything for her brother.

DR. ZHAO
(carefully)
Legally, she cannot. And your wife would need to—

SU MINGZHE
My wife would sign. If it meant saving Xiaohui.

DR. ZHAO
Mrs. Zhou would have to be evaluated for coercion. And Yiyi would need psychological screening. This isn't a simple procedure.

SU MINGZHE
(furious whisper)
My daughter is missing in this hospital while my son codes upstairs. If we find her, and she agrees, will you file the paperwork?

DR. ZHAO
I can start the process. But Mr. Su, the board may still deny it.

SONG YUANJIANG
Sir, security footage shows Yiyi wandering toward the pediatric ward on the fourth floor. Alone.

INT. HOSPITAL WARD - DAY

YIYI sits on a hospital bed, clutching a stuffed rabbit. SU MINGZHE enters, his face transforming from panic to a fragile hope.

SU MINGZHE
(gently)
Found you, little rabbit.

YIYI
Daddy! I got lost. I was trying to find Xiaohui's room.

SU MINGZHE
(sitting beside her)
You want to help your brother?

YIYI
(nodding)
Mommy says he's very sick.

SU MINGZHE
He needs a special gift. From inside you. A tiny bean that makes him better.

YIYI
(scared but brave)
Will it hurt?

SU MINGZHE
A little. But you're so strong. You'd do that for Xiaohui?

YIYI
(wiping her eyes)
If it makes him play with me again.

SU MINGZHE
(hugging her)
Good girl. Such a good girl.

He looks over her head at the NURSE entering.

SU MINGZHE
(to Nurse)
Preliminaries first. Draw her blood. Start the assessment protocol.

The NURSE approaches with a pediatric blood draw kit. YIYI extends her arm, trying to be brave. The rabbit falls from her lap.

title: Ex-Husband Gains Mind Reading After Divorce
description: A woman threatens to jump from a building to prevent divorce, but her husband coldly calls her bluff. After a car accident, he gains the ability to hear her inner thoughts.
context:
Title: Ex-Husband Gains Mind Reading After Divorce
Description: A woman threatens to jump from a building to prevent divorce, but her husband coldly calls her bluff. After a car accident, he gains the ability to hear her inner thoughts.

EXT. OFFICE BUILDING - DAY

LIN XUEZHI (28, porcelain defiance in a battered bridal gown) stands at the rooftop edge.

Below, HE YAN (35, tailored suit tailored cruelty) and his assistant ZHANG YUAN (30s, nervous energy) look up.

LIN XUEZHI
He Yan! If you divorce me, I'll jump!

HE YAN
(coldly)
Third building this month. Try the north tower—it's taller.

LIN XUEZHI
(angrily)
You bastard!

HE YAN
Now you're getting it.

He turns to leave.

ZHANG YUAN
(worried)
President He, the reporters—

HE YAN
Will have to find a new story. She won't jump.

LIN XUEZHI
(shouting)
He Yan! I will never sign those papers!

A black sedan SCREENS around the corner and speeds toward them, horn BLARING.

HE YAN shoves ZHANG YUAN aside. The sedan clips him. He crumples, head cracking against pavement.

LIN XUEZHI
(scream)
HE YAN!

She sprints for the fire escape.
continuation:
EXT. CITY STREET - CONTINUOUS

LIN XUEZHI cradles HE YAN, blood pooling beneath his head.

LIN XUEZHI
(frantically)
He Yan! Please—

HE YAN
(weakly)
Am I—

LIN XUEZHI (V.O.)
 dying? God. I wanted to hurt you, not kill you. I wanted you to need me. If you die, I'm still Mrs. He. The shares. The will. Stop. Think of him, not the money. The money is just... security. If he lives.

LIN XUEZHI
(trembling)
He Yan, don't leave me...

INT. HOSPITAL WARD - DAY

HE YAN lies unconscious, head wrapped, eyes closed. ZHANG YUAN stands nearby.

The door bursts open. LIN XUEZHI, in wrinkled casual clothes, rushes in.

She seizes his hand.

LIN XUEZHI
(crying softly)
He Yan. He Yan, wake up.

ZHANG YUAN
Madam, his monitors—

HE YAN slowly opens his eyes.

LIN XUEZHI
(gasp)
He Yan—

LIN XUEZHI (V.O.)
 —thank God. The prenup is void if he dies. No. Stop. I just want him to see me. Not the contract. Me.

HE YAN stares at her, hearing every silent word.

title: Descending the Mountain into the Mortal World
description: A master chess player sends his disciple, who possesses mystical powers and a thirst for justice, down the mountain with meaningful gifts to confront a dark past.
context:
Title: Descending the Mountain into the Mortal World
Description: A master chess player sends his disciple, who possesses mystical powers and a thirst for justice, down the mountain with meaningful gifts to confront a dark past.

EXT. LAKESIDE PAVILION - DAY

A white-haired MASTER and his disciple YE CHEN face each other across a stone chessboard. Morning mist rises from the lake.

MASTER (V.O.)
Within these nineteen lines, the world itself unfolds. Every stone placed is a choice made.

Ye Chen captures a white piece, his movements precise with barely contained energy. The Master strokes his beard, studying the board.

MASTER (V.O.)
The question isn't who wins. It's whether he can see beyond the board.

INT. MENTAL CHESS REALM - CONTINUOUS

The pavilion dissolves into a starlit void. A massive chess grid pulses beneath their feet.

MASTER
Watch closely.

The Master gestures. His pieces ignite into constellations, forming an overwhelming tide of light.

MASTER
All Things as Chess.

YE CHEN (V.O.)
He expects fury. He taught me better.

Ye Chen's pieces shimmer with golden fire, arranging themselves into a coiled DRAGON that doesn't strike—it rests, watchful, between the stars.

YE CHEN
I see your formation. Do you see mine?

The Master's tide of light halts, unable to advance without destroying the entire pattern.
continuation:
EXT. LAKESIDE PAVILION - DAY

Ye Chen places a final black stone. The game is complete. The Master exhales slowly.

MASTER
You didn't shatter my attack. You made it obsolete. That's... unexpected.

YE CHEN
I learned from watching you.

MASTER
Ten years ago, you came to me hollowed out. Body broken. Spirit burning. I gave you the Qilin Kidneys so you could heal. Today, you show me you can wield such power without letting it consume you.

YE CHEN
(quietly)
And now?

MASTER
Now you must face what made you. The Jiang family still roams free. They took your future; you'll reclaim your name.

YE CHEN
(stiffening)
Master... the procedure they used on me. No anesthesia. They left me to die.

MASTER
(tosses him a leather pouch)
Then make them feel every choice they've made. Take this.

Ye Chen catches it. Inside: four objects that gleam even in daylight.

MASTER
The obsidian card holds resources—use them to rebuild what was destroyed. The token commands the Angel Guard; they'll follow you because they've seen what you survived, not because I command it. The ring was earned when you chose restraint over victory today. And the golden needle... use it on those who deserve a second chance you never received.

YE CHEN
You're not coming back, are you?

The Master turns away, hands clasped behind his back.

MASTER
My path ends where yours begins. Three years, and you've become everything I hoped. And feared.

(beat)
The Qilin Blood in your veins will draw many things—power, temptation, old ghosts. Remember why you chose the dragon's watchfulness over the dragon's fire.

YE CHEN
(lowers his head)
Master... thank you. For the kidneys. For the lesson. For everything.

MASTER
Go. Before I forget my own teachings.

Ye Chen bows deeply, then walks toward the mountain path. He doesn't look back.

The Master watches him go, his satisfied smile fading into quiet concern.

MASTER
(softly)
A hidden dragon rises. May the world be ready.

FADE OUT.

title: Guardian God of Jiang Domain
description: A powerful lord returns home to find his benefactor dead and his family in danger from a scheming mistress and treacherous relative.
context:
Title: Guardian God of Jiang Domain
Description: A powerful lord returns home to find his benefactor dead and his family in danger from a scheming mistress and treacherous relative.

EXT. GOLF COURSE - DAY

JIANG SHOU is swinging a golf club, with two MAIDS in red qipao standing behind him.

He swings forcefully, and the golf ball flies into the distance.

A convoy of luxury cars arrives and stops by the roadside. The lead vehicle is a white sports car.

QING YUN gets out of the sports car, followed by a group of SUBORDINATES in black.

QING YUN leads everyone running quickly toward JIANG SHOU.

Everyone runs behind JIANG SHOU and kneels on one knee.

QING YUN
Qing Yun pays respects to the Supreme Lord of Jiang Domain.

SUBORDINATES
(in unison)
We pay respects to the Supreme Lord of Jiang Domain!

JIANG SHOU turns around, his expression calm.

JIANG SHOU
Rise. This is a personal matter now.

QING YUN
Supreme Lord, Jiang Domain remains peaceful in your absence.

JIANG SHOU
Good. Then my work there is done.

QING YUN
Forgive my intrusion, but there is urgent news from your homeland.

JIANG SHOU
Speak.

QING YUN
Old Master Jiang has fallen. Li Yue and Jiang Xun have taken control of the estate. Your sister's safety cannot be guaranteed.

JIANG SHOU's grip tightens on his club. He slowly places it back in the bag.

JIANG SHOU
The old man gave me everything. And this is how they repay his memory?

JIANG SHOU
Qing Yun!

QING YUN
Yes!

JIANG SHOU
Ready the convoy. We're going home.

QING YUN
Yes!

JIANG SHOU turns and leads everyone away with determined strides.
continuation:
INT. MOURNING HALL - DAY

Inside the mourning hall, LI YUE kneels before the ancestral tablet, pretending to mourn. JIANG XUN stands beside her, his voice low and urgent.

LI YUE
(quietly, with a smirk)
The lawyers finalize the inheritance papers tomorrow. Once Jiang Yun's signature is on them, she'll have nothing.

JIANG XUN
She trusts me. Her dear uncle, looking out for her interests.

LI YUE
And the old fool actually thought she'd inherit everything. Ridiculous.

JIANG XUN
He always favored my brother's brats. But dead men can't protect their children.

LI YUE
Hush. Someone might hear.

JIANG XUN
Let them. By the time anyone realizes what happened, it will be too late.

The two exchange a glance, their smiles cold.

Suddenly, JIANG YUN appears at the doorway, having overheard. Her face pales with shock.

JIANG YUN
(whispering, horrified)
Uncle... what have you done?

title: Revenge of the Betrayed General's Daughter
description: A woman is tortured and murdered by her lover and his mistress after her family helped him rise to power.
context:
Title: Revenge of the Betrayed General's Daughter
Description: A woman is tortured and murdered by her lover and his mistress after her family helped him rise to power.

INT. WOODSHED - NIGHT

In the dim woodshed, flames flicker in a brazier.

GU YANHANG, in blood-stained white robes, wears an iron collar and kneels in the dirt. Before her stands PEI ZHI in black, his face unreadable. Her father, FATHER GU, bleeds in shackles nearby.

A RED-ROBED WOMAN holds a wine cup, watching.

GU YANHANG
(quiet, broken)
Pei Zhi. Let him die at home. Not like this.

PEI ZHI lifts fire tongs from the brazier—a branding iron glows at their tip, his house sigil.

GU YANHANG
(horrified recognition)
That brand... you swore it would never touch my flesh.

PEI ZHI presses it to FATHER GU's throat. The sizzle cuts her words.

GU YANHANG
(screams)

GU YANHANG
(choking on smoke)
Father! Shuobei—was it worth it? Worth ten winters of false vows?

PEI ZHI's hand trembles once. He drives a wooden spike through FATHER GU's chest.

GU YANHANG
(collapses)

PEI ZHI
continuation:
(flat)
Your name was the only thing worth keeping.

GU YANHANG
(over her father's body)
Then you were never worthy of it.

RED-ROBED WOMAN
She's learned too late. Just like her father.

RED-ROBED WOMAN produces a poison vial.

PEI ZHI
(hand out)
Give it to me.

GU YANHANG looks up—hope or horror, unclear.

PEI ZHI
(leaning close, pouring)
Sleep now.

His thumb brushes her lip—a ghost of old habit—then forces the poison down. RED-ROBED WOMAN laughs.

QUICK FLASHBACK MONTAGE:
- GU YANHANG carves PEI ZHI's sigil into a shield, laughing.
- She kisses his thumb as he traces her smile.
- Their foreheads touch; his hand at her neck—not a collar, but a caress.

BACK TO PRESENT:

GU YANHANG (V.O.)
(venom-quiet)
Pei Zhi... that thumb. I'll take it from you myself.

She convulses, eyes fixed on his. Dies unclosed, unforgiven.

title: Yinyang Village: Rebirth Blood Pu
description: A village doctor investigates the mysterious plague that killed his father, uncovering dark secrets involving ancient witchcraft and blood rituals.
context:
Title: Yinyang Village: Rebirth Blood Pu
Description: A village doctor investigates the mysterious plague that killed his father, uncovering dark secrets involving ancient witchcraft and blood rituals.

INT. DARK ROOM - NIGHT

A woman in a red traditional Chinese wedding dress kneels before an altar table, her back to us. A candle burns. Ritual objects rest on the table.

SOUND EFFECT: Muffled weeping that twists into a giggle.

The screen flashes to black.

EXT. MISTY FOREST - NIGHT

DUGU MU (20s, medical bag on his back) runs through the mist. He clutches a SPINNING compass.

DUGU MU (V.O.)
My father died three days ago. His last words: "Chongming Village. The plague that wasn't a plague."

Dugu Mu stops. The compass needle STOPS—pointing at a village gate swallowed by fog. He pulls out an ANCIENT BOOK. The cover reads "Ancient Witchcraft Codex." Pages flip themselves, stopping at a diagram: a woman and man bound to an altar, bodies marked with Yin-Yang symbols.

DUGU MU (V.O.)
The codex spoke of blood rituals. Of bodies preserved beyond death. Of a bargain that marks its vessels for exactly one year.

A vision flashes: an OLD MAN with a goatee, hunched over the same book, cutting his palm.
continuation:
EXT. RAINY FOREST - NIGHT

The sky is covered with dark clouds. Thunder and lightning flash.

The Old Man stands in the pouring rain, raising both hands high. Grief and madness war on his face.

OLD MAN
Souls bewildered, Yin and Yang reversed! I will not lose her!

INT. DARK ROOM - NIGHT

The woman in red still kneels before the altar. The Old Man enters, holding a candle that trembles.

OLD MAN
(whispering)
Meimei... I heard you singing.

The woman in red slowly turns her head. Her face is pale, her eyes vacant, but her smile is knowing.

WOMAN IN RED
(voice distorted)
Father... the year is done.

The candlelight flares green. Her shadow on the wall has too many limbs.

title: Dragon King of the Heavens, Jiang Fusheng
description: Jiang Fusheng, betrayed by his half-brother and stripped of his dragon blood, survives and returns three years later as a humble village keeper with unmatched power.
context:
Title: Dragon King of the Heavens, Jiang Fusheng
Description: Jiang Fusheng, betrayed by his half-brother and stripped of his dragon blood, survives and returns three years later as a humble village keeper with unmatched power.

EXT. JIANG CLAN SACRED GROUNDS - DAY

Morning mist clings to ancient stone circles. JIANG FUSHENG (20s, proud in crimson robes) gasps, his sword trembling. Golden veins that once glowed beneath his skin are fading.

JIANG CHENJUN (late 20s, black scaled armor) circles like a wolf, his own aura crackling with stolen power. He smirks.

JIANG CHENJUN
The dragon blood's finally drained, brother. Canglan purged the last drop from your veins last night. You're just a bastard again.

JIANG FUSHENG stumbles, fingers clawing at his chest where poison still burns.

JIANG FUSHENG
(Chenjun...)
We shared the same cradle. I carried you through the Bone Tempering Valley when your legs broke.

JIANG CHENJUN's jaw tightens. He attacks—no honor, just raw fury. Their swords sing. Jiang Fusheng's blade moves with remembered grace, but slower... weaker. Chenjun's strikes carry unnatural weight.

JIANG CHENJUN
Shared? You took everything! Father's eye, the elders' hope, MY BIRTHRIGHT!

He hammers down a blow that shatters Fusheng's guard. Fusheng falls to one knee.

JIANG CHENJUN
(raising sword)
A bastard should know his place.

Fusheng's sword flashes up—not at Chenjun, but at a pendant around his neck. The chain snaps. A childhood charm falls.

FLASHBACK TO:

EXT. BONE TEMPERING VALLEY - NIGHT (10 YEARS EARLIER)

Two boys huddle in a cave. YOUNG FUSHENG (8) ties a carved dragon tooth around YOUNG CHENJUN's (6) neck.

YOUNG FUSHENG
This keeps you safe, little brother. Promise me—

YOUNG CHENJUN
—promise we'll always protect each other!

Their small hands clasp. Blood oaths in the dark.

BACK TO:

EXT. JIANG CLAN SACRED GROUNDS - DAY

JIANG CHENJUN stares at the charm in the dirt. For a heartbeat, his ferocity cracks.

JIANG FUSHENG
(breathing hard)
Leave. Just... leave.

Fusheng turns. Chenjun's eyes harden. He lunges.

The blade slides through Fusheng's back with a wet sound. No flash. No drama. Just betrayal in its purest form.

FATHER JIANG (50s, white beard stained with power) emerges from the mist with twelve BLACKROBES. Their presence warps the air.

JIANG CHENJUN
Father... the Supreme Bone is ready.

JIANG FUSHENG
(through blood)
You knew... all along...

FATHER JIANG
Every dragon needs a whetstone. Your blood awakens his potential. Your sacrifice... is complete.

His staff descends. Not on Fusheng's body—but on his dantian. The core shatters audibly. Fusheng's scream is Silent.

JIANG FUSHENG
(voice barely there)
Then I become the ghost that haunts your throne.

His eyes close. Father Jiang doesn't even look at the body.

NARRATOR (V.O.)
Jiang Fusheng, heir apparent, died during the Canglan expedition. His brother inherited everything.

The Blackrobes depart. The charm lies in the dirt, swallowed by blood.

DISSOLVE TO:
