ON SCREEN: THREE YEARS LATER - THE VILLAGE THAT REFUSES TO BE FOUND
continuation:
EXT. HIDDEN DRAGON VILLAGE - NIGHT

Moonlight carves the characters "Hidden Dragon" into a weathered stone arch. The characters shift if stared at too long.

A column of masked PRISON GUARDS marches MOSES—6'5", iron mask, chains that smoke with dark runes. Each step leaves scorched earth.

ON SCREEN: MOSES - SUPREME ASSASSIN, WANTED: 3,000 SPIRIT STONES

JIANG FUSHENG waits beneath the arch. Gray robes, wooden sandals. A jade token hangs at his waist—carved with the same dragon tooth pattern. His eyes are ancient lakes.

JIANG FUSHENG
State your business.

MASKED GUARD
By decree of the Sovereign, we deliver Moses to serve his sentence.

JIANG FUSHENG
The cow shed lacks a shoveler. The horse stable needs muck raked. Choose.

MOSES
(processed voice, dripping contempt)
A peasant gravekeeper dares—

He flexes. Chains explode into shrapnel. Guards scatter. Moses moves like oil over water, a blade of darkness forming in his hand.

JIANG FUSHENG doesn't move. He exhales.

The exhalation becomes a wind. The wind becomes a dragon's sigh. Moses and his men hang suspended, caught in an invisible maw that slowly... tightens.

JIANG FUSHENG
You mistake humility for helplessness. This is not a prison. It is a choice.

He flicks his wrist. They crash down—not onto earth, but into freshly tilled furrows that weren't there a moment ago.

MOSES
(terrified, gasping)
That technique... you're the one who—

JIANG FUSHENG
Choose.

MOSES
The shovel! The shovel, my lord!

GOD KING ZEUS (30s, lightning scars crossing his face) and YUN POTIAN (40s, one eye milky white) step from shadow. Both carry hoes like royal scepters.

GOD KING ZEUS
If you're the dog, I'm the leash.

MOSES
Zeus? The War God who levelled Sunfire City?

YUN POTIAN
East field's done. Those rune crops grow fast when you sing to them.

MOSES
Marshal Yun... your eye...

GOD KING ZEUS & YUN POTIAN
(perfect unison)
Keeper.

They bow—not low, but exactly right. The way you bow to a force of nature.

EXT. HIDDEN DRAGON VILLAGE - DAY

MOSES hoes a field of silver-leaved plants that whisper when the wind blows. His mask hangs from a post.

JIANG FUSHENG pours tea. The steam forms characters: "Patience."

A white sports car—electric silent—glides through the arch. BAI RUOWEI (28, white silk suit cut like armor) emerges. Her attendant carries a jade scroll case.

ON SCREEN: BAI RUOWEI - MATRIARCH OF THE SKY-IRON MERCHANTS

BAI RUOWEI
Jiang Fusheng. The dead heir of a dead clan, playing farmer. How... quaint.

JIANG FUSHENG
(sipping tea)
You're early. The divorce decree wasn't due until spring.

BAI RUOWEI freezes. The attendant drops the scroll case. It cracks on the stone.

ON SCREEN: TO BE CONTINUED

title: Tiger Courage, Dragon Prestige
description: A legendary warrior known as the Phoenix War God searches for her lost brother, who has been working as a delivery driver, unaware of his noble heritage.
context:
Title: Tiger Courage, Dragon Prestige
Description: A legendary warrior known as the Phoenix War God searches for her lost brother, who has been working as a delivery driver, unaware of his noble heritage.

INT. LUXURIOUS MANOR - DAY

A red carpet stretches across the manor courtyard. BODYGUARDS in black suits stand at attention. LIU MULAN strides forward, her military-green cloak billowing, every step radiating authority.

NARRATOR (V.O.)
The Sovereign's decree is simple: Liu Mulan, the Phoenix War God, is granted the title of King. She who turned the tide against three hundred thousand. She who commands the four seas.

ZHUQUE, sharp in leather, drops to one knee, head bowed.

ZHUQUE
Phoenix War God.

Behind her, LUO SONG (Grand Governor), SHEN WANSAN (tycoon), and SAI HUATUO (physician) follow suit, forming a semicircle of deference.

LUO SONG
Daxia recognizes its protector.

SHEN WANSAN
The markets bless this union.

SAI HUATUO
The people gain their healer.

ALL
Lord Phoenix.

LIU MULAN's gaze sweeps across them—brief, weighted acknowledgment.

LIU MULAN
Zhuque.

ZHUQUE
Your brother lives. Jiangcheng.

LIU MULAN
The night we lost him... twenty-three years. Your report says he's—?

ZHUQUE
A delivery rider. Electric scooter. Single income.

LUO SONG
(in quiet devastation)
A king's blood...

LIU MULAN
Jiangcheng. Now.

They move as one.
continuation:
EXT. PARK BENCH - DAY

LIU HUIQIANG perches on his scooter, devouring rice from a plastic container. GAO QILAN watches, smoothing his collar.

GAO QILAN
You'll choke.

LIU HUIQIANG
(still chewing)
Your soy chicken. Better than any banquet.

She offers him a thermos. He takes it, their fingers brushing.

GAO QILAN
Quit this. My uncle offered you warehouse work.

LIU HUIQIANG
And lose flexibility? Peak bonus is tonight. Three more orders, we're talking new shoes for—

GAO QILAN
—I'm not suffering. But I see you.

LIU HUIQIANG
I promised you a ceremony.

GAO QILAN
You promised to share your mapo tofu recipe. Still waiting.

His phone SCREAMS with a notification.

LIU HUIQIANG
Hospital order. 306, stat.

GAO QILAN
Don't run reds again.

LIU HUIQIANG
Only on Tuesdays.

He kisses her forehead, revs the scooter.

INT. HOTEL CORRIDOR - DAY

LIU HUIQIANG stops at 301, three delivery bags hanging from his shoulders. He knocks.

The door opens. A MAN in a designer shirt takes the food without looking up from his phone.

LIU HUIQIANG
Mr. Chen? Two meals, no cilantro. Extra chili oil on side.

MAN
Where's my cigarettes? Premiums. I tipped for them.

LIU HUIQIANG
Platform rules prohibit tobacco. But I can redirect you to—

MAN
It's 9pm. My deadline's midnight. You think I care about your app?

LIU HUIQIANG
I care about my rating. Sir.

MAN
Then care about this: one-star unless you're back in ten minutes with exactly what I asked for.

He slams the door. LIU HUIQIANG stares at the closed door, a muscle working in his jaw.

title: Fishing Beauty Survives in a Shura Field
description: A woman's soul is transported into the body of a villainess who has simultaneously provoked multiple dangerous men, and must now survive the deadly consequences.
context:
Title: Fishing Beauty Survives in a Shura Field
Description: A woman's soul is transported into the body of a villainess who has simultaneously provoked multiple dangerous men, and must now survive the deadly consequences.

INT. LUXURIOUS BEDROOM - NIGHT

CLOSE UP on JIANG HUAZHI's fingers gliding black silk into a perfect knot.

JIANG HUAZHI (20s, sleek predator in black) ties the blindfold around YUAN HENIAN's (20s, handsome shark in white) eyes. He is sitting on the edge of a silk-draped bed.

Her touch traces his jaw. His collar. A button pops. Fabric parts. Their faces inch together. Her lips brush his neck.

Then—she freezes. The room tilts. Her breath catches wrong.

SFX: DEAFENING WHOOSH. A digital GLITCH that distorts the air.

SYSTEM (V.O.)
(filtered, clinical)
Carrier locked. Host transfer protocol engaged.

JIANG HUAZHI blinks. The bedroom sharpens into terrifying focus. Her hand—someone else's hand—still rests on his chest.

SYSTEM (V.O.)
You have transmigrated into Jiang Huazhi. Secondary antagonist. Motivation: eliminate Qiao Yan and claim her male lead collection. Methods: seduction, coercion, chemical manipulation. Status: critical failure.

Her free hand flies to her mouth.

SYSTEM (V.O.)
continuation:
Current objective: survive. Your actions have triggered three simultaneous death flags.

FLASH IMAGES: LU SIYAN kneeling in a shower, shirt soaked, fists clenched. XI JIN slumped unconscious in a supply closet, necktie gag. GU YUZHI glaring from a Ferrari dashboard, jaw tight.

SYSTEM (V.O.)
Scholar Lu Siyan: currently locked in bathroom penance. Childhood friend Xi Jin: sedated and confined. Fiance Gu Yuzhi: ETA three minutes. Intent: homicide.

JIANG HUAZHI's knees buckle. She lands on the bed. A hysterical laugh bubbles out—cut short by a sob.

JIANG HUAZHI
(whispered)
Three... different... men... at once? What kind of kamikaze bimbo—

SYSTEM (V.O.)
Survival probability: 0.03%. Recommend immediate damage control.

YUAN HENIAN's hand snaps up. Yanks the blindfold down. His stare could etch glass.

YUAN HENIAN
Jiang Huazhi.

He captures her wrist. Squeezes until bone grinds.

YUAN HENIAN
(low, almost curious)
Did you truly believe I'd be the easiest to break?

END SCENE

title: Sorry, I Am the Leading Lady
description: Wen Chuxia prepares to meet her boyfriend's parents with lavish gifts, only to discover his family's unexpected plans to move into her apartment.
context:
Title: Sorry, I Am the Leading Lady
Description: Wen Chuxia prepares to meet her boyfriend's parents with lavish gifts, only to discover his family's unexpected plans to move into her apartment.

INT. WEN CHUXIA'S VANITY TABLE - DAY

WEN CHUXIA applies makeup—lipstick, mascara, perfume. The mirror reflects her nervous smile.

WEN CHUXIA (V.O.)
Three months of planning. One perfect afternoon. Just breathe.

WEN ZHENNAN, Wen Chuxia's father, appears, placing a velvet jewelry box beside her cosmetics.

WEN ZHENNAN
Your mother added this. For his mother.

Several MAIDS enter carrying trays: ginseng roots, a Hermès scarf, gold-plated tea sets.

WEN CHUXIA stands, surveying the display.

WEN CHUXIA
Dad, this is... a lot.

LIN XING, Wen Chuxia's mother, enters, adjusting a gift box.

LIN XING
We want them to see how treasured you are.

WEN CHUXIA
It's too much.

LIN XING
Love only grows where respect is planted.

WEN CHUXIA and her parents embrace.

WEN CHUXIA
I will be happy.

LIN XING
(smiling)
Yes.

WEN ZHENNAN
It's time.

WEN CHUXIA
Mom, Dad, I'll be going now.

LIN XING
Yes.

WEN ZHENNAN
Go ahead.

WEN CHUXIA walks out.
continuation:
INT. WEN FAMILY LIVING ROOM - CONTINUOUS

After WEN CHUXIA leaves, the BUTLER approaches WEN ZHENNAN and LIN XING.

BUTLER
The young man's family arrived early. They're waiting by her gate.

WEN ZHENNAN
Let her write her own story.

LIN XING
And if she falls?

WEN ZHENNAN
We'll catch her.

INT. CHUXIA'S APARTMENT LIVING ROOM - DAY

WEN CHUXIA arranges the gifts on the coffee table—each placement deliberate. The doorbell RINGS.

She opens it. LIN ZIQIANG stands there, flowers in hand.

LIN ZIQIANG
Chuxia. You look—

ZIQIANG'S MOTHER pushes past him, dragging a wheeled suitcase.

ZIQIANG'S MOTHER
—tired! City life is exhausting. Good thing we're here now.

Behind her, ZIQIANG'S SISTER and NEPHEW enter, carrying duffel bags and a plastic tray of eggs.

WEN CHUXIA
(confused)
Auntie, the hotel I booked—

ZIQIANG'S MOTHER
Hotel? Nonsense. We're family.

She surveys the apartment like a general claiming territory.

ZIQIANG'S MOTHER
Ziqiang said three bedrooms? Sister takes the small one, I'll take the master, and the boy gets your study.

WEN CHUXIA
The... master?

LIN ZIQIANG
(to Chuxia, low)
She just wants to see where we'll live...

WEN CHUXIA
We?

ZIQIANG'S SISTER opens the fridge, frowning.

ZIQIANG'S SISTER
No fresh milk? Little Bin needs milk every morning.

ZIQIANG'S NEPHEW kicks off his shoes on her white sofa, leaving a muddy print.

ZIQIANG'S NEPHEW
This is my new home?

WEN CHUXIA watches the footprint sink into designer fabric. The eggs sweat on marble. The suitcase blocks her hallway.

Her phone BUZZES—her mother's text: "Everything alright?"

WEN CHUXIA doesn't answer. She just stares at LIN ZIQIANG, waiting.

He smiles that same tight smile.

LIN ZIQIANG
Mom brought her homemade quilt. For our bed.

WEN CHUXIA looks at the quilt—polyester, floral-printed, utterly wrong. Her perfect afternoon dissolves into a stranger's living room.

title: Mr. Huo, Your Wife is a Bit Wild
description: A red-clad martial arts girl performing on an ancient-style street encounters the mysterious Mr. Huo when fate brings them together in an unexpected collision.
context:
Title: Mr. Huo, Your Wife is a Bit Wild
Description: A red-clad martial arts girl performing on an ancient-style street encounters the mysterious Mr. Huo when fate brings them together in an unexpected collision.

EXT. HERITAGE DISTRICT STREET - DAY

A GIRL IN RED, 20s, athletic and fierce, spins a long spear under a blooming peach tree. Tourists watch as petals drift down around her.

DIRECTOR (V.O.)
Action in three... two... one...

EXT. MODERN CITY STREET - DAY

MONTAGE:
- A black Porsche accelerates through afternoon traffic.
- MR. HUO (30s, sharp suit) grips the steering wheel, his luxury watch gleaming.
- His eyes, normally cold steel, now blink with disorientation.
- A motorcycle cuts across his lane.
- MR. HUO swerves, jaw clenched.

EXT. HERITAGE DISTRICT STREET - DAY

The GIRL IN RED strikes a bronze gong beside a vintage weapons rack. Tourists and locals turn.

GIRL IN RED
(shouting with practiced charm)
Witness living history, folks! Authentic martial arts from the Tianyi lineage!

She addresses the growing crowd with a performer's smile.

GIRL IN RED
They say home is where family helps, but out here, we rely on kind strangers. My family's school needs support. If you can, toss a coin. If you can't, your applause is just as valuable.

She hefts a convincing plaster "stone" above her head, preparing for her finale. The crowd murmurs with anticipation.

FEMALE TOURIST
(raising her phone)
This is incredible!
continuation:
INT. PORSCHE - DAY

MR. HUO's knuckles are white on the wheel. He blinks hard, fighting dizziness.

MR. HUO (V.O.)
(quietly)
Should've known they'd spike the toast. Never attend a "friendly" merger lunch.

EXT. HERITAGE DISTRICT STREET - DAY

A SKEPTICAL TEEN points at the stone, smirking.

SKEPTICAL TEEN
That thing's obviously fake!

The GIRL IN RED's smile doesn't falter. She locks eyes with him.

GIRL IN RED
Fake? Let's see if you can tell the difference.

She hurls the prop at him—not hard enough to hurt, but enough to startle. He stumbles back, tripping over a curb. The crowd roars approval. She winks, then collects tips in a wooden bowl while handing out cards.

GIRL IN RED
(to an elderly man)
Tianyi Martial Arts Hall offers heritage lessons. Show this card for a discount.

EXT. HERITAGE DISTRICT STREET - DAY

The GIRL IN RED counts her earnings in the shade, relief softening her features.

GIRL IN RED
(whispering)
Three months of rent. We might survive after all.

A black sedan rounds the corner too fast, screeching. Papers scatter. She whirls, planting both hands on the hood as the car halts inches away.

Through the windshield, her eyes meet MR. HUO's—his sharp with surprise, hers flashing with fury.

ON SCREEN: TO BE CONTINUED

title: The Marquis Lady's Rebirth
description: A woman betrayed by her husband and killed in a frozen apocalypse is reborn to the days before disaster strikes, determined to stockpile resources and seek revenge.
context:
Title: The Marquis Lady's Rebirth
Description: A woman betrayed by her husband and killed in a frozen apocalypse is reborn to the days before disaster strikes, determined to stockpile resources and seek revenge.

EXT. NINGYUAN MARQUIS MANOR ENTRANCE - DAY

The manor entrance is piled high with sacks and crates. SERVANTS busily carry goods into the manor.

SERVANT A
(adjusting slipping crate)
Steady now!

SERVANT B
(grunting under weight)
What's in these? Rocks?

SERVANT C
(to Servant D)
Third delivery this morning...

STEWARD (O.S.)
Mind the porcelain! Inside, quickly!

Several MERCHANTS and LADIES stand nearby, watching with growing alarm.

ONLOOKER A
(whispering)
That's the fifth grain merchant today.

ONLOOKER B
She bought out Chen's entire fur inventory. In summer!

ONLOOKER C
The Liu family just lost their daughter to her—paid triple for a dowry's worth of silk.

INT. NINGYUAN MARQUIS MANOR ENTRANCE - DAY

A MEDICINE MERCHANT rushes toward SU HUA, clutching a ledger.

MEDICINE MERCHANT
(breathless)
Lady Marquis, every herb from my shop—winter stock, fever tonics, wound salves. All delivered.

SU HUA, dressed in fine robes, holds a box filled with banknotes. She pulls out a stack without looking at the merchant.

SU HUA
The Liu Family Apothecary as well?

MEDICINE MERCHANT
(stammering)
They... they refused at first, but your price...

SU HUA places the notes in his hand and walks past, eyes fixed on the horizon.

SU HUA
Everything they have. By sundown.

The merchant bows repeatedly, backing away. The onlooking crowd erupts.

ONLOOKER D
The Liu shop too? That's half the city's medicine!

ONLOOKER E
She's emptied the granaries. What is she planning?

CLOTH SHOP OWNER
(to a companion)
She didn't even haggle. Just pointed at my most expensive furs and said 'all'.

MEDICINE MERCHANT
(joining them, wiping sweat)
Twelve years of stock. The rhubarb alone could supply an army.

CROWD
(shocked)
An army?

MEDICINE MERCHANT
(shaking his head)
In this heat? Most will spoil before autumn.

ONLOOKER F
Madness. Pure madness.

FEMALE ONLOOKER
(quietly)
They say the Marquis hasn't visited her chambers in months. Prefers that concubine from the Zhang household.

ONLOOKER G
Even grief doesn't excuse this.

ONLOOKER H
Alright, alright. Nothing to see.

The crowd gradually disperses. SU HUA stands in place, fingers trembling slightly as she touches a jade pendant at her throat.

SU HUA (V.O.)
Ten days. In ten days, this jade—and every coin I own—will be worthless. But these supplies...

FLASHBACK:
continuation:
EXT. EXECUTION GROUND - DAY

SU HUA and her family, wearing prisoner's garb, kneel in the dirt. SOLDIERS hold them at spearpoint.

SU HUA (V.O.)
The Duke of Dingguo's "treason." Ningyuan Manor implicated. Confiscated. Exiled.

NING YANSHAN emerges from the crowd, pointing at GENERAL SU.

NING YANSHAN
There! The General's seal—found in the Duke's study. Proof of their conspiracy!

GENERAL SU
(struggling against bonds)
Ning Yanshan! I treated you as a son!

NING YANSHAN
(cold)
You treated me as a fool.

The EXECUTIONER's blade rises. Blood splatters across Su Hua's cheek.

SU HUA
(screaming, voice cracking)
Father!

EXT. SNOWY ROAD - DAY

Heavy snow blankets a line of shackled prisoners. Frozen corpses dot the roadside.

SU HUA (V.O.)
We marched for ten days. Then winter came early.

A FIRE USER conjures flame, warming abusive GUARDS. An ICE USER freezes a prisoner's shackles to brittle cracking.

SU HUA (V.O.)
Some awakened. Most died.

SU HUA trudges forward, frostbitten, as prisoners collapse around her.

INT. CAVE - NIGHT

SU HUA lies weakly on frozen ground. NING YANSHAN enters with ABILITY USERS—scavengers with dead eyes.

NING YANSHAN
(to the Users)
She's General Su's daughter. Strong stock. Might survive the bonding.

ABILITY USER ONE
(grinning)
And if not?

NING YANSHAN
Then she dies like the rest.

He shoves SU HUA forward. She grabs his sleeve.

SU HUA
(whisper)
Why?

NING YANSHAN
(ripping away)
Your dowry was never enough.

The ABILITY USERS close in. SU HUA's scream echoes off stone.

END FLASHBACK.

EXT. NINGYUAN MARQUIS MANOR ENTRANCE - DAY

SU HUA's tears fall on the jade pendant. She closes her fist around it, then opens her hand. The pendant is gone.

SU HUA (V.O.)
Heaven gave me back the days. This time, I have the supplies. And soon—

SU HUA turns. A faint red mark glows on her forehead. She gestures. A nearby crate vanishes with a soft ripple of air.

SU HUA (V.O.)
—I will have the power.

title: Mr. Jin, Your Wife Has Run Away With Your Daughter Again
description: A woman trapped in a loveless marriage faces betrayal and near-death, confronting her husband who never believed her cries for help.
context:
Title: Mr. Jin, Your Wife Has Run Away With Your Daughter Again
Description: A woman trapped in a loveless marriage faces betrayal and near-death, confronting her husband who never believed her cries for help.

EXT. SNOWY STAIRCASE - DAY

LU YING, wearing a white dress, walks barefoot up snow-dusted stairs. Snowflakes drift around her. Her expression is desolate as she climbs.

INT. HOTEL ROOM - DAY

LU YING walks barefoot through a modern hotel room, heading toward a standalone bathtub. Without hesitation, she steps into the already-filled bathtub while still wearing her dress, then slowly lies down, letting the water submerge her body.

LU YING (V.O.)
No one wants me to live. Not even my husband of three years, who I've known for twenty-two years since childhood. Not even for her sake.

INT. DARK TUNNEL - NIGHT

FLASHBACK. LU YING sits in a dark tunnel, hands bound behind her back, mouth gagged. A MAN (KIDNAPPER) holds a phone to her mouth.

LU YING
(muffled, calling out)
Jin Beizhou! Jin Beizhou, something happened to me!

The phone screen shows an ongoing call with "JIN BEIZHOU."

JIN BEIZHOU (V.O.)
(through phone, voice tight)
Had enough of your games? Do you even remember what day it is today?

LU YING
(crying)
I'm not playing, Jin Beizhou! I'm going to die!

JIN BEIZHOU (V.O.)
(through phone)
Isn't Lu Ying the indestructible cockroach? If you really die, I'll follow you to the grave.

LU YING
(desperately)
Jin Beizhou! Jin Beizhou, no!

The KIDNAPPER hangs up the phone.

KIDNAPPER
Looks like he's not coming to save you. So you can just stay here and wait to die!

The KIDNAPPER leaves. A car drives away and the tunnel plunges into darkness. LU YING is left alone. Another car approaches from deep in the tunnel—police lights flash red and blue.

LU YING
Help! Over here! Please!
continuation:
INT. HOTEL ROOM - DAY

Back to reality. LU YING is in the bathtub, her own cries for help echoing in her ears. Her phone rings on the nearby shelf. She sits up abruptly and answers.

FRIEND (V.O.)
What's wrong with you? Running away on his birthday? The announcement just dropped—Jin Meimei's pregnant. She even had the nerve to pose with your daughter at the party. People who don't know would think she's the real Mrs. Jin.

LU YING
What is it?

FRIEND (V.O.)
Jin Beizhou left the party early. Just... vanished. Babe, where's your daughter? The nanny's frantic.

LU YING
She's safe. With me.

FRIEND (V.O.)
Okay. But you must let me know if you're alright.

LU YING hangs up and numbly places the phone back on the shelf. The doorbell rings. She gets up, changes clothes, and goes to answer the door.

JIN BEIZHOU stands at the door in a brown suit, his expression cold but his jaw tight.

LU YING
Why are you here?

JIN BEIZHOU
The police report from the tunnel. I had to identify some belongings. Then I tracked the credit card.

LU YING
So you know it wasn't a game.

JIN BEIZHOU
I know you took my daughter. I know you chose today. What I don't know is why I'm still here.

LU YING
Now you can leave.

LU YING tries to close the door, but JIN BEIZHOU blocks it with his hand. He walks into the room.

JIN BEIZHOU
Lu Ying, there's a limit to playing games.

LU YING
(turning around, eyes angry)
I never had limits. Why don't you just kill me then!

LU YING glares at JIN BEIZHOU with fury, her eyes filled with determination.

title: Compete with Me on Fathers? My Dad is the Dragon Emperor!
description: The legendary Dragon Emperor discovers his wife and son are living in poverty and humiliation, and vows to return and protect them.
context:
Title: Compete with Me on Fathers? My Dad is the Dragon Emperor!
Description: The legendary Dragon Emperor discovers his wife and son are living in poverty and humiliation, and vows to return and protect them.

EXT. ABANDONED FACTORY EXTERIOR - NIGHT

Night shrouds a dilapidated factory. Broken windows breathe cold air.

INT. ABANDONED FACTORY - NIGHT

White-clad soldiers clash with black-clad raiders. Steel rings against steel.

Two FEMALE ASSASSINS in black leather cut through three soldiers with synchronized precision.

A SKULL-MASKED LEADER charges with a greatsword. They drop him with a leg sweep—he crashes, clutching his hamstring.

Through the smoke, THE GRIM REAPER emerges, scythe blade gleaming. The assassins attack. He deflects both with a single spin, sending them sprawling.

GRIM REAPER
(chuckling low)

GRIM REAPER
Pests.

The ceiling EXPLODES. A figure in GOLDEN ARMOR crashes down, GREEN DRAGON CRESCENT BLADE catching the light. CHU ZHANTIAN lands in a crouch.

He rises. One swing—three raiders fall. Another—two more.

GRIM REAPER
Identity?

CHU ZHANTIAN
A dragon among men. An emperor among dragons.

FEMALE ASSASSIN
(gasping)
Dragon... Emperor?

GRIM REAPER
Impossible! You vanished—

CHU ZHANTIAN
My domain is inviolate. Choose your death.

Grim Reaper charges. Their blades meet—his shatters. A red line appears on his throat. He drops.

The assassins throw down their weapons, crawling forward.

FEMALE ASSASSIN
We were forced! Please—let us serve—

CHU ZHANTIAN
Service requires honor.

His blade flashes. The assassins collapse.
continuation:
INT. ABANDONED FACTORY - LATER

Bodies litter the concrete. CHU ZHANTIAN stands motionless. QINGLONG drops from above, one knee down, tablet extended.

QINGLONG
Emperor. The Northern Seal has finally lifted. Your family—

CHU ZHANTIAN
Where?

QINGLONG
Jinghai. Construction site and West Market.

On the tablet: a woman hauling bricks, a young man gutting fish.

CHU ZHANTIAN's knuckles whiten on his blade.

CHU ZHANTIAN
(quietly, dangerously)
Five years holding the demon gate... and this is their "protection"?

QINGLONG
The seal hid them from our enemies. And our eyes.

CHU ZHANTIAN
Summon them all. Every. Single. One.

EXT. CITY BUILDING - DAY

A skyscraper buckles inward. Windows cascade downward.

INT. MARKET - DAY

Fluorescent lights hum over fish scales. CHU XIAOQIANG, frayed apron tied tight, guts fish with mechanical precision. LIN XUEYAO counts worn bills.

CHU XIAOQIANG
Another month. We'll have it.

LIN XUEYAO
You're getting faster.

She wipes concrete dust from his cheek. He catches her hand.

CHU XIAOQIANG
Your father's offer—

LIN XUEYAO
—is still refused.

Behind them, MOTHER hauls ice buckets, her back permanently bent.

THUG
(O.S.)
Move it, stink-fish.

Two FLORAL-SHIRT THUGS kick the stall. Fish spill across concrete.

THUG
Boss Huang's spot. Rent's due.

The second thug grabs LIN XUEYAO's wrist.

THUG 2
Nice hands for a fish-monger's girl. Boss Huang needs a secretary.

CHU XIAOQIANG's knife SLAMS into the wood—quivering. For an instant, his eyes flash with something... not quite human.

CHU XIAOQIANG
Let. Her. Go.

The thugs laugh. The knife's handle cracks under his fingers.

title: Peerless Cute Baby: Genius Mother is Stunning
description: A betrayed noblewoman loses everything to her scheming sisters, but after a tragic death, her body is taken over by a modern warrior who vows to reclaim what was stolen and exact revenge.
context:
Title: Peerless Cute Baby: Genius Mother is Stunning
Description: A betrayed noblewoman loses everything to her scheming sisters, but after a tragic death, her body is taken over by a modern warrior who vows to reclaim what was stolen and exact revenge.

INT. UNDERWATER - DAY

YE CHUYUE and YE MOHAN embrace in a desperate kiss beneath the water. She struggles weakly, her eyes glazed—drugged.

INT. CAVE - DAY

YE NINGYAN holds a candle, leading CROWN PRINCE XUANYUAN CHEN and several HANDMAIDENS into a misty cave.

YE NINGYAN
Crown Prince, over here! Third Sister!

YE NINGYAN walks to the edge of a pool and looks at YE CHUYUE, whose clothes are disheveled and who appears disoriented.

YE NINGYAN
(voice trembling)
Third Sister... you were betrothed to the Crown Prince. How could you...

XUANYUAN CHEN looks at YE CHUYUE with fury.

XUANYUAN CHEN
You. I will destroy your face. Let's see your shame then.

XUANYUAN CHEN casts a spell. A pink beam of light strikes YE CHUYUE's face.

YE CHUYUE
(in pain)
The tea... it was you...

YE CHUYUE touches her bleeding face, consumed by agony.

YE CHUYUE
My face! My face! Ah!

TRANSITION: EIGHT MONTHS LATER
continuation:
EXT. SEPARATE COURTYARD - NIGHT

YE CHUYUE, heavily pregnant, cries out in pain in the courtyard.

YE CHUYUE
Someone! Is anyone there! I'm going into labor!

YE RUOXUE slowly approaches, carrying a lantern.

YE CHUYUE
Elder Sister, please help me, my child...

YE RUOXUE
Don't be afraid, Third Sister. The pain will end soon. Let me help you.

YE RUOXUE suddenly reveals a vicious expression and casts a spell. A green light is extracted from YE CHUYUE's body and flows into her own hand.

YE CHUYUE
(screaming)
My cultivation! My core!

YE RUOXUE
Ye Chuyue, your mother stole my mother's position. You stole my status. This is what you owe me.

YE RUOXUE
(continuing to cast the spell)
A divine root, wasted on a whore's body. Better I take it, to please... him.

YE RUOXUE laughs maniacally as she completely absorbs YE CHUYUE's cultivation.

YE CHUYUE
(in agony)
Go to hell...

NARRATOR (V.O.)
Once heaven's favored child. Framed by a sister, face destroyed by my fiancé, dantian crippled, martial root stolen. How tragic... this life.

TRANSITION: FIVE YEARS LATER

EXT. STREET - DAY

XUANYUAN CHEN rides a white horse, leading a wedding procession with gongs and drums, very lively.

INT. TAVERN - DAY

YE CHUYUE stands on the second floor of a tavern, watching the procession below. Her face is hidden by a veil.

YE CHUYUE (V.O.)
Xuanyuan Chen. Today, you die.

YE CHUYUE leaps from the building and crashes heavily to the ground, blood flowing everywhere. Her veil falls away, revealing her scarred face.

PASSERBY A
Look, the Ye family's fool jumped off the building!

PASSERBY B
Seeking death by jumping! She must be jealous that the Crown Prince is getting married!

PASSERBY A
Her death is a small matter, but she'll bring misfortune to the Ye family!

MYSTERIOUS VOICE (V.O.)
Your hatred... I accept. Phoenix Flame, awaken.

A mysterious power flows into YE CHUYUE's body. Her eyes emit golden light.

YE CHUYUE slowly opens her eyes and rises from the ground.

YE CHUYUE (V.O.)
I'm not dead. I am the Ancient Martial Sect Master of the 23rd century. I died purging traitors. Instead...

YE CHUYUE stands up, her eyes becoming sharp and fierce.

YE CHUYUE (V.O.)
Since I've taken this body, I will repay your vengeance tenfold.

title: Countdown to National Ruin, Little Princess's Thoughts Save the Emperor
description: A girl transmigrates into a novel as a cannon fodder princess about to be executed by a tyrant emperor, but discovers he can hear her inner thoughts.
context:
Title: Countdown to National Ruin, Little Princess's Thoughts Save the Emperor
Description: A girl transmigrates into a novel as a cannon fodder princess about to be executed by a tyrant emperor, but discovers he can hear her inner thoughts.

EXT. PALACE COURTYARD - DAY

LU JUNZHOU, the King of Chu, walks with a grave expression. He wears magnificent black and gold court robes and holds prayer beads in his hand.

A little girl with double buns, LU ZHAZHAO, kneels on the stone pavement. Her face is smudged with dirt, her eyes confused. In front of her on the ground lies a shattered jade pendant.

LU JUNZHOU stands on the steps, looking down at LU ZHAZHAO. Two GUARDS stand on either side of her.

LU JUNZHOU
(coldly)
The tribute from Loyalty Province. Destroyed by your carelessness.

LU JUNZHOU
(coldly)
Take her. Beheading at dawn.

LU ZHAZHAO (V.O.)
I've read this scene. The pendant... the tyrant... the execution at dawn.

The two GUARDS step forward and grab LU ZHAZHAO by the arms, dragging her away.

LU ZHAZHAO (V.O.)
Page three. I'm the princess who dies on page three.

LU ZHAZHAO
(screaming)
Wait!

LU ZHAZHAO breaks free from the guards and rushes toward LU JUNZHOU.

LU ZHAZHAO
(urgently)
continuation:
Father Emperor, the artisans can repair it! Just give me—

LU JUNZHOU
You think I tolerate you because of blood? You've disgraced the crown. Take her.

LU JUNZHOU turns around, his back to LU ZHAZHAO.

LU ZHAZHAO (V.O.)
Seven days. The ancestral rites. He collapses then. I just need to survive...

LU JUNZHOU pauses mid-step, as if hearing something. He tilts his head slightly.

LU JUNZHOU
(puzzled)
What voice is this?

LU ZHAZHAO (V.O.)
Once he's dead, the siege begins. Survive him. That's all.

LU JUNZHOU
(internally, surprised)
Inner thoughts?

LU ZHAZHAO
(shouting)
Seven days! Grant me seven days and I'll restore the pendant!

LU ZHAZHAO (V.O.)
Please. Let his pride be as monstrous as the book promised.

LU JUNZHOU whips around, his sharp gaze fixed on LU ZHAZHAO.

LU JUNZHOU
(commanding loudly)
Stop.

title: Heaven-Sent Divine Healer
description: A young healer who has mastered the ancient Tianxing Medical Canon descends from the mountain to the modern world to find his fiancée and face his destiny.
context:
Title: Heaven-Sent Divine Healer
Description: A young healer who has mastered the ancient Tianxing Medical Canon descends from the mountain to the modern world to find his fiancée and face his destiny.

INT. ETHEREAL SPACE - DAY

XIAO TIANYI sits cross-legged, surrounded by flowing energy. Five figures in RED MASKS circle him - each mask bears a different suffering expression: Pain, Fever, Delusion, Decay, Death. They whisper fragments of symptoms.

The figure of Pain reaches out. Tianyi touches it. Light flows from his fingers; the mask cracks, revealing peace beneath.

MASTER (65), weathered and blindfolded, sits opposite him.

MASTER
The seventh realm isn't about resisting distraction. It's about seeing that every poison is medicine misapplied. Your skill is proven. But can you heal what cannot be seen?

Tianyi's fingers tremble. The energy stutters.

MASTER (CONT'D)
Go. Find what the books couldn't teach you.

Tianyi opens his eyes. They shimmer with acupuncture points pulsing beneath the skin. He bows.

XIAO TIANYI
I will return with answers... or not at all.

EXT. CITY STREET - DAY

XIAO TIANYI navigates the sidewalk, his long hair tied with a worn jade ornament. He stops at a crosswalk, confused. A DELIVERY SCOOTER nearly clips him - Tianyi sidesteps with inhuman speed, hand instinctively forming a needle-holding gesture.

His phone buzzes. He taps it awkwardly.

SENIOR SISTER (V.O.)
Tianyi? I felt the mountain's energy shift. You're really—?

XIAO TIANYI
(into phone)
Where is she?

A group of TEENAGE GIRLS film him. One waves.

SENIOR SISTER (V.O.)
Third People's Hospital, VIP wing. But Tianyi, the modern world sees a boy, not a master.

XIAO TIANYI
Then I'll show them what I see.
continuation:
EXT. BUS STOP - DAY

XIAO TIANYI studies a digital bus schedule, brow furrowed. The display glitches— his reflection shows ancient robes for a heartbeat before returning to normal.

GIRL A (16), uniformed, nudges her friend.

GIRL A
Ask him. He's obviously foreign—

GIRL B
(approaching)
Need help with the app?

XIAO TIANYI
(to the schedule)
This "delayed." Is that a spiritual blockage?

GIRL B
(puzzled)
Just traffic—

XIAO TIANYI
Mundane obstruction. I understand.

His phone shows a map with a pulsing red marker: "GU RUOXUE - CRITICAL."

XIAO TIANYI (CONT'D)
Thank you, but I cannot wait for things merely delayed.

He walks away. The bus arrives.

INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - DAY

XIAO TIANYI runs, passing a room where a CHILD cries. His hand twitches toward his empty sleeve.

From behind a door marked "VIP WARD CONSULTATION":
DOCTOR (O.S.)
Mr. Gu, her neural pathways are degrading in patterns we've never—

OLD GU (O.S.)
(yelling)
I don't pay for "we've never!" I pay for answers!

The camera pans across a door sign: "VIP WARD - AUTHORIZED PERSONNEL ONLY."

INT. VIP WARD - DAY

GU RUOXUE (22) lies still, skin translucent. Her fingers clutch a half-finished sketch of a mountain landscape - the peaks match Tianyi's home. A jade bracelet pulses faintly in rhythm with Tianyi's heartbeat.

INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - DAY

OLD GU (60s, salt-and-pepper hair, bespoke suit soaked with sweat) looms over a shattered water glass. Two DOCTORS cower. A NURSE holds a tablet showing a brain scan lit like a star map.

OLD GU
(voice ragged)
That's my daughter's mind turning against her body in ways your textbooks never imagined.

DOCTOR 1
The neurological degeneration is—we're consulting specialists—

OLD GU
Consult faster.

He notices Tianyi in the doorway. Their eyes meet - Old Gu pauses.

BODYGUARD
Wait! This is the VIP ward area, you cannot enter.

XIAO TIANYI
I'm here to find my fiancée. Her name is Gu Ruoxue.

BODYGUARD
Sure you are, kid. Move—

XIAO TIANYI
(quietly, to Old Gu)
Her jade is calling. Let me answer.

Old Gu's hand flies to his own jade pendant - it warms against his chest. He stares at Tianyi's hands: perfectly steady, fingertips marked with faint, ancient needle scars.

OLD GU
(to bodyguards)
Let him pass.

The bodyguards part. Tianyi steps forward, his shadow falling across Ruoxue's doorway — but the shadow is shaped like a healer's mountain peak.

title: She Gave Birth But Her Ex-Husband Claims He's Celibate
description: After the death of the family matriarch, a wealthy heir prepares to abandon his intellectually disabled wife and unborn twins, unaware of the danger lurking around them.
context:
Title: She Gave Birth But Her Ex-Husband Claims He's Celibate
Description: After the death of the family matriarch, a wealthy heir prepares to abandon his intellectually disabled wife and unborn twins, unaware of the danger lurking around them.

EXT. BEIJING CITY - DAY

NEWS ANCHOR (V.O.)
Beijing's financial magnate, Madam Qin, passed away April 15th, 2024, at eighty-six. Her grandson, Qin Wangyan, now fully controls Qin Financial Group. Though rumors persist about his marriage, his wife's identity remains unconfirmed as the funeral approaches.

A black sedan crosses a bridge, stopping before a traditional Chinese mansion.

QIN WANGYAN, thirty, pristine suit, jaw tight, exits. He doesn't look back.

Across the courtyard, XIA WANQING, elegant in black, hand resting on her barely-there bump, watches with a smile that doesn't reach her eyes.

XIA WANQING (V.O.)
The dragon's finally dead. Nothing stands between Wangyan and me now.

INT. MEMORIAL HALL - DAY

White chrysanthemums blanket the hall. OLD MADAM QIN's portrait watches from above.

QIN WANGYAN sits alone, eyes hollow. He touches the frame once, then turns away.

On a side table, a document: "Divorce Agreement."

INT. LIVING ROOM - DAY

QIN NIANWAN, twenty-two, twin braids, a fading scar on her temple, moves carefully with her full-term belly. She carries a soup bowl, concentrating hard on each step.

QIN NIANWAN
(excitedly)
Wangyan home!

QIN WANGYAN
Come here.

QIN NIANWAN
(offering bowl)
Soup! Make you strong.

QIN WANGYAN takes it, sets it down untouched. He guides her to the sofa.

QIN WANGYAN
Sit.

She obeys, smiling. He picks up the divorce papers, hands them over.

QIN NIANWAN
What's this?

She turns pages upside down, squinting.

QIN NIANWAN
Too many words.

QIN WANGYAN
Sign your name. Here. Like I taught you.

Her face lights up. She takes the pen, tongue between teeth, copying each stroke with painstaking care.

QIN NIANWAN
Qin... Nian... Wan. Done, Wangyan!

QIN WANGYAN takes the papers, can't look at her. He calls his assistant.

QIN WANGYAN
Qin Chao?

QIN CHAO enters, eyes downcast.

QIN CHAO
Master. The hotel staff—nurse, doctor, nanny—everything's ready. As requested.

QIN CHAO
(quieter)
The twins come in five weeks. Sending her away now...

QIN WANGYAN
She'll want for nothing. I promised Grandmother. That's all that matters.
continuation:
INT. BEDROOM - NIGHT (FLASHBACK)

OLD MADAM QIN, frail, grips a MASTER's arm. On the bed, QIN WANGYAN lies still, monitors beeping.

OLD MADAM QIN
Three months. The doctors do nothing. You swear this works?

MASTER
The girl has imperfect understanding, but her fortune runs deep. She matches Third Master's chart. It is... your best chance.

OLD MADAM QIN
Then we marry them tonight.

INT. BEDROOM - DAY (FLASHBACK)

QIN NIANWAN in oversized wedding red, clutching the bedpost. QIN WANGYAN's eyes flutter open.

OLD MADAM QIN
(tears falling)
She did it. You woke. You owe her your life, Wangyan. Remember this.

INT. LIVING ROOM - DAY

QIN NIANWAN
Where we going, Wangyan?

QIN WANGYAN
You wanted snow. Qin Chao's taking you to Xiangshan. Hot springs. Snow.

QIN NIANWAN
You come too?

QIN WANGYAN
Soon. Wait for me there.

QIN NIANWAN
(jumping up)
Promise?

QIN WANGYAN nods. She runs upstairs, humming. He watches until she's gone, then crumples the divorce papers in his fist.

EXT. HOT SPRING HOTEL COURTYARD - NIGHT

Snow falls, thick. QIN NIANWAN stands alone, shivering, looking up at the dark windows.

QIN WANGYAN watches from a second-floor balcony, a shadow.

XIA WANQING appears beside QIN NIANWAN, umbrella shielding her from snow.

XIA WANQING
Waiting for someone?

QIN NIANWAN
Wangyan comes soon.

XIA WANQING
The funeral's over. The contract's fulfilled. Blessing marriages don't last, little sister.

QIN NIANWAN
We promised!

XIA WANQING
A promise to a simpleton doesn't count. Neither do children that shouldn't exist. Move.

She steps closer. QIN NIANWAN stumbles back, protecting her belly.

XIA WANQING turns to her SUBORDINATE, barely visible in the snowfall.

XIA WANQING
The room?

SUBORDINATE
Prepared. Third floor. Quiet.

XIA WANQING (V.O.)
Some accidents happen before the snow melts.

title: Where to Find You Upon Descending the Mountain
description: A young woman fleeing her master encounters an unconscious man in the forest. Five years later, her act of kindness has unexpected consequences.
context:
Title: Where to Find You Upon Descending the Mountain
Description: A young woman fleeing her master encounters an unconscious man in the forest. Five years later, her act of kindness has unexpected consequences.

INT. FOREST - NIGHT

A dead campfire.

In the background, SONG YIN (20s) lies beside the unconscious GU HENG (20s). She suddenly wakes with a start, sitting up with a confused and frightened expression.

SONG YIN (V.O.)
Oh heavens, I only stole three fish and two chickens from my master, did you really have to deliver a corpse to my side?

She checks her bamboo basket frantically, then notices GU HENG's ashen face. Her fingers hover near his neck, checking for a pulse. She exhales in relief.

SONG YIN (V.O.)
Alive then. For now.

SONG YIN discovers an exquisite jade pendant on the ground, glowing faintly. She picks it up to examine it.

SONG YIN
What's this?

She looks at the jade pendant, then at GU HENG, as if realizing something.

SONG YIN
Didn't I say that caring for a man brings bad luck for a lifetime, and spending money on a man brings bad luck for three lifetimes? I can't let you latch onto me.

She tosses the jade pendant back onto GU HENG.

SONG YIN
Here, take it back. We have no karmic debt.

SONG YIN stands up to leave, but hesitates. Her gaze lingers on Gu Heng's pale face. She takes a chicken and a fish from the bamboo basket beside her.

SONG YIN
I'm being righteous enough. Fish, chicken.

She places the fish and chicken on GU HENG's body.

SONG YIN
Payment given, we're even, never to meet again.

As she turns, GU HENG's hand twitches, almost touching her sleeve. Song Yin doesn't notice.
continuation:
SONG YIN picks up her bamboo basket, turns, and runs off.

After she leaves, the pendant PULSES. The fish and chicken emit a strange glow, transforming into the shapes of a dragon and phoenix. The light flows into GU HENG's body. In the distance, OLD MAN SHEN (60s, white hair and long beard) quietly observes everything. He nods, as if a long wait has ended.

GU HENG suddenly wakes with a start, discovering a chicken perched on his chest. He sits up, confused, clutching the pendant.

GU HENG
My dream last night wasn't fake.

He stands up, holding the chicken in one hand and the fish in the other, and sees the jade pendant SONG YIN dropped on the ground.

GU HENG
But this... this was given freely.

He pockets the pendant deliberately.

CUT TO:

ON SCREEN: Five Years Later

EXT. THATCHED HUT - DAY

A large pot simmers with chicken soup, steam rising.

Two children (a boy and a girl, about 5 years old) lean over the pot, drooling with desire. They both wear simple jade pendants identical to the one from the forest.

BOY
Mommy, it's so good.

SONG YIN (O.S.)
Quiet, darling, we're sneaking a taste.

The wooden door of the thatched hut is pushed open. OLD MAN SHEN walks out.

OLD MAN SHEN
So, you do know you're sneaking a taste.

The two children and SONG YIN (off-screen) all look up in alarm.

SONG YIN (O.S.)
Master! I thought you were meditating until sundown!

OLD MAN SHEN
The dragon and phoenix in the soup told me otherwise.

title: Marriage Ad on Electric Pole Turns Out to Be Beautiful Boss
description: Su Han discovers he has a superpower that turns fake things into reality, leading him to respond to a suspicious marriage advertisement.
context:
Title: Marriage Ad on Electric Pole Turns Out to Be Beautiful Boss
Description: Su Han discovers he has a superpower that turns fake things into reality, leading him to respond to a suspicious marriage advertisement.

INT. SU HAN'S BEDROOM - DAY

Su Han lies in bed, his gaunt face lit by a cheap phone screen. A fan whirs in the corner. Overdue bills are stacked on a crate serving as a nightstand.

SU HAN (V.O.)
My name is Su Han. I've been scammed by online romance, phone fraud, and job scams. But from now on, I will never be scammed again. If anyone tries to deceive me, their lies will become true. Starting today, I will marry a rich and beautiful woman and reach the peak of my life!

Su Han jerks awake, gasping. He checks his phone—3:47 AM.

SU HAN
(whispering)
A dream... it had to be.

His thumb hovers over a "Red Envelope Game" scam app. He taps it. The screen glitches. Then—DING! DING! DING! Bank notifications cascade down the screen.

SU HAN
(stunned)
It worked... it actually worked.

Su Han scrambles out of bed.

SU HAN
(shouting)
Finally! My turn!
continuation:
A notification pops up: "Security alert: Irregular activity. Account suspended."

Su Han's face falls. He stares at the screen, then laughs—a hollow, desperate sound.

SU HAN
Right. Too easy.

He tosses the phone on his pillow. It lands face-up on a cached screenshot: "Lonely female CEO seeks healthy male for marriage."

Su Han's breath catches. He slowly picks up the phone.

SU HAN
Healthy. Male. Age 28.

A dangerous smile crosses his face.

SU HAN
Let's test this properly.

INT. SHEN RUMENG'S HOME - DAY

A sharp-eyed woman in a black silk robe, SHEN RUMENG, sits on a leather sofa. Her phone rings—"Unknown Caller" flashes on screen. Beside her, a printed copy of the same marriage ad.

SHEN RUMENG
(answering)
This is Shen Rumeng. You have thirty seconds.

title: Family Forces Me to Take the Blame for Ten Years for Adopted Son
description: A man returns to his birth family after ten years, only to be forced to take the blame for a crime committed by his adopted brother.
context:
Title: Family Forces Me to Take the Blame for Ten Years for Adopted Son
Description: A man returns to his birth family after ten years, only to be forced to take the blame for a crime committed by his adopted brother.

INT. YUAN FAMILY LIVING ROOM - DAY

A television news broadcast is playing.

NEWS ANCHOR (V.O.)
Special report: A serious fire has broken out in the new district. According to sources, police are naming Yuan Yu, son of the Yuan family, as a person of interest.

YUAN MOTHER holds the trembling YUAN JUN protectively. YUAN FATHER sits rigid, his expression grave. The family watches in tense silence.

YUAN YU rushes into the living room.

YUAN YU
The police just called. You told them it was me?

YUAN SHUANG stands to the side and slams down her cup.

YUAN SHUANG
A-Jun didn't mean for this to happen. He needs help, not prison.

YUAN SHUANG
(pausing)
You can survive this. He can't.
continuation:
YUAN YU
(in disbelief)
What?

YUAN FATHER stands up from the sofa and walks over to YUAN YU.

YUAN FATHER
It's okay, son.

YUAN FATHER
That's why it has to be you. He wouldn't last.

YUAN MOTHER
(holding YUAN JUN, speaking to YUAN YU)
A-Yu, please. It's only until we sort this out.

YUAN YU
(emotionally agitated)
Dad, Mom, Sis... I'm your biological son. Ten years I waited to come home. And him? He's—

YUAN FATHER suddenly slaps YUAN YU across the face.

YUAN FATHER
You ungrateful bastard.

YUAN YU covers his face, looking at his father in shock.

title: Limited Marriage Spoiling, Iceberg Daddy's Wife-Doting Daily Life
description: A hotel worker discovers she's pregnant with twins after a one-night encounter. Five years later, she crosses paths again with the wealthy CEO father of her children.
context:
Title: Limited Marriage Spoiling, Iceberg Daddy's Wife-Doting Daily Life
Description: A hotel worker discovers she's pregnant with twins after a one-night encounter. Five years later, she crosses paths again with the wealthy CEO father of her children.

INT. HOTEL OFFICE - DAY

GAO MINGYUAN sits behind his desk, looking at an ultrasound report with a surprised expression.

XIA NIAN stands opposite him, her expression calm.

GAO MINGYUAN
Twins. That's... statistically impressive.

GAO MINGYUAN pushes the report across the desk.

GAO MINGYUAN
I assume this is why you're resigning?

XIA NIAN
(touching her belly)
High-risk pregnancy. Doctor's orders for bed rest.

GAO MINGYUAN
Summer job, Xia Wei's recommendation?

(beat)
She left last month. Found herself a wealthy boyfriend.

(leaning forward)
Will the father be providing?

XIA NIAN
(quietly evasive)
The father won't be a factor.

FLASHBACK MONTAGE - INT. HOTEL SUITE - NIGHT

SUBTITLE: One month ago

XI YAOTING (V.O.)
A staff member who doesn't know her place.

XIA NIAN (wearing her staff uniform) feels her body burning up, swaying unsteadily.

XIA NIAN
(to herself)
That water Xia Wei gave me... something's off.

XI YAOTING stands by the window, looking at the snowy scene outside.

XIA NIAN stumbles toward him.

XIA NIAN
(weakly)
Please... I need help.

XI YAOTING turns around. Their eyes meet. He hesitates, then moves closer.
continuation:
INT. XIA NIAN'S HOME - DAY

SUBTITLE: Five years later

The door opens. XIA NIAN enters with a pair of boy-girl twins, TIANTIAN and MIMI.

XIA NIAN
Tiantian, Mimi, Mommy has a late shift tonight. Be good for Grandma?

MIMI
We'll be angels!

TIANTIAN
Can we have one more cartoon?

XIA NIAN
(smiling)
One. Then straight to bed.

LU AIMEI sits on the sofa, video chatting with LIU JINHUA on her phone.

LU AIMEI
(to the phone)
...wedding in the Maldives. So exclusive.

(ends call, to Xia Nian)
Xia Wei's mother. Her daughter's set for life.

LU AIMEI
(continuing)
You work double shifts, exhausting yourself. Xia Wei? She sleeps in, shops, lives in luxury.

XIA NIAN
(firmly)
We're fine on our own terms. That's what matters.

MIMI
Mommy's strong!

TIANTIAN
Superhero strong!

LU AIMEI
(dismissively)
Superheroes burn out.

XIA NIAN
Then we rise from the ashes. That's our family motto.

INT. OT CLUB - NIGHT

The bar is filled with flashing lights and loud music.

XI YAOTING and his friend LIN CHUAN sit in a booth.

XI YAOTING
You insisted on this place because...?

LIN CHUAN
You've been a ghost for five years! Since that hotel night—

XI YAOTING
Don't.

LIN CHUAN
(leaning closer)
You keep her in that mansion like a shrine. Never visit.

XI YAOTING
(coldly)
I have my reasons.

LIN CHUAN
Reasons or regrets?

DJ (O.S.)
Next, please welcome our resident singer, Xia Nian!

XI YAOTING hears the name and freezes.

XIA NIAN, wearing a sparkling dress and a tassel veil, walks onto the stage.

XI YAOTING stands up, recognition hitting him.

LIN CHUAN
(surprised)
You know her?

XI YAOTING
(staring at the stage)
She's the one.

LIN CHUAN
(stunned)
Holy shit.

ON SCREEN: TO BE CONTINUED

title: Private Collection & Private Tasting
description: A woman running a bar reluctantly agrees to a marriage of convenience with an older man she's never met, only to encounter complications when a persistent suitor appears.
context:
Title: Private Collection & Private Tasting
Description: A woman running a bar reluctantly agrees to a marriage of convenience with an older man she's never met, only to encounter complications when a persistent suitor appears.

INT. BAR/SHU YANG'S HOME - NIGHT

Scene alternates between SHU YANG on the phone at the bar and her mother SHU MEI on the phone at home.

SHU YANG (V.O.)
An old man no one dares to marry—why volunteer myself as tribute?

SHU MEI
(on the phone)
He's thirty-six, Yangyang. And he saw your graduation photo. Wouldn't take no for an answer.

SHU YANG sits at the bar counter, phone pinched between shoulder and ear, wiping down a glass.

SHU YANG
(into the phone)
I'd rather auction the bar and sleep in the storage room.

SHU MEI
(on the phone, lowering voice)
The trust fund hits seven figures. Fully liquid. You'd never have to call your uncle again.

SHU YANG
(into the phone, flatly)
Do I look like I'm for sale?

SHU MEI
(on the phone)
One year. Separate residences. A post-nup that gives him nothing if he breaks the terms.

SHU YANG is silent, the glass forgotten in her hand.

SHU YANG
(into the phone)
Civil Affairs Bureau. Nine a.m. If he's late, I'm gone.

SHU MEI
(on the phone, exhales)
I'll forward the meeting details.

SHU YANG hangs up, pours herself a finger of whiskey.

SHU YANG
(to herself)
Seven figures for twelve months of theater. As long as he doesn't drool.

She knocks it back in one swallow.
continuation:
INT. BAR - NIGHT

Three men (PASSERBY A, B, and C) nurse beers in a corner booth, eyes flicking toward SHU YANG.

PASSERBY A
Third time this month she's closed alone.

PASSERBY B
Debts like hers don't leave room for a social life.

PASSERBY C
Debt's the least of it. Huo's kid comes every Tuesday like a mortgage payment.

HUO ZHEYU enters, roses replaced by a leather folio and the inevitable ring box.

PASSERBY B
Tuesdays, man.

HUO ZHEYU walks to the bar counter, places the folio between them.

HUO ZHEYU
Sister Shu Yang, the foreclosure notice is dated three days from now. My family's offer expires at midnight.

SHU YANG
And if I prefer bankruptcy?

HUO ZHEYU
(opening the ring box)
Then you'll remember that I offered. When no one else did.

EXT. BAR ENTRANCE - NIGHT

A black Maybach stops at the curb. The door opens; a polished oxford tests the pavement.

QI SHUO, thirty-something in a tailored coat, adjusts his glasses. A silver coin dances across his knuckles as he walks toward the bar.

INT. BAR - NIGHT

QI SHUO enters. The temperature drops.

SHU YANG looks up. Their eyes meet across the empty room.

SHU YANG
(internal monologue)
That bone structure. I've seen it on a museum wall I couldn't afford to enter.

QI SHUO's coin disappears into his palm. His gaze doesn't waver.

title: The Handsome Husband in the Jade Hairpin - Episode 1
description: A college student trapped in a nightmare finds herself forced into a ghostly wedding with the King of Hell, only to wake up to a horrifying reality.
context:
Title: The Handsome Husband in the Jade Hairpin - Episode 1
Description: A college student trapped in a nightmare finds herself forced into a ghostly wedding with the King of Hell, only to wake up to a horrifying reality.

INT. FEMALE DORMITORY - NIGHT

ON SCREEN: Haicheng University - Female Dormitory

MU WAN lies on the top bunk of her dormitory bed, surrounded by crumpled talismans. She twitches in a nightmare.

INT. ANCIENT BRIDAL CHAMBER - NIGHT

MU WAN wears a red wedding dress, lying on an antique wedding bed, her hands bound by red silk cords.

MALE VOICE (V.O.)
The King of Hell claims his bride. The living shall not interfere.

MU WAN opens her eyes, breath misting in the cold. She strains against the cords.

MU WAN (V.O.)
A ghost wedding... the bride is me.

She spots an ornate mirror—her reflection shows the bridal veil.

MU WAN
Grandma's charms failed. This can't be real.

She struggles, trying to reactivate the faded ink on her palm with spit and friction, muttering protective mantras.

A figure materializes: KING OF HELL in crimson wedding robes, black silk sash covering his eyes.

KING OF HELL (V.O.)
Need help, little bride?

MU WAN
(desperate)
Yes! Cut these ropes—I'll pay you anything, just get me out!

She freezes. His robes match hers—the same phoenix embroidery.

MU WAN
Your clothes...
continuation:
The KING OF HELL helps her untie the cloth strips on his hands. Just as MU WAN tries to escape, the KING OF HELL grabs her and pins her down on the bed.

KING OF HELL
Where are you running?

MU WAN
(panicking)
My grandmother's a medium—she'll banish you!

He touches the jade hairpin to her lips.

KING OF HELL
She protected you for twenty years. Tonight, her ink ran dry.

He kisses her. The hairpin falls.

INT. FEMALE DORMITORY - DAY

KING OF HELL (V.O.)
A gift awaits you.

MU WAN jolts awake, gasping. Talismans litter her blanket.

Noisy voices outside.

PASSERBY (O.S.)
Someone jumped! Call 911!

MU WAN immediately gets out of bed and rushes to the window, knocks over red ink—spills across a torn photo of her with two girls, their faces scratched out.

EXT. BELOW DORMITORY BUILDING - DAY

Two female corpses lie on concrete. Blood pools. A bystander's phone shows a video: two girls throwing a notebook off the roof, laughing.

INT. FEMALE DORMITORY - DAY

MU WAN looks at the tragic scene below, her face deathly pale, her eyes filled with shock and terror.

MU WAN (V.O.)
The gift... from my nightmare husband?

Her hand finds the jade hairpin on her windowsill.

title: Destined Life
description: A martial arts disciple tries to save his master's student and her newborn child, but is betrayed and killed by his sworn brother who was deceived by their corrupt master.
context:
Title: Destined Life
Description: A martial arts disciple tries to save his master's student and her newborn child, but is betrayed and killed by his sworn brother who was deceived by their corrupt master.

INT. NANGONG YA'S RESIDENCE - DAY

ZANG LONG (a disciple of the Martial Arts Alliance) holds a baby in swaddling clothes, looking tenderly at his wife NANGONG YA beside him.

ZANG LONG
Xiao Ya. Thank you for your hard work.

NANGONG YA
This is the name my father prepared for him early on, Zang Feng. Hoping he will hide his sharpness and stay away from conflict.

Zang Long smiles and kisses the baby's forehead.

INT. ROOM - NIGHT

Thunder and lightning rage outside.

HONG YING (Zhentian's wife) lies on the bed, screaming in pain, clutching a newborn daughter.

ZANG LONG (O.S.)
Hong Ying!

Hong Ying struggles, questioning her master QIU BAICHUAN (Leader of the Martial Arts Alliance) who stands by the bed, his face impassive.

HONG YING
Master, please. Zhentian is your finest disciple. This child is his bloodline...

QIU BAICHUAN
Her life force will complete my breakthrough. A small sacrifice for the Alliance's true power.

HONG YING
(desperately)
Someone save my child!

Qiu Baichuan's palm begins to glow with dark energy.

ZANG LONG (O.S.)
Stop!

Zang Long and Nangong Ya burst in. Zang Long intercepts Qiu Baichuan while Nangong Ya shields Hong Ying.

ZANG LONG
Master, we swore to protect the innocent. This is madness.

HONG YING
(to Zang Long)
Senior Brother... he's already killed three disciples who questioned him. He'll come for Feng'er next.

ZANG LONG
(realizing)
So that's why you wanted our son brought here tonight.

QIU BAICHUAN
(to Zang Long)
Two pure newborns in one night. Fate smiles upon my ascension.

ZANG LONG
(furious)
I would rather die than let you touch either child.

Hong Ying thrusts her daughter into Nangong Ya's arms.

HONG YING
Take her! Find Zhentian! He's in the northern village--

Qiu Baichuan strikes Hong Ying. She collapses, lifeless.

NANGONG YA
(to Zang Long)
We must take them both. He'll hunt Feng'er if we leave him.

ZANG LONG
Go!

Zang Long and Nangong Ya flee, each carrying a baby.
continuation:
EXT. BAMBOO FOREST - NIGHT

Heavy rain pours down. Zang Long and Nangong Ya stumble through the mud.

ZANG LONG
We reach Zhentian by dawn. He'll protect all of us from the master's madness.

Suddenly, CHEN ZHENTIAN (disciple of the Martial Arts Alliance) blocks their path, sword trembling in his hand, his eyes red-rimmed.

ZANG LONG
Zhentian! Thank the gods. Hong Ying is--

Chen Zhentian's sword flashes. Zang Long falls, the baby in his arms (Hong Ying's daughter) nearly dropping.

NANGONG YA
A Long!

CHEN ZHENTIAN
(voice breaking)
Master sent me her bloodied robe... her hairpin... and this.

He holds up a jade token - Zang Long's own disciple token.

CHEN ZHENTIAN
He said you murdered her last night. That you stole our child for a forbidden ritual. That you envied what I had.

ZANG LONG
(gasping, struggling to rise)
The master... lies... she died... protecting your daughter...

CHEN ZHENTIAN
(seeing the baby Zang Long holds)
That child... is mine?

He sees Nangong Ya clutching Zang Feng protectively.

CHEN ZHENTIAN
And you keep yours safe while mine dies? You planned this?

NANGONG YA
No! Feng'er is our son! That is your daughter in A Long's arms! The master killed Hong Ying before our eyes--

Zhentian's grief overwhelms reason. He strikes again.

CHEN ZHENTIAN
Master told me everything! Your false righteousness. Your hidden jealousy. Your betrayal!

Zang Long falls dead. Zhentian turns to Nangong Ya, tears mixing with rain.

CHEN ZHENTIAN
Now you will feel what I feel.

He pierces her heart. As she collapses, Zang Feng rolls from her arms, wailing into the storm. Zhentian stares down at the infant, his face a mask of torment and doubt.

title: Reborn in the Seventies, Substitute Husband, It's Your Turn to Suffer
description: Fengxia overhears her husband's plot to assume his deceased brother's identity and abandon her, revealing a shocking betrayal by her entire family.
context:
Title: Reborn in the Seventies, Substitute Husband, It's Your Turn to Suffer
Description: Fengxia overhears her husband's plot to assume his deceased brother's identity and abandon her, revealing a shocking betrayal by her entire family.

EXT. DILAPIDATED HOUSE - DAY

FENGXIA presses against the warped doorframe, her knuckles white around the basket handle. Raised voices bleed through the splintered wood.

INT. DILAPIDATED HOUSE - DAY

LI ZHIGANG towers over his PARENTS, a crumpled telegram in his fist.

LI ZHIGANG'S MOTHER
(trembling)
Your brother's barely cold, and you're taking his name? What becomes of Fengxia and the girl?

LI ZHIGANG
(urgent)
Not another word. From this moment, I'm Li Zhiqiang. The name sticks.

LI ZHIGANG'S FATHER
(quiet)
She's worked these fields ten years for us. Raised our grandchild. How does she survive this?

LI ZHIGANG
(scoffs)
She's peasant stock, Dad. Hardship's in her bones. But Wanqing? She's carrying the Li heir. One month without meat and she'd lose the child.

LI ZHIGANG
(pressing his advantage)
Tell me, can you watch her take your grandson to another man's house?
continuation:
EXT. DILAPIDATED HOUSE - DAY

FENGXIA stumbles back, tears streaking through the dust on her cheeks.

FENGXIA (O.S.)
So she's Wanqing now. How long have they whispered that name?

INT. DILAPIDATED HOUSE - DAY

LI ZHIGANG'S FATHER
(frowning)
The commune knows both our sons. The cadres, the work unit records--

LI ZHIGANG
(cutting him off)
The mountain flood took everything. Papers, photos, the entire dossier. Who questions a grieving widow?

EXT. DILAPIDATED HOUSE - DAY

FENGXIA (O.S.)
That won't do.

INT. DILAPIDATED HOUSE - DAY

LI ZHIGANG'S MOTHER
(avoiding her husband's eyes)
Old man... we can't even earn eighty yuan a year. The baby's milk powder alone...

LI ZHIGANG'S FATHER
(stiff nod)

EXT. DILAPIDATED HOUSE - DAY

FENGXIA's eyes harden, the pain calcifying into something colder.

FENGXIA (O.S.)
Ten years of steam buns and saved cooking oil. And they sell me for a dead man's salary.

INT. DILAPIDATED HOUSE - DAY

LI ZHIGANG
(triumph in his voice)
That's settled then. Tomorrow we bury Li Zhigang. Remember-- the name belongs to me now.

LI ZHIGANG turns toward the door, a thin smile on his lips.

INT. DOORWAY - DAY

LI ZHIGANG pulls the door open. FENGXIA stands there, basket at her feet, her gaze clear and dry.

LI ZHIGANG
(horror dawning)
Fengxia--

title: The Commoner Physiognomist
description: A delivery man encounters a desperate heiress who refuses an arranged marriage, leading to an unexpected night and a confrontation about responsibility and fate.
context:
Title: The Commoner Physiognomist
Description: A delivery man encounters a desperate heiress who refuses an arranged marriage, leading to an unexpected night and a confrontation about responsibility and fate.

INT. XIAO YAROU'S HOME - NIGHT

Opening with a series of close-up shots of XIAO YAROU, wearing exquisite makeup, her eyes hazy—but a faint tremor in her hand betrays her.

XIAO YAROU wears a silk robe, lounging lazily on the sofa, holding a glass of red wine, gently swirling it. The liquid sloshes slightly unevenly.

Her phone on the table suddenly rings. She picks it up and answers.

XIAO YAROU
Hello?

MALE VOICE (V.O.)
Xiao Yarou, you're marrying Young Master Wang in three days. No matter where you are, come back immediately.

XIAO YAROU
(angrily)
The Wang family is a cesspool. I'd rather die than marry into it!

MALE VOICE (V.O.)
Then your mother's medical bills die with her. The wedding is non-negotiable.

XIAO YAROU
(quietly, voice breaking)
You bastard...

XIAO YAROU hangs up and angrily throws the phone on the table. It clatters loudly.

The doorbell rings.

XIAO YAROU
(impatiently)
Who is it?

DELIVERY GUY (O.S.)
Hello, your food delivery is here.

XIAO YAROU gets up and walks to the door to open it.

A young DELIVERY GUY stands at the door, holding a delivery bag. His eyes quickly scan her face—noticing the puffy eyes beneath makeup, the wine glass clutched like a lifeline.

DELIVERY GUY
Hello, this is our restaurant's signature fried rice.

Without a word, XIAO YAROU grabs the DELIVERY GUY by the collar, pulls him into the room, pushes him hard against the wall, and kisses him.

The DELIVERY GUY looks completely shocked—but his hand briefly hesitates near her trembling waist.

XIAO YAROU pushes the DELIVERY GUY onto the bed.

Quick scene transition, screen goes black.
continuation:
INT. XIAO YAROU'S HOME - DAY

The next morning, the DELIVERY GUY wakes up shirtless in bed, covered with lipstick marks. He sits up, looking confused. He touches his lips thoughtfully.

DELIVERY GUY
(to himself)
Peach blossom curse... but her face showed no joy. Only desperation.

XIAO YAROU walks out of the bathroom wrapped in a towel. Her makeup is gone, revealing dark circles and a pallor.

DELIVERY GUY
Last night was my first time. You have to take responsibility for me.

XIAO YAROU
(coldly)
I take responsibility for you? If you don't want to die, disappear before I change my mind.

DELIVERY GUY
(agitated)
Hey! You haven't even put your pants on and you're already denying everything? Last night it was me, the boss myself, who delivered your food, and you wore me out all night. My back is about to break.

XIAO YAROU ignores him and turns to walk away.

DELIVERY GUY
Hey!

The DELIVERY GUY gets dressed and stands in the room.

XIAO YAROU
Shut up.

XIAO YAROU takes out a bank card and throws it to the DELIVERY GUY.

XIAO YAROU
There's one million here. Enough to buy you a hundred food stalls. Leave now and disappear forever.

DELIVERY GUY
(shocked)
One million? You think I'm a gigolo? What happened between us isn't something money can solve.

The DELIVERY GUY throws the bank card on the floor.

XIAO YAROU
Then what do you want?

The DELIVERY GUY walks toward her step by step, his gaze tracing the exhaustion etched into her face.

DELIVERY GUY
I want...

Their eyes lock. The frame freezes. End.

title: Rise to Fame with a Shuttlecock
description: A shuttlecock champion achieves his lifelong dream of winning the national championship.
context:
Title: Rise to Fame with a Shuttlecock
Description: A shuttlecock champion achieves his lifelong dream of winning the national championship.

INT. SPORTS ARENA - DAY

Inside the sports arena, the audience ROARS. Thousands of hands clap in unison. Flags wave like a crimson storm. Li Jiang stands frozen, trophy in hand, as if the moment might shatter.

ANNOUNCER (V.O.)
And now, the moment we've all been waiting for—your 2025 National Dabaijian Champions!

Four athletes (LI JIANG and his teammates) wearing red and yellow gradient sportswear stand in a row. Li Jiang's knuckles are white where he grips the trophy.

An AWARD PRESENTER walks forward and hands a golden trophy to LI JIANG, who stands at the front.

AWARD PRESENTER
Don't drop it, son. You've earned every gram.

Li Jiang stares at his own reflection in the polished gold, seeing a younger version of himself.

AWARD PRESENTER
(grasping Li Jiang's shoulder)
Your master would be proud.

LI JIANG
(voice cracking)
continuation:
Thank you, sir.

AWARD PRESENTER
(to teammates)
You boys made history today.

TEAMMATE
(pumping fist)
For Master Chen!

LI JIANG'S TEAMMATES
(in unison)
We promised him!

ON SCREEN: Dabaijian Promotion Ambassador Li Jiang

LI JIANG (V.O.)
(thick with emotion)
Master... the doctors said you'd never see this day. But you saw it first. Ten thousand times.

Li Jiang raises the trophy slowly, as if performing a ritual. His face remains stoic, but a single tear escapes.

The arena lights BLAZE. For a moment, Li Jiang is silhouetted against the brilliance, a solitary figure holding the weight of a promise kept.

A white light flashes across the screen.

title: Landing Ashore, Discarding the Devoted Husband First
description: A man who built his wife's streaming career watches as she betrays his trust with false advertising and is tempted by her ex-lover.
context:
Title: Landing Ashore, Discarding the Devoted Husband First
Description: A man who built his wife's streaming career watches as she betrays his trust with false advertising and is tempted by her ex-lover.

INT. LIVE STREAMING ROOM - DAY

WEIYA and another FEMALE HOST are live streaming, selling products. WEIYA glances at a monitor showing real-time sales figures ticking upward.

WEIYA
This tea is completely different from anything else on the market. Our blend can relieve rhinitis, reduce fever, even help with urticaria—

FEMALE HOST
(nervously)
That's what the traditional medicine studies suggest, yes—

WEIYA
And the antioxidants can inhibit cancer cell growth. You heard that right. So who wants it?

FEMALE HOST
We do!

WEIYA
Who's ready to change their life?

FEMALE HOST
We are!

INT. QIN MING'S OFFICE - DAY

QIN MING sits at his desk, watching Weiya's live stream on his phone, his brow furrowed. A poster appears on the phone screen showing Weiya has achieved "Sales Champion" with "Sales Breaking 100 Million."

QIN MING (V.O.)
Three years of scripts. Countless all-nights selecting products. I built her from nothing to a hundred-million-dollar empire. Where did I lose her?

EXT. COMPANY ENTRANCE - DAY

A black luxury car stops abruptly. CHEN GUO and XIANG TAI exit, visibly distressed.

FEMALE ASSISTANT
(to CHEN GUO)
Mr. Chen, the live stream just claimed our floral tea has oncological benefits.

XIANG TAI
That's not just deceptive—that's regulatory suicide.

CHEN GUO
We need to shut this down before the authorities notice.

XIANG TAI
Qin Ming's office. Now.
continuation:
INT. QIN MING'S OFFICE - DAY

CHEN GUO and XIANG TAI burst in. Qin Ming and his ASSISTANT stand.

CHEN GUO
(calm but firm)
Qin Ming, your wife just made unsubstantiated medical claims. The FDA warning will arrive before the day ends.

XIANG TAI
And the learning machine? Contract price: $1,800. Her price: $2,800. That's breach of contract and price gouging.

On Qin Ming's laptop, Weiya's stream continues.

WEIYA (in the live stream)
—not five thousand, not four thousand. Only two thousand eight hundred for the future of your child's education!

XIANG TAI
Our legal team is drafting papers. Right now.

QIN MING
(measured)
She must have received the wrong script revision.

ASSISTANT
(hesitant)
Mr. Qin... Sister Weiya said your script was... "too conservative for today's algorithm." She had her team rewrite it.

Qin Ming's knuckles go white on the desk edge. He stares at the screen, then executes a remote kill command. The stream goes black.

QIN MING (V.O.)
The script wasn't conservative. It was sustainable. But sustainability doesn't trend.

WEIYA, wearing a white dress, storms into the office, phone clutched like a weapon.

WEIYA
You killed my stream? I was five minutes from breaking my own record!

QIN MING
You were five minutes from a federal investigation.

WEIYA
I was giving them a story they could believe in! Your scripts treat them like children—

QIN MING
They trust you!

WEIYA
They want to be transformed! They want miracles! I'm just smart enough to sell them what they already want to buy. If they can't afford it, that's economics, not ethics.

QIN MING
Xiao Ya, this isn't the plan we—

WEIYA
(throwing her phone on the desk)
Your plan caps my growth! With my numbers, I am the plan now. You, the merchants—you adapt to me.

Applause from the doorway. FAN CHEN leans against the frame, impeccably tailored.

FAN CHEN
Selling transformation instead of product? That's not a crime, Qin Ming. That's evolution.

FAN CHEN
(to Weiya)
You're performing heart surgery with a knife the board dulls after each use. Come build with me. Equity partnership. Full creative control. No one holding the algorithmic reins.

FAN CHEN
(to Qin Ming, almost sympathetic)
You taught her to swim. Now she needs deeper water.

His smile isn't triumphant. It's certain.

title: The Secret of Club No. 9
description: At an elite club, a powerful woman named Tina selects male consultants from thousands of applicants, testing their skincare knowledge and ability to handle demanding clients.
context:
Title: The Secret of Club No. 9
Description: At an elite club, a powerful woman named Tina selects male consultants from thousands of applicants, testing their skincare knowledge and ability to handle demanding clients.

INT. TOP-TIER CLUB - NIGHT

ON SCREEN: Feisi Club No. 9 - Private Consultation Wing

Fifteen MALE CONSULTANTS stand at attention along a mirrored corridor. Their black linen uniforms and translucent face shields create an anonymous, clinical line.

MALE ASSISTANT
Sister Tina. Final candidates from thirty thousand applicants.

TINA'S REFLECTION appears in the mirror before she does—gold glasses, sleek suit, assessing eyes. She walks the line with a digital stylus in hand.

TINA
Your face is your resume here. But resumes can be airbrushed. Skin can't.

Tina stops before CONSULTANT #7. His shoulders tense.

She lifts his face shield. Studies him. Her stylus hovers near his jaw.

TINA
(quietly)
This redness isn't acne. It's over-exfoliation. You panicked and tried to fix your skin last night, didn't you?

Consultant #7's jaw tightens.

TINA
Our clients can smell desperation. Thank you for your time.

She taps her stylus. He exits, dignity intact but defeated.

Tina settles into a leather chair, crossing her legs.

TINA
To those still standing—you've earned a lottery ticket. But the draw is tomorrow.

She gestures. The curtain behind her opens. A FEMALE CLIENT in a silk robe stands beneath a spotlight, her complexion visibly irritated and uneven.

TINA
Your client had a bad reaction to a $600 cream. She's already posted one-star reviews. You have thirty seconds.
continuation:
The consultants shift. Some whisper calculations. Others freeze.

CHU RUYE (mid-20s, calm, focused) steps forward one pace.

CHU RUYE
The flaking suggests barrier damage. The uneven tone means she's covering it with makeup, which is making it worse.

MALE CONSULTANT A
(whispering)
He's reading her, not just the symptoms.

MALE CONSULTANT B
(whispering back)
That's the difference between selling and solving.

Tina's stylus hovers over her tablet, ready to eliminate another.

TINA
Your solution?

Chu Ruye removes his face shield. His skin is healthy, not perfect—real.

CHU RUYE
Dafu Yan Jingxiu's B5 Intensive Repair. It's what rebuilt my barrier after I destroyed it with too many acid peels.

ON SCREEN: CHU RUYE
ON SCREEN: @RuyeBeauty - 12M followers

CHU RUYE (V.O.)
Proof over promises.

INT. LABORATORY - NIGHT

A YUE (30s, sleepless, genius) stares through a microscope. His own reflection in the lens shows stress and passion.

ON SCREEN: A YUE - Dafu Yan Lead Chemist

MYSTERIOUS MAN (V.O.)
Your B5 prototype is outperforming our entire premium line in live trials.

A Yue looks up sharply. A mix of pride and fear crosses his face.

ON SCREEN: TO BE CONTINUED

title: Rather Die Than Submit
description: A young girl confronts the Emperor on the street, claiming he is her father, shocking the crowd who believed he came to select concubines.
context:
Title: Rather Die Than Submit
Description: A young girl confronts the Emperor on the street, claiming he is her father, shocking the crowd who believed he came to select concubines.

EXT. ANCIENT STREET - DAY

SOLDIERS in crimson armor shove forward, their spear-butts thudding against cobblestones. DESPERATE WOMEN clutch hand-painted portraits and wilting lotus blossoms, pressing against the soldiers' shields.

SOLDIER
Make way! Make way! By order of the Crown Prince!

Shoving intensifies. A crone's basket spills—dates scatter, trampled underfoot.

From a shadowed doorway, YUEYUE (9, filthy, in threadbare hemp) clutches a silk scroll. She unrolls it: a vibrant imperial portrait with edges worn by countless secret viewings.

At the procession's head, PRINCE XIAO CHENGRUI (30s, cold-eyed) surveys the crowd like a falcon. Behind his mount, the Emperor's carriage—black lacquer, unadorned, its curtains sealed tight.

WOMAN A
(voice cracking)
Ten years... ten years since any woman entered the Jade Pavilion!

WOMAN B
(shoving a painting through a guard's arm)
The astrologers said the Phoenix Star aligns today! He must choose!

XIAO CHENGRUI wheels his horse toward the carriage, his voice low but cutting.

XIAO CHENGRUI
Imperial Brother. Mother grows desperate. You grace these filthy streets for temple incense while your throne stands heirless. She demands you return with at least three new consorts.

He straightens in his saddle, suddenly projecting his voice for the masses.

XIAO CHENGRUI
Hear this! His Majesty rides today for the Temple of Heaven's Blessing—not for any lowborn selection!

A groan ripples through the crowd. Hope falters.

XIAO CHENGRUI
(silkily)
continuation:
But should any maiden's... virtue... pierce his refined sorrow? She would be raised as high as the moon itself.

The crowd erupts. Women surge, paintings tearing, flowers crushed. The soldiers grin—more chaos means more bribes.

From the carriage, a voice like grinding jade.

XIAO JINGRUI (O.S.)
Enough, Chengrui. You play too long with mice.

Yueyue's knuckles whiten around the portrait. She whispers to its painted eyes.

YUEYUE
(to herself)
Mother died whispering your name. I won't.

She bolts. Small and quick, she darts between legs, past the soldiers' line—

XIAO CHENGRUI
(reining in his horse)
Whoa!

His horse rears, hooves flashing. Yueyue stands her ground, arms spread, holding the portrait up like a shield.

XIAO CHENGRUI
What gutter spawn—

The carriage door opens. EMPEROR XIAO JINGRUI (40s, face carved by years of solitude) emerges. His gaze finds Yueyue.

Her chin lifts. Tears cut clean tracks through the dirt on her cheeks. Her voice carries—clear, young, unbreakable.

YUEYUE
Father. Your daughter Yueyue has waited seven winters.

Silence. Even the soldiers freeze.

WOMAN A
(whispered prayer)
She called him Father. The gods forgive us all.

title: Bound by Heart
description: A peasant girl sold to a brothel is bought by a mysterious lord who forces her to impersonate a minister's daughter and marry the Crown Prince to retrieve a secret item.
context:
Title: Bound by Heart
Description: A peasant girl sold to a brothel is bought by a mysterious lord who forces her to impersonate a minister's daughter and marry the Crown Prince to retrieve a secret item.

INT. DRUNKEN FLOWER BROTHEL - DAY
