Dust motes swirl in the lantern light. SU WANWAN, seventeen, calloused hands clutching torn hemp clothing, is shoved to the filthy floor. She scrambles backward like a cornered animal.

SU WANWAN
(pleading)
Father, please—not me! The spring planting isn't done. The well needs mending. Who'll care for Mother when the cough returns?

FATHER
(hollow-eyed, reeking of sorghum wine)
The fields are ruined. The well is dry. Your mother died last winter.

He delivers a numb kick to her ribs—more exhaustion than malice. She curls around the blow.

MADAM
(red lacquered nails tapping a wooden paddle)
First lesson, piglet. My house, my rules.

Su Wanwan bolts. A SERVANT'S meaty hand snags her hair. Another clamps her waist. She thrashes, kicking over a spittoon.

SU WANWAN
(between gritted teeth)
Let—me—go!

ZHAO JIN
(emerging from shadows)
Hold her still.

Outside, a carriage with no markings stops. The curtain parts a finger's width. HUAN CHU's gaze flickers over the scene like a snake tasting air.

MADAM
(sugar-sweet, bowing low)
My deepest apologies, my lord. Fresh stock, still feral. We'll have her docile by month's end.

HUAN CHU
(voice barely a murmur)
I'll take that one.

MADAM
(stuttering)
This... this one?

ZHAO JIN
(produces a silk pouch)
Her entire debt. Plus twenty years of your best earnings.

He spills golden taels like water. They clink against the floorboards, rolling. The Madam's eyes fix on the gold, then on Su Wanwan—truly seeing her for the first time.

MADAM
(hand trembling as she extends the contract)
Take her. She was born for better things.

ZHAO JIN
(tears the parchment once, twice)
Her past is ash.

Su Wanwan is half-carried toward the carriage. Her father lunges for a rolling tael.

FATHER
(to Madam)
You gave me two silvers! She's worth a hundred!

MADAM
(to Bouncer)
Break his fingers.

TRANSITION: Three weeks later
continuation:
INT. LUXURIOUS CHAMBER - DAY

Sunlight cuts through sandalwood incense, illuminating SU WANWAN in bridal scarlet. She doesn't touch the silk—holds herself as if the fabric might bite. Her reflection in the bronze mirror is a stranger.

HUAN CHU stands at the lattice window, a cut-paper silhouette.

HUAN CHU
The Grand Secretary's daughter died of fever last month. You have her name, her face, and now—her destiny.

SU WANWAN
(frozen)
You mean... the prince thinks I'm—

HUAN CHU
In three days, you marry the Crown Prince. You will be perfectly behaved.

SU WANWAN
(laughs, bordering hysteria)
I'll be dead in three days. They'll see through me before the first tea ceremony.

HUAN CHU
(turns, sword sliding from scabbard)
Then you'll die here instead.

The blade's tip catches the light, rests beneath her jaw. Su Wanwan's breath stills. Her eyes drop to the jade-inlaid hilt, then to his face—searching for bluff. Finding none.

SU WANWAN
(whisper)
What do you want from me?

HUAN CHU
The Prince keeps a jade seal in his private study. It opens a box. Bring me the box.

SU WANWAN
(swallowing against steel)
And if I do? If I'm lucky enough to live that long?

HUAN CHU
Your contract burns. You get fifty taels and a new name in a southern province.

SU WANWAN's fingers twitch. Her eyes calculate—fifty taels. A field. A house that locks. A life.

SU WANWAN
(very slowly)
I'm strong. I learn fast. And I've kept secrets before.

HUAN CHU
Three months. Fail, and your father doesn't die—he merely wishes he had.

SU WANWAN
(voice flat)
He's already dead to me.

HUAN CHU
(smile without warmth)
Then I'll take your hands instead. The Prince prefers docile wives.

SU WANWAN
(pale, but eyes steady)
I'll get your box.

HUAN CHU
Zhao Jin—take her to the governess. If she uses one phrase of village dialect, cut out her tongue.

ZHAO JIN
Yes, my lord.

Su Wanwan rises. Her hands shake, but she smooths the bridal silk with the same reverence she'd show a plow handle—tool of her survival.

SU WANWAN
(to herself, barely audible)
Just another field to tend.

She follows Zhao Jin out. Huan Chu watches her go, his expression for once uncertain.

title: The Useless Junior Sister Is Heaven's Chosen Daughter
description: A young outer disciple searching for a rare spiritual herb is betrayed and killed by a jealous senior sister, only to have her body taken over by a modern office worker from another world.
context:
Title: The Useless Junior Sister Is Heaven's Chosen Daughter
Description: A young outer disciple searching for a rare spiritual herb is betrayed and killed by a jealous senior sister, only to have her body taken over by a modern office worker from another world.

EXT. EXTREME COLD ILLUSION REALM - CAVE - DAY

FENG XI (20s, threadbare robes, frost in her hair) kneels before a luminous pink flower blooming from cracked ice. Her dirt-caked fingers tremble as she brushes the petals.

FENG XI
(barely a whisper)
One more task. Just this.

A WHITE SERPENT erupts from the frozen pool, scales scraping stone. Feng Xi doesn't scream—she rolls, grabs a sharp icicle, and drives it into the beast's eye as it strikes. Black vapor hisses from the wound. She collapses, clutching her ribs.

Feng Xi crawls back to the flower. Her fingers close around the stem.

SHEN ZHILAN (20s, immaculate white robes) appears at the cave entrance, already holding a cluster of identical blossoms.

SHEN ZHILAN
(mock pity)
All that effort for a weed.

FENG XI
(frozen)
Senior Sister... those are Ice Lilies. The Essence is—

SHEN ZHILAN
I know what it is. I also know you logged the coordinates in the sect ledger three days ago.

Feng Xi's face crumples—not with rage, but dawning betrayal.

FENG XI
(quietly)
You've been waiting.

SHEN ZHILAN
(smiling)
I let you clear the path. Consider it... a service to your betters.

FENG XI
(struggling up)
I'll report this. Master sees the truth in blood memory.

She pulls out a jade talisman. Shen Zhilan's smile flickers—panic, then something harder.

SHEN ZHILAN
(tossing the lilies)
Then remember this.
continuation:
The flowers arc through the air. As Feng Xi's eyes follow them, Shen Zhilan's sword flashes—not at her heart, but her wrist. The blade pins Feng Xin's sword-hand to the ice wall. The talisman falls.

FENG XI
(gasping)
My meridians...

SHEN ZHILAN
Now you can't hold a blade. Can't prove a thing.

She plucks the glowing Essence from Feng Xi's slack fingers.

SHEN ZHILAN
(softly)
You were supposed to stay in the outer sect where you belonged. Grateful. Invisible.

She turns to leave. Feng Xi spits blood onto the ice.

FENG XI
(whispered)
I was never invisible.

INT. MODERN OFFICE - CUBICLE - NIGHT

OFFICE WORKER (20s, hoodie, dead eyes) stares at the same scene on her laptop. She knows what's next.

OFFICE WORKER
(to the screen)
Don't say it. Don't you dare—

She slams the laptop shut. The blue standby light flares, reflecting in her glasses. It pulses once, twice—then floods the cubicle.

OFFICE WORKER
(tired, unsurprised)
Third time this month.

INT. EXTREME COLD ILLUSION REALM - CAVE - DAY

Feng Xi's eyes snap open—different eyes. She stares at her impaled hand, the blood, the robes. Her first breath is a laugh, bitter and familiar.

FENG XI/OFFICE WORKER
(quietly)
Chapter forty-seven. The one where the plot armor cracks.

She looks at the cave entrance where Shen Zhilan disappeared.

FENG XI/OFFICE WORKER
(to herself, determined)
Okay, Feng Xi. Let's see if we can rewrite this ending.

title: Social Butterfly Baby Saves Cannon Fodder Mom in Period Drama
description: A modern reader transmigrates into a period novel as the weak female lead who must stand up to her oppressive in-laws to protect her genius twins.
context:
Title: Social Butterfly Baby Saves Cannon Fodder Mom in Period Drama
Description: A modern reader transmigrates into a period novel as the weak female lead who must stand up to her oppressive in-laws to protect her genius twins.

INT. READER'S HOME - NIGHT

A young woman (NOVEL READER) in a white nightgown lies on the sofa, focused on reading a novel on her phone.

NOVEL READER
(sighing)
Tian Cuifen... you vicious old bat.

She stares at the text on her phone screen, frowning, getting more and more angry.

NOVEL READER
(in disbelief)
How is she putting up with this?

She suddenly sits up from the sofa, throws her phone aside, and stands up in anger.

NOVEL READER
(furious)
That's it! This story is infuriating! The heroine has a battalion commander husband, gave birth to brilliant twins, and what does she do? Lets her in-laws bleed her dry while her children suffer.

The more she thinks about it, the angrier she gets, and she starts pacing around the room.

NOVEL READER
(talking to herself)
If it were me...

She suddenly stops, her eyes determined, and starts gesturing.

NOVEL READER
(excitedly)
I'd kick that biased mother-in-law to the curb and knock that leech of a sister-in-law flat!

She makes kicking and punching motions, as if venting her emotions.

NOVEL READER
(satisfied)
That's more like it.

After venting, she calms down and sees a document on the table. She picks it up to look. It's a diagnosis report.

NOVEL READER
(dejected)
Infertile. If I could be like the heroine and have two perfect twins, I'd never let them endure this.

As she's feeling sad, a strong light suddenly emanates around her body and engulfs her.

NOVEL READER
(screaming in terror)
What the—?!
continuation:
INT. NOVEL WORLD - DAY

The light fades. The NOVEL READER finds herself in a simple room, wearing 1970s clothing, looking exactly like the novel's female lead JIANG NINGNING. She falls to the ground, looking bewildered.

A middle-aged woman (TIAN CUIFEN) stands in front of her, hands on hips, looking fierce.

TIAN CUIFEN
You little tramp, if our family hadn't sacrificed to send Donglin to the army, you'd have starved long ago. My daughter needs this house for her wedding. Pack your things. Tonight.

Two children (TWINS) stand not far away, looking at them fearfully.

NOVEL READER/JIANG NINGNING
(confused)
Where is this?

She looks around and sees a calendar on the wall that reads "1976".

NOVEL READER/JIANG NINGNING
(shocked)
Nineteen seventy-six?

Her head throbs with pain as a flood of memories that don't belong to her rush into her mind.

FLASHBACK BEGINS

The scene blurs, presenting the plot from the novel.

A handsome man in military uniform (HUO DONGLIN) speaks to a woman who looks just like her (ORIGINAL JIANG NINGNING).

HUO DONGLIN (V.O.)
Ningning, I'm shipping out tomorrow. I'll send my allowance home. Take care.

ORIGINAL JIANG NINGNING (V.O.)
Don't worry, Donglin. I'll be a good daughter-in-law while you're gone.

NOVEL READER/JIANG NINGNING (V.O.)
(internal monologue)
Why does that woman have my face?

The scene switches. TIAN CUIFEN points at ORIGINAL JIANG NINGNING'S nose and scolds her.

TIAN CUIFEN (V.O.)
An orphan brings nothing to this family. If Donglin weren't twenty-seven, we'd never have taken you. His allowance comes to me. Every single yuan.

A young girl (HUO CHUNFANG) steps on ORIGINAL JIANG NINGNING'S hand with her foot.

HUO CHUNFANG (V.O.)
Watch yourself while my brother's gone, sister-in-law. No one likes a pretty widow.

The scene switches again. ORIGINAL JIANG NINGNING has given birth to twins.

MIDWIFE (V.O.)
Twins! Madam Huo, your family's doubled its fortune!

HUO CHUNFANG gossips behind ORIGINAL JIANG NINGNING'S back.

HUO CHUNFANG (V.O.)
Donglin's been gone a year and a half. Those aren't his children.

TIAN CUIFEN forces the weak ORIGINAL JIANG NINGNING, who just gave birth, to get out of bed and write a letter.

TIAN CUIFEN (V.O.)
Up! Write to Donglin! Tell him about the twins and demand more money! Now!

ORIGINAL JIANG NINGNING lies on the table, tears in her eyes.

ORIGINAL JIANG NINGNING (V.O.)
(internal monologue)
If I give them everything, they'll finally accept me as family.

FLASHBACK ENDS

INT. NOVEL WORLD - DAY (CONTINUOUS)

NOVEL READER/JIANG NINGNING awakens from the memories. TIAN CUIFEN is impatiently yelling at her.

TIAN CUIFEN
I'm talking to you! Did you hear me or not?

NOVEL READER/JIANG NINGNING raises her head, her eyes changing from confusion to shock and realization.

NOVEL READER/JIANG NINGNING
(internal monologue)
Period Drama Twins: Searching for Their Commander Father. I transmigrated... into the doormat mother.

She looks at the evil mother-in-law before her and the two children not far away, her face full of disbelief.

ON SCREEN: TO BE CONTINUED

title: He Gave Me Starlight
description: A forbidden romance between Sang Muye and Shen Xingli unfolds, but their secret relationship is exposed when her grandfather discovers compromising photos.
context:
Title: He Gave Me Starlight
Description: A forbidden romance between Sang Muye and Shen Xingli unfolds, but their secret relationship is exposed when her grandfather discovers compromising photos.

INT. APARTMENT - NIGHT

SANG MUYE, a bespectacled, refined man, and SHEN XINGLI, a beautiful woman in business attire, stand before a floor-to-ceiling window. The city sprawls below them like scattered starlight.

Their palms press against the glass, fingers interlocking with hesitant tenderness.

SANG MUYE
What are we doing?

SHEN XINGLI's fingers trace across SANG MUYE's lips, his Adam's apple, then grasp his tie.

SHEN XINGLI
What I've wanted since that broken telescope.

She pulls SANG MUYE closer. They embrace tightly, gazing deeply at each other, then kiss passionately.

SANG MUYE
(barely a whisper)
Your grandfather—

SHEN XINGLI
—will never know.

They kiss again, urgent and desperate.
continuation:
INT. BEDROOM - LATER

The bed is covered with rose petals. SANG MUYE presses SHEN XINGLI beneath him.

SANG MUYE
If he finds out—

SHEN XINGLI
Then at least I had this.

He leans down to kiss her.

INT. SHEN FAMILY MANSION - NIGHT

SHEN XINGLI tiptoes in through the front door, looking nervous.

SHEN XINGLI (V.O.)
Not tonight. Please, not tonight.

She carefully crosses the living room. The room is brightly lit. OLD MASTER SHEN, an elderly man with a stern expression, sits on the sofa with a manila envelope.

OLD MASTER SHEN
Your security detail reported an anomaly.

SHEN XINGLI's body stiffens. She stops in her tracks.

SHEN XINGLI
A business dinner ran late. I should have called.

She smiles and tries to slip away.

OLD MASTER SHEN
Shen Xingli. Did you think I wouldn't recognize his father's building?

He throws surveillance photos onto the coffee table.

OLD MASTER SHEN
Look at what you've done.

SHEN XINGLI hesitantly walks forward and picks up the photos. When she sees their silhouettes against the city lights—starlight trapped between them—her pupils dilate instantly, shock written all over her face. The photos show her and SANG MUYE kissing passionately in the apartment.

OLD MASTER SHEN
(softly, dangerously)
You've brought the son of my enemy into my house. Through my granddaughter.

title: Fairy Child Cheats, Saves Father, Wins Brides, Conquers the World
description: Little Lucky Star Jin Bao steals celestial nectar at the Peach Banquet and replaces it with urine, tricking the Celestial Emperor and all the immortals. The Emperor is furious, and Jin Bao is struck down to the mortal realm by the Nine Heavens Thunder Tribulation to undergo trials, reincarnating into the womb of Princess Xiao Jinlan.
context:
Title: Fairy Child Cheats, Saves Father, Wins Brides, Conquers the World
Description: Little Lucky Star Jin Bao steals celestial nectar at the Peach Banquet and replaces it with urine, tricking the Celestial Emperor and all the immortals. The Emperor is furious, and Jin Bao is struck down to the mortal realm by the Nine Heavens Thunder Tribulation to undergo trials, reincarnating into the womb of Princess Xiao Jinlan.

INT. PEACH BANQUET - DAY

The heavenly palace shrouded in clouds and mist. The Peach Banquet scene with several tables displaying immortal peaches and delicacies.

Little Lucky Star JIN BAO weaves between the tables, tossing an immortal peach into the air and catching it. He picks up a jade bottle and takes a sip.

JIN BAO (V.O.)
(panicked)
The celestial nectar! Father will be furious...

JIN BAO
(having a bright idea)
I'll replace it with essence of morning dew—identical appearance!

JIN BAO closes his eyes and casts a spell. The empty jade bottles on the ground are refilled.

IMMORTALS (O.S.)
This year's celestial nectar is purer than the finest jade!

JIN BAO
(nervous)
Someone's coming!

IMMORTALS (O.S.)
Let us toast to the Emperor's health!

JIN BAO quickly hides beneath a banquet table.

The CELESTIAL EMPEROR and the IMMORTALS arrive at the Peach Banquet.

CELESTIAL EMPEROR
(surprised)
Jin Bao? Perfect timing. Help me sample this year's nectar.

JIN BAO
(waving his hand)
I'm just a trainee, Your Majesty. This honor is too great.

CELESTIAL EMPEROR
Nonsense. One sip grants a century of wisdom. You need it most.

The CELESTIAL EMPEROR picks up a bottle of "celestial nectar" and prepares to drink.

JIN BAO
(shouting)
Emperor, wait!

The CELESTIAL EMPEROR has already taken a sip.

CELESTIAL EMPEROR
(frowning)
Interesting... earthy notes. Unconventional.

TAIBAI JINXING
(choking back laughter)
Dew essence, Your Majesty. The boy's signature move.

The IMMORTALS suppress smiles, accustomed to Jin Bao's antics.

CELESTIAL GENERAL
Your Majesty, the law demands—

CELESTIAL EMPEROR
(raises hand)
continuation:
He who guards the nectar must taste it first. Tradition.

JIN BAO's spell misfires, ringing the Thunder Bell.

The sky fills with dark clouds, lightning and thunder.

CELESTIAL EMPEROR
The Nine Heavens Thunder Tribulation? For a child's prank?

A bolt of lightning strikes toward JIN BAO.

JIN BAO
(screaming)
I didn't mean to!

JIN BAO falls from the sky, encased in protective golden light.

CELESTIAL EMPEROR
Jin Bao!

CELESTIAL EMPEROR
Heaven tempers flawed jade through trial.

TAIBAI JINXING
This mortal journey will teach him responsibility.

CELESTIAL EMPEROR
When his merit is complete, he shall return. Perhaps then he'll be worthy of his title.

JIN BAO transforms into a golden light, descending from the heavens.

JIN BAO (V.O.)
Mortal life? Maybe I can finally escape celestial law! Wait... what's a 'father'?

EXT. FOREST - DAY

A horse carriage stops in the forest. Guards stand watch.

The golden light flies into the carriage. Inside, PRINCESS XIAO JINLAN rests. The golden light enters PRINCESS XIAO JINLAN's womb.

PRINCESS XIAO JINLAN suddenly awakens, feeling the sacred energy.

PRINCESS XIAO JINLAN
(whispering)
A celestial soul... chooses me?

YE SHUZE approaches with a physician's bag.

YE SHUZE
(calling out)
Princess, you fainted. I brought medicine—

PRINCESS XIAO JINLAN
(shocked, protective)
Stay back!

PRINCESS XIAO JINLAN's palm strikes out, maternal magic flaring.

YE SHUZE dodges, eyes widening with recognition.

YE SHUZE
(astonished)
Your Highness... you're carrying the prophesied one.

PRINCESS XIAO JINLAN
(determined)
Then this child already protects his mother. Good.

title: Reborn and Running, My Awakening Makes My Ex-Husband Panic
description: A woman discovers the dark truth about her marriage and family, leading to a desperate act of revenge before her rebirth.
context:
Title: Reborn and Running, My Awakening Makes My Ex-Husband Panic
Description: A woman discovers the dark truth about her marriage and family, leading to a desperate act of revenge before her rebirth.

INT. BEDROOM - DAY

ON SCREEN: 1990 - Town Courtyard

SU QINGRAN sits on the edge of the bed, folding her husband's shirts into perfect squares. Her movements are slow, methodical.

XIAO GUODONG adjusts his tie in the mirror. A thick envelope of cash rests beside him.

XIAO GUODONG
Time moves quickly. Xiao Jun's wedding is almost here. Qingran, I've made arrangements. We'll relocate to the east courtyard. This house will serve its proper purpose.

SU QINGRAN stops mid-fold.

SU QINGRAN
My father built this house.

XIAO GUODONG
(without turning)
Family shares everything. Possessions have no memory.

SU QINGRAN
Sixteen years ago, you brought Shen Yunfang and her son here. "Temporary," you said.

XIAO GUODONG
(turning to her)
Consider it practice. For the family we never had.

The barb lands. Su Qingran's fingers tighten on the fabric.

XIAO GUODONG (CONT'D)
The Shanghai shop will be sold. Mother agrees—the proceeds, combined with your father's compensation and your nephew's settlement, will purchase Xiao Jun's new home. A fresh start for everyone.

SU QINGRAN
That money is blood money.

XIAO GUODONG
Don't be dramatic. Blood washes off.

He exits. Su Qingran stares at the closed door.
continuation:
INT. LIVING ROOM - DAY

SU QINGRAN intercepts XIAO GUODONG before he reaches the front door.

SU QINGRAN
(low)
You swore on our wedding day you'd never touch it.

XIAO GUODONG
I swore to protect you. This is protection.

SU QINGRAN
My nephew died because—

XIAO GUODONG
(interrupting)
Your nephew died because he couldn't control his temper. Just as your father couldn't control his tongue. Some families are cursed, Qingran. Ours doesn't have to be.

SU QINGRAN
(quietly)
I am not cursed.

XIAO GUODONG
(looking at her stomach)
Some things we must accept. I've been generous.

He leaves. Su Qingran stands alone, her eyes finding the framed photograph on the wall—her father, confident and young.

INT. COURTYARD - DAY (FLASHBACK)

Young SHEN YUNFANG and ZHANG GUILAN sit on wooden stools, shelling peas.

ZHANG GUILAN
She still doesn't know?

SHEN YUNFANG
Guodong is careful. She trusts him.

ZHANG GUILAN
Good. She owes you everything. If Guodong hadn't reported her father to the authorities—

SU QINGRAN watches through a crack in the door, her face draining of color.

ZHANG GUILAN (V.O.)
"—the whole family would have been sent down. She'd be dead or worse."

QUICK CUT: SU QINGRAN's hand covering her mouth, tears tracking silent paths.

ZHANG GUILAN (V.O.)
"The compensation was her father's guilt. And that nephew..."

QUICK CUT: A memory—Su Qingran's nephew, passionate and alive, arguing with Xiao Guodong.

ZHANG GUILAN (V.O.)
"...Guodong just pointed him toward trouble. Boys will be boys."

ZHANG GUILAN (V.O.)
Now Xiao Jun will have what he deserves. What we all deserve.

INT. LIVING ROOM - DAY

SU QINGRAN kneels beside the gas tank, her hands steady as she opens the valve. The hiss is soft, insistent. She pours rice wine in a careful line across the floor, the liquid darkening the wood.

INT. COURTYARD - DAY (FLASHBACK)

SHEN YUNFANG and ZHANG GUILAN walk toward the house, carrying groceries.

SHEN YUNFANG
(sniffing)
Do you smell that? Like the market near the distillery—

INT. LIVING ROOM - DAY

ZHANG GUILAN and SHEN YUNFANG enter, freezing as the fumes hit them.

ZHANG GUILAN
(shouting)
Have you lost your mind?

SU QINGRAN stands near the kitchen, a single match between her fingers.

SU QINGRAN
(calm)
I'm returning what was borrowed. With interest.

She strikes the match. It flares to life. She opens her hand.

The match falls.

BOOM!

Fire races across the floor, up the walls. ZHANG GUILAN and SHEN YUNFANG scream, stumbling backward. The photograph of Su Qingran's father faces the flames.

SU QINGRAN stands motionless at the center, the fire reflected in her clear, dry eyes.

title: Reigniting the Glorious Era
description: A weapons researcher dies with regret and is reborn to the early days of the nation, determined to prevent the tragedy that cost his beloved colleague her life.
context:
Title: Reigniting the Glorious Era
Description: A weapons researcher dies with regret and is reborn to the early days of the nation, determined to prevent the tragedy that cost his beloved colleague her life.

INT. MUNITIONS FACTORY - DAY

ON SCREEN: MUNITIONS FACTORY AUDITORIUM

LI LONG, a middle-aged man in a Zhongshan suit with a commanding presence, walks into a spacious factory workshop. Inside, a group of SOLDIERS in military uniforms and TECHNICIANS in civilian clothes stand in neat formation. A military truck loaded with rocket artillery and a large cannon are displayed nearby.

LI LONG
Comrades, you are all top students who have returned from studying abroad, especially proficient in weapons research. The weapon placed on my left, I'm sure you are all familiar with it. Our Soviet allies call it Katyusha.

CHEN HUAN, a young technical backbone, shows shock and disbelief in his eyes.

LI LONG
The higher-ups have issued orders for us at North Ordnance to make further improvements on the existing Type-63 artillery within one month.

CHEN HUAN (V.O.)
Type-63... North Ordnance... Wanning?

ZHAO WANNING, a young female researcher with double braids, gently pats CHEN HUAN on the shoulder.

ZHAO WANNING
Comrade Chen Huan.

CHEN HUAN is startled and turns to see ZHAO WANNING. He freezes.

ZHAO WANNING
What's wrong? Are you feeling unwell?

CHEN HUAN
(murmuring)
Wanning...
continuation:
INT. FIELD HOSPITAL - DAY (FLASHBACK)

The hospital corridor is chaotic, with wounded being carried in continuously. Young CHEN HUAN frantically grabs a NURSE.

CHEN HUAN
Excuse me, do you know where Zhao Wanning from the Independent Regiment is?

NURSE
I don't know.

CHEN HUAN searches frantically through the corridor and finally sees two SOLDIERS carrying a stretcher covered with a white cloth. He rushes over to stop them.

CHEN HUAN
Where is Zhao Wanning?

SOLDIER
(quietly)
Engineer Zhao was killed in an artillery strike. Direct hit.

CHEN HUAN
(trembling)
She's okay, right?

SOLDIER
(avoiding his eyes)
She's gone, comrade.

CHEN HUAN reaches out to lift the white cloth. He sees ZHAO WANNING'S face—peaceful beneath the dust and blood. He takes a step back, his legs giving way as he collapses.

END FLASHBACK.

INT. MUNITIONS FACTORY - DAY

CHEN HUAN snaps back to reality, looking at the living ZHAO WANNING before him, his eyes filled with pain. He grips the workbench to steady himself.

ZHAO WANNING
(concerned)
Chen Huan, talk to me.

CHEN HUAN
(softly)
Just... a nightmare. From before.

LI LONG
We cannot depend on foreign designs forever. We must forge our own sword!

CHEN HUAN (V.O.)
The Eagle Offensive begins in six months. Wanning will volunteer, and that Type-63 will fail—and she'll be gone. I've lived forty years of regret. Not again.

CHEN HUAN'S eyes change from confusion to determination.

CHEN HUAN
(loudly)
Yes! We Chinese must have our own Katyusha—but thirty days won't be enough. We need to start from the propellant up.

Everyone looks at him in surprise. CHEN HUAN steps forward, his gaze fixed on the weapon.

CHEN HUAN
We'll build it better than theirs.

ON SCREEN: TO BE CONTINUED

title: Accidentally Pregnant with My Boss's Child
description: A woman discovers she is pregnant after a drunken night with a mysterious man, while helping her friend deal with her own pregnancy troubles.
context:
Title: Accidentally Pregnant with My Boss's Child
Description: A woman discovers she is pregnant after a drunken night with a mysterious man, while helping her friend deal with her own pregnancy troubles.

INT. SU XIA'S APARTMENT - DAY

SU XIA (28, weary but resilient) enters the cramped apartment, juggling grocery bags and exhaustion.

From her bedroom, YE LIN (26, sharp features masking desperation) emerges. Her eyes lock on the designer handbag dangling from Su Xia's wrist.

YE LIN
Su Xia.

Ye Lin intercepts her, snatching the bag with trembling hands. She examines it like a prosecutor with evidence.

YE LIN
(quietly fierce)
New scratches. Right across the clasp.

SU XIA
(confused)
I kept it wrapped the entire interview. It never left my sight--

YE LIN
(turning the bag)
Here. Here. And here. Do you know what this cost?

SU XIA
(softly)
I'll replace it. Once I land something.

YE LIN
The rent's already three weeks late.

Su Xia flinches. Ye Lin softens, a practiced shift.

YE LIN
(conciliatory)
But you're trying. That's what matters.

YE LIN (V.O.)
She'll never know I scratched it myself. The consignment shop needs pristine bags. We need groceries.

YE LIN's fingers brush SU XIA's neck, revealing a purple bruise beneath her collar. Ye Lin's breath catches.

YE LIN
What happened?

SU XIA
(covering it)
Networking event. Open bar. I don't... remember getting home.

FLASHBACK:

INT. HOTEL CORRIDOR - NIGHT (MEMORY FRAGMENT)

SU XIA stumbles, vision swimming. A man's hands—strong, unfamiliar—steady her. She sees only a blurred face and a hint of ink on his wrist before darkness.

BACK TO:
continuation:
INT. SU XIA'S APARTMENT - DAY

SU XIA
I woke up alone. Clothes intact. Figured I just...

YE LIN
(quietly)
You were a virgin. Was it worth it?

YE LIN doubles over, hand flying to her mouth. She retches into the sink.

SU XIA
(rushing over)
Linlin!

YE LIN waves her off, spitting water. Her reflection in the faucet shows tears, not nausea.

SU XIA
How long?

YE LIN
Don't.

SU XIA
(eyes hardening)
The test in your trash. The prenatal vitamins. It's Li Kai's.

YE LIN
(defeated)
He blocked my number yesterday.

SU XIA grabs her phone. Ye Lin reaches for it—too slow.

INT. POOL HALL - DAY

LI KAI (30, casual cruelty) lines up a shot. His phone buzzes. He checks the screen, smirking.

LI KAI
(answering)
The charity case is calling me?

SU XIA (V.O.)
(fierce)
Li Kai. Ye Lin's pregnant. You disappeared.

LI KAI
(leaning against the table)
So? I'm not a doctor. I'm not her husband. What do you want, a medal for stating facts?

SU XIA (V.O.)
You promised--

LI KAI
I promised a good time. Not a lifetime. Tell her to handle it.

CLICK. He hangs up.

INT. SU XIA'S APARTMENT - DAY

The phone drops from SU XIA's hand.

YE LIN
(whispered fury)
You just made it worse. He thinks I'm pathetic.

SU XIA
He is pathetic.

YE LIN
And what are you? Meddling where you're not wanted. Maybe you just need me to be as miserable as you are.

YE LIN storms out, slamming the door. Su Xia stands frozen, the hickey burning like a brand.

EXT. CITY SKYLINE - DAY

AERIAL SHOT: The city sprawls beneath a hazy sky.

SUPER: Ten weeks later.

INT. DOCTOR'S OFFICE - DAY

SU XIA sits straighter now, worn blazer over a changed body. She grips her knees.

DOCTOR
(50s, professional)
Your hormone levels confirm it. Ten weeks.

SU XIA
But I haven't... I mean, I thought it was stress.

DOCTOR
It often is. Until it isn't. Have you considered your options?

SU XIA (V.O.)
Options. As if that night was a multiple-choice question I could erase.

FLASHBACK:

INT. HOTEL ROOM - NIGHT (MEMORY FRAGMENT)

SU XIA on her back, the MYSTERIOUS MAN above her. His glasses catch the light, obscuring his eyes. On his forearm, a flame tattoo licks toward his wrist. His lips brush her neck.

MYSTERIOUS MAN
(low)
Is this okay?

SU XIA
(dreamlike)
Mmm.

He kisses her throat, hard enough to mark.

BACK TO:

INT. DOCTOR'S OFFICE - DAY

SU XIA's fingers trace the ghost of that bruise on her neck, now faded. Her other hand rests on the soft curve beneath her shirt.

SU XIA (V.O.)
The man with the flame tattoo. Who was he? And why do I feel like I've seen that tattoo before...

title: Night in Fancy Dress
description: A young woman faces escalating abuse from her stepfather while her mother's denial deepens their desperate situation.
context:
Title: Night in Fancy Dress
Description: A young woman faces escalating abuse from her stepfather while her mother's denial deepens their desperate situation.

INT. TANG YU'S HOUSE/BEDROOM - NIGHT

Thunder and lightning rage outside.

TANG YU (female, about 20 years old) sleeps fitfully. The door opens silently—her stepfather TIAN DALEI (male, about 50 years old) enters, whiskey bottle in hand. He moves to the bedside and leans close.

Lightning flashes across his face. TANG YU wakes with a start.

TANG YU
(terrified)
Stepfather—don't—

TIAN DALEI
(low, slurred)
Don't fight me. I'm all that's keeping a roof over your head.

He lunges. TANG YU struggles. His hand finds the sheets—blood.

TIAN DALEI
(disgusted)
Filthy.

He wipes his hand on the blanket, turns back to her.

TIAN DALEI
(cold)
I'll wait.

He exits. TANG YU sits up, trembling. Her terror shifts to something harder—resolve.
continuation:
INT. TANG YU'S HOUSE/LIVING ROOM - DAY

The living room is in disarray, furniture overturned. TIAN DALEI is assaulting TANG YU's mother HAN MEI (female, about 40-something years old), tearing at her clothes.

TIAN DALEI
(roaring)
Where's the money?

He strikes HAN MEI. She falls. TANG YU hides behind the door, gripping the frame, tears streaming down her face.

TIAN DALEI
I need it now! Don't make me ask again!

HAN MEI
(crying out)
It's gone! Everything's gone!

TIAN DALEI searches her roughly, finds a wad of bills tucked in her waistband. He pockets it.

TIAN DALEI
(turning, sees Tang Yu)
How long?

TANG YU
(voice shaking)
Two days.

TIAN DALEI
(nods)
Lock your door.

He leaves. TANG YU rushes to HAN MEI.

TANG YU
(crying)
Mom—we have to go—

HAN MEI
(shoves her away)
And go where?

TANG YU
Anywhere—I've saved—

HAN MEI
(slaps her)
You think he'd let us leave? You think I can survive without him?

Han Mei's voice breaks. She won't look at her daughter.

HAN MEI
(whispering)
Just... make yourself scarce. Please.

TANG YU sits back, stunned. TIAN DALEI's words echo.

TIAN DALEI (V.O.)
I'll wait.

TANG YU's hand finds a piece of broken glass on the floor. She holds it up, watching the light. Her tears stop. She makes a choice.

title: Mother-in-Law's Card Game Saves the Day
description: A skilled card player mother-in-law wins at every table, but rushes to save her son-in-law when he's trapped in a gambling den after being set up.
context:
Title: Mother-in-Law's Card Game Saves the Day
Description: A skilled card player mother-in-law wins at every table, but rushes to save her son-in-law when he's trapped in a gambling den after being set up.

INT. COURTYARD MAHJONG TABLE - DAY

Four women huddle around a crowded mahjong table in a tight community courtyard. QIN LING (60s, sharp-eyed, nimble fingers) casually arranges her tiles. Three NEIGHBORS sweat nervously.

MALE CARD PLAYER
(leaning over Aunt Zhang's shoulder)
Hey, let me draw for you. Can't be worse than your luck.

AUNT ZHANG
(praying with hands together)
God of Wealth, just once. Let me break even before my husband notices.

CARD PLAYER A
(impatiently)
Play something. Anything.

QIN LING
(smiling faintly)
Last tile.

QIN LING reveals her hand with a quiet flourish.

QIN LING
Nine Gates. Pure and perfect.

CARD PLAYER B
(awestruck)
Twenty years... first time I've seen a Nine Gates in the wild.

AUNT ZHANG
(defeated)
That's six rounds straight. You should just empty my purse at the start.

MALE CARD PLAYER
(to others)
Told you. Never bet against Qin Ling.

QIN LING
(gathering cash with practiced ease)
Sun's getting low. My daughter's family is coming for dinner.

AUNT ZHANG
(grabbing her sleeve)
One more round. Double stakes.

QIN LING
(standing firmly)
When I'm good, I'm good. When I'm done, I'm done.

CARD PLAYER B
(to the table)
Wins and walks. Every. Single. Time.

INT. COURTYARD PAIGOW TABLE - DAY

QIN LING crosses the courtyard to a rougher table where four MEN play Pai Gow. They stiffen as she approaches.

CARD PLAYER C
(covering his tiles)
Sister Qin. We weren't expecting royalty.

CARD PLAYER D
(scrambling)
Go, go, deal her in.

CARD PLAYER C
(sighing)
I'm out. Folded before I started.

QIN LING
(sitting smoothly)
Don't be dramatic. One hand.

CARD PLAYER E
(resigned)
There goes my cigarette money for the month.

The DEALER slides tiles. QIN LING's fingers dance across them.

CARD PLAYER F
(confident)
Double nine cakes. Beat that, Sister Qin.

QIN LING
(laughing softly)
Let me see.

She reveals the Supreme Pair with a sharp snap.

CARD PLAYER C
(jumping back)
Supreme Pair?! We're playing for pennies!

CARD PLAYER E
(to the ceiling)
Why do I do this to myself?

QIN LING
(collecting the modest pot)
Gentlemen, it's been educational.

She stands, leaving them gaping.

CARD PLAYER F
That's it? One hand?

CARD PLAYER D
She's a phantom. A card shark phantom.
continuation:
INT. INDOOR CARD TABLE - DAY

QIN LING enters a smoky back room. XIAO LIU (20s, cocky) deals cards to three PLAYERS.

XIAO LIU
(slapping cards down)
Today I bankrupt you grandpas.

QIN LING
(leaning in the doorway)
Mind if I cut in, Xiao Liu?

XIAO LIU
(stuttering)
A-Aunt Qin. I meant, please, sit.

CARD PLAYER H
(awed)
You're everywhere.

CARD PLAYER I
(chuckling)
Like a tax collector.

QIN LING
(settling in)
Only for the careless.

She plays with surgical precision.

QIN LING
Bomb. Straight. Triple with kicker. Spring hand. Pay.

The table groans. She sweeps the money.

EXT. COURTYARD - DAY

QINGQING (30s, frantic) skids her bicycle into the courtyard, spots QIN LING emerging.

QINGQING
(gasping for breath)
Aunt Qin! Da Niu's in trouble. They dragged him to the—

QIN LING
(calm exterior cracking)
My son-in-law doesn't gamble.

QINGQING
Exactly! He refused, so they forced him. Said he owes "entertainment fees." Now he's down five thousand at Boss Zhou's den.

QIN LING
(eyes flashing)
Get me there. Now.

INT. GAMBLING DEN - DAY

Smoke hangs thick. DA NIU (40s, terrified) sits at a dice table. His shirt is soaked with sweat and spilled beer. A HEAVY (30s, scarred) looms behind him.

GAMBLERS
Big! Big! Big!

The dice settle. Wrong. DA NIU watches his last chips vanish.

DA NIU
(whispering)
It's gone. My daughter's tuition...

EXT. OUTSIDE GAMBLING DEN - DAY

QINGQING's bicycle screeches to a halt. A NEIGHBOR woman waits, twisted with worry.

FEMALE NEIGHBOR
Sister Qin, thank heaven. They're not letting him leave. Says he owes interest now.

QIN LING
(striding forward)
I brought interest.

She pulls a thick roll of cash from her pocket.

INT. GAMBLING DEN - CONTINUOUS

QIN LING bursts through the door, QINGQING behind her. The room goes silent.

QIN LING
(to the room)
My son-in-law's debt. I'll clear it.

BOSS ZHOU (50s, gold chains) emerges from shadows.

BOSS ZHOU
(smiling coldly)
A woman? How quaint. Double or nothing. Your money against his freedom.

QIN LING
(fierce smile)
One hand. My game.

She points to a pristine mahjong table in the corner.

QIN LING
Nine Gates. If I don't make it, you get everything. If I do, Da Niu walks.

The room holds its breath.

title: The Bright Moon Should Return
description: A woman finds herself in the body of a neglected wife in ancient times, only to discover her husband is destined to become a notorious villain in history.
context:
Title: The Bright Moon Should Return
Description: A woman finds herself in the body of a neglected wife in ancient times, only to discover her husband is destined to become a notorious villain in history.

INT. XIE RESIDENCE ENTRANCE - NIGHT

A WU stands at the entrance, torn robes and bloodied knuckles, watching XIE JIAN walk ahead.

A WU (V.O.)
Could this be him? The future grand villain?

XIA SHI strides out with her son XIE MIN, her glare sharp enough to draw blood.

XIA SHI
What time is it, and you finally know to come back? We've fed you well for two years, even the fiercest beast should have softened by now, you ungrateful thing.

XIA SHI looks A WU up and down.

XIA SHI
Why are you so filthy? Your clothes are even torn?

XIE MIN (pulling XIA SHI's sleeve)
Mother, don't be harsh on A Wu. A Wu is so pitiful.

A Wu's gaze flicks from Xia Shi's contempt to Xie Min's worried face.

A WU (V.O.)
The history books mentioned a sister-in-law and nephew. These must be them.

A WU (lowering her head)
I just ran into two mad dogs.

XIA SHI
Serves you right! Who told you to always think about running back to your parents' home? You're lucky they didn't bite you to death.

XIE JIAN (coldly)
A Jian needs to sleep. Hurry and prepare the bedding.

A Wu's throat tightens. She bows her head and slips past them into the residence.
continuation:
INT. XIE RESIDENCE BEDROOM - NIGHT

A Wu stumbles over a wooden practice sword and bites back a cry of pain.

A WU (V.O.)
They think I ran home. They don't know about the elopement.

She steadies herself, surveying the sparse room. One bed. One desk. The sword—deliberately placed?

A WU (V.O.)
Two years of hate. One thousand taels of dowry. And yet they share a bed.

A WU (to herself)
No way, do we have to sleep in the same bed tonight too?

The door opens. A Wu scrambles backward, colliding with the bed frame.

XIE JIAN enters without a glance. He bolts the door, then sits at the desk with a scroll. The candlelight carves his perfect profile.

A WU (V.O.)
Even better looking than his AI photo. And even colder.

A Wu's gaze drops to the sword. The lover's voice echoes: "Xie Jian let it slip..."

A WU (V.O.)
Wait. That's not right.

FLASHBACK BEGINS:

EXT. FOREST - NIGHT

A MAN on horseback leans toward his companion, voice pitched to carry.

MAN
He was practicing sword forms yesterday. Between strokes, he said his wife's dowry was a thousand taels. Said she keeps it hidden somewhere in the west wing. She'll come for it. They always come for love.

FLASHBACK ENDS.

INT. XIE RESIDENCE BEDROOM - NIGHT

A Wu's breath catches. She stares at the sword, then at Xie Jian's impassive face.

A WU (V.O.)
Xie Jian let it slip? The grand villain who does everything flawlessly?

A Wu's fingers find the hidden key in her sleeve. Xie Jian turns a page, the sound crisp and final.

A WU (V.O.)
Oh my god. He orchestrated everything. Even his own wife's escape.

A Wu watches him, motionless, as the candle burns down.

title: Prison Cart Rides to the Golden Hall
description: An emperor refuses to name an heir, while his long-lost son unknowingly faces a terrible fate in the capital.
context:
Title: Prison Cart Rides to the Golden Hall
Description: An emperor refuses to name an heir, while his long-lost son unknowingly faces a terrible fate in the capital.

INT. GOLDEN HALL - DAY

EMPEROR WEN (40s, granite-eyed but weighted by memory) stands before his council. MINISTER LIU (60s, unyielding) steps forward.

MINISTER LIU
The throne's succession remains hollow, and the realm trembles. Your physicians have spoken plainly—the imperial line requires an heir of your own blood, yet fifteen years have passed.

EMPEROR WEN
(low, dangerous)
My bloodline is my own concern, Minister.

MINISTER LIU
(kneeling, voice cracking)
Your Majesty, the memorials overflow! Name a successor, any prince from the clan, or court the chaos you court now!

ALL MINISTERS
(kneeling in unison)
Name a successor, secure the dynasty!

EMPEROR WEN
(drawing his sword, measured)
You test how far my mercy extends.

EMPRESS DOWAGER
Your Majesty, enough!

The EMPEROR drives his sword through Minister Liu. The old man collapses, crimson blooming across the jade carpet. The EMPRESS DOWAGER (70s, iron in silk) turns away, jaw tight.

EMPEROR WEN
(quietly, to the hall)
Speak of adoption again, and the carpet will thirst.

He discards the sword. From his sleeve, he withdraws a faded silk pouch, thumb tracing its embroidery.

INT. HUMBLE COTTAGE - DAY (FLASHBACK)

SHEN ZHIROU (30s, gentle but resolute) ties a matching pouch to young XIAO LANG's (25, calloused hands, hungry eyes) belt as he cradles their infant son.

SHEN ZHIROU
One for you, one for me. When you reach the capital... remember the weight of home.

XIAO LANG
(holding the baby close)
When the throne is mine, this cottage will become a palace. You and Zhou'er will wear gold.

SHEN ZHIROU
(soft smile touching her eyes)
Just return to us.

She touches the baby's forehead.

SHEN ZHIROU
Zhou'er. His father's stubborn chin.
continuation:
INT. GOLDEN HALL - DAY

EMPEROR WEN
(V.O.)
Rou'er... I've kept the promise. Where have you hidden our son?

EMPRESS DOWAGER
(approaching, voice low)
Every day you kill in the name of an heir that may not exist. The clan princes wait.

EMPEROR WEN
(spins on her)
He exists. I have turned the empire inside out searching. When Zhou'er stands here, no adopted pup will challenge him.

INT. HUMBLE COTTAGE - DAY

SHEN ZHIROU (50s now, gray threading her hair) clutches the pouch as SHEN YUNZHOU (20, her eyes but his father's bearing) shoulders a traveler's pack.

SHEN YUNZHOU
Mother, you weep over that pouch as if it breathes. It leads to Father. And I will find him.

SHEN ZHIROU
The capital devours boys like you.

SHEN YUNZHOU
Then let it try.

He kisses her forehead and strides out. She clutches the doorway, the pouch fraying in her grip.

SHEN ZHIROU
(whispered into the wind)
Zhou'er...

INT. CAPITAL RECRUITMENT OFFICE - DAY

SHEN YUNZHOU stands before LIU ERGOU (40s, polished cruelty), who studies a roster with feigned boredom.

LIU ERGOU
Imperial service is an honor. You seek a father? The palace knows every man in the capital.

SHEN YUNZHUO
(eager, naive)
Then you'll help me?

LIU ERGOU
(smiling)
Sign here. We'll place you where secrets flow.

Shen Yunzhou presses his thumb to the scroll. Liu Ergou's smile sharpens.

INT. CASTRATION ROOM - DAY

Shen Yunzhou is pinned to a blood-stained bench by two silent GUARDS. His face drains of color.

SHEN YUNZHOU
(struggling)
Wait—there's been a mistake! I'm here for the imperial records, not—

LIU ERGOU
(flicking the blade with his thumb)
Every boy thinks he's special. Your ink is dry. The palace needs eunuchs, and your name topped today's list.

SHEN YUNZHOU
(pleading)
My mother waits! Please, check the records again!

LIU ERGOU
(raising the curved blade)
Hold him tight. This one fights like he has something to lose.

The blade catches the torchlight.

SHEN YUNZHOU
(screaming, primal)
Mother—!

INT. GOLDEN HALL - DAY

The Emperor's fingers tighten around his pouch. The embroidery—"Zhou"— catches the light.

EMPEROR WEN
(to himself)
Soon. Soon he will come.

title: Black Moonlight, She's Full of Lies
description: After dying in a car crash orchestrated by those who wanted her gone, a young woman is reborn five years in the past, determined to turn the tables on those who wronged her.
context:
Title: Black Moonlight, She's Full of Lies
Description: After dying in a car crash orchestrated by those who wanted her gone, a young woman is reborn five years in the past, determined to turn the tables on those who wronged her.

EXT. CITY STREET - NIGHT

A rainy night. A red Ferrari speeds through neon-lit city streets, wipers fighting the downpour. Inside, XIAO YIN drives with white knuckles.

INT. BUS - NIGHT

A man wearing a black mask and cap loads a handgun with a soft CLICK, his eyes cold behind the mask.

EXT. CITY STREET - NIGHT

The bus suddenly cuts in front of the Ferrari, tires SCREAMING. XIAO YIN screams and jerks the steering wheel.

In slow motion, the Ferrari crashes into the bus. The windshield shatters instantly into a thousand diamonds. XIAO YIN's head snaps back—then darkness.

INT. BEDROOM - DAY

XIAO YIN jolts awake in bed, gasping for air.

XIAO YIN (V.O.)
I died. I felt the life leave my body. So why am I breathing?

She looks around in confusion, finding the room unchanged yet alien.

XIAO YIN (V.O.)
Wait. The Hong mansion. My childhood prison. Five years ago.

In the mirror, dark wings flicker behind her—a trick of light or something more? The wall painting writhes, briefly becoming thorns and roses. A leather-bound book on the shelf begins to glow.

XIAO YIN (V.O.)
A novel. My life is a novel, and I was written as disposable. That crash was their final edit.

The book flips open, pages turning themselves. Sketches flash: the crash, a girl in blue, Xiao Yin's name crossed out.

XIAO YIN (V.O.)
They killed me to clear the path. They never expected a sequel.

A MAID enters, carrying a silver tray with amber liquid.

MAID
Miss, are you awake? Does your head still hurt? I've brought tonight's medicine.

XIAO YIN
My head is clear. Take it away.

MAID
Miss, your father just called. He said he's bringing back a girl around your age.

XIAO YIN
(eyes on the glowing book)
The protagonist arrives. How convenient.
continuation:
INT. LIVING ROOM - NIGHT

In the luxurious living room, a middle-aged man (FATHER) sits impatiently on the sofa, checking his gold watch. Next to him sits a young girl (NEW GIRL) wearing a light blue dress, hands folded demurely. Another young man (HONG YUAN) leans lazily on the armrest, scrolling his phone.

FATHER
Why isn't Xiao Yin coming down yet? I have a dinner reservation.

NEW GIRL
I had no idea there was suddenly another sister.

HONG YUAN
(puts down his phone, voice dripping with venom)
My mother's been in the ground two months. You must've been digging fast, little grave-robber.

FATHER
(angrily)
Hong Yuan, that's enough!

INT. BEDROOM - DAY

XIAO YIN sits at her vanity as twilight bleeds through the windows. She studies her younger face in the mirror.

XIAO YIN (V.O.)
Eighteen and already dead once. This time, I write my own story.

She picks up an eyebrow pencil and lipstick, applying them with the precision of someone painting a mask. Her eyes hold the weight of five years of graves.

INT. LIVING ROOM - NIGHT

Father comforts the New Girl, but his gaze keeps drifting to the staircase.

FATHER
It's fine, it's fine. Xiao Yin's probably just... adjusting.

NEW GIRL
(obediently)
Thank you, Father. I'll be no trouble at all.

Hong Yuan watches her performance, unimpressed, then looks toward the stairs. His smirk fades.

INT. MANSION STAIRCASE - NIGHT

XIAO YIN, fully made up and dressed in an elegant black evening gown, descends gracefully down the spiral staircase with a noble bearing. Each step is a promise. The living room falls silent below. She doesn't rush toward her revenge—she lets it come to her.

title: Lottery Winner's Time Travel
description: A security guard wins the lottery but gets hit by a car while retrieving his ticket, only to wake up in ancient times and meet his ancestor.
context:
Title: Lottery Winner's Time Travel
Description: A security guard wins the lottery but gets hit by a car while retrieving his ticket, only to wake up in ancient times and meet his ancestor.

INT. LOTTERY SHOP - DAY

A composed woman in red (LOTTERY ATTENDANT) writes the winning numbers on a whiteboard.

Security guard YE CHEN sits at a table, clenching his lottery ticket, muttering as he checks each number.

YE CHEN
Thirty-one... thirty-two... four...

YE CHEN jumps up, the ticket trembling. Nearby players cast surprised looks.

YE CHEN
(barely breathing)
Eighty-seven million. Mom's surgery... it's real.

A WOMAN IN BLACK approaches, resting a hand on YE CHEN's arm.

WOMAN IN BLACK
(practiced charm)
Security guard? My employer wants to discuss your... windfall. Somewhere private.

The WOMAN IN BLACK and two associates guide YE CHEN toward the exit.

WOMAN IN BLACK
This way.

LOTTERY ATTENDANT watches them leave, subtly touching a jade pendant.
continuation:
EXT. STREET - DAY

YE CHEN is steered along the sidewalk when the ticket is torn from his hand by a gust.

YE CHEN
(panicking)
No! My daughter's future—

YE CHEN breaks free, sprinting back. He scoops up the ticket on the crosswalk.

YE CHEN
(relieved)
Got it—

A black sedan barrels through. Headlights. Impact.

INT. ANCIENT STABLE - DAY

YE CHEN awakens on hay, wearing coarse linen robes.

YE CHEN
(confused)
Where am I?

A woman in white silk (LOTTERY ATTENDANT) enters, carrying a lantern.

YE CHEN looks up, recognition dawning.

YE CHEN
(surprised)
You... from the shop?

LOTTERY ATTENDANT
I am Guanyin, matriarch of the Chen bloodline. And you... wear my grandson's face.

She reveals the ticket—now parchment—it crumbles, leaving the number "31" glowing on his palm.

YE CHEN
(stunned)
Huh?

title: Sharing a Bed, Different Dreams
description: A pregnant woman discovers her paralyzed husband calls her best friend "wife" due to amnesia, forcing her to make painful sacrifices to help him recover his memory.
context:
Title: Sharing a Bed, Different Dreams
Description: A pregnant woman discovers her paralyzed husband calls her best friend "wife" due to amnesia, forcing her to make painful sacrifices to help him recover his memory.

INT. VILLA LIVING ROOM - DAY

Opening shot: A wedding photo—CAI PENG stands tall, SHEN QING glowing. Beside it, a withering bouquet.

SHEN QING (V.O.)
Ten years. That's how long he's been my whole world. Even after the accident stole his legs, he was still whole in my eyes.

Footsteps. Pregnant SHEN QING enters, steadied by TANG QIAOQIAO. CAI PENG sits in his wheelchair, back to them.

CAI PENG
(to TANG QIAOQIAO)
You're home late. I kept thinking...

TANG QIAOQIAO
(gently)
Hospital traffic. The therapist says you're making remarkable progress.

SHEN QING's smile freezes. She watches her husband reach for QIAOQIAO's hand, his eyes never finding her.

SHEN QING (V.O.)
That word. Home. As if I'd become the guest in my own marriage.

TANG QIAOQIAO
(over her shoulder)
Dr. Lin's method requires consistency, Xiao Qing. The immersive reconstruction...

CAI PENG
(interrupting)
She shouldn't leave. Qiaoqiao stays.

SHEN QING
(fumbling)
A-Peng, Dr. Lin only suggested she assist with your exercises...

CAI PENG
(wheeling around, low and dangerous)
Assist? She's been here every morning, every night. Who do you think I've been seeing when I open my eyes? You, flitting in and out like some overpaid nurse? Or her—my wife?

ZHANG MA appears in the kitchen doorway, a tea tray trembling.

ZHANG MA
Sir, your medication...

CAI PENG
Memory? I remember promises. I remember a woman who swore to stand by me. That woman is Qiaoqiao.

SHEN QING
(quietly, to herself)
And who am I, then?

TANG QIAOQIAO
(stepping between them, protective hand on SHEN QING's stomach)
Brother Peng, you're upsetting the baby.

SHEN QING flinches at the touch.

CAI PENG
Then maybe she should rest. In the guest room. Qiaoqiao needs proper sleep for the therapy.

SHEN QING
(looking at her belly, then at him)
Our bedroom. Where we planned...

CAI PENG
A child you keep telling me is mine. Convenient.

TANG QIAOQIAO
Xiao Qing, it's temporary. For his recovery. You said you'd do anything.
continuation:
SHEN QING studies her friend's face—the same face that held her through three miscarriages. Now offering this poisoned contract.

SHEN QING
(to TANG QIAOQIAO, not CAI PENG)
You moved his medication to the nightstand. The green pills. He hates those.

TANG QIAOQIAO
(defensively)
Dr. Lin said...

SHEN QING
(still staring)
You know he hates them. That's why you do it.

A beat. TANG QIAOQIAO looks away.

CAI PENG
(agitated, wheels squeaking)
Enough! Qiaoqiao, tell her. Or I stop eating. Stop therapy.

TANG QIAOQIAO
(softly, eyes on the floor)
He wants me to manage the household. And... you to prepare our meals. Just like you used to.

SHEN QING's laugh is brittle.

SHEN QING
(reading from some internal script)
Immersive reconstruction might trigger...

She turns toward the kitchen.

SHEN QING
(over her shoulder)
The congee takes two hours. You must be hungry.

ZHANG MA follows, her hand not quite touching SHEN QING's elbow.

INT. STUDY - NIGHT

ZHANG MA moves through the darkened study, collecting teacups. Moonlight reveals CAI PENG at the window, his wheelchair abandoned.

He stands. Not trembling. Simply stands, rolling his shoulders.

ZHANG MA
(voice barely a whisper)
Sir... your legs...

CAI PENG
(turning, face unreadable)
Sometimes, Zhang Ma, a man must lose everything to see what he truly had.

He picks up the wedding photo—tenderly.

CAI PENG
She never looked at the medical reports. Not in three months. The dates didn't match the accident.

ZHANG MA
You mean...

CAI PENG
I mean she's so desperate to believe I'm broken, she'll sacrifice everything to fix me.

He sets the photo down. In the glass reflection, ZHANG MA's stricken face.

CAI PENG
Tell her, and you'll break her heart. Not me.

ZHANG MA backs toward the door, cups rattling.

CAI PENG
Tomorrow, buy fresh flowers. The kind from our wedding. Qiaoqiao prefers them.

title: Ex-Wife's Redemption
description: A wealthy CEO accepts a challenge to fake bankruptcy for three months to test the loyalty of those around her, betting company shares with her best friend.
context:
Title: Ex-Wife's Redemption
Description: A wealthy CEO accepts a challenge to fake bankruptcy for three months to test the loyalty of those around her, betting company shares with her best friend.

INT. LUXURIOUS LIVING ROOM - DAY

Sunlight streams through massive floor-to-ceiling windows into the misty, luxurious living room, creating a soft, dreamlike glow.

BEST FRIEND, wearing a black strapless top and silver sequined gown, walks toward XUE'ER, who sits on a beige sofa, carrying two glasses of red wine. Her measured steps echo across the marble floors.

ON SCREEN: XUE'ER - CEO OF ZHAO CORPORATION

XUE'ER accepts the wine glass, her fingers lingering on the stem as she meets BEST FRIEND's gaze.

BEST FRIEND
My lawyers drafted the contract this morning. Three months, controlled insolvency simulation. Complete legal protection.

BEST FRIEND
The question is—do you actually have the courage to see who stays when the money disappears?

XUE'ER
continuation:
(smiling, but her eyes tighten)
What's there to be afraid of?

BEST FRIEND
Don't answer so quickly. Pan Ming is already planning your engagement. And your dear "brother" Ryan has been making some interesting calls to our competitors.

BEST FRIEND
(leaning closer)
Your father lost everything to people he trusted.

BEST FRIEND
(quietly)
Are you sure you want to bet twenty percent of Zhao Corporation on that same mistake?

XUE'ER
(chuckles, swirling her wine)
If you want to walk away from your own company, who am I to stop you?

They raise their glasses. The crystal chimes hang in the air as XUE'ER downs her wine in one swallow, her hand trembling almost imperceptibly.

ON SCREEN: TO BE CONTINUED

title: In the Name of Medicine
description: A man who injured a perpetrator to protect his sister faces an unjust legal system where mental illness becomes a shield for crime.
context:
Title: In the Name of Medicine
Description: A man who injured a perpetrator to protect his sister faces an unjust legal system where mental illness becomes a shield for crime.

INT. COURTROOM - DAY

A parole hearing. XU HAO sits in the victim's gallery. ZHANG QIANG appears on a monitor, flanked by orderlies.

XU HAO
I forgive Zhang Qiang for what he did to my sister.

The gallery whispers.

AUDIENCE (V.O.)
But she died. How can he forgive?

ZHANG QIANG smiles, a hint of glee.

XU HAO
As the family, I issue a letter of understanding. I won't pursue further action.

ZHANG QIANG suddenly leans into the camera.

ZHANG QIANG
(smugly)
You lost.

XU HAO lowers his head.

FADE OUT.

FADE IN:

TITLE CARD: THREE YEARS EARLIER

EXT. FARM PORK SHOP - DAY

XU HAO chops meat. A white sedan screeches up. FRIEND 1 runs over.

FRIEND 1
Brother Hao. Xiao Yu. Zhang Qiang found her.

XU HAO drops the cleaver. Removes his apron.

XU HAO
Hospital?

FRIEND 1 nods. Xu Hao runs. Friend 2 moves to follow.

XU HAO
(stopping him)
Stay. I handle my own blood.

He sprints off. The friends watch.
continuation:
INT. HOSPITAL WARD - DAY

XIAO YU on the floor, her leg in a cast. ZHANG QIANG stands over her, unstable.

ZHANG QIANG
You can't hide from me.

XU HAO bursts in. Takes in the scene.

XU HAO
Get back!

ZHANG QIANG
Or what? More prison time?

He lunges. Xu Hao intercepts. They crash down.

XU HAO's fists find flesh. Then bone. A sharp CRACK.

XIAO YU
Brother! Stop! You'll—

XU HAO
(quiet rage)
You can't control it. So I controlled it for you.

He stands, knuckles bleeding. Orderlies rush in.

FLASHBACK TO:

TITLE CARD: TWENTY YEARS AGO

INT. BEDROOM - NIGHT

YOUNG XU HAO and XIAO YU watch their MOTHER fade.

MOTHER
(weakly)
Xiao Bao... protect her... but not...

She doesn't finish. Her eyes close. The children weep.

BACK TO:

INT. HOSPITAL WARD - DAY

XU HAO kneels by Xiao Yu. POLICE OFFICERS enter.

POLICE OFFICER 1
Assault. You're under arrest.

XIAO YU
(whispering)
I'll wait.

XU HAO
(to officer)
He's schizophrenic. In psychiatric care?

POLICE OFFICER 2
Treatment, not prison. That's the law.

ZHANG QIANG
(on gurney)
When I get out, I'll—

ORDERLY
Sedative's working. He won't remember.

ZHANG QIANG laughs through the fog.

FADE OUT.

FADE IN:

INT. COURTROOM - DAY

Back at the hearing. Xu Hao stands to leave.

DR. LI
Your sister's medical expenses?

XU HAO
She died. Complications.

ZHANG QIANG's smile fades.

XU HAO
(to monitor)
You think you won? I served three years. You served none. But everyone knows what you are. Even if the medicine of law can't touch you.

XU HAO exits. The monitor flickers. Zhang Qiang's face hardens.

FADE OUT.

title: Rebirth for Redemption
description: A woman betrayed by her fiancé and sister is given a second chance when she travels back in time to her wedding day, three years before her tragic death.
context:
Title: Rebirth for Redemption
Description: A woman betrayed by her fiancé and sister is given a second chance when she travels back in time to her wedding day, three years before her tragic death.

INT. ABANDONED WAREHOUSE - NIGHT

YANYAN lies in a spreading pool of blood. LI SHIYUAN stands over her.

YANYAN
(crying)
Shiyuan... please... I'm your fiancée...

LI SHIYUAN kicks her ribs. She gasps.

YANYAN
(screaming)
Ah!

LI SHIYUAN
(disdainfully)
I'm the Li Group heir. Why would I marry a slut? I've always loved your sister.

YING WENXIN enters in black silk, draping herself against him.

YANYAN stares, betrayal sinking in.

INT. ROOM - DAY (FLASHBACK)

YANYAN in a pink dress hugs LI SHIYUAN.

LI SHIYUAN
Get me the Li Group's secrets, and I'll marry you.

YANYAN
(affectionately)
I'll do anything for you.

They embrace. LI SHIYUAN's eyes are dead.

INT. ABANDONED WAREHOUSE - NIGHT

YANYAN
(in despair)
Everything was a lie.

YING WENXIN crouches beside her.

YING WENXIN
Not everything. We really did enjoy watching you suffer.

YANYAN
(angrily)
Li Sihan will make you pay!

YING WENXIN slaps her across the face.

LI SHIYUAN pours gasoline around YANYAN.

YING WENXIN
(coldly)
In your next life, try being less stupid.

She ignites the lighter, drops it.

YANYAN
(terrified)
No! No!

Flames erupt, surrounding her.
continuation:
YANYAN
(screaming in the fire)
I'll haunt you both!

LI SIHAN crashes through the flames.

LI SIHAN
Yanyan!

He reaches her side.

YANYAN
Why did you come?

LI SIHAN
You called.

A burning beam cracks overhead.

LI SIHAN
Watch out!

He shoves her. The beam strikes him, and he falls.

YANYAN crawls to LI SIHAN's side.

YANYAN
(crying)
Sihan... I'm sorry...

LI SIHAN
(weakly)
I was wrong... caged you with love...

INT. LUXURIOUS LIVING ROOM - DAY (FLASHBACK)

LI SIHAN pins YANYAN against the wall.

LI SIHAN
(furiously)
You're mine! You can't leave!

YANYAN
Li Sihan, please--

LI SIHAN
(to his subordinates)
If she runs, break her legs.

INT. ABANDONED WAREHOUSE - NIGHT

LI SIHAN
(dying)
Now you're free. Live.

He dies. YANYAN screams as flames consume everything.

INT. BRIDAL ROOM - DAY

YANYAN wakes in a white wedding dress, her hands bound.

She sees the wedding photo. Herself and LI SIHAN.

YANYAN
(to herself)
Three years... before the fire.

She begins untying the rope, her expression hardening.

FADE OUT.

title: You Are the April of This World
description: A young woman drugged at a party ends up spending a night with a stranger—only to discover he is the husband she's never met, who is already filing for divorce.
context:
Title: You Are the April of This World
Description: A young woman drugged at a party ends up spending a night with a stranger—only to discover he is the husband she's never met, who is already filing for divorce.

INT. HOTEL HALLWAY - NIGHT

Close-up of hotel room door number "610".

YE NANSHENG (25), in a white dress, steadies herself against the wall, gripping a room card. Her expression is foggy but resolute.

YE NANSHENG (V.O.)
Father's favors always come with a price. Tonight, he collected.

YE NANSHENG swipes the card. As the door opens, a strong hand pulls her inside.

INT. HOTEL ROOM - CONTINUOUS

Dimly lit. YE NANSHENG stumbles backward into a table, sending a glass crashing. A man's silhouette moves toward her. They collide—his lips find hers in the darkness.

YE NANSHENG pushes against his chest, breaking the kiss. The man staggers back, his face catching the light—SI YIHAN (30), sharp features glazed with disorientation.

YE NANSHENG
(faint recognition)
The portrait in grandfather's study...

SI YIHAN
(gravelly)
Who sent you?

He reaches for her again. She braces against the wall—then the world tilts.
continuation:
INT. HOTEL ROOM - DAY

Morning light cuts through curtains.

SI YIHAN buttons a crisp black shirt. On the bed, YE NANSHENG clutches the sheets, a faint bruise blooming on her collarbone.

YE NANSHENG (V.O.)
Two years of signatures and ceremonies, yet we've remained strangers. Until now.

SI YIHAN
(cool, precise)
State your terms. I'll meet them.

YE NANSHENG
I don't want—

SI YIHAN
—Don't insult us both by refusing compensation. Name your price, then we both move on.

YE NANSHENG
(sitting taller)
You misunderstand. I'm—

SI YIHAN's phone RINGS. Caller ID: ATTORNEY.

SI YIHAN
(on phone)
Report.

ATTORNEY (V.O.)
Papers delivered to Miss Ye's residence. She has 48 hours to sign.

SI YIHAN
Tell her the settlement stands. The Ye family got their alliance; they don't get to waste my time with delays.

YE NANSHENG's fingers tighten on the sheets. Her voice is very small.

YE NANSHENG
I see. You're already done with the marriage.

SI YIHAN slides a business card from his wallet, places it on the nightstand.

SI YIHAN
The card contacts my accountant. Consider this resolved.

He takes his jacket and leaves. The door clicks shut.

YE NANSHENG touches the card, her expression hardening from hurt to something else—determination.

ON SCREEN: TO BE CONTINUED

title: Reborn: The Warlord's Wife Wants Divorce
description: After being betrayed and murdered by her warlord husband and his mistress, Lin Jingyun is reborn one year earlier, determined to make them pay for what they did to her and her family.
context:
Title: Reborn: The Warlord's Wife Wants Divorce
Description: After being betrayed and murdered by her warlord husband and his mistress, Lin Jingyun is reborn one year earlier, determined to make them pay for what they did to her and her family.

INT. LIN FAMILY COMPOUND - NIGHT

Rain lashes the courtyard. Lanterns flicker, casting trembling shadows.

LIN JINGYUN and her PARENTS kneel in the mud, surrounded by ARMED SOLDIERS. WARLORD GU BEICHEN watches from the steps, untouched by the storm.

SOLDIER
Execute!

LIN JINGYUN
(terrified)
No! No!

FATHER LIN
(furious)
Gu Beichen! I took you from nothing—

Mother Lin crumples first, a red stain spreading across her chest. Father Lin falls beside her, reaching for Jingyun until his hand drops.

LIN JINGYUN
(heart-wrenching)
Father! Mother!

QIN HUAMEI and ANOTHER WOMAN watch from the steps, sheltered under an oil-paper umbrella.

Gu Beichen descends. Mud splashes his boots.

LIN JINGYUN
(crying)
Why? We gave you everything—

GU BEICHEN
(cold laugh)
Your father gave me everything. With his money. His name. And his daughter.

(crouches)
Every time he called me 'boy,' I imagined this day.

LIN JINGYUN
(bitter laugh)
I was so stupid... to believe your vows...

GU BEICHEN
Let me give you one truth. That hero who saved you? Li Feiyu. We staged it.

LIN JINGYUN
(shocked)
Everything... was a lie.

QIN HUAMEI
(stepping forward)
Brother Beichen only ever loved me. You were just a stepping stone.

(mocking)
Don't be so stupid in your next life.

GU BEICHEN raises his pistol.

LIN JINGYUN
(whisper)
Did you ever—

GU BEICHEN
No.

He fires. Lin Jingyun falls.

LIN JINGYUN (V.O.)
If there is a next life... I'll make your Gu family pay blood for blood.
continuation:
INT. GU FAMILY ANCESTRAL HALL - DAY

Lin Jingyun's eyes snap open. She's seated in a chair, wearing an elegant white qipao. Incense smoke curls through the air.

OLD MADAM GU addresses the servants.

OLD MADAM GU
Today is the master's death anniversary. No mistakes, or you're all dismissed.

Lin Jingyun looks at her unblemished hands.

LIN JINGYUN (inner monologue)
Madam Gu. The ancestral hall. But I died. How—?

QIN HUAMEI enters in a bright qipao.

QIN HUAMEI
(bowing)
Daughter-in-law Qin Huamei pays respects to Old Madam.

OLD MADAM GU
(disdainful)
What wild woman is this?

GU BEICHEN
Mother, this is Huamei. My childhood friend. I wish to take her as concubine.

LIN JINGYUN (inner monologue)
Qin Huamei entering the household—this happened a year ago. I've been reborn.

OLD MADAM GU
That opera singer?

QIN HUAMEI
(pitifully)
My family fell into ruin. I only wish to serve—Gu Beichen, Sister Lin, this house.

LIN JINGYUN (inner monologue)
In my last life, I wept and accepted. In this life...

Lin Jingyun rises. Her eyes are cold and determined.

LIN JINGYUN
(to Old Madam Gu)
Mother. Should we not consult the astrologer first? Or does my husband wish to bring theater scandal into our ancestral rites?

Gu Beichen's jaw tightens. Qin Huamei's smile freezes.

LIN JINGYUN (inner monologue)
I remember every wound. Every lie. And I know exactly where you're weakest.

FADE OUT.

title: I'm Really Not a Hidden Master
description: A simple village man practicing tai chi becomes the unexpected target of a forced marriage proposal from a powerful young lady who possesses extraordinary abilities.
context:
Title: I'm Really Not a Hidden Master
Description: A simple village man practicing tai chi becomes the unexpected target of a forced marriage proposal from a powerful young lady who possesses extraordinary abilities.

INT. JIANG FAMILY HALL - DAY

JIANG CHEN, wearing a white practice outfit, practices tai chi in the courtyard. JIANG QILIN and JIANG ZHIHU sit at a tea table inside the room, drinking tea.

JIANG QILIN
Chen'er, how many times can you recite our Jiang family's ancestral teachings now?

JIANG ZHIHU
I can recite it nine times. Though the words about "hidden dragons" and "unseen storms" seemed like old men's fears... until today.

JIANG QILIN
(sipping tea slowly)
Some fears age into wisdom. When I was your age, I could only manage three repetitions before my hands shook too much to hold the scroll.

Suddenly, a loud bang. The main door is pushed open by an invisible force.

NING YANRAN and NING YUAN walk in.

JIANG CHEN, JIANG QILIN, and JIANG ZHIHU all look at them in surprise.

NING YANRAN
Jiang Chen of the Jiang family.

NING YANRAN
Sign it.

NING YANRAN throws a scroll onto the table. It unfurls with a soft, golden glow.

JIANG CHEN
Well, well, so you're here to break the engagement. Let me tell you, thirty years on the east side of the river—

NING YANRAN
(interrupting)
The betrothal stands. I am here to honor it.

JIANG CHEN picks up the scroll, unfolds it, and sees the words "Marriage Certificate" written in blood-red ink.
continuation:
NING YANRAN
Three years ago, your father saved my life with a single acupuncture needle. The Ning family pays its debts in iron and ink. This contract was sealed before the Jade Council itself.

NING YANRAN
(her voice softening for a heartbeat)
And I... I remember a hand that was steady when my world was not.

JIANG CHEN
(shocked)
But I'm just a village healer. I mend bones and brew teas. You command forces that shatter doors without touch.

JIANG QILIN
(rising, his voice heavy)
Chen'er, your mother wanted you free of these weights. But the world remembers promises, even when we forget.

JIANG ZHIHU
(quietly, only to Jiang Chen)
Brother, her spirit pressure could crack walnuts. Maybe... sign quickly and negotiate later?

NING YANRAN
I will not chain a man who truly refuses. But enemies hunt my bloodline, and your name is already written in their death scrolls. This marriage is a shield as much as a vow.

NING YANRAN
(stepping closer)
I offer you a world you never asked for. But I offer it honestly.

JIANG CHEN
(to himself, barely audible)
A cage of silk and steel... or a life spent running from shadows I cannot see.

JIANG CHEN
(looking up, eyes clear)
And if I sign, what do you become?

NING YUAN steps forward. Flames erupt in his palm, forming the character for "PROTECTOR" that hangs in the air.

NING YUAN
Someone worth the trouble.

title: The Female CEO's Personal Imperial Physician
description: A man awakens in a hospital believing he has traveled through time from ancient China, where he served as the imperial physician to an empress he must protect.
context:
Title: The Female CEO's Personal Imperial Physician
Description: A man awakens in a hospital believing he has traveled through time from ancient China, where he served as the imperial physician to an empress he must protect.

INT. HOSPITAL WARD - DAY

The blood oxygen monitor's steady rhythm spikes. A hand twitches, fingers clawing at air.

XIAO RAN jolts awake, oxygen mask fogging with ragged breaths. His eyes snap open - ancient, haunted. He rips the mask off.

XIAO RAN (V.O.)
Fifteen years... It worked.

His fingers fly to his chest, searching, then dig frantically at his hospital gown. Nothing. Panic twists his features.

XIAO RAN
The pendant...

He throws off the blanket, tearing at IV tubes, searching the sheets.

EXT. ANCIENT COURTYARD - DAY (FLASHBACK)

LIN YAO's sword bites into EMPRESS GU HUAN's throat. A single crimson bead wells against the blade.

XIAO RAN (in blood-stained imperial physician robes) stumbles forward, hand extended.

XIAO RAN
Release Her Majesty!

LIN YAO
Surrender the Dao Heart Manual or she dies!

GU HUAN
Husband, no!

The words strike Xiao Ran like a physical blow. He drops to his knees, blood spilling from his lips.

LIN YAO
Your martial arts mean nothing without your Dao heart. You're already dead.

Lin Yao raises his sword for the killing strike.

The pendant - simple jade, glowing from within Xiao Ran's robes - blazes to life. It launches itself into the air, shattering the descending blade in a burst of golden light.

LIN YAO
(shielding his eyes)
The Human Emperor Pendant!

Xiao Ran grabs the glowing relic, feeling its power surge through his veins.

XIAO RAN
(roaring)
When I return, Lin Yao, you'll beg for death!

Light engulfs everything.
continuation:
INT. HOSPITAL WARD - DAY

GU HUAN - power suit, stilettos clicking urgency - rushes through the door, phone still clutched in hand.

GU HUAN
Xiao Ran!

She freezes. Xiao Ran's eyes lock on her, overflowing with recognition and devotion.

XIAO RAN
Your Majesty...

GU HUAN
(at his bedside, voice cracking)
Don't move. The doctor said -

XIAO RAN
(grabbing her wrist)
The pendant's gone. If Lin Yao followed us through-

GU FEIFEI saunters in, chewing gum, designer bag swinging.

GU FEIFEI
Cousin, he's been delusional since the beating. Young Master Lin barely tapped him.

YOUNG MASTER LIN enters, polished and predatory, BODYGUARD looming behind him.

GU FEIFEI (CONT'D)
(to Gu Huan)
Seriously, dumping him at the altar was smart. Keeping him? That's just sad.

YOUNG MASTER LIN
(to Gu Huan)
Your "husband" needs to learn his place. He soiled my shoes. This is mercy.

XIAO RAN
(fury boiling)
You dare-

GU HUAN
(clenching his hand)
Not now.

GU FEIFEI
Oh please. He's the family embarrassment. Always has been.

She moves to slap Gu Huan. Xiao Ran intercepts, his grip iron around her wrist.

XIAO RAN
Touch Her Majesty and lose the hand.

YOUNG MASTER LIN
(to his bodyguard)
Break him. Again.

The bodyguard advances.

GU HUAN
(stepping between them, voice like steel)
Try it. This hospital has excellent lawyers. And better security cameras.

TO BE CONTINUED

title: Hit by the Campus Belle, I Became the World's Richest Man
description: A poor student is betrayed by his girlfriend and humiliated by a rich rival, but a mysterious jade pendant may change his fate.
context:
Title: Hit by the Campus Belle, I Became the World's Richest Man
Description: A poor student is betrayed by his girlfriend and humiliated by a rich rival, but a mysterious jade pendant may change his fate.

INT. COFFEE SHOP - DAY

LIANG SHAO and ZHU CHENCHEN sit at a corner table. He slides a bank card toward her.

LIANG SHAO
For the trip. My place tonight.

ZHU CHENCHEN
(fingers hovering over the card)
Liang Shao... Chen Fan and I, we've been together three years.

LIANG SHAO
And yet here you are. The choice is made.

CHEN FAN appears, holding two cups of coffee. His expression freezes.

CHEN FAN
Chenchen...?

ZHU CHENCHEN
(quietly, not meeting his eyes)
I texted you. We were done yesterday.

CHEN FAN
One fight about a lipstick and you're—who is this?

ZHU CHENCHEN
(looking up, voice hardening)
It's not about the lipstick. It's about sitting in a campus café holding cheap coffee, pretending this is enough. It was never enough.

CHEN FAN
(pleading)
continuation:
The bride price... my parents borrowed against everything. You knew what it cost us.

ZHU CHENCHEN
Then they should've borrowed more.

LIANG SHAO
(leaning back)
Your uncle's medical bills are due next week, I hear. Touch me, and that loan I approved? Disappears. Along with your degree.

CHEN FAN
(hands shaking)
You can't—

LIANG SHAO
I can. Also, Chenchen? That purity act you've been playing? I've heard the rumors. How you made him wait. Let's give him a real show tonight, shall we?

ZHU CHENCHEN
(to Chen Fan, voice cold)
Don't make this harder than it is. Some people climb. Others are just weight to be cut loose.

She stands, slipping the card into her bag.

CHEN FAN
(roaring)
Chenchen!

LIANG SHAO
(softly, to the room)
Remove him.

TWO BODYGUARDS at a nearby table stand and move in. They grab Chen Fan's arms.

The first bodyguard drives a fist into his stomach. Chen Fan doubles over.

The jade pendant beneath his shirt PULSES with a faint, unseen light—only Chen Fan's eyes widen at it.

title: Dragon Lord of Dragon Gate
description: Qi Tian, a legendary warrior who conquered millions, now lives in hiding selling watermelons, while secretly protecting his wife and wielding immense power.
context:
Title: Dragon Lord of Dragon Gate
Description: Qi Tian, a legendary warrior who conquered millions, now lives in hiding selling watermelons, while secretly protecting his wife and wielding immense power.

EXT. BATTLEFIELD - NIGHT

THREE YEARS AGO

QI TIAN (30s), black battle armor slick with rain, cuts through a horde of enemies. Steel flashes. Lightning illuminates the carnage.

NARRATOR (V.O.)
They called him the Dragon Lord. In one night, ten million fell. By dawn, the four seas belonged to Great Xia. Then... he vanished.

EXT. ROADSIDE WATERMELON STAND - DAY

QI TIAN, white tank top and worn trousers, splits a watermelon with a single stroke. Beside him, a faded flag bearing the character "Dragon" flutters lazily.

A group of PEDESTRIANS approach.

QI TIAN
Dragon melons. Hundred thousand a pound. Guaranteed sweet.

PEDESTRIAN A
Hundred thousand? For fruit? You cracked?

PEDESTRIAN B
Guy's a nutter. Let's go.

They retreat. Qi Tian resumes cutting, unfazed.

A luxury sedan glides to a halt. WANG JINSONG (50s), green suit, emerges with two BODYGUARDS. They hang back as Wang approaches alone, bowing deeply.

WANG JINSONG
(bowing low)
Forgive the intrusion, Dragon Lord. That flag... I've been searching three months.

QI TIAN
(without looking up)
You found me. Now what?

WANG JINSONG
Your wife's company—her new medicine. The approvals are... expedited. She'll have them by dawn.

Qi Tian's knife pauses mid-slice. He glances at a simple silver ring on his finger.

QI TIAN
What do you want?

A Bodyguard steps forward with a velvet tray bearing an antique key and a black card. Wang waves the card away.

WANG JINSONG
The Cloud Province Villa. Key's yours. For one melon.

QI TIAN
A villa for fruit? You're overpaying.

WANG JINSONG
I'm paying what it's worth to me.

QI TIAN
(takes the key, hefts it)
Protection doesn't come this cheap.

WANG JINSONG
(hastily)
The card holds a hundred million. For... expenses.

Qi Tian pockets both, selects a perfect melon.

QI TIAN
You're under Dragon Gate's roof now. Don't make me regret it.

WANG JINSONG
(gravely)
continuation:
Thank you, Dragon Lord.

The Bodyguard reveals a glass case containing a Tianshan snow lotus.

WANG JINSONG
For your wife's research. A token.
