Qi Tian accepts it with surprising gentleness, wrapping it in clean cloth before placing it beneath the stand.

QI TIAN
You're thorough. We're done.

WANG JINSONG
Yes, Dragon Lord.

They retreat backwards, heads bowed.

A WOMAN in a red halter top materializes from the shadows. Qi Tian's knife flashes to her throat in one motion.

QI TIAN
I'm retired.

FEMALE SUBORDINATE
Sir. Your wife—

QI TIAN
(lowering the blade)
What about her?

FEMALE SUBORDINATE
The five hundred million is gone. Her drug failed. Zero sales.

Qi Tian selects a melon slice, studies it.

QI TIAN
Buy every unit. Five billion. Anonymously.

FEMALE SUBORDINATE
She'll suspect.

QI TIAN
Let her think she's brilliant. Let her win.

She nods, vanishing as silently as she came.

A red Ferrari roars up. LIU RUYAN (20s), white designer dress, steps out with an imperious bearing.

LIU RUYAN
Qi Tian.

He bites into a rind, unimpressed.

QI TIAN
You're blocking my sun.

LIU RUYAN
My father... Zongheng Group. He said you owed him a promise.

QI TIAN
Old Liu's girl. I owe no one.

LIU RUYAN
(smiling coldly)
Then why did you send him a jade pendant when I was born? With a vow.

QI TIAN
(still)
That was before.

LIU RUYAN
I'm here to collect. The vow was for marriage.

She places a jade pendant on the stand—the twin of his ring.

title: After Divorce, My Wife Learns I Am the Emperor
description: The legendary Night Emperor, who saved the nation from rebellion, hides his identity as a humble husband. After being summoned back to defeat a traitor, he declines the victory banquet to return home to his wife.
context:
Title: After Divorce, My Wife Learns I Am the Emperor
Description: The legendary Night Emperor, who saved the nation from rebellion, hides his identity as a humble husband. After being summoned back to defeat a traitor, he declines the victory banquet to return home to his wife.

INT. BATTLEFIELD - NIGHT

Flames surge into the sky, explosions echo everywhere.

QIN TIAN, wearing red battle armor, fights fiercely against multiple opponents. His martial arts are supreme, no one can match him.

NARRATOR (V.O.)
The First War God of Great Xia faces the legend who vanished three years ago.

A mysterious man wearing a skull mask (YE FENG) appears, confronting QIN TIAN.

NARRATOR (V.O.)
Eighteen golden decrees summoned him from seclusion.

YE FENG removes his mask, revealing a face hardened by three peaceful years.

YE FENG
I left the battlefield to protect one life. You threaten millions.

YE FENG and QIN TIAN engage in fierce combat, blades flashing. Finally, YE FENG defeats him with one strike. QIN TIAN falls to the ground.

QIN TIAN lies bleeding.

QIN TIAN
You... mastered the Yin Yang Scripture.

YE FENG looks down at him.

YE FENG
I mastered being a husband first.
continuation:
EXT. IMPERIAL PALACE PLAZA - NIGHT

YE FENG stands in magnificent armor at the end of a red carpet. Before him, black-clad guards kneel in unison.

NARRATOR (V.O.)
The Night Emperor has achieved supreme merit. Power to judge emperors, authority over all lords.

ALL
(in unison)
Long live our Emperor! Long live! Long live!

NARRATOR (V.O.)
But the long night ends at home.

The SOVEREIGN'S ENVOY steps forward to deliver the decree.

SOVEREIGN'S ENVOY
By the Sovereign's decree, the Night Emperor is invited to the victory banquet.

YE FENG
I won't go. I have to go home tonight... before the divorce papers arrive tomorrow.

YE FENG turns and leaves, leaving everyone stunned.

SOVEREIGN'S ENVOY
(muttering to himself)
Three years secluding as a husband... and now she learns what she truly lost.

title: Opening with a Broken Engagement - I Am the Emperor and I Reveal It
description: A modern scientist is transported to ancient times after a lab explosion, where he discovers he is the Sixth Prince and becomes entangled in palace intrigue.
context:
Title: Opening with a Broken Engagement - I Am the Emperor and I Reveal It
Description: A modern scientist is transported to ancient times after a lab explosion, where he discovers he is the Sixth Prince and becomes entangled in palace intrigue.

INT. LABORATORY - NIGHT

Lights flicker in a high-tech laboratory. A young scientist, HAN JUN, wearing a white lab coat and goggles, conducts a chemical experiment.

He carefully drops a liquid into a flask. The liquid produces white smoke.

HAN JUN picks up a beaker and looks at the reactants inside with satisfaction.

HAN JUN
Now my doctoral thesis should be fine.

He mixes two chemical reagents. Suddenly, a violent explosion occurs, producing a dazzling blue light.

HAN JUN
(terrified)
What the—

The scene enters a time-travel special effect. Year numbers rapidly rewind and finally freeze on an ancient scene.

EXT. ANCIENT COURTYARD LAWN - NIGHT

HAN JUN falls from the sky and crashes heavily onto the grass. He is wearing ancient costume.

HAN JUN
(screaming)
Ah!

He struggles to get up from the ground and looks around in confusion.

He staggers toward a building draped with white gauze curtains.

INT. BATHHOUSE - NIGHT

HAN JUN passes through the flowing gauze and enters an antique room filled with mist.

He sees the back of a woman bathing in a wooden tub. The woman has a graceful figure.

HAN JUN stares in amazement.

HAN JUN (V.O.)
Okay, this hallucination is getting specific—

The woman, SHEN QINGZHU, senses someone's presence and turns around abruptly. Her eyes flash with fury and recognition.

SHEN QINGZHU
(low, dangerous)
You.

HAN JUN
(startled)
I can explain—

SHEN QINGZHU grabs a jade soap dish and hurls it at HAN JUN.

SHEN QINGZHU
The women's bathhouse, Sixth Prince? Have you no shame?

HAN JUN
(dodging)
Laboratory! I was in a laboratory! This is a massive misunderstanding!

SHEN QINGZHU stops, her anger shifting into something colder, more calculating.

SHEN QINGZHU
Sixth Prince. Breaking a betrothal is one thing. Breaking into here suggests you've lost more than your senses.

HAN JUN
Betrothal? What—
(looks down at his robes)
Wait. Wasn't I wearing a lab coat?

SHEN QINGZHU
Your fevered pursuit ends now. Return to your chambers before I report this to the Empress Dowager.

HAN JUN (V.O.)
Time travel is a statistical impossibility. Unless the explosion—

HAN JUN turns and runs.
continuation:
EXT. COURTYARD - NIGHT

HAN JUN runs out of the bathhouse in panic. A EUNUCH hurries toward him from a nearby lantern-lit path.

EUNUCH
(anxiously)
Your Highness! The Emperor summons the princes for marriage decrees. This servant has searched every—

The EUNUCH sees SHEN QINGZHU emerging behind HAN JUN and immediately bows, lowering his voice.

EUNUCH
(quietly)
Miss Shen. The Prime Minister's reputation hangs on discretion. We need not burden the Empress with tonight's... confusion.

HAN JUN
(confused)
You're a eunuch? That's historically accurate.

SHEN QINGZHU
(to HAN JUN)
Your proposal was already an embarrassment. This performance proves the Prime Minister's daughter deserves better.

SHEN QINGZHU turns and leaves, her bearing regal.

HAN JUN stands there, processing fragments.

EUNUCH
(pulling HAN JUN)
Your Highness, the ancestral hall awaits. Delay will insult the Emperor personally.

HAN JUN
(struggling)
I'm not a prince! I'm a postdoc in inorganic chemistry!

EUNUCH
(whispering)
And this old servant is a dragon. Come—before we both lose our heads.

The EUNUCH forcibly drags HAN JUN away. HAN JUN continues to resist, his eyes scanning for any scientific explanation.

title: Chaotic Times Wedding - The Lady Wants to Escape Marriage
description: A woman tortured in a dungeon by her rival relives memories of her deceased husband, a military commander, before seemingly encountering him again on a train.
context:
Title: Chaotic Times Wedding - The Lady Wants to Escape Marriage
Description: A woman tortured in a dungeon by her rival relives memories of her deceased husband, a military commander, before seemingly encountering him again on a train.

INT. DUNGEON - NIGHT

In the dark, gloomy dungeon, flames flicker in a fire basin.

YAN'ER is bound to a massive wooden cross, covered in blood and wounds, her hair hanging disheveled. She is unconscious.

The sounds of whipping and water splashing on her body echo continuously.

GU YUTING, wearing a luxurious qipao and high heels, slowly walks into the dungeon. She toys with a sharp dagger in her hand.

GU YUTING approaches YAN'ER and looks at her miserable state.

GU YUTING
(contemptuously)
Oh, awake now?

GU YUTING
I just don't understand. Tell me, what does Huo Xizhou see in you? Losing your virginity before marriage, your reputation ruined.

GU YUTING slides the back of the dagger blade across YAN'ER's arm.

GU YUTING
I shouldn't have sent you to Huo Minghao's bed. It only made him love you more.

GU YUTING rips a pair of broken jade pendants from YAN'ER's neck, stained with blood.

GU YUTING
You don't know yet, do you? Huo Xizhou went to suppress bandits. He's dead.

GU YUTING's expression becomes twisted, tears in her eyes.

GU YUTING
The Huo family is finished!

GU YUTING suddenly bursts into maniacal laughter.
continuation:
GU YUTING
(laughing wildly)
Ha ha ha! Ha ha!

YAN'ER slowly opens her eyes, calling out weakly.

YAN'ER
(barely breathing)
Xizhou...

GU YUTING leans close to YAN'ER's ear.

GU YUTING
(whispering)
Huo Xizhou... go to hell!

GU YUTING viciously stabs the dagger into YAN'ER's side. YAN'ER spits out a mouthful of black blood and her body goes limp.

The dungeon door slams shut. Darkness consumes the cell.

MONTAGE

- HUO XIZHOU in military uniform lifts YAN'ER's red wedding veil in the bridal chamber. They gaze deeply at each other. He fastens the jade pendants around her neck.
- The two kiss on the wedding bed, embracing as they sleep.
- YAN'ER and HUO XIZHOU in casual clothes, nestled together by the window, peaceful and content.
- HUO XIZHOU is shot on the battlefield, his face covered in blood, his eyes filled with despair.

INT. TRAIN CAR - DAY

YAN'ER sits by the window, looking forlorn. She holds the broken jade pendants in her hand, joining the two pieces together. A scar peeks from her collar.

She looks at an old newspaper on the table with the headline "Year 12 of the Republic."

A MAN in a trench coat and fedora walks past in the aisle, his silhouette strikingly similar to HUO XIZHOU. Gunpowder and sandalwood scent the air.

YAN'ER suddenly lifts her head, her eyes filled with shock and hope.

FADE OUT.

title: Baby Strike: Agent Mommy Is Not to Be Messed With
description: A female agent is betrayed by her partner and wakes up in a hospital, finding herself in a strange situation with unfamiliar people.
context:
Title: Baby Strike: Agent Mommy Is Not to Be Messed With
Description: A female agent is betrayed by her partner and wakes up in a hospital, finding herself in a strange situation with unfamiliar people.

INT. ABANDONED WAREHOUSE - DAY

On the messy warehouse floor lie several unconscious MEN IN BLACK.

Female agent FANG NUAN (dressed in black tactical clothing) wakes from unconsciousness, fingers instinctively checking her ballistic vest. She sits up alertly and looks around.

FANG NUAN activates the communicator in her ear.

FANG NUAN
Command, the orphanage led to a trap. There's a breach.

Not far away, an injured MALE COLLEAGUE struggles to raise his pistol, aiming at FANG NUAN.

A gunshot rings out.

FANG NUAN reacts extremely fast, instantly raising her gun and returning fire, taking him down.

Another MALE COLLEAGUE, FU TING, stands up from the ground and walks toward her with a smile that doesn't reach his eyes.

FANG NUAN sees FU TING, breathes a shaky sigh of relief, and runs forward to embrace him.

FANG NUAN
Thank God. Tell me Mei-Mei's safe.

FU TING holds FANG NUAN, a cold smile playing on his lips as tears pool in his eyes. He pulls out a syringe and stabs it into her neck.

FANG NUAN's eyes widen in shock as her body goes limp. FU TING slowly lowers her to the ground.

FU TING
(whispering)
Remember you have a daughter.

FU TING raises his gun, firing into the concrete beside her head. He empties a blood pack across her vest.

FU TING
I had no choice. You have to die.
continuation:
INT. HOSPITAL WARD - DAY

FANG NUAN lies in a hospital bed, covered with a blue and white striped blanket, eyes closed. A faded surgical scar peeks from her gown.

A woman in a pink cheongsam, LU QIANQIAN, stands beside the bed holding a baby monitor, looking at her with contempt.

LU QIANQIAN (V.O.)
Bitches have tough lives. Even this couldn't drown her.

FANG NUAN suddenly opens her eyes and leaps up from the bed, looking at LU QIANQIAN in terror.

LU QIANQIAN
(surprised)
You...

LU QIANQIAN recovers and becomes angry.

LU QIANQIAN
You dare glare at me!

LU QIANQIAN raises her hand to strike FANG NUAN. FANG NUAN quickly counterattacks, grabs LU QIANQIAN's hand, pins her down on the bed, and chokes her neck.

LU QIANQIAN
(struggling)
She'll be an orphan!

FANG NUAN
(coldly)
Who are you? Do you want to die?

LU QIANQIAN
(struggling)
Let go of me!

A man in a gray suit (MAN IN SUIT) walks into the ward holding a toddler's photo. Seeing this scene, he is shocked.

MAN IN SUIT
Lu Nuan, that's enough! Think of your daughter!

FADE OUT.

title: The Imperial Consort is a Man
description: A man finds himself transported to ancient times, forced into the role of an imperial consort, and desperately trying to return to his own world.
context:
Title: The Imperial Consort is a Man
Description: A man finds himself transported to ancient times, forced into the role of an imperial consort, and desperately trying to return to his own world.

INT. LUXURIOUS BEDCHAMBER - NIGHT

ASSASSINS are subdued, kneeling. Their leader speaks.

ASSASSIN
Your Majesty, this lowly servant deserves death.

LI XUAN
You may all leave.

The assassins retreat. LI XUAN walks toward the bed, looking at WEI YUCHEN lying on it.

LI XUAN
Wei Yuchen.

WEI YUCHEN, wearing a red wedding dress, sits up from the bed, looking at LI XUAN with a blank expression.

LI XUAN
You were just conferred the title of Imperial Consort today. Why are you acting like this?

WEI YUCHEN
(disgusted)
What the hell? Who are you?

LI XUAN
Me? I am the sovereign of the Li Kingdom, Li Xuan.

WEI YUCHEN
(shocked)
What? You're the Emperor? Is this the Tang Dynasty or the Song Dynasty?

LI XUAN
Wei Yuchen, just now you and I were inseparable, why don't you remember me now?

WEI YUCHEN (V.O.)
I'm done for. How can I travel back? Oh right, death! If I die, I'll go back.

WEI YUCHEN gets up and runs for the sword display. Guards subdue him. He collapses.
continuation:
EXT. PAVILION - DAY

WEI YUCHEN lies on a soft couch, opens his eyes and finds himself lying in LI XUAN's arms.

WEI YUCHEN (V.O.)
I must be able to return to reality! Three, two, one!

WEI YUCHEN suddenly sits up, breaks free from LI XUAN's embrace, and stands to the side.

LI XUAN
Beloved Consort, are you still angry with me because I didn't choose you as Empress back then?

WEI YUCHEN
(impatiently)
Damn it! The way I look now, even if you made me Empress Wu Zetian, I wouldn't do it!

LI XUAN
I don't care who Empress Wu Zetian is. Beloved Consort.

LI XUAN steps forward and pulls WEI YUCHEN into his arms, their posture intimate.

LI XUAN
You are my one true love.

WEI YUCHEN
(struggling)
Your Majesty, stop flirting. We're really not suitable for each other.

EMPRESS MA enters with her MAIDS.

EMPRESS MA
Wei Yuchen! On your wedding night, you dared to assassinate His Majesty! Guards, drag him out and behead him!

GUARD (O.S.)
Yes!

WEI YUCHEN
(overjoyed)
Good, good, good!

MAIDS step forward to drag WEI YUCHEN away.

LI XUAN
(stopping them)
Wait!

title: Endless Purgatory
description: Dragon Emperor breaks free from the Endless Purgatory after three years of imprisonment and torture, only to discover his master has arranged nine marriage contracts for him.
context:
Title: Fox Demon
Description: Dragon Emperor breaks free from the Endless Purgatory after three years of imprisonment and torture, only to discover his master has arranged nine marriage contracts for him.

INT. MISTY POOL - NIGHT

In a pool shrouded in smoke, a woman in red wearing a mask (FOX DEMON) plays in the water, her voice echoing like a memory.

Title: Endless Purgatory

INT. DARK CELL - NIGHT

A disheveled man with ethereal chains binding his wrists (DRAGON EMPEROR) crouches in isolation. A man wearing an ornate mask (WUTIAN) materializes in the shadows above.

FOX DEMON (V.O.)
(whispering seductively)
Just surrender, Qin Yang. Three years is enough.

DRAGON EMPEROR (V.O.)
(strained)
Dragon Emperor... never breaks.

The FOX DEMON appears behind the DRAGON EMPEROR, wrapping ghostly arms around his neck, her breath cold against his ear.

FOX DEMON
Let go. I'll make the pain stop.

The DRAGON EMPEROR's eyes flicker, his resolve wavering for a heartbeat. Then his gaze hardens.

DRAGON EMPEROR
Get away!

The DRAGON EMPEROR releases a burst of pure will, shattering the FOX DEMON's illusion. The phantom dissipates into mist. He collapses forward, the spiritual chains glowing brighter.

INT. BURNING CORRIDOR - NIGHT

Two GUARDS drag a man wearing a muzzle mask, bound in physical chains (BLACK EMPEROR), through a corridor lined with fire basins.

GUARD
Move! The Hall Master waits!

Title: Black Emperor

The BLACK EMPEROR is shoved before a group of men in black. Alarm bells toll in the distance.

The BLACK EMPEROR suddenly breaks his restraints, using the chains as weapons. He moves with brutal precision, his strikes fueled by desperation. He defeats all of them, but hesitates, looking toward the prison depths.
continuation:
INT. PRISON - NIGHT

A man hangs suspended by spiritual chains, then is slammed heavily to the ground. The Dark Hall Master WUTIAN stands nearby, examining his fingernails.

WUTIAN (V.O.)
Your loyalty is touching. But your master has suffered enough for today.

The BLACK EMPEROR kneels on the ground, his voice muffled behind the mask.

BLACK EMPEROR
(voice muffled)
Hall Master, I only wanted to test his limits. Forgive me.

WUTIAN laughs, the sound echoing off stone walls.

WUTIAN
Test? You'll have your chance. When he's broken.

INT. MISTY CELL - NIGHT

Title: Dragon Emperor's Golden Sword

The DRAGON EMPEROR sits in meditation, his eyes burning with determination. The Fox Demon's whispers fade from his mind.

DRAGON EMPEROR
Three years of voices. Today, they end.

The DRAGON EMPEROR focuses his core energy. The spiritual chains on his hands shatter. A white sword hilt materializes before him—his manifested will. He grasps it, and a light sword blazes to life.

INT. ABANDONED WAREHOUSE - NIGHT

WUTIAN and the BLACK EMPEROR walk through a warehouse littered with corpses—the failed challengers.

WUTIAN
Mere rebels. They thought they could free him.

A blinding golden light floods the room. The DRAGON EMPEROR, wearing radiant armor and wielding his light sword, blocks their path. His presence is vast, overwhelming.

WUTIAN
(terrified)
The... the Dragon Emperor's true form!

WUTIAN falls to his knees, his mask cracking.

DRAGON EMPEROR
Wutian. You were my warden. Now you're just a witness.

WUTIAN
(trembling)
It was the Elder's orders! I had no choice!

BLACK EMPEROR
(voice muffled)
Master, he's still weakened! We can—

DRAGON EMPEROR
(coldly)
You've mistaken your master.

BLACK EMPEROR charges, chains whirling. The DRAGON EMPEROR deflects with a single precise strike. The BLACK EMPEROR's mask splits; he falls, his energy dissipated.

WUTIAN crawls backward, pleading.

WUTIAN
Spare me! I only guarded the prison!

DRAGON EMPEROR
You enjoyed it.

The DRAGON EMPEROR swings his sword. A flash of sword light cuts through WUTIAN's defenses. WUTIAN falls, dissolving into shadow.

A woman in a black qipao (QINGFENG) arrives with a group of people in black. They kneel before the DRAGON EMPEROR.

Title: Qingfeng

QINGFENG
Dragon Emperor. We felt your breakthrough. The Elder's arrangements...

She presents a red box with both hands. The DRAGON EMPEROR's sword vanishes.

DRAGON EMPEROR
What is this?

QINGFENG
Nine marriage contracts. To bind the fractured realms. Your final trial.

The DRAGON EMPEROR's face shows an expression of weary disbelief.

DRAGON EMPEROR
I just escaped one prison.

title: Underworld Chat Group
description: A morgue attendant flirts with a girl online late at night, only to discover she is a ghost from a corpse delivered the day before.
context:
Title: Underworld Chat Group
Description: A morgue attendant flirts with a girl online late at night, only to discover she is a ghost from a corpse delivered the day before.

INT. FUNERAL HOME - NIGHT

Inside the quiet funeral home, the lighting is ghostly blue. ZHOU YAN, a young morgue attendant in a white coat, sits on a metal stool, gazing at his phone.

ZHOU YAN
(softly)
Those photos... it's been so long since someone smiled at me like that.

He clears his throat and sends a voice message.

ZHOU YAN (V.O.)
Hey, you seem really cool. Want to meet sometime? I'm off at dawn.

He sends the voice message and quickly receives a reply.

TONG'ER (V.O.)
A good guy? Then I'll come find you right now.

ZHOU YAN
(startled)
Wait—now?

He hurriedly sends another voice message.

ZHOU YAN (V.O.)
It's 3 AM, and I'm at work. The funeral home on East River Road.

His phone receives another voice message from TONG'ER.

TONG'ER (V.O.)
I know. Number 36. I arrived yesterday, too. So fated, big brother.

ZHOU YAN's expression shifts. He stares toward the cold storage.

ZHOU YAN
(whispering)
Yesterday... only delivery was that accident victim...

He suddenly realizes, looking around, his eyes widening.

ZHOU YAN
(panicking)
continuation:
No... this is a prank. Has to be.

He rushes to the door and finds it won't open. His phone receives another message.

TONG'ER (V.O.)
Big brother, why aren't you replying? Please don't leave me alone.

The lights begin to flicker, and an eerie voice echoes through the room.

TONG'ER (ghostly voice)
I'm so cold. Let me hold you.

ZHOU YAN cowers by the door, trembling all over.

ZHOU YAN
(trembling)
Stay away! I'm not afraid!

TONG'ER (ghostly voice)
Working alone must be lonely. I'll keep you company.

A pale white hand extends from under the door gap and grabs ZHOU YAN's ankle.

ZHOU YAN
(screaming)
Ahhhhh!

The screen goes black.

EXT. NAIHE BRIDGE - NIGHT

The scene shifts to a bridge shrouded in mist with flickering green light. BLACK AND WHITE IMPERMANENCE and other ghost officers roam the bridge. ZHOU YAN stumbles onto the bridge, his phone clutched in hand, and falls to the ground before the stone monument.

ZHOU YAN
(whispering)
Naihe Bridge... from her profile picture...

He sees the stone monument at the bridge head.

ZHOU YAN
(shocked)
She wasn't inviting me out... she was inviting me here.

A white light flashes, and ZHOU YAN disappears. His phone clatters to the stone, screen still showing their chat log. The last message reads: "Welcome home."

SCENE END

title: Substitute Tycoon
description: A wealthy family's heir is missing, and a desperate mother searches for a lookalike to prevent a illegitimate son from inheriting the family fortune.
context:
Title: Substitute Tycoon
Description: A wealthy family's heir is missing, and a desperate mother searches for a lookalike to prevent a illegitimate son from inheriting the family fortune.

INT. JIANG FAMILY MANSION - DAY

JIANG WANQING (50s), matriarch of the Jiang empire, sits rigidly before a massive wall screen.

TV NEWS (V.O.)
With Chairman Jiang's health failing, his illegitimate son Jiang Mingyu has reportedly seized a key executive role. Jiangcheng's financial landscape hangs in the balance.

Jiang Wanqing's knuckles whiten around her teacup. She sets it down with a sharp CLINK.

JIANG WANQING
(under her breath)
Mingyu...

She snatches her phone.

JIANG WANQING
(into phone)
Ruoxi. The Dragon Banquet is tonight. Our last chance.

JIANG WANQING (V.O.)
He doesn't get a single share.

EXT. PARKING LOT - DAY

CHEN RUOXI (30s), the family's razor-sharp fixer, glides toward a Rolls-Royce flanked by BLACK-SUITED BODYGUARDS. She studies a tablet displaying a man's photo.

Chen Ruoxi dons a wireless earpiece and enters the vehicle.

The motorcade drives down an empty road.
continuation:
INT. ROLLS-ROYCE - DAY

CHEN RUOXI
(into earpiece)
Madam, we have a match. 98% facial recognition.

INT. JIANG FAMILY MANSION - DAY

Jiang Wanqing remains on the sofa, phone pressed to her ear.

JIANG WANQING
Bring him to the west gate. Tonight.

INT. ROLLS-ROYCE - DAY

CHEN RUOXI
Understood.

EXT. CONSTRUCTION SITE - DAY

COWORKER A shouts beside a flooded foundation pit.

COWORKER A
The drill bit's sheared off down there!

The FOREMAN runs over, cash wads in hand.

FOREMAN
Twenty thousand to whoever retrieves it!

Several workers gather, wary.

COWORKER B
That's a death sentence. You'd need a real diver.

JIANG YICHEN (late 20s), lean and weathered, pushes through the crowd.

JIANG YICHEN
I was a commercial diver. I'll go.

COWORKER A
(grabbing him)
This ain't no ocean, kid. It's liquid concrete and rebar.

JIANG YICHEN
(shaking free)
My daughters need tuition. And I know what I'm doing.

FOREMAN
(shoving the cash at him)
Prove it. Gear's in the trailer.

Yichen suits up in a worn wetsuit and battered helmet. Workers secure his safety line with calloused hands.

He drops into the murky pit. The line whirs out.

Bubbles explode to the surface. Then nothing.

FOREMAN
Hold that rope! Tight, damn it!

The water stills.

title: Secret Wife Brought Home
description: A young master searches for a woman from his past, but the one who returns seems increasingly different from the person he remembers, while a kind stranger appears who looks identical to her.
context:
Title: Secret Wife Brought Home
Description: A young master searches for a woman from his past, but the one who returns seems increasingly different from the person he remembers, while a kind stranger appears who looks identical to her.

INT. BEDROOM - NIGHT (FLASHBACK)

Soft music plays.

Moonlight falls across the bed. The YOUNG MASTER touches a jade pendant resting on a WOMAN'S neck.

WOMAN
(softly)
Promise you'll remember me like this.

She closes his hand over the pendant.

INT. STUDY - DAY

The YOUNG MASTER sits at his desk, staring at the same pendant. His expression is troubled.

The ASSISTANT enters.

ASSISTANT
Young Master, we found her. She's waiting.

The RETURNING WOMAN enters, white dress pristine. Her eyes scan the room before landing on him. She touches her bare neck.

RETURNING WOMAN
(smiling)
Darling. I told you I'd come back.

The YOUNG MASTER studies her, his hand closing around the pendant. Doubt crosses his face.

INT. STUDY - DAY (FIVE YEARS LATER)

ON SCREEN: Five Years Later

The YOUNG MASTER reviews adoption papers. His phone rings repeatedly—six missed calls from "HOME." He ignores it, pouring a drink.

He glances at a photo: him, the RETURNING WOMAN, and MENGMENG (5), posed and uncomfortable. The RETURNING WOMAN's smile doesn't reach her eyes.

The phone rings again. He answers.

YOUNG MASTER
(coldly)
I'm working.

The RETURNING WOMAN'S voice comes through, sharp-edged with false concern.

RETURNING WOMAN (O.S.)
Mengmeng's fever spiked again. She's asking for you.

He sets down his glass hard.

YOUNG MASTER
I'll be there.

He grabs his keys and leaves.
continuation:
INT. LIVING ROOM - DAY

The RETURNING WOMAN in a red dress paces, phone in hand. MENGMENG sits at the table, tear-streaked.

RETURNING WOMAN
(into phone, sweetly)
He's on his way now.

She hangs up and turns to MENGMENG, the sweetness vanishing.

RETURNING WOMAN
(sneering)
Six years of playing perfect mother. For what?

She snatches MENGMENG'S stuffed rabbit from the table.

RETURNING WOMAN
You don't even look like him.

MENGMENG reaches for the rabbit. The RETURNING WOMAN holds it just out of reach.

RETURNING WOMAN
(sharply)
If you tell him I was mean, I'll make sure you regret it.

MENGMENG snatches the rabbit and runs for the door. The RETURNING WOMAN watches her go, then smiles at her reflection.

EXT. BUILDING EXTERIOR - DAY

A KIND WOMAN in gray and white walks through the courtyard, tenant applications under her arm. She looks identical to the woman from the flashback. The jade pendant hangs at her throat.

MENGMENG runs straight into her. The KIND WOMAN steadies her, crouching.

KIND WOMAN
(startled)
Whoa, little one. Where's the fire?

MENGMENG clutches her rabbit, saying nothing.

KIND WOMAN
(softening)
Okay. Quiet is okay too.

She pulls a candy from her pocket.

KIND WOMAN
Auntie lives in 3B. You can sit with me while we find your grown-up.

MENGMENG looks at the pendant, eyes widening. She takes the candy, then buries her face in the KIND WOMAN'S shoulder.

The KIND WOMAN holds her, concerned, as the YOUNG MASTER bursts through the building doors.

YOUNG MASTER (O.S.)
MENGMENG!

The KIND WOMAN looks up. The pendant catches the light.

title: Young Master Ye, Your Wife is a Celestial Goddess
description: A celestial goddess is framed for theft and banished to the mortal realm, where she must find a sacred jade to prove her innocence.
context:
Title: Young Master Ye, Your Wife is a Celestial Goddess
Description: A celestial goddess is framed for theft and banished to the mortal realm, where she must find a sacred jade to prove her innocence.

INT. CELESTIAL PALACE - DAY

The ANCIENT EMPEROR sits high upon his throne, looking down at LINGBI FAIRY below.

ANCIENT EMPEROR
Lingbi Fairy, your service has been exemplary. By celestial decree, you are promoted to Upper Goddess.

A radiant light surrounds LINGBI FAIRY. Her robes transform, becoming more magnificent. She bows deeply.

LINGBI FAIRY
Thank you, Ancient Emperor.

ZIYAN FAIRY (V.O.)
Wait!

ZIYAN FAIRY enters, her purple robes marking her high status. She carries a jade shard.

ZIYAN FAIRY
Ancient Emperor, the Divine Light Ancient Jade has been stolen from the tribute platform. Lingbi Fairy's seal was found on the case.

LINGBI FAIRY
(urgently)
Ziyan, you know I would never—

ZIYAN FAIRY
(coldly)
My mirror shows otherwise.

ZIYAN FAIRY waves her sleeve. A water mirror appears, showing a figure with Lingbi's seal breaking the jade's case.
continuation:
INT. CELESTIAL TRIBUTE PLATFORM - DAY (FLASHBACK)

In the water mirror, a figure wearing LINGBI FAIRY's seal breaks the case and takes the Divine Light Ancient Jade.

INT. CELESTIAL PALACE - DAY

The water mirror vanishes.

LINGBI FAIRY
(desperately)
My seal was stolen three days ago! I reported it, but—

ZIYAN FAIRY
Convenient timing. Ancient Emperor, the jade's power is needed for the upcoming celestial trial. We cannot risk chaos.

ANCIENT EMPEROR
(sternly)
The seal's signature is undeniable. Lingbi, do you deny this?

LINGBI FAIRY
I deny the crime, not the seal. Someone used my stolen seal to frame me. The jade recognizes its true keeper—let me retrieve it and prove my innocence!

ZIYAN FAIRY
A clever ploy to escape execution.

ANCIENT EMPEROR
(considering)
Very well. You have three mortal months. The jade's consciousness will reveal truth. But understand—if you fail, the realm's stability requires your execution. The seal must be protected.

The ANCIENT EMPEROR casts a spell. Golden light envelops LINGBI FAIRY, and chains of light bind her celestial essence.

INT. SU FAMILY RESIDENCE - DAY

Golden light strikes SU WAN's body as she collapses. Her eyes snap open, now glowing faintly.

SU WAN
(groaning in pain)
Where... what is this?

She sees wounds on her arm, then touches her face—unfamiliar features.

SU WAN
(whispering)
A vessel? Three months...

A YOUNG WOMAN in pink and a MIDDLE-AGED WOMAN appear at the doorway.

YOUNG WOMAN (V.O.)
She survived the poison? Impossible.

The two enter the room and look down at SU WAN on the floor, exchanging a glance.

title: The Great Xia Dynasty
description: A messenger brings urgent news as the Emperor mourns his lost daughter. When word arrives that the Tenth Princess has been found, the princes compete to show their devotion, unaware she is being held captive elsewhere.
context:
Title: The Great Xia Dynasty
Description: A messenger brings urgent news as the Emperor mourns his lost daughter. When word arrives that the Tenth Princess has been found, the princes compete to show their devotion, unaware she is being held captive elsewhere.

EXT. PALACE EXTERIOR - DAY

A MESSENGER sprints through the palace gates, his armor mud-splattered. Guards scramble aside.

MESSENGER
(shouting)
Eight hundred li urgent report! Move!

The messenger doesn't slow, his voice echoing through the courtyards.

EXT. PALACE COURTYARD - DAY

The GREAT XIA EMPEROR sits alone, turning a broken jade pendant over in his palm. His shoulders tremble.

GREAT XIA EMPEROR
(whispering)
Yu'er...

SECOND PRINCE YE ZIHAO approaches quietly, holding a fur-lined cloak.

SECOND PRINCE YE ZIHAO
Father. The north wind bites.

GREAT XIA EMPEROR
Ten winters since she vanished. And still...

SECOND PRINCE YE ZIHAO
I've doubled the search parties. Every province, every village.

SECOND PRINCE YE ZIHAO drapes the cloak over the Emperor's shoulders.

CROWN PRINCE YE ZHUOYUN bursts into the courtyard, breathless, clutching a scroll.

CROWN PRINCE YE ZHUOYUN
Father! Word from Guangzhou!

The Emperor rises, the pendant slipping from his fingers.

GREAT XIA EMPEROR
Where is she?

CROWN PRINCE YE ZHUOYUN
A trader's caravan. The description matches—birthmark on her left wrist, the jade pendant.

A EUNUCH rushes forward, head bowed.
continuation:
EUNUCH
Your Majesty! The other princes approach! Their banners were spotted at dawn.

Hooves thunder. The THIRD PRINCE dismounts, his silk robes travel-stained.

THIRD PRINCE
Father, I've prepared Yueyang Manor. Roofs of gold leaf, just as she used to draw.

The FOURTH PRINCE follows, his hand on his sword hilt.

FOURTH PRINCE
The Shadow Guard stands ready. Let me escort her.

The FIFTH PRINCE enters more slowly, a wooden box in his hands.

FIFTH PRINCE
From the southern abyss. A pearl that glows in moonlight. For her chamber.

CROWN PRINCE YE ZHUOYUN
Ginseng from Changbai. Snow lotus from Kunlun. All en route.

SECOND PRINCE YE ZIHAO watches the Emperor retrieve the fallen pendant. He takes it from his father's trembling hand.

SECOND PRINCE YE ZIHAO
I will bring her home myself.

The broken pendant glows as their hands touch, warmth spreading through the jade. The light intensifies, then fades.

INT. INTERIOR ROOM - DAY

TENTH PRINCESS SU YAO, bruised but upright, faces JIANG CHUYUE. The matching half of the jade pendant hangs visible at her throat.

JIANG CHUYUE
The formula. Where did you sell it?

TENTH PRINCESS SU YAO
I sold nothing.

JIANG CHUYUE backhands SU YAO across the face. SU YAO spits blood, but her hand closes protectively around her pendant.

JIANG CHUYUE
You think your silence protects you? No one is coming.

SU YAO's fingers tighten on the pendant. It flickers—faint, almost imperceptible.

SU YAO
(quietly)
You have no idea who I am.

Her eyes, fixed on JIANG CHUYUE, burn with quiet fury.

title: My Dad is a Live-in Son-in-law
description: A young man endures three years of humiliation in his wife's family after his father allegedly swindled them, only to discover his father's risky gamble is about to pay off spectacularly.
context:
Title: My Dad is a Live-in Son-in-law
Description: A young man endures three years of humiliation in his wife's family after his father allegedly swindled them, only to discover his father's risky gamble is about to pay off spectacularly.

INT. LUXURIOUS LIVING ROOM - DAY

BAI RUXUE, wearing a blue dress and high heels, walks toward JIANG ZHOU, who is tied to a chair with rope.

JIANG ZHOU
Sister.

BAI RUXUE slaps JIANG ZHOU across the face.

BAI RUXUE
Currency of privilege. You have none.

JIANG ZHOU
Sister.

BAI RUXUE picks up a whip and lashes at JIANG ZHOU.

BAI RUXUE
You inventory groceries while your father inventories our trust. Three hundred million units of betrayal.

BAI RULAN, sitting on the sofa, speaks up.

BAI RULAN
The board convenes in ten. Save some for later.

BAI RUXUE
This is more productive.

(to Jiang Zhou)
Three years ago, my mother extended your family a lifeline. Your father used it as a noose. Company funds diverted, then vanished. Now we circle bankruptcy. Your contribution?

JIANG ZHOU
Every meal calibrated, every garment preserved, every surface reflecting your status. I account for every cent I cost you. But not my father's vision.

BAI RUXUE
(another lash)
Dignity doesn't appear in our ledgers.

BAI RUXUE kicks over JIANG ZHOU's chair. JIANG ZHOU falls to the ground with the chair.

BAI RUXUE walks forward and steps on JIANG ZHOU with her high heel.

BAI RUXUE
(leaning down)
The view from down there—does it clarify your position?

JIANG ZHOU turns his head away.

BAI RUXUE
(another lash)
Look at me when I'm appraising you.

BAI RULAN
He's convinced he has a valuation ability. Claims he can see intrinsic worth.

BAI RUXUE
Then value this crop. Or my patience.

Jiang Zhou's expression flickers.

JIANG ZHOU
It's inconsistent. But three years ago, on that land, it was absolute. Ten billion in development potential.

FLASHBACK TO:
continuation:
EXT. ROOFTOP - DAY

Three years ago.

JIANG WANNIAN
Son, every analyst calls it worthless.

JIANG ZHOU
I see hotels. Conferences. Infrastructure grants. Ten billion in five years.

JIANG WANNIAN
The buy-in is three hundred million. I don't have that kind of collateral.

JIANG ZHOU
You have your reputation. Your track record. Your word as a Jiang.

JIANG WANNIAN
My word just became leverage.

END FLASHBACK.

INT. LUXURIOUS LIVING ROOM - DAY

BAI RULAN
The funding gap is four hundred million. We need solutions, not delusions.

Jiang Zhou's phone vibrates. He extracts it awkwardly.

Screen shows JIANG WANNIAN: "Position closed: 10B realized. Transfer initiated. Vanquis Tower, 8 PM. Formal attire."

BAI RULAN
Your father? Put him on speaker. I want promises, not texts.

JIANG ZHOU
(quiet laugh)
Three hundred million was the down payment. A three-year hold. Market rate of return is tenfold.

BAI RUXUE
You're hallucinating debt relief.

She swings the whip. Jiang Zhou catches it with one hand.

BAI RUXUE
(shocked)
You dare fight back? I don't think you want to stay in the Bai family anymore!

JIANG ZHOU
The debt is settled. The returns are mine. When I return, I'll value this house properly. And your position in it.

He drops the whip.

JIANG ZHOU
Five hundred million. One billion. Whatever the numbers require.

JIANG ZHOU finishes speaking, turns and leaves, leaving BAI RUXUE and BAI RULAN in shock.

title: Surgical Vengeance
description: A woman is forced into surgery to lose her child, manipulated by her scheming sister who wants to erase all ties between her and the man they both love.
context:
Title: Surgical Vengeance
Description: A woman is forced into surgery to lose her child, manipulated by her scheming sister who wants to erase all ties between her and the man they both love.

INT. PRIVATE CLINIC OPERATING ROOM - NIGHT

QIN YIMO, 28, clutches her abdomen as FU RONGCHUAN, 35, pulls her toward the operating table. She resists with the last of her strength, a mother's instinct.

QIN YIMO
(strangled whisper)
Let me go. You can't do this.

FU RONGCHUAN
It's already done.

QIN YIMO
(pleading, voice raw)
Rongchuan, feel this. He's yours. He kicks when you're near.

She guides his hand. He jerks away, a spasm crossing his face.

FU RONGCHUAN grabs her throat—not with rage, but with terrible certainty, his thumb pressing her pulse point.

FU RONGCHUAN (V.O.)
Qing showed me the DNA report. The dates don't lie. But we both know they do.

FU RONGCHUAN releases his grip, turns to the DOCTOR, 50s, whose hands shake as he sterilizes instruments.

FU RONGCHUAN
The transfer is authenticated. Proceed. No records.

FU RONGCHUAN exits without looking back. QIN YIMO starts after him, but QIN QING, 30, elegant and unnaturally calm, blocks the doorway.

QIN QING
Running again? You never faced consequences well.

QIN YIMO
(whisper)
You told him to keep it. Until you changed the rules.
continuation:
QIN QING
(to medical staff, crisp)
She's hysterical. Soft restraints.

MEDICAL STAFF move forward, professional but grim, securing QIN YIMO to the table with padded cuffs.

QIN YIMO
(terrified whisper)
Please. Not like this.

QIN QING walks to the operating table, leans over. Her perfume is cloying, her smile doesn't reach her eyes.

QIN QING
Mother's will. Her first grandchild inherits everything. Mine died in the womb. Yours dies here.

QIN YIMO
(hollow)
This was never about him. It's about money.

QIN QING
It's about the sister who survived. When this is over, I'll finally breathe.

QIN YIMO
(voice breaking)
I'll sign it over. The inheritance. Just—

QIN QING
The child is your signature. And his excuse to see you.

QIN QING straightens, addressing the DOCTOR with practiced authority.

QIN QING
Use the local. She needs to remember why she should never return.

QIN QING places a bite block between QIN YIMO's teeth, her fingers trembling slightly.

QIN QING
Scream into this. It's what I did for nine months.

The heart monitor accelerates. The DOCTOR begins. QIN YIMO's body arches in silent agony, her eyes fixed on QIN QING—who watches with a smile that cracks into something like grief.

title: Pet
description: A woman discovers her fiancé's betrayal on the eve of their arranged marriage and decides to take revenge by seducing his uncle, her powerful CEO boss.
context:
Title: Pet
Description: A woman discovers her fiancé's betrayal on the eve of their arranged marriage and decides to take revenge by seducing his uncle, her powerful CEO boss.

INT. HOTEL ROOM - NIGHT

JIANG LIN (Lu family grandson) presses BAI LIU (eldest daughter of the Bai family) onto a leather sofa. His bathrobe hangs loose. Her blouse is askew.

BAI LIU
(gasping)
Wait... what if Tao Tao finds out?

JIANG LIN
She won't. She's too busy being grateful.
(tasting her neck)
A "bastard" like her should know her place.

He kisses her deeply. The door cracks open.

BAI TAO (second daughter of the Bai family) stands frozen in the doorway. Her engagement ring glints as her hand trembles.

INT. CAFE - DAY (FLASHBACK)

XU XIAORAN (Bai Tao's best friend) slams her phone down. A photo shows Jiang Lin and Bai Liu entering a hotel.

XU XIAORAN
This is the third time. You can't keep defending him.

Opposite her, BAI TAO stares at the photo, thumb circling her engagement ring.

XU XIAORAN (O.S.)
Your mom would want you to be happy—

BAI TAO
(cutting her off)
My mom wanted me to keep my promise.

INT. HOTEL CORRIDOR - NIGHT

BAI TAO stands at room 1808. Her black dress is severe. She raises her fist to knock.

JIANG LIN (O.S.)
Who's there?

Her fist freezes.

BAI LIU (O.S.)
Just staff. Ignore it.

BAI TAO's hand drops. She presses against the wall, breathing shallow. She looks at her ring, then the door. Something hardens.

A key beeps. LU ZHAOHE (CEO of Shengchuan Group) emerges, heading for room 1809.

LU ZHAOHE
Assistant Bai.

She turns.

LU ZHAOHE (O.S.)
You're working late.

BAI TAO
Something like that.

Inside 1808, Jiang Lin's laughter spills out.

BAI TAO's eyes meet Lu Zhaohe's. She sees the family resemblance. An idea crystallizes.

She steps forward.

BAI TAO
CEO Lu... are you single?

He studies her.

LU ZHAOHE
What are you doing, Bai Tao?

She pushes him through his door.
continuation:
INT. LU ZHAOHE'S HOTEL ROOM - CONTINUOUS

BAI TAO stumbles. LU ZHAOHE catches himself, regaining control. He doesn't touch her.

LU ZHAOHE
You've had too much to drink.

BAI TAO
I'm sober. I've memorized your schedule three years.

She steps closer.

BAI TAO (O.S.)
I've never seen you with anyone. Some say you have... standards.

He touches one finger under her chin, lifting her face.

LU ZHAOHE
You're engaged to my nephew.

BAI TAO
Am I?

She reaches for his tie.

BAI TAO (O.S.)
Three years ago, Jiang Lin's family covered my mother's bills. Tonight, I find out that debt's been... accumulating interest.

LU ZHAOHE
Revenge is a poor reason.

BAI TAO
What about leverage?

LU ZHAOHE
You want to use me against him?

BAI TAO
I want to win.

Silence. A briefcase clicks open. LU ZHAOHE extracts a folder, hands it to her.

LU ZHAOHE
Page seven.

BAI TAO opens it. Photos—Jiang Lin and Bai Liu, dated months back. Bank statements. Texts.

LU ZHAOHE (O.S.)
You're not the only one who's been watching.

Her hands tremble. She looks up.

BAI TAO
Why?

LU ZHAOHE
I protect my investments. Jiang Lin is a liability.

She drops the folder. Slowly unzips her dress.

BAI TAO
What am I?

LU ZHAOHE
(catching her wrist)
Don't.

He pulls her close, lips at her ear.

LU ZHAOHE (O.S.)
Tonight, you're whatever you want to be.

He kisses her—precise. She melts into it. A wine glass tips, forgotten.

FADE OUT.

title: Uncle's Little Wife
description: A young woman deliberately sabotages her arranged marriage meeting with an old man by appearing in outrageous attire, but her plan backfires when he approves of the match anyway.
context:
Title: Uncle's Little Wife
Description: A young woman deliberately sabotages her arranged marriage meeting with an old man by appearing in outrageous attire, but her plan backfires when he approves of the match anyway.

INT. LAKESIDE PAVILION - DAY

OLD GU sits holding a cane inlaid with rubies.

CHAIRMAN TANG sits across from OLD GU. Exquisite dishes are laid out on the table.

Several BODYGUARDS in black suits approach carrying expensive gift boxes.

CHAIRMAN TANG
Old Gu, I trust Nuannuan's portrait meets your standards?

OLD GU looks at a photo of a girl. The girl in the photo is demure and poised.

OLD GU
Acceptable. She knows her angles.

CHAIRMAN TANG
(relieved)
She's been groomed for this alliance since childhood.

Suddenly, TANG NUANNUAN appears in the doorway. She sports a neon-pink wig, a clashing floral jacket, and holds a comically oversized lollipop. She swaggers toward them.

CHAIRMAN TANG
(horrified)
Miss, you've mistaken this pavilion for the costume party.

TANG NUANNUAN
(defiantly)
Cut the act, Dad. I'm your three o'clock.

OLD GU
(intrigued)
Remarkable. You share minimal DNA with this photograph.

TANG NUANNUAN
That's Photoshop for you. The photo's my highlight reel.

TANG NUANNUAN grabs a shrimp dumpling. CHAIRMAN TANG looks mortified. OLD GU appears calculating.
continuation:
TANG NUANNUAN
Not terrible. Still not worth my freedom.

CHAIRMAN TANG
(to OLD GU, desperate)
Obviously this performance voids our agreement. We'll triple your compensation—

CHAIRMAN TANG stands up, trying to pull TANG NUANNUAN away.

CHAIRMAN TANG
(hissing)
You've ruined us!

OLD GU
(standing up, stopping them)
Wait. I find her... authentic. August 15th stands.

TANG NUANNUAN
(stunned)
What?

EXT. GOLF COURSE - DAY

GU CHENYU, a sharp-featured man in his thirties, swings a golf club.

An ASSISTANT holds an umbrella and a tablet.

GU CHENYU takes a sip of water.

ASSISTANT
President Gu, Old Master Gu confirmed the wedding. He said: "She has spine."

GU CHENYU
(expressionless)
Did she now.

A faint smile plays on GU CHENYU's lips.

INT. BRIDAL SHOP - DAY

TANG NUANNUAN, now stripped of costume, stands before a mirror in a sleek wedding gown. GU CHENYU appears behind her.

ON SCREEN: TO BE CONTINUED

title: Reborn as the Foolish Prince's Peerless Princess
description: A princess consort is betrayed on her wedding day but is given a chance at rebirth with newfound powers to seek revenge.
context:
Title: Reborn as the Foolish Prince's Peerless Princess
Description: A princess consort is betrayed on her wedding day but is given a chance at rebirth with newfound powers to seek revenge.

TITLE CARD: REBORN AS THE FOOLISH PRINCE'S PEERLESS PRINCESS - EPISODE 1

MONTAGE

A series of aesthetic shots: JIANG YUANXIA in red robes plays a guqin, her eyes melancholic. A man's hand covers hers. The hand tightens, possessive. A single tear falls.

INT. ROOM - DAY

A group of ragged THUGS burst into the room, led by a BALD MAN with a scarred face.

JIANG YUANXIA, magnificent in her red wedding dress, backs against the wall.

JIANG YUANXIA
Who are you? What do you want? I'm telling you, I am the Prince Consort! If you dare touch me, you're all dead!

BALD MAN
(grinning wickedly)
The Prince isn't here. And by morning, neither will you be.

The THUGS swarm forward. One grabs her wrist. Another covers her mouth. She bites down hard, but they don't stop. Her eyes flash with sudden understanding. This is no random attack.

MYSTERIOUS VOICE (V.O.)
Jiang Yuanxia... I give you another chance. Unravel what was woven.

A golden light erupts from JIANG YUANXIA'S chest, throwing the thugs back. She collapses.

The light fades. JIANG YUANXIA opens her eyes. They're sharp now, ancient. She stares at her hands, flexing them. Energy crackles beneath her skin.

A LONG-HAIRED MAN lunges at her. JIANG YUANXIA strikes, grabbing his throat.

LONG-HAIRED MAN
(in pain)
Ah! Let go!

JIANG YUANXIA
continuation:
(coldly)
Who sent you?

LONG-HAIRED MAN
You wretched woman dare to resist—

She squeezes. He chokes. JIANG YUANXIA throws him. He crashes through a wooden screen.

Another THUG draws a knife and charges.

THUG
Hey!

JIANG YUANXIA dodges, the blade whispering past her throat. She catches his wrist. The knife flips into her hand. JIANG YUANXIA strikes him down with the pommel.

JIANG YUANXIA moves efficiently, defeating each thug. Finally, she holds the knife to the BALD MAN'S throat.

BALD MAN
(terrified)
Wait! I'll talk! The Second Miss—the Prince's Second Miss! She paid us to ruin you! So the Prince would divorce you and marry her!

JIANG YUANXIA (V.O.)
Have I been reborn? This power... I've never felt it before.

JIANG YUANXIA'S eyes flash. She focuses. The air around the BALD MAN'S throat thickens. He chokes.

BALD MAN
(choking)
Please... mercy...

JIANG YUANXIA
You were shown none to me.

She releases her grip. He collapses. JIANG YUANXIA leans close, her voice ice.

JIANG YUANXIA
Tell your mistress: I remember. If I see you again, you won't have eyes to see with.

JIANG YUANXIA straightens, her wedding dress seeming like armor now. Her eyes freeze with the promise of revenge.

title: Return to Ancient Times as a Wastrel
description: A modern archaeologist is transported to ancient times after discovering a mysterious jade artifact and finds himself in the body of a prince.
context:
Title: Return to Ancient Times as a Wastrel
Description: A modern archaeologist is transported to ancient times after discovering a mysterious jade artifact and finds himself in the body of a prince.

INT. ARCHAEOLOGICAL SITE - DAY

XU JIPING, wearing blue work clothes, extracts a wooden box from the muddy earth with trembling care. He cracks the lid.

A jade bi disc gleams. He lifts it, studying the ancient engravings.

XU JIPING
(to himself)
Xia burial goods, but the context is impossible. Unless—

The jade flares. Light engulfs him. He disappears. The box drops into the mud.

INT. ANCIENT ROOM - DAY

XU JIPING lies on a bed, eyes closed, wrists loosely bound. CHU XIANGXIANG stands over an overturned wine service. Two HANDMAIDENS huddle near the door.

HANDMAIDEN
(whispering)
Miss Chu, the physician swore it was only enough to flush him from your chambers. Not... fatal.

CHU XIANGXIANG
(quiet, fierce)
The wastrel's constitution proved weaker than I calculated.

XU JIPING's eyes snap open. He focuses on Chu Xiangxiang. She goes pale.

XU JIPING
Where— Who bound me—
continuation:
He sits up. The poorly-tied cords slip free. The handmaidens stare.

HANDMAIDEN
His mind... it must have broken.

XU JIPING
(touching his temples)
Hallucination. Possible toxin. Cultural disorientation—

A memory surfaces: HIMSELF—this body—leaping from behind a pillar, spilling Chu Xiangxiang's pastries. Her humiliated fury.

XU JIPING
(realization)
Chu Xiangxiang. I've... I've time-traveled.

His legs buckle. The aphrodisiac's heat floods his veins. He stumbles toward the table for water, but collides with Chu Xiangxiang. They fall back onto the bed.

CHU XIANGXIANG
(struggling)
Get off—stop—

The door explodes open. FATHER CHU charges in, sword bared.

FATHER CHU
(roaring)
Defile my daughter, you diseased goat? I'll send you to your ancestors!

He slashes. Xu Jiping—pure instinct—whips the silk cord around the blade, yanking it off-course. The sword buries in a floorboard. Both stare, stunned.

FADE OUT.

title: Hidden Dragon
description: A powerful warrior lord with godlike abilities decides to cultivate a supreme technique that seals his memories for three years, only to wake up as a security guard with no recollection of his past glory.
context:
Title: Hidden Dragon
Description: A powerful warrior lord with godlike abilities decides to cultivate a supreme technique that seals his memories for three years, only to wake up as a security guard with no recollection of his past glory.

INT. INTERIOR ROOM - DAY

Quick montage: Go stones, clashing swords, a glowing scroll.

WANG HAO and MALE SUBORDINATE play Go. FEMALE SUBORDINATE enters.

FEMALE SUBORDINATE
Young Master, the Southern Reaches have fallen. The Four Demon Kings are dead.

WANG HAO
And General Song?

FEMALE SUBORDINATE
Holding the plaza. She asks for your blessing.

WANG HAO places a stone. The board cracks.

WANG HAO
She'll learn to stand alone.

EXT. PLAZA - DAY

SONG HONGYAN in red-black armor, faces FOUR ADVERSARIES. Quick, brutal strikes. They fall.

She kneels, offering a broken crown.

SONG HONGYAN
For the Young Master.
continuation:
INT. CORRIDOR - DAY

WANG HAO and subordinates watch from above.

WANG HAO
The Supreme Heart Technique. Three years of memories for true immortality.

He takes the manual. It glows.

FEMALE SUBORDINATE
You'll be defenseless. A god in a mortal's shell.

MALE SUBORDINATE
If enemies find you...

WANG HAO
Then guard me well.

He gives her a jade token.

WANG HAO
If I'm lost, this will find me.

SOLDIER (O.S.)
General Song Hongyan!

EXT. PLAZA - DAY

SONG HONGYAN approaches, bloodied.

SONG HONGYAN
Young Master, I've brought proof.

MALE SUBORDINATE
The Young Master sees no one. Not even you.

SONG HONGYAN
Then I'll wait. However long it takes.

She salutes and leaves.

ON SCREEN: THREE YEARS LATER

INT. UPSCALE RESTAURANT - DAY

WANG HAO, in a security uniform, sits with BLIND DATE WOMAN.

WANG HAO
I'm the top-rated guard in my district. Very dependable.

BLIND DATE WOMAN
Dependable? My Uber driver is dependable.

She splashes water. It soaks his shirt.

BLIND DATE WOMAN
Don't call me.

As she leaves, Wang Hao touches his chest. His fingers find a chain—the jade token, now dull.

It flickers. Just once.

WANG HAO
(to himself)
Why does that name... Song...?

The token pulses again, brighter.

ON SCREEN: HIDDEN DRAGON

title: Husband from Outer Space
description: A star explorer from planet Hacker falls in love with an Earth woman, breaking planetary law, and faces execution by his own brother.
context:
Title: Husband from Outer Space
Description: A star explorer from planet Hacker falls in love with an Earth woman, breaking planetary law, and faces execution by his own brother.

INT. FOREST - DAY

QIAN ZICHU (30s, otherworldly stillness) and CHU YU'ER (20s, defiant) sprint through the forest, sunlight flashing through canopy. They stop abruptly—

QIAN SIQI (30s, rigid posture, cybernetic eye pulsing) blocks the path ahead, energy bow manifesting in his hand.

QIAN SIQI
Qian Zichu. As a Hacker Planet explorer, you violated the Prime Directive by bonding with an Earth native. By planetary law, you face erasure. Any final words, brother?

CHU YU'ER
(shoving between them)
I won't let you take him!

QIAN ZICHU
(yanking her back)
Yu'er, the teleport beacon—it's still primed. You have to go!

QIAN SIQI
(cold smile)
The lock is encoded on both signals. She won't escape.

CHU YU'ER
I'm not leaving you!

QIAN ZICHU
Go!

QIAN ZICHU activates his wrist device. Chu Yu'er begins to dematerialize—then suddenly snaps back, half-phased, flickering.

QIAN SIQI
Emotional interference destabilizes the transfer. Predictable.
continuation:
His cybernetic eye flares BLUE. He draws the energy bow, arrow crackling. Chu Yu'er, caught between states, lunges toward Qian Zichu as the arrow releases. The bolt strikes her mid-teleport—she becomes solid as it pierces her chest.

QIAN ZICHU
(horrified)
Yu'er! No!

He catches her collapsing form. Blood spreads across her shirt. Her breath hitches.

CHU YU'ER
(whispering)
...wouldn't go... without you...

She goes limp.

QIAN ZICHU
(grief-stricken)
Yu'er...

He looks up at his brother, anguish hardening into rage.

QIAN ZICHU
(low, dangerous)
You meant to hit her.

Energy surges through Qian Zichu's hands, earth trembling beneath them.

INT. WHITE SPACE - DAY

QIAN ZICHU floats in infinite white, eyes closed. CHU YU'ER's phantom appears, translucent.

CHU YU'ER (V.O.)
Zichu... you promised we'd find each other...

QIAN ZICHU's eyes snap open, pulsing with electric BLUE light.

ON SCREEN: TO BE CONTINUED

title: Black Domain Supreme
description: A man imprisoned and betrayed by his wife and her lover is sold to an underground entertainment venue where he is tortured for the audience's amusement while forced to witness his wife's betrayal.
context:
Title: Black Domain Supreme
Description: A man imprisoned and betrayed by his wife and her lover is sold to an underground entertainment venue where he is tortured for the audience's amusement while forced to witness his wife's betrayal.

INT. BLACK DOMAIN SHOWROOM - NIGHT

MONTAGE - NIGHTSCAPE
Fast cuts: Rain-slicked streets, flickering neon kanji, a towering megastructure in the distance labeled "TOWER-7 SECURITY FACILITY." Camera pushes through a steel door into a pulsing underground showroom.

SHOWROOM HOST (30s, razor-sharp suit) grips a chrome microphone, pacing the catwalk stage.

SHOWROOM HOST
(into microphone, showman's grin)
Black Domain! Where the City's finest come to play!

He gestures to a massive holographic screen descending behind him.

SHOWROOM HOST
Tonight's special - a Tower transfer who thinks he's going home. Place your bets, ladies and gentlemen. How long until Lu Yun breaks?

The screen displays: "LU YUN - INMATE #7734" with timer options: 5 MIN / 10 MIN / 15 MIN. The capacity crowd, including SUN QIANG and ZHAO YA in a velvet booth, taps their phones. Results flash: 89% voted 5 MIN.

Two GUARDS shove LU YUN (30s, broken but defiant) onto the stage. A smart-collar blinks red around his neck. His prison uniform is torn, one eye swollen shut.

LU YUN (V.O.)
(barely a whisper)
Yaya's birthday is next week. Zhao Ya promised we'd get her that doll...

A GUARD plants a boot in Lu Yun's back.

GUARD
Move, convict!

INT. VIP ROOM - NIGHT

Behind one-way glass, SUN QIANG (40s, predator-calm) sips whiskey with ZHAO YA (30s, brittle elegance). She watches Lu Yun on a monitor, knuckles white on her clutch.

LU YAYA (6, pigtails) bursts in, clutching a crayon drawing.

LU YAYA
Mommy, look! I drew Daddy!

ZHAO YA
(flinching, then cold)
Not now, Yaya.

She sets the child on the floor a bit too firmly. Yaya's lip trembles.

SUN QIANG
(eyes on Zhao Ya, not the child)
They say a hundred days of marriage builds grace. You Jiang City women are... efficient.

He traces Zhao Ya's jawline. She doesn't pull away.

SUN QIANG
Sent him to prison. Sold his sentence to us. What's next?

ZHAO YA
(tight smile)
Young Master Sun, that transfer fee bought this room. Consider it... entertainment insurance.

She kisses his knuckles. He catches her wrist.

SUN QIANG
Then let's make sure he gets his money's worth.

LU YAYA
(small voice)
Mommy, why are you with the bad man?

ZHAO YA
(eyes flashing, then dead)
He's not bad, baby. He's just... winning.
continuation:
INT. BLUE ROOM - NIGHT

Lu Yun is shoved into a sapphire-lit chamber, walls dripping with condensation. Steel drains line the floor.

GUARD
In you go!

Lu Yun stumbles. His hands touch the cold metal. He looks up.

LU YUN
This isn't the transfer bus...

A ONE-EYED MAN (50s, scarred, silver canine tooth) emerges from shadow. His eyepatch is etched with a barcode.

ONE-EYED MAN
Daxia Tower breeds soft men. Lucky for us.

He seizes Lu Yun's throat. Two BULL-MASKED ATTENDANTS pin his arms.

LU YUN
(choking)
Sun Qiang's testimony... already got me five years...

ONE-EYED MAN
(leaning in, whisper)
This isn't prison, pretty boy. This is premium content. And your wife? She's a producer now.

He forces Lu Yun to his knees facing a glass wall.

ONE-EYED MAN
The good viewers of Channel Black want their finale. Kneel for camera three.

INT. VIP ROOM - NIGHT

Sun Qiang taps a remote. The glass wall between rooms clears. Zhao Ya inhales sharply.

INT. BLUE ROOM - NIGHT

Lu Yun sees them. His wife. The man who framed him. Behind the glass, untouchable.

LU YUN
(anguished howl)
Zhao Ya! You said it was a conjugal visit!

Sun Qiang's voice crackles through a speaker.

SUN QIANG (O.S.)
She lied. Shocking, I know.

He hauls Lu Yaya up to the glass. The child's face presses against it.

LU YAYA
Daddy!

ZHAO YA
(on the phone, voice honeyed)
Honey, tell him what you told me. About the money.

LU YUN
(shattered)
You sold my sentence... for a fucking VIP room?

SUN QIANG
Through the glass, he mimes a kiss at Zhao Ya. She takes the gesture, but her reflection shows a tear she won't let him see.

ZHAO YA
(into phone, breaking)
I'm his secretary now. Yaya needs a future.

SUN QIANG
(to Yaya, gentle)
Your daddy's going to sing for us. Isn't that nice?

He puts Yaya down. She runs to Zhao Ya, who turns away.

LU YUN
(screaming, to Zhao Ya)
You look at her! LOOK AT HER!

ONE-EYED MAN
(pressing a blade to Lu Yun's ear)
She's looking at her new life. Now... let's give them a show.

The smart-collar injects something. Lu Yun's body goes rigid. The One-Eyed Man whispers:

ONE-EYED MAN
Your daughter gets to watch you cry. Family entertainment.

FADE OUT.

title: CEO's Sweet Love
description: A family heiress is drugged and framed on the night before her wedding. Four years later, terminally ill and desperate to find her child's father, she encounters a mysterious masked man with a familiar dragon tattoo.
context:
Title: CEO's Sweet Love
Description: A family heiress is drugged and framed on the night before her wedding. Four years later, terminally ill and desperate to find her child's father, she encounters a mysterious masked man with a familiar dragon tattoo.

INT. LUXURY HOTEL SUITE - NIGHT

JI SHISHI (24), elegant but visibly disoriented, stumbles through the penthouse suite. Her reflection in the floor-to-ceiling windows shows a woman fighting through chemical fog. She clutches a torn wedding invitation.

XIAO SHENGHAN (28), CEO of Shengshi Group, stands by the window, phone to his ear. His crisp shirt is unbuttoned at the collar, revealing a distinctive dragon-shaped birthmark on his neck that resembles an intricate tattoo.

JI SHISHI
(voice slurred)
Wait... this isn't—

She reaches for him, desperate for stability. He turns. Their eyes lock. Recognition flickers—then confusion.

CLOSE-UP: The dragon birthmark seems to pulse as his jaw tightens.

They collide. Not passion—gravity. Two people falling.

INT. LUXURY HOTEL SUITE - DAY

Sunlight slices through silk curtains. JI SHISHI awakens alone, silk sheets pooled around her. She touches her temple, wincing at the tenderness. On the nightstand: a single cufflink, silver, engraved with a dragon motif.

She spots it. Her fingers close around it just as the door bursts open.

INT. JI FAMILY MANSION - DAY - CONTINUOUS

JI GUOHUA (60s, patriarch) storms in, his face stone. Behind him, WANG XUCHEN (28) hovers, his expression shattered rather than furious. JI ANAN (22) lingers in the doorway, watching like a director.

JI GUOHUA
(roaring)
The wedding is OFF! Shengshi Group's CEO saw you leave with that... that escort! Our merger is ruined!

He strikes. The slap cracks across her face. JI SHISHI's head snaps sideways—not from force, but from shock at the lie's precision.

JI SHISHI
(choked)
Dad, I was drugged. Check the hotel cameras—

JI ANAN
(stepping forward, voice honeyed)
Sister, the footage shows you drinking alone. No one else. Father's heart can't take these fabrications.

She produces a phone. On screen: JI SHISHI, seemingly lucid, ordering another drink. The timestamp loops, damning.

WANG XUCHEN
(quietly broken)
Shishi... the man you were seen with. Was he worth everything?

JI SHISHI
(turning to him, raw)
Xuchen, you know me. Twelve years—you know me.

WANG XUCHEN
I thought I did.

He turns. JI ANAN catches his sleeve—a gesture too practiced, too comforting. He doesn't shake her off.

JI ANAN
(whispering, just for JI SHISHI)
I told you. Some players don't deserve the board.

She drops a business card on the bed: "VIP Escort Services." The number is handwritten—JI SHISHI's own, from the phone she lost yesterday.

JI ANAN sweeps out, taking the men with her. JI SHISHI stares at the card. At the cufflink. Her fingers close around both.

BLACK SCREEN. TEXT APPEARS: Four Years Later
continuation:
INT. MODEST APARTMENT - NIGHT

JI SHISHI, now 28, sits by XIAOSHAN (3), her son. The diagnosis on her lap reads "Stage III Malignant Tumor—Metastasized." Her fingers trace the dragon-shaped cufflink.

JI SHISHI
(softly)
Your grandmother's jewelry paid for three years of treatment. This... this is all that's left to find him.

She tucks the cufflink into XIAOSHAN's small hand.

JI SHISHI
(whispering)
But you're worth every second of the search.

EXT. BACK ALLEYS - NIGHT

Rain slicks the brick walls. JI SHISHI, thinner but harder, staples a weatherproof flyer: "URGENT: Seeking man, mid-20s, dragon birthmark left neck. Medical emergency. Reward: mother's antique jade collection." No name. No number—just an email: dragonsearch@protonmail.com.

She turns, colliding with a MAN IN GOLDEN MASK. His collar is high, but rain has plastered his shirt to his neck. The birthmark—raised, distinct, undeniably the same—peeks above his collar.

JI SHISHI
(taking a step back)
I'm sorry—

Her eyes fix on his neck. His hand flies up, covering it. Through the mask's eyeholes, his gaze is guarded, familiar.

JI SHISHI
(barely breathing)
...you.

His fingers tighten on the birthmark. The cufflink in her pocket suddenly burns hot.

ON SCREEN: TO BE CONTINUED

title: The Demon's Arrival
description: A Demon Lord defeated in battle is reborn in the modern world and must navigate his new identity while planning his return to the demon realm.
context:
Title: The Demon's Arrival
Description: A Demon Lord defeated in battle is reborn in the modern world and must navigate his new identity while planning his return to the demon realm.

INT. DEMON REALM - NIGHT

The DEMON LORD hovers above his shattered throne, surrounded by three CELESTIAL AVATARS. His armor bleeds shadows.

OPPONENT 1
Demon Lord, your reign ends here!

DEMON LORD
Then let oblivion know... I never bowed.

Abyssal lightning arcs from his fists. The avatars raise shields of pure starlight. Sparks weld cracks in reality itself.

OPPONENT 2
Your twelve legions are broken. Your human consort sealed beyond time itself. Why continue?

The DEMON LORD's hand strays to his chest—where a human heartbeat pulses faintly beneath divine armor.

DEMON LORD
(softly)
She taught me that even gods can bleed.

He unleashes a nova of blue-black fire, shattering two avatars. OPPONENT 3 rises from the ash, opening a portal that inverts gravity.

OPPONENT 3
Hahaha! The Chaos Abyss doesn't rebirth, Demon Lord. It UNMAKES!

The DEMON LORD's form unravels, atom by atom. As he vanishes, his armor disintegrates—revealing a simple SILVER NECKLACE. Human work.

The necklace falls. Clatters once. Dissolves into light.
continuation:
INT. HOTEL ROOM - DAY

YE TIAN wakes with a violent gasp. Sweat-drenched sheets. Wrong body. Wrong world. He stares at his hands—too soft, too mortal. LIN YIXUE clutches the sheets, watching him.

YE TIAN (V.O.)
A thousand years of blood... undone by a heartbeat I never wanted.

LIN YIXUE
You're saying you transmigrated? Everything Ye Tian did—none of it was you?

YE TIAN
Precisely.

LIN YIXUE
Bastard... I'll destroy you.

She lunges. Ye Tian catches her wrist mid-swing. Not rough—just immovable. Her fury meets his abyss.

YE TIAN
You've already tried. Last night, with wine and tears.

He releases her. She stumbles back, not from force, but from the truth.

INT. HOTEL CORRIDOR - DAY

Three REPORTERS and a CAMERAMAN huddle outside ROOM 1208, studying a blurry paparazzi photo on a phone—Ye Tian's face circled in red.

FEMALE REPORTER
(whispering)
Ye family's bastard heir, caught with Lin Corp's president. This is our golden ticket.

The CAMERAMAN checks his watch: 8:47 AM. He kicks the door.

INT. HOTEL ROOM - DAY

YE TIAN's head whips toward the door. His pupils dilate—inhuman. He hears the whispers, the autofocus, the heartbeat in the corridor.

YE TIAN
Four mortals. One lens. They think you're sleeping with a "bastard."

LIN YIXUE
(laughs, bitter)
Which part is the lie?

CRACK! The doorframe splinters. The lock shatters.

Ye Tian moves—not teleportation, but pure, blurring speed. He snags his jacket, drapes it over Lin Yixue, and backs into the bathroom. Light catches the SILVER NECKLACE around his throat.

REPORTERS flood in. Lin Yixue stands, jacket held like armor.

FEMALE REPORTER
Lin Yixue! Where's Ye Tian—the illegitimate heir?

MALE REPORTER 1
We have photos! He's here!

LIN YIXUE
(frozen, then... smiles)
Photos? Of me... alone?

The bathroom door clicks open. Empty. The window's glass is FROSTED with rime. A single BLACK FEATHER drifts to the tiles.

MALE REPORTER 2
What the hell... it's July.

Lin Yixue touches the frost on the sill. It's real. And for the first time, her shock becomes wonder.

FADE OUT.

title: From Corporate Slave to Boss
description: An ordinary office worker's life is turned upside down when a freak accident causes her to swap bodies with her billionaire CEO boss.
context:
Title: From Corporate Slave to Boss
Description: An ordinary office worker's life is turned upside down when a freak accident causes her to swap bodies with her billionaire CEO boss.

INT. CITY STREET - DAY

A black Lamborghini cuts through traffic, pausing at a light.

A modest crowd of PHONE-OUTSPECTATORS jockeys for position, some waving, others muttering to friends.

GU NIANYI (28) weaves through on an electric scooter, gripping a delivery bag. She pauses, one foot down, checking her phone at the same intersection.

GU NIANYI (V.O.)
One minute you're delivering revised reports, the next you're delivering... nothing. Just trying to survive another performance review.

The Lamborghini's window rolls down. SONG RUICHEN (32) glances at his watch, impatience flickering across sharp features.

GU NIANYI (V.O.)
That's Song Ruichen. My boss. The man who once restructured an entire department between the 4th and 5th floors of an elevator ride.

TWO WOMEN beside Gu whisper, phones raised.

WOMAN 1
They say he fired his own uncle for looking at him wrong.

WOMAN 2
I'd be terrified to work for him. But god, the dental plan must be incredible.

The light changes. The Lamborghini purrs forward. Gu shakes her head, scooter humming as she turns toward a side entrance.
continuation:
INT. COMPANY LOBBY - DAY

SONG RUICHEN strides through the lobby, two assistants scrambling to keep pace, folders extended like offerings.

GU NIANYI waits by the elevators, tapping her foot, checking her cracked phone screen. A CLEANING LADY works a mop in tight circles nearby.

GU NIANYI
(thinking)
Two minutes late. He's already upstairs. Safe.

She exhales—just as Song's entourage rounds the corner. Gu spins, steps back, and her sneaker hits the wet tile.

GU NIANYI
Shit—

She lunges for the wall, misses, and careens forward. Song turns at the sound. They collide. Heads crack. Both bodies hit the marble with sickening finality. The assistants freeze.

INT. HOSPITAL ROOM - DAY

GU NIANYI wakes with a jolt. Fluorescent lights sear her vision. The smell is wrong—disinfectant and expensive cologne.

Her throat feels different when she swallows. She reaches up. Her fingers find cartilage. An Adam's apple.

GU NIANYI
(thinking)
No. That's not—

She pulls back the blanket. A man's chest. A hospital gown. Her hands—no, these hands—are wrong. Too large. Too smooth.

She spots a phone on the nightstand. Not her cracked screen. The latest model, unlocked with a face she doesn't recognize until—

She holds it up. The camera shows Song Ruichen's face, pale and bruised. The screen reflects his sharp jaw, his disheveled hair, his eyes—her eyes—wide with panic.

GU NIANYI
(thinking)
...me.

title: My Junior Sister is a Hidden Boss
description: In the Tianqing era, after a war between Suyu and Ning kingdoms, Ning is defeated and forced to marry their princess to General Xiao's son. But Xiao Qifeng has other plans with the mysterious Xuannü.
context:
Title: My Junior Sister is a Hidden Boss
Description: In the Tianqing era, after a war between Suyu and Ning kingdoms, Ning is defeated and forced to marry their princess to General Xiao's son. But Xiao Qifeng has other plans with the mysterious Xuannü.

INT. WEDDING CHAMBER - DAY

NARRATOR (V.O.)
In the first year of Tianqing, the kingdoms of Suyu and Ning went to war, and Ning was defeated. To secure the release of thirty thousand prisoners held in Suyu, Ning was forced to marry their princess to Xiao Qifeng, son of Suyu's great general.

XIAO QIFENG, dressed in casual clothes, sits at a table, calmly playing with a chess piece. His expression is indifferent.

A FRIEND enters, wearing the red wedding robe that should belong to XIAO QIFENG.

FRIEND
Your wedding robe fits me pretty well.

XIAO QIFENG
(without looking up)
Then you go bow at the altar for me.

FRIEND
(surprised)
You're truly refusing? Xiao Qifeng eloping with his junior sister from the Tianming Bureau—every hunter in the empire will chase you.

XUANNÜ enters through the balcony window.
continuation:
XUANNÜ
Who said I'm eloping?

XUANNÜ walks up to XIAO QIFENG.

XUANNÜ
I want to do this openly.

XUANNÜ points at XIAO QIFENG.

XUANNÜ
You - will not marry the Ning princess. Refuse the marriage. Marry me.

XUANNÜ throws a scroll toward XIAO QIFENG.

XUANNÜ
Do you dare?

XIAO QIFENG catches the scroll and looks at XUANNÜ. His fingers tighten around it.

XUANNÜ
(softly)
Senior Brother?

Golden light shimmers across XUANNÜ's face, her eyes determined.

title: Peerless Divine Doctor
description: Lin Tianxuan, a top family heir, is betrayed by his fiancée and left for dead. A mysterious jade pendant awakens ancient medical knowledge within him, giving him a second chance at life and revenge.
context:
Title: Peerless Divine Doctor
Description: Lin Tianxuan, a top family heir, is betrayed by his fiancée and left for dead. A mysterious jade pendant awakens ancient medical knowledge within him, giving him a second chance at life and revenge.

INT. WILDERNESS - DAY

LIN TIANXUAN lies on rain-slicked grass, motionless and bloodied.

Two women, WOMAN A and WOMAN B, drag LIN TIANXUAN's body.

WOMAN A
(straining)
They said he's a goner. Saves his fiancée the hospital fees.

WOMAN A
(glancing around, lower)
Rich people problems. Let's dump and go.

They push LIN TIANXUAN down a slope. His head strikes a rock with a THUD.

LIN TIANXUAN's fingers twitch. The jade pendant around his neck emits a RED GLOW, pulsing like a heartbeat.

NARRATOR (V.O.)
Lin Tianxuan, heir to Jiangdu's top elite family. Framed by his fiancée and her accomplice. His sister, Lin Xin'er, is also missing.

LIN TIANXUAN sits up, eyes clear but haunted. He looks at the pendant in his hand—his wounds GLOW faintly, knitting closed.

LIN TIANXUAN
(quiet horror)
Medicine Emperor's Heart Sutra...?
continuation:
INT. LUXURY APARTMENT - NIGHT

SHEN MEI sits on the sofa, smiling as she studies a tablet.

SHEN MEI
Xiaoxue. Our patience pays off.

BAI XUE, wearing a red dress, walks over gracefully. QI TIANCHENG steps forward, takes her hand and kisses it.

QI TIANCHENG
Apologies for the delay, my love. But we must be discreet until the Lin estate is ours.

BAI XUE
looks at QI TIANCHENG, a slight smile at the corner of her mouth.

BAI XUE
Tomorrow. Then we celebrate properly.

QI TIANCHENG
(toasts)
To tying up loose ends.

EXT. LIN FAMILY COURTYARD - NIGHT

LIN TIANXUAN walks alone in the courtyard of his family's estate, his eyes determined and cold.

LIN TIANXUAN
(voice low, trembling)
Heaven gave me a second chance. You took everything.

He crushes a dry leaf in his fist. It turns to ash.

LIN TIANXUAN
(quiet, deadly)
I won't let you go. I'll take it all back.

title: The Last Confession
description: A dying woman records a final message to the man she has always loved, revealing a truth buried since childhood, moments before he returns to accuse her of betrayal.
context:
Title: The Last Confession
Description: A dying woman records a final message to the man she has always loved, revealing a truth buried since childhood, moments before he returns to accuse her of betrayal.

INT. SU FAMILY VILLA - BEDROOM - NIGHT

A camera is mounted on a tripod, its red light glowing. YE QINXIN sits on the bed, holding a silver ring.

YE QINXIN
Xiao Jiu... I know I promised never to call you that again. I'm dying. Weeks, maybe days. And I lied to you. When you asked at eighteen why I said yes, I told you it was gratitude. For the Ye family adopting me after the earthquake.

YE QINXIN looks at the ring.

YE QINXIN
But gratitude doesn't make a girl steal her rescuer's jacket and sleep with it for three months. I loved you since I was eight years old, when you pulled me from the rubble. You just never let yourself see it.

Footsteps sound on the stairs. YE QINXIN's expression turns panicked. She hides the ring and turns off the camera.

SU YUNJING enters the room.

YE QINXIN
Xiao Jiu, you're back.

SU YUNJING's face is dark. He strides forward and grabs YE QINXIN by the throat.

SU YUNJING
(angrily)
Don't call me that. You lost that right when you killed my brother.

SU YUNJING throws YE QINXIN onto the bed.

SU YUNJING removes his tie and blindfolds YE QINXIN with it, tying her to the bedframe.

YE QINXIN lies on the bed, blindfolded.
continuation:
YE QINXIN
(weakly)
Do you hate me this much?

SU YUNJING
(coldly)
You betrayed me with him. Got pregnant with his child. Then let him die in that car. Tell me why I shouldn't hate you.

YE QINXIN
Because the child was yours. That night at the lake house, before the accident. Because I was trying to save him from Ye Ruoyao's men. Because my fingerprints on that wrench were from trying to fix what they'd broken.

SU YUNJING
(shouting)
Yaoyao's in a coma because of you! She's fighting for her life while you—

His phone rings. He answers.

SU YUNJING
(into the phone)
What? ...She's awake? I'll be there.

SU YUNJING hangs up.

SU YUNJING
Tomorrow, I'm divorcing you.

SU YUNJING turns and leaves.

YE QINXIN removes the blindfold. She retrieves the camera from under the pillow and turns it on.

YE QINXIN
(to camera)
Live well, Xiao Jiu. Since you finally learned how to let me go.

title: Dragon Lord of the Nation
description: A security guard who moonlights as a ride-share driver hides his true identity as the legendary Dragon Lord, protector of the Great Xia nation.
context:
Title: Dragon Lord of the Nation
Description: A security guard who moonlights as a ride-share driver hides his true identity as the legendary Dragon Lord, protector of the Great Xia nation.

EXT. OFFICE BUILDING - DAY

SECURITY GUARD A stifles a yawn, exhausted.

SECURITY GUARD B walks over, phone ready.

SECURITY GUARD A
Qin Feng. Ten-hour shifts, then ride-share till dawn. The kid's a machine.

SECURITY GUARD B
For a wife like his? I'd work three jobs. But watch this.

SECURITY GUARD B takes out his phone, and the two huddle together to watch.

INT. PHONE SCREEN - NIGHT
