Shaky footage shows QIN FENG in scarred armor fighting NINJAS. Lightning crackles. Overlaid text: "DRAGON LORD HOAX?" Comments scroll: "FAKE."

THUNDER GOD RAY (V.O.)
Your reign ends tonight.

QIN FENG (V.O.)
Great Xia stands.

The screen whites out in a massive explosion.
continuation:
INT. OFFICE BUILDING - DAY

SECURITY GUARD A and SECURITY GUARD B watch with surging passion.

SECURITY GUARD B
Dragon Lord of the Nation... they say he saved us.

SECURITY GUARD A
If he existed. Forums debunked that footage.

SECURITY GUARD B
(looking closely)
Hey... doesn't that look like Qin Feng?

SECURITY GUARD A
(dismissive)
A security guard? Don't be stupid.

QIN FENG appears behind them, knuckles raw.

QIN FENG
Shift's over.

They spin. Guard B fumbles his phone—it lands face-up on the helmet frame.

SECURITY GUARD B
(stammering)
Qin Feng! We were just—

Qin Feng picks up the phone. His scarred fingers brush the image. He hands it back without meeting their eyes.

QIN FENG
Good render.

He walks to his dented car. The guards stare after him.

SECURITY GUARD B
(whisper)
His knuckles were bleeding.

SECURITY GUARD A
(scoffs)
Paper cuts. Let it go.

FADE OUT.

title: The Masked God of War
description: A legendary warrior named Ye Chen is honored as the God of War but mysteriously disappears, losing his memory and becoming a security guard, only to be rescued by the woman he once saved.
context:
Title: The Masked God of War
Description: A legendary warrior named Ye Chen is honored as the God of War but mysteriously disappears, losing his memory and becoming a security guard, only to be rescued by the woman he once saved.

INT. OUTSIDE SHENWU HALL - DAY

The characters "SHENWU HALL" appear on screen.

A masked herald blows a ceremonial horn.

NARRATOR (V.O.)
Ye Chen of the Northern Territory. Slayer of rebels, shield of the realm. Today, he ascends as the God of War, Supreme Commander of Great Xia.

YE CHEN, in black battle armor, leads JIUXIAO DRAGON LADY, FEI LONG, and a procession of officers toward the hall.

INT. INSIDE SHENWU HALL - DAY

YE CHEN and his subordinates walk a red carpet as soldiers line both sides.

ALL
Congratulations! Congratulations! Congratulations!

YE CHEN stands center, facing the assembly.

YE CHEN
This honor belongs to those who fell. To every brother still standing.

YE CHEN raises his bowl.

YE CHEN
Remember them. Drink!

ALL
Drink!

They drain their bowls and smash them in unison.

EXT. ON A BRIDGE - DAY

The words "OUTSIDE SHENWU HALL" appear on screen.

XU XUEROU and her sister XU QINGYUN watch distant palace fireworks.

XU QINGYUN
You came all this way just to glimpse his procession? You didn't even see his face.

XU XUEROU
Knowing he's safe is enough. Some debts don't need repayment.

XU QINGYUN
But you don't even know what he looks like. How can you—?

A car horn blares from above.

XU QINGYUN
Driver's waiting.

From the woods below, YE CHEN staggers forth, his clothes torn, fresh bandages seeping through.

XU QINGYUN
(frightened)
Stay back! There's a shelter in the city—

XU XUEROU
He's wounded. We can't leave him.

XU XUEROU
(to YE CHEN)
Can you walk? We're heading to Qing City.

YE CHEN clutches his head, voice raw.

YE CHEN
Fragments... just my name. Ye Chen.

XU QINGYUN
(shocked)
Ye—? Like the God of—

YE CHEN collapses. XU XUEROU catches him.

XU XUEROU
Easy. We've got you.
continuation:
EXT. ON THE ROAD - DAY

JIUXIAO DRAGON LADY leads a covert unit at a dead run.

JIUXIAO DRAGON LADY
The God of War is compromised. Notify the Sovereign—silent search. No panic. No leaks.

FEMALE SOLDIERS
Yes, Commander!

INT. XU GROUP CORPORATION LOBBY - DAY

The words "THREE YEARS LATER" and "XU GROUP CORPORATION LOBBY" appear on screen.

CHEN XIULI, in a red power suit, crosses the marble floor. YE CHEN, in a security uniform, tries to blend into the wall.

CHEN XIULI
You're the stray Xuerou brought home? Still here.

She shoves a hotel keycard into his hand.

CHEN XIULI
Your boss got cornered at the Yangtze Tower dinner. Room 808. She's not herself—go.

YE CHEN studies the card, his fingers brushing old scars.

INT. YUEYI HOTEL ROOM - NIGHT

XU XUEROU, in a white silk dress, sways by the window. Glassy eyes, unnatural flush.

The door cracks. YE CHEN enters, movements measured.

YE CHEN
President Xu?

YE CHEN closes the door.

YE CHEN
Miss Xu?

XU XUEROU spins, breath catching.

XU XUEROU
(whispering)
You came... burning... something's wrong—

She stumbles into him. They fall onto the bed. Her fingers grip his collar.

From a vent above, a hidden camera's red dot blinks steady.

title: CEO Run, Your Wife Is Actually a Princess
description: A princess from 1,500 years ago is betrayed by her lover from the future and reborn in the modern world seeking revenge.
context:
Title: CEO Run, Your Wife Is Actually a Princess
Description: A princess from 1,500 years ago is betrayed by her lover from the future and reborn in the modern world seeking revenge.

INT. PALACE EXTERIOR - NIGHT

Under a bleeding moon, UNCLE WANG (50s, battle-scarred general) and his elite SOLDIERS form a tight circle around FU CHENG (28, mysterious modern jacket, defiant stance). Princess ZHAO YUANXI (18, regal yet trembling) stands apart, her eyes reflecting shattered trust.

ZHAO YUANXI (V.O.)
Fifteen hundred years ago, I was Princess of Great Xia. Uncle Wang captured a demon in the palace. He wore strange clothes and spoke of impossible things.

MONTAGE - DAY/NIGHT

-- FU CHENG paints ZHAO YUANXI in a pavilion. She steals glances at him, not the canvas.
-- Their hands brush while painting. She doesn't pull away.
-- They sit on palace steps, sparklers reflecting in both their eyes. Her head rests on his shoulder.

ZHAO YUANXI (V.O.)
He was from the future. A world without royal chains. Where love needed no permission. I believed every word.

INT. PRINCESS'S CHAMBER - NIGHT

ZHAO YUANXI stares at her reflection in bronze, dressed in crimson wedding silks. Her fingers trace the embroidery like a death shroud.

FU CHENG emerges from shadow, his face half in darkness.

FU CHENG
(softly)
Prince Xiao's twin jade. It opens doors between worlds. I'll have it by dawn. We'll vanish.

ZHAO YUANXI
(whisper)
And if he discovers you?

FU CHENG
Then I'll burn his kingdom down.

EXT. COURTYARD - DAY

Rain hammers the stones. UNCLE WANG blocks ZHAO YUANXI's path, his sword half-drawn.

UNCLE WANG
Escaping a political marriage is treason. That stranger is gambling with your bloodline.

ZHAO YUANXI
(meeting his gaze)
Then consider me all-in.
continuation:
INT. PRINCESS'S CHAMBER - NIGHT

ZHAO YUANXI presses her forehead against the chamber door. UNCLE WANG stands guard outside, his silhouette rigid.

ZHAO YUANXI
You raised me when my father couldn't. Tonight... let me be a foolish girl one last time.

Silence. Then—a single nod of his shadow.

EXT. CITY GATE - DAY

The marriage procession snakes through the gate like a funeral march. ZHAO YUANXI sits in the palanquin, gripping the jade pendant hidden in her sleeve.

EXT. PRINCE XIAO'S CAMP - NIGHT

ZHAO YUANXI slips through the command tent, her heart hammering. She spots the TWIN JADE on Prince Xiao's armor stand.

Her fingers close around it—

PRINCE XIAO (40, war-hardened) erupts from his cot, sword singing from its scabbard.

PRINCE XIAO
Spy! That pendant is my soul!

He lunges. UNCLE WANG crashes through the tent flap, taking the blade through his shoulder. Blood sprays ZHAO YUANXI's wedding dress.

EXT. WILDERNESS - NIGHT

The caravan burns. UNCLE WANG, bleeding, drags ZHAO YUANXI toward a riderless horse.

UNCLE WANG
Yongning Gate. Noon. He'll be there?

ZHAO YUANXI
He swore it.

UNCLE WANG
Then ride like the dynasty depends on it.

EXT. YONGNING GATE EXTERIOR - NIGHT

ZHAO YUANXI and UNCLE WANG, both bloodied, stumble toward the towering gate. Twenty enemy HORSEMEN close in, torches painting the night orange.

Behind the iron bars—FU CHENG stands motionless, twin jade pendants glowing in his fist.

FU CHENG
(shouting)
You took her from me. Now you both die in her name!

UNCLE WANG
(bellowing)
Open the gate! For the Princess of Xia!

The gate doesn't move. Arrows thud into the wood around them.

ZHAO YUANXI (V.O.)
Little Uncle Wang fought three days straight. A thousand miles. The gate never opened.

An arrow takes UNCLE WANG in the back. He drops to one knee, still swinging his sword.

UNCLE WANG
(gasping)
Princess... I got you... home...

ZHAO YUANXI
(screaming)
Little Uncle Wang!

The gate groans open. FU CHENG stands in the gap, backlit like an angel of death.

ZHAO YUANXI
(sobbing, crawling)
The twin jade can heal! Please—save him!

FU CHENG
(cold)
It doesn't heal. It erases. And I'm done erasing pieces of my past.

He strikes. She crumples, the pendant clutched to her chest. It flares—blinding white.

ZHAO YUANXI (V.O.)
Fu Cheng killed me. But Uncle Wang's sacrifice... that was love.

EXT. MODERN CITY - NIGHT

Neon floods ancient stone streets. ZHAO YUANXI lies in a Shanghai alley, coughing on 21st-century air. Skyscrapers pierce clouds where palaces once stood. Her fingers—still gripping the jade—twitch.

ZHAO YUANXI
(disoriented, venomous)
Where...?

She sees a digital billboard flashing Fu Cheng's face—now a CEO in a tailored suit. Her eyes narrow. The jade glows in her fist.

FADE OUT.

title: Tang Clan
description: Tang Seventh Master, guardian of the Tang Clan's forbidden legacy, faces a lethal ambush that forces him to choose between preserving tradition or passing its burden to an unlikely heir.
context:
Title: Tang Clan
Description: Tang Seventh Master, guardian of the Tang Clan's forbidden legacy, faces a lethal ambush that forces him to choose between preserving tradition or passing its burden to an unlikely heir.

EXT. ABANDONED INDUSTRIAL COMPLEX - DAY

Explosions tear through rusted structures. TANG SEVENTH MASTER (40s, robes tattered) weaves through the ruins on horseback, smoke trailing behind him.

FEMALE ASSASSIN (V.O.)
Your clan's secrets die with you, Tang!

He swerves as a BLAST erupts through a water tower. Debris rains down.

TANG SEVENTH MASTER
Then come and claim them.

He vaults from his horse, lands in a crouch. Four ASSASSINS drop from above, surrounding him:

- FEMALE ASSASSIN (30s, qipao lined with blades)
- MALE ASSASSIN 1 (40s, wide-brimmed hat)
- MALE ASSASSIN 2 (30s, trench coat)
- MALE ASSASSIN 3 (20s, hooded)

FEMALE ASSASSIN
Your life for the manual. Final offer.

TANG SEVENTH MASTER
(quietly)
The manual burned. The knowledge... is here.
(taps his temple)

MALE ASSASSIN 1
Then we take your head.

Silver chains whip from his sleeves. MALE ASSASSIN 2's fingers ignite with crimson energy. The FEMALE ASSASSIN's blade sings. MALE ASSASSIN 3 melts into shadow.

TANG SEVENTH MASTER exhales. Golden light fractures across his skin as a towering dharma form materializes—flickering, unstable.

He slams his palm down. A shockwave erupts.

The ASSASSINS crash through concrete pillars, their totems (Azure Dragon, Vermillion Bird, White Tiger, Black Tortoise) shattering like glass.

Tang Seventh Master collapses to one knee, coughing blood. He clutches his chest—black veins spiderweb across his skin.

MASKED MAN (O.S.)
Let him run.

A figure in a crimson demon mask emerges from smoke. The assassins struggle to their feet, bloodied.

MASKED MAN (CONT'D)
The Fire Cloud Seal is set. He has until midnight to find a successor... or the line ends.

The black veins pulse visibly.
continuation:
INT. ABANDONED WAREHOUSE - NIGHT

Tang Seventh Master stumbles through darkness, each step heavier. He reaches a support beam and slides down it.

Footsteps echo. XIE FENG (20s, scavenger's gear) freezes twenty feet away, holding a knife.

XIE FENG
(whisper)
The Ghost Hand of Chengdu...

TANG SEVENTH MASTER
(struggling to focus)
Not anymore. Boy... do you know what the Tang Clan guards?

He extends his hand. Black veins climb toward his fingertips—while golden light pools in his palm, swirling into ancient characters.

XIE FENG
(backing away)
I want no part of your world.

TANG SEVENTH MASTER
(laughs, bitter)
Neither did I.

The characters flicker brighter. His eyes meet Xie Feng's—one pupil pure white, one burning gold.

FADE OUT.

title: Dragon's Kiss
description: A construction worker unknowingly becomes entangled in a web of betrayal when his girlfriend and his boss carry on an affair behind his back.
context:
Title: Dragon's Kiss
Description: A construction worker unknowingly becomes entangled in a web of betrayal when his girlfriend and his boss carry on an affair behind his back.

INT. CONSTRUCTION SITE OFFICE - DAY

ZHOU GE sits at his desk, reviewing paperwork. The air conditioner hums.

YE HUAN enters, removing his safety helmet.

YE HUAN
Brother Zhou.

ZHOU GE
(looking up)
Ye Huan.

YE HUAN
Here for my wages.

ZHOU GE
Right.

ZHOU GE opens a drawer, counts out cash, and hands it to YE HUAN.

ZHOU GE
Three days' work.

YE HUAN
(taking the money)
Thanks, Brother Zhou.

YE HUAN lingers, looking at a photo on the desk—Zixuan and Zhou Ge at a company event, Zhou Ge's arm around her shoulders.

YE HUAN
That's a good picture of her.

ZHOU GE
(covers it with a file)
Office party.

YE HUAN
Zixuan mentioned she might drop by today.

ZHOU GE
(stiffens)
She hasn't.

YE HUAN
She should. You did us a real favor with this job.

ZHOU GE
Just business.

YE HUAN
Still. We're grateful.

YE HUAN turns to leave.

ZHOU GE watches the door close, then exhales.

The camera pans down under the desk. A red handbag sits in the shadows.
continuation:
EXT. CONSTRUCTION SITE - DAY

ZIXUAN walks through the site in jeans and a blouse, more practical but still out of place. She carries a lunch bag.

WORKERS watch her pass.

YE HUAN sees her and smiles.

YE HUAN
You made it.

ZIXUAN
(strained smile)
Brought you lunch.

YE HUAN
You shouldn't have. Site's too dirty.

ZIXUAN
(glances toward the office)
Wanted to see where you work.

YE HUAN
At least let me wash my hands first.

ZIXUAN
I'll wait in the office.

She moves toward it before he can respond.

INT. CONSTRUCTION SITE OFFICE - DAY

ZIXUAN enters. ZHOU GE stands, blocking her path.

ZHOU GE
You can't keep doing this.

ZIXUAN
(defensive)
He asked me to bring food.

ZHOU GE
And you always say yes.

He pulls her close. The lunch bag drops.

ZIXUAN
(soft, desperate)
We have to tell him.

ZHOU GE
Never.

Footsteps. The door opens.

YE HUAN stands in the doorway, holding the red handbag.

YE HUAN
(quiet)
You forgot something.

The tableau: ZHOU GE's arms around ZIXUAN, her bag on the floor.

YE HUAN
(to ZIXUAN)
Under the desk?

ZIXUAN
(pales)
Ye Huan—

YE HUAN
(cutting her off, to ZHOU GE)
How long?

ZHOU GE
Does it matter?

YE HUAN
(softly)
Three hundred yuan a day. I thought I was building us a future.

He looks between them. Neither can hold his gaze.

YE HUAN
Guess I was just digging my own grave.

He drops the handbag. It thuds.

YE HUAN turns and walks out. The door stays open.

ZIXUAN starts toward it. ZHOU GE grabs her arm.

ZHOU GE
He'll get over it.

ZIXUAN
(quietly, with venom)
You don't know him at all.

She pulls free and follows YE HUAN.

ZHOU GE stands alone, looking at the red handbag on his polished floor. He picks it up, brushes off the dust, and sets it on his desk next to the photo.

He straightens the picture frame.

title: The Empress Dowager is with Child
description: A forbidden romance between an empress and an emperor ends in tragedy, leading to a modern-day woman's rebirth into the past.
context:
Title: The Empress Dowager is with Child
Description: A forbidden romance between an empress and an emperor ends in tragedy, leading to a modern-day woman's rebirth into the past.

INT. ANCIENT PALACE - DAY

Melodious ancient music plays.

JIANG WANSHUANG (30s), Empress Dowager in scarlet silk, reclines on a rosewood divan. Two male COURTIERS attend her—one pours wine, the other massages her shoulders.

EMPEROR LONG ZE (20s) storms in, dragon robes swirling.

LONG ZE
(angrily)
Get out. All of you.

The courtiers flee. Jiang Wanshuang doesn't move.

JIANG WANSHUANG
(leisurely)
What brings the Son of Heaven to this dowager's chambers?

Long Ze seizes her wrist.

LONG ZE
Wanshuang, I will not marry the Prime Minister's daughter. Don't use this method to anger me.

JIANG WANSHUANG
(serious)
Your father's will made me Empress Dowager. I'm your mother, by law.

LONG ZE
(coldly laughing)
Last moon you were in my bed. Not my mother's.

Jiang Wanshuang meets his eyes. Her expression hardens.

JIANG WANSHUANG
(laughing lightly)
Then perhaps I've tired of your inexperience, Your Majesty.

LONG ZE
(shocked)
You're lying.

JIANG WANSHUANG
(impatiently)
Leave me. Please.

Long Ze turns. Exits. Jiang Wanshuang watches until he's gone. She coughs. Blood spatters the jade cup. She collapses.

Long Ze hears. Rushes back in.

LONG ZE
(panicking)
Shuang'er! What did you do?

He catches her falling body.

JIANG WANSHUANG
(weakly)
Prime Minister's poison... finally took. Had to push you away... save you...

She dies. Long Ze holds her as the screen fades to black and white.

SUPER: Great Liang Dynasty, Year 1 of Tiansheng. Empress Dowager Jiang, deceased.
continuation:
INT. MODERN MANSION - DAY

2023. LIU HANYAN (20s) models a pink designer gown and diamonds, admiring herself in a mirror.

JIANG WANSHUANG (MODERN, 20s) enters in monochrome separates. She hurls a velvet box at Liu Hanyan's feet. A diamond necklace spills out.

JIANG WANSHUANG (MODERN)
Well, well, Liu Hanyan, you dare to steal my mother's heirlooms.

JIANG WANSHUANG (MODERN) crushes the necklace under her heel.

JIANG WANSHUANG (MODERN)
You and your mother are gone by dawn.

She exits. Liu Hanyan gathers the broken diamonds. Her eyes turn venomous.

INT. MANSION STAIRCASE - DAY

Jiang Wanshuang (Modern) climbs the marble stairs. Liu Hanyan appears at the top.

LIU HANYAN
Jiang Wanshuang!

Liu Hanyan shoves her. Jiang Wanshuang tumbles down the stairs. Her skull cracks against marble. Blood pools.

Liu Hanyan descends, first smiling, then feigning horror.

LIU HANYAN
(screaming)
Help! Somebody! Oh God!

INT. HOSPITAL WARD - DAY

Jiang Wanshuang (Modern) lies on a hospital bed. A DOCTOR checks his watch.

DOCTOR
(looking at watch)
Time of death. 14:38.

The DOCTOR and NURSE exit. The body under the sheet opens ancient eyes—sharp, cold.

ON SCREEN: TO BE CONTINUED

title: Book Dream Romance
description: A resilient fish vendor's dreams are shattered by betrayal, but a second chance awaits in a world where stories and reality collide.
context:
Title: Book Dream Romance
Description: A resilient fish vendor's dreams are shattered by betrayal, but a second chance awaits in a world where stories and reality collide.

INT. SEAFOOD MARKET - DAY

Fast-paced montage: Fishing boats unload at dawn, crabs scuttling across ice, Liang Xu's weathered hands counting change.

LIANG XU, late 20s, tired but focused, pins down a rebellious crab.

LIANG XU (V.O.)
Three years. Three hundred and sixty-two days per year. That's how long I've been saving for a different story.

LIANG XU pulls out a worn flask, pours a small offering onto the cutting board for the crab, then takes a careful sip himself, wincing at the burn.

ON SCREEN: LIANG XU - FISH VENDOR, DREAMER

His friend WEN XI, a delivery driver with ink-stained fingers, appears with a cardboard box.

WEN XI
Drawing a sword to cut water—

LIANG XU
—makes it flow more. I know, I know. You rehearse your lines more than I count crabs.

WEN XI grins, then his face multiplies in LIANG XU's vision, each version shouting louder.

WEN XI
A Liang! Delivery! A Liang!

LIANG XU
(steadying himself)
Alright. The manuscripts?

WEN XI
(proudly)
Proofed and perfect. Your novel edits. Plus something new.

WEN XI hands him paper-clipped pages beneath a waterproof bag.

LIANG XU
Keep them dry. My laptop died last month.

WEN XI
(tapping a crab)
These guys have better arcs than half the slop publishers print.

LIANG XU
(flipping pages)
Why do all these villains steal the protagonist's love interest? No buildup. Just... poof. Betrayed.

WEN XI
Instant rage-clicks. You wouldn't understand. Some people want pure catharsis.

LIANG XU reaches a handwritten margin note, his own cramped handwriting: "What if the villain wins because he's already inside the hero's house?" He swallows hard.

LIANG XU
(quietly)
I'd settle for just being able to finish my own story.

LIANG XU pulls out a thin bank envelope, thumbing the cash inside.

LIANG XU
Qingqing's tuition balance. Finally. She can graduate, we can—

YE CHEN, 30, immaculate suit, sunglasses reflecting the market grime, approaches with two BODYGUARDS who clear a path. He carries a leather portfolio.

YE CHEN
(pleasantly)
Vendor. Your crabs. Do they all come with guarantees?

LIANG XU
Depends on the guarantee.

YE CHEN
continuation:
That they won't disappoint me. Like people do.

LIANG XU
Males fight. Females nurture. Which disappointment are you?

YE CHEN's smile vanishes. He signals. One bodyguard produces a roll of bills—exactly twice what LIANG XU saved.

YE CHEN
I'll take them all. And your loyalty.

LIANG XU
Not for sale.

YE CHEN leans in, his voice dropping to a whisper.

YE CHEN
She already took the tuition money, you know. Yesterday. Said it was for you.

LIANG XU goes pale. YE CHEN pulls him into a forced embrace, knife sliding from his sleeve. The blade enters beneath LIANG XU's ribs—precise, hidden by their bodies.

LIANG XU
(gasping)
Why... this?

YE CHEN
(leaning close)
Because you exist. That's offense enough.

QINGQING appears, 24, nervous, clutching a designer bag. She sees them, understands, but doesn't scream.

ON SCREEN: QINGQING - LIANG XU'S FIANCEE, DEBT-RIDDEN

LIANG XU reaches for her.

LIANG XU
Qingqing... the money...

YE CHEN
(laughing)
Oh, she has your money. Spent it on that bag. Cost less than her silence.

QINGQING
(desperate, not cold)
Don't make this about money, A Liang. You never had enough to fix my problems. He does.

LIANG XU
(bleeding)
I gave you everything—

QINGQING
(tears falling)
Exactly! Everything you had was everything I couldn't afford to need. I'm sorry. I'm so sorry.

QINGQING turns away. YE CHEN twists the knife.

YE CHEN
The only real prison is poverty. Welcome to your escape.

LIANG XU collapses. Blood pools on his manuscript pages.

LIANG XU (V.O.)
So this is how my story ends. Not with words, but with—

MYSTERIOUS VOICE (V.O.)
—silence? No. This chapter merely needs a better editor. Someone who understands that villains should fear the epilogue.

Memory fragments: Qingqing's exhausted nights studying, Ye Chen's shadow in her doorway, the tuition deadline notice, Liang Xu's own written words: "The hero dies on page one. The legend begins on page two."

His vision darkens, then a single spark. Water rushes.

INT. POOLSIDE - DAY

Several beautiful girls laugh in a sun-drenched pool.

LIANG XU's eyes snap open. He's lying on a marble deck, shirtless, a manuscript page clutched in his hand. His own handwriting now reads: "Chapter Two: The Villain's Mistake."

title: Unbridled
description: A woman dying of cancer realizes she was only a substitute for her husband's true love and decides to end her life, but mysterious voices intervene.
context:
Title: Unbridled
Description: A woman dying of cancer realizes she was only a substitute for her husband's true love and decides to end her life, but mysterious voices intervene.

INT. BEDROOM - NIGHT

Medication bottles line the nightstand. SU JINMO watches FU YANCHEN pack a suitcase.

SU JINMO
Yanchen... the doctor called today.

FU YANCHEN
(doesn't turn)
I know.

He slams the suitcase shut. A photograph peeks out—him with a woman who looks like Jinmo, but isn't.

ON SCREEN: Character introduction text - FU YANCHEN, President of Fu Group; SU JINMO.

SU JINMO
You know?

FU YANCHEN
Xining saw you at the hospital. She told me everything.
(beat)
This card has one million in it, and this house. They're yours. Our relationship ends here.

He places a keycard on the dresser. Jinmo's reflection in the mirror shows her hand trembling near her abdomen.

SU JINMO
(softly)
I wasn't going to ask for money.

FU YANCHEN
Then what? Pity?

He walks to the door, pauses.

FU YANCHEN
You got three years because you looked like her. Be grateful.

He leaves. Jinmo's fingers find a crumpled pathology report in her robe pocket. She stares at the words: METASTATIC.
continuation:
INT. BATHROOM - NIGHT

SU JINMO lies in the bathtub, candlelight flickering on wet porcelain. Her phone glows with a social media post: Fu Yanchen and Su Xining at a gala, captioned "Back where I belong."

SU JINMO (V.O.)
(thready)
You said you'd love me until I died. You just didn't think it would be so soon.

Her hand slips beneath the water. A single red ribbon swirls upward.

SU JINMO (V.O.)
This time, I won't be anyone's ghost.

Her head tilts back. A drop of blood falls. The ribbon drifts toward the drain.

ON SCREEN: Episode One

ON SCREEN: Bullet comments flood the frame.

BULLET COMMENTS (V.O.)
(chaotic)
She's actually doing it? No way they'll kill the FL! Classic torture drama!

SU JINMO (V.O.)
(whisper)
Who's... talking?

The candle flames flicker blue. The blood drop rolls UP the tub's curve, defying gravity.

MYSTERIOUS VOICE (V.O.)
(urgent, layered)
Hey! Not this again! Wake up! WAKE UP WAKE UP WAKE—

The ribbon flies from the drain, wrapping Jinmo's wrist like a tourniquet. Her eyes snap open.

title: You Are the Fireworks of the World
description: A secretary discovers her boyfriend's betrayal with her boss's fiancée and proposes an unexpected form of revenge.
context:
Title: You Are the Fireworks of the World
Description: A secretary discovers her boyfriend's betrayal with her boss's fiancée and proposes an unexpected form of revenge.

INT. JUNAN HOTEL - NIGHT

Exterior of the hotel building, countless windows lit up. Text overlay: Junan Hotel.

MU ZIAN half-lies on the bed, GONG JIAOJIAO straddles him.

MU ZIAN
Jiaojiao.

GONG JIAOJIAO
Look how eager you are.

The two embrace and kiss. The camera pans across a bouquet of flowers by the bed. Hidden beneath the ribbon of the bouquet is a tiny camera, its red light blinking.

INT. MU XINGYUAN'S OFFICE - DAY

MU XINGYUAN sits at his desk, surveillance footage from the hotel room playing on his computer screen. He watches with a serious expression.

XU YI walks into the office angrily.

XU YI
President Mu, we have a situation. Your nephew and... the other party.

MU XINGYUAN
Two idiots. Not worth dirtying my hands over.

MU XINGYUAN clenches his fist, his eyes cold.

MU XINGYUAN
Go get Secretary Jiang for me.

XU YI
Yes.

XU YI turns and leaves.
continuation:
INT. OFFICE CORRIDOR/MU XINGYUAN'S OFFICE - DAY

JIANG WANQING, wearing professional attire and flat shoes, walks down the office corridor. She glances at her phone—a hospital payment reminder—then enters.

JIANG WANQING
President Mu, you wanted to see me?

MU XINGYUAN
Are you dating my nephew Mu Zian?

JIANG WANQING
(pause)
Yes, President Mu.

MU XINGYUAN
As far as I know, Mu Zian has cheated more times than you can count on both hands. What exactly do you tolerate it for?

JIANG WANQING
(smiling tightly)
The same reason anyone honors a bad contract. I have obligations.

MU XINGYUAN
(challenging)
Do you know who the woman is this time?

MU XINGYUAN turns the computer screen toward JIANG WANQING. She sees the surveillance footage, her smile shatters—hurt, then hardened resolve.

JIANG WANQING
(quietly)
Your fiancée. He's surpassed himself.

MU XINGYUAN
Junan Hotel. Room 8808. Still in progress.

MU XINGYUAN pushes a room key card across the desk.

MU XINGYUAN
Here's the key card. Go now, and you might still catch the climax.

MU XINGYUAN stands to leave. JIANG WANQING reaches out and stops him.

MU XINGYUAN
What? Secretary Jiang doesn't want to catch them in the act?

JIANG WANQING
(smiling again)
Direct confrontation is for those with nothing to lose. For revenge that actually costs him? I have a better idea.

MU XINGYUAN
I'm listening.

JIANG WANQING moves closer to MU XINGYUAN, grabs his tie, tilts her head up and kisses him.

title: The Heiress Goes Crazy in the Entertainment Industry
description: A young woman wakes up in a hospital after an accident, believing she is a prime minister's daughter from ancient times, only to find herself in the modern world engaged to a man she once knew.
context:
Title: The Heiress Goes Crazy in the Entertainment Industry
Description: A young woman wakes up in a hospital after an accident, believing she is a prime minister's daughter from ancient times, only to find herself in the modern world engaged to a man she once knew.

INT. HOSPITAL WARD - DAY

FLASHBACK:

QIN YINGYING (V.O.)
(voice tight with manufactured guilt)
I really didn't mean to. It was all sister, sister pushed me, and she fell down herself.

LU SIYA (V.O.)
(eagerly)
Yingying, everyone knows you and my uncle are a match made in heaven. Qin Xi, this country bumpkin from the countryside, how is she worthy of my uncle?

FLASHBACK TO:

EXT. ANCIENT BATTLEFIELD - DAY

LU JINGSHEN, covered in blood, collapses in QIN XI's arms. Then LU JINGSHEN lies on the ground, surrounded by enemies. Their blades glint in firelight.

BACK TO:
continuation:
INT. HOSPITAL WARD - DAY

QIN XI lies in a hospital bed, head wrapped in bandages, and suddenly wakes up with a start.

QIN XI
(terrified)
Jingshen!

QIN XI sits up, looks around, confused. QIN YINGYING and LU SIYA enter the ward.

QIN XI
(confused, formal)
Miss, where is this place? Everything I see is white... Jingshen, is he dead?

QIN YINGYING
(impatiently)
Qin Xi, did you knock your head stupid?

LU SIYA
(disdainfully)
Vulgar and crude, no knowledge, no manners. I really don't know how someone like you could be my uncle's fiancée.

QIN XI
(angry, drawing herself up)
How dare you! I am the legitimate daughter of the Prime Minister's household. How dare you insult me like this?

LU SIYA
(mocking)
Qin Xi, are you playing cosplay now? You're the Prime Minister's daughter, and I'm a princess.

QIN YINGYING
(suspicious, head tilting)
Sister, you're not trying to use amnesia to cover up the fact that you grew up in the countryside, with limited knowledge and vulgar manners, are you?

QIN XI clutches her head in pain. Memories war within her.

LU JINGSHEN appears at the door, stance rigid.

LU JINGSHEN
Qin Yingying.

LU JINGSHEN (V.O.)
(internal, cold)
Mama Chen saw with her own eyes that you pushed her.

QIN XI sees LU JINGSHEN, immediately gets out of bed, rushes over and hugs him tightly, IV pole clattering.

QIN XI
(crying, desperate)
Jingshen! Jingshen, thank goodness you're alive. I thought I would never see you again.

QIN XI cries in LU JINGSHEN's arms. LU JINGSHEN stands with a complex expression on his face, his hands hovering at his sides.

FADE OUT.

title: Wudao Mountain Wuji Temple
description: A humble temple janitor reveals his hidden strength when confronted by arrogant visitors before a martial arts trial assembly.
context:
Title: Wudao Mountain Wuji Temple
Description: A humble temple janitor reveals his hidden strength when confronted by arrogant visitors before a martial arts trial assembly.

TITLE CARD: WUDAO MOUNTAIN WUJI TEMPLE

EXT. TEMPLE MOUNTAIN GATE - DAY

A black sedan stops at the bottom of a long stone staircase. Several BODYGUARDS exit the car and open an umbrella for an elegant woman in a black dress (QIN RUOYU).

QIN RUOYU walks briskly up the stone steps in high heels.

On the steps, a young man in simple white clothing (YE QINGYUN) is lying down sleeping, with a broom and a pile of swept leaves beside him.

QIN RUOYU
Ye Qingyun?

YE QINGYUN opens his eyes—not lazy, but assessing.

YE QINGYUN
You're early. The Assembly doesn't start for hours.

QIN RUOYU
The Xia family petitioned the Council. Intervene today, and you're rogue. No sect, no protection.

She places a sealed envelope beside him.

YE QINGYUN
(sitting up)
They think sweeping temples scares me?

QIN RUOYU
They think losing your name terrifies you.

She continues up the mountain. Ye Qingyun watches her, then glances at the envelope—his name written in the hand of his former master. He tucks it away.

An arrogant man in a floral shirt (FLORAL SHIRT MAN) approaches with two HENCHMEN.

FLORAL SHIRT MAN
(pointing at the leaf pile)
Who piles garbage here?

YE QINGYUN
(standing)
I do. Problem?

HENCHMAN A
Apologize to my boss!

FLORAL SHIRT MAN
(laughing)
Wait... I know you. The Xia family's useless son-in-law. Come to hide?

YE QINGYUN
I don't hide. I wait.

FLORAL SHIRT MAN
Wait for what? More humiliation?

He kicks the leaf pile apart. The HENCHMEN move to grab Ye Qingyun.

FLORAL SHIRT MAN
The four great families are up there. Even the Commander came to watch. A sweeper like you—
continuation:
YE QINGYUN
If the Commander breaks something, he pays for it.

FLORAL SHIRT MAN
You stinking sweeper, how dare you—

YE QINGYUN
If you break something, you pay.

FLORAL SHIRT MAN kicks at him. Ye Qingyun catches his ankle and dumps him into his own scattered leaves.

HENCHMAN B
He used internal energy! He's not crippled!

FLORAL SHIRT MAN
(struggling up)
Tiger Lord will kill you!

YE QINGYUN
Then bring him.

A booming voice echoes.

TIGER LORD (O.S.)
Who dares?

A burly man in black robes (TIGER LORD) leads a dozen men down the stairs. He stops, staring at Ye Qingyun.

TIGER LORD
You healed.

YE QINGYUN
I buried what needed burying.

TIGER LORD
The Council thinks you're neutral. But if you can fight, you're a contender. That changes the vote.

YE QINGYUN
I don't vote.

TIGER LORD
Then why test your strength here? Why now?

Ye Qingyun's gaze drifts past Tiger Lord—toward the temple, toward where Qin Ruoyu vanished. He smiles faintly.

YE QINGYUN
Someone has to clean the garbage.

TIGER LORD
(smiling coldly)
The Xia family sent her to warn you off. Smart.

He steps closer, menace rising.

TIGER LORD
But you're going to defy them. Because that's what you do.

YE QINGYUN
And you're going to get in my way. Because that's what you do.

TIGER LORD
You're asking for death!

YE QINGYUN emanates an invisible aura of power, staring coldly at TIGER LORD and his men.

title: Gale: Desperate Escape
description: Xiao Lang and his companions attempt to escape from a compound in Myawaddy, only to be caught by ruthless guards.
context:
Title: Gale: Desperate Escape
Description: Xiao Lang and his companions attempt to escape from a compound in Myawaddy, only to be caught by ruthless guards.

INT. COMPOUND COURTYARD - NIGHT

A pair of THUGS patrol, their synchronized footsteps echoing off concrete. One pauses to light a cigarette - a predictable sixty-second delay.

XIAO LANG, YANG HAO, and two others flatten against a barracks wall. Xiao Lang's fingers trace a grease-pencil map on his palm.

The Thugs move on. Xiao Lang exhales, turns to Yang Hao.

XIAO LANG
(whisper)
They're gone. Ninety seconds.

XIAO LANG
She's occupied with the new shipment. Our only window.

XIAO LANG
If the south wall fails, scatter for the river. Don't wait.

Xiao Lang leads them in a low run across open ground, hugging the shadows.

EXT. FACTORY GATE - NIGHT

The group reaches a drainage pipe along the perimeter wall. Rusted barbed wire glints overhead. Xiao Lang tests the pipe - it holds.

YANG HAO
(voice cracking)
The map showed a cleared section. This is suicide!

A metallic PING rings out - a companion's belt buckle hits the pipe. They freeze.

THUG (O.S.)
Movement! North wall!

XIAO LANG
(shoving Yang Hao)
Up! Now!

YANG HAO
(frantic)
We've been spotted! Fall back?

XIAO LANG
(feral whisper)
Going back means the cages. Climb.

ANOTHER COMPANION
(weeping)
The wire's live! I saw them test it this morning!
continuation:
EXT. FACTORY DEAD END - NIGHT

Xiao Lang leads them along the wall to a stack of rotting pallets blocking a narrow gap. The wall ahead is sheer.

XIAO LANG
(desperate)
The river access should be...

He shoves a pallet. Beyond it, chain-link hums with current, razor wire glinting.

YANG HAO
(turning on Xiao Lang)
You said the south wall was low! You promised!

XIAO LANG
(quiet, hollow)
Someone gave me bad information. Someone here.

Bootsteps echo. The LEAD THUG emerges, tapping a baton against his palm. Six men fan out behind him.

LEAD THUG
(calling back)
Dead end! Surrounded!

He advances.

LEAD THUG
Boss said make it educational. Who's first?

THUGS swarm. Xiao Lang takes a blow to his ribs, crumpling over another companion.

XIAO LANG
(gasping)
We're contracted! You can't—

FEMALE BOSS (O.S.)
Stop.

The assault freezes. The FEMALE BOSS emerges, heels clicking. The MALE BOSS follows, examining his fingernails.

FEMALE BOSS
(measured)
Chen. I said contained, not pulped.

MALE BOSS
(to Female Boss)
One facility. That's what I entrusted you with. And you're staging a broadcast of incompetence?

He gestures at the beaten men.

MALE BOSS
My Bangkok partners see this footage, they'll question my stability. Then I question yours.

FEMALE BOSS
(crouching before Xiao Lang)
You came to Myawaddy seeking sanctuary. I gave you work. This is your gratitude?

She smiles, cold.

FEMALE BOSS
Here's your new contract. You tell me who sold you that map. Tonight. Or my men demonstrate the full hospitality of this city. Starting with your friend who can't stop crying.

A companion whimpers. Xiao Lang's jaw tightens.

FEMALE BOSS
(softly)
Nobody leaves Myawaddy without settling their tab.

title: Restart and Rise Again
description: A dying man filled with regret is given a second chance to fix the mistakes that destroyed his family.
context:
Title: Restart and Rise Again
Description: A dying man filled with regret is given a second chance to fix the mistakes that destroyed his family.

INT. LIVING ROOM - NIGHT

XIAO RAN (50s, gaunt, trembling) clutches a family photo, coughing blood into a tissue. The room reeks of medicine and silence.

Footsteps thunder. LIN WEI (30s, hardened) bursts in, a crumpled will in his fist.

LIN WEI
What the hell is this? You name me in your will—like I'm your son? Like I owe you a grave?

XIAO RAN
(weakly)
Lin Yue and Ying... they're buried in the family plot. I just want to be near them.

LIN WEI
Don't you dare. You lost that right when you let Ying die. When you drove my sister to—

LIN WEI chokes on the words, fury boiling over.

LIN WEI
You think a deathbed apology erases fifteen years? You think you get to play grieving husband now?

XIAO RAN
(whispering)
I was drowning. I pulled them under with me.
continuation:
LIN WEI
Then sink alone. That's what you deserve.

XIAO RAN collapses, the photo frame shattering. Blood sprays across the glass.

FLASHBACK BEGINS.

QUICK CUTS:
- XIAO RAN, younger, slamming a door. LIN YUE crying on the other side.
- Tiny YING (3) reaching for his hand. He turns away, grabs a bottle.
- LIN WEI holding LIN YUE as she sobs, shooting Xiao Ran a look of pure hatred.
- A child's coffin. LIN YUE's empty pill bottles.
- XIAO RAN, drunk, screaming silent words.

FLASHBACK ENDS.

XIAO RAN lies still, eyes fixed on the bloody photo. His fingers brush the faces of his wife and daughter.

XIAO RAN
(fading)
Lin Yue... I'm sorry I wasn't... stronger...

XIAO RAN'S hand drops. He is still.

The photo frame GLOWS faintly. The blood on the glass SLOWLY FADES, as if being drawn back in. The air shimmers.

A second chance begins.

title: Report to the Prince, the Princess Wants a Divorce
description: A modern doctor is transported back in time after an accident on Ghost Festival, finding herself buried alive as a sacrificial bride to a dead prince.
context:
Title: Report to the Prince, the Princess Wants a Divorce
Description: A modern doctor is transported back in time after an accident on Ghost Festival, finding herself buried alive as a sacrificial bride to a dead prince.

EXT. STREET - NIGHT

SUPER: Year 2023, Ghost Festival

Paper money ashes swirl through the air. Flames gutter from small offering bowls.

WEI ZIXUAN (28, exhausted but sharp) walks while on the phone, medical bag slung over her shoulder.

WEI ZIXUAN
(on phone)
Patient's stable. Finally.

Her foot steps on something. She looks down: a red envelope. Picks it up.

Inside: a silver bracelet, a lock of hair, a note reading "Happy Marriage."

WEI ZIXUAN
(smiling faintly)
Someone's superstition...

An OLD WOMAN materializes from the smoke.

OLD WOMAN
...will cost you dearly.

WEI ZIXUAN
We don't do arranged marriages anymore, auntie.

She pockets the bracelet, turns—slips. Headlights BLAZE. A car HORN SCREAMS.

Impact. She hits the pavement. The bracelet lands beside her, glowing with unnatural green light.

WEI ZIXUAN
(whispering)
Not... a ghost...

The world SPINS into a vortex of light and shadow.
continuation:
INT. INSIDE COFFIN - NIGHT

WEI ZIXUAN's eyes snap open. Red silk wedding robes. A phoenix crown digging into her scalp. Cramped darkness.

She gasps, choking on stale air. Her hands explore the wooden inches above her face.

WEI ZIXUAN
(voice cracking)
No... not a dream...

Her fingers touch something cold beside her. A man's hand. Green light pulses from his palm—luminous pearl.

She recoils, muffling a scream. Her fists pound the lid.

WEI ZIXUAN
(strangled)
Help! Someone—!

INT. PRINCE JING'S MANOR MOURNING HALL - NIGHT

The coffin dominates the room. White candles drip wax. Two spirit tablets: "Wei Zixuan" and "Li Jing."

EXT. WEI MANOR - DAY (FLASHBACK)

The IMPERIAL ASTRONOMER reads from a jade scroll. The Wei family kowtows.

IMPERIAL ASTRONOMER
The Wei second daughter bears the Phoenix Mark. She shall ascend with Prince Jing in death, ensuring the dynasty's fortune.

WEI ZHENG (50s, calculating) hides a smile.

EXT. WEI MANOR COURTYARD - DAY (FLASHBACK)

Snow falls like ash.

BAI AN (40s, elegant cruelty) holds a drug vial. Beside her, YOUNG WEI ZIXUAN (10) watches her own mother collapse in the snow.

YOUNG WEI ZIXUAN
Mother!

BAI AN
(to the unconscious woman)
Your daughter's destiny belongs to my Shu-lan now.

INT. WEI MANOR KITCHEN - DAY (FLASHBACK)

TEENAGE WEI ZIXUAN (16) crawls, dish of scraps pushed toward her. WEI SHULAN (18) grabs her hair.

WEI SHULAN
Smile, little fool. You're going to be a princess.

She forces a bitter potion down Zixuan's throat. Zixuan convulses.

INT. INSIDE COFFIN - NIGHT

Memories crash like waves. Wei Zixuan clutches her head, breathing ragged.

WEI ZIXUAN
(voice trembling)
Phoenix destiny... mine?

She pounds again, weaker now.

INT. PRINCE JING'S MANOR MOURNING HALL - NIGHT

WEI SHULAN (20, radiant in mourning white) hears the thumping. She places her palm on the coffin.

WEI SHULAN
(softly)
Stop fighting, sister. The bracelet chose you. But the phoenix destiny... that was always mine.

She drapes a white silk cloth over the coffin—sealing it.

INT. INSIDE COFFIN - NIGHT

The thumping stops. Darkness presses in. Then—

WEI ZIXUAN's fingers find the silver bracelet on her wrist. It glows faintly. Her hand trembles, then steadies.

She begins feeling the coffin seams, searching methodically. A doctor's fingers, trained for emergencies.

Silence. Focus. Survival.

FADE OUT.

title: Back to Ancient Times as a Waiter
description: A modern man wakes up in ancient China after an accident on a film set, finding himself in a new family with a confusing identity.
context:
Title: Back to Ancient Times as a Waiter
Description: A modern man wakes up in ancient China after an accident on a film set, finding himself in a new family with a confusing identity.

INT. ANCIENT ROOM - DAY

Close-up of HUA MENGYAN's eyes as they slowly open.

The camera cuts to reveal the room's antique decor, with an ornate carved window open.

HUA SANNIANG leans over him, worried.

HUA SANNIANG
Mengyan? Thank heavens you're awake.

EXT. MODERN FILM SET - NIGHT

The DIRECTOR speaks into a microphone to the crew.

DIRECTOR
This is our premium production. Act like professionals.

A CREW MEMBER carries a long ladder past.

CREW MEMBER
Heads up! Coming through!

The ladder clips a light stand.

CREW MEMBER
(impatiently)
Watch where you're standing!

The light fixture falls toward HUA MENGYAN (modern clothes, server's apron) and a GLASSES-WEARING AD. Both are dressed in modern clothes, looking up in horror.

It crashes down.
continuation:
INT. ANCIENT ROOM - DAY

HUA MENGYAN (ancient costume) sits in a chair as HUA SANNIANG wipes his face with a handkerchief.

HUA MENGYAN looks around in confusion.

HUA MENGYAN
Where... where is this place?

HUA SANNIANG
(distressed)
You fell, child. The physician fears memory loss. Don't you know me?

HUA MENGYAN
(confused)
I don't... I don't know you.

HUA SANNIANG
(internal monologue)
Could he have forgotten his purpose?

HUA SANNIANG
(flustered)
If I am not your mother, then who would be?

HUA SIJIN enters with medicine.

HUA SIJIN
Brother is awake?

HUA SANNIANG
(relieved)
He remembers nothing of the Silver Pavilion.

HUA SIJIN
Mother, there's something I've never understood. You only gave birth to me and my brother, so why do people call you Third Mother?

HUA SANNIANG
(matter-of-factly)
I am the third daughter. The staff called me Third Mother as a girl. It stuck.

HUA MENGYAN
(turning to HUA SIJIN)
Sister--what do they call me? At the restaurant?

HUA SIJIN
Mengyan. The Dreamer.

HUA MENGYAN stares at his calloused hands. A waiter's hands.

ON SCREEN: TO BE CONTINUED

title: I Love You, I'm Guilty
description: A woman suffers abuse and false accusations from a man who refuses to believe her innocence.
context:
Title: I Love You, I'm Guilty
Description: A woman suffers abuse and false accusations from a man who refuses to believe her innocence.

INT. ROOM - DAY

TANG XIAOYAN lies on the floor, clutching a torn PHOTOGRAPH, her eyes hollow with exhaustion beneath the sorrow. AN OLD MAN leans down close to her, his fury edged by desperation.

OLD MAN
Go on. Tell them how you smile for those cameras while you sell our family's shame for your apartment. That's my son in those pictures. Your husband. While I paid for your law degree.

A tear rolls down TANG XIAOYAN's cheek.

The OLD MAN stands up, straightening his clothes.
continuation:
TANG XIAOYAN slowly sits up, adjusting her own clothes.

OLD MAN
(contemptuously)
You think you're better than us. But you're just like your mother. Taking what doesn't belong to you.

TANG XIAOYAN stands up, looking at the OLD MAN with emotional intensity.

TANG XIAOYAN
(quietly)
I loved him. And I loved you. That's why I'm guilty.

The OLD MAN's expression turns furious. He steps forward and slaps TANG XIAOYAN hard across the face.

title: The Hidden Dragon
description: In accordance with the ancient Liu family tradition, whoever can pull the divine sword from its stone shall become the family's son-in-law and inherit its power.
context:
Title: The Hidden Dragon
Description: In accordance with the ancient Liu family tradition, whoever can pull the divine sword from its stone shall become the family's son-in-law and inherit its power.

EXT. LIU FAMILY ANCESTRAL HALL - DAY

A grand aerial shot reveals a magnificent complex of classical Chinese architecture nestled in the mountains.

NARRATOR (V.O.)
According to ancient Liu family tradition, whoever pulls the divine sword shall become the Liu family's son-in-law and wield the family's power.

The camera cuts to the massive plaza in front of the ancestral hall. At its center, a divine sword locked with iron chains stands embedded in a stone pedestal. Many people gather around the plaza.

A chubby man in white training clothes steps forward.

CHUBBY MAN
Let me try first!

The chubby man takes a running start, leaps toward the divine sword, and grabs the hilt with both hands, pulling with all his might. A powerful burst of blue energy erupts, sending him flying backward. He crashes heavily to the ground, coughing up blood.

ZHOU LING, a sharp-tongued young woman in a white suit jacket, stands beside LIU PIAOXUE, who sits in a wheelchair, her face pale but eyes determined.

ZHOU LING
Another challenger falls. How many more must we watch die?

A young man named JIANG FENG, wearing a blue water delivery vest and carrying a water jug, walks up the steps. He pauses, seeing the scene, then approaches LIU PIAOXUE.

JIANG FENG
Miss Liu? Your Longquan water delivery.

ZHOU LING
(suspiciously)
We're in the middle of a sacred trial. Leave it and go.

LIU PIAOXUE
(weakly, but politely)
Thank you. Just leave it there.

JIANG FENG sets the jug down, but his gaze lingers on the sword. He speaks softly, almost to himself.

JIANG FENG
The Azure Dragon Seal... still bound after all these years.

ZHOU LING
(overhearing, angry)
What did you say? A delivery man dares to speak of our ancestral sword? In three days, 1,876 challengers have tried. Not one has even touched the hilt and lived.

LIU PIAOXUE
(to Zhou Ling, voice trembling)
If the sword doesn't accept a master soon... my cultivation illness will claim me before the month's end.

LIU PIAOXUE coughs violently, a silk handkerchief coming away with crimson spots.

LIU FAMILY STEWARD
(reciting, voice echoing)
"A three-foot blade that split the heavens, yet none perceive the immortal within."

An elderly man with white hair and beard, FANG WENDAO, appears in immortal-like robes, surrounded by a cluster of flying swords that hum with power.

ZHOU LING
(astonished)
Supreme Sword Saint Fang Wendao!

LIU PIAOXUE
(low voice)
The only grandmaster to comprehend sword intent... they say he commands thirty-three spiritual blades.

FANG WENDAO
(arrogantly)
Little steward, you quote the prophecy well. Perhaps today, it finally speaks of me.

LIU PIAOXUE
(frustrated)
The sword chooses its master. It cannot be forced!

FANG WENDAO
Everything in this world yields to power. Once I claim this blade, the Liu family legacy will be in expert hands.

FANG WENDAO ascends toward the divine sword, his robes billowing.

LIU PIAOXUE
(whispering to Zhou Ling)
He's over seventy... if he succeeds, my fate...

FANG WENDAO hovers above the divine sword, forming hand seals. Red energy swirls violently around him as he attempts to wrest the sword from the stone.

FANG WENDAO
(shouting)
Yield to me!
continuation:
The divine sword erupts with blinding blue energy, the force sending everyone in the plaza staggering backward. FANG WENDAO is hurled down, crashing to the stones, unconscious, blood at his lips.

ZHOU LING
(stunned)
Even the Sword Saint... could the family head be right? That only one with a true dragon's destiny—

JIANG FENG
(quietly, to himself)
Destiny... or perhaps something the sword has waited for.

ZHOU LING
(wheeling on him)
You! Still here? If you think you're so special, why don't you try?

LIU PIAOXUE
(urgently)
No! The sword's spirit is too volatile. Even touching it without invitation could—

JIANG FENG
(meeting her eyes)
Miss Liu, do you want to live?

LIU PIAOXUE
(frozen, then whispers)
More than anything.

JIANG FENG
Then trust the sword's judgment.

JIANG FENG walks toward the divine sword. LIU PIAOXUE reaches for him but stops mid-gesture.

JIANG FENG
(confidently)
A Sword Saint's pride blinded him. I see the sword for what it is.

JIANG FENG shakes off LIU PIAOXUE's hand, walks to the divine sword, and pulls out a folding ladder from behind him, setting it up. The sword's fierce energy has quieted to a soft hum.

LIU FAMILY STEWARD
(mockingly)
All that big talk, and he's climbing up with a ladder.

FANG WENDAO
(lying on the ground, weakly)
Utter foolishness! The sword's spirit is merely recharging after rejecting me. It will destroy him!

LIU PIAOXUE
(anxiously, to Zhou Ling)
Quick, pull him back, or he'll die!

JIANG FENG climbs the ladder and reaches out to touch the divine sword. The sword emits a brilliant blue light—but instead of an attack, it pulses with recognition.

FANG WENDAO
(struggling to lift his head)
What... why doesn't it strike him?

LIU PIAOXUE
(shocked, realization dawning)
It accepts him...

JIANG FENG grips the hilt, his voice calm but firm.

JIANG FENG
You were waiting for someone who didn't want to use you.

He pulls upward with steady force. The divine sword slowly emerges from the stone pedestal, its chains dissolving into light.

ZHOU LING
(whisper)
It didn't fight him...

LIU PIAOXUE
(tears in her eyes)
It recognized its true master.

The sword hums in Jiang Feng's hand, its light reflecting in his calm eyes.

FANG WENDAO
(barely conscious)
Who... are you...

JIANG FENG looks at the old master, then at Liu Piaoxue, and finally at the sword.

JIANG FENG
Just a man who delivers what is needed.

He turns toward LIU PIAOXUE, sword in hand, as the blue light begins to envelop her wheelchair.

FADE OUT.

title: I'm Really Not the God of War
description: A man selling lingerie on the street is mistaken for a legendary warrior called Dragon Lord by assassins and warriors who come to kill or protect him.
context:
Title: I'm Really Not the God of War
Description: A man selling lingerie on the street is mistaken for a legendary warrior called Dragon Lord by assassins and warriors who come to kill or protect him.

INT. CITY STREET - NIGHT

A motorcycle tears through neon-lit streets, weaving through traffic. BLACK ROSE brings it to a screeching halt, removes her helmet—her eyes sharp enough to cut glass.

ON SCREEN: BLACK ROSE - ASSASSIN

EXT. CITY PLAZA - NIGHT

LI XIAOFAN scrambles behind a makeshift stall, rearranging silk and lace under flickering streetlights.

LI XIAOFAN
(shouting)
Last chance! Factory boss eloped with the accountant—entire inventory must go! Luxury lingerie, street-side prices!

A young woman quickens her pace, shielding her face.

LI XIAOFAN
(approaching)
Miss, wait—genuine French lace, never worn!

PASSERBY WOMAN
(disgusted)
Creep!

She hurries away. Li Xiaofan sags, counting loose change in his palm.

BLACK ROSE approaches, sword hilt visible at her back. Li Xiaofan's face lights up.

LI XIAOFAN
Miss! Perfect timing—I've got pieces that'd make a warrior feel like royalty.

LI XIAOFAN holds up midnight-black lace.

LI XIAOFAN
This one's called "Dragon's Whisper." Honestly, you...

BLACK ROSE
You don't recognize me. Of course you don't.

LI XIAOFAN
Should I? Wait—did we match on FriendFinder?

BLACK ROSE
The Heartbreak Powder was supposed to erase your memories, not your dignity.

She draws her sword. The blade sings as it clears the sheath.

LI XIAOFAN
Easy! No commission is worth this—

BLACK ROSE
Don't play the fool. Even without your powers, you're still the man who burned three empires to ash.

She strikes. Li Xiaofan stumbles backward, tripping over his own merchandise.

LI XIAOFAN
Okay, okay—it's a prank! Very funny. Where's the director? That's real steel!
continuation:
BLACK ROSE
It's also real blood you'll be bleeding.

She lunges. Li Xiaofan rolls aside, a silk camisole tangled around his wrist.

LI XIAOFAN
Alright, that's it! I warned you!

He whips the silk upward—it catches the blade, deflecting it inches from his throat. In the same motion, he traps her wrist against the stall's frame.

LI XIAOFAN
(panting)
Not so fun when the prop fights back, huh?

He releases her. Black Rose stares at her own hand like it's betrayed her.

BLACK ROSE
That technique... you taught it to me.

LI XIAOFAN
Lady, I can barely teach myself to file taxes.

BLACK ROSE
Then why spare me?

LI XIAOFAN
You dropped this.

He kicks her fallen sword toward her boot.

LI XIAOFAN
Also, I'm pretty sure murder voids my vendor's license.

Black Rose picks up the blade, studying his face for something that isn't there. She mounts her bike.

LI XIAOFAN
And hey—if you're not busy Friday, I've got a trunk of "Warrior Princess" sets arriving!

BLACK ROSE
(quietly)
You really don't remember.

She roars away. Li Xiaofan exhales, wiping sweat onto his sales apron.

EXT. CITY PLAZA - NIGHT

A black SUV skids to a halt, doors flying open. QING LING emerges in white combat silks, face veiled. RED DUST follows, crimson hair catching the neon.

ON SCREEN: QING LING - FIVE-STAR FEMALE GENERAL
ON SCREEN: RED DUST - QING LING'S DEPUTY

LI XIAOFAN is on all fours, gathering scattered inventory. The two women kneel, offering their weapons palms-up.

QING LING
We lost the signal. Forgive our delay, my Lord.

LI XIAOFAN looks up, a red thong dangling from his fingers.

FADE OUT.

title: Fall from Grace
description: A loyal celestial general is falsely accused and executed, while his sister is stripped of her immortal bone and banished to the mortal realm.
context:
Title: Fall from Grace
Description: A loyal celestial general is falsely accused and executed, while his sister is stripped of her immortal bone and banished to the mortal realm.

INT. HEAVENLY PALACE - DAY

The Heavenly Palace shrouded in clouds and mist. Celestial beings gather together, their robes catching the aurora light.

IMMORTAL A (V.O.)
Nine Heavens Mystic Art, reveal all truths...

IMMORTAL B (V.O.)
Nine Heavens Mystic Art, obey my command.

FAIRY
General Vermillion Bird has cleansed the Northern Wastelands and returned the Demon Clan's ancestral seal. The Realm itself owes him debt!

XUANNIAO CLAN LEADER
(laughing heartily, yet weary)
Three generations of blood-soaked feathers... When the Heavens call, we answer. Even when the Heavens forget why they called.

HEAVENLY EMPEROR'S ENVOY
The Heavenly Emperor's Envoy, Lady Yao Ji arrives! All bow!

Lady Yao Ji, dressed in magnificent robes, walks forward with a scroll case that bleeds darkness.

CROWD
We welcome Lady Yao Ji.

LADY YAO JI
Nan Tian of the Xuanniao, kneel for judgment.

Heavenly soldiers step forward and grab NAN TIAN—golden chains materializing around his wrists.

FAIRY RUO LI
(shocked, stepping between them)
Lady Yao Ji! My brother bears the Emperor's own Phoenix Seal. He stood against the Demon King's blade when—

LADY YAO JI
continuation:
—when he learned their blade could cut both ways. The Nine Heavens Mystic Art caught him drafting new celestial laws. With demon script.

She unfurls the scroll. The characters writhe like black serpents.

FAIRY RUO LI
That's impossible! The Xuanniao cannot even read—

LADY YAO JI
Say another word, and you confess by association. Your clan's loyalty is precisely what makes his betrayal so poisonous.

FAIRY RUO LI
(kneeling, desperate)
Then let the Emperor himself wield the Thunder! Let him look in my brother's eyes when—

HEAVENLY EMPEROR'S ENVOY
The Emperor has looked. And wept. Do it.

Heavenly lightning—purple and sentient—descends from above and strikes NAN TIAN.

NAN TIAN
(screaming, his voice splintering into echoes)
Ruo Li—fly! The cage is the—!

Nan Tian turns to ash in the lightning, his Phoenix Seal shattering. Fairy Ruo Li watches in agony and collapses to the ground.

A MASKED FIGURE in black detaches from Yao Ji's shadow.

MASKED FIGURE
(whispering to Ruo Li)
You were always the brighter flame. That's why they clipped your wings first.

The Masked Figure reaches out and extracts a glowing immortal bone from Fairy Ruo Li's body. The bone pulses with her lineage memory. Fairy Ruo Li falls in pain, her eyes locked on the ashes.

HEAVENLY EMPEROR'S ENVOY
(reading the decree, voice hollow)
By order of the Heavenly Emperor: Fairy Ruo Li, stripped of the Xuanniao immortal bone, cast to the mortal realm. Her name erased from the Jade Record. Let no one speak of her again.

Lady Yao Ji watches coldly as the Masked Figure grinds the immortal bone to dust. Fairy Ruo Li loses consciousness and falls from the clouds, her silhouette shrinking against the endless sky.

title: Record of Spirit Beasts - Nine-Tailed Fox King
description: A veterinary intern discovers his hidden lineage when three shape-shifting demons test him in a neon-lit alley, awakening powers he never knew he possessed.
context:
Title: Record of Spirit Beasts - Nine-Tailed Fox King
Description: A veterinary intern discovers his hidden lineage when three shape-shifting demons test him in a neon-lit alley, awakening powers he never knew he possessed.

INT. NEON ALLEY - NIGHT

A DRUNK MAN and a WOMAN IN RED kiss under pink neon lights.

LIN walks by with a medical satchel, glancing at the couple with clinical detachment.

The Woman opens her eyes. They glow GREEN. She transforms into a GIANT COBRA, striking the man. He collapses, paralyzed.

LIN
(whispering)
Neurotoxic venom... respiratory paralysis within minutes.

The Cobra turns to Lin, unhinging her jaw.

LIN
(stumbling back)
Running triggers pursuit reflex. Bad idea. Doing it anyway.

He sprints. The snake crashes through trash cans behind him.

Lin trips. The LEOPARD DEMON and PIG DEMON block his path.

LEOPARD DEMON
Sisi's shy. You ran, so now she chase.

LIN
(gasping)
That man needs intubation! Let me help him—

LEOPARD DEMON
(smiling)
Help is for the strong. Are you strong?

Her face SHIFTS into a LEOPARD MUZZLE, eyes burning YELLOW.

LEOPARD DEMON
Prey should squeal. Why don't you?

SNAKE DEMON (SISI)
Appears behind him, humanoid with scales and forked tongue.

SNAKE DEMON (SISI)
You don't squeal. You diagnose. Unusual for a human.

LIN
How do you know my name?

PIG DEMON
Your blood stinks of old hunters. Fox King's line.

The Pig Demon steps forward, tusks glinting.

PIG DEMON
Time to see if you're worthy of the name.

LIN
(frantically searching his satchel)
Porcine metabolism... high sensitivity to anticholinergics...
continuation:
He flings WHITE POWDER. The Pig Demon inhales, staggers, snout appearing.

PIG DEMON
(slurred, furious)
You... drugged me?

LEOPARD DEMON
(eyes widening)
The mark! He's awakening!

Lin's sleeve burns away, revealing a GLOWING NINE-TAILED FOX TATTOO on his forearm.

SNAKE DEMON (SISI)
(bowing her head slightly)
The King returns. Our test is complete.

NINE CRIMSON TAILS of spectral light manifest around Lin.

LIN
(staring at his hands)
What... what am I?

SNAKE DEMON (SISI)
The hunter we were sworn to serve. The treaty is broken.

The demons VANISH in swirling smoke.

Lin kneels by the unconscious man. The venom visibly withdraws from the man's veins.

Lin's eyes glow AMBER with slit pupils. He stands, tails flickering.

A TINY FOX SPIRIT emerges from his satchel.

FOX SPIRIT
(squeaky voice)
Finally awake, lazy heir. Can we get dumplings now?

LIN
(whispering)
What just happened?

FOX SPIRIT
You passed the test. Welcome to the hunt, King.

Lin looks down the neon alley, seeing ghostly spirits among the crowd. He squares his shoulders.

LIN
I don't understand my powers.

FOX SPIRIT
Then let's hunt. Starting with dinner?

LIN
(smiling despite himself)
After I save this man.

Lin's tails fade as he pulls out a syringe, his hands steady now.

FOX SPIRIT
(sighs)
So responsible. Just like your grandmother.

The city pulses with hidden life. Lin works, the first true Fox King in a century.

title: Peerless War God
description: A legendary military commander is falsely accused of treason by a corrupt official and a traitor, forcing him to make an impossible choice between his honor and his army.
context:
Title: Peerless War God
Description: A legendary military commander is falsely accused of treason by a corrupt official and a traitor, forcing him to make an impossible choice between his honor and his army.

INT. WAR ROOM - DAY

LIE LANG stands before a sand table, flanked by two armed GUARDS. A sealed imperial dispatch rests beside the maps.

LIE LANG
Deploy one hundred thousand troops through the western passes. Phi Nation's forces await our signal. When they strike, Great Xia's defenses will shatter.

INT. CORRIDOR - DAY

XIAO POTIAN blocks LIE LANG's path.

XIAO POTIAN
Commander Lie. Your men march without my authority. Explain yourself.

LIE LANG
Explain treason, Marshal? I've already sent my report. You've been secretly negotiating with Phi Nation's War God.

XIAO POTIAN
Fifteen years I've held this border.

LIE LANG
Fifteen years you prepared your betrayal. The evidence waits inside. Surrender, and you might keep your head.

XIAO POTIAN
Show me this evidence—or lose yours.

The GUARDS attack. XIAO POTIAN strikes—three movements, impossibly fast. Both men are disarmed, and LIE LANG stumbles back against the wall.

XIAO POTIAN
From now on, any man who questions my loyalty answers to my blade.

LI FENG appears, imperial edict in hand.

LI FENG
Rebel Xiao Potian, traitor to the nation, turning against heaven itself. Kneel and receive the imperial edict!

LIE LANG
(struggling to his feet)
Vice Minister Li! He discovered I had proof of his Phi Nation correspondence—he tried to murder me to suppress it!

XIAO POTIAN
(to LI FENG)
Li Feng, you accuse me of treason. Do you have evidence?
continuation:
LI FENG
Evidence? The sovereign's decree is the evidence.

LI FENG unfolds the edict. XIAO POTIAN is shocked after reading it.

XIAO POTIAN
Impossible! Li Feng, you've set me up!

LI FENG
How dare you! The evidence is right before you, and you still dare to argue?

XIAO POTIAN
I enlisted at fifteen to defend our borders. At twenty, I led three hundred soldiers against the Eagle Nation's eight War Gods. At twenty-two, I crushed four allied armies at Red River Ford. I am the Tiger Marshal, appointed by the sovereign himself. If you would convict me, have him speak the words to my face.

LI FENG
A condemned traitor doesn't demand audiences. Consider your million soldiers, Marshal. If you resist, they'll die as conspirators. Their families will starve in the mines. Is that your legacy?

XIAO POTIAN
My men are innocent.

LI FENG
Then kneel. Accept the investigation.

As XIAO POTIAN's eyes drop to the edict, LIE LANG produces a hidden dagger from his boot.

LIE LANG
(viciously)
Die, traitor!

He stabs downward. XIAO POTIAN twists, the blade scoring his shoulder. He seizes LIE LANG'S wrist and forces the blade back.

XIAO POTIAN
(roaring)
Great Xia's safety is my only line! Those who cross it find death!

He drives the dagger through LIE LANG'S throat.

XIAO POTIAN rises, blood streaming from his shoulder, and faces LI FENG.

LI FENG
You dare defy the imperial edict?

XIAO POTIAN
My loyalty was never to seals or decrees. It was to the soldiers who bleed for this land. You can kill me, Li Feng, but you cannot kill what I protected. From this day, I sever the chain that bound my honor to your corruption.

XIAO POTIAN drops his sword. It rings against the stone.

title: Red Eyes, Golden Pupils
description: After his family is massacred and his father killed, Wang Hao inherits the Divine Master Ring and vows revenge against the traitor Qin Ao.
context:
Title: Red Eyes, Golden Pupils
Description: After his family is massacred and his father killed, Wang Hao inherits the Divine Master Ring and vows revenge against the traitor Qin Ao.

EXT. VILLA COURTYARD - NIGHT

Rain lashes the courtyard. Torchlight flickers across wet stone as BLACK-CLAD ASSASSINS cut down fleeing SERVANTS. Blood pools at the base of guardian lion statues. A cold wind carries the stench of iron.

A MAN IN BLACK silences WANG HAO'S MOTHER with a swift, professional cut. She falls without a sound.

QIN AO (50s), bald, beads clicking in his grip, watches from the veranda. Not with glee—with grim necessity.

QIN AO
(quietly)
Find the Master. Not the ring. The man.

SUBORDINATE
(bowing)
The family wing is clear. Only the old basement remains.

QIN AO
He won't hide. Not from me.

Qin Ao steps over a fallen guard, his robes untouched by blood.

QIN AO (CONT'D)
Burn it. Let the past turn to ash.

Torches arc through the rain. Smoke billows as fire devours the wooden eaves.

INT. BASEMENT - NIGHT

WANG YUANSHAN (50s), pale from poison, presses an ornate ring into his son WANG HAO's palm. The younger man's scholar's hands tremble.

WANG YUANSHAN
You were never meant for this path. The academy... your books...

WANG HAO
(whisper)
We can still leave. Together.

WANG YUANSHAN
This was your brother's burden. Now it's yours.

WANG HAO
(choked)
It's just metal. Brother is dead. Mother—

WANG YUANSHAN
Metal that holds a million souls. Qin Ao thinks he wants it. He doesn't understand the weight.

Footsteps pound overhead. Dust showers from the beams.

WANG YUANSHAN (CONT'D)
The tunnel behind the wine racks. It leads to the old well.

WANG HAO
Not without you.

WANG YUANSHAN
I've been dead for three years, Hao'er. Since the day they poisoned me. Today, I'm just making it official.

WANG HAO
(tears falling)
You promised to see me graduate.

WANG YUANSHAN
And you promised never to draw a blade. We both lied.

He shoves Wang Hao toward the hidden entrance.

WANG YUANSHAN (CONT'D)
Remember: the ring commands nothing. You command it.
continuation:
EXT. VILLA COURTYARD - NIGHT

Wang Hao emerges from the well, mud-soaked. The villa blazes, but rain contains the worst.

Through the flames, he sees his father in the basement doorway—upright, defiant.

WANG HAO
(scream swallowed by thunder)
FATHER!

WANG YUANSHAN (V.O.)
Don't seek revenge. Seek justice. Or become what he is.

The villa collapses inward. Sparks spiral into the storm.

EXT. VILLA COURTYARD - NIGHT

Wang Hao kneels before his father's scorched body in the smoking ruins. The ring rests in his palm—cold metal, no magic.

WANG HAO
(voice raw)
Justice. Or become what he is.

He slips the ring on. Nothing happens. No glow. Just weight.

WANG HAO (CONT'D)
Qin Ao. I'm coming. Not for Cloud Heaven Hall. For the man you burned. And the one you made me become.

A wave of dizziness hits. The smoke... the grief... Wang Hao's vision blurs. For a moment, the ring seems to pulse with heat.

His eyes sting. Tears? No—something else. A golden shimmer reflects in a puddle before him. In it, he sees his own eyes: bloodshot red, pupils flecked with gold.

Not a power. Not magic. Just the look of a man who's lost everything—and found something harder in its place.

WANG HAO (CONT'D)
(whisper)
This is what you wanted, Qin Ao? Then come and see what you've created.

The golden flecks fade, but the hardness remains. The ring is just metal. The transformation is his alone.

title: The Husband's Betrayal
description: A woman disguises herself as a bunny girl waitress to catch evidence of her husband's affair with his returning first love at a KTV.
context:
Title: The Husband's Betrayal
Description: A woman disguises herself as a bunny girl waitress to catch evidence of her husband's affair with his returning first love at a KTV.

INT. KTV HALLWAY - NIGHT

SANG WANYI, dressed in a bunny girl waitress uniform and wearing a mask, walks through the neon-lit hallway carrying a tray of drinks.

SANG WANYI (V.O.)
Third club tonight. In this uniform, I'm invisible. That's the point.

SANG WANYI walks to a private room door and pushes it open.

INT. KTV PRIVATE ROOM - NIGHT

The room pulses with purple strobe lights. LU LINYUAN sits rigid on the sofa as SU ENYUE drapes herself across his shoulder. FEMALE FRIEND and FRIEND sway nearby.

SU ENYUE
(cooing)
Be honest. When you saw her at that gallery, did you think "close enough"? Or was it always about the insurance clause?

FRIEND
(slurred)
Man's gotta diversify.

FEMALE FRIEND
(to Sang Wanyi)
Refills.

SANG WANYI approaches, face angled from the light. She pours steadily.

SU ENYUE
(teasing)
Three rounds, Brother Linyuan. Truth or consequences?

LU LINYUAN
Consequences.

SU ENYUE
Then text her. "We need to talk about the prenup."

SANG WANYI (V.O.)
The prenup I signed while he held my hand.
continuation:
SANG WANYI's apron pocket buzzes. She doesn't react.

LU LINYUAN
(typing)
Done.

SU ENYUE
(pouting)
You're no fun. How about a real penalty? One photo.

SANG WANYI pivots, pretends to adjust a speaker, snaps a burst. The flash reflects off a mirrored wall—brief, disguised.

FRIEND
(squinting)
Did you—

SANG WANYI drops the tray. Glass shatters. She bolts.

FEMALE FRIEND
(yelling)
Get her!

INT. KTV RESTROOM - NIGHT

SANG WANYI locks herself in a stall, screenshooting the message: "We need to talk about the prenup."

INT. KTV MAIN HALL - NIGHT

SANG WANYI walks out from the restroom area. A hand catches her elbow. LU LINYUAN.

LU LINYUAN
(quietly)
Sloppy. For a lawyer.

SANG WANYI
(beat)
You saw.

LU LINYUAN
Reflection. In the champagne bucket.

SANG WANYI (V.O.)
Game over. Or just beginning?

title: Reborn After Being Kicked Out by My Daughter
description: A dying man filled with regret is given a second chance when he is reborn back to 1998, the day his gambling addiction began to destroy his family.
context:
Title: Reborn After Being Kicked Out by My Daughter
Description: A dying man filled with regret is given a second chance when he is reborn back to 1998, the day his gambling addiction began to destroy his family.

INT. BEDROOM - NIGHT

XIA DONG (60s), frail beneath an oxygen mask, lies on the floor where he's been dumped from the hospital bed. IV tubes dangle from his arms, dripping onto the hardwood.

In the bed above him, ZHOU YING (50s) watches with dead eyes. BOSS HUANG (40s), sleek in designer suit, adjusts his cufflinks with a smirk.

BOSS HUANG
(whispering)
Your husband's still breathing down there. And you called me anyway.

ZHOU YING
(sweet poison)
Breathing isn't living. Not for years. Why let his pride suffer when I can have what I need?

She trails a finger down Boss Huang's chest.

BOSS HUANG
(low laugh)
Practical woman.

XIA DONG
(strangled wheeze)
Bitch... bitch...

XIA DONG (V.O.)
I let this serpent coil around my life. For what? For this?

Xia Dong convulses. Blood sprays the inside of his oxygen mask. His body goes limp.

BOSS HUANG
(alarmed)
Is he...?

ZHOU YING
(calmly)
Dead? Finally. No more bills. No more witnesses.

BOSS HUANG
The daughter--

ZHOU YING
--will sign whatever I give her. She hates him more than we do.
continuation:
EXT. VILLA LAWN - NIGHT

Xia Dong's body lies in the grass where it was dragged, IV ripped out. He stirs, consciousness flickering back.

Through blurred vision, he sees RUO RUO (30s) standing at a distance, arms crossed, face stone.

XIA DONG
(rasping)
Ruo Ruo... I'm sorry... your mother... please...

He coughs wetly.

RUO RUO
(quiet, brutal)
You want to lie beside Mom? You stole her morphine money. She died screaming, counting pills. One. At. A. Time.

She takes a step closer, her shadow falling over him.

RUO RUO
I was twelve. Three days without food. Mrs. Chen was cooking pork next door. I looked. You beat me until I couldn't stand. Remember?

XIA DONG
(trembling)
I remember... every... day...

RUO RUO
Then remember this: You're not my father. You're the man who killed my mother for poker chips.

She turns away. He reaches for her, fingers scraping dirt.

XIA DONG (V.O.)
One chance. That's all I need. Just one.

EXT. WILDERNESS - DAY

Xia Dong lies in a ditch off a dirt road, flies already gathering. A car engine fades in the distance.

Ruoruo stands above him, flanked by two MEN IN BLACK. She doesn't look at his face.

RUO RUO
No burial. No name on stone. You don't deserve to share her air.

She drops a shovel. It clatters beside him.

RUO RUO
The wolves can have what's left.

She walks away. The Men in Black follow. Xia Dong watches clouds drift overhead, each breath shallower.

XIA DONG (V.O.)
If I could take it back... every bet... every lie...

Wolf howls echo. Paws crunch on gravel. Two shadows lope into frame, circling.

CLOSE ON: Xia Dong's eyes. He doesn't blink.

INT. GAMBLING DEN - DAY

The stench of sweat and cheap cigarettes. A CROWD roars around a table.

GAMBLER
Big! Big! Big!

XIA DONG's eyes snap open. He's younger, stronger hands clenched on the table. The roar floods his ears.

He looks down. No tubes. No pain. Just sweat-soaked shirt and a fistful of crumpled bills.

XIA DONG (V.O.)
Dead. I was dead.

He stares at the faces around him: OLD LIU, fat and laughing; LI SANSHUI, toothless grin. He knows them. Knew them. Twenty-six years ago.

Xia Dong looks at his hands again. Young. Capable. The bet he hasn't placed yet. The future unwritten.

XIA DONG (V.O.)
Please... let this be real.

The dice rattle in the cup. The world holds its breath.

title: Thorns in a New Marriage
description: A woman wakes up after a mysterious night, finds herself pregnant, and is accused of infidelity by her husband's family, only to discover the truth may be far more complex.
context:
Title: Thorns in a New Marriage
Description: A woman wakes up after a mysterious night, finds herself pregnant, and is accused of infidelity by her husband's family, only to discover the truth may be far more complex.

INT. HOTEL ROOM - NIGHT

A luxury suite. MISS XIA struggles to focus. A man's SILHOUETTE pours champagne. Her vision swims. She reaches for him.

MISS XIA
(weakly)
He Cong...

She collapses back onto silk sheets.

TRANSITION: Six weeks later

INT. HOSPITAL CONSULTATION ROOM - DAY

MISS XIA clutches an ultrasound photo, knuckles white. DR. CHEN watches her.

MISS XIA
(to herself)
This can't be real...

DR. CHEN
Six weeks. The heartbeat is strong.

The door opens. AUNT HE enters, eyes locked on the ultrasound.

AUNT HE
(to Dr. Chen)
Give us privacy.

DR. CHEN exits. MISS XIA stands, defensive.

MISS XIA
Mom—

AUNT HE snatches the ultrasound, her face hardening.

AUNT HE
(quietly seething)
My son builds his empire. You build a lie.

AUNT HE shoves MISS XIA hard. MISS XIA stumbles, catches herself on the desk.

AUNT HE
(angrily pointing at her)
Five weeks in Berlin. Yet here you are. Disgrace.

MISS XIA
(looking up, tearful)
continuation:
I don't even remember...

The door opens. HE MEIMEI enters, designer suit, venom smile.

HE MEIMEI
(coldly)
Convenient. Brother Cong remembers his vows. Every single one.

HE MEIMEI
(arms crossed, mocking)
Marrying into the He family was your miracle. Aunt He was your blessing. And you? You couldn't wait.

MISS XIA
(voice breaking)
Something's wrong. That night—

AUNT HE
(furious)
Enough! Guards will escort you out. Take nothing.

AUNT HE drags MISS XIA toward the door.

EXT. STREET - DAY

Rain falls. MISS XIA stands outside, phone to her ear. The call disconnects.

PHONE VOICE (V.O.)
The number you have dialed is unavailable.

MISS XIA lowers the phone, clutching her stomach.

MISS XIA (V.O.)
If it wasn't He Cong... then who?

A black Mercedes pulls up. The DRIVER holds an umbrella.

DRIVER
Miss Xia. Mr. Song is waiting.

MISS XIA
(warily)
I don't know any Mr. Song.

The door opens. MR. SONG (40, composed power) studies her.

MR. SONG
(with a slight smile)
Your child has answers.

MISS XIA stares, rainwater mixing with tears.

END SCENE

title: Dragon Suppressor
description: In 2043, a prison riot erupts as criminals attempt to free the infamous Evil Dragon General, but the new Dragon Lord arrives to restore order.
context:
Title: Dragon Suppressor
Description: In 2043, a prison riot erupts as criminals attempt to free the infamous Evil Dragon General, but the new Dragon Lord arrives to restore order.

INT. TIANHAI PRISON - DAY

ON SCREEN: July 1, 2043

The prison is in chaos, with inmates rioting. A muscular man (IRON HAMMER) in an orange prison uniform, wrapped in glowing chains, slams a guard through reinforced glass.

NARRATOR (V.O.)
Tianhai Prison, 2043. The Evil Dragon General awaits trial. His followers will reduce Great Xia to ash to free him. The guards have one hope left.

The guards are beaten back. A uniformed officer crashes to the ground, clutching his radio.

GUARD
(shouting)
Dragon Lord, we need you NOW!

The inmates surge forward. Suddenly, a man in a high-ranking military uniform (DRAGON LORD) enters, leaning on a carved cane. His eyes survey the chaos with cold precision.

A white-haired woman wearing a metal mask (WITCH) stands among the inmates, watching him.

WITCH
I didn't expect the new Dragon Lord to be a cripple.

DRAGON LORD
(leaning on his cane)
You're not leaving this block alive.

WITCH
The old Dragon Lord died standing. You'll die crawling.
continuation:
WITCH turns to IRON HAMMER.

WITCH
Kill him. Become a legend.

IRON HAMMER
(laughing loudly)
Ha ha ha!

IRON HAMMER lifts a massive iron ball, aiming at the DRAGON LORD.

IRON HAMMER
One swing. One corpse.
