IRON HAMMER throws the iron ball. The DRAGON LORD taps his cane—an energy shield appears, shattering the projectile. He taps again. A concussive wave slams IRON HAMMER into a wall, engulfing him in flames. WITCH and the inmates stare in shock.

INT. UNDERGROUND PARKING GARAGE - NIGHT

A woman in a black leather jacket (NANGONG LUOYUN) gets out of a car, holding documents marked "DIVORCE PAPERS—SHEN FENG."

NANGONG LUOYUN
(into phone)
Confirm the meeting. I want him gone by morning.

NANGONG LUOYUN looks at the papers, a contemptuous smile on her face.

NANGONG LUOYUN
Shen Feng. Three years, and you still can't even walk without that cane.

She walks toward the elevators, heels clicking against the concrete.

title: Guardian Saint
description: In 2045, mutated sea beasts attack China's coast after nuclear contamination. The legendary warrior Guan Tiance returns from seclusion to protect his homeland and clear his father's name, but must confront the true cost of the power that could save them all.
context:
Title: Guardian Saint
Description: In 2045, mutated sea beasts attack China's coast after nuclear contamination. The legendary warrior Guan Tiance returns from seclusion to protect his homeland and clear his father's name, but must confront the true cost of the power that could save them all.

INT. OFFICE - DAY

Classical rosewood furniture. A holographic screen flickers, showing aerial footage of devastation. Tea grows cold on the desk.

SUPER: October 16, 2045

On screen, mutated creatures tear through coastal defenses. Emergency alerts scroll.

NEWSCASTER (V.O.)
...third mutation event confirmed. These bioforms absorb and redirect energy weapons. The South China Sea coast is falling. Evacuation corridors collapsing...

JI YINGYING (50s, elegant, steel beneath silk) clutches a jade pendant, watching footage of soldiers dying. She taps a communicator, gets static. A sad, proud smile.

JI YINGYING
(whispering)
Don't be a hero, Tian. Just come home.

EXT. CITY ROOFTOP - DAY

A command spire. GENERAL JIU FENG (30s, scarred, dual swords) stands before three commanders: steady ZHUANG SHAN, fierce BING PO, and pragmatic MALE COMMANDER. Below, 360,000 troops hold energy pikes in a complex spiral formation—the Tiangang Array.

The BEAST KING (stories tall, chitinous plates pulsing with absorbed energy) roars. It's missing an eye—a fresh wound.

MALE COMMANDER
General, the array is holding, but it's learned. Every strike we land, it... remembers.

JIU FENG
It bleeds. We adapt faster. Zhuang Shan, signal the pivot. Po, harry its flank. We take the other eye.

Jiu Feng LEAPS. The formation channels energy through her blades as she carves a golden arc.

The Beast King SCREAMS, blinded. It staggers.

SOLDIER (O.S.)
The array works! It's vulnerable!

The creature's plates suddenly GLOW, redirecting the energy back outward in a shockwave. Troops fly backward. The formation shatters.

Zhuang Shan staggers up, armor cracked.

ZHUANG SHAN
It's using our own power against us...

The Beast King's wounds knit with sickening speed. It GROWS, towering larger, dorsal spines blazing blue-white. It inhales.

COMMUNICATOR VOICE (V.O.)
All units! Energy critical mass! Take cover!

JIU FENG
(shouting)
Disperse! NOW!

She hurls herself at the Beast King, trying to draw its fire. Too late.

The creature releases a cataclysmic energy wave. The explosion engulfs the army. Soldiers vaporize. The three commanders are hurled back, slamming into the spire, bleeding.

Jiu Feng crawls, one leg shattered, dragging her sword.

JIU FENG
(strangled)
The array... was our best. I'm sorry.

BING PO
(weakly)
We failed them...

MALE COMMANDER
(points skyward)
Movement! Something's breaking through the energy field!

In the sky, a meteor of black flame. GUAN TIANCE (late 20s, armor cracked, eyes hollow) descends on a blade wreathed in dark fire. He's not triumphant—he looks exhausted, haunted.

JIU FENG
(breathless)
continuation:
The Saint... but his seclusion was penance. If he uses that power again—

GUAN TIANCE
(hand outstretched)
Blade. Come.

His sword arrives. The Beast King locks onto him, sensing fresh power.

GUAN TIANCE
(to himself)
Father's name... or their lives. Can't have both.

He doesn't charge. He stands, sword planted, as the Beast King unleashes another energy wave—straight at him. He ABSORBS it. His armor cracks glow, burning his skin. He channels it back through the blade, but inverted, unstable.

GUAN TIANCE
(straining)
Jiu Feng! The weak point! Where you struck!

JIU FENG
The eye socket! But you'll burn out!

GUAN TIANCE
Already burning.

He LAUNCHES, a comet of inverted energy. The blade pierces the Beast King's blind socket. The creature's own power, reversed, unravels it from within. It collapses, disintegrating.

Guan Tiance falls, smashing into the rooftop. His flame dies. He doesn't move.

Bing Po stares, then rushes over.

BING PO
Gods... he didn't just kill it. He unmade it.

Jiu Feng crawls toward Guan Tiance's body.

JIU FENG
(dazed)
He traded his saint realm... for us.

VOICE (V.O.)
The Heavenly Decree arrives! Guan Tiance, receive the edict!

A golden scroll descends, hovering over Guan Tiance's unconscious form.

VOICE (V.O.)
Martial Saint Guan Tiance, your selfless act has preserved Great Xia. Rise as Guardian Saint of the Nation.

Guan Tiance's eyes snap open—but they're different now. Duller. The price is paid. He rises, swaying.

GUAN TIANCE
(voice rough)
I accept... the burden.

Jiu Feng and surviving soldiers kneel—fewer than before. Many gaps in their ranks.

JIU FENG
The Phoenix Battalion... what's left of us. We'll follow you south.

GUAN TIANCE
(shaking his head)
Not to fight. To rebuild. My father's name won't matter if there's no home left.

He summons his blade. The flame is weaker, sputtering. He steps onto it, unsteady.

GUAN TIANCE (V.O.)
Five years ago, I left my aunt Yingying to prove my father's innocence. Today I learned some truths cost more than others. Now I return... to see which truth she values more.

He flies toward the horizon, trailing smoke.

INT. OFFICE - DAY

Ji Yingying's communicator finally lights up. A single message: "It's done. Coming home."

She closes her eyes, tears falling.

JI YINGYING
(to the empty room)
Welcome back, nephew. Welcome back.

title: Mr. Cheng, Long Time No See
description: A young man introduces his fiancée to his family, unaware that she shares a mysterious past with his older brother.
context:
Title: Mr. Cheng, Long Time No See
Description: A young man introduces his fiancée to his family, unaware that she shares a mysterious past with his older brother.

INT. CHENG FAMILY LIVING ROOM - DAY

CHENG JUN'AN, JIANG YAN, and CHENG JUN'AN's PARENTS sit in silence. The tea between them has gone cold.

CHENG JUN'AN
Dad, Mom... Yanyan and I want to marry. Right after graduation.

CHENG HONGZHOU
You've made your decision, then.

CHENG JUN'AN
Yes.

JIANG YAN
(nodding)
Yes, sir.

MOTHER CHENG studies Jiang Yan's hands—clasped too tightly.

MOTHER CHENG
(to Jiang Yan)
You've had a difficult journey, child. We respect that.

CHENG JUN'AN
She'll have a family now. We'll have a family.

The door opens. CHENG JUNNIAN steps in, still in his overcoat.

CHENG JUNNIAN
Jun'an.

CHENG JUN'AN
(delighted)
Big Brother! You came.

CHENG JUN'AN embraces him. CHENG JUNNIAN's eyes find JIANG YAN over his brother's shoulder.

CHENG JUN'AN
continuation:
(to JIANG YAN)
Yanyan, this is my brother. Quick, say hello.

JIANG YAN
(standing)
Big Brother.

CHENG JUNNIAN
(very quiet)
...Jiang Yan.

CHENG JUN'AN
I told you about her, remember?

CHENG JUNNIAN doesn't answer. He simply stares, and something in his composure fractures for half a second.

EXT. CHENG FAMILY VILLA - DAY

CHENG JUNNIAN, CHENG JUN'AN, and JIANG YAN walk toward a black sedan.

CHENG JUN'AN
Brother, we can get back ourselves. Don't trouble yourself.

CHENG JUNNIAN
I'm heading that way.

CHENG JUNNIAN checks his pockets. Frowns.

CHENG JUNNIAN
My keys. Wait here.

CHENG JUN'AN
(to JIANG YAN)
I'll be right back.

CHENG JUN'AN jogs back inside. The gate clangs shut.

CHENG JUNNIAN turns to JIANG YAN. Winter air visible between them.

CHENG JUNNIAN
Tell me, Miss Jiang... was my brother part of your plan, or an accident?

title: Unexpected Assistant
description: Yu Sheng attends a job interview at Lu Jin's company, unaware that he is the man she tied up the night before. A confrontation with a rival leads to an unexpected turn of events.
context:
Title: Unexpected Assistant
Description: Yu Sheng attends a job interview at Lu Jin's company, unaware that he is the man she tied up the night before. A confrontation with a rival leads to an unexpected turn of events.

INT. HALLWAY - DAY

LU JIN and a BODYGUARD stand in front of the elevator.

BODYGUARD
Young Master, the woman in the video can't be identified. I've already destroyed it. Won't you go back and explain to the Master?

LU JIN stands expressionless, lost in thought. The BODYGUARD glances nervously toward the elevator door, rubbing his wrist where faint rope marks are visible.

INT. ELEVATOR - DAY

The elevator door opens. YU SHENG rushes in.

YU SHENG
(out of breath)
Sorry, I'm in a hurry for an interview.

LU JIN
It's fine.

YU SHENG looks up and sees LU JIN. She freezes, blood draining from her face.

YU SHENG (thinking)
Lu Jin? That psychopath I left tied up in a hotel bathtub last night... Oh god, why did he have to be here? And sober?

FLASHBACK:

LU JIN, shirtless, is tied up in a bathtub, struggling. A half-empty bottle of whiskey sits nearby. YU SHENG's hands shake as she ties the last knot, her face streaked with tears and anger.

END FLASHBACK.

YU SHENG (thinking)
He doesn't remember. Thank god. Or... wait. That might be worse.

LU JIN
You know me?

YU SHENG (thinking)
Wait. Is that... confusion? Or is he testing me?

YU SHENG
(forcing a smile)
Who doesn't know the famous Young Master Lu?

LU JIN
(frowning)
Young Master?

The elevator shakes slightly. LU JIN's expression darkens, his knuckles white against the handrail.

YU SHENG (thinking)
Why is he staring at me like that? Like he's trying to see through me. Keep it together. He was drunk, you were masked. There's no way.

The elevator door opens. YU SHENG exits.
continuation:
INT. COMPANY HALLWAY - DAY

YU SHENG walks into the office area and is immediately stopped by SU QIANQIAN, examining her nails with a smug expression.

SU QIANQIAN
Oh my, if it isn't Miss Yu? The Yu family has such a huge corporation, and with your family bankrupt without any connections, you still have to lower yourself to come for an interview?

YU SHENG
You're wrong. I'm here to sell cemetery plots. Miss Su, we have a connection, so I'll give you a twenty percent discount.

SU QIANQIAN
Yu Sheng, I'm the CEO's assistant. One phone call from me and you won't be able to find a job anywhere.

LU JIN walks out of his office, his eyes immediately finding Yu Sheng.

LU JIN
Who said you're my assistant?

SU QIANQIAN
(immediately switching to a gentle tone)
Brother Lu Jin, Uncle Lu sent me to be your assistant. Didn't he tell you?

LU JIN
(walking up to SU QIANQIAN)
What a coincidence.

LU JIN turns and walks toward YU SHENG, studying her face intently.

LU JIN
I already have an assistant.

LU JIN points at the stunned YU SHENG.

LU JIN
It's her.

A flash of light. YU SHENG stands frozen in place.

title: My Secret Marriage: The CEO's White Moonlight
description: Lin Tang prepares to meet her husband of two years for the first time, but fate has other plans.
context:
Title: My Secret Marriage: The CEO's White Moonlight
Description: Lin Tang prepares to meet her husband of two years for the first time, but fate has other plans.

INT. HOTEL HALLWAY - NIGHT

LIN TANG, elegant in a tailored suit, hesitates before a hotel suite door, fingers hovering near the handle.

LIN TANG (V.O.)
Two years of signatures on paper. A marriage in name only. And tonight, we become strangers no more...

LIN TANG steels herself, smoothing her jacket.

LIN TANG (V.O.)
Just be professional. You're here for the merger meeting, not a fairy tale. But what if he hates me on sight?

The door suddenly swings open. Strong hands pull her inside.

INT. HOTEL ROOM - CONTINUOUS

HUO BEICHENG, white shirt disheveled, grips LIN TANG's arm. His eyes are lucid but desperate.

LIN TANG
Mr. Huo—

HUO BEICHENG
Someone spiked my drink. I need help.

LIN TANG
Help?

Huo Beicheng
You're the doctor Su Zhenguo sent, aren't you?

Before Lin Tang can clarify, he stumbles forward. Instinctively, she catches him. Their eyes meet.

LIN TANG (V.O.)
He doesn't know. After all this time, he doesn't recognize his own wife.

She could push him away. Instead, she guides him toward the bed.

HUO BEICHENG
Stay. Please.

LIN TANG
You won't remember this tomorrow.

HUO BEICHENG
I'll remember you.

MONTAGE
- Lin Tang's fingers hesitantly brush his cheek
- The two embrace among scattered rose petals
- A single high heel falls silently from the bed
- Lin Tang's hand rests on his chest, a quiet choice
- Morning light filters through curtains
END MONTAGE
continuation:
INT. HOTEL ROOM - DAY

LIN TANG wakes beside HUO BEICHENG. His face is peaceful in sleep. She watches him, emotions warring across her features.

Her phone BUZZES. Caller ID: "Dad - Su Zhenguo."

DAD (V.O.)
Tangtang. Home. Now.

LIN TANG
(panicked whisper)
What did you do?

She silences the call. Huo Beicheng stirs. Grabbing her clothes, she flees. A distinctive red-soled heel remains on the carpet. Huo Beicheng's eyes open slowly. He touches the empty space beside him, then notices the shoe.

HUO BEICHENG
(softly)
Who are you?

INT. HOTEL ROOM - LATER

HUO BEICHENG, immaculate in a black suit, holds the shoe. SECRETARY ZHAO waits with a tablet.

HUO BEICHENG
Find the owner. Discreetly.

SECRETARY ZHAO
The car's waiting. Your grandmother insists you collect Mrs. Huo from the Su residence today.

HUO BEICHENG
The life-saving grace from two years ago. I've honored the contract. She hasn't.

He turns the shoe over in his hands, thoughtful.

HUO BEICHENG
The one who saved me last night—she left this behind. And something else.

SECRETARY ZHAO
Sir?

Huo Beicheng
A sense of... recognition.

He pockets the shoe.

HUO BEICHENG
To the Su family. Let's meet my wife.

FADE OUT.

title: Mrs. Fu Stops Pretending
description: Xu Qingcheng confronts the lecherous Mr. Ye at a KTV to negotiate a debt, but when he assaults her, she fights back and escapes into the arms of Fu Jingting.
context:
Title: Mrs. Fu Stops Pretending
Description: Xu Qingcheng confronts the lecherous Mr. Ye at a KTV to negotiate a debt, but when he assaults her, she fights back and escapes into the arms of Fu Jingting.

INT. KTV PRIVATE ROOM - NIGHT

Neon lights strobe. MR. YE, 50s, sleaze personified, lounges among giggling hostesses. The bass THUMPS through the walls.

The door swings open. XU QINGCHENG, late 20s, enters. Her posture is rigid, eyes like flint. She adjusts her cufflink with surgical precision—a tell, for those who know.

XU QINGCHENG
Mr. Ye. We need to discuss Shengshi's hundred-million debt.

MR. YE's grin curdles. He flicks two fingers—the women scatter, sensing violence.

MR. YE
The little negotiator. Drink first. Talk later.

He sloshes baijiu into a tumbler, the amber liquid slopping over his rings. Pushes it across the glass table.

XU QINGCHENG
(smiling coldly)
Fair terms.

She downs it. A beat. Her vision wavers—only for an instant, but he catches it. His trap springs.

MR. YE
Now... payment.

He lunges, grabbing her wrist. She lets him pull her close—then her elbow snaps up, shattering his nose.

XU QINGCHENG
I already paid.

She snatches the ashtray, cracks it against his temple as he stumbles. He crumples, howling.

XU QINGCHENG
(voice slurring slightly)
Interest.

Her heel drives into his groin. The room tilts. She clutches the wall, fighting the drug, and staggers out.
continuation:
INT. KTV CORRIDOR - NIGHT

XU QINGCHENG stumbles, using the wall as a crutch. Her breath comes ragged.

Behind her, MR. YE erupts, blood streaming, flanked by HENCHMEN.

MR. YE
(Ye a guttural scream)
Break her! Don't let—

At the corridor's far end, FU JINGTING appears. Late 30s, tailored suit, eyes scanning. His phone glows—her location, tracked.

MR. YE's goons barrel past him, blind with rage.

FU JINGTING
(quietly, into phone)
Too late. I've got her.

XU QINGCHENG careens around the corner—straight into his chest. In one fluid motion, he yanks her close, spins, pins her to the wall. His hand clamps over her mouth, not to silence, but to steady. His other hand brushes the hair from her face.

FU JINGTING
(whisper)
You're early, Mrs. Fu.

Her eyes—wide, furious, relieved—find his. The footsteps thunder past.

FADE OUT.

title: Emperor Shrouding the Heavens
description: A man at rock bottom is transported to a cultivation world where he must fight off a soul-stealing elder using the power of his beliefs.
context:
Title: Emperor Shrouding the Heavens
Description: A man at rock bottom is transported to a cultivation world where he must fight off a soul-stealing elder using the power of his beliefs.

EXT. CITY STAIRWAY - NIGHT

LU YU, 30s, disheveled in black clothes, trudges down outdoor steps. He stops at the bottom, pulling crumpled papers from his pocket: an EVICTION NOTICE and DIVORCE DECREE. He lets them flutter into the wind.

ON SCREEN: LU YU [THREE-NOTHINGS PERSON]

LU YU (V.O.)
Divorced two days ago. Fired yesterday. Evicted today. Thirty years old, less than a thousand yuan in savings, and nothing to show for it.

LU YU slumps against the railing, scrolling his phone. A motivational poster flashes across the screen: "PROSPERITY, DEMOCRACY, EQUALITY, FREEDOM." He sneers, swiping it away.

LU YU
(shouting)
I might as well just die!

CUT TO:

A bright moon in the night sky.

ON SCREEN: Host detected in state of despair

SYSTEM VOICE (V.O.)
Host detected in state of despair.

The phone screen flickers in LU YU's hand, magnetized to his palm.

ON SCREEN: Transmigration conditions met

SYSTEM VOICE (V.O.)
Transmigration conditions met.

ON SCREEN: Commencing transmigration now

SYSTEM VOICE (V.O.)
Commencing transmigration now.

A spinning energy vortex erupts from the phone screen, rapidly expanding to envelop LU YU. He SCREAMS as his body is sucked into the light and disappears. The phone drops onto the steps, the vortex on its screen vanishing.
continuation:
INT. ANCIENT CAVE - DAY

LU YU wakes with a GASP on cold stone, now wearing period robes. He touches his long hair, shocked.

LU YU (V.O.)
Where is this?

He struggles to his feet, staring at his transformed body.

LU YU
I've transmigrated.

A BEAUTIFUL WOMAN in red silk materializes behind him, gently caressing his face. Her touch is ice-cold.

SNAKE DEMON BEAUTY
My lord. Come here. Come.

The SNAKE DEMON BEAUTY's image becomes blurred.

SNAKE DEMON BEAUTY (V.O.)
Come here.

LU YU looks down, seeing her feet floating above ground. He jerks his head up; her face has become grotesque, surrounded by green smoke.

LU YU (V.O.)
What kind of godly opening is this? Just transmigrated and already have a beauty throwing herself at me.

LU YU
(terrified)
Holy shit, what are you?!

LU YU scrambles backward. LV CHAO RAN, white-haired and imposing, appears in a flash. He flicks his fingers; the demon evaporates.

ON SCREEN: LV CHAO RAN [IMMORTAL UNITY REALM NINTH HEAVEN]

LV CHAO RAN
Fool. That phantom was the first test. You barely passed.

LV CHAO RAN thrusts his palm. A blue energy wave SLAMS into LU YU, knocking his soul loose. LU YU's body collapses; his translucent SOUL stumbles out, flickering.

LU YU (V.O.)
Soul separation? I'm in a cultivation world?

LU YU's soul flees in panic, but LV CHAO RAN's energy strikes it down. The soul crashes back into the body. LU YU's body sits up cross-legged, eyes closed. His soul re-enters. He opens his eyes to see LV CHAO RAN's translucent soul standing before him.

LV CHAO RAN (SOUL)
A Desolate Ancient Waste Body? Useless. But your youth... that I can claim.

LU YU (INNER MONOLOGUE)
I can't die. Not after getting a second chance.

LV CHAO RAN (SOUL)
Half an hour ago, you begged for death. Why resist now? Let this master avenge your grievances.

The soul phantom of LU YU's body's original owner appears beside him.

LU YU (SOUL PHANTOM)
I know transmigration comes with cheats, but you're one ugly old man. I don't want you.

LV CHAO RAN (SOUL)
Without powerful conviction, you cannot stop me from seizing your body.

LU YU (SOUL PHANTOM)
Powerful conviction?

LU YU (INNER MONOLOGUE)
The mantra... it was on my phone.

LU YU (SOUL PHANTOM)
Prosperity, democracy, equality, freedom!

Golden light flickers around him.

LV CHAO RAN (SOUL)
What incantation is this?

LU YU (SOUL PHANTOM)
Not an incantation. The Twenty-Four Character Mantra!

LV CHAO RAN (SOUL)
Never heard of it!

LU YU (SOUL PHANTOM)
Integrity! Kindness! All evil spirits and demons, begone!

LU YU's body erupts with powerful golden flames, forcing LV CHAO RAN's soul back. The scene freezes on him surrounded by flames, sitting in solemn meditation.

title: Rescue Day: Daughter Refuses to Sign
description: A daughter confronts her dying father in the hospital, haunted by memories of his abuse that led to her mother's death twenty years ago.
context:
Title: Rescue Day: Daughter Refuses to Sign
Description: A daughter confronts her dying father in the hospital, haunted by memories of his abuse that led to her mother's death twenty years ago.

INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - DAY

A quiet, dimly lit corridor, only the echo of high heels clicking on the floor.

DOCTOR (V.O.)
Miss Ye, your father is in critical condition. We need your signature.

LIN YIYI (V.O.)
Even someone like you has a day like this?

The camera pulls up to reveal a fashionably dressed woman, LIN YIYI, who stops in her tracks, her eyes cold as she looks ahead.

LIN YIYI
Do you still remember how you treated us, mother and daughter? Do you still remember how Mom died?

TRANSITION: A white flash, entering a flashback.

INT. HOME - DAY

ON SCREEN: Twenty years ago.

Little YIYI runs into the room holding a colorful pinwheel, happy and excited.

LITTLE YIYI
Daddy, look at my pinwheel!

Her father, YE FENG, lying on the bed looking irritated, snatches the pinwheel and throws it on the ground.

YE FENG
Get lost!

Little YIYI is frightened and starts crying.

YE FENG
(impatiently)
Always crying. Worthless girl.

YE FENG gets up and roughly grabs Little YIYI.

YE FENG
You're still crying! You jinx, you've cried away all my luck!

Mother SUN YUYU rushes in, kneeling down to protect Little YIYI.

SUN YUYU
Yiyi! Don't hit the child! If you want to hit someone, hit me!

YE FENG
(roaring)
Fine!

YE FENG unbuckles his belt and wildly whips SUN YUYU.

YE FENG
I'll teach you! Teach you both!
continuation:
INT. HOSPITAL WARD - DAY

LIN YIYI and the DOCTOR stand by the bed. YE FENG lies unconscious with an oxygen tube.

DOCTOR
Your father's organs are failing. We need your consent to continue life support.

LIN YIYI
Is that so?

LIN YIYI
(interrupting)
Then don't trouble yourself, Doctor.

LIN YIYI takes out a bundle of dried mugwort and a lighter from her designer bag.

LIN YIYI
In our hometown, there's a folk remedy.

She lights the mugwort. The doctor flinches.

DOCTOR
Miss Ye, you cannot—

LIN YIYI
Please. Let us have a moment.

The doctor hesitates, then exits. LIN YIYI sits, holding the smoking mugwort.

INT. HOME - DAY

In the flashback, YE FENG lights a bundle of mugwort, smoke swirling.

YE FENG
I asked around. You're just being dramatic. Fumigate it and you'll be fine.

SUN YUYU lies in bed, seriously ill, coughing continuously. YE FENG waves the smoking mugwort around in front of her.

YE FENG
See, aren't you better now? You still have some money at home, right? I saw you hide it.

YE FENG lifts the pillow and takes the money hidden underneath. SUN YUYU weakly tries to stop him.

SUN YUYU
You can't... it's for Yiyi's school...

YE FENG
(pushing her away)
Get away from me! When I win at gambling, I'll bring it back tenfold.

YE FENG turns and leaves with the money.

INT. HOME - NIGHT

YE FENG returns home with a bruised and swollen face, horrified to find SUN YUYU collapsed on the ground, no longer breathing. Little YIYI cries heart-wrenchingly beside her.

YE FENG is so frightened by the scene that he collapses to the ground.

YE FENG
Yuyu... no...

INT. HOSPITAL WARD - DAY

Back to reality, LIN YIYI holds the smoking mugwort, slowly approaching YE FENG on the bed.

LIN YIYI (V.O.)
This is the method you used to kill my mother. Now you're getting what you deserve.

LIN YIYI sits by the bed, tears welling up in her eyes.

LIN YIYI
You took everything from us. What right do you have to live?

YE FENG on the bed sheds a tear, his lips moving slightly.

YE FENG
(weakly)
Yiyi... forgive me... I was... a fool...

YE FENG finishes speaking, slowly closes his eyes, and stops breathing.

LIN YIYI watches for a long moment, then extinguishes the mugwort. She stands, smooths her dress, and walks out without a backward glance.

title: The General Takes a Job (The War Goddess Plays Unfair)
description: A legendary female general is betrayed and killed, only to be reborn in the modern world where she must face her ancient enemies in new forms.
context:
Title: The General Takes a Job (The War Goddess Plays Unfair)
Description: A legendary female general is betrayed and killed, only to be reborn in the modern world where she must face her ancient enemies in new forms.

EXT. COURTYARD - DAY

SHEN QINGHE, battle-scarred armor glinting, cuts through enemy soldiers with economical precision. An arrow thuds into her back from behind. She stumbles, sword digging into the stone to keep her upright.

QING'ER
Qinghe!

QING'ER, in crimson wedding silks, clutches an arrow in her chest. Blood spreads like a flower. She collapses.

Soldiers close in, swords forming a cage around SHEN QINGHE. She grits her teeth, forcing herself to stand.

SHEN QINGHE
(breathing ragged, eyes burning)
I am Shen Qinghe. Daughter of the Shen family. The War Goddess who carved borders for Wei. My marriage was decreed by the Emperor himself.

LIN WAN emerges from the shadows, silk robes whispering. EUNUCH ZHANG trails behind, his face a mask of gloating.

LIN WAN
Sister. Still clinging to titles?

SHEN QINGHE
(eyes widening)
Lin Wan. You were family.

LIN WAN
(smiling coldly)
Family? The Shen family conspired with foreign powers while you were at the border. Treason. They were exiled yesterday. You were declared dead tomorrow.

SHEN QINGHE
(trembling)
Lies. My family bled for Wei. We built this empire.

LIN WAN
The Emperor believes otherwise.

A scroll lands at SHEN QINGHE's feet. She doesn't look at it.

SHEN QINGHE
(whispered fury)
You repay our protection with poison. I should have let your house fall.

She lunges. Her legs give way. Blood spatters the stone.

EUNUCH ZHANG
(mocking bow)
General. Always so dramatic.
continuation:
SHEN QINGHE
(laughing bitterly)
Zhang. I remember you groveling at my father's feet. Fetching his wine.

LIN WAN
(leaning close, voice honeyed)
Your achievements eclipsed the throne. This is the price of glory.

SHEN QINGHE
(fingers clawing at stone)
Where is Jiang Yao?

LIN WAN
(softly)
The Regent Prince? He traded his armies for your freedom. The Emperor accepted... then ordered his execution. He died at sunrise.

SHEN QINGHE
(hand flying to her chest)
No.

Her fingers close around a small wooden horse. She stares at it.

SHEN QINGHE (V.O.)
(whispered)
Jiang Yao. I kept my promise. I came back.

Snow begins to fall. The wooden horse slips from her fingers. Her eyes close.

INT. MODERN BEDROOM - DAY

SHEN QINGHE's eyes snap open. Silk sheets. A ceiling fan. The smell of cheap perfume and debt.

SHEN QINGHE (V.O.)
This is not the afterlife.

Footsteps approach. CHAIRMAN ZHANG appears in the doorway, his belt already loosening. Same predatory smile, now in a tailored suit.

CHAIRMAN ZHANG
Xiao He. You're awake.

SHEN QINGHE
(frozen)
Zhang.

CHAIRMAN ZHANG
(stepping closer, voice slimy)
Your father signed the contract. You're mine until the debt's cleared. Be a good girl.

He reaches for her. She sees the wooden horse on the nightstand, just out of reach.

title: Episode One
description: A desperate young woman in a school uniform bursts into a KTV room seeking help, claiming to be the bride of Youlan Court, and finds herself caught between pursuing gangsters and a reluctant stranger.
context:
Title: Episode One
Description: A desperate young woman in a school uniform bursts into a KTV room seeking help, claiming to be the bride of Youlan Court, and finds herself caught between pursuing gangsters and a reluctant stranger.

INT. KTV PRIVATE ROOM - NIGHT

A luxurious KTV private room with flashing lights. Smoke hangs in the air, bottles scattered across the table.

LU HANTING holds a microphone, singing to himself—detached, weary.

LU HANTING
(singing)
Let me pluck your heart...

Below the stage, HUO XIZE and his FRIENDS raise their glasses, the atmosphere turning restless.

HUO XIZE
(singing along)
Pluck your heart!

LU HANTING
(singing)
Try to melt it slowly...

The door bursts open. The music cuts out.

XIA DUOWAN rushes in, hyperventilating. Her school uniform is torn, makeup smudged across her face.

XIA DUOWAN
(out of breath)
Please. Help me.

She rushes to LU HANTING, gripping his arm with trembling fingers.

LU HANTING
(frowning)
Who are you?

Without explanation, XIA DUOWAN hides behind LU HANTING. HUO XIZE and his LACKEYS burst in after her.

HUO XIZE
(seeing them, laughing)
Found you.

XIA DUOWAN peeks out, voice trembling.

XIA DUOWAN
This... this is my fiancé. Talk to him.

XIA DUOWAN forces a brittle smile, grabbing a drink she can't afford.

XIA DUOWAN
Let's all just... have a drink.
continuation:
HUO XIZE walks up to LU HANTING, looking him up and down with contempt.

HUO XIZE
Who are you? My family runs this street.

LU HANTING remains expressionless, unmoved.

LU HANTING
You guys have fun.

LU HANTING turns to leave. XIA DUOWAN blocks him, fierce desperation in her eyes.

XIA DUOWAN
Hey!

HUO XIZE smiles smugly, approaching XIA DUOWAN.

XIA DUOWAN
(desperately shouting)
I'm the bride of Youlan Court!

Hearing this, LU HANTING stops and turns, his eyes becoming sharp.

HUO XIZE's LACKEY freezes, then mocks her.

THUG
And I'm the boss of Youlan Court!

HUO XIZE
(smirking evilly)
Then we'll... play with the bride.

HUO XIZE and his men close in on XIA DUOWAN.

XIA DUOWAN
(terrified)
Don't come near me!

XIA DUOWAN backs up to the table, jumps onto it, and grabs two bottles as weapons.

XIA DUOWAN
I'm going to use my ultimate move! I mean it!

Just as HUO XIZE moves, LU HANTING suddenly acts, grabbing him by the collar.

HUO XIZE
(struggling)
You're asking for a beating! Can't stop me!

LU HANTING's eyes are ice cold as he swings a punch at HUO XIZE.

SFX: Punch impact sound

LU HANTING looks expressionlessly at the fallen HUO XIZE.

title: Oops! CEO Mommy Goes to Work
description: A wealthy mother secretly takes a job as a cleaner, prompting her powerful children to mobilize their resources to protect her.
context:
Title: Oops! CEO Mommy Goes to Work
Description: A wealthy mother secretly takes a job as a cleaner, prompting her powerful children to mobilize their resources to protect her.

INT. PARK - DAY

MOMMY rides a vintage bicycle along a park path, humming softly to herself.

A BODYGUARD in a black suit hides in the roadside bushes, phone held low.

BODYGUARD (into earpiece)
Young Master, she's actually going through with it.

INT. AIRPORT TARMAC - DAY

DABAO, a small boy in a striped suit and gold-rimmed glasses, descends private jet stairs. Bodyguards flank a red carpet.

BODYGUARDS (in unison)
Welcome, Young Master!

ASSISTANT rushes over, tablet in hand.

ASSISTANT
Sir, the Canadian delegation awaits.

DABAO
Reschedule. Priority one: Mommy.

ASSISTANT
At once.

INT. HACKER BASE - NIGHT

Dim room pulsing with green light. ERBAO, a small boy in an oversized hoodie, faces wall-to-wall monitors.

HACKER SUBORDINATE
Threat neutralized, boss. Systems locked down.

ERBAO
Good. Now full surveillance on Mommy's route.

HACKER SUBORDINATES (in unison)
Yes, boss!
continuation:
EXT. CROSSWALK - DAY

A car brakes hard. An OLD GRANNY stumbles on the crosswalk.

SANBAO, a small girl in a taekwondo uniform, darts forward, steadies the woman.

SANBAO
Got you!

She taps her smartwatch.

SANBAO
Nini, coordinates sent. Don't lose her.

WATCH (V.O.)
On it.

SANBAO effortlessly shifts the car aside. Two GIRLS on the roadside gasp.

PASSERBY A
What the—?

SANBAO
(bows politely)
Safety first!

EXT. HIGHWAY - DAY

MOMMY pedals her bicycle. Two black SUVs pull alongside, forcing her to stop.

MOMMY (startled)
Hey!

Car doors open. DABAO and ERBAO step out. A pink mini motorcycle arrives; SANBAO removes her helmet.

MOMMY (softly)
...My babies.

The children rush in, enveloping her in a hug.

CHILDREN
Mommy!

DABAO
You don't have to prove anything. Come work with me.

MOMMY
Sweetheart, I need to remember who I am beyond just your mom.

ERBAO
(tugging her sleeve)
Then let me buy the hotel. You can be the boss.

MOMMY
That's not the point, honey.

SANBAO
You want to make your own things happen again. Right?

MOMMY
Exactly. Now let Mommy do this. Please?

MOMMY checks her watch, eyes widening.

MOMMY
Late. Remember — not a word about who I am. Promise?

She mounts her bicycle and rides away. The children watch.

DABAO (to ASSISTANT)
Acquire Yunmeng Hotel. Silent partner.

ASSISTANT
Immediately.

ERBAO (softly)
Tap their security feeds. Just to watch.

SANBAO
She'll know.

SANBAO grins, pulling out a lollipop.

SANBAO
That's what makes it fun.

FADE OUT.

title: Renting a Boyfriend for Chinese New Year
description: A young woman quits her job after her boss refuses her leave and rushes to meet a man she hired to pose as her boyfriend for the holiday.
context:
Title: Renting a Boyfriend for Chinese New Year
Description: A young woman quits her job after her boss refuses her leave and rushes to meet a man she hired to pose as her boyfriend for the holiday.

INT. OFFICE - DAY

YE XI (27, composed but with fraying patience) holds a leave request form. Her boss, MR. CHEN, never looks up from his monitor.

YE XI
Mr. Chen, I've submitted this three times.

MR. CHEN
And I've ignored it three times. We're finalizing the Q4 report. Everyone stays.

YE XI
(quietly)
My grandfather's turning ninety. He thinks I'm bringing someone home.

MR. CHEN
(typing)
Your personal life doesn't pay your bonus. Welcome to corporate reality.

His phone BUZZES. He reaches for it instinctively, catching the name "WIFE" on screen. He angles away, but Ye Xi sees.

MR. CHEN
(sotto voce, into phone)
Hey, sweetheart... Yes, I'll make the reunion dinner... No, work won't keep me this year.

Ye Xi's expression shifts from resignation to calculation.

YE XI
(loudly, to herself)
Corporate reality, right.

She clicks her phone's voice memo app, holds it up.

YE XI
(to the room)
Just want to document this motivational moment. Mr. Chen confirming that family comes second to productivity.

MR. CHEN
(hand over phone)
What are you—

YE XI
Affects everyone, doesn't it? Or does policy only apply when your wife's not calling?

MR. CHEN
(frantic, to phone)
It's not what it sounds like—

YE XI
(to the office)
I've canceled three trips home. Worked eighty-hour weeks. My grandfather's crying when I call.

Turns to leave, pauses at the door.

YE XI
You're right about one thing. I won't find life value here.

She drops her access card on the reception desk. The whole office watches.

MR. CHEN
(into phone, desperate)
No, no, I was telling them to work harder, not me—

YE XI
Tell your wife I said happy new year.
continuation:
INT. COFFEE SHOP - DAY

YE XI hurries in, checks her phone: 3:47. Half an hour late. Her confident mask slips—she's genuinely flustered.

She scans the room: GRAY COAT, BEIGE SCARF—yes, there. But the man is already watching her, like he knew she'd be late.

YE XI
(hovering)
Gu Li?

GU LI (30s, sharp eyes, sleeves rolled to reveal faded calligraphy tattoos) sets down his espresso.

GU LI
You texted you'd be twenty minutes. You were optimistic.

YE XI
(fumbling)
The meeting ran... no. I quit my job. It was... loud.

GU LI
(slight smile)
So I gathered. You're shaking.

YE XI
(hands in pockets)
It's nothing. You're ready, right? We have the contract—

GU LI
The basics. Pretend we're dating. Endure three days of family interrogation. Don't embarrass you.

YE XI
Exactly. Five thousand, as agreed.

GU LI
You should know: I'm expensive at pretending. But when I commit, I'm convincing.

YE XI
That's... what I need.

GU LI
Then let's rewrite the terms.

She blinks. He stands, drapes his scarf around her neck.

GU LI
A boyfriend wouldn't let you freeze. And he'd know your grandfather's favorite tea.

YE XI
(pause)
Pu'er. The aged kind.

GU LI
Good. Now we have somewhere to start.

He gestures to the door. She leads, but differently—less desperate, more cautiously hopeful.

title: Million Dollar Bride
description: A young woman is forced by her father to marry into a wealthy family to save her comatose mother, leading her to a reckless night that changes everything.
context:
Title: Million Dollar Bride
Description: A young woman is forced by her father to marry into a wealthy family to save her comatose mother, leading her to a reckless night that changes everything.

INT. BAR - NIGHT

MU XINGRAN sits alone at the bar counter, picks up a glass and drinks it in one gulp.

MU XINGRAN (V.O.)
Young master Li. The idiot prince of a golden cage. They trade my life for his comfort.

INT. MU FAMILY LIVING ROOM - DAY

FLASHBACK:

SHEN QIUHE, Mu Xingran's stepmother, is persuading MU WANQING.

SHEN QIUHE
The Li family offers what your mother needs. What you need. Think of it as preservation.

MU WANQING
A great opportunity to bring luck to an idiot? Why not let Mu Wanqing do it?

INT. BAR - NIGHT

Back to reality, MU XINGRAN drinks again, her eyes filled with pain.

INT. MU FAMILY LIVING ROOM - DAY

FLASHBACK:

MU ZHENGUO, Mu Xingran's father, points at MU WANQING and scolds her angrily.

MU ZHENGUO
Do you have no conscience? She's your own sister!

MU WANQING
(emotionally agitated)
Less than half a month after my mother's accident, the mistress had already moved in. This illegitimate daughter of yours is only one year younger than me. Speaking of conscience, in Jiangcheng if you rank second, who would dare claim first place?

MU ZHENGUO angrily slaps MU WANQING.

MU ZHENGUO
Ungrateful daughter. You will marry whether you like it or not. Otherwise, forget about your mother's medical expenses!
continuation:
INT. BAR - NIGHT

MU ZHENGUO (V.O.)
A half-dead vegetable, better off dead!

End of flashback. MU XINGRAN continues drinking at the bar.

A THUG approaches MU XINGRAN.

THUG
Little sister, all alone? Tell big brother what's troubling you.

The THUG puts his hand on MU XINGRAN's shoulder. In the distance on a sofa, LI SITING watches this scene coldly. A LI FAMILY RING gleams on his finger.

MU XINGRAN
(pushing him away)
Get lost!

THUG
(grabbing her again)
Where are you going? Let's find a place, and big brother will help you relax.

LI SITING stands up and walks over, grabbing the THUG's wrist.

THUG
Who the hell are you? Dare to ruin my fun?

LI SITING punches the THUG to the ground.

LI SITING
(coldly)
Get out!

The THUG flees in embarrassment. MU XINGRAN, drunk, falls into LI SITING's arms.

MU XINGRAN (V.O.)
I'm about to marry an idiot anyway. Can't I go crazy just once?

MU XINGRAN
(looking up at LI SITING)
Handsome.

LI SITING
What?

MU XINGRAN
(wrapping her arms around his neck)
Spend the night with me, how about it?

LI SITING
I'm not interested in you.

LI SITING tries to push her away, but MU XINGRAN holds on tighter.

MU XINGRAN
(whispering in his ear)
Not interested, or does the Li family not allow it?

LI SITING's eyes flash with anger, his expression provoked.

LI SITING
What do you know about my family?

MU XINGRAN
Enough to know they're buying what I'm selling.

She kisses him before he can respond.

TO BE CONTINUED

title: Three Reborn Brothers Spoil Me
description: After rebirth, three brothers reject their adoptive sister at a press conference, revealing past betrayals while their true sister watches from afar.
context:
Title: Three Reborn Brothers Spoil Me
Description: After rebirth, three brothers reject their adoptive sister at a press conference, revealing past betrayals while their true sister watches from afar.

INT. PRESS CONFERENCE - DAY

BACKGROUND VOICE (V.O.)
How much longer? The Lu Family Global Press Conference begins in minutes, and the third young master still hasn't arrived...

REPORTERS jostle anxiously. The atmosphere crackles with tension.

REPORTER A
The Lu brothers are coming out!

LU NANCHEN, LU YIZE, and LU YUNQING stride onto the red carpet flanked by BODYGUARDS. Flashbulbs erupt as REPORTERS surge forward.

ON SCREEN: LU NANCHEN - HEAD OF THE LU FAMILY
ON SCREEN: LU YIZE - TOP ACTOR
ON SCREEN: LU YUNQING - RENOWNED LAWYER

REPORTER B
Mr. Lu Yize, three years since your last win—how does it feel to hold the Best Actor award again?

REPORTER C
Mr. Lu Nanchen, with Lu Corporation's relisting, who deserves your thanks most?

LU NANCHEN
The three of us stand here today because of one person.

LU YUNQING
Without her, we'd be nothing.

LU NANCHEN
She is our sister, Chi.

A young woman in a pristine white suit, LU XIAOXIAO, pushes through the crowd.

LU XIAOXIAO
Big Brother!

She rushes toward LU NANCHEN with outstretched arms.
continuation:
EXT. CITY STREET - NIGHT

CHI XIA, wrapped in a worn red hoodie and scarf, stands alone on a desolate, snow-swept street. She watches the press conference on a building screen.

CHI XIA
(to herself)
Back to their perfect family. They won't miss my cheap noodles now.

She turns away, shoulders slumping. Snowflakes cling to her eyelashes.

Suddenly—a MAN stumbles into the road as a car speeds toward him.

CHI XIA
(shouting)
Watch out!

She lunges forward, shoving him clear. The car slams into her.

She hits the pavement hard. Blood trickles from her temple. Her vision blurs.

CHI XIA
(inner voice)
So this is how it ends... for people like me. Unseen. Unneeded.

She fades into darkness.

INT. PRESS CONFERENCE - DAY

Time rewinds. LU XIAOXIAO is about to embrace LU NANCHEN.

LU NANCHEN's hand shoots out, stopping her cold. He pushes her back gently but firmly.

LU YUNQING
Who exactly are you?

LU XIAOXIAO
(panicked)
I... Big Brother, it's me—Xiaoxiao!

LU YIZE
The adoptive daughter who cut all ties when we went bankrupt.

LU NANCHEN
The one who disappeared for three years without a word.

LU YUNQING
You're not our sister.

LU XIAOXIAO's face drains of color as the three brothers turn away in unison.

title: Arranged Marriage Pressure
description: A young woman faces mounting pressure from her traditional parents to find a husband and continue the family legacy, but she resists their matchmaking attempts.
context:
Title: Arranged Marriage Pressure
Description: A young woman faces mounting pressure from her traditional parents to find a husband and continue the family legacy, but she resists their matchmaking attempts.

MONTAGE

A series of photos on a bedroom wall: XU SUINING and a young man, laughing at a carnival, cooking together, hiking. She removes the last photo, her face stoic.

TRANSITION

TITLE: Three Years Later

EXT. CITY LANDSCAPE - DAY

Aerial shots of a modern metropolis, a magnificent bridge spanning across the river.

INT. XU FAMILY ANCESTRAL HALL - DAY

The ancestral hall is solemn and dignified, with memorial tablets of the Xu ancestors. XU YAQING, the Xu clan matriarch, kneels on a cushion, her posture rigid with prayer.

XU YAQING
(whispering fervently)
Ancestors, grant me strength... before the business crumbles and I do.

XU HAITAO, Xu Yaqing's husband, shuffles in holding a thick photo album. It slips from his hands, pages scattering with a fluttering sound.

XU SUINING
(startled)
Dad!

XU HAITAO
(apologetic)
Clumsy old man.

XU HAITAO gathers photos, offering one to his daughter who doesn't take it.

XU HAITAO
(holding up photo)
This one runs a startup.

XU SUINING
He looks like the startup is a pyramid scheme.

XU HAITAO
(flipping page)
Architect. Good bones.

XU SUINING
(in unison with XU YAQING)
And knows it.
continuation:
XU YAQING strides over, still holding prayer beads.

XU HAITAO
(showing another)
This doctor—steady income.

XU SUINING
Steady ego, too.

XU YAQING
(interrupting)
Xu Suining. You think you have forever? The Shanghai branch is hemorrhaging money. The board wants family stability—meaning you, married, producing an heir.

XU SUINING
And if I refuse?

XU YAQING's hand trembles as she reaches for a ceremonial spear mounted on the wall—not in theatrics, but in barely-contained fury.

XU HAITAO
(softly, to Suining)
Don't. She's been sleeping here three nights.

XU SUINING catches her mother's wrist mid-reach—not with dramatic flair, but with quiet, firm pressure. Their eyes lock.

XU SUINING
Mom, you want me to replicate your life? When was the last time you slept through the night without worrying about the ancestors' judgment? When did Dad last voice an opinion without calculating your reaction first?

XU YAQING's face drains of color. XU HAITAO studies his shoes.

XU HAITAO
(quietly)
I'll... check the ledgers.

He exits. The ancestral hall feels larger, emptier.

XU YAQING releases the spear. Her voice cracks.

XU YAQING
One month. Not for the ancestors. For me. Before I become one of them.

EXT. ROADSIDE - DAY

XU SUINING walks furiously, swiping at her phone—deleting a contact. She hurls her rabbit hand warmer onto the road.

A luxury car brakes smoothly. Behind the window, a man, LING SHAO, watches her. His gaze isn't just interested—it's recognition.

LING SHAO
(to driver)
Stop.

title: Tomb Keeper's Notes: Return to Coffin Mountain
description: A man plagued by nightmares seeks a legendary cure from a mysterious mountain, but obtaining it requires more than just finding it.
context:
Title: Tomb Keeper's Notes: Return to Coffin Mountain
Description: A man plagued by nightmares seeks a legendary cure from a mysterious mountain, but obtaining it requires more than just finding it.

INT. COFFIN MOUNTAIN - NIGHT (FLASHBACK)

SHI QINGPING lies on the ground, convulsing. His fingers tear at the dirt, seeking purchase. He sits up, terror flattening his features.

Two silhouettes with furnace-green eyes manifest from the blackness. They move like puppets with cut strings—jerky, too fast. The air between them warps.

They hit him like a wave. His back arches. Something beneath his ribs glows—faint, fruit-shaped—then fades to nothing.

EXT. HAICHENG SHI MANSION COURTYARD - DAY

SHI QINGPING lurches awake. The teacup slips from his fingers and shatters. He stares at the shards, breathing hard.

BAO WANRU appears without a sound. Her hand hovers near his shoulder, not quite touching.

BAO WANRU
(low)
Again.

QINGWEN lingers by the courtyard gate, wringing a letter.

QINGWEN
Master. Doctor Xing... he's coming tonight. Says tomorrow's too late.

Shi Qingping closes his eyes. He already knows.
continuation:
INT. HAICHENG SHI MANSION INNER CHAMBER - DAY

The room sinks into twilight. DOCTOR XING ZICHENG holds SHI QINGPING's wrist, his thumb pressing the hollow of the pulse. The silence stretches.

XING ZICHENG
Your pulse is fleeing.

SHI QINGPING
(cold)
Give me a name for it.

XING ZICHENG
Coffin King Fruit. Nothing else.

SHI QINGPING
Coffin—

XING ZICHENG
Mountain. Yes.

Shi Qingping's hand tightens on the chair arm.

SHI QINGPING
How did you—

XING ZICHENG
I smell wet earth on you. The day after rain. Only one place near Haicheng.

LEI WENLI shifts from the shadows. His scarred knuckles are white.

LEI WENLI
(interjecting)
Master Shi. My grandfather was a tomb keeper there.

SHI QINGPING
(looking at LEI WENLI in surprise)
Speak.

LEI WENLI
The fruit doesn't obey. It collects. It chooses who owes the debt. If it summons you, it's not to give. It's to take payment.

SHI QINGPING
(turning to glare at XING ZICHENG)
If you're lying—

XING ZICHENG
Touch your left ribs. Count the marks.

Shi Qingping's hand goes to his chest. He doesn't look. He already feels the three bruises, glowing faintly through his silk robe.

title: Dangerous Encounter
description: A nurse saves a man being chased by thugs in an underground parking garage, only to discover he's been poisoned and is searching for her.
context:
Title: Dangerous Encounter
Description: A nurse saves a man being chased by thugs in an underground parking garage, only to discover he's been poisoned and is searching for her.

INT. UNDERGROUND PARKING GARAGE - NIGHT

Female nurse LI RONGYUE walks toward her car while talking on the phone.

LI RONGYUE
(on phone)
Don't worry, just enjoy your date with your rich boyfriend.

A man in black, PEI HENG, stumbles from behind a pillar, his movements labored.

LI RONGYUE
(on phone)
No one noticed I covered your shift.

As LI RONGYUE reaches for her car door, PEI HENG lunges forward, muffling her startled cry and pulling her behind the vehicle.

LI RONGYUE
(terrified, muffled)
Hey! Ahhh!

PEI HENG fumbles with the back door, urgency in his trembling hands.

Three THUGS holding clubs and knives rush into the parking garage.

INT. CAR - CONTINUOUS

PEI HENG collapses against LI RONGYUE, his hand gently but firmly covering her mouth, his breathing ragged.

LI RONGYUE
(struggling, muffled)
Ahhh!

PEI HENG
(whispering, desperate)
Please... be quiet. They'll kill us both.

LI RONGYUE's eyes widen in recognition, then steel with resolve.

LI RONGYUE
(inner monologue)
That face... from the news? The missing CEO?

INT. UNDERGROUND PARKING GARAGE - CONTINUOUS

The LEAD THUG and his two lackeys scan the area, their footsteps echoing.

LEAD THUG
Damn it! He can't be far, not with that poison in his system. Split up!

INT. CAR - CONTINUOUS

PEI HENG's grip loosens as his strength fades.

PEI HENG
(whisper fading)
Don't... move.

LI RONGYUE watches the thugs approach, her medical training warring with her fear.

LI RONGYUE
(inner monologue)
His pulse is erratic. He's dying.

LI RONGYUE grabs PEI HENG's wrist, pressing her thumb urgently to his radial pulse.

LI RONGYUE
(aloud, firm)
Stay with me.

She shifts abruptly, leaning out the window with calculated annoyance.

LI RONGYUE
(shouting at the thugs)
Excuse me! Do you mind? Some of us are trying to have a private moment here!

The THUGS freeze, caught off guard.

LI RONGYUE turns back to PEI HENG, her voice dropping to a honeyed whisper.

LI RONGYUE
Hold on, love. I'll get rid of them.

She leans out again, brandishing her hospital ID.

LI RONGYUE
I'm a nurse, and this is my break. You want me filing a harassment report?

LEAD THUG
(stammering)
We... we didn't realize—

LI RONGYUE
Then keep walking!

The THUGS retreat, glancing back suspiciously.

Li Rongyue slumps back inside, sealing the doors. She turns to PEI HENG, now convulsing gently.

LI RONGYUE
What's in your system? How much time?

PEI HENG
(voice cracking)
Need... hospital. But they'll be watching.

His hand clutches hers, accidentally snagging her necklace.

LI RONGYUE
My necklace—

The chain breaks. PEI HENG collapses against her shoulder, unconscious.
continuation:
INT. CAR - LATER

LI RONGYUE sits alone in the back seat, her uniform disheveled, clutching her broken chain.

PEI HENG (V.O.)
I will find you.

LI RONGYUE exits the car. A ruby pendant lies on the seat.

PEI HENG's fingers close around it as consciousness returns.

CLOSE-UP: LI RONGYUE's ID badge, reading "Name: Li Rongyue, Position: Emergency Nurse, Number: H027."

CLOSE-UP of PEI HENG's face, his eyes burning with grim determination.

INT. UNDERGROUND PARKING GARAGE - LATER

PEI HENG leans against the car, weak but upright. Three SUBORDINATES in suits approach with medical equipment.

SUBORDINATE
Young Master Pei, your security detail failed. The antidote—

PEI HENG
(cutting him off)
Find the woman who saved me. She dropped this.

He holds up the ruby pendant.

PEI HENG
She's about 5'4", mid-twenties, works at Central Hospital. And she risked her life for a stranger.

SUBORDINATE
We'll have her located within the hour.

PEI HENG
Bring her to me safely. And find out who poisoned me.

FLASHBACK

INT. HOSPITAL LOCKER ROOM - DAY

LI RONGYUE sits on a bench, examining her broken necklace chain. The ruby pendant is missing. A COLLEAGUE NURSE enters.

COLLEAGUE NURSE
You okay? You look exhausted.

LI RONGYUE
(carefully)
Long shift. Thought I lost something important.

She touches her bare neck.

LI RONGYUE
Turns out I did.

COLLEAGUE NURSE
Director needs you in trauma bay two. Possible poisoning case.

LI RONGYUE stands, her expression hardening with recognition.

LI RONGYUE
I'm on my way.

title: Save My Boss
description: A delivery man at rock bottom is struck by lightning and receives a mysterious call from a trapped CEO who promises him wealth in exchange for rescue.
context:
Title: Save My Boss
Description: A delivery man at rock bottom is struck by lightning and receives a mysterious call from a trapped CEO who promises him wealth in exchange for rescue.

INT. STAIRWELL - NIGHT

Delivery man WU YAOZU, late twenties, sprints down a fire escape, the delivery box slamming against his spine. Rain streaks the tiny window above. He juggles his phone with one hand.

WU YAOZU
(into phone)
Three minutes! This elevator's been down for a week—

LANDLORD'S AGENT (V.O.)
My boss doesn't care about your logistics, Wu. Rent's due midnight.

WU YAOZU
(pleading)
I have cash. Right here, from my best route. Please, until Friday.

LANDLORD'S AGENT (V.O.)
Half measures get evicted. I've got three guys waiting to change those locks.

The line cuts. Wu stares at his cracked phone screen—his wallpaper shows him and LIU FANG in happier times. He stops on the landing and slowly removes his helmet, letting it roll down the stairs. He just sits, breathing hard.

WU YAOZU
(whispered)
Fangfang's deposit...

EXT. STREET - NIGHT

Wu limps along the curb, favoring his ankle. Rain begins to fall. Across the street, a Bentley's hazard lights flash. Through the windshield, he glimpses LIU FANG checking her reflection.

WU YAOZU
(freezing)
Fang...

He glances both ways and jogs across.

INT. LUXURY CAR - NIGHT

LIU FANG sits in the passenger seat, her phone buzzing with missed calls from "Yaozu ❤️". She silences it without looking. Beside her, MA ZHIWEI, fortyish, checks a contract.

LIU FANG
Her mother's surgery is scheduled. Monday morning.

MA ZHIWEI
Good. Sign this, and the private room is covered. Plus the tuition.

He produces a pen. She hesitates, then signs with a flourish.
continuation:
EXT. STREET - NIGHT

Wu taps on the tinted window. It hums down. Liu Fang's eyes meet his—no surprise, just resignation.

WU YAOZU
(out of breath)
Your mom said you weren't home. I was worried.

LIU FANG
I have a new home now. Third ring road. Two bedrooms.

WU YAOZU
(quietly)
The bride price... I'm two months away. The night shifts—

LIU FANG
(interrupting)
Mom's dialysis is weekly. My sister's cram school is monthly. You're counting in months.

She holds his gaze, her voice dropping.

LIU FANG
(quietly)
You can't save everyone, Yaozu. I can't wait for everyone's happy ending.

MA ZHIWEI leans into view, his hand resting on her shoulder.

MA ZHIWEI
Now you're just making her feel guilty. That's not love, boy.

Two BODYGUARDS step from the shadows. One gently takes Wu's arm.

MA ZHIWEI
(to Bodyguard)
Get his jacket. It's worth more than he makes in a week. Consider it... interest.

The Bodyguard wrenches Wu's arm behind his back. Wu struggles, but his exhaustion betrays him. A shove sends him sprawling into the gutter. His delivery jacket tears.

EXT. BRIDGE - NIGHT

Wu leans against the railing, his torn jacket flapping. He checks his phone: 11:47 PM. A notification reads: "LOCKOUT WARNING: 13 minutes."

He looks at his wallpaper—him and Liu Fang, younger, in graduation gowns. His thumb hovers. In the background, a loose bridge cable whips in the wind.

WU YAOZU
(to himself)
Twenty-eight years. Can't even keep a roof.

Lightning illuminates everything. The cable snaps, whipping downward. The arc catches Wu's phone, flung from his hand. The force throws him over the railing.

EXT. RIVERBANK - NIGHT

Wu lies crumpled on the mudflat. His phone, three feet away, blinks to life despite a spider-webbed screen—an emergency beacon pulsing red.

LUO WENXUAN (V.O.)
(from phone)
—SOS received—this is Luo Wenxuan—Blue Group—coordinates attached—

Wu groans, coughing water.

LUO WENXUAN (V.O.)
(from phone)
—trapped—mine shaft—Shenzhen—reward—your figures—

WU YAOZU
(weakly)
...my neck...

LUO WENXUAN (V.O.)
(from phone)
—two million—if you reach me—battery at one percent—

The phone flickers. Wu's fingers dig into the mud, pulling himself toward the blinking light.

LUO WENXUAN (V.O.)
(from phone)
—say you'll try—

Wu collapses, his fingertips inches from the phone. The red light blinks once more, then dies. The screen goes black.

title: Mr. Mo, Come Spoil Me
description: A woman with a birthmark marries a rumored invalid, but both harbor secrets that make them far more capable than they appear.
context:
Title: Mr. Mo, Come Spoil Me
Description: A woman with a birthmark marries a rumored invalid, but both harbor secrets that make them far more capable than they appear.

INT. DRESSING ROOM - DAY

SU MUYAN wears a red Chinese-style wedding dress, a prominent birthmark visible on her face. She looks terrified as a knife is held to her throat.

KIDNAPPER (V.O.)
Who are you?

SU MUYAN
Who am I?

INT. STUDY - DAY

MO BEIHAN sits at a desk, the BUTLER standing behind him. He is speaking to the kidnappers through an earpiece.

MO BEIHAN
Third time this month. My uncle's men never learn.

KIDNAPPER (V.O.)
Hmph, Mo Beihan actually married an ugly freak.

INT. DRESSING ROOM - DAY

The KIDNAPPER holds SU MUYAN hostage with a knife.

KIDNAPPER
Don't move!

KIDNAPPER (V.O.)
Mo Beihan, if you want your woman to live, surrender the Jiangnan project now.
continuation:
INT. STUDY - DAY

MO BEIHAN listens to the phone expressionlessly.

MO BEIHAN
A forced bride? Expendable. But billion-dollar assets? That's the real leverage.

KIDNAPPER (V.O.)
Hmph, you really are heartless.

INT. DRESSING ROOM - DAY

The kidnapper's knife presses closer to SU MUYAN's throat. Suddenly, another KIDNAPPER is sent flying. SU MUYAN seizes the opportunity to fight back, taking the knife and subduing the kidnapper.

INT. BALCONY - DAY

SU MUYAN and MO BEIHAN stand facing each other.

MO BEIHAN
I never expected that someone the Su family didn't want would have such skills. Truly impressive.

SU MUYAN
I heard Mo Beihan is a sickly invalid. You don't look like one to me.

MO BEIHAN
Such a sharp tongue... ugly freak.

SU MUYAN takes a small vial from her sleeve, her expression resolute.

SU MUYAN
This antidote—take it now.

MO BEIHAN suddenly grimaces in pain, his body weakening.

MO BEIHAN
(in pain)
Go!

SU MUYAN
(worried)
You... what's wrong...

MO BEIHAN clutches his chest in pain, his eyes becoming fierce.

SU MUYAN
(crying out)
Mo Beihan!

INT. BEDROOM - DAY

MO BEIHAN writhes in pain on the bed, the BUTLER trying to hold him down.

BUTLER (V.O.)
Young Master! The toxin is spreading!

MO BEIHAN
(roaring)
Get out!

SU MUYAN approaches.

BUTLER
Young Madam, don't come closer. The Young Master will hurt you.

SU MUYAN
I stabilized the formula. Get Dr. Chen!

BUTLER
Ah, yes.

The BUTLER hurries away. SU MUYAN walks to the bedside.

SU MUYAN
Let me check your pulse.

As she approaches, the delirious MO BEIHAN suddenly grabs her and pulls her onto the bed. MO BEIHAN pins her down, looking at her with eyes both dazed and aggressive.

TO BE CONTINUED

title: Showdown, I Am the Group's Young Miss
description: The heiress of a corporate empire goes undercover to investigate missing luxury goods and uncover corruption within a branch company.
context:
Title: Showdown, I Am the Group's Young Miss
Description: The heiress of a corporate empire goes undercover to investigate missing luxury goods and uncover corruption within a branch company.

EXT. REMOTE HIGHWAY - DAY

A refrigerated VAN with "XIA CORPORATION - LIQUID ASSETS" printed on the side drives along the highway. Three THUGS crouch in the bushes. The lead THUG BOSS wears a floral shirt.

THUG BOSS
Here it comes... here it comes...

His men throw a wooden board with nails onto the road. The van drives over it, TIRES BLOWING OUT. It brakes to an emergency stop.

THUG BOSS
Go!

The DRIVER gets out to check the tire. The THUGS, holding steel pipes, rush forward and surround the DRIVER. The THUG BOSS raises his steel pipe and smashes the car window with practiced precision.

INT. XIA CORPORATION CEO OFFICE - DAY

XIA MANTING studies a spreadsheet while XIA ZHIRONG examines a security photo of the wrecked van.

XIA MANTING
Third shipment this quarter. The insurance is bleeding us dry.

XIA ZHIRONG
(off photo)
That's not opportunistic theft. The security lock was dismantled with a key code. Someone on the inside gave them the route.

XIA MANTING
Father built that division himself. Every warehouse, every route.

XIA ZHIRONG
Let me embed. One week. I'll trace the inventory trails myself.

XIA MANTING
You'll be a ghost. No backup, no authority.

XIA ZHIRONG
Better. They'll think I'm just another desperate mid-level hire.
continuation:
INT. BRANCH COMPANY - SUPPLY CLOSET - NIGHT

MANAGER LU whispers into his phone.

MANAGER LU
(into phone)
...heard the Group's sending someone. Not sure when.

(listens)
No, not yet. But if it's the daughter--

(listens, face paling)
Understood. I'll handle it.

INT. BRANCH COMPANY HR DEPARTMENT - DAY

XIA ZHIRONG, now in budget business attire with her hair styled differently, walks into the HR floor carrying a worn portfolio. She approaches the office where HU HAI interviews candidates.

XIA ZHIRONG
(under her breath)
Let's see what you've been hiding.

She walks to the office door, knocks, then pushes it open. Inside, HU HAI and his secretary MINA are conducting interviews.

XIA ZHIRONG
(smiling)
Zhao Rong. Here for the assistant manager position.

MINA checks her list, then glances at Xia Zhirong's face. She leans close to HU HAI to whisper.

MINA
(whispering to HU HAI)
She looks exactly like the Group's photo--

HU HAI
(cutting her off, to Xia)
Your resume says logistics experience. Can you read inventory manifests?

XIA ZHIRONG
(meeting his gaze)
Every code. Every discrepancy.

The room goes silent. Hu Hai studies her, uneasy.

FADE OUT.

title: KTV Private Room
description: A young woman trying to earn money for her grandmother's medical treatment faces pressure at a KTV gathering with entertainment company executives.
context:
Title: KTV Private Room
Description: A young woman trying to earn money for her grandmother's medical treatment faces pressure at a KTV gathering with entertainment company executives.

INT. KTV PRIVATE ROOM - NIGHT

Neon reflections pulse on black marble. BOSS JIANG (40s, gray suit, glasses) watches from the sofa, wine glass in hand.

BOSS ZHANG leads in five CHRISTMAS BUNNY GIRLS. SHEN XINGCHEN (20, pale, trembling) trails last, clutching a champagne bottle.

BOSS ZHANG
(to Boss Jiang)
Boss Jiang, take a look. These are the newest starlets our company just signed. Just say the word, and they can do many things for you.

BOSS ZHANG
(continuing)
Whichever one you like can come over and have a drink with you.

BOSS JIANG remains silent, observing. His gaze lingers on Shen Xingchen's trembling hands.

BOSS ZHANG
(pointing at one girl)
This one?

BOSS ZHANG
(pointing at another)
Or... this one?

BOSS ZHANG yanks SHEN XINGCHEN forward.

BOSS ZHANG
This one, come!

SHEN XINGCHEN
(to Boss Zhang)
Boss Zhang, didn't you say I would only be selling alcohol?

BOSS ZHANG
(dismissively)
Are you really pure or just pretending? Which entertainment company signs artists just to sell drinks? Can selling drinks give you a twenty thousand yuan commission per night? Hurry up and go!

SHEN XINGCHEN
Boss Zhang, you didn't make this clear when you signed the contract.

SHEN XINGCHEN puts the bottle in her hand on the table.

SHEN XINGCHEN
(continuing)
Then I won't take this money.

She turns to leave. BOSS ZHANG grabs her arm.

BOSS ZHANG
(low, lethal)
You better think this through. If you don't take this money, what will you use to treat that sickly grandmother of yours? You came here to make money, didn't you?

BOSS ZHANG pulls out a thick wad of cash and throws it. Bills flutter around SHEN XINGCHEN's feet.

BOSS ZHANG
(shouting)
Is this enough? Is this enough? Now will you do it? Go!

BOSS ZHANG shoves her. BOSS JIANG catches her—gently—then releases.

BOSS JIANG
continuation:
(cold)
Go.

BOSS JIANG pushes SHEN XINGCHEN away.

SHEN XINGCHEN
(straightening her clothes)
I'm sorry, Boss Jiang.

BOSS JIANG
(looking at Boss Zhang)
Boss Zhang, you know I hate forcing people the most. Mutual consent is what makes things last.

BOSS ZHANG
(laughing awkwardly)
Boss Jiang, yes, yes, yes. I was just joking, just joking.

BOSS JIANG
(raising his glass)
Boss Zhang, to a pleasant cooperation.

BOSS ZHANG
(quickly raising his glass)
To a pleasant cooperation. I should be toasting you. If it weren't for your generous support, my drama wouldn't go so smoothly. To you.

They clink glasses.

SHEN XINGCHEN
(to Boss Zhang)
Then I'll leave first.

BOSS ZHANG
(waving his hand)
Fine, fine.

SHEN XINGCHEN turns and leaves, stepping over the cash.

BOSS ZHANG
(to the other girls)
What are you all standing around for? Hurry up and keep Boss Jiang company!

The girls immediately sit around BOSS JIANG. He watches Shen Xingchen's exit.

BOSS ZHANG
Boss Jiang, enjoy yourself.

BOSS JIANG
(to Boss Zhang)
Boss Zhang, with innocent girls like this, you can't force them. It's best to let things happen naturally.

BOSS ZHANG
(pausing, then laughing heartily)
Boss Jiang really knows how to play! Boss Jiang knows how to play. Come, drink up, drink up.

INT. BOSS JIANG'S OFFICE - DAY

BOSS JIANG sits behind his desk. An ASSISTANT hands him an envelope.

BOSS JIANG opens the envelope and pulls out an old photograph. The photo shows a family of three, with young SHEN XINGCHEN as the little girl in the middle. A hospital invoice falls out.

BOSS JIANG (V.O.)
So it really is her.

BOSS JIANG looks at the photo, his eyes becoming complex and profound. He signs the cheque beside the invoice.

title: The Heavenly Life Creditor
description: A mysterious young man with the power to borrow life from heaven arrives at a wealthy family's estate as the patriarch lies dying.
context:
Title: The Heavenly Life Creditor
Description: A mysterious young man with the power to borrow life from heaven arrives at a wealthy family's estate as the patriarch lies dying.

INT. ROLLS-ROYCE - DAY

A luxury motorcade glides along a tree-lined road. In the back seat, YE GUODONG (50s, black tailcoat, granite demeanor) clutches a jade amulet, eyes closed in meditation.

EXT. LUXURY ESTATE - DAY

The motorcade stops at a marble mansion. BODYGUARDS in black suits snap to attention as the DRIVER opens Ye Guodong's door.

INT. VILLA HALL - DAY

YE GUOLIANG (40s, gray suit, bloodshot eyes) freezes mid-stride, phone clutched white-knuckled, as Ye Guodong enters.

YE GUOLIANG
(quietly breaking)
He's still breathing. But the machines...

YE GUODONG
How long?

Ye Guoliang shakes his head. They move toward the stairs in unison.
continuation:
EXT. PARK - DAY

GU QING (20s, black tangzhuang, still as a heron) stands beneath a ginkgo tree, watching golden leaves fall in reverse.

GU QING (V.O.)
Heaven's ledger balances all debts. Some accounts... I choose to reopen.

INT. BEDROOM - DAY

OLD MR. YE (70s) lies corpse-pale, ventilator hissing. The DOCTOR packs his instruments with painful slowness.

YE GUOLIANG
(barely controlled)
There must be something. Experimental, illegal, I don't care--

DOCTOR
(quietly)
The heart is a house with all lights out. I cannot undo time.

Ye Guodong's jaw tightens. He turns to find GU QING standing inside the doorway, untouched by the bodyguards who flank him.

YE GUODONG
(low, dangerous)
How did you get past security?

GU QING
(gesturing to the dying man)
The same way I'll pass through death's door.

Ye Guoliang steps between them.

YE GUOLIANG
Who is this?

YE GUODONG
(never breaking eye contact)
A ghost story. From our grandfather's time.

GU QING
Flesh merchants call us many things. Life Creditor is... polite.

The brothers lock eyes. Outside the window, autumn leaves suddenly swirl as if caught in a summer storm--then freeze mid-air.

CLOSE-UP: GU QING's pupils become twin golden coins, ancient and unreadable.

title: Flash Marriage: My Sugar Daddy Husband Gained Mind Reading
description: A woman discovers her fiancé's betrayal on their wedding day, unaware that her arranged marriage holds deeper secrets.
context:
Title: Flash Marriage: My Sugar Daddy Husband Gained Mind Reading
Description: A woman discovers her fiancé's betrayal on their wedding day, unaware that her arranged marriage holds deeper secrets.

INT. DRESSING ROOM - DAY

ZHOU ZIHENG and JIAN YUWEI are entangled on the velvet sofa, lipstick smudged on his collar.

ZHOU ZIHENG
(glancing toward the door)
The ceremony's in twenty minutes.

JIAN YUWEI
(fingers tracing his jaw)
Perfect timing. She won't leave her makeup chair until her entrance.

ZHOU ZIHENG
(stiffening)
If this costs me the merger shares—

JIAN YUWEI
My dear brother-in-law... by this time tomorrow, Jian Ning will have signed everything over. Then we can be as public as you like.

ZHOU ZIHENG
You have proof the documents are ready?

JIAN YUWEI
(leaning closer)
I have something better. I have her trust.

INT. BRIDE'S LOUNGE / EXT. HIGHWAY - DAY

JIAN NING stands before a floor-length mirror, her wedding dress immaculate, phone pressed to her ear.

JIAN NING
Chu Yanchi. Highway traffic reports are green. You have no excuse.

CUT TO:

CHU YANCHI's gloved hands grip the steering wheel of a crimson Bugatti. The speedometer kisses 180 km/h.

CHU YANCHI
(voice calm through the speaker)
Your assistant is currently airborne. The contract's buckled in the passenger seat.

JIAN NING
(eyes narrowing)
Don't perform for me. Just deliver.

CHU YANCHI
I never perform, President Jian. I execute.

JIAN NING
(fingers tightening on the phone)
Three minutes.

She ends the call, gaze falling to the photo tucked in her phone case—her mother, younger, wearing the same stoic expression.

JIAN NING (V.O.)
Mom, you thought marriage would soften me. You were wrong. Today, I reclaim your empire. One signature at a time.
continuation:
INT. BRIDE'S LOUNGE - DAY

The PHOTOGRAPHER hovers in the doorway, camera ready.

PHOTOGRAPHER
Miss Jian, the publicity team requested pre-ceremony content for the company newsletter...

JIAN NING
(not turning)
Send it to my director of communications for approval. Every frame.

PHOTOGRAPHER
But Miss Zhou specifically said—

JIAN NING
(finally facing him, gaze like ice)
My sister doesn't sign your checks. I do. Now go. And if I see that camera turned on before I arrive, you'll be photographing pigeons in the park.

The photographer retreats. Jian Ning's shoulders drop one fraction.

JIAN NING
(softly, into the phone)
Chu Yanchi? New priority. Find out why my sister hired a photographer.

EXT. HOTEL ENTRANCE - DAY

The Bugatti's tires scream as CHU YANCHI brakes. He steps out, every movement precise, expensive. Time seems to slow around him.

ZHANG MAO
(whispering)
President Chu, the photographer's in place. Miss Jian's sister arranged it.

CHU YANCHI
(hand extended for the folder)
She wants leverage. She'll use it tonight.

ZHANG MAO
(fumbling with the contract)
Sir?

CHU YANCHI
(almost imperceptible smile)
Mind reading, Zhang Mao. It's called observation. Now go. You're her assistant today. Not mine.

He watches Zhang Mao enter, his eyes narrowing at the hotel's facade as if seeing through walls.

INT. DRESSING ROOM - DAY

JIAN NING's hand trembles on the doorknob. She steels herself, then pushes.

The room is dim, but the image is clear: ZHOU ZIHENG and JIAN YUWEI, caught mid-adjustment, her lipstick on his collar, his hand on her waist. Their faces freeze in twin masks of shock.

The PHOTOGRAPHER, positioned behind Jian Ning, captures everything.

JIAN NING
(to the photographer, voice steady)
Keep recording. Every second. This is my wedding gift to myself.

title: Return of the Son-in-Law
description: Li Shiheng, leader of the Liuhe Commerce Association, is ambushed in a warehouse and saved by the mysterious Ye Feng, to whom he pledges his loyalty and resources.
context:
Title: Return of the Son-in-Law
Description: Li Shiheng, leader of the Liuhe Commerce Association, is ambushed in a warehouse and saved by the mysterious Ye Feng, to whom he pledges his loyalty and resources.

INT. WAREHOUSE - DAY

Aerial shot of a massive industrial area. On-screen text reads: "Port City - Liuhe Warehouse District."

LI SHIHENG, blood at the corner of his mouth, is surrounded by more than a dozen men in black at the center of the warehouse.

BLACK-CLAD LEADER (O.S.)
Shiheng! There's no escape!

LI SHIHENG
(breathing heavily, defiant)
Twenty years I built Liuhe in this city. Come then. Let's see if you have the steel to finish what your masters started.

LI SHIHENG takes the initiative and fights the black-clad men. His skills are impressive, but he's outnumbered. Soon, a black-clad man holds a knife to his throat and pins him to the ground.

BLACK-CLAD MAN
(urgent whisper)
Time to retire, old man.

Just as the black-clad man is about to strike, a figure drops from the rafters with a kick, sending the attacker flying. The newcomer is YE FENG, wearing a black trench coat, with an extraordinary presence.

BLACK-CLAD MAN
Who are you?

YE FENG
(quiet, dangerous)
Wrong warehouse.

BLACK-CLAD LEADER
What audacity! Brothers, kill him!
continuation:
All the black-clad men rush at YE FENG. YE FENG moves with lethal economy, using precise strikes, quickly rendering all the black-clad men immobile. They lie motionless.

The roar of motorcycles is heard outside the warehouse. Four motorcycles speed in, followed by a large group of reinforcements in black suits.

SUBORDINATE
(anxiously)
President! The Four Pillars are coming! We got your tracker signal—

The reinforcements rush into the warehouse and freeze when they see the enemies on the ground and YE FENG standing unharmed. A subordinate runs to LI SHIHENG and kneels before him.

SUBORDINATE
(stricken)
We were blocked at the bridge. President, please forgive us!

LI SHIHENG ignores the subordinate and walks straight to YE FENG, kneeling on one knee. All the reinforcements behind him kneel in unison.

LI SHIHENG
(voice cracking)
You wear no colors. No banners. Yet you stand when I fall.

YE FENG
(helping LI SHIHENG up)
Please rise. I don't want this.

LI SHIHENG
(standing, intense)
They broke every rule of this city to take me down. You... you had no reason to interfere. Yet here I stand.

LI SHIHENG takes out a black card from his chest and hands it to YE FENG.

LI SHIHENG
The Eighth Card. There are only seven in existence. Until now. This isn't a favor—it's a foundation. Whatever you build in this city, Liuhe stands beneath it.

YE FENG takes the black card, looks at LI SHIHENG, deep in thought.

title: Radiant Like Her
description: A wealthy heiress hides her identity to live a simple life with the man she loves, only to face a turning point on their third anniversary.
context:
Title: Radiant Like Her
Description: A wealthy heiress hides her identity to live a simple life with the man she loves, only to face a turning point on their third anniversary.

INT. BARBECUE STALL - NIGHT

JIANG YAO, a young woman in a simple apron, skillfully grills meat skewers. Her scarred hands belie her noble birth.

EXT. CITY NIGHT ROAD - NIGHT

A convoy of black luxury cars speeds through the night.

QIN YUE (V.O.)
The old master is dying. Three years of silence is enough.

The lead car is a Rolls-Royce, imposing and powerful.

INT. BARBECUE STALL - NIGHT

JIANG YAO serves the grilled skewers to two male customers, THUG A and THUG B.

JIANG YAO
Enjoy.

THUG A suddenly grabs JIANG YAO's wrist.

THUG A
(grinning)
Boss lady, you're too good for this dump. Come work for me.

JIANG YAO struggles forcefully.

JIANG YAO
Let go of me!

THUG B also steps forward, and together with THUG A, they pull at JIANG YAO.

THUD B
Don't be shy. We'll triple your pay.

JIANG YAO
Let go of me!

THUG B
Just hear us out.

Suddenly, a BODYGUARD in a suit rushes forward and kicks THUG B away. More BODYGUARDS appear and quickly subdue the two thugs.

QIN YUE walks over, surrounded by bodyguards. He pulls out a stack of cash from his pocket and throws it on the ground.
continuation:
QIN YUE
This money buys your lives. Don't let me see you in Jiangzhou again. Get lost!

The two thugs scramble to pick up the money and flee.

QIN YUE turns to JIANG YAO and bows respectfully.

QIN YUE
Young lady, your father's final wish is to see you. The contract you signed gave you away.

JIANG YAO
(coldly)
I signed as Jiang Yao. Hui Zhou knows nothing.

QIN YUE
The board knows everything. They expect their chairwoman tomorrow.

JIANG YAO
(emotionally)
I have an anniversary. I promised Hui Zhou—

QIN YUE
Three years of secret assistance ends now. He thinks he earned his success alone.

JIANG YAO
(touching her simple wedding ring)
He did. I only opened doors.

QIN YUE
The Jiang family fortune of hundreds of millions needs its heir. Not a grill cook.

JIANG YAO
No more persuasion. Go back.

QIN YUE has no choice but to leave with the bodyguards.

JIANG YAO watches them go, then begins to pack up her stall. She picks up an exquisitely wrapped pink gift box, a happy smile on her face.

JIANG YAO (V.O.)
Tomorrow I tell him everything. Three years of secrets end at our anniversary.

EXT. CITY STREET - DAY

A Rolls-Royce drives down the road.

JIANG YAO, holding the gift box, stands by the roadside, full of joy and anticipation.

The Rolls-Royce makes a beautiful drift and stops in front of JIANG YAO. The door opens, and a handsome man in a black coat with an extraordinary air steps out. This is HUI ZHOU.

HUI ZHOU looks at JIANG YAO, his eyes complex.

title: The Runaway Heiress
description: A wealthy heiress runs away from home for love, working as a delivery driver to support her boyfriend's business, while her protective brothers track her down.
context:
Title: The Runaway Heiress
Description: A wealthy heiress runs away from home for love, working as a delivery driver to support her boyfriend's business, while her protective brothers track her down.

.MONTAGE START

INT. CONFERENCE ROOM - DAY

SU JINGCHEN (eldest brother) sits at the head of a long conference table, his expression serious.

INT. AWARDS CEREMONY STAGE - DAY

SU TINGXUAN (second brother) wears a sequined suit, accepting an award.

EXT. RACE TRACK - DAY

SU ZIYAO (third brother) in racing gear, wearing a helmet, straddles a motorcycle, preparing for a race.

.MONTAGE END

INT. OFFICE - DAY

SU JINGCHEN is looking at his phone.

SU OLD MASTER (V.O.)
First, second, third sons.

EXT. RACE TRACK - DAY

SU ZIYAO is looking at his phone.

SU OLD MASTER (V.O.)
First, second, third sons.

INT. AWARDS CEREMONY BACKSTAGE - DAY

SU TINGXUAN is looking at his phone.

EXT. VILLA EXTERIOR - DAY

SU OLD MASTER holds his phone, shouting excitedly.

SU OLD MASTER
Your sister has been found!
continuation:
INT. CONFERENCE ROOM - DAY

SU JINGCHEN hears the news and immediately stands up.

SU JINGCHEN
Meeting adjourned. I need to pick up little sister.

He strides out of the conference room.
