INT. AWARDS CEREMONY STAGE - DAY

SU TINGXUAN shoves his newly received trophy into the presenter's hands.

SU TINGXUAN
Give the Tianma Award to someone else. I'm going to pick up my little sister.

He turns and walks off the stage.

EXT. RACE TRACK - DAY

SU ZIYAO speaks into his phone.

SU ZIYAO
Race postponed. I need to pick up my little sister first.

He starts his motorcycle and speeds away.

EXT. CITY PLAZA - DAY

SU WAN (little sister) wearing a yellow delivery uniform, sits on the steps reviewing her delivery app. Her phone chimes with an order notification.

PHONE NOTIFICATION
You have a new order, please check.

SU WAN immediately puts down her meal, grabs her helmet and phone, and runs toward her electric scooter.

Three heavy motorcycles and two luxury sports cars roar up and stop in the plaza.

SU JINGCHEN, SU TINGXUAN, and SU ZIYAO get out of their respective vehicles, walking toward SU WAN with powerful presence.

ON SCREEN character introduction subtitles appear:
SU TINGXUAN - Su Family Second Brother - Three-Time Golden Melody Winner
SU JINGCHEN - Su Family Eldest Brother - Chairman of Su Group
SU ZIYAO - Su Family Third Brother - GP Racing Champion

SU WAN sees them, looking panicked.

SU WAN
(internal monologue)
Dummy account compromised. Should've used a better VPN.

SU ZIYAO
Little sister. Your form's improved—took you ninety seconds to pocket that order.

SU JINGCHEN
You ran away for a year. Now that we finally found you, you want to run again?

SU WAN
(laughing awkwardly)
Hello, brothers. Great timing as always.

SU TINGXUAN
Little sister, you left for Jiang Hao. Does he know his girlfriend's a Su?

SU WAN
He knows I have money. He doesn't know I'm your sister. That's the point.

SU ZIYAO
So you're delivering food while his green tech startup pitches to our venture capital arm next week?

SU WAN
Someone had to teach you what actual work looks like. And yes, I ghost-wrote his deck.

SU JINGCHEN
Those projections were yours? The Henderson deal—

SU WAN
—was going to tank. You're welcome.

SU TINGXUAN
Little sister, come home. You don't need to prove anything.

SU WAN
I need to prove I can choose my own life. Investigate Jiang Hao if you want. Vet his code yourselves.

She mounts her scooter.

SU WAN
But right now, I have a delivery to make. And if you follow me, I'll route you through every red light in this city.

She rides off, beeping her horn twice.

The three brothers watch her departing figure.

SU ZIYAO
Eldest brother, what do we do now?

SU JINGCHEN
(eyes determined)
We do what she said. Investigate. Then we invest.

title: The Wife's Trial
description: On a snowy New Year's Eve, the wealthiest man in Ying City dies of food poisoning. His wife becomes the prime suspect and faces a three-day televised trial that could end in immediate execution.
context:
Title: The Wife's Trial
Description: On a snowy New Year's Eve, the wealthiest man in Ying City dies of food poisoning. His wife becomes the prime suspect and faces a three-day televised trial that could end in immediate execution.

EXT. LI FAMILY VILLA - NIGHT

Snow swirls beneath ambulance lights flashing red against the darkness.

ON SCREEN: December 31, 2023 - Outside the Li Family Villa

Reporters mass at the gates, cameras shouldering like weapons. Flashbulbs pop in irregular bursts, catching falling snowflakes mid-descent.

SHI ZHU (V.O.)
December 31. My husband died. They say I killed him.

INT. VILLA - NIGHT

Stretcher wheels whisper across marble. A gloved hand draws a blue sheet over still features. A platinum watch peeks from beneath—frozen at 11:47.

MEDICAL PERSONNEL navigate the stretcher through the gauntlet of reporters.

SHI ZHU (V.O.)
Food poisoning, the coroner said. Jasmine powder in his chicken soup.

CLOSE ON: A porcelain bowl, half-full of golden broth. LI GAISI's body lies on polished wood, a crimson thread at his lips.

The stretcher slides into the ambulance bay.

SHI ZHU (V.O.)
The soup I made.

SHI ZHU emerges, black silk evening gown untouched by the chaos. Security flanks her. She moves through the frenzy like a blade through water.

ON SCREEN: Shi Zhu - Wife of Ying City's Richest Man
continuation:
EXT. VILLA ENTRANCE - NIGHT

Reporters surge. Security forms a human wedge.

REPORTER 1
Mrs. Li—any response to the allegations?

REPORTER 2
Did you argue that evening, Mrs. Li?

Shi Zhu's face remains a mask. Only her eyes move—flickering across the crowd with something like assessment. The corner of her mouth twitches. Not quite a smile.

SECURITY GUARD
Step back! All of you!

SHI ZHU (V.O.)
They arrested me before dawn. The whole country watched.

EXT. CITY ROAD - NIGHT

Black SUVs knife through the city's neon veins.

SHI ZHU (V.O.)
The FTI. Financial Tribunal International. For cases that threaten market stability.

The convoy halts before a glass tower. CHIEF JUDGE LIN BIN exits, followed by his panel.

ON SCREEN: Chief Judge Lin Bin - FTI Special Tribunal

They stride toward the illuminated building.

SHI ZHU (V.O.)
Three days. Broadcast worldwide. A conviction means no appeal. No delays.

INT. COURTROOM - DAY

SHI ZHU stands in the dock, hands cuffed before her. The evening gown now looks like armor. She surveys the courtroom as if it belongs to her.

SHI ZHU (V.O.)
My life reduced to a 72-hour performance. Act one: establish doubt.

Chief Judge LIN BIN and the JURY take their positions. The gavel's crack echoes.

LIN BIN
This tribunal is now in session. Ms. Shi Zhu, how do you plead?

SHI ZHU
(eyes locked on Lin Bin)
Not guilty. To every charge.

LIN BIN
The deceased consumed chicken soup you prepared. You ate none. Explain.

SHI ZHU
The chicken was a Silkie. Twenty thousand yuan per bird. Li family tradition: precious ingredients are for the patriarch only.

LIN BIN
Tradition established by?

SHI ZHU
My mother-in-law. Wang Jie.

The camera FINDS WANG JIE in the gallery—fur draped over shoulders, knuckles white on her handbag.

ON SCREEN: Wang Jie - Family Matriarch

WANG JIE
(rising, voice trembling with fury)
Tradition? She's mocking us, Chief Judge. This woman—she's unnatural. She killed my son. And her own daughter—

The gallery erupts. Shi Zhu's head turns slowly toward Wang Jie. Her expression shifts: not quite a smile. Something colder. More knowing.

QUICK FLASH: WANG JIE cradles a small, still form. Blood on a child's lips. Her face—grief mixed with something else. Guilt?

ON SCREEN: TO BE CONTINUED

FADE OUT.

title: Getting Rich After Divorce
description: A gambling addict loses everything including his family in pursuit of a big win, only to face devastating consequences.
context:
Title: Getting Rich After Divorce
Description: A gambling addict loses everything including his family in pursuit of a big win, only to face devastating consequences.

INT. ONLINE CASINO - DAY

A DEALER (30s, polished, professional) faces the camera with a practiced smile.

DEALER
Hello, sir. I am your exclusive dealer. I will now deal the cards. Please place your bets.

INT. YE CHEN'S APARTMENT - DAY

SMASH CUT TO:

YE CHEN (40s, unshaven, eyes bloodshot) wears a stained tank top, frantically clicking his mouse. The laptop screen reflects cards being dealt.

LI MEIYUN (30s, exhausted, clutching medical bills) enters with their daughter, TONGTONG (7, frail, with a hospital bracelet).

LI MEIYUN
Ye Chen. The deed—where is it?

YE CHEN
(not turning)
Safe. Don't worry about it.

LI MEIYUN
You didn't.

YE CHEN
It's a concrete box. I'll buy you a real home.

LI MEIYUN
Tongtong's fever spiked again. They won't treat her without today's deposit.

TONGTONG
(weakly)
Daddy... my head hurts.

She touches his arm. Ye Chen flinches.

YE CHEN
(shrugging her off)
Not now. I'm close.

TONGTONG stumbles back, clips the table edge. Falls.

LI MEIYUN
Tongtong!

She rushes over. Blood seeps from the girl's temple.

LI MEIYUN
(quietly)
She needs you.

YE CHEN
I'm making the money you need!

LI MEIYUN
This is how?

YE CHEN
Insider information. This hand—then we're free.

LI MEIYUN stares at him, sees a stranger.

LI MEIYUN
You're already gone.

She scoops up Tongtong and leaves. The door slams.
continuation:
INT. YE CHEN'S APARTMENT - LATER

Ye Chen hunches closer to the screen, surrounded by takeout containers and cigarette butts.

DEALER (V.O.)
Banker nine points, player eight points. Banker wins.

YE CHEN
(wiping sweat)
Again. One more.

He types frantically to "Customer Service Wenwen." Messages bounce back: "User not found."

YE CHEN
No... Wenwen, the tip—why?

His phone RINGS—UNKNOWN NUMBER.

YE CHEN
(answering)
What?

DOCTOR (V.O.)
Mr. Ye? This is City Central. We called your wife's phone—yours was listed as emergency contact.

YE CHEN
Is she—

DOCTOR (V.O.)
About Tongtong. The fall caused a hemorrhage. We did everything we could.

The phone slips. Ye Chen stares at nothing. A laugh escapes—small, involuntary. He clamps a hand over his mouth. Tears fall. He laughs again, choking on it, collapsing into a sound that isn't quite human.

END SCENE

title: The Devil by My Side
description: A woman marries an older man for a dowry, only to endure abuse, betrayal, and ultimately a deadly conspiracy orchestrated by her husband and her best friend.
context:
Title: The Devil by My Side
Description: A woman marries an older man for a dowry, only to endure abuse, betrayal, and ultimately a deadly conspiracy orchestrated by her husband and her best friend.

INT. WEDDING BANQUET PRIVATE ROOM - DAY

HE RUOQING (20s) wears a red toast dress, serving tea to WANG MOTHER (50s). Her husband WANG CHANGLIN (40s) watches with detached amusement. Both sets of parents are present.

WANG MOTHER (accepting tea)
A daughter-in-law is family. You'll serve well.

He Ruoqing's smile doesn't reach her eyes.

INT. WEDDING BANQUET HALL - DAY

Wang Changlin's phone buzzes. He glances at the screen—ZHANG MEIZHEN's name visible—then at He Ruoqing, who looks away.

WANG CHANGLIN
(to He Ruoqing)
Business call.

He pockets the phone, screen-side in.

INT. WANG FAMILY HOUSE - DAY

He Ruoqing scrubs dishes. Her hands are raw. Wang Mother watches, unimpressed.

WANG MOTHER
My son married down. Remember your place.

Wang Changlin enters, smelling of alcohol. He grabs He Ruoqing's arm.

WANG CHANGLIN
Where's the money I gave you?

HE RUOQING
For groceries—

WANG CHANGLIN
(shoving her)
You think I don't know you steal?

INT. WANG FAMILY HOUSE - NIGHT

He Ruoqing curls on the sofa as Wang Changlin unbuckles his belt.

WANG CHANGLIN
(belt snapping)
Learn your lesson.

The blows land. He Ruoqing bites her lip, silent.

INT. UNDERGROUND CLINIC - DAY

He Ruoqing lies on a stained examination table, bleeding. The FEMALE DOCTOR (40s) shakes her head.

FEMALE DOCTOR
(to Wang Changlin)
She's lost the pregnancy. She needs rest, not more—

WANG CHANGLIN
It's just a child.

WANG MOTHER
She's young. She'll conceive again.

He Ruoqing turns her face to the wall, tears tracking down.
continuation:
INT. HE FAMILY HOUSE - DAY

He Ruoqing stands before her parents, clutching her bruised arm.

HE FATHER
Divorce? Over some arguments?

HE RUOQING
He hits me. I lost the baby—

HE FATHER
(slams table)
You endure! The dowry bought your brother's future!

HE MOTHER
Ruoqing, be reasonable.

He Ruoqing's younger brother HE BAOZHEN (20s) appears, hearing the raised voices.

HE BAOZHEN
Sis, what's wrong?

HE FATHER
Nothing! She's returning to her husband.

HE BAOZHEN
(breaking)
We used your dowry for my business. It failed. We're bankrupt.

HE RUOQING
(quietly)
How much?

HE BAOZHEN
Two hundred thousand. They'll take everything.

HE FATHER
You can't leave him. We need that money.

HE BAOZHEN
(pleading)
Sis, I didn't know. I'm sorry.

He produces a kitchen knife—not threatening, but desperate.

HE BAOZHEN
I'll end this. All of it.

HE FATHER
Baozhen!

HE BAOZHEN
(pointing knife at himself)
I ruined us. Let me fix it.

HE RUOQING
Stop!

She moves toward him. He shifts, knife now toward her.

HE BAOZHEN
(to their father)
Kneel! Beg her to stay, or I cut her first!

HE MOTHER
(screaming)
Baozhen, no!

He Ruoqing's father drops to his knees.

HE FATHER
Please. For your brother.

He Ruoqing walks out, leaving the knife clattering to the floor.

EXT. STREET - DAY

He Ruoqing sits at a bus stop, trembling. She scratches a lottery ticket from her purse—last month's purchase.

The numbers match. Not a million. Fifty thousand.

She laughs, a broken sound.

INT. BEDROOM - NIGHT

Wang Changlin and Zhang Meizhen lie tangled together. His phone shows a text: BANK ALERT: 50K DEPOSIT.

WANG CHANGLIN
She actually won.

ZHANG MEIZHEN
(kissing his neck)
Take it. Say it's joint property.

WANG CHANGLIN
Divorce would only get me half. This way...

ZHANG MEIZHEN
(smiling)
She'll give it willingly. For love.

INT. BATHTUB - NIGHT

He Ruoqing soaks in a tub, red candlelight flickering. Her phone shows texts from Wang Changlin: "Forgive me. Come home."

WANG CHANGLIN and Zhang Meizhen stand over her.

HE RUOQING
(weakly)
The water... feels strange...

WANG CHANGLIN
Just relax.

He Ruoqing's eyes flutter. She tries to stand, slips. Wang Changlin pushes her shoulders down.

HE RUOQING
(struggling)
I can't... breathe...

WANG CHANGLIN
(whispering)
For our future.

Zhang Meizhen holds her legs still. He Ruoqing's hands claw at the tub's edge, then go limp.

The water stills. Only candles remain lit.

title: Miss Zhong Who Doesn't Want to Get Married
description: A koi spirit loses her body after being struck by a coin during her tribulation and finds herself inhabiting the body of a woman in danger.
context:
Title: Miss Zhong Who Doesn't Want to Get Married
Description: A koi spirit loses her body after being struck by a coin during her tribulation and finds herself inhabiting the body of a woman in danger.

EXT. GARDEN POND - DAY

A tranquil garden, mist floating over the pond. ZHONG BAOYAN sits on a rock by the water, lost in thought. Across the pond, TANG XINYANG's figure appears and disappears in the mist.

ZHONG BAOYAN (V.O.)
Do you believe that to meet the right person, you would use up all your luck?

MONTAGE - VARIOUS LOCATIONS

- Zhong Baoyan angrily pushes away a man.  
- Tang Xinyang saves Zhong Baoyan from a speeding car. They fall together onto the car hood, close to each other.  
- Tang Xinyang gently holds Zhong Baoyan.  
- Zhong Baoyan lies in bed, thoughtful.  
- A man with glasses holds Zhong Baoyan in a wedding dress.  
- Zhong Baoyan tightly embraces Tang Xinyang.  
- Tang Xinyang holds an unconscious Zhong Baoyan in his arms, looking panicked.  

TANG XINYANG
(shouting)
Baoyan, Baoyan!

TITLE CARD: Six Months Ago

INT. KTV ROOM - NIGHT

Noisy music, flashing lights. A group of young people dancing and celebrating.

ZHONG BAOYAN walks in carrying a FENDI gift bag. She sees her friend NANA. Her movements carry an unnatural grace—she's still learning to inhabit this body.

NANA
Baoyan! You made it!

ZHONG BAOYAN
Happy birthday. I... had trouble finding the place.

NANA
You seem different. More poised somehow.

Nana runs over and hugs Zhong Baoyan tightly.

NANA (CONT'D)
Thank you, babe! This bag costs a fortune.

Later. Nana is singing karaoke. Zhong Baoyan sits on the sofa, watching the room with ancient eyes. A man, NANA'S SENIOR, watches her from a distance.

NANA
(to Zhong Baoyan)
You sing first, I'm going to the restroom.

ZHONG BAOYAN
I'll wait here.

Nana leaves. Nana's senior carries two drinks and comes to sit next to Zhong Baoyan. She tenses imperceptibly—predator instincts recognize predator.

NANA'S SENIOR
I'm Nana's college senior. Let me toast you.

He hands her a drink. She accepts it, her eyes narrowing.

ZHONG BAOYAN
What is this?

NANA'S SENIOR
Just whiskey. You looked thirsty.

Both drink. He watches her with calculated patience.

NANA'S SENIOR (CONT'D)
You're not like Nana's other friends. There's something... different about you.

Zhong Baoyan's vision begins to blur. She grips the armrest.

ZHONG BAOYAN (V.O.)
Poisoned. Like river water turned to ink.

NANA'S SENIOR
(leaning closer)
Had too much to drink? We have a room upstairs where you can rest.
continuation:
INT. HOTEL ROOM - NIGHT

Nana's senior guides Zhong Baoyan to a luxurious bed. She's dazed but fighting consciousness. He locks the door.

NANA'S SENIOR
This drug works fast. But don't worry—you have spirit. I like that.

ZHONG BAOYAN (V.O.)
I am a koi spirit, not prey in a net.

Nana's senior begins to unbutton his shirt and reaches out to touch her. Zhong Baoyan's hand shoots up, gripping his wrist with surprising strength.

ZHONG BAOYAN
(whispering)
Water repays every debt. Every drop.

A pipe suddenly bursts in the bathroom. Water floods the suite. He slips, cursing, as she rolls off the bed.

FLASHBACK

TITLE CARD: One Hundred Years of Cultivation

EXT. GARDEN POND - DAY

KOI SPIRIT, in beautiful ancient costume, kneels by the same pond. She speaks to the koi swimming below.

KOI SPIRIT
Today I complete my tribulation. A century of merit, and I can find my sister at the Dragon Palace. Remember—cultivate with purpose.

TANG XINYANG, wearing a modern suit, walks through the garden background. He flips a commemorative coin upward.

The coin arcs through the air and strikes the koi spirit's forehead. She gasps, falling backward. Her form flickers between human and spirit.

KOI SPIRIT (V.O.)
One hundred years... could metal and chance undo it all?

On the rock by the pond, a koi fish flops helplessly. The koi spirit's body on the ground shimmers, then vanishes completely.

END OF FLASHBACK

EXT. HOTEL - NIGHT

Tang Xinyang's car screeches to a halt. He sees Zhong Baoyan stumble out, drenched and glowing faintly in the streetlight. He recognizes something impossible.

TANG XINYANG
That woman... the one I thought I imagined...

He runs toward her.

FADE OUT.

title: The Secret That Cannot Be Told
description: A security guard gains the ability to see people's secrets after hitting his head, discovering hidden truths about those around him.
context:
Title: The Secret That Cannot Be Told
Description: A security guard gains the ability to see people's secrets after hitting his head, discovering hidden truths about those around him.

EXT. RESIDENTIAL COMMUNITY ENTRANCE - DAY

A young SECURITY GUARD squats by the roadside, eating his boxed meal while highlighting a worn security manual.

A WOMAN IN PINK walks toward the entrance, designer bag clutched tight, on her phone. The SECURITY GUARD glances up.

The WOMAN IN PINK stops, her shoulders tightening.

WOMAN IN PINK
(to the guard, voice sharp)
Problem?

SECURITY GUARD
(standing)
Just verifying resident access, ma'am.

WOMAN IN PINK
(ends her call)
Do I look like I need verifying?

SECURITY GUARD
I'd be happy to—

WOMAN IN PINK
(flashes her keycard, cutting him off)
You were staring.

SECURITY GUARD
(quietly)
My apologies. Protocol requires—

WOMAN IN PINK
(impatiently)
Protocol? One complaint and you're scanning IDs at a parking garage.

She thrusts her keycard toward him. He processes it with his phone. The gate opens.

She snatches the phone back, her polished facade cracking—exhaustion flickers across her face.

WOMAN IN PINK
(low, almost to herself)
Don't let me see you looking again.

She sweeps through the gate. The SECURITY GUARD watches her go, jaw tight.

BROTHER WANG leans out from the guard booth, thermos in hand.

BROTHER WANG
continuation:
Kid, some battles you don't fight.

SECURITY GUARD
(quietly)
She's not a battle. She's just...

BROTHER WANG
Rich? Stressed? Doesn't matter. They're all buttons you don't push.

BROTHER WANG
Last month, Chen from Block 3 reduced a guard to tears over a wet umbrella. That's the math.

SECURITY GUARD
Maybe he should've—

BROTHER WANG
Known his place? These apartments cost more than our souls.

The SECURITY GUARD turns, his foot catches on the manual. He falls backward, head cracking against concrete.

SECURITY GUARD
(groaning)
Ah... damn.

He sits up, head throbbing. BROTHER WANG rushes over.

BROTHER WANG
You alright?

Suddenly, the air shimmers around BROTHER WANG. Transparent images flicker—cash register, hospital bill, his fingers sliding money into his pocket. Ghostly text appears.

SYSTEM VOICE (V.O.)
[Name: Wang Gang] [Discrepancy: 574 yuan. Context: Wife's medication.]

The SECURITY GUARD blinks hard. The images vanish.

SECURITY GUARD
(disoriented)
I saw... your wife's pills.

BROTHER WANG
What?

SECURITY GUARD
(looks at him sharply)
Last week. The equipment purchase. You moved 574 yuan.

BROTHER WANG's face goes slack. The thermos slips from his hand, dents on concrete. His eyes show not just terror, but a deep, worn shame.

BROTHER WANG
(hoarse whisper)
How... how could you possibly...

title: Return of the King - Homecoming in Glory (Episode 87)
description: A corrupt contractor refuses to pay migrant workers their wages, boasting about his powerful connections, when a mysterious woman arrives to stop the violence.
context:
Title: Return of the King - Homecoming in Glory (Episode 87)
Description: A corrupt contractor refuses to pay migrant workers their wages, boasting about his powerful connections, when a mysterious woman arrives to stop the violence.

INT. OFFICE - DAY

WANG FU sits on a leather sofa, an arm draped around each of two women. One pours champagne, the other offers him a cherry.

WOMAN A
Brother Fu.

WOMAN B
Have another.

WANG FU
He drains the glass, takes the cherry, and laughs—a rolling, satisfied sound.

WANG FU
(laughing)
Good. Very good.

EXT. CONSTRUCTION SITE GATE - DAY

Two dozen MIGRANT WORKERS block the entrance, hoisting a red banner: "QIANGSHENG GROUP: RETURN OUR HARD-EARNED MONEY!!!" Their white signs read "PAY YOUR DEBTS."

MIGRANT WORKERS
(chanting)
Return our hard-earned money! Pay us! Wang Fu pay us!

INT. OFFICE - DAY

A sharp KNOCK.

WANG FU
Come in.

WANG FU'S SUBORDINATE enters, face slick with sweat.

WANG FU'S SUBORDINATE
Brother Fu, the workers. They're all here.

WOMAN A
We'll wait inside.

WANG FU
(to the women)
Don't move. I'll handle this.

He rises, straightening his collar, and exits.
continuation:
EXT. CONSTRUCTION SITE SECOND FLOOR CORRIDOR - DAY

WANG FU and his subordinate overlook the courtyard. Five THUGS grip metal clubs below.

WANG FU
(shouting)
Clear them out!

The THUGS charge. The workers stand firm. Clubs swing. Bodies fall.

MIGRANT WORKERS
(screaming)
Stop hitting! You're killing us! We just want our wages!

WANG FU
(calling down)
Enough!

The THUGS lower their weapons. Workers lie bleeding in the dust.

WANG FU
(arrogantly)
You stinking migrants dare ask me for money? Leave now, or don't leave at all.

MIGRANT WORKER REPRESENTATIVE
(cradling a broken arm)
Boss Wang, you promised—year-end settlement. Our families starve!

MIGRANT WORKERS
Pay us! Pay us!

WANG FU
I promised nothing. I won't pay. What will you do?

MIGRANT WORKER A
Report you! CEO Chen's policy—no delayed wages!

MIGRANT WORKER B
He'll bury you!

MIGRANT WORKERS
Report! Report!

WANG FU
(sneering)
Chen Zhi'an? Jiangzhou's richest man? He built this city on your backs—and he doesn't remember your faces. Beat them again.

The THUGS raise their clubs.

MIGRANT WORKERS
(desperate)
No! Mercy! Our children!

EXT. CONSTRUCTION SITE ROAD - DAY

A convoy of black SUVs arrives. The lead vehicle displays license plate "NAN A·88888."

The rear door opens. A MYSTERIOUS WOMAN steps out—impeccable suit, eyes like flint. BODYGUARDS fan out behind her.

MYSTERIOUS WOMAN
(sternly)
Everyone stop.

WANG FU turns. The blood drains from his face.

WANG FU
(whispering)
...It can't be.

title: The Domineering CEO's Strategy Manual
description: A journalist accidentally photographs a boss harassing an employee at a car show and must flee, finding unexpected refuge in a mysterious car.
context:
Title: The Domineering CEO's Strategy Manual
Description: A journalist accidentally photographs a boss harassing an employee at a car show and must flee, finding unexpected refuge in a mysterious car.

INT. CAR SHOW VENUE - DAY

A series of close-up shots of luxury sports cars, accompanied by upbeat music.

Several CAR MODELS pose in various positions next to the luxury cars.

MENG RUI'ER (30s, determined, camera bag worn like armor) scans the crowd, her press pass visible. Her colleague DING HAOJIE (20s, nervous, juggling equipment) trails behind.

DING HAOJIE
Chief says we need shots of the new Fleetwood coupe. Just... cars, right? No drama?

MENG RUI'ER
(eyes narrowing)
Just cars. I'm here for the wheels, not the heels.

She raises her camera, framing a pristine vehicle. Through the lens, she spots a MAN IN TAILORED SUIT whispering intensely to a WOMAN in company uniform.

INT. CAR SHOW ANOTHER CORNER - DAY

The BOSS (40s, silver cufflinks, voice like pressed steel) corners XIAO LI (20s, makeup barely hiding her exhaustion) near a display pedestal.

BOSS
Xiao Li. Your mother's specialist consultation. It's scheduled for Monday. Company policy provides discretionary support for... loyal employees.

He places an envelope on the pedestal. His hand rests on hers.

XIAO LI
(quietly, frozen)
Boss, I appreciate the help. But this isn't—

BOSS
(softly)
The contract extension just needs your signature. Tonight. At the hotel suite. We'll discuss your future.

He leans closer. Her badge catches the light as she flinches.

MENG RUI'ER peeks from behind a pillar, snapping rapid shots. Her lens cap accidentally drops—CLATTERING against marble.

BOSS
(turning, voice dropping an octave)
Interesting. Company media policy prohibits unauthorized photography.

He signals two SECURITY GUARDS with a subtle hand gesture.

BOSS
(to guards)
That equipment contains proprietary images. Retrieve it. Now.

MENG RUI'ER
(to herself, snatching lens cap)
Stupid. Stupid.

She sprints away.
continuation:
INT. CORRIDOR - DAY

MENG RUI'ER runs, shoving the camera into DING HAOJIE's hands.

MENG RUI'ER
Memory card's in the side pocket. Get it to Xu at Legal. Tell him "Project Lavender."

DING HAOJIE
(confused, panicking)
Legal? What are you—

MENG RUI'ER
Just run!

She bolts down a different corridor, her phone already dialing a number.

SECURITY GUARDS
(to radio)
Seal the east exit. Female journalist, press pass.

DING HAOJIE looks at the camera, then at Meng's retreating form. He slips out a service door.

EXT. BACK ALLEY - NIGHT

MENG RUI'ER emerges into a narrow service alley, breathless. She pockets her phone, deletes a recent call.

MENG RUI'ER
(to herself)
Great. Expose corruption, lose job, possibly get sued. Happy Tuesday.

A BLACK SEDAN with tinted windows idles at the alley's end, exhaust curling in the cold. The rear door UNLOCKS with a soft CLICK. Through the tinted glass, she sees the silhouettes of the pursuing GUARDS at the alley entrance.

MENG RUI'ER hesitates, then ducks inside.

INT. SEDAN - NIGHT

MENG RUI'ER collapses against the leather seat, shoulder brushing the MAN beside her. He wears gold-rimmed glasses, his attention fixed on a tablet displaying her press badge photo.

MAN
(without looking up)
Project Lavender. Bold codename. The data breach lawsuit from last year?

MENG RUI'ER
(stiffening)
Who—

MAN
(swipes tablet, revealing case files)
You're investigating Apex Automotive's labor violations. I know. I hired Xu.

He finally turns. His eyes are cold, analytical.

MAN
Now. Let's discuss whether you want to survive this story... or become it.

title: Prosperous Blossoms
description: A modern finance student is electrocuted and transported into an ancient dynasty, where he wakes up in the empress's bed, facing the same fate as his historical namesake.
context:
Title: Prosperous Blossoms
Description: A modern finance student is electrocuted and transported into an ancient dynasty, where he wakes up in the empress's bed, facing the same fate as his historical namesake.

INT. APARTMENT - DAY

XIAO QIAN and his GIRLFRIEND are passionately kissing against the wall. She pulls back, breathless.

GIRLFRIEND
Shower first. You're vibrating with caffeine.

XIAO QIAN
That's just market excitement. Made three hundred on the yuan dip.

XIAO QIAN
Wait for me.

INT. BEDROOM - DAY

GIRLFRIEND towel-dries her hair, picks up an ancient book from the study materials. She reads aloud.

GIRLFRIEND
(sardonic)
"Xiao Qian of the Southern Kingdom—gambled away his fortune, sold his wife into servitude, and after failing as a eunuch, was executed by five horses for touching the Emperor."

She flips the page. The book's spine crackles with static electricity.

GIRLFRIEND
(calling out)
Your father sent another "educational" text. This guy's supposedly our ancestor?
continuation:
INT. BATHROOM - DAY

XIAO QIAN wipes steam from the mirror, sees the CURLING IRON dangling near the sink edge—unplugged but still hot.

XIAO QIAN
(to himself)
Risk assessment: high. Reward: none.

He reaches to move it safely away. His wet hand touches the metal.

A neon-blue current erupts—not from the iron, but from the ANCIENT BOOK in the other room, channeling through the apartment's wiring.

XIAO QIAN's body seizes. The mirror cracks, spiderwebbing from his reflection.

INT. BEDROOM - DAY

GIRLFRIEND sees blue light bleeding under the bathroom door. She drops the book.

GIRLFRIEND
Xiao Qian!

The book flares. Pages fly, whipping into a vortex.

MONTAGE

Blue lightning becomes silk threads. The apartment's modern grid morphs into ancient constellations. "Southern Kingdom" appears in elegant calligraphy across a dawn sky.

INT. ANCIENT PALACE BEDCHAMBER - DAWN

XIAO QIAN gasps awake. Silk sheets. Sandalwood and wine. His hands clutch brocade.

He turns. Beside him, the EMPRESS sleeps with a dagger under her pillow.

XIAO QIAN
(whisper)
No... no, no, no...

He checks his body—intact. Then spots his reflection: he's wearing a EUNUCH'S UNIFORM.

XIAO QIAN
(voice cracking)
I'm the eunuch. The one who—

The Empress stirs. Xiao Qian freezes. His hand brushes her ankle.

The Empress's eyes snap open. Her hand goes for the dagger.

EMPRESS
(low, dangerous)
Another one who wants to die before sunrise?

XIAO QIAN
Your Majesty, I—I tripped on history!

VOICE (O.S.)
Urgent news! The Emperor approaches!

The Empress's gaze doesn't leave Xiao Qian. She smiles, thin and terrible.

ON SCREEN: TO BE CONTINUED

title: The CEO's Wife Is A Bit Wild
description: A young woman in a wedding dress flees from a forced marriage, only to collide with a wheelchair-bound CEO who recognizes her as the doctor who once saved him.
context:
Title: The CEO's Wife Is A Bit Wild
Description: A young woman in a wedding dress flees from a forced marriage, only to collide with a wheelchair-bound CEO who recognizes her as the doctor who once saved him.

INT. HOTEL CORRIDOR - DAY

A magnificent door swings open. SHEN QINGHUAN (24) stumbles out in a voluminous white wedding dress, her veil torn. She kicks off her heels and sprints barefoot.

Two MEN IN BLACK round the corner behind her.

MAN IN BLACK 1
Third floor! Move!

MAN IN BLACK 2
Split up—cut her off at the service elevator!

Their radios crackle with coordination as they fan out with practiced precision.

INT. HOTEL STAIRCASE/CORRIDOR - DAY

SHEN QINGHUAN lifts her elaborate gown and takes the stairs two at a time, fabric ripping. She bursts through a fire door into—

A stark white corridor. At the far end, a glass wall overlooks the atrium.

She skids to a stop. Her reflection reveals desperate eyes and a smudged cheek—but also fierce determination.

Behind her, footsteps echo. Multiple sets. They're boxing her in.

SHEN QINGHUAN spots an arched side corridor. She darts toward it.

The Men in Black converge at the archway. They peer down the empty corridor. One checks under a housekeeping cart. The other sweeps behind a pillar—nothing.

MAN IN BLACK 1
(into radio)
She's in the walls. Check all service access on levels four and five.

They retreat, boots clicking in precision.

SHEN QINGHUAN slips out from behind a recessed wall panel, not a pillar. She exhales, clutching a stolen access keycard.
continuation:
INT. LOUNGE - DAY

FU ZHOUCHENG (30s) sits in a carbon-fiber wheelchair, a cashmere blanket across his lap. His assistant WANG ZHANG (40s) pushes him toward floor-to-ceiling windows.

WANG ZHANG
The German specialist arrives Tuesday. Until then, Doctor Murad suggests hydrotherapy—

FU ZHOUCHENG
(gazing out at city)
I didn't ask for suggestions. I asked for results.

His fingers trace a small red amulet in his palm.

FU ZHOUCHENG
(low)
Five years. She'd be what... twenty-four now?

WANG ZHANG
Sir?

FU ZHOUCHENG
Nothing.

INT. HOSPITAL ROOM - NIGHT

FLASHBACK:

YOUNG FU ZHOUCHENG lies in a dimly lit ICU, monitors beeping softly. His leg is in a complex external fixation frame.

The door cracks open. INTERN SHEN QINGHUAN checks both ways before slipping in.

SHEN QINGHUAN
(whispering)
They said you refused sedation. That's... either very brave or very stupid.

FU ZHOUCHENG
(deadpan)
The morphine makes the dreams worse.

She notices his clenched fist—he's been biting his hand to stay conscious.

Without a word, she produces a small red amulet from her ID badge lanyard.

SHEN QINGHUAN
My grandmother gave me this. Said it helped her through the Cultural Revolution. Placebo effect is scientifically documented.

She drapes it over his IV pole.

SHEN QINGHUAN
If you make it through tonight without punching a nurse, you can return it. Deal?

A ghost of a smile crosses his face.

END FLASHBACK.

INT. LOUNGE - DAY

FU ZHOUCHENG's phone buzzes. He glances at it—an urgent message from Legal.

WANG ZHANG
The Shen Group acquisition papers?

FU ZHOUCHENG
They're trying to force the daughter's signature. Find out why.

Suddenly, a blur of white careens through the lounge door.

SHEN QINGHUAN, breathing hard, sprints straight toward the windows—then sees the wheelchair.

She tries to stop. Her wedding dress's train catches on a floor lamp.

She crashes into FU ZHOUCHENG's wheelchair. They tumble backward.

WANG ZHANG lunges but too late.

FU ZHOUCHENG catches SHEN QINGHUAN as they fall. Her face ends up inches from his.

He stares at her. She stares back, wild-eyed.

The amulet falls from his hand, landing on her heaving chest.

FU ZHOUCHENG
(softly, amazed)
...You kept it.

Behind them, the Men in Black burst through the door.

FREEZE ON SHEN QINGHUAN's shocked face.

title: Dragon Abyss
description: A delivery man named Lin Yang, betrayed and left for dead by his wife, returns after three years of mastering divine martial arts, seeking revenge with the power of dragon blood and the authority of Haotian Hall.
context:
Title: Dragon Abyss
Description: A delivery man named Lin Yang, betrayed and left for dead by his wife, returns after three years of mastering divine martial arts, seeking revenge with the power of dragon blood and the authority of Haotian Hall.

EXT. BUSINESS CENTER EXTERIOR - DAY

Two delivery workers, LIN YANG and his COLLEAGUE, sit on the steps outside a building eating boxed lunches.

COLLEAGUE
You barely touched your food. Third day in a row.

(beat)
Your ex... she's not worth destroying yourself over.

The COLLEAGUE offers a boiled egg. LIN YANG's knuckles whiten around his chopsticks.

A SECURITY GUARD approaches, his radio crackling with static.

SECURITY GUARD
Delivery guys can't loiter here. Event prep starts tonight.

The GUARD's boot "accidentally" catches LIN YANG's lunch box, spilling it down the steps.

SECURITY GUARD
(tight smile)
Oops. These steps are for tenants. Not sewer rats who can't read signs.

LIN YANG rises slowly, his breathing measured. The air seems to grow heavier.

LIN YANG
You wear a uniform. Does it make you forget you're also just a man?

The GUARD's hand drifts toward his baton. LIN YANG's eyes fix on a spot over the guard's shoulder—seeing something else.

LIN YANG's mind flashes back to his master's teachings.

MASTER (V.O.)
The mountain teaches patience. The world will test it.

FLASHBACK BEGINS:
continuation:
EXT. MOUNTAIN PAVILION - DAY

On a misty mountaintop, LIN YANG sits cross-legged in white robes, meditating. Energy ripples distort the air around him.

MASTER (V.O.)
Three winters. Three summers. You rebuilt yourself from nothing.

The MASTER, an elderly man with white hair and a long beard, materializes from the mist. LIN YANG's eyes snap open—solid gold pupils that fade back to brown.

LIN YANG
Master... the visions won't stop.

MASTER
They are not visions. They are memories your body refuses to release.

The MASTER places a hand on LIN YANG's shoulder. Ancient scars beneath the fabric pulse with faint light.

MASTER
She took your marrow. The mountain gave you something... else. Something that hasn't walked this earth in five dynasties.

The MASTER removes a dragon-shaped ring from his finger. It seems carved from solid twilight.

MASTER
Haotian Hall waits for one who can carry its weight without being crushed. Show me you are that man.

LIN YANG accepts the ring. The metal burns cold against his skin.

MASTER
The silver needles. The technique I taught you... it wasn't for healing. It was to teach you control. Dragon blood doesn't obey those ruled by rage.

LIN YANG's jaw tightens. When he speaks, his voice carries an undercurrent that makes the mist recede.

LIN YANG
Then what obeys?

MASTER
Purpose.

END FLASHBACK.

EXT. BUSINESS CENTER EXTERIOR - DAY

The scene cuts back to reality. The SECURITY GUARD is sweating now, though he doesn't know why.

SECURITY GUARD
Tomorrow... the Song family marries off their daughter here. Miss Song Wan'er. Xiao family. Biggest event of the year. I'm not losing my job because some delivery trash—

The name hits LIN YANG like a physical blow. His COLLEAGUE notices Lin's stillness—the dangerous kind.

LIN YANG
(VO)
Wan'er. Here. So close I can taste the irony.

The ring on his finger—drab, unremarkable—catches a sliver of sunlight. For an instant, it gleams like a predator's eye.

LIN YANG's fingers flex. Somewhere in the business center, every light bulb flickers.

LIN YANG
(softly, to the guard)
You should leave now.

The GUARD hesitates, sensing something fundamentally wrong, but his pride won't let him retreat.

SECURITY GUARD
Or what?

LIN YANG smiles. It's not a pleasant expression.

LIN YANG
Or you'll learn what happens when dragon blood remembers.

title: Flying Life: 1988
description: A father sells his daughter for money, leading to tragedy and a cycle of revenge that spans twenty years.
context:
Title: Flying Life: 1988
Description: A father sells his daughter for money, leading to tragedy and a cycle of revenge that spans twenty years.

INT. QI FENG'S HOUSE - NIGHT

A man (THIRD BROTHER) examines a little girl's (QI XIAOYA) teeth.

QI XIAOYA
(crying)
Dad, I'm scared.

QI FENG
(to Xiaoya)
Quiet.
(to Third Brother)
She's healthy. Never sick.

THIRD BROTHER
Six hundred. Market's flooded.

QI FENG
You said eight last month!

THIRD BROTHER
Take it or leave it. The loan sharks want their money tonight.

Qi Feng glances at the table: medical bills, pill bottles, a loan notice.

QI FENG grabs Xiaoya's arm, hard.

QI XIAOYA
Dad, I'll eat less! I promise!

QI FENG hands XIAOYA to THIRD BROTHER, who passes him a thin stack of cash. QI FENG counts it frantically.

THIRD BROTHER and his accomplice carry away the struggling XIAOYA.

SU QIAN enters, dropping groceries, seeing the scene.

SU QIAN
Qi Feng! What are you doing?

QI FENG
Stay out of it!

They struggle. He pushes. She falls, hits her head, lies still.

QI XIAOYA
Mom!

The door slams. QI FENG drops beside SU QIAN. She stirs, eyes slits.

SU QIAN
(whisper)
My baby...

She crawls to the kitchen drawer. Pulls out scissors.

QI FENG
Su Qian, don't—

She stabs her stomach. Determined. Not theatrical. Blood spreads.

QI FENG catches her falling body.

SU QIAN
(blood on lips, barely breathing)
She will hate you... forever...

She goes limp. The money falls from QI FENG's hands, scattering.
continuation:
INT. HOSPITAL WARD - DAY

Twenty years later.

The heart monitor beeps. QI FENG (60s, frail but wealthy) lies with oxygen tube.

NEWS BROADCAST (V.O.)
Jiangzhou's richest man, Qi Feng, built his empire on contested evictions. Now dying, he claims he's found his estranged daughter...

Adult QI XIAOYA (30s, composed, sharp suit) enters.

QI FENG
(weak, eyes opening)
Xiaoya... you came.

He gestures to an envelope on the bedside table.

QI FENG
Everything... for you. Please forgive...

XIAOYA takes the will, glances at it, tears it in half.

ADULT XIAOYA
Six hundred yuan. Sold to a mountain village. Married at thirteen. I traced your blood money through every corrupt deal, every shell company, to find you.

QI FENG
(crying)
I had no choice. Your mother's medicine—

ADULT XIAOYA
You chose. I survived. She didn't.

She pulls out the oxygen tube. The monitor alarms.

ADULT XIAOYA
Mom was right.

She watches the flatline, face empty, then turns and leaves.

INT. QI FENG'S HOUSE - NIGHT (FLASHBACK)

QI FENG wakes from drunkenness. SU QIAN holds XIAOYA in the corner.

SU QIAN
Don't come closer!

QI XIAOYA
Dad, I'll collect more bottles! Don't sell me!

THIRD BROTHER bursts in with two men.

THIRD BROTHER
Qi Feng! The loan sharks sent us. Fifty thousand, or we take the girl and your kidneys.

Qi Feng sees the unsigned transfer paper. Su Qian's terminal diagnosis. Xiaoya's terrified face.

His hand shakes as he reaches for the pen.

QI FENG signs. THIRD BROTHER takes the paper, satisfied.

THIRD BROTHER
Smart man. You'll bounce back.

Qi Feng sits alone, crumpling Xiaoya's drawing: "Daddy, I love you." He presses it to his face.

FADE OUT.

title: After Big Brother's Death, Sister-in-Law Goes Berserk
description: After her husband's sudden death, a powerful woman faces challenges from the family as they try to seize control of the estate.
context:
Title: After Big Brother's Death, Sister-in-Law Goes Berserk
Description: After her husband's sudden death, a powerful woman faces challenges from the family as they try to seize control of the estate.

INT. PARKING GARAGE - DAY

A white van door opens. 

SHEN QIUSHUI, wearing a white cheongsam and sunglasses, steps out with a commanding presence. Her gloved hand grips the doorframe a moment too long—just enough to notice—before releasing. A young male assistant immediately approaches and drapes a black coat over her shoulders.

ON SCREEN: SHEN QIUSHUI - ELDEST SISTER-IN-LAW OF THE SONG FAMILY

EXT. MANOR ENTRANCE - DAY

A row of black-suited BODYGUARDS stand in formation at the entrance. As SHEN QIUSHUI approaches, they bow in unison at ninety degrees.

BODYGUARDS
(in unison)
Good day, Sister-in-Law!

SHEN QIUSHUI walks past them expressionlessly and enters through the gate.

INT. MOURNING HALL - DAY

The mourning hall is solemnly decorated. Guests in dark suits with yellow ribbons pinned to their chests line both sides.

ANNOUNCER (O.S.)
Sister-in-Law has arrived!

SHEN QIUSHUI, accompanied by her assistant, walks down the black-carpeted aisle with a cold gaze. Guests whisper among themselves.

GUEST 1
She's the wife of Boss Song.

GUEST 2
That's right. They hadn't been married three months when Boss Song suddenly died.

GUEST 1
With such a major upheaval, the Song family is in for a bloodbath.

A MAN holding SONG XINGZHI's portrait approaches and hands it to SHEN QIUSHUI.

SHEN QIUSHUI takes the portrait and slowly walks toward the altar at the front of the hall. She places the portrait carefully, then takes out a yellow tulip from inside her coat. Her fingers linger on the petals for a heartbeat before she gently places it beside the portrait.

SHEN QIUSHUI turns to face all the guests.

SHEN QIUSHUI
Thank you all for attending my late husband's funeral.

SONG ZHENGDE, a middle-aged man wearing glasses, steps forward.

ON SCREEN: SONG ZHENGDE - SECOND UNCLE OF THE SONG FAMILY

SONG ZHENGDE
Niece-in-law, please accept my condolences. 

He reaches out to pat SHEN QIUSHUI's shoulder. She sidesteps, her hand brushing his away with a controlled flick that borders on offensive.

SONG ZHENGDE awkwardly retreats to the side.

A YOUNG WOMAN steps forward, glaring at SHEN QIUSHUI.

YOUNG WOMAN
Shen Qiushui, how can you be so rude? My father is just showing concern.

SHEN QIUSHUI ignores her and walks directly to a chair, sitting down. She picks up an apple and a small knife from the table and begins to peel the apple in one continuous, spiraling motion.

SHEN QIUSHUI
Concern for me? Or concern for the thirty-seven subsidiaries and the seal that controls them?
continuation:
YOUNG WOMAN
You—

SONG ZHENGDE restrains his daughter and steps forward to address SHEN QIUSHUI.

SONG ZHENGDE
Niece-in-law, although you are Song Xingzhi's wife, now that Xingzhi has passed, and moreover, you're an outsider to the family name. The Song enterprise must be handed over to someone with Song bloodline.

SHEN QIUSHUI
(stops peeling the apple)
What if I refuse?

A MAN in a blue suit steps forward arrogantly.

PROVOCATIVE MAN
What does a woman like you understand about running a conglomerate? Go back to your tea parties. Hand over the seal now, or you'll find out how we handle trespassers.

SHEN QIUSHUI's ASSISTANT suddenly laughs—a sharp, humorless sound.

ASSISTANT
Ha ha ha!

PROVOCATIVE MAN
(to the assistant)
Even your lackey knows you're finished. Stop struggling.

ASSISTANT
(smiling)
I'm laughing at your funeral.

PROVOCATIVE MAN
You—

Before he can finish, SHEN QIUSHUI suddenly hurls the small knife in her hand.

The knife whistles through the air, precisely slashing the provocative man's cheek and embedding itself deep in the door frame behind him.

The PROVOCATIVE MAN's legs give way and he collapses to the ground, clutching his bleeding face, staring at SHEN QIUSHUI in terror.

SHEN QIUSHUI
(turning her head slightly, coldly)
Sorry. My hand slipped.

PROVOCATIVE MAN
(trembling all over)
Noth... nothing...

SHEN QIUSHUI snorts coldly and crosses her arms. Her assistant taps his earpiece once. The bodyguards from the entrance rush in with batons, forming a perimeter around the hall.

SHEN QIUSHUI
(looking around)
Does anyone else want to speak?

The hall falls completely silent.

Suddenly, a loud voice comes from outside the mourning hall.

VOICES (O.S.)
Yes!

The doors of the mourning hall are pushed open forcefully. Blinding sunlight streams in. A tall figure walks in against the light with steady steps—the same measured gait from the photograph.

The newcomer is the man from the portrait—SONG XINGZHI. He wears a black coat, his face stern, his eyes sharp. A thin scar mars his temple that wasn't in the photograph.

Everyone stares at him in shock, as if seeing a ghost.

SONG XINGZHI walks to the center of the mourning hall, stops, and scans the entire room with a determined gaze that lands last on SHEN QIUSHUI and the knife still quivering in the doorframe.

title: Martial Soul Under Heaven & Martial Blood Loyal Heart (Episode 78)
description: After a decade of hunting, Yang Zaitian confronts the mastermind behind his family's massacre, forcing him to choose between vengeance and the future he fought to protect.
context:
Title: Martial Soul Under Heaven & Martial Blood Loyal Heart (Episode 78)
Description: After a decade of hunting, Yang Zaitian confronts the mastermind behind his family's massacre, forcing him to choose between vengeance and the future he fought to protect.

EXT. ROOFTOP - DAY

Blinding sunlight beats down. YANG ZAITIAN (30s), bare-chested and scarred, plants a black-flagged spear into the roof tile. The flag trembles. Below, YAMAMOTO'S GUARDS scatter across adjacent rooftops, their corpses marking a trail of blood.

YANG ZAITIAN touches a jade locket around his neck. Inside: a miniature painting of WAN'ER.

YANG ZAITIAN (V.O.)
Ten years. Ten years of painting this city in their blood.

MONTAGE:
- YAMAMOTO HONGFU (50s, corpulent) lounges poolside, his wine goblet filled with dark liquid. He watches a caged songbird.
- Yang Zaitian's eyes: cold, exhausted, unblinking.

FLASHBACK:

EXT. YANG FAMILY COURTYARD - DAY (TEN YEARS AGO)
Black-and-white, cold tones.

YANG DINGTIAN (40s, armored) kneels, impaled by three shadow blades. His blood pools black.

YANG DINGTIAN
(rasping)
The people... we protected...

A WHITE-ROBED FIGURE stands before him, holding a blood-filled vial that GLOWS faintly.

WHITE-ROBED MAN
The Martial God's blood doesn't belong to peasants. It belongs to progress.

He drips the glowing blood into a silver flask.

YANG DINGTIAN
My son... will—

WHITE-ROBED MAN
Your son will fuel the next ascension. Just like your daughter. And your youngest.

The Figure gestures. YANG ZAIYU (20s) lies crumpled against a pillar, her blade broken. Young YANG ZAIYE (8) cowers by the well, clutching a wooden sword.

YANG ZAITIAN (V.O.)
They didn't just kill them. They harvested them.

The White-Robed Man touches the boy's forehead. YOUNG YANG ZAITIAN (15) watches from the well, covered in his brother's hiding.

WHITE-ROBED MAN (O.S.)
This one has the purest strain. Find him.

Young Yang Zaitian vanishes into the well's darkness.

END FLASHBACK.
continuation:
EXT. ROOFTOP - DAY

Yang Zaitian YANKS his spear free. His knuckles are white.

YANG ZAITIAN (V.O.)
You taught me what strength was for.

MONTAGE:
- Yang Zaitian moves through Yamamoto's guards: precise, economic strikes. Each kill uses their own weapons against them.

YANG ZAITIAN (V.O.)
Not for thrones. Not for gods.

EXT. POOLSIDE - DAY

Yamamoto Hongfu backs against his birdcage, wine spilled. The songbird inside is dead.

YAMAMOTO HONGFU
You think this ends with me? The Southern Kingdom has a thousand more like me!

YANG ZAITIAN
Then I'll learn their names.

He stabs the spear through Yamamoto's chest. Yamamoto's body slides off, revealing:

INT. BIRDCAGE - DAY

WAN'ER (20s) huddles inside, her wrists marked with extraction scars. She sees Yang Zaitian.

WAN'ER
(whispering)
You came... for the living.

Yang Zaitian SMASHES the cage lock. He helps her out. She touches his face.

WAN'ER
Not just for ghosts anymore.

YANG ZAITIAN
There's a difference between justice and vengeance. You taught me that.

He presses the jade locket into her palm.

EXT. ROOFTOP - DAY

Yang Zaitian stands on the rooftop, Wan'er beside him. Below, the city begins to stir. He looks at his bloodied hands, then at her.

YANG ZAITIAN
Great Xia can wait. This city needs a protector who remembers what we're fighting for.

They watch the sunrise. The black flag catches fire from a nearby torch. Yang Zaitian lets it burn.

FADE OUT.

title: Golden Kingdom - The Little President Dares to Love Me
description: A young woman faces an arranged engagement with a powerful family heir and devises a plan to make him call off the wedding.
context:
Title: Golden Kingdom - The Little President Dares to Love Me
Description: A young woman faces an arranged engagement with a powerful family heir and devises a plan to make him call off the wedding.

TRAILER MONTAGE

MAN (V.O.)
Maybe only when I find the real answer—

BAI QIAN
It's impossible to break off the engagement now.

MAN (V.O.)
—will I have the courage to marry you.

LIU WU (V.O.)
The patriarch wants you engaged to the Ouyang heir. The contract is bound in blood and gold.

BAI QIAN
The head of Fancheng's four great families?

OUYANG FENG
Look into Bai Qian's background. Every detail.

WANG NING
Feng'er, just break the engagement. Pay the gold coin penalty.

BAI QIAN
You're using ancient gold coins to trade lives like livestock?

OUYANG TIAN
The Ouyang family will cut ties with the Wang family soon. Before the lunar eclipse.

WOMAN (V.O.)
After all, she's not my own flesh and blood. That coin should've been mine.

SHANGGUAN YAN
What kind of joke is this, Feng? A scooter?

BO SHI
Don't go too far with this charade, Miss Bai.

SAITO JIRO
When you see the Eight-Foot Jade of the Ouyang clan, you must kneel. It is older than their fortune.

SHEN ZIYU
Take down that plaque. The one that says "Eternal Alliance."

TEN ELDERS
You crazy woman, you've ruined six generations of planning!

LAO FAN
Please accept Manager Bai's kindness. She hasn't slept in three days.

BAI QIAN
Ouyang Feng, how much longer will you watch?

MAN (V.O.)
Less than a hundred gold coins remain. Each one costs a year of someone's life. How can I obtain another?

MAN (V.O.)
A death match between the chosen ones. That's what the coins were originally for.

BAI QIAN (V.O.)
Why hasn't he called my bluff yet?

WOMAN (V.O.)
Because he's already calculated ten moves ahead.

BAI QIAN (V.O.)
Will you come back when I break my coin?

TITLE CARD: GOLDEN KINGDOM - THE LITTLE PRESIDENT DARES TO LOVE ME

EXT. BAI FAMILY VILLA - DAY

A light drizzle. BAI QIAN (24, sharp eyes hidden beneath calculated nonchalance) stands with her back to the gates, phone pressed to her ear.

BAI QIAN
(into phone)
I don't care what it takes. Get me everything on Ouyang Feng's real estate holdings. Not the family—the man himself.

A MAID rushes through the rain, umbrella tilted against the wind.

MAID
(out of breath)
Young Miss, Fifth Madam moved up the meeting. She's already inside. Brought accountants.

BAI QIAN
(smiles, hangs up)
Here comes the real trouble.
continuation:
INT. BAI FAMILY LIVING ROOM - DAY

LIU WU (60s, silk suit, jade bracelet clicking with every gesture) pours tea with ceremonial precision. BAI QIAN watches from the doorway.

LIU WU
(without turning)
Your grandfather's will was quite specific, Qian'er. The gold coin must be transferred before the new moon.

BAI QIAN
(enters, sits opposite)
The Ouyang coin belongs to the main family line. Not some fifth concubine's gambling debt.

LIU WU
(slides a velvet box across the table)
The patriarch's seal says otherwise. Young Master Ouyang has already accepted the alliance.

Inside the box: a single ancient gold coin, stamped with a phoenix.

LIU WU (CONT'D)
(leaning forward)
Of course, a man of his stature would never bind himself to... damaged goods. Make him see that.

BAI QIAN
(quietly)
And if I refuse?

LIU WU
Then I'll activate the secondary clause. Your sister gets your mother's medical bills. All of them.

BAI QIAN's fingers tighten on the box. She stands.

BAI QIAN
(bright smile)
For my family's happiness, I'll make sure this engagement dies a swift death.

MONTAGE

EXT. COUNTRY ROAD - DAY

BAI QIAN weaves on a pink electric scooter, Hello Kitty helmet, fake designer bag. She stops to buy oranges from a roadside vendor.

BAI QIAN (V.O.)
Step one: Become the nightmare they never saw coming.

The vendor hands her change. She counts it twice, loudly.

EXT. OUYANG FAMILY VILLA ENTRANCE - DAY

The gates tower like a fortress. OUYANG FENG (28, quiet intensity) stands at the top step, watching the scooter's approach through security cameras.

OUYANG FENG
(to his assistant, softly)
She's wearing last season's Chanel. Badly replicated. Interesting.

SHANGGUAN YAN (26, ice in her veins) joins him, spotting the scooter.

SHANGGUAN YAN
Is that... her? Feng, this is beneath you.

OUYANG FENG
Let's see how deep the performance goes.

BAI QIAN screeches to a halt, knocking over a potted bonsai.

BAI QIAN
(overly loud)
Oopsie! I'll pay for that. With my future husband's money, 'kay?

The HEAD MAID hurries forward with a velvet cushion for the gold coin ceremony.

HEAD MAID
Please present your family's coin, Miss Bai—

SHANGGUAN YAN
(intercepts)
Don't you dare. This is a sacred exchange, not a farmer's market.

She swats at BAI QIAN's orange bag. BAI QIAN lets it fall—strategically. Oranges tumble down the marble steps.

BAI QIAN
(faux gasp)
My dowry! Do you know how much these cost? Six yuan a jin!

SHANGGUAN YAN
(whispers harshly)
You're trash. My family earned our coin through blood at Chang'an. You—

OUYANG FENG
(cuts in, voice low)
Yan'er. The Ouyang code. Article three.

SHANGGUAN YAN's face drains. She knows what's coming.

OUYANG FENG (CONT'D)
(to BAI QIAN, formally)
My cousin dishonored your offering. Choose her penalty.

BAI QIAN
(crouches, picks up a muddy orange)
Just have her taste my sincerity.

OUYANG FENG
(nods)
Peel it. Yourself.

SHANGGUAN YAN
Feng—

OUYANG FENG
Now.

The servants turn away. SHANGGUAN YAN's hands shake as she peels the orange, dirt under her nails. Takes one bite. Tears of rage.

SHANGGUAN YAN
(quietly)
Delicious.

BAI QIAN
(leans in, whisper)
The bitterness hides in the pith. Like family.

OUYANG FENG
(observing, to himself)
She doesn't flinch. Not even when Yan'er raised her hand.

BAI QIAN
(stands, stretches)
So, when's the wedding? I'll need an advance.

OUYANG FENG
You'll move in tonight. East wing.

BAI QIAN
Whoa, whoa. A million a month, or I spill family secrets to the press. I've got pics of your grandfather's mistress.

SHANGGUAN YAN
(laughs, recovering)
She's blackmailing you! Feng, throw her out!

OUYANG FENG
(looks directly at BAI QIAN for the first time)
Two million. Starting tonight. But you'll earn it.

He descends the steps, stops beside her.

OUYANG FENG (CONT'D)
(softly, for her ears only)
The replica Chanel is a nice touch. The real one doesn't use that clasp.

He walks away. BAI QIAN's smile freezes.

BAI QIAN (V.O.)
(quiet panic)
He knew. He knew from the first second.

FADE OUT.

title: Return After Six Years
description: A woman returns after six years with her son, seeking justice for past betrayals and ready to reclaim what was taken from her.
context:
Title: Return After Six Years
Description: A woman returns after six years with her son, seeking justice for past betrayals and ready to reclaim what was taken from her.

INT. AIRPORT TERMINAL - DAY

WEN RUAN (Wen family heiress), dressed in a black business suit, wearing sunglasses, pulling a suitcase, holds the hand of her son WEN CHENG (Wen Ruan's son) as she walks with a powerful presence.

WEN RUAN removes her sunglasses, her eyes determined.

WEN RUAN
Six years. Time to settle accounts.

WEN CHENG
(looking up at his mother)
Mommy, will Daddy be here?

WEN RUAN
(her eyes darken)
Your father died six years ago. We're here for justice. And to make those who broke us pay.

INT. HOSPITAL WARD - DAY (FLASHBACK)

ON SCREEN: SIX YEARS AGO

WEN RUAN lies on the hospital bed, looking weak. LIN QIANQIAN (Lin family illegitimate daughter) holds a baby in swaddling clothes, standing by the bed with a vicious smile.

LIN QIANQIAN
The child didn't make it. Brother Jing Hang sends his regards.

WEN RUAN
(in pain)
No... he wouldn't...

LIN QIANQIAN
You were convenient comfort while he was blind. Now? You're obsolete.

LIN QIANQIAN turns to the DOCTOR nearby.

LIN QIANQIAN
She doesn't leave this room alive. The transfer clears in one hour.

DOCTOR
(hesitant)
The protocols—

LIN QIANQIAN
continuation:
Will be compensated. Tenfold.

LIN QIANQIAN exits. The DOCTOR approaches with a syringe.

WEN RUAN
(through gritted teeth)
Wait... I'll triple any offer.
(clutches her locket)
I'm Wen family's lost heir. Proof's in my necklace.

The DOCTOR pauses, checks the engraving: "Wen Estate - First Daughter." His expression shifts.

DOCTOR
(resigned)
Push. Now.

WEN RUAN grips the bedsheet, pushing through agony. Blood stains spread beneath her.

WEN RUAN
(screaming)
Aaghh!

She collapses.

INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - DAY

LIN QIANQIAN, now wearing the same hospital gown as WEN RUAN, holds the baby and walks toward XIE JING HANG (Xie Group CEO), his vision still blurry post-surgery.

LIN QIANQIAN
(joyfully)
Jing Hang, the surgery worked! Our son is waiting.

XIE JING HANG
(squinting, disoriented)
Mengmeng? Your voice sounds...

LIN QIANQIAN
(leaning close)
Everything's changed. But this moment... it's ours.

XIE JING HANG
(touches the baby's face)
Our child...

XIE JING HANG cradles the baby, his expression tender.

From the shadows, WEN RUAN—holding HER baby—watches, devastation etched into her features. She clutches the child tighter, her gaze never leaving the twisted scene as silent tears begin to fall.

title: The World's Wealth Emperor
description: The most powerful and wealthy man in the land holds the fate of kingdoms in his hands as kings compete for his fortune.
context:
Title: The World's Wealth Emperor
Description: The most powerful and wealthy man in the land holds the fate of kingdoms in his hands as kings compete for his fortune.

EXT. ANCIENT COURTYARD - DAY

SOUND of intense fighting.

Several KINGS wearing distinct royal robes sit in chairs watching the battle. In the center of the courtyard, ASURA WAR GOD wields a battle axe, fighting fiercely against armored training dummies. He moves with precision, each strike sending sparks flying.

SUPER: King of Dasi Kingdom

SUPER: Asura War God - Great Xia's Invincible Champion

ASURA WAR GOD
You are no match for this War God.

QINGTIAN WAR GOD holds a sword, confronting ASURA WAR GOD.

SUPER: Qingtian War God - Great Lin's Final Hope

QINGTIAN WAR GOD
Don't be arrogant! The Wealth Emperor's bounty must save Great Lin Kingdom! Military funding issues plague us.

ASURA WAR GOD
The Wealth Emperor's reward can erase that debt.

SUPER: King of Great Lin Kingdom

KING OF GREAT LIN KINGDOM
For Great Lin Kingdom!

QINGTIAN WAR GOD
For Great Lin Kingdom, I will fight you to the death!

QINGTIAN WAR GOD brandishes his sword and charges at ASURA WAR GOD. The two begin an intense battle.

KING OF GREAT LIN KINGDOM
Qingtian War God, Asura War God, win this and our debt to the Wealth Emperor is erased. I'm counting on you!

The two continue fighting.

SUPER: King of Great Chen Kingdom

KING OF GREAT CHEN KINGDOM
(anxiously)
Lord Wealth Emperor, plague runs rampant in Great Chen Kingdom. Our people are displaced, dying of disease and hunger. We urgently need your aid.
continuation:
The KINGS descend from their chairs and kneel on the ground.

ALL KINGS
We beg the Wealth Emperor for mercy! We beg the Wealth Emperor for rewards!

A team of MEN IN BLACK SUITS carry several large chests into the courtyard and neatly place them on the ground. A man wearing an ornate mask and black robes—THE WEALTH EMPEROR—walks through the main gate.

ALL KINGS
(in unison)
We welcome the Wealth Emperor!

SUPER: The World's Wealth Emperor - Bian Wudao

WEALTH EMPEROR
Everyone, rise.

The KINGS stand up.

ALL KINGS
We pay our respects to the Wealth Emperor.

WEALTH EMPEROR
Your groveling entertains me. Open the chests.

The MEN IN BLACK open the chests, which are filled with imperial credits. The KINGS show expressions of surprise and greed.

WEALTH EMPEROR
Today, this Emperor grows bored of your duels. All shall be rewarded!

The WEALTH EMPEROR throws credits into the air. The KINGS kneel on the ground scrambling to collect them.

A blonde woman, LONG KUI, leaps down from the roof and lands steadily before the WEALTH EMPEROR.

SUPER: Long Kui - The Wealth Emperor's Shadow

LONG KUI
Reporting to the Wealth Emperor, the daughter of Jiang City's wealthiest man has vowed to marry only you. She has prepared a banquet and wishes to wed you before the city's elite.

WEALTH EMPEROR
Marriage? This Emperor will marry, but not her.

LONG KUI
The Wealth Emperor is the richest in the world. What woman could be worthy?

WEALTH EMPEROR
Someone, bring the Ten National Treasures and ten thousand taels of gold. Accompany this Emperor to Jiang City to present betrothal gifts. The woman this Emperor will marry is...

title: Eyes Against the Wind
description: A man betrayed by his girlfriend and humiliated by her lover awakens with a mysterious ability to see the value of objects after a violent confrontation.
context:
Title: Eyes Against the Wind
Description: A man betrayed by his girlfriend and humiliated by her lover awakens with a mysterious ability to see the value of objects after a violent confrontation.

INT. BEDROOM - DAY

Muffled sounds from behind the bedroom door. Soft laughter, a gasp.

LILI (O.S.)
Wait—what if—

GANG GE (O.S.)
He's not home.

WENZE enters the apartment, keys in hand. He pauses at the sounds from the bedroom.

He approaches the door. Pushes it open.

Inside, LILI and GANG GE freeze on the bed.

WENZE
(whisper)
...Lili?

WENZE lunges forward, grabs Gang Ge's arm. They struggle.

WENZE
(to Lili)
How could you—

LILI
(wrapping herself in a sheet)
How could I? Wenze, look at this place. You think ramen and cheap wine is a life?

WENZE
Everything I earned, I gave to—

LILI
You gave me debt and dreams. Gang Ge gives me security.

GANG GE
You're embarrassing yourself. Walk away now, and we forget this.

WENZE swings. Gang Ge sidesteps, snatches a crystal vase—

SMASH.

WENZE crumples, blood pooling beneath his temple. Still.

GANG GE
(to Lili)
Get dressed. We're leaving.

Gang Ge guides Lili out. She glances back once, expression unreadable.
continuation:
INT. LIVING ROOM - LATER

WENZE sits at the table, a butterfly bandage on his forehead. An empty beer bottle in front of him. He stares at his phone—photos of him and Lili. Deletes them, one by one.

WENZE
(quiet)
All that time...

He deletes the last photo. The screen goes black. He sets the phone down, rests his head in his hands.

INT. LIVING ROOM - MORNING

Sunlight slashes across the table. Wenze jerks awake, disoriented.

WENZE
What—?

He touches his forehead—the wound is gone. Checks his fingers. No blood.

WENZE
(softly)
Was it—

His eyes land on his sneakers. Golden text flickers: [Warrior Brand - Street Vendor - Value: $2.30].

WENZE
...a dream?

He blinks. The text remains, hovering.

title: The Errand Runner is a Mysterious Boss
description: An errand runner stumbles upon a kidnapping and rescue attempt, revealing hidden depths beneath his humble occupation.
context:
Title: The Errand Runner is a Mysterious Boss
Description: An errand runner stumbles upon a kidnapping and rescue attempt, revealing hidden depths beneath his humble occupation.

EXT. PARK - NIGHT

Moonlight cuts through the tree branches. NALAN YANRAN, late 20s, runs along a dimly lit park path, her designer heels in hand. She looks back, gasping. Mud streaks her designer suit.

She stumbles, catches herself on a bench, and pushes forward. Her phone lies shattered in the grass behind her.

She reaches a residential building's service entrance and ducks inside, pressing against the wall. A SHADOW passes the doorway. She freezes. A gloved hand covers her mouth from behind.

INT. ROOM - NIGHT

NALAN YANRAN lies bound with rope, black tape over her mouth, on a worn sofa. Her eyes burn with fury.

ONE-EYED DRAGON ASSASSIN, 40s, skull eyepatch over his left eye, speaks into a burner phone.

ONE-EYED DRAGON ASSASSIN
Package secured. Price just doubled.

MASTERMIND (V.O.)
We had an agreement.

ONE-EYED DRAGON ASSASSIN
In Great Xia, Nalan contracts come with regrets. Pay now, or I disappear.

MASTERMIND (V.O.)
Done. No witnesses.

He pockets the phone and approaches NALAN YANRAN, studying her.

ONE-EYED DRAGON ASSASSIN
They say you built an empire by thirty. Pity.

He rips the tape from her mouth.

NALAN YANRAN
(spitting the words)
My family will hunt you to the ends of the earth.

ONE-EYED DRAGON ASSASSIN
Who said anything about killing?

He produces a small black pill. NALAN YANRAN thrashes. He forces it between her teeth. She struggles as it dissolves.
continuation:
INT. HALLWAY - NIGHT

CHU FAN, early 30s, wearing a blue "Run Your Legs Off" delivery vest, checks a crumpled receipt against the apartment door.

CHU FAN
4B. Third time's the charm.

He knocks. Silence. He knocks harder. A muffled thump comes from inside.

INT. ROOM - NIGHT

ONE-EYED DRAGON ASSASSIN freezes at the knock. He pulls a silenced pistol and moves toward the door.

NALAN YANRAN'S vision blurs. She fights the effects of the pill.

CHU FAN (O.S.)
Management said someone's home. I'm not leaving this package in the hall.

The lock turns. The door cracks open. Chu Fan's foot slides into the gap, preventing it from closing.

CHU FAN
(different tone)
Open the door.

ONE-EYED DRAGON ASSASSIN
Wrong apartment.

He tries to shove it closed. The door explodes inward. CHU FAN stands in the doorway, his delivery vest askew, his expression cold and calculating.

ONE-EYED DRAGON ASSASSIN
You have no idea what you've stepped into.

Chu Fan's gaze sweeps the room: the restraints, the pistol, Nalan Yanran's dilating pupils.

CHU FAN
Neither do you.

He drops his clipboard. His hands come up, loose and ready.

title: Return to 1990: Entertainment Godfather
description: A Golden Palm Award-winning actor is poisoned by his wife and manager on the night of his triumph, only to wake up thirty years in the past at a talent show audition.
context:
Title: Return to 1990: Entertainment Godfather
Description: A Golden Palm Award-winning actor is poisoned by his wife and manager on the night of his triumph, only to wake up thirty years in the past at a talent show audition.

INT. AWARD CEREMONY VENUE - DAY

The Golden Palm Best Actor award ceremony. Lights are dazzling. Newly crowned Best Actor XU TIANYANG holds his trophy, standing on stage, surrounded by a group of REPORTERS.

REPORTERS (O.S.)
Mr. Xu! Over here! Mr. Xu!

REPORTER A
They call you a kept man riding your wife's fame. Your response?

REPORTER B
From security guard to Best Actor—was it all thanks to Zhao Jiaojiao?

CROWD (O.S.)
Details! Give us details!

REPORTER C
Rumors about Zhao Jiaojiao and your agent Chu Wei—any comment?

XU TIANYANG
(calmly, but a flicker in his eyes)
I thank two people. My wife Zhao Jiaojiao, who's stood behind me. And my agent Chu Wei. Without them, I'm not here today.

XU TIANYANG's phone vibrates. He glances—UNKNOWN CALLER. He answers.

XU TIANYANG
(low)
Hello?

VOICE ON PHONE (V.O.)
Tianyang... it's Mom's caretaker. She collapsed. Please—

The phone drops. Xu Tianyang's knuckles whiten around the trophy.

XU TIANYANG
(to reporters)
Family emergency. Excuse me.

XU TIANYANG exits, leaving the reporters clamoring.
continuation:
INT. XU FAMILY VILLA - BEDROOM - DAY

XU TIANYANG rushes in. His MOTHER lies still on the bed, lips pale. Agent CHU WEI stands near the window. Wife ZHAO JIAOJIAO hovers by the bedside.

XU TIANYANG
Mom!

CHU WEI
(gripping his shoulder)
Take a breath. I called emergency services. Here—water.

Chu Wei hands him a glass. Xu Tianyang downs it without thinking.

XU TIANYANG
(crouching)
Her lips... discolored. This looks wrong—

A spasm wrenches through him. The glass shatters.

XU TIANYANG
(gasping)
The water...

ZHAO JIAOJIAO
(stepping back)
Finally figured it out?

XU TIANYANG
(doubled over)
You...

CHU WEI
(smirking)
She walked in on us this afternoon. Threatened to cut you from her will. We had to act fast.

ZHAO JIAOJIAO
Cold, honey? You've been living off me for five years while we played house. Time's up.

XU TIANYANG
(straining)
My son... spare my son...

A CHILD stands in the doorway—XU TIANYANG'S SON, holding a toy airplane. He surveys the scene, then walks past Xu Tianyang and takes Chu Wei's hand.

XU TIANYANG'S SON
Daddy, is he finally leaving?

CHU WEI
(ruffling the boy's hair)
Soon, champ. Then it's just us.

XU TIANYANG
(trembling)
No... he's...

CHU WEI
(leaning close)
I didn't just spend your money and fuck your wife, Xu. I raised your child. Every time you kissed him goodnight, he called me Daddy in his heart.

XU TIANYANG's fingers claw at the carpet. His eyes lock on the trophy—a mockery in his grip.

XU TIANYANG
(whisper)
Next life... I'll bury you.

His breath rattles. Stops.

INT. TIME TUNNEL

The trophy glints. Time rewinds in stuttered flashes—Xu Tianyang's face aging backward, lights reversing, film spooling backward.

INT. TALENT SHOW VENUE - DAY

XU TIANYANG suddenly wakes up, wearing a security guard uniform, seated among unfamiliar young faces.

XU TIANYANG
(disoriented)
Where is this?

HOST (O.S.)
Welcome everyone to Good Voice.

On stage, a MALE and FEMALE HOST are hosting the show. The background displays "Good Voice Talent Show - 1990."

FADE OUT.

title: A Mother's Desperate Search
description: A pregnant woman's daughter is kidnapped and sold by her gambling addict husband on the child's birthday, leading to a tragic night of loss and desperation.
context:
Title: A Mother's Desperate Search
Description: A pregnant woman's daughter is kidnapped and sold by her gambling addict husband on the child's birthday, leading to a tragic night of loss and desperation.

EXT. ANCIENT TOWN STREET - NIGHT

QIN FANGHAO (pregnant) and her daughter YOUYOU walk hand-in-hand along the stone-paved road.

QIN FANGHAO
We'll make something delicious when we get home. I saved a little.

They pass a cake shop window. YOUYOU stops, looking at the cakes.

QIN FANGHAO
(gently)
Does Youyou want cake?

YOUYOU
Mom, didn't you say Dad took all the money?

QIN FANGHAO
I kept some aside. For your birthday.

YOUYOU
(happily)
Thank you, Mom.

QIN FANGHAO opens the shop door. YOUYOU lingers outside, still looking at the display. The SHOPKEEPER's bells JANGLE from within, and QIN FANGHAO turns her head inside for just a moment.

In that instant, LIN WEI crosses the narrow street from shadows. He covers YOUYOU's mouth and pulls her into the dark passage beside the shop.

EXT. DARK ALLEY - NIGHT

LIN WEI drags YOUYOU into the alley. A couple (BUYER MAN, BUYER WOMAN) waits.

LIN WEI
Here she is.

BUYER WOMAN
Let me see her.

LIN WEI pulls YOUYOU forward. She trembles.

YOUYOU
(crying)
Dad, please don't sell me.

LIN WEI
(avoiding her eyes)
You eat too much.

YOUYOU
I'll eat less! I can work--

LIN WEI
(impatiently)
Enough.

He shoves YOUYOU toward the buyers. She stumbles. The woman catches her, starts walking away.

YOUYOU
(calling back)
Dad!

LIN WEI takes the money envelope, counts it, not watching them leave.
continuation:
EXT. IN FRONT OF CAKE SHOP - NIGHT

QIN FANGHAO exits with a cake box, turning with a smile.

QIN FANGHAO
My daughter loves strawberry cake the most.

She looks for YOUYOU. Sees the empty spot where she stood. Sees the alley mouth.

QIN FANGHAO
(anxiously)
Youyou? Youyou! Youyou!

She runs to the alley entrance, shouting.

QIN FANGHAO
Youyou!

LIN WEI appears from the alley, breathing hard.

LIN WEI
What are you shouting about? Where's the child?

QIN FANGHAO
(flustered)
I don't know! She was right here--

LIN WEI
(roaring)
You lost her?

He slaps her. The cake box falls. QIN FANGHAO stumbles.

QIN FANGHAO
(voice breaking)
I bought a cake and came out--

LIN WEI
(pointing)
I told you not to celebrate! Now look!

He kicks her leg. She goes down, clutching her belly.

LIN WEI
Your crying makes me feel terrible! Get up and search!

He kicks the vegetable basket beside her, spilling contents.

LIN WEI
Where's the money?

QIN FANGHAO
(crying)
You took everything! Where would I have money?

LIN WEI
Go home and cook!

He turns away, hands shaking, and leaves without looking back. QIN FANGHAO lies on the ground, blood seeping through her skirt. She reaches tremblingly to the smashed cake, picks up a tiny bit of frosting.

QIN FANGHAO
(sobbing)
Youyou...

FLASHBACK: YOUYOU and QIN FANGHAO laughing together, frosting a cookie.

QIN FANGHAO
(lying on the ground, weak but determined)
Mom will definitely find you...

She lies in pain on the cold ground, her hand tightly clutching that piece of frosting.

FADE OUT.

title: The Empress of Great Zhou
description: An empress discovers her husband the emperor in bed with her own sister and confronts them, only to be betrayed and poisoned.
context:
Title: The Empress of Great Zhou
Description: An empress discovers her husband the emperor in bed with her own sister and confronts them, only to be betrayed and poisoned.

INT. PALACE CORRIDOR - NIGHT

Empress JIANG XUE, dressed in magnificent robes, walks briskly toward the Emperor's bedchamber, surrounded by a group of PALACE MAIDS and EUNUCHS.

EUNUCH
Your Majesty the Empress, entering the Emperor's bedchamber without his summons is a capital offense.

JIANG XUE
He hasn't attended court for days. I must see what he's doing.

JIANG XUE ignores the obstruction and continues forward.

INT. EMPEROR'S BEDCHAMBER - NIGHT

JIANG XUE kicks open the bedchamber door with one foot. The door shatters. She walks into the incense-filled chamber with anger.

On the dragon bed, Emperor LI QINGXUAN is startled awake.

LI QINGXUAN
Who?

JIANG XUE walks into the inner chamber and sees clearly what is before her. Emperor LI QINGXUAN sits on the bed in disheveled clothing, and behind him is none other than her own sister, JIANG YING.

JIANG XUE
(shocked)
Li Qingxuan... Jiang Ying... You two!

LI QINGXUAN
(coldly)
Empress, you have intruded into the bedchamber. That is a capital offense.

JIANG XUE
(questioning)
Then what crime is it for the Emperor to casually bed an unwed woman from outside the palace and neglect state affairs?

LI QINGXUAN
(sneering)
Ridiculous! I am the Emperor. What crime is it to favor a woman? Let me tell you, today I will make her Empress! And you, for intruding and disturbing me, shall be executed on the spot!

LI QINGXUAN
(shouting)
Guards!
continuation:
A group of GUARDS rush into the bedchamber, drawing their swords and surrounding JIANG XUE.

GUARDS
Ha!

The GUARDS swing their swords at JIANG XUE. She dodges easily, grabs one GUARD by the neck, and throws him out, knocking down another GUARD.

Her movements are fluid. Within a few moves, she has defeated all the GUARDS.

The GUARDS struggle to their feet, looking at her in terror.

LI QINGXUAN
(furious)
Capture Jiang Xue! Ten thousand taels of gold as reward! Anyone who retreats will have nine generations of their family executed!

Spurred by the reward and punishment, the GUARDS roar and charge at JIANG XUE again.

GUARDS
Yah!

JIANG XUE crouches down, placing both hands on the luxurious carpet and channeling her internal energy. The carpet instantly shatters, and a powerful wave of force sends all the GUARDS flying backward. They crash heavily to the ground, unconscious.

JIANG XUE
(contemptuously)
You cannot kill me.

As soon as she finishes speaking, JIANG XUE suddenly feels a sharp pain. She falls to her knees and violently coughs up blood.

JIANG YING on the bed reveals a triumphant smile.

JIANG YING
The incense, sister. It was laced with poison from the moment you entered.

JIANG YING rises from the bed, draping herself in imperial robes.

JIANG YING
The Jiang clan grows tired of warrior Empresses. We prefer puppet rulers.

JIANG XUE collapses, her eyes locked on the dragon emblem above. A final smile frozen on her lips.

JIANG YING
(whisper)
Why do you smile?

Silence. JIANG XUE is still.

title: KTV Debt Confrontation
description: A tense negotiation in a KTV room over a debt, where loyalties and power dynamics clash.
context:
Title: KTV Debt Confrontation
Description: A tense negotiation in a KTV room over a debt, where loyalties and power dynamics clash.

INT. KTV PRIVATE ROOM - NIGHT

LAO MEI'ER holds a microphone, singing. HUA ZI, LIN TAO, and other FRIENDS sit on the sofa listening.

LAO MEI'ER finishes singing and puts down the microphone. FRIENDS applaud.

HUA ZI
Lao Mei'er, that voice could make a dead man cry. Wasted on this room.

LAO MEI'ER
(to LIN TAO)
Brother Tao, did it reach you?

LIN TAO
Every word.

LIN TAO
(to HUA ZI)
Hua Zi, the guarantor papers show thirty thousand principal. Let's settle at forty-five and be done.

HUA ZI
Interest adds up. Fifty thousand flat. But for you, Tao Zi—I'll cut the trouble fee. Forty-eight. Generous, right?

LAO MEI'ER
(standing up, angry)
This room costs eight hundred an hour. You're haggling over pennies while my sister's shop dies? Zhou Da Yong is family. Half. Now.

HUA ZI
Not blood. But Lao Mei'er—one private song, I drop ten thousand. Just us upstairs. I'll be gentle.

LIN TAO
continuation:
(to HUA ZI)
Mountains don't move, Hua Zi. But rivers remember stones. You might need a bridge.

HUA ZI
(taking a sip of wine)
Bridges are for movers. You're furniture. Don't you know your price?

LIN TAO
(standing up)
Say it.

HUA ZI
You're a ghost. A favor. Fifty thousand. Not one less, or the shop is mine.

HUA ZI
(looking at LIN TAO)
What? Pay it.

BAO GE pushes the door open and enters.

EVERYONE
Bao Ge.

HUA ZI
(immediately standing up, fawning)
Bao Ge! Please, sit, the good sofa—

BAO GE sits down.

HUA ZI
