Bao Ge, what brings you here?

BAO GE
If I didn't come, you wouldn't take Tao Zi seriously. Don't you know Tao Zi is my brother?

title: Eight Years Later
description: A woman secretly posing as the righteous thief Jade Hero to aid the poor discovers her husband, comatose for eight years, has finally awakened.
context:
Title: Eight Years Later
Description: A woman secretly posing as the righteous thief Jade Hero to aid the poor discovers her husband, comatose for eight years, has finally awakened.

INT. OUTSIDE GOVERNMENT OFFICE - DAY

An OFFICIAL rides his horse, shouting angrily.

OFFICIAL
Sealed! Every road out of the province!
I want Jade Hero's head by dawn!

A masked figure, JADE HERO, leaps across rooftops above a bamboo forest. The OFFICIAL's guards rampage through an impoverished village, and VILLAGERS scatter to avoid them.

VILLAGER (V.O.)
(whispered)
Bless you, Jade Hero...

INT. DILAPIDATED SHACK - DAY

A LITTLE GIRL sits by the bed, caring for her seriously ill MOTHER.

LITTLE GIRL
(quietly desperate)
I'll find a way. The apothecary said three days—

MOTHER
(weakly)
No, child. Let me go.

A cloth pouch lands in the doorway. The LITTLE GIRL retrieves it, revealing silver taels.

LITTLE GIRL
(breathless)
Mother... it's from Jade Hero.

MOTHER
(tearfully)
Then I can die in peace... May heaven guard that noble soul.
continuation:
EXT. VILLAGE - DAY

JADE HERO rides into a stable. Dismounting, QIN XIANGYU removes her mask, revealing her face.

TITLE CARD: CHEN HEMEI'S WIFE - QIN XIANGYU

She stuffs her black cloak into a feed sack, rubbing dirt onto the horse's distinctive markings.

SOLDIERS (O.S.)
The horse came this way! Search every stall!

SOLDIERS rush toward QIN XIANGYU but see only a woman in plain clothes with a common nag.

SOLDIER
You—see anyone in black?

QIN XIANGYU
(shakes head)
Only my husband's horse, sir.

The soldiers charge past. Qin Xiangyu exhales.

EXT. VILLAGE MARKET - DAY

AUNT WANG tends her bun stall.

AUNT WANG
Two steamed, coming up!

QIN XIANGYU walks over carrying a basket.

QIN XIANGYU
Aunt Wang.

AUNT WANG
Yu'er, you're finally here. Take these.

AUNT WANG stuffs two steaming buns into QIN XIANGYU's hands.

QIN XIANGYU
Auntie, I can't—

AUNT WANG
You saved Xiao Hu. Let an old woman help.

(beat)
Still tending his horse?

QIN XIANGYU
(nods)
He'll want it waiting.

AUNT WANG
(sighs)
Top scholar... what a waste.

Qin Xiangyu's expression darkens. Her daughter, CHEN YUEPING, runs over.

CHEN YUEPING
(shouting)
Mother!

CHEN YUEPING
(out of breath)
Father's eyes... they opened!

QIN XIANGYU lifts her head in shock, the buns falling from her hands to the ground.

title: Don't Cry, Mom
description: A mother faces cruelty from her mother-in-law who refuses to give back money needed for her sick daughter's surgery, while a wealthy chairman searches for his long-lost daughter.
context:
Title: Don't Cry, Mom
Description: A mother faces cruelty from her mother-in-law who refuses to give back money needed for her sick daughter's surgery, while a wealthy chairman searches for his long-lost daughter.

INT. ZHANG DASHAN'S HOUSE - DAY

ZHOU HUI and WANG GUIYING struggle over a money pouch.

WANG GUIYING
Hand it over. Now.

ZHOU HUI
This is Miaomiao's surgery money!

WANG GUIYING
You think bills pay themselves? Give it here!

WANG GUIYING shoves ZHOU HUI down. She falls, clutching her stomach. ZHANG MIAOMIAO runs in.

ZHANG MIAOMIAO
Mommy!

WANG GUIYING
Back to your room!

ZHOU HUI
Miaomiao, don't—

WANG GUIYING grabs a feather duster.

WANG GUIYING
I'll teach you to steal from this family!

She beats ZHOU HUI as she cries out. The door bursts open. ZHANG DASHAN rushes in.

ZHANG DASHAN
Stop!

ZHANG MIAOMIAO
Daddy!

ZHANG DASHAN helps ZHOU HUI up.

ZHANG DASHAN
What happened?

ZHOU HUI
(voice breaking)
Mom took Miaomiao's treatment money.

WANG GUIYING
It's called being filial! Your monthly pittance doesn't keep this house running.

ZHANG DASHAN
Mom, Miaomiao needs that surgery.

WANG GUIYING
She's draining us dry! If her real family cared, they'd have found you. That worthless jade around your neck proves they don't!

WANG GUIYING exits with the pouch. The family holds each other.
continuation:
INT. CONFERENCE ROOM - DAY

SHEN QIAOSHENG throws documents on the table before cowering employees.

SHEN QIAOSHENG
Three weeks for this garbage?

An ASSISTANT rushes in.

ASSISTANT
Chairman, news about your daughter.

SHEN QIAOSHENG
Another hoax?

ASSISTANT
The pendant. It's the phoenix half.

The ASSISTANT shows a tablet photo of a broken jade pendant. SHEN QIAOSHENG takes out his dragon pendant.

SHEN QIAOSHENG
(whispering)
Zhenzhen...

INT. ZHANG DASHAN'S HOUSE - DAY

ZHOU HUI removes her phoenix pendant.

ZHOU HUI
Sell this. For Miaomiao.

ZHANG DASHAN
Your family—

ZHOU HUI
—can find me without it. My daughter can't wait.

ZHOU HUI leaves. ZHANG DASHAN examines the pendant. From his pocket, he pulls an old cloth bundle. Inside: the dragon pendant. He fits them together.

title: The Entire Entertainment Industry Is Waiting for Our Divorce
description: A Chinese medicine practitioner wakes up to find her face has been swapped with a famous celebrity after being drugged at a KTV.
context:
Title: The Entire Entertainment Industry Is Waiting for Our Divorce
Description: A Chinese medicine practitioner wakes up to find her face has been swapped with a famous celebrity after being drugged at a KTV.

INT. KTV PRIVATE ROOM - NIGHT

SHEN SHULI, wearing a pink dress, examines the liquor bottles with trembling fingers. A row of empty glasses sits on the table.

She walks toward LI LI, who sits on the sofa in a black evening gown, scrolling through news about her own divorce scandal on her phone.

SHEN SHULI
I've finished all of these. Where is my sister?

LI LI
(sneering)
Satisfy me, and you'll naturally be able to see your sister.

SHEN SHULI grabs an expensive bottle, sniffs it, then wavers.

SHEN SHULI
(in pain)
So dizzy... these herbs...

The bottle slips and shatters.

SHEN SHULI
(terrified)
You've mixed sedatives with alcohol!

SHEN SHULI staggers and grabs LI LI's shoulder.

SHEN SHULI
What exactly do you want?

SHEN SHULI collapses. LI LI stands, looking at her phone screen: a text reads "Procedure ready."

LI LI
(quietly)
What I want is to swap faces with you. And your clean medical record.
continuation:
INT. OPERATING ROOM - NIGHT

Bright surgical lights shine down. SHEN SHULI lies unconscious as a MECHANICAL DEVICE hums above her face.

LI LI (O.S.)
She's about to wake up. Quickly swap our faces. The prototype is ready.

Medical instruments appear on screen - syringes, scalpels, and a HIGH-TECH FACIAL MAPPING scanner.

INT. HOSPITAL ROOM - DAY

SHEN SHULI wakes up startled in the hospital bed. She wears a patient gown with an IV needle still in her hand. She frantically touches her face.

SHEN SHULI
My face...

She sees herself in the mirror - she has become LI LI, but her own BIRTHMARK remains near her eye.

SHEN SHULI
(shocked)
How did my face turn into Li Li's? I need to find out what's going on.

A TV on the wall shows entertainment news: "Actress LI LI hospitalized amid divorce crisis. Husband demands settlement."

SHEN SHULI covers her face with both hands, her eyes filled with fury.

SHEN SHULI
(whispering)
She took my life. Now I have her scandal. Her divorce. Her empire.

She lowers her hands, expression hardening with determination.

title: A String, A Pillar, Remembering the Years
description: A woman is reborn to the day she and her sister were both to be married. She decides to swap fates with her sister to protect her from a dangerous marriage.
context:
Title: A String, A Pillar, Remembering the Years
Description: A woman is reborn to the day she and her sister were both to be married. She decides to swap fates with her sister to protect her from a dangerous marriage.

EXT. COUNTRY ROAD - DAY

MU MIANMIAN walks along a country road, suitcase in hand. Her MOTHER and FATHER follow behind.

MOTHER
Mianmian! Stop!

Mother catches up, grabs Mianmian's arm.

MOTHER
Five years with a good man—you throw it away for some island soldier? What kind of daughter—

MU MIANMIAN
The kind who keeps her word.

Mianmian pulls free and boards a waiting minibus. Mother pounds on the door.

MOTHER
Mianmian! Mianmian! Get off that bus! You'll regret this!

The minibus pulls away. Mother chases, shouting.

MOTHER
Mianmian!

INT. MINIBUS - DAY

Mianmian watches her mother recede. Her knuckles whiten on the suitcase handle.

DRIVER
You sure, miss? That ferry doesn't come back 'til tomorrow.

MU MIANMIAN
I'm sure.

She looks at her hands—smooth, young. A scar on her palm she hasn't earned yet.

INT. BEDROOM - DAY

ON SCREEN: THREE HOURS EARLIER

Mianmian wakes with a gasp, clutching her chest. She touches her face—smooth. No wrinkles. She sits up, breathing hard.

A red wedding dress hangs on the wall. Beside it—a 1980 calendar, today's date circled.

The door opens. Mother enters with steaming dumplings.

MOTHER
Finally awake! Today of all days—your sister's already dressed. Eat, then get ready. The accountant's family will be here soon.

Mother sets down the dumplings. Mianmian stares at them.

MU MIANMIAN
(whispering)
The accountant...

MOTHER
What's wrong? You begged to marry him!

Mother notices Mianmian's fixed gaze on the calendar.

MOTHER
You forget your own wedding day?

Mianmian's fingers find the scar on her palm. Her eyes harden.

MU MIANMIAN
No. I remember everything.

MONTAGE - MU MIANMIAN'S MEMORIES

A) INT. OFFICE - DAY (FLASHBACK) - Older Mianmian signs divorce papers. LIU YUNQING won't meet her eyes.

B) INT. LIVING ROOM - DAY (FLASHBACK) - Mianmian's SISTER smiles in a wedding photo with stern soldier SHEN HUANIAN.

C) INT. POLICE STATION - DAY (FLASHBACK) - Mianmian, now 60s, identifies her sister's body. A PHOTO of a young, delicate woman flashes on a bulletin board. DETECTIVE (V.O.): "...suspected accomplice..."
continuation:
INT. LIVING ROOM - DAY

Mianmian stands before her sister's door. Enters.

INT. SISTER'S BEDROOM - DAY

SISTER sits on the bed, folding a wedding veil with trembling hands. She looks up—Mianmian in the doorway, still in nightclothes.

SISTER
Mianmian? Why aren't you—

Mianmian crosses, takes her sister's hands.

MU MIANMIAN
Switch with me.

SISTER
What?

MU MIANMIAN
I'll marry Shen Huanian. You take the accountant.

SISTER
(shocked)
Have you lost your mind? Shen Huanian's dangerous—he has that woman, that—

MU MIANMIAN
That "green tea" viper he's kept since childhood? I know. That's why I'm going.

Mianmian squeezes her sister's hands.

MU MIANMIAN
She killed you, sister. In a life you never lived. I'm not letting it happen again.

SISTER
(whispering)
How can you know that?

MU MIANMIAN
Because I died old and alone, and woke up with a second chance. I know how this ends. Let me rewrite it.

Mianmian forces a smile.

MU MIANMIAN
Besides. Grandfather never specified which granddaughter. And me against some delicate island girl? Don't you remember who won every fight?

She throws a precise jab at the air.

SISTER
(laughing through tears)
You were eleven.

MU MIANMIAN
And undefeated.

Mianmian picks up Shen Huanian's wedding clothes—red silk like armor.

MU MIANMIAN
I'll send word when I'm settled. If it goes wrong... I'll handle it. Revenge for revenge, grievance for grievance. But she won't touch our family.

MU MIANMIAN
(softening)
Please, sister.

SISTER studies her, sees something unshakeable. Finally—she nods.

SISTER
(deadly serious)
You come back to me.

Mianmian embraces her, fierce and brief.

MU MIANMIAN
I promise.

INT. MINIBUS / EXT. COUNTRY ROAD - DAY

BACK TO PRESENT

The minibus rattles down the road. Mother runs alongside, hoarse.

MOTHER
Mianmian! Mianmian, come back!

Mianmian leans out the window. Wind tears at her hair.

MU MIANMIAN
(calling out)
Mother! I'm keeping my promise!

She holds up her scarred palm. Mother can't see it, but Mianmian needs her to witness the gesture.

MU MIANMIAN
I'll be home for Spring Festival!

The bus accelerates. Mother stops, doubled over. She watches the bus disappear into dust and light.

Mianmian settles back, eyes forward. Her hand rests on the suitcase—heavy with a dead woman's wedding clothes and a living woman's fury.

title: A Thought of Warmth
description: A woman destined for seven lifetimes of loneliness is granted seven soulmates in one life by the Moon God, leading to chaos at her wedding and a journey through fated love.
context:
Title: A Thought of Warmth
Description: A woman destined for seven lifetimes of loneliness is granted seven soulmates in one life by the Moon God, leading to chaos at her wedding and a journey through fated love.

EXT. WEDDING LAWN - DAY

WEN NUAN (28, elegant but hollow-eyed) walks with her FATHER toward YU HAN. Her bouquet trembles slightly.

FATHER
You're freezing.

WEN NUAN
Just nerves.

FATHER
Yu Han, I'm entrusting my daughter to you.

OFFICIANT
Mr. Yu Han, do you take Miss Wen Nuan?

YU HAN
I do.

OFFICIANT
Miss Wen Nuan, do you take Mr. Yu Han?

WEN NUAN
I...

Seven phantom threads shimmer from her fingertips, tugging toward different guests.

WEN NUAN
(voice cracking)
I object!

SEVEN OBJECTORS rise from the crowd. Each carries himself differently: a CEO, a musician, a teacher, a chef, an artist, an athlete, a scholar.

OBJECTORS
We object!

YU HAN
(steps closer, protective)
She's already chosen.

CEO OBJECTOR
Has she? Or has she simply settled for what's safe?

The seven move in, surrounding Wen Nuan. They kneel, producing rings.

OBJECTORS
Marry me. Choose me. Save me.

WEN NUAN
(backing away)
I just want one proper wedding!
continuation:
INT. MOVIE THEATER - NIGHT

Wen Nuan jerks awake in her seat. Seven crimson threads wrap her fingers, pulsing. MOON GOD (white-haired, ancient) watches the screen replay the wedding.

WEN NUAN
That wasn't a dream.

MOON GOD
Memory. Of what will be.

WEN NUAN
Seven lifetimes alone, and your solution is seven chains?

MOON GOD
I gave you what you earned. Love in abundance.

WEN NUAN
(standing)
I learned to stand without it.

MOON GOD
Then break them. The threads are yours.

He vanishes. The theater dissolves to mist.

INT. BEDROOM - DAY

Wen Nuan snaps awake. She checks her fingers: seven faint red circles remain. She touches them, resigned but determined.

WEN NUAN
(whisper)
Break them.

INT. COMPANY HALLWAY - DAY

Wen Nuan sits among INTERVIEWEES, hiding her marked hand. YU HAN approaches, sizing up the room.

YU HAN
Mind if I sit?

WEN NUAN
Please.

He sits beside her. She quickly hides her marked hand.

YU HAN
Yu Han.

WEN NUAN
Wen Nuan.

They shake. For a moment, only ONE solid thread appears between them, bright and true.

INTERVIEWER (O.S.)
Wen Nuan?

She stands, takes a breath. The phantom threads tug at her fingers. She walks forward anyway, leaving them slack behind her.

FADE OUT.

title: A Dream Recalled
description: A woman confronts her treacherous husband who deceived her into marriage, stole her family's fortune, and now forces her into degradation.
context:
Title: A Dream Recalled
Description: A woman confronts her treacherous husband who deceived her into marriage, stole her family's fortune, and now forces her into degradation.

INT. DONGFANG MANSION - GRAND STAIRCASE - NIGHT

A woman in white (MEI PING) tumbles down the stairs, her body covered in blood. Chaos surrounds her as GUESTS cry out in alarm.

GUESTS (O.S.)
Something's happened!

INT. DONGFANG MANSION - SECOND FLOOR CORRIDOR - NIGHT

Lights blaze and festivities continue. JU XIANG and HUI NIANG flank MEI PING in the corridor.

JU XIANG
Madam, don't blame the master. You refuse to serve Lord Zhang - you're deliberately blocking the master's promotion.

MEI PING, covered in wounds with blood at the corner of her mouth, looks up defiantly at the upper floor. On the balcony above, her husband DONGFANG DE is intimate with another woman.

KANG RUI'ER supports MEI PING, pleading anxiously.

KANG RUI'ER
Sister, don't! Stop fighting with them.
continuation:
MEI PING
(shouting up at the balcony)
Dongfang De! You tricked me into marriage, seized my family's fortune, and drove my father to his death! Demoting me from wife to concubine wasn't enough - now you force me to entertain guests, paving the way for your promotion and wealth! Are you even human?

DONGFANG DE
(laughing from above)
I'm honoring you by doing so!

DONGFANG DE looks at the other maids and servants in the mansion.

DONGFANG DE
Look at the maids and servants in this household - which one hasn't served officials and nobles? As long as I'm pleased, even if I matched them with pigs, dogs, cattle, or horses, who would dare refuse? Guards!

Several GUARDS rush toward MEI PING and KANG RUI'ER.

DONGFANG DE descends from the upper floor and approaches MEI PING, who lies on the ground. He looks down at her condescendingly.

DONGFANG DE
Only you - you're the most disobedient of all.

MEI PING
(Quietly)
Good. I was listening.

title: Love at First Sight, Destined to Be Together
description: A Taoist disciple with a rare constitution must find her destined partner before her twentieth birthday or face certain death. She falls from the sky into the arms of her betrothed.
context:
Title: Love at First Sight, Destined to Be Together
Description: A Taoist disciple with a rare constitution must find her destined partner before her twentieth birthday or face certain death. She falls from the sky into the arms of her betrothed.

INT. ANCIENT COURTYARD - DAY

Golden light flashes. JIANG YI descends from the sky, silk robes fluttering as she lands.

JIANG YI
(laughing breathlessly)
Little Phoenix, your feathers can't hide you forever!

XUAN WUMING sits at a stone table, pouring tea.

LITTLE PHOENIX darts from behind his robes, tail feathers looking ragged.

LITTLE PHOENIX
Master, she'll pluck me bare!

JIANG YI chases LITTLE PHOENIX around XUAN WUMING.

JIANG YI
Just one! For my calligraphy!

XUAN WUMING flicks his fan. Invisible force lifts JIANG YI, suspending her.

JIANG YI
(surprised)
Master!

XUAN WUMING
(eyes sharp)
The winter solstice approaches. Your twentieth birthday with it. Do you feel the cold deepening?

JIANG YI
In my bones. Every night.

XUAN WUMING
Then you know what comes next.

He releases her. She lands, face serious. From his sleeve, a red silk scroll materializes.

JIANG YI takes it, unrolling it with trembling fingers.

JIANG YI
Fu Chengyan. The name means nothing.

XUAN WUMING
His chi burns with Mystic Yang fire. Only his flame can thaw the ice in your veins. But he burns too bright—without balance, he'll be ash before the moon turns.

Wind swirls. JIANG YI's satchel floats into her hands.

XUAN WUMING (V.O.)
Your senior sister waits in the mortal realm. Silk pouch for emergencies, paper for pride. I depart at dawn. Do not seek me.

JIANG YI
(calling into the wind)
Master—what if he refuses?
continuation:
INT. HOT SPRING POOL - DAY

Scalding mist rises. FU CHENGYAN floats in the center, silver-streaked hair clinging to his neck. Iron chains glow with sealing runes. Each breath makes the water hiss.

ELDER HEALER (V.O.)
The Yang fever rages. Seven days, perhaps eight, before his own life force turns to ash. Only Clear Spring Mountain's recluse might temper this fire—but he vanished into mist a decade past.

EXT. EDGE OF HOT SPRING POOL - DAY

ASSISTANT XU addresses a line of veiled women, each bearing medicinal herbs.

ASSISTANT XU
The matriarch offers sanctuary and honor to any woman who can quell Young Master Fu's affliction. Her gratitude would know no bounds.

WOMEN
(whispering)
A chance to save him...

ASSISTANT XU
Please. He suffers.

The women approach the pool with hesitant reverence, extending lotus leaves with cooling salves.

FU CHENGYAN
(voice hoarse but commanding)
Withdraw. This burden is not yours.

They retreat with respect. One woman pauses.

WOMAN
(gently)
We meant no offense, Young Master. Only... your clan needs you.

They depart. ASSISTANT XU wrings his hands.

ASSISTANT XU
Young Master, your betrothed from the Jiang family delays again. Your uncle moves in the shadows. If you cannot be saved, at least let the line continue...

FU CHENGYAN
Dismissed. Seal the spring.

He coughs. Blood drips into the water, hissing like molten metal.

ASSISTANT XU
But--

FU CHENGYAN
Seal it.

ASSISTANT XU bows and retreats. The chain runes glow brighter.

Suddenly, a cry echoes from above.

JIANG YI (O.S.)
Below! Clear the--

JIANG YI crashes through the canopy and plunges into the spring.

She surfaces, sputtering—and locks eyes with FU CHENGYAN.

The phoenix feather in her hair glows. The chain on his wrist pulses.

Both still. Both seeing.

The water around them begins to shimmer—not with heat, but with something else entirely.

title: Rebirth of the Villain Ex-Wife
description: A reader transmigrates into a novel as the villainous ex-wife who abandoned the male lead during his downfall, only to face karmic retribution when he rises again.
context:
Title: Rebirth of the Villain Ex-Wife
Description: A reader transmigrates into a novel as the villainous ex-wife who abandoned the male lead during his downfall, only to face karmic retribution when he rises again.

INT. BESIDE GARBAGE BINS - NIGHT

A stormy night with thunder and lightning.

A man rummages through a box of discarded lettuce.

JIANG YUMAN, ragged and soaked to the bone, hides behind a garbage bin. She takes a vegetable heart from the man and devours it hungrily, yet her face shows a satisfied smile.

A distant SHOUT echoes: "Check the alleys!"

A black Mercedes drives up and stops in the rain.

A man in a black suit with shiny leather shoes gets out. A BODYGUARD opens a black umbrella for him. This is FU JINGCHEN.

JIANG YUMAN sees him. The vegetable heart drops from her hand. Her eyes show shock.

FU JINGCHEN holds the umbrella, looking at her coldly.

JIANG YUMAN crawls toward him desperately, then stands up with a fawning smile on her face.

JIANG YUMAN
Fu Jingchen, they cleared your name. I knew they would. We can start over--

A BODYGUARD steps forward and pushes JIANG YUMAN to the ground.

FU JINGCHEN
(coldly)
Jiang Yuman. Is this what you left me for?

An elegantly dressed woman, YAO SIMENG, gets out of the car.

YAO SIMENG
(contemptuously)
This is her? The one who vanished when the investigators came? Who filed the divorce papers before your sentencing?

JIANG YUMAN
(voice cracking)
Ten thousand. Just ten thousand. The loan sharks-- they'll take my hands.

FU JINGCHEN
You gave up the right to ask for my help when you erased our child.

YAO SIMENG
Jingchen, don't waste your vindication on her.
continuation:
FU JINGCHEN turns to leave.

JIANG YUMAN
Wait! I'll beg. I'll grovel--

FU JINGCHEN
(sternly)
You already did. Two years ago. It was enough.

Several men wielding clubs rush over.

DEBT COLLECTOR
There she is! Don't let her run!

JIANG YUMAN flees in terror. The DEBT COLLECTORS chase after her. She runs blindly into the middle of the road.

A car speeds toward her, its headlights blinding.

BANG! JIANG YUMAN is struck and sent flying, landing in a pool of blood.

The scene freezes, transforming into an illustration in a book.

INT. MODERN APARTMENT - DAY

A READER wearing glasses and pajamas closes the book.

READER
(gleefully)
She got exactly what she deserved. Every last bit of it.

The READER stands, reaching for a water glass. Her foot slips on a wet patch. She falls--

Her head strikes the table corner. The glass shatters.

The book on the floor flips open. White light spills from its pages, enveloping the room.

INT. INSIDE A CAR - DAY

The READER slowly opens her eyes and finds herself in an unfamiliar environment, her face showing confusion.

She looks down at her hands - manicured, unblemished.

Outside the window, a gated estate waits.

She touches her face in the rearview mirror.

JIANG YUMAN's reflection stares back, eyes brimming with dawning horror.

title: After Descending the Mountain, A Peerless Beauty Insists on Becoming My Disciple
description: A powerful cultivator is hunted by celestial forces after defying the heavens and avenging his master.
context:
Title: After Descending the Mountain, A Peerless Beauty Insists on Becoming My Disciple
Description: A powerful cultivator is hunted by celestial forces after defying the heavens and avenging his master.

EXT. SNOWY MOUNTAIN WILDERNESS - DAY

A fractured solar halo stains the heavens.

ANCESTOR (V.O.)
Jiang Wuqi! You shattered the Heavenly Court's edict and slew your own ancestor! Ten thousand deaths cannot atone for this sin!

JIANG WUQI crashes from the sky, slamming into the frozen earth. Blood sprays across the snow.

JIANG WUQI struggles to rise, violet light flickering beneath his skin. Blood drips from his mouth.

Three IMMORTALS descend from the sky, hovering in the air, surrounding JIANG WUQI—IMMORTAL A, IMMORTAL B, IMMORTAL C.

IMMORTAL A
Surrender the Samsara Codex, Jiang Wuqi. Return to the Immortal Court in chains, and we might spare a fragment of your soul.

JIANG WUQI
The same court that watched my master shatter into soul-dust? The same ancestor who sent my senior sister into the Demonic Abyss? Come then. Take me.

IMMORTAL C
Insolence!

The three IMMORTALS attack simultaneously. JIANG WUQI forms a violet lotus seal, and a barrier appears, blocking the attack.

The barrier shatters instantly. JIANG WUQI is sent flying.

JIANG WUQI rolls on the ground dodging wave after wave of attacks, but is eventually hit by several energy blasts and falls motionless.

The three IMMORTALS slowly land and walk toward JIANG WUQI lying on the ground.

IMMORTAL B
With injuries like these, how did you ever break the Ancestor's Nine Heavens Seal?

Suddenly, the sound of clapping comes from behind them. The three turn around in shock.
continuation:
JIANG WUQI's true body appears behind them at some point, looking composed but pale.

JIANG WUQI
A decent effort. You nearly destroyed my blood puppet.

The "JIANG WUQI" on the ground dissolves into motes of violet light, leaving only a bloodstained talisman.

IMMORTAL A
Blood puppetry? That art was lost with the ancient immortals—

JIANG WUQI
Let me show you what else was lost.

JIANG WUQI gathers powerful violet lightning energy spheres in both hands. His hands tremble slightly.

IMMORTAL A (terrified)
He's channeling Primordial Lightning...

JIANG WUQI slams the lightning spheres into the ground. Countless bolts of lightning instantly engulf the three IMMORTALS.

The three IMMORTALS are blasted away by the electric light, falling to the ground in disarray, severely injured.

IMMORTAL B (struggling)
You're no mere cultivator... Who are you?

JIANG WUQI (bitter smile)
Just a disciple who buried his master.

The sky tears open, and a massive figure formed of storm clouds appears above.

ANCESTOR
Will you bury your sect next, traitor?

JIANG WUQI looks up at the ANCESTOR in the sky, his expression grave. For a heartbeat, grief crosses his face.

JIANG WUQI
If I must.

In the treeline, a PEERLESS BEAUTY in white watches, her eyes reflecting starlight.

title: Tiger Descending the Mountain
description: Chen Hu is reborn after being murdered by his family and returns to the moment that started his downfall, determined to turn the tables on those who betrayed him.
context:
Title: Tiger Descending the Mountain
Description: Chen Hu is reborn after being murdered by his family and returns to the moment that started his downfall, determined to turn the tables on those who betrayed him.

INT. HOT SPRING POOL - NIGHT

CHEN HU, white shirt and black pants clinging to his frame, floats face-down in the hot spring pool, motionless.

Suddenly, CHEN HU bolts upright from the water, gasping for air, his eyes wild, searching.

CHEN HU (V.O.)
Back here. I'm back.

FLASHBACK:

INT. BATHTUB - NIGHT

CHEN HU struggles violently in the water, finally sinking to the bottom.

CHEN HU (V.O.)
Chen Xiaolong's cocktail. The bathtub "accident" that ruined me.

INT. HOSPITAL WARD - DAY

CHEN HU, wearing a hospital gown, sits in a wheelchair with a vacant stare, drool running down from the corner of his mouth. A DOCTOR speaks with CHEN SHAN.

DOCTOR (V.O.)
Oxygen deprivation caused permanent damage. He'll need full-time care.

CHEN QINGXUE and CHEN XIAOLONG stand outside the ward, looking at the scene inside.

CHEN QINGXUE
What a pity. He survived.

CHEN XIAOLONG
He's dead enough. Reputation ruined, mind gone.

CHEN SHAN walks over.

CHEN XIAOLONG
Once I'm confirmed as company heir, I'll finish him.

END FLASHBACK.

ANOTHER FLASHBACK:
continuation:
INT. ABANDONED WAREHOUSE - NIGHT

CHEN HU lies on the ground covered in injuries, barely alive. CHEN SHAN looks down at him from above.

CHEN SHAN
Xiao Hu, don't blame Dad. The company belongs to Xiaolong and Xiaoxue. Your sacrifice is necessary.

CHEN XIAOLONG walks toward CHEN HU holding an iron rod, his face twisted with malice. CHEN HU's eyes widen—then harden.

END FLASHBACK.

INT. HOT SPRING POOL - NIGHT

CHEN HU returns to reality, his expression cold and determined.

CHEN HU (V.O.)
This time, the hunt goes both ways.

A woman in a red dress and gold robe, LIU SHUANGSHUANG, cautiously approaches the hot spring pool.

LIU SHUANGSHUANG
Tiger Young Master, are you alright? You were under so long.

CHEN HU
Liu Shuangshuang.

LIU SHUANGSHUANG
(nervously)
If you're okay, then I'll just...

CHEN HU rises from the water and walks toward her.

CHEN HU
Chen Xiaolong sent you to check, didn't he? Surprised I'm not dead?

LIU SHUANGSHUANG
(flustered)
No, this has nothing to do with me.

CHEN HU
Where is he?

LIU SHUANGSHUANG
He's... downstairs.

CHEN HU beckons to LIU SHUANGSHUANG with his finger. LIU SHUANGSHUANG hesitantly steps forward. CHEN HU suddenly reaches out and pulls her into the water.

LIU SHUANGSHUANG screams as she falls into the water. The two face each other in the pool.

CHEN HU
(quietly)
If I'd died tonight, Xiaolong's next move would be your arrest. "Self-defense against assault." He wins twice.

LIU SHUANGSHUANG
(shocked)
Is what you're saying true?

CHEN HU
I'm giving you one more chance to choose again.

ON SCREEN: TO BE CONTINUED

title: Without Rebirth I Can Still Take Back Everything That Belongs to Me
description: A young woman endures abuse from her husband and mother-in-law, nearly driven to suicide—until a discovery forces her to fight for survival.
context:
Title: Without Rebirth I Can Still Take Back Everything That Belongs to Me
Description: A young woman endures abuse from her husband and mother-in-law, nearly driven to suicide—until a discovery forces her to fight for survival.

INT. APARTMENT - DAY

LIU XINXIN, a young woman in casual home clothes, stands on a low stool with empty eyes, facing an open window.

LIU XINXIN (V.O.)
Rather than living like this, I might as well be dead.

A series of quick flashbacks:
QIN WEN pushes LIU XINXIN to the ground.
QIN WEN pins LIU XINXIN down on the bed.
XIA HUA slaps LIU XINXIN across the face.
XIA HUA steps on LIU XINXIN's hand as she lies on the ground.

XIA HUA (V.O.)
You're nothing but a dog of the Qin family!

Back to reality, LIU XINXIN stands by the window, tears streaming down her face.

LIU XINXIN
Mom... your daughter can't serve you anymore.

INT. STAIRCASE - DAY

Mother-in-law XIA HUA and husband QIN WEN watch coldly from outside the apartment door.

XIA HUA
She's actually going to jump. The little bitch found her courage.

QIN WEN
Qingming Festival is next week. One cemetery visit.

INT. APARTMENT - DAY

LIU XINXIN is about to step forward when she hears a baby crying from the living room. Her whole body trembles.

LIU XINXIN
No... I can't die. If I die, what will happen to the baby?

She gets down from the stool, staggers, and collapses on the sofa as if awakening, gasping for air.
continuation:
INT. STAIRCASE - DAY

QIN WEN and XIA HUA see that LIU XINXIN hasn't jumped.

QIN WEN
Why isn't she jumping?

XIA HUA
The Shen Group heiress doesn't like loose ends.

QIN WEN checks his phone: "Shen Mansion Tomorrow 10PM."

Their footsteps CREAK toward the door.

INT. APARTMENT - DAY

LIU XINXIN hears their voices through the door, her eyes filled with shock.

QIN WEN (O.S.)
—the Shen opportunity. Our chance to cross over. Xinxin must—

XIA HUA (O.S.)
—Make it look natural.

INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - DAY

SUPER: "Two Months Ago"

A DOCTOR runs hurriedly through the hospital corridor.

INT. HOSPITAL ROOM - DAY

LIU XINXIN lies on a hospital bed, moaning in pain, about to give birth. QIN WEN holds her hand, pretending to comfort.

LIU XINXIN
Honey, I'm in so much pain.

QIN WEN
Don't worry, I'm here. Everything will be fine.

Doctor ZHANG XIAOLONG walks in holding a report.

ZHANG XIAOLONG
Abnormal fetal position, umbilical cord wrapped around the neck. Emergency surgery now.

Medical staff quickly wheel LIU XINXIN toward the operating room.

INT. OPERATING ROOM - DAY

LIU XINXIN lies on the operating table, the surgical lights on.

ANESTHESIOLOGIST
Blood pressure's dropping. I can't give her the full dose.

The doctor picks up the scalpel. LIU XINXIN suddenly screams in pain.

DOCTOR A
What's happening?

NURSE
She's feeling everything!

DOCTOR A
Do we stop?

ZHANG XIAOLONG
No time. Continue.

LIU XINXIN lets out a heart-wrenching scream.

NURSE A
For your baby. Hold on!

NURSE A stuffs a bite guard into LIU XINXIN's mouth. LIU XINXIN struggles and loses consciousness.

ZHANG XIAOLONG
Massive hemorrhage. I need consent for emergency hysterectomy.

NURSE B
The husband is signing now.

A NURSE carries the silent newborn and hurries away.

NURSE A
The baby isn't crying...

FADE OUT.

title: I Will Not Fail My Lovesickness, Nor You
description: A successful CEO encounters his ex-girlfriend who once left him for money, now working as an employee in his company, forcing him to confront their painful past.
context:
Title: I Will Not Fail My Lovesickness, Nor You
Description: A successful CEO encounters his ex-girlfriend who once left him for money, now working as an employee in his company, forcing him to confront their painful past.

INT. COMPANY BUILDING - DAY

A black Rolls-Royce glides to a stop at the entrance. The rear window lowers, revealing GU JINCHUAN's impassive profile.

ON SCREEN: GU JINCHUAN, CEO of Tomorrow Group

Through the windshield: EMPLOYEES stream through the lobby. Among them, CHEN QIANQIAN clutches a worn tote bag, her white trench coat too thin for the weather.

ON SCREEN: CHEN QIANQIAN, Single Mother

The car door opens. GU JINCHUAN emerges, his black overcoat sharp against the morning light. He strides toward the entrance, ASSISTANT LIN scrambling to keep pace.

The lobby stills. EMPLOYEES line the atrium, bowing in practiced unison.

EMPLOYEES
(in unison)
Good morning, President Gu.

GU JINCHUAN's gaze sweeps across them—then locks onto CHEN QIANQIAN. Her bow is deeper than the others, her knuckles white around the tote bag.

Their eyes meet. Her lips part in silent shock.

ASSISTANT LIN
(low, urgent)
President Gu—your 9 AM acquisition briefing—

FLASHBACK TO:
continuation:
EXT. ROOFTOP - NIGHT

ON SCREEN: Eight Years Ago

A rooftop scattered with vintage astronomy charts. Candles outline Cassiopeia. FRIENDS hold mismatched lanterns, their whispers eager.

FRIENDS
Say yes! Say yes!

Young GU JINCHUAN kneels, offering not roses but a hand-bound journal pressed with forget-me-nots.

GU JINCHUAN
Qianqian, every constellation I mapped this year, I named after you. Be my girlfriend.

CHEN QIANQIAN's fingers tremble as she accepts. GU JINCHUAN lifts her, spinning them through the candlelight.

EXT. HOSPITAL PARKING LOT - DAY

ON SCREEN: Six Years Ago

Rain slicks the asphalt. GU JINCHUAN stands in a damp shirt, facing CHEN QIANQIAN under the awning.

GU JINCHUAN
Break up? Qianqian, we've built everything together. The company just secured Series A—

CHEN QIANQIAN
(cutting him off)
Can you secure a bone marrow transplant for my mother? The deposit alone is eighty thousand. Your "everything" won't even cover her first week in ICU.

GU JINCHUAN
(desperately)
I can raise it. I'll mortgage everything. Just give me three days—

CHEN QIANQIAN
And then what? More debt, more "potential"? I have a degree I can't use and a mother who's dying. Your love doesn't pay medical bills.

A silver Mercedes pulls up. The DRIVER steps out, holding an umbrella.

DRIVER
Miss Chen? Mr. Wang is waiting.

CHEN QIANQIAN turns. Her voice drops.

CHEN QIANQIAN
I was pregnant, Jinchuan. I took care of it. Some futures you can't build on promises.

She walks away. GU JINCHUAN stands frozen, rainwater mixing with tears he won't let fall.

INT. COMPANY BUILDING - DAY

GU JINCHUAN looks at the woman before him—her trench coat fraying at the cuffs, her eyes hollowed by sleepless nights.

GU JINCHUAN (V.O.)
She burned our future to save her mother. And I became the man who could buy a thousand hospitals. Yet neither of us survived what she chose.

He starts to turn away. Stops. A muscle in his jaw tightens.

GU JINCHUAN
(to Assistant Lin, low)
Transfer her to the sixteenth floor. My secretarial pool.

He walks past her, close enough to smell her perfume—lavender, the same as eight years ago.

ON SCREEN: TO BE CONTINUED

title: A Long Song With You
description: The Master of Star Plucking Tower's assassination attempt on the Prince of Jing'an is thwarted by a jade pendant bearing a childhood memory, while a cunning strategist engineers his own rescue.
context:
Title: A Long Song With You
Description: The Master of Star Plucking Tower's assassination attempt on the Prince of Jing'an is thwarted by a jade pendant bearing a childhood memory, while a cunning strategist engineers his own rescue.

INT. STAR PLUCKING TOWER HEADQUARTERS - NIGHT

Inside a cavern lit by votive candles, crimson silk banners hang from above. The MASTER OF STAR PLUCKING TOWER, in plum robes and a silver fox mask, reclines on a lacquered couch.

A SUBORDINATE in black scale armor enters and kneels.

SUBORDINATE
Master, the Jing'an assassination unit has been eliminated.

The MASTER sits up, candlelight reflecting off his mask.

SUBORDINATE
The survivors' final report mentions the Longevity Manual. The Prince carries it.

The MASTER hurls his scroll case across the stone floor. He selects another from a rack, breaking its wax seal.

The scroll reads: Grade A Commission - Prince of Jing'an - Jiang Yan - 500,000 taels.

MASTER
(to the flame)
Five years chasing that manual. If Jiang Yan holds it...

EXT. QINGYANG MOUNTAIN PASS - DAY

The PRINCE OF JING'AN moves through a bamboo grove in cerulean scholar's robes, two GUARDS trailing. His gait is measured, a hand pressed to his ribs.

The MASTER descends silently from the canopy, his folding fan snapping open.

GUARDS
Protect the Prince!

The Master's fan becomes a blur. Both GUARDS crumple, struck at pressure points, disarmed but alive.

The PRINCE draws a thin sword, his stance betraying him—too rigid, compensating for weakness.

Their clash sends tremors through bamboo. The Prince parries twice before the Master's palm strike sends him staggering back.

The pendant swings free—a lotus-carved jade, weathered, split by a hairline crack.

The MASTER's breath catches. His own pendant, hidden beneath his robes, pulses warm against his skin.
continuation:
INT. MASTER'S MEMORY - FLASH

A young boy clutching the same broken pendant, pulled from a burning manor. A promise whispered: "Find your brother by this token."

EXT. QINGYANG MOUNTAIN PASS - DAY

The Master's fan freezes mid-strike.

PRINCE
(struggling for breath)
Finish it.

MASTER
(whisper)
...Brother?

He vanishes into the forest shadows.

GUARD 1
Fifth Prince! The Shadow Dragon talisman—it's reacting!

The PRINCE glances at his chest, where a hidden seal glows crimson.

PRINCE
The manual warns of assassins. We must move.

They limp away.

EXT. QINGYANG MOUNTAIN PASS - DUSK

Twilight settles over a wrecked carriage. Three BANDIT CORPSES lie facedown, neck wounds precise, professional.

A toppled sedan chair lies in the wreckage, red silk torn.

The PRINCE approaches, his GUARD drawing a blade.

GUARD 1
Scholarwood arrows. Military issue. Crimson Lotus bandits don't carry these.

He lifts the curtain. Inside: SU ZIYUAN, bound in wedding crimson, mud-stained, a gag soaked with blood. His eyes remain sharp.

The Guard cuts his bonds. Su Ziyuan rises, kneels, offers a proper bow despite the mud.

SU ZIYUAN
Su Ziyuan, third son of the Su household. My life is yours, noble sir.

PRINCE
Did the Crimson Lotus take you?

SU ZIYUAN
Their leader claims legitimacy through marriage. When I refused her... hospitality, she dispatched these men to deliver my corpse. I... persuaded them otherwise.

He gestures to the bodies, a grim smile playing on his lips.

PRINCE
We ride for the Martial Arts Convention. You're free to go.

SU ZIYUAN sways, his knees buckling. The Prince catches him, noting scholar's calluses on his palms.

SU ZIYUAN
(murmuring)
My retinue waits at White Dew Crossing, three li north. The head injury...

His eyes flutter closed.

A MAN in traveler's clothes bursts from the bamboo, crossbow raised.

ATTENDANT
Unhand him!

GUARD 1
We found him like this—Crimson Lotus work.

The Attendant's eyes scan the Prince's embroidered insignia, the precise wounds on the bandits, Su Ziyuan's limp form. His crossbow lowers.

ATTENDANT
My pardon. I tracked these bandits since dawn. When I saw the uniform...

He holsters the weapon, approaches Su Ziyuan with genuine worry.

ATTENDANT
Young Master needs warmth and wine. We lost our supplies.

The Prince studies Su Ziyuan's face—the too-steady breathing, the tension in his jaw.

PRINCE
(to Guard 1)
Prepare the spare palanquin. Send a scout to White Dew Crossing.

As they lift Su Ziyuan, the Attendant's fingers brush his sleeve—three rapid taps, a prearranged signal. Su Ziyuan's lips curl, barely perceptible.

They carry him toward the horses, the Prince's gaze lingering on the scholar's face, suspicion and curiosity warring.

title: Cherish Love in Our Youth Part 1
description: A desperate mother makes an impossible choice when faced with her daughter's life-threatening illness and the stark inequality of medical care.
context:
Title: Cherish Love in Our Youth Part 1
Description: A desperate mother makes an impossible choice when faced with her daughter's life-threatening illness and the stark inequality of medical care.

INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - NIGHT

LI FANG kneels on the linoleum floor, fingers clutched around a NURSE's polyester scrubs. Her husband SHI GUOQING stands beside her, rocking their sleeping infant. Fluorescent lights cast a sickly pallor over the scene.

LI FANG
(whispered, trembling)
Please. She's only three months old. The heart surgery—she won't survive without it.

NURSE
(detaching Li Fang's grip)
Ma'am, I understand. But the surgeon needs the deposit first. That's hospital policy.

SHI GUOQING
(stepping forward)
Then take it from me. Blood, bone marrow—whatever you need. I'll sign anything.

NURSE
(adjusting her clipboard)
We don't barter here. You need sixty thousand. Cash or transfer.

Down the corridor, a commotion. A NANNY in a starched uniform hurries ahead of an entourage, speaking into a phone. Behind her, ZHAO WANQIU glides forward in silk loungewear, an infant in her arms.

NANNY
(urgent, to phone)
—yes, Doctor Chen is meeting us personally. The private elevator.

The NURSE's demeanor shifts instantly. She smooths her hair and steps around Li Fang, who stumbles backward onto the floor.

DOCTOR CHEN emerges from double doors, stethoscope already in hand.

ZHAO WANQIU
(concerned)
Her temperature's been up three degrees. Should I be worried?

DOCTOR CHEN
(taking the baby gently)
Let's have a look, shall we? The pediatric suite is ready.

NANNY
(brusque)
Miss Zhao expects the full panel. No waiting.

DOCTOR CHEN
Of course. Right this way.

The group moves past. Li Fang scrambles to her feet, blocking the Nurse's path.

LI FANG
(quiet, dangerous)
Why does her baby get a suite while mine gets a waiting list?

NURSE
(over her shoulder, matter-of-fact)
Shi Group endows our cardiology wing. Their donations keep this hospital running. You? You haven't paid a cent.

The Nurse walks away. Shi Guoqing sinks to the floor. Li Fang stares after the retreating figures, her expression hardening into glass.

LI FANG (V.O.)
(soft, fractured)
Daughter... there are rules. And then there's survival.
continuation:
INT. HOSPITAL WARD - NIGHT

A private room. ZHAO WANQIU's daughter sleeps in a glass crib, an ID bracelet catching the light. Li Fang watches from the doorway, her own baby mewling softly against her chest.

ZHAO WANQIU
(to the Nanny, gathering her purse)
I'll be in the consultation room. Page me if Doctor Chen calls.

The Nanny settles into an armchair, already scrolling through her phone. Within minutes, her head nods forward.

Li Fang hovers at the threshold. She checks both wrists—identical pink bracelets, tiny fingers, dark hair. The babies could be sisters.

NURSE (V.O. FLASHBACK)
Their donations keep this hospital running... You haven't paid a cent.

Li Fang's hands tremble as she tests the crib latch. It opens silently. She glances at the Nanny—snoring softly now.

LI FANG
(to her daughter, barely breathing)
They'll save you now. They have to.

She lifts her baby into the crib. For a moment, her hands rest on two infants. Then she lifts the sleeping child of wealth and privilege, tucking her into a worn shawl.

INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - DAY

Morning light filters through frosted windows. ZHAO WANQIU walks toward the ward, thumbing through lab results.

LI FANG approaches from the opposite direction, the shawl-wrapped baby held close. Her eyes stay fixed on the floor.

ZHAO WANQIU
(stepping aside, distracted)
—just need to check her bilirubin levels—

Their shoulders brush. Zhao Wanqiu frowns, turning back, but Li Fang is already disappearing around the corner. Zhao Wanqiu glances at the shawl—expensive cashmere—and relaxes, assuming it's a fellow patient.

She pushes open the ward door.

FADE OUT.

title: The Person Who Loved Me Most in the World is Dead
description: A woman's mother-in-law dies while her doctor husband chooses to save his first love instead, revealing a painful betrayal.
context:
Title: The Person Who Loved Me Most in the World is Dead
Description: A woman's mother-in-law dies while her doctor husband chooses to save his first love instead, revealing a painful betrayal.

INT. MEMORIAL HALL - DAY

Close-up of chrysanthemums and lit candles.

SHEN RONG (V.O.)
They say the cruelest questions come from love. But real life doesn't ask. It just watches while you drown.

The camera turns to the memorial hall, where a banner reads "In Loving Memory of Ms. Zhao Lan."

SHEN RONG (V.O.)
My mother-in-law died three days ago. Her son—my husband, the man who knows hearts better than anyone—was busy mending someone else's.

SHEN RONG, dressed in black, walks into the memorial hall with a controlled, hollow expression. She sees her husband ZHOU SHENGYU standing near the altar, his arm supporting a weeping YI XIAOWAN. He doesn't look up.

INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - NIGHT

Text appears on screen: Five Days Ago.

Medical staff lift the MOTHER-IN-LAW from an ambulance and push her on a gurney toward the emergency room. SHEN RONG follows, gripping her phone.

NURSE
Dr. Zhou's the attending cardiothoracic surgeon on call. His expertise could make the difference. Have you reached him?

SHEN RONG
He's not answering. I've left three messages.

NURSE
Try again. Every minute counts.

SHEN RONG dials again, her hands trembling.

SHEN RONG
(into the phone)
Shengyu, please. It's Mom. She's...

ZHOU SHENGYU (V.O.)
—I'm ten minutes out. Xiaowan's car flipped. Possible femoral fracture with arterial involvement. I'll be there as soon as I stabilize her.

The call drops. SHEN RONG's face drains of color.

At that moment, ZHOU SHENGYU rushes through the doors carrying YI XIAOWAN on a backboard, her right leg splinted and bloody.

NURSE
Dr. Zhou, we have a Code STEMI. Your mother's in Bay Three, we need you to—

ZHOU SHENGYU
(intense, focused)
Get Dr. Chen for the STEMI. He can handle it. This patient needs immediate vascular assessment.

ZHOU SHENGYU places YI XIAOWAN on a trauma bay. SHEN RONG intercepts him.

SHEN RONG
Dr. Chen is a resident. Mom's chart is in your head. You know her anatomy, her risks—

YI XIAOWAN
(weakly, panicked)
Shengyu, I can't feel my foot. Tell me it's not...

ZHOU SHENGYU
continuation:
(to YI XIAOWAN, then protocol)
Nurse, get vascular surgery on standby. Prep for angiogram.

SHEN RONG
(blocking him)
She's coding. Listen to me.

A MONITOR ALARM sounds nearby—MOTHER-IN-LAW's vitals crashing.

ZHOU SHENGYU
(finally looking at Shen Rong)
Dr. Chen knows the protocol. I can't abandon Xiaowan. She has no one else.

SHEN RONG
(low, desperate)
She's your mother. She has you.

ZHOU SHENGYU
(quiet, awful certainty)
Dr. Chen will do everything I would do. I trust him.

He turns away. SHEN RONG watches, frozen, as he disappears with YI XIAOWAN's gurney. Yi Xiaowan's eyes meet Shen Rong's for a moment—there's fear there, but something else. Relief. The luxury of being chosen.

NURSE
Miss! We need consent for the procedure.

SHEN RONG snaps back, signs the form with a shaking hand, and follows the MOTHER-IN-LAW's bed.

INT. HOSPITAL ROOM - NIGHT

The MOTHER-IN-LAW lies in bed, post-surgery, monitors beeping steadily. She's pale but lucid. SHEN RONG sits beside her.

MOTHER-IN-LAW
Did he come?

SHEN RONG
Dr. Chen did. The surgery was... successful.

MOTHER-IN-LAW
(small smile)
But my son didn't.

She takes SHEN RONG's hand, her grip surprisingly strong.

MOTHER-IN-LAW
Rongrong, when I'm gone, don't let them bury me in the Zhou family plot. Don't give them the satisfaction of mourning properly. Cremate me, scatter me under the sunflowers in the west field. You know the ones—we planted them together last spring.

SHEN RONG
Mom, stop. You'll recover.

MOTHER-IN-LAW
No. But you will. You're stronger than all of us.

The MOTHER-IN-LAW's monitors begin to alarm—gradual, not crashing. Her breathing slows.

MOTHER-IN-LAW
Thank you... for being the daughter I chose.

SHEN RONG
(sobbing, but steady)
Thank you for choosing me.

The MOTHER-IN-LAW's hand goes limp. The monitor's alarm becomes a single, endless tone. SHEN RONG doesn't scream. She just holds the cooling hand and stares at the door—still waiting.

title: The Lottery Winner
description: A kind-hearted woman buys a lottery ticket and wins 1 billion yuan, only to discover a shocking betrayal when she returns home to celebrate.
context:
Title: The Lottery Winner
Description: A kind-hearted woman buys a lottery ticket and wins 1 billion yuan, only to discover a shocking betrayal when she returns home to celebrate.

INT. LOTTERY SHOP - DAY

The LOTTERY SHOP OWNER hands SISTER QIN a lottery ticket.

LOTTERY SHOP OWNER
Here you go.

SISTER QIN
Thank you.

SISTER QIN takes the ticket and pulls out money from her wallet to pay.

LOTTERY SHOP OWNER
Auntie, the draw is about to start. The jackpot is 1 billion yuan.

SISTER QIN
(laughing)
Just my Friday ritual. Someone has to win, right? Family's waiting.

SISTER QIN prepares to leave. Another young couple in the shop is looking at lottery tickets.

YOUNG MAN
Prize is insane. My dad's been playing thirty years—best he got was a free ticket.

YOUNG WOMAN
You never know.

YOUNG WOMAN
(looking at the TV)
It's starting.

SISTER QIN stops and turns back to look at the TV. The winning numbers are being announced on screen.

TV ANNOUNCER (V.O.)
The winning numbers are: 04, 13, 17, 19, 26, 29, 16.

SISTER QIN looks down at the lottery ticket in her hand. The numbers match one by one. Her expression changes from calm to dazed.

LOTTERY SHOP OWNER
(quietly)
Someone's life just changed.

SISTER QIN
(whispering)
I think it's mine.

SISTER QIN doesn't answer. She clutches the lottery ticket and her wallet tightly, turns around, and walks out—controlled, almost too controlled.
continuation:
EXT. LOTTERY SHOP ENTRANCE - DAY

SISTER QIN walks out the door and leans against the wall, looking at her wallet with a trembling smile.

SISTER QIN (V.O.)
Eight hundred million. Hongjun's surgery, Hongwen's wedding. Maybe I can finally breathe again.

EXT. SEAFOOD MARKET - DAY

SISTER QIN arrives at a seafood stall.

SEAFOOD VENDOR
Oh, Sister Qin! This fish just died. I'll sell it to you cheap.

SISTER QIN
(beaming)
Live crabs today. Your best prawns. The works.

SEAFOOD VENDOR
(surprised)
Big celebration?

SISTER QIN
(smiling)
Thirty years of patience. Finally paid off.

INT. APARTMENT HALLWAY - DAY

SISTER QIN carries her shopping basket, humming a tune happily as she walks to her front door.

As she's about to open the door, she hears her husband's voice and a young woman's voice talking and laughing inside.

HUSBAND (O.S.)
She'll be at her sister's until eight. We have time.

MISTRESS (O.S.)
(laughing)
Good. Because next month, this is our apartment.

HUSBAND (O.S.)
Hahaha.

The smile on SISTER QIN's face freezes. She stands there, then carefully tucks the lottery ticket into her pocket.

title: The Sales Champion's Layoff
description: A veteran employee's celebration of his third consecutive sales championship shatters when his name appears on the company's layoff list.
context:
Title: The Sales Champion's Layoff
Description: A veteran employee's celebration of his third consecutive sales championship shatters when his name appears on the company's layoff list.

INT. COMPANY CONFERENCE ROOM - DAY

Fluorescent lights hum over a polished conference table. JIANG JIANGUO (52) sits with a quiet smile, polishing a small "SALES CHAMPION" trophy with his thumb. Nearby COLLEAGUES murmur appreciatively.

FEMALE COLLEAGUE
Third month in a row, Old Jiang? You're making us look bad.

JIANG JIANGUO
(soft laugh)
Just lucky.

MALE COLLEAGUE
Li's wallet is gonna feel this one.

BOSS LI raps his Montblanc pen on the table. The chatter dies.

BOSS LI
Monthly numbers. Excellent work.

His eyes scan the room, resting on Jiang for half a second too long.

BOSS LI
However. "Strategic optimization" requires... difficult decisions.

He nods to ASSISTANT WANG, who distributes single sheets—face down.

BOSS LI
Marked papers. HR after the meeting.

Jiang turns his sheet over. A RED LINE slashes through his name. The trophy slips—CLATTERS on the table.

JIANG JIANGUO
...what?

WHISPERS ripple. Colleagues stare at their clean sheets, then at Jiang.

FEMALE COLLEAGUE
continuation:
(to herself)
No.

ANOTHER COLLEAGUE
(quiet)
Cost-cutting.

BOSS LI gathers his tablet.

BOSS LI
Meeting adjourned--

JIANG JIANGUO
Wait.

Boss Li pauses.

JIANG JIANGUO stands, holding the paper.

JIANG JIANGUO
My clients. Eight years I've built this.

BOSS LI
The company appreciates that. But we need "fresh energy" in market development.

JIANG JIANGUO
Fresh energy.

He touches the trophy on the table.

JIANG JIANGUO
So the twelve-hour days. The clients who call me at midnight. That's just... outdated?

BOSS LI
Don't make this difficult. Be a team player.

Jiang's jaw tightens. He picks up the trophy. SLAMS it down.

CRYSTAL SHATTERS. A woman GASPS. Silence.

Jiang stares at his hand. Blood wells from a deep cut. He looks at Boss Li, breathing hard, the broken trophy glittering between them.

title: Biological Daughter Xia Tian vs Adopted Daughter Yin Hong
description: A story of jealousy and resentment between a biological daughter and an adopted daughter in rural China, as one gets the chance to return to the city while the other is left behind.
context:
Title: Biological Daughter Xia Tian vs Adopted Daughter Yin Hong
Description: A story of jealousy and resentment between a biological daughter and an adopted daughter in rural China, as one gets the chance to return to the city while the other is left behind.

INT. PEACH ORCHARD - DAY

Sunlight filters through the leaves.

XIA TIAN stands on a simple wooden ladder, wearing a white dress, happily picking peaches.

Adopted daughter YIN HONG, wearing a red floral shirt, stands below the ladder, looking up at XIA TIAN.

XIA TIAN
Yin Hong, we'll have peaches to eat with Mom tonight.

YIN HONG
Sister Xia Tian, there are a few more peaches over there.

XIA TIAN turns to reach for the peaches farther away. YIN HONG watches her back, her envy gradually turning to jealousy. Her hand grips the ladder leg.

The ladder wobbles. XIA TIAN screams and falls from the ladder. Peaches roll everywhere.

XIA TIAN
Ah!

YIN HONG runs forward and helps XIA TIAN up. XIA TIAN's knee is scraped, blood flowing.

YIN HONG
Sister Xia Tian, are you okay? I lost my grip.

XIA TIAN
(enduring the pain)
Just a scrape, it's fine.

YIN HONG
(staring at the wound)
Falling from that height and not breaking your leg. You're lucky.

THREE DAYS LATER
continuation:
INT. SIMPLE HOUSE - NIGHT

A table is set with a few simple dishes and a cake with "Happy Birthday" written on it, with a single candle on top.

TEACHER MENG helps XIA TIAN, whose knee is bandaged, sit at the table. YIN HONG is already seated there.

XIA TIAN
Wow!

TEACHER MENG
Make a wish.

XIA TIAN and YIN HONG both close their eyes and clasp their hands together to make wishes.

XIA TIAN (V.O.)
I hope we can always be together.

YIN HONG (V.O.)
I hope she never leaves this place.

After making wishes, everyone prepares to eat.

TEACHER MENG
(to YIN HONG)
Yin Hong, actually there's something...

XIA TIAN
(interrupting)
Mom, we're going back to the city tomorrow night. Village Chief Uncle said the bus will wait for us at the east end of the village at seven tomorrow night. When should we pack our luggage?

YIN HONG
(turning to XIA TIAN, quiet)
You're leaving... together?

TEACHER MENG looks troubled and remains silent.

XIA TIAN
(pulling TEACHER MENG's hand, anxiously)
Teacher Meng, please take her with us.

TEACHER MENG
(stroking YIN HONG's shoulder, with difficulty)
Yin Hong, the work assignment only covers biological children. If anyone finds a discrepancy, none of us can leave.

TEACHER MENG
(guiltily)
Yin Hong, I'm sorry. When the roster was made, only Xia Tian's name was listed.

XIA TIAN
(angrily)
If Sister Yin Hong isn't going, then I'm not going either!

TEACHER MENG
Let's do this: we'll go back to the city and get settled first, then we'll find a way to bring Yin Hong back, okay?

XIA TIAN
(with tears)
Then we have to bring Sister Yin Hong back before autumn, okay?

TEACHER MENG hugs XIA TIAN to comfort her. YIN HONG sits to the side, watching them with cold eyes.

YIN HONG (V.O.)
It's all because of you. If it weren't for you, I could go to the city with Teacher Meng and live a good life.

title: Report Me for Selling Fake Medicine, Now You Cry When I Won't Sell
description: A traditional Chinese medicine practitioner saves a woman at an accident scene after Western doctors declare her dead, proving the power of ancient remedies.
context:
Title: Report Me for Selling Fake Medicine, Now You Cry When I Won't Sell
Description: A traditional Chinese medicine practitioner saves a woman at an accident scene after Western doctors declare her dead, proving the power of ancient remedies.

EXT. CITY ROAD - DAY

CHEN XIAO (40s, weathered hands gripping handlebars tightly) rides an electric scooter. His daughter CHEN XIAOTONG (8, clutching a worn pink piggy bank) sits behind him. A faded "TCM Practitioner" bag hangs from the handlebars - a newspaper clipping inside reads "License Revoked Pending Investigation."

SOUND: Ambulance siren wails in the distance.

An ambulance rushes past, splashing through puddles.

CHEN XIAOTONG
Dad, look. Should we help?

CHEN XIAO
(flinching)
Doctors are already there. Your medicine's getting cold.

CHEN XIAOTONG
But you always say we can't turn away.

She touches his shoulder. Chen Xiao's jaw tightens—he's thinking of the courtroom, the accusations. The scooter slows.

EXT. CAR ACCIDENT SCENE - CONTINUOUS

A three-car pileup. LUO MENG (30s, blue business suit) lies on asphalt, shallow breath misting in cold air. Paramedics work frantically.

CHEN XIAO hangs back at the crowd's edge, his daughter pulling his sleeve.

CHEN XIAOTONG
Please. Just look.

AN OLD DOCTOR (60s, stethoscope around neck) checks LUO MENG's vitals. Younger paramedics exchange grim looks.

OLD DOCTOR
(to his team)
No pulse. Pupils fixed. Prep the sheet.

A PARAMEDIC reaches for a white cloth.

ONLOOKER A
She's so young.

ONLOOKER B
Nothing more they can do.

CHEN XIAO
(quietly)
Wait.

OLD DOCTOR
(turning)
Who said that?

CHEN XIAO pushes forward, Xiaotong behind him.

CHEN XIAO
She's in suspended animation. Not death.

YOUNG DOCTOR (O.S.)
(stepping into view)
You can't be serious. Master Li has forty years' experience.

CHEN XIAOTONG
My dad saved three people last month.

YOUNG DOCTOR
(to Xiaotong, gentler)
Sweetheart, miracles don't work that way.

CHEN XIAO
(to Xiaotong, low)
The red gourd. Only one pill left.
continuation:
CHEN XIAOTONG rummages in her backpack, produces a small gourd.

CHEN XIAOTONG
(to Young Doctor)
He means it.

YOUNG DOCTOR
That's interference with emergency services!

OLD DOCTOR
(laughs, not unkindly)
Young man, I've watched herbs fail for decades. If that revives her, I'll... retrain from scratch.

YOUNG DOCTOR
And I'll assist him!

CHEN XIAOTONG
Promise?

CHEN XIAO
(quiet authority)
Enough.

Chen Xiao kneels, checks LUO MENG's wrist—inner pulse point. He cracks the pill under his nose, wafts it. Then places it under her tongue.

He performs acupressure: three precise points on her throat, then chest compressions—different rhythm, fingers splayed.

Silence. Only traffic hum.

CHEN XIAO
(to his daughter, grim)
We tried. Let's go.

He stands, takes Xiaotong's hand. Turns.

YOUNG DOCTOR
(blocking him)
You can't just—

LUO MENG's hand spasms. She gasps—a wet, ragged inhale. Coughs violently.

STUNNED BEAT.

ONLOOKER A
She moved.

ONLOOKER B
Did you see—

OLD DOCTOR
(rushing to check)
Pulse returning. Weak but there.

YOUNG DOCTOR
(staring at Chen Xiao)
How did you—

Chen Xiao is already walking away, daughter beside him. He doesn't look back.

CHEN XIAOTONG
(whispering)
Will they let you practice again?

CHEN XIAO
(touching the newspaper clipping)
Probably not.

They merge into pedestrian flow. Behind them, the Young Doctor pulls out his phone—record function on.

YOUNG DOCTOR
(to Old Doctor)
We need to study this.

The Old Doctor watches Chen Xiao disappear, thoughtful.

title: The Poisonous Concubine's Daughter
description: A concubine's daughter is forced by her stepmother to become a servant in the Prince's mansion to secure her legitimate sister's position, while her mother and brother are held hostage.
context:
Title: The Poisonous Concubine's Daughter
Description: A concubine's daughter is forced by her stepmother to become a servant in the Prince's mansion to secure her legitimate sister's position, while her mother and brother are held hostage.

EXT. REAR COURTYARD OF MARQUIS QI'S MANSION - DAY

Heavy rain pours down, turning the courtyard to mud.

MADAM JIANG crosses the stone path with SERVANTS, her silk shoes untouched.

MADAM JIANG
Yun Niang. You always did have poor timing.

The servants seize YUN NIANG. She falls to her knees, pulling JIANG JINXIN into the mire.

YUN NIANG
Madam, I only begged for my son's medicine...

MADAM JIANG
(icy smile)
And I've brought you a permanent solution. Servants—make her grateful.

A wooden club strikes YUN NIANG's back.

JIANG JINXIN
Mother!

JIANG JINXIN crawls to MADAM JIANG's feet.

JIANG JINXIN
Madam, please! She'll die!

MADAM JIANG crouches, fingers biting into Jinxin's jaw.

MADAM JIANG
Your sister's confinement approaches. Prince Rui requires a particular companion—someone familiar with our family's...delicate arts. You defy me, and your mother's bloodline ends in this courtyard. Starting with that feverish son.

Servants drag out the young brother, limp with illness.

JIANG JINXIN
(strangled)
He's a child!

MADAM JIANG
Fever doesn't discriminate.

JIANG TIANCHENG (O.S.)
Enough theater.

MARQUIS QI YUAN, JIANG TIANCHENG, appears under an oil-paper umbrella, court documents in hand.

MADAM JIANG
continuation:
My lord. Instructions were nearly complete.

JIANG JINXIN
Father—
(her voice cracks)
They send me to Prince Rui's mansion. As my sister's maidservant.

JIANG TIANCHENG
The Prince's request specified a woman skilled in herbal arts. Your mother's teaching becomes your dowry to this family.
(He glances at Yun Niang)
Consider it gratitude for her instruction.

MADAM JIANG
The Prince's heir secures our position. You understand obligation.

JIANG TIANCHENG
Your brother receives the physician. Your mother receives quarters. While you serve.

JIANG JINXIN searches her father's face. Finds only the marquis.

JIANG JINXIN
And if I...displease?

MADAM JIANG
Then physicians forget. Quarters become cells.

Rain hammers down. JIANG JINXIN's fingers brush her mother's bloodied hand. Their hands twine for one heartbeat.

JIANG JINXIN
(raising her head)
I am honored to serve my sister's interests.

JIANG TIANCHENG
Lock Yun Niang and the boy away. We'll revisit their situation after Jinxin enters service.

JIANG TIANCHENG turns. Servants drag YUN NIANG and the brother away.

MADAM JIANG grips Jinxin's chin once more.

MADAM JIANG
Remember—inappropriate ideas cost more than your life. They cost his.

MADAM JIANG
Let's go!

MADAM JIANG departs. JIANG JINXIN remains kneeling in the rain.

JIANG JINXIN (V.O.)
(internal monologue, eyes becoming resolute)
You believe chains make a servant. I know they forge a weapon.

JIANG JINXIN lifts her head, her quiet hatred measured and infinitely more dangerous.

title: Sweet Little Village Wife
description: A CEO is abandoned in a rural village by his assistant on his father's orders, where he encounters a young woman being mistreated by her ex-boyfriend.
context:
Title: Sweet Little Village Wife
Description: A CEO is abandoned in a rural village by his assistant on his father's orders, where he encounters a young woman being mistreated by her ex-boyfriend.

EXT. COUNTRY ROAD - DAY

A black sedan navigates potholes on a rural highway, flanked by lush green rice paddies. The car jerks violently.

INT. SEDAN - DAY

XIAO YI, CEO of Xiao Corporation, mid-30s, wearing a rumpled suit, jolts awake. Dark circles under his eyes. Coffee stains his shirt cuff. He checks his watch, then his phone—no signal.

XIAO YI
(quietly)
We should've been at the Imperial Hotel two hours ago. Ake, where are we?

The driver, AKE, 40s, grizzled hands on the wheel, avoids the rearview mirror. His knuckles are white.

AKE
Mr. Xiao... your father called again this morning.

XIAO YI
(rubbing his temples)
The Bai family merger. I told him—no marriage meetings during the quarterly reviews.

AKE
Chairman's consolidating his holdings. He said... he said if you won't consider Miss Bai seriously, you're to spend time in Xu Family Village. Without corporate resources.

The car hits another pothole. XIAO YI's coffee cup tips. He catches it, but hot liquid splashes his shirt.

XIAO YI
(ice in his voice)
You diverted my car. Based on a threat.

AKE
I have a daughter starting university. The Chairman's been... generous with the staff investment program.

A long beat. XIAO YI looks out at the endless fields.

XIAO YI
Pull over.
continuation:
EXT. COUNTRY ROAD - DAY

The sedan stops. AKE pops the trunk, removes a duffel bag.

AKE
I keep spare clothes for village visits. Fresher uniform than that stained suit.

From the bag: a simple button-down shirt, work pants, sturdy boots. Practical. Not a uniform.

XIAO YI
(taking the clothes)
You're not coming back.

AKE
Chairman's tracking the car GPS. I need to drive around two hours. Then... I don't know.

XIAO YI studies his assistant—ten years of loyalty, now this.

XIAO YI
Make sure your daughter gets her tuition.

AKE nods, throat tight. XIAO YI changes beside the car, methodical. The CEO disappears; a regular man remains.

XIAO YI
When my father asks—tell him I said the Bai family bleeds companies dry. I'd dissolve Xiao Corp before merging with parasites.

AKE
He won't listen.

XIAO YI
Then he'll learn what happens when you corner someone.

AKE gets in the car. The engine starts. XIAO YI turns away, not watching it leave.

The car reverses, turns, and speeds back the way it came. Dust settles.

XIAO YI stands alone. He checks his pockets—wallet, dead phone, keys to apartments and offices that mean nothing here. He begins walking.

A worn stone marker: "Xu Family Village - 3 Li."

XIAO YI (V.O.)
Xu Family Village. Mother's hometown. Before grandfather disowned her.

In the distance: voices. A man's slurred shouting. A woman's sharp retort. XIAO YI's head lifts. He changes direction toward the sound.

EXT. XU FAMILY VILLAGE ENTRANCE - DAY

Village youth XU SHENG, 20s, blocks LIU MINGZHU's path. He reeks of cheap alcohol. She's steady, holding a canvas grocery bag.

XU SHENG
Two nights at Er Niu's place. Nothing happened. You're being dramatic.

LIU MINGZHU
Step aside. We're done.

XU SHENG
(venom building)
Done? Your grandma's medical bills last month—who helped? You think some stranger's gonna—

XIAO YI (O.S.)
Is there a problem here?

XIAO YI appears from around the corner. He doesn't approach directly. He leans against a tree, casual but present. His gaze settles on Xu Sheng.

XU SHENG
(challenging)
Mind your business, outsider.

LIU MINGZHU
(quietly fierce)
I paid back every cent you lent me. With interest. Now get out of my way.

She steps forward. Xu Sheng grabs her wrist. The grocery bag falls—apples roll in the dirt.

XIAO YI
(repeating, softer)
I said. Is there a problem?

Xiao Yi straightens. The tree no longer supports him. He is very still.

title: Rural Teacher Sweeps the World & Run, Teacher
description: A renowned professor who saved Earth from an asteroid chooses to return to rural teaching, leaving behind his powerful students who wish to honor him.
context:
Title: Rural Teacher Sweeps the World & Run, Teacher
Description: A renowned professor who saved Earth from an asteroid chooses to return to rural teaching, leaving behind his powerful students who wish to honor him.

INT. SPACE COMMAND CENTER - DAY

Space. Thousands of meteors hurtle toward Earth.

A hand operates frantically at a control panel.

PROFESSOR WANG JIANGUO, white coat and glasses, watches the screen in shock.

A rocket launches from the ground, flying into space.

Missiles intercept the meteorites. Violent explosions. White light fills the screen.

The command center's large screen displays the explosion footage.

Inside the command center, all the RESEARCHERS burst into enthusiastic cheers.

WANG JIANGUO
We did it.

ASSISTANT
(excitedly)
All fragments destroyed. Blue Star is safe.

FEMALE COLLEAGUE
(applauding)
You did it, Wang. You actually did it.

WANG JIANGUO
(smiling with relief)
Saved. It's saved.

The command center door opens. DRAGON GOD, PHOENIX, and CANGHAI walk in with powerful presence.

NARRATOR (V.O.)
Master of the Northern Territory's Dragon Warriors, Dragon God. Blue Star's business tycoon, Phoenix. President of the Four Seas Canglang Group, Canghai. All his students.

DRAGON GOD, PHOENIX, and CANGHAI walk up to WANG JIANGUO and kneel on one knee in unison, clasping their fists in salute.

DRAGON GOD
Teacher. You preserved our world.

DRAGON GOD, PHOENIX, CANGHAI
(in unison)
Let us honor you.
continuation:
WANG JIANGUO
(laughing, helping them up)
Rise, please. Your intention means everything. But Teacher is returning to the countryside.

PHOENIX
(urgently)
You've earned every honor. Don't exhaust yourself further.

WANG JIANGUO
I need to teach.

DRAGON GOD
You gave eight years to this. Rest.

ASSISTANT
Yes.

WANG JIANGUO
(sighing)
Eight years.

WANG JIANGUO picks up a photo of himself and his wife from the desk, falling into memory.

INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - 8 YEARS AGO

Young WANG JIANGUO paces anxiously outside the delivery room. His WIFE'S painful cries come from inside.

WANG JIANGUO
(praying with hands clasped)
Please. Let them both be safe.

Several ASSISTANTS rush over.

ASSISTANT
(out of breath)
Professor Wang—Pluto's orbit is destabilizing. Moving toward us. Eight years.

WANG JIANGUO
At that time...

ASSISTANT
Blue Star will perish.

WANG JIANGUO
(shocked)
What?

WANG JIANGUO adjusts his glasses, his eyes filled with disbelief and gravity.

title: Super Wheat
description: Agricultural scientist Lin Weimin returns home after twenty years of secret research on super wheat that could revolutionize food security for the nation.
context:
Title: Super Wheat
Description: Agricultural scientist Lin Weimin returns home after twenty years of secret research on super wheat that could revolutionize food security for the nation.

INT. STATE LABORATORY - DAY

A pristine, high-security research facility. LIN WEIMIN (50s, weathered hands, eyes focused) examines wheat specimens under a microscope. His worn jacket hangs beside a photo of a wheat field—faded, from another era.

CHEN CHENG (20s, ambitious assistant) bursts through the airlock doors, tablet in hand, trying to maintain composure.

CHEN CHENG
Professor Lin! The Gobi test fields just reported in.

(pause)
Double the standard yield. Per acre.

A hush falls. Nearby, DR. ZHOU (40s, lead agronomist) drops her tablet on a workstation. Rushes over.

DR. ZHOU
(double-checking the data)
These readings... they're not possible. 
(glances at Lin)
If we scale this—

CHEN CHENG
The broadcast is already starting.

On a wall monitor, the NATIONAL LEADER addresses the nation. Lin watches, silent.

NATIONAL LEADER (ON SCREEN)
—a breakthrough that will secure our nation's future. In three days, Academician Lin will receive the nation's highest honor.

The screen shows footage of golden wheat fields. Lin touches the faded photo on his desk.

LIN WEIMIN
(quietly, to himself)
Two decades.

DR. ZHOU
Professor?

LIN WEIMIN
The Gobi strain isn't the limit. It never was.

CHEN CHENG
There's more?

Lin pulls out an old field journal. The cover bears a woman's name: SU MEI. He opens it, revealing meticulous notes alongside pressed wheat samples.

LIN WEIMIN
My wife cultivated the mother strain. In our village. Before I left.

Dr. Zhou leans in, studying the notes. Chen Cheng's eyes widen.

LIN WEIMIN
She was the one who saw its potential first. I need to finish what we started.

CHEN CHENG
I'll arrange transport—

LIN WEIMIN
(shaking his head)
Alone. It's been twenty years.

The laboratory doors slide open. Two PROTOCOL OFFICERS enter, forming an honor guard. The National Leader's voice continues on screen.

The scientists straighten. Lin picks up the journal, edges worn from twenty years of handling, and walks toward the exit.
continuation:
INT. WANG BANCHENG'S PENTHOUSE OFFICE - DAY

Floor-to-ceiling windows overlook a glittering city. WANG BANCHENG (50s, diamond cufflinks, smile that doesn't reach his eyes) scrolls through news on a curved monitor.

The headline: "NATIONAL HERO LIN WEIMIN—SUPER WHEAT SAVES NATION."

LIN TINGTING (20s, sharp features, sharper ambition) enters with a lacquered tray of tea. She pours with practiced elegance, her reflection ghosting across the dark screen.

LIN TINGTING
The board wants to know our position on the wheat contracts.

Wang doesn't look up. Tingting's fingers tighten on the teapot.

WANG BANCHENG
We don't have a position. Yet.

He zooms in on Lin Weimin's photo. Studies it.

WANG BANCHENG
Jiangcheng Chamber of Commerce controls food distribution for three provinces. We become irrelevant if we don't control the seeds.

LIN TINGTING
What do you need?

WANG BANCHENG
A gesture of goodwill. Something... personal.

He swivels his chair. Faces her fully for the first time.

WANG BANCHENG
I recall you mentioned property in your hometown. Prime location?

LIN TINGTING
(voice measured)
My father's land. But there's... a complication. Someone still lives there.

WANG BANCHENG
People can be persuaded.

LIN TINGTING
She's a widow. Stubborn. Refused previous offers.

Wang opens a drawer. Places a bankbook on the glass desk.

WANG BANCHENG
One million. For relocation.

Tingting's breath catches. She reaches for the bankbook. Wang's hand covers hers.

WANG BANCHENG
Handle this properly. The Chamber's influence depends on it.

She meets his gaze. A calculation passes between them.

LIN TINGTING
(softly)
What about your current wife?

WANG BANCHENG
What about Academician Lin's wife?

The words hang. Tingting's smile widens, understanding the unspoken bargain. She slips the bankbook into her purse.

LIN TINGTING
I'll leave tonight.

Wang turns back to the window. In the reflection, he watches her leave—then pulls up a second screen: demographics of Lin Weimin's hometown village.

He zooms in on a name: SU MEI. Widow. Property holder.

WANG BANCHENG
(to himself)
Gifts should arrive before the guest.

He picks up a phone.

WANG BANCHENG
(into phone)
Ready the demolition crew. Quietly.

title: The Amazing Mother
description: A mother who collects trash to fund her daughter's education must protect her from being sold into marriage by her abusive gambling husband.
context:
Title: The Amazing Mother
Description: A mother who collects trash to fund her daughter's education must protect her from being sold into marriage by her abusive gambling husband.

EXT. GARBAGE DUMP - NIGHT

A light rain slicks the mountain of refuse. LI YUN (40s, scholar's hands now calloused) stuffs plastic bottles into her sack. Her flashlight beam catches a discarded textbook—she pauses, wipes mud from its cover, adds it to her haul.

LI YUN
(to herself)
One hundred seventeen. Enough.

She ties the sack, a weary satisfaction on her face.

EXT. ALLEY - NIGHT

LI YUN drags the heavy sack when MRS. CHEN (60s, neighbor) emerges from the shadows, slippers slapping wet pavement.

MRS. CHEN
(urgent, low)
Li Yun—they're saying Old Tang took Youyou to the Zhang matchmaker. Tonight.

LI YUN's sack slips from her grasp. Bottles scatter. She doesn't retrieve them. She runs.

EXT. HOUSE ENTRANCE - NIGHT

The door SLAMS open. OLD TANG (50s, bloated with drink) shoves YOUYOU (18) onto the steps—she's in a red wedding qipao, a bruise darkening her jaw. She catches herself on the railing.

OLD TANG yanks his belt free. The leather WHIPS the air.

OLD TANG
Twenty years I've fed you—time to pay back!

YOUYOU
(quiet, terrified)
Mom's tuition money...

OLD TANG
What money? Zhang's paying triple my debt!

The belt descends. YOUYOU flinches.

LI YUN sprints into the courtyard. Without a word, she THROWS herself over her daughter. The belt cracks across her shoulders—she grunts but doesn't cry out.
continuation:
LI YUN
(hissing)
You want to hit someone? Hit me.

OLD TANG
(tangling hand in her hair)
Think I won't?

YOUYOU
(eyes flashing)
I'm not a thing to sell!

OLD TANG
(mocking)
With what money? More trash?

YOUYOU
I'll get scholarships. I'll work—

OLD TANG
You'll—

LI YUN's hand finds a brick from the crumbling step. She swings it sideways into Old Tang's knee. He howls, buckles, slumps against the doorframe—DIZZY, cursing, but conscious.

LI YUN stares at the brick, drops it. From her pocket she pulls a roll of damp bills—fives and tens, meticulously saved.

LI YUN
(hand shaking)
Train fare. To Shanghai. Go.

YOUYOU
Mom, I can't—

LI YUN
You must. Now.

She stuffs the money into Youyou's palm, pushes her toward the street. Youyou stumbles, looks back—her mother standing guard over Tang's groaning form.

YOUYOU's face shifts: terror hardening into resolve. She clasps the money and sprints into the darkness.

ON LI YUN—breathing hard, a fragile wall between her daughter and the world—as Old Tang's hand gropes for her ankle.

FADE OUT.

title: Five Treasures Unite: Daddy Chases Mommy
description: A young woman's desperate night leads to an unexpected encounter with a mysterious man, resulting in quintuplets that will change both their lives forever.
context:
