Title: Five Treasures Unite: Daddy Chases Mommy
Description: A young woman's desperate night leads to an unexpected encounter with a mysterious man, resulting in quintuplets that will change both their lives forever.

INT. NIGHTCLUB - NIGHT

SU XIWEI balances a champagne tray, her mother's bracelet catching the strobe lights.

SU XIWEI (V.O.)
That night, I thought I was fighting for my diploma. Turns out, I was fighting for five.

BOSS FU leers from his VIP sofa. BAI YAN corners SU XIWEI near the bar.

BAI YAN
Last chance. Thirty thousand yuan for one hour with Boss Fu. Or you're deported tomorrow.

SU XIWEI
I said no. I'll find another way.

She spins away—and collides with FU JINGSHEN. Champagne soaks his shirt.

FU JINGSHEN
(steadying her)
Usually people apologize first.

SU XIWEI
I'm sorry! I'll pay for—wait, your bracelet—

Their identical prayer bead bracelets clink together.

FU JINGSHEN
My mother's. She said I'd know my destiny when I saw its match.

ASSISTANT ZHU appears, whispering urgently. FU JINGSHEN's jaw tightens.

FU JINGSHEN
(to SU XIWEI)
Thirty thousand yuan. Marry me tonight. Save your visa. Save my company from my grandmother's ultimatum.

SU XIWEI searches his face. Desperation meets desperation.

SU XIWEI
Just for show?

FU JINGSHEN
Just business. One year. Our secret.

He removes his bracelet, clasping it around her wrist.

FU JINGSHEN
Now we match.
continuation:
INT. HOSPITAL DELIVERY ROOM - DAY

FADE IN:

TEXT ON SCREEN: NINE MONTHS LATER

SU XIWEI screams, gripping the bracelet. A hidden LED pulses with her heartbeat.

SU XIWEI
(between contractions)
You said you'd find me...

DOCTOR
First baby's out! Wait—this is impossible. It's... quintuplets?

SU XIWEI
(shocked)
What?

She faints. Five nurses hold five newborns. One has a blue birthmark.

ASSISTANT ZHU (V.O.)
Boss Fu, the tracker in her bracelet just went active. She's at City Hospital—

FU JINGSHEN (O.S.)
I'm already in the elevator.

FADE OUT.

title: Five Elements Legend (Episode 65)
description: At a temple, disciples train under Master Hu Shan's watchful eye when the sinister Qing Sha and his black-clad soldiers arrive at the gates.
context:
Title: Five Elements Legend (Episode 65)
Description: At a temple, disciples train under Master Hu Shan's watchful eye when the sinister Qing Sha and his black-clad soldiers arrive at the gates.

EXT. TEMPLE COURTYARD - DAY

Wide shot.

On the broad stone steps in front of the temple, DISCIPLE A and DISCIPLE B are engaged in intense sparring. MASTER HU SHAN stands nearby, holding a monk's staff, watching them sternly.

Close shot.

DISCIPLE A and DISCIPLE B wield heavy weapons, their moves sharp and fierce—A pressing forward with raw intensity, B defending with fluid precision. The clashing of their weapons rings out continuously. DISCIPLE A executes a graceful backflip and lands steadily.

MASTER HU SHAN
(to Disciple B)
Your form holds, but your conviction trembles. They will sense that.

The disciples cross their weapons in front of MASTER HU SHAN.

MASTER HU SHAN
(to both)
Good. Remember—protecting the temple means more than winning.
continuation:
EXT. MILITARY CAMP GATE - DAY

Wide shot.

A heavily guarded city gate with a plaque reading "General's Mansion." A woman in white robes walks slowly toward the gate, her hand clutching a broken sword hilt bearing the temple's insignia.

A group of black-clad soldiers kneel on one knee, holding their weapons. A black flag bearing the character "Sha" flutters in the wind.

Close-up of the unusual weapons in the soldiers' hands—obsidian blades that seem to absorb light rather than reflect it.

A man dressed in red and white robes plays with a throwing knife between his fingers, his eyes locked on the woman's pendant.

EXT. TEMPLE COURTYARD - DAY

The red temple doors are pushed open from the outside.

Outside the gate, QING SHA appears with a large group of black-clad soldiers. His armor bears the same broken-sword insignia as the woman's hilt.

Inside the courtyard, MASTER HU SHAN and his disciples maintain their defensive stance, watching the entrance warily.

DAOIST ELDER stands to the side. Seeing who has arrived, his face shows shock and bitter recognition.

DAOIST ELDER
(shocked)
Qing Sha. You traded your soul for those blades.

QING SHA enters the courtyard with a smug smile on his face, his gaze falling on the Daoist Elder.

QING SHA
Elder. You taught me that mercy is weakness. I've merely learned my lesson.

title: Finding Love in Midlife & The Flash Marriage Partner is the Nation's Richest
description: A woman discovers her husband's betrayal at a young man's celebration banquet, only to be unexpectedly defended by a security guard.
context:
Title: Finding Love in Midlife & The Flash Marriage Partner is the Nation's Richest
Description: A woman discovers her husband's betrayal at a young man's celebration banquet, only to be unexpectedly defended by a security guard.

INT. BANQUET HALL - DAY

A grand academic celebration banquet is underway, packed with guests and a lively atmosphere. CHEN XIULAN, her husband ZHAO JIANMIN, and her mother-in-law LI GUILIAN sit at the main table. Chen Xiulan's fingers trace the edge of an envelope in her lap.

CHEN XIULAN
(whispering to ZHAO JIANMIN)
Old Zhao.

ZHAO JIANMIN
(not looking up from his phone)
Mmm?

CHEN XIULAN
Twenty thousand for Zhao Liang's scores... that's six months of my nursing shifts. You never even asked.

LI GUILIAN
(stabbing a dumpling precisely)
A childless woman shouldn't question a man's decisions. Zhao Liang's university seat is the Zhao family's future.

ZHAO JIANMIN
(pocketing his phone)
Mother's right. It's an investment.

CHEN XIULAN
(folding the envelope into her bag)
I see. An investment.

EMCEE
(on stage)
Now let's have our future college student, Zhao Liang, say a few words!

Guests applaud. ZHAO LIANG walks onto the stage accompanied by his mother, ZHANG FENGXIA. Chen Xiulan's eyes narrow—Zhao Liang has Zhao Jianmin's exact jawline.

ZHAO LIANG
(taking the microphone, voice cracking)
First, thank you for coming. My achievements belong to my mother, Ms. Zhang Fengxia... who raised me alone in Qingzhou while building her business.

FEMALE GUEST
(surprised)
Qingzhou? Isn't that where Zhao Jianmin's company opened a branch?

MALE GUEST
The timeline fits. Been operating there for... what, nineteen years?

ZHAO JIANMIN stands, straightening his jacket. Chen Xiulan doesn't flinch—just watches.

ZHAO LIANG
(announcing, but his eyes find Chen Xiulan)
Today, I also thank the man who taught me what responsibility looks like. My father—Zhao Jianmin.

The hall erupts. Chen Xiulan rises slowly, her hand still in her bag.

CHEN XIULAN (V.O.)
Nineteen years. The Qingzhou "business trips." The separate bank account. The daughter they told me died of "complications."

ZHAO LIANG
(walking toward ZHAO JIANMIN)
Dad.

ZHAO JIANMIN
(smiling, but it doesn't reach his eyes)
Son.
continuation:
ZHANG FENGXIA
(to ZHAO JIANMIN, voice low)
I told you to wait until after the divorce.

ZHAO JIANMIN
(patting her arm)
The timing is perfect.

CHEN XIULAN
(stepping into their path, voice steady)
Zhao Jianmin. The Qingzhou property in your name. Built during our marriage. Care to explain?

ZHAO JIANMIN
(coldly)
Fengxia and I have been partners—in every sense—for two decades. I married you because my mother demanded a "respectable" wife. You've served your purpose.

CHEN XIULAN
(breaking down the facade)
Purpose? I worked eighty-hour weeks to pay for your mother's surgery. Your "business trips" were family vacations. The car, the house—my debt, your assets.

LI GUILIAN
(rushing over, voice like a whip)
You dare speak? You couldn't carry a son! Fengxia gave me a grandson. Your daughter was defective—weak lungs, they'd said.

CHEN XIULAN
(finding her volume)
She was premature because you pushed me down the stairs!

FLASHBACK - 18 YEARS AGO

INT. HOSPITAL ROOM - DAY

CHEN XIULAN, pale and trembling, holds a tiny infant. YOUNG LI GUILIAN and YOUNG ZHAO JIANMIN hover.

YOUNG LI GUILIAN
(hissing)
A daughter? With her health problems, she'll cost us everything. The doctors say she might not survive. Sign the papers, Jianmin. Let the state have her.

YOUNG ZHAO JIANMIN
(avoiding Chen Xiulan's eyes)
It's... mercy.

The MIDWIFE takes the baby. Chen Xiulan's screams are muffled by a nurse closing the door.

END FLASHBACK

INT. BANQUET HALL - DAY

LI GUILIAN
(pointing, but uncertainty flickers)
You still dare mention that burden?

ZHAO JIANMIN
(disgusted)
Chen Xiulan, you're a ghost of a woman. But I'll be generous—stay as my housekeeper, and I won't contest the divorce. Though who would want a used nurse pushing fifty?

A SECURITY BADGE appears between them. WEI BAOGANG, 45, weathered hands holding it up.

WEI BAOGANG
(officer's badge, not a guard's)
Detective Wei, Economic Crimes Unit. I've been investigating Zhao Jianmin's offshore accounts. Mrs. Chen, I believe you have evidence of marital asset fraud?

Chen Xiulan pulls the envelope from her bag—bank statements. Her tears dry.

CHEN XIULAN
(to Wei)
I do. And I know exactly where my daughter is.

title: Life Upgrade Guide
description: A man who became a villain's pawn is given a second chance when a game of Russian roulette miraculously sends him back ten years to correct his mistakes.
context:
Title: Life Upgrade Guide
Description: A man who became a villain's pawn is given a second chance when a game of Russian roulette miraculously sends him back ten years to correct his mistakes.

EXT. ROOFTOP - DAY

JIANG MING, in a suit, stands at the edge of the rooftop, holding a revolver.

JIANG MING (V.O.)
My name is Jiang Ming. My business cards say I'm a real estate executive.

JIANG MING points the gun at his temple.

JIANG MING (V.O.)
One bullet. Five pulls. 16.67% survival. Better odds than I've given my victims.

JIANG MING (V.O.)
In this life, I've perfected the art of looking away.

JIANG MING pulls the trigger. It clicks empty.

EXT. CONSTRUCTION SITE - DAY (FLASHBACK)

Young JIANG MING wears work clothes. A CONTRACTOR hands him a red safety helmet filled with money.

CONTRACTOR
Xiao Jiang, Li Yong was your brother. But brothers don't bankrupt projects. One accident, and this development becomes a ghost property.

JIANG MING
The pit wasn't marked. We both knew the sign was missing.

CONTRACTOR
(interrupting)
What sign? The only sign that matters is the one you didn't give—the warning he never heard. From now on, Li Yong never existed.

EXT. ROOFTOP - DAY

Back on the rooftop, JIANG MING's eyes are filled with pain.

JIANG MING (V.O.)
I'm sorry, Yongzi. If I had another chance, I would definitely save you.

JIANG MING pulls the trigger again. Another empty click. He moves the gun to his chin.

JIANG MING
Dad, forgive me.
continuation:
INT. LIVING ROOM - DAY (FLASHBACK)

JIANG MING's FATHER grabs his arm, emotional.

JIANG MING'S FATHER
Jiang Ming, do you know what that means? Prison!

JIANG MING
Dad, that's the boss of Hengyuan Real Estate. If I take the fall for him for three years, I can get five hundred thousand! Only a fool would refuse!

JIANG MING shakes off his father and walks toward the door.

JIANG MING'S FATHER
Jiang Ming! If you walk out that door today, don't call me your father anymore!

JIANG MING leaves without looking back. His FATHER clutches his chest and collapses painfully onto the sofa.

EXT. ROOFTOP - DAY

JIANG MING (V.O.)
Dad, Yongzi, give me one more chance, I will definitely be a good person!

JIANG MING
(shouting)
Do you know what happened to me after that?

INT. OFFICE - DAY (FLASHBACK)

XU HENGYUAN, the boss of Hengyuan Real Estate, pats JIANG MING on the shoulder.

XU HENGYUAN
Jiang Ming, from today on, you are Hengyuan Real Estate's top enforcer!

JIANG MING
(smiling obsequiously)
Thank you, Brother.

EXT. CONSTRUCTION SITE - DAY (FLASHBACK)

LI YONG'S MOTHER kneels on the ground, crying and grabbing JIANG MING's pant leg.

LI YONG'S MOTHER
Jiang Ming! Your housing project, they just stopped building it! This money is my life savings!

INT. OFFICE - DAY (FLASHBACK)

JIANG MING is tied with rope, kneeling before XU HENGYUAN.

XU HENGYUAN
Jiang Ming, you're nothing but a dog by my side, and you dare to report Hengyuan Group? Even though I did all the bad things, the public will think it was Jiang Ming who owes them billions in relocation funds!

XU HENGYUAN laughs maniacally.

EXT. ROOFTOP - DAY

JIANG MING (V.O.)
I became exactly what they needed: a scapegoat with a name and face. I, Jiang Ming, am nothing but debt.

JIANG MING shoves the gun in his mouth and frantically pulls the trigger. Another empty click.

JIANG MING
(desperately)
Four shots.

JIANG MING
(roaring at the sky)
Heaven! Are you trying to let me live again?

Past scenes flash rapidly. JIANG MING's emotions collapse. He points the gun at his temple again and roars as he pulls the trigger for the fifth time.

SOUND: A gunshot rings out.

INT. DORM ROOM - DAY

JIANG MING jolts awake from a crude bed, screaming frantically.

JIANG MING
(touching his head, in disbelief)
I'm not dead? I'm not dead!

He looks around and realizes he's in the construction site dormitory from ten years ago.

JIANG MING
I've been reborn!

JIANG MING clasps his hands together, excited and grateful.

JIANG MING
Thank you, Heaven! In this life, I will never go down the wrong path again! I will definitely be a good person!

He sees a calendar on the wall showing April 2nd.

JIANG MING
April 2nd... I will never forget this day. This is the day Li Yong fell into the pit.

AMING'S GIRLFRIEND (O.S.)
Aming, you're awake.

A pretty girl wearing a white top and plaid skirt walks in.

title: His Love Came Just in Time
description: A young girl searches for her father, a wealthy CEO, to save her mother from danger.
context:
Title: His Love Came Just in Time
Description: A young girl searches for her father, a wealthy CEO, to save her mother from danger.

INT. BUS - DAY

YUEYUE (six or seven) sits hunched in her seat, clutching a worn magazine. Rain streaks the window.

CONDUCTOR (O.S.)
Next stop, West Station. Tickets, please.

The CONDUCTOR stops beside Yueyue, glancing at her mud-stained backpack.

CONDUCTOR
Where to, little one?

YUEYUE
(softly)
The capital.

CONDUCTOR
That's ¥150. What you've got... maybe ¥20?

YUEYUE
( showing the magazine)
My father will pay when I find him. He's Mo Yunpei.

The bus lurches. Passengers murmur. A MAN scoffs.

MAN
Everyone in the capital wishes Mo Yunpei was their daddy.

CONDUCTOR
(sighing)
Rules are rules. I can't let you ride.

YUEYUE
Please. My mother needs—

CONDUCTOR
Off at the next stop. I'll say I miscounted.
continuation:
EXT. ROADSIDE - DAY

YUEYUE stands in the rain as the bus pulls away. The magazine falls open. A photo of MO YUNPEI at a gala—circled in red marker.

She picks herself up, counts the wet bills, and starts walking along the highway.

YUEYUE
(to herself)
Mom said the capital is north. Just keep north.

A truck horn blares. Yueyue stumbles back, falling. A silver bracelet slips from her sleeve—engraved with the Mo family crest.

YUEYUE
(touching the bracelet)
Mom, I won't let them hurt you again.

FLASHBACK - INT. ROOM - DAY

CHENG SINING, bruises on her wrists, packs a backpack. She pins the magazine photo inside Yueyue's jacket.

CHENG SINING
This came out the week you were born. If I'm not at the station by morning, take the bracelet to him. He'll know.

END FLASHBACK

EXT. ROADSIDE - DAY

Yueyue wipes mud from her face. Headlights appear in the distance—a black luxury sedan.

She holds up the magazine, waving frantically.

INT. LUXURY CAR - DAY

MO YUNPEI reviews contracts. WU PEIYI watches the rain.

WU PEIYI
Slow down. That child's going to get herself—

Through the rain-streaked window: Yueyue's bracelet catches the light.

WU PEIYI
( sharp intake of breath)
Stop the car. Now.

DRIVER
Sir?

MO YUNPEI
(glancing up)
Mother?

WU PEIYI
That bracelet—

EXT. ROADSIDE - DAY

The car stops. MO YUNPEI steps out, briefcase in hand.

YUEYUE runs to him, hugging his leg. Rainwater drips from her hair.

YUEYUE
(crying)
Dad, please. Mom needs help.

MO YUNPEI
(staring at the bracelet)
Where did you get that?

YUEYUE
Mom gave it to me. She said you'd know.

Mo's grip tightens on the briefcase. He looks from the bracelet to the magazine in Yueyue's hand—the circled photo, the date.

MO YUNPEI
(quietly)
What's your mother's name?

YUEYUE
Cheng Sining. She's waiting—

MO YUNPEI
(to Driver)
Call Dr. Chen. Tell him we have an emergency.

Mo kneels, his hand trembling as he touches the bracelet.

MO YUNPEI
(whisper)
Get in the car.

title: Temptation by Design (Episode 51)
description: A woman wakes up in a hospital to find herself recruited into a revenge scheme by her enemy's adoptive brother, who offers her a new identity as his deceased sister.
context:
Title: Temptation by Design (Episode 51)
Description: A woman wakes up in a hospital to find herself recruited into a revenge scheme by her enemy's adoptive brother, who offers her a new identity as his deceased sister.

INT. HOSPITAL WARD - DAY

Sunlight cuts through blinds, striping the sterile room. The FEMALE LEAD stirs, her fingers twitching against white sheets. A heartbeat monitor beeps steadily.

GU SHIYAN sits in shadows, his face half-lit. He leans forward as her eyes flutter open.

GU SHIYAN
(gently)
Welcome back.

The FEMALE LEAD jolts upright, pain flashing across her features. Her hand flies to her bandaged ribs.

FEMALE LEAD
(her voice raw)
Did they—

GU SHIYAN
(interrupting)
He thinks you're dead. The river current helped.

She studies him, her gaze sharpening despite the drugs. She notices his expensive watch, the way he doesn't quite sit like a worried relative.

FEMALE LEAD
You're not a doctor.

GU SHIYAN
(observing her closely)
No. I'm the man who pulled you out. And the man who can put you back in.

A beat. She understands.

FEMALE LEAD
Gu Ruosheng's brother.

GU SHIYAN
(slight nod)
Gu Shiyan. You've done your homework.

FEMALE LEAD
(defensive edge)
When your husband tries to kill you, you learn his enemies.

She winces, touching her throat—fingerprint bruises still visible.

GU SHIYAN
(quietly)
My adopted sister Gu Yan spent twenty-three years in a private facility. Three days ago, she died during an "experimental therapy" session. Her death certificate is still warm.

He slides a leather folder onto her lap. She doesn't open it.

GU SHIYAN
Gu Ruosheng signed the transfer papers himself. Another loose end tied.

FEMALE LEAD
(whisper)
Why would I become someone else's ghost?

GU SHIYAN
Because Gu Yan was heir to fifteen percent of Gu Group shares. Because as her, you can walk into any room. Because I saw your face in the water—calm. Like someone who'd already died and decided to come back anyway.

She finally opens the folder. A photo: a fragile girl with her same build, similar eyes.

FEMALE LEAD
(softly)
I don't know how to be her.

GU SHIYAN
You don't have to. You just have to be angry enough to pretend.

He places a small keycard on the file.

GU SHIYAN
Room 314. Her personal effects. I'll give you tonight to decide if you want to keep breathing as a corpse... or start living as a weapon.

He leaves. She stares at the photo—at the girl who could be her sister, her mirror. Her hands tremble.
continuation:
INT. PRESS CONFERENCE VENUE - DAY

The ballroom hums with camera clicks and hushed greed. The backdrop looms: "Lin-Fu Group Merger."

CEO FU adjusts his black mourning armband, playing the grieving widower. His smile is carefully broken.

Below, GUEST 1 checks his phone, leaning to his companion.

GUEST 1
(quietly)
Lin's stock dropped forty percent since the "accident." Efficient way to clear a boardroom.

GUEST 2
Still. Killing your wife? That's—

GUEST 1
That's what happens when you marry your accountant's daughter.

At the podium, CEO FU taps the microphone. The room hushes.

CEO FU
(voice cracking)
My beloved wife lost her battle with depression. In her memory, I've chosen to merge Lin Group—her family's legacy—with Fu Group. Together, we will honor her by building something stronger.

A FEMALE REPORTER stands, her press badge catching light.

FEMALE REPORTER
CEO Fu, sources claim Fu Group's debt load exceeds assets by three hundred million. They allege this "merger" is asset stripping, and your wife discovered the scheme before her death.

The room holds its breath.

A COLD VOICE cuts through from the back row.

GU YAN (O.S.)
She discovered more than that.

Heads turn. GU YAN rises, wearing Gu Yan's signature ivory blazer. She walks with a limp—the real Gu Yan's childhood injury. CEO FU's face drains.

GU YAN
(approaching slowly)
She discovered the offshore accounts. The falsified therapy records. TheDates. She found out you were going to kill her three weeks before the wedding.

She stops ten feet from the stage, her eyes locked on his.

GU YAN
You even asked if I'd be your maid of honor. Remember?

CEO FU
(stammering)
Gu Yan is—that's impossible, she's—

Suddenly, the projectors flicker. Documents, signatures, therapy dates flash across the backdrop. The flyers aren't thrown—they cascade from the ceiling like judgment.

CLOSE-UP: A photo floats down—CEO FU and a doctor exchanging money outside a psychiatric facility.

GUEST 3
(catching one)
My god. That's his signature on the commitment papers.

GUEST 4
He committed his own sister-in-law?

CEO FU stumbles backward as the papers rain down. One sticks to his shoe: "Patient Gu Yan: Termination Authorization."

GU YAN
(her voice carrying)
You wanted a merger? Here's your paperwork.

Camera flashes strobe like lightning. CEO FU clutches the podium, his ashen face reflecting in the dying projector light.

title: Disguised Affection
description: A woman drugged at a hotel encounters a man in the same condition, leading to a fateful night that echoes a traumatic past orchestrated by her scheming family.
context:
Title: Disguised Affection
Description: A woman drugged at a hotel encounters a man in the same condition, leading to a fateful night that echoes a traumatic past orchestrated by her scheming family.

INT. HOTEL BATHROOM - NIGHT

GU BEISHENG, wearing a red blouse, holding a wine glass, staggers into the bathroom. She places the glass on the sink, looking dizzy and disoriented.

She turns on the faucet and splashes cold water on her face, trying to stay conscious.

GU BEISHENG (V.O.)
I feel terrible. Something's wrong with that drink.

In the mirror, a man, FU XIZHOU, appears at the doorway. He removes his suit jacket.

GU BEISHENG
Who are you?

FU XIZHOU steadies himself against the doorframe, breathing heavily.

FU XIZHOU
Same question.

He stumbles toward her. She backs against the sink. They both waver, drugged.

GU BEISHENG
(struggling)
The wine...

FU XIZHOU clutches the sink edge beside her. They lock eyes, recognizing mutual desperation.

FU XIZHOU
(quietly)
They got you too.

He leans close, not predatory—trying to focus. His fingers, trembling, brush her earring. It slips, falling to the floor with a sharp CLICK.

FU XIZHOU (V.O.)
Now I understand everything. She was drugged too. The earring is proof.

They gaze deeply into each other's eyes, then kiss. FU XIZHOU lifts GU BEISHENG into his arms and carries her toward the room.
continuation:
INT. HOTEL ROOM - CONTINUOUS

FU XIZHOU gently lays GU BEISHENG on the bed.

GU BEISHENG
(hazily)
Don't.

FU XIZHOU holds her hand.

FU XIZHOU
I won't leave you here.

He leans closer to her.

FU XIZHOU
I remember you.

INT. HOSPITAL DELIVERY ROOM - FLASHBACK (FIVE YEARS AGO)

GU BEISHENG lies on the delivery bed, screaming in pain during childbirth. Doctors and nurses surround her.

GU BEISHENG (V.O.)
Five years ago, I was framed and violated, then became pregnant and gave birth to a stillborn child.

Through the small window in the operating room door, she sees her stepmother XU HUIRONG and sister GU XINYU watching her coldly.

INT. PSYCHIATRIC HOSPITAL - FLASHBACK

GU BEISHENG (V.O.)
To seize the shares my grandmother left me, my family had me committed to a psychiatric hospital.

An older man (FAMILY MEMBER) and a woman force GU BEISHENG to place her fingerprint on documents.

FAMILY MEMBER
Sign it, now!

GU BEISHENG struggles fiercely, breaks free from her restraints, and runs through the ward, trying to escape. Several medical staff in white coats chase after her.

MEDICAL STAFF
Catch her! Don't let her get away!

GU BEISHENG
Let me go!

She is caught and guided back to her room.

GU BEISHENG
(desperately)
This is illegal!

INT. PSYCHIATRIC HOSPITAL WARD - PRESENT DAY

GU BEISHENG wakes from a nightmare, lying in an empty ward.

GU BEISHENG
(terrified)
No!

A doctor wearing a mask enters the ward.

DOCTOR
Gu Beisheng, your family is here to pick you up.

At the doorway, GU XINYU and XU HUIRONG look at her with triumphant smiles.

GU BEISHENG
(fearfully)
Stay away!

GU XINYU
Sister, we've found you a good match.

XU HUIRONG
You'll be discharged very soon.

GU BEISHENG clutches her pillow tightly, her eyes filled with fear and hatred.

INT. LUXURY VILLA - DAY

FU XIZHOU stands on the second-floor balcony, cutting and lighting a cigar before taking a puff.

FU XIZHOU
(to his subordinates below)
I asked you to find a woman. Five years and you still can't find her.

He angrily throws the cigar to the ground.

FU XIZHOU
A bunch of useless fools!

The subordinates bow collectively.

FU XIZHOU
Keep searching. I must find her whereabouts.

title: Switched at Birth
description: A vengeful servant switches two newborns during a stormy night at a rural hospital, setting in motion a tale of mistaken identities and separated families.
context:
Title: Switched at Birth
Description: A vengeful servant switches two newborns during a stormy night at a rural hospital, setting in motion a tale of mistaken identities and separated families.

INT. VILLAGE HOSPITAL - NIGHT

Rain lashes a dark window. HE XI runs beside her HUSBAND as he pushes a hospital bed. On it, ZHAO WANRU, 25, writhes in advanced labor.

HE XI
(shouting)
Doctor! My mistress—she's breech!

ZHAO WANRU
(screaming through contraction)
Don't let me die in this filth!

INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - NIGHT

Narrow, dimly lit. The HUSBAND swerves to avoid a water bucket—COLLIDES with SU SHANHE, 40s, on crutches. Both men crash down.

HE XI
Clumsy oaf!

HUSBAND
(struggling up)
Do you know whose child that is? One word from her and we—

SU YUQIAO'S ADOPTIVE MOTHER stumbles from a doorway, clutching her belly.

SU YUQIAO'S ADOPTIVE MOTHER
You maniac! You could've killed him!

She shoves He Xi. He Xi recoils, knocking the woman against the wall. She doubles over, gasping, water soaking her dress.

SU SHANHE
No— the baby! It's too soon!

He hammers on a supply closet.

SU SHANHE
Nurse! My wife—she's bleeding!

INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - LATER

He Xi and her Husband slump against opposite walls, soaked in rain and dread.

HUSBAND
(soft)
Flash flood on the main road. We had no choice.

HE XI
(whisper)
If she blames us... Mingming pays the price.

The DELIVERY ROOM DOOR opens. A NURSE steps out.

NURSE
Zhao Wanru? Mother and daughter are stable.

He Xi's breath hitches—relief and something darker.
continuation:
INT. HOSPITAL ROOM - NIGHT

Lightning flickers. ZHAO WANRU lies on starched sheets, already scrolling on her phone, untouched water beside her.

ZHAO WANRU
(without looking up)
Where is it?

HE XI enters, clipboard in hand.

HE XI
The nurse will bring her soon. You should—

ZHAO WANRU
(razor-sharp)
Should? I should be in a private suite, not this sewer. She kicks the bedframe. He Xi flinches.

ZHAO WANRU
My daughter deserves a proper welcome. Not whatever diseases linger in your poverty. Fetch her. And pray she's perfect.

INT. NURSERY - NIGHT

He Xi stands before two cribs. Storm knocked out half the lights. One card: "MOTHER: ZHAO WANRU." The other: "MOTHER: SU YUQIAO'S MOTHER."

Zhao's baby sleeps fitfully. The Su baby is calm, thumb in mouth.

HE XI
(whisper)
You'd be her mirror. Her little monster.

Her hand strays to her knee—old pain.

FLASHBACK

INT. MANSION - DAY

One month ago. He Xi scrubs marble floors. ZHAO WANRU glides past. He Xi shifts the bucket—too slow. Water darkens silk hem.

SECOND MAID
Mistress! It won't happen again!

HE XI
(whisper)
My son needs this job. Please.

ZHAO WANRU
(cold)
My Mingming fell because of you. He still has the scar.

She lifts a crystal bowl—drops it. SHATTER.

ZHAO WANRU
Kneel.

HE XI
Mistress—

ZHAO WANRU
Or I call the authorities. Your boy becomes a ward of the state.

He Xi kneels. Glass bites through fabric. Blood pools.

ZHAO WANRU
Some people are born to serve. Some are born to be served.

She nods. The Second Maid slaps He Xi—once, twice. Mechanically. Ashamed.

HE XI
(soft)
Mingming... forgive me...

END FLASHBACK

INT. NURSERY - NIGHT

Back to the present. HE XI looks at ZHAO WANRU's crying baby daughter. Her hand trembles above the crib.

The Su infant stirs, opens eyes—dark, like her son's. He Xi notices a strawberry birthmark on the girl's wrist. Identical to Mingming's.

HE XI
(whisper)
God forgive me.

She lifts the Su baby. The child nuzzles into her neck, trusting. He Xi holds her close—one moment of tenderness.

Then, trembling, she places the Su baby in Zhao's crib. Lifts Zhao's daughter.

HE XI
(to the baby girl)
She'll never know you. And you'll never know her poison.

HE XI cradles the infant, her face a mask of pain and fierce possession. She disappears into the thunder.

title: Courting Death Villain: You Dare Kidnap the Immortal's Daughter
description: A young girl with immortal powers searches for a mother for her cultivator father, but gets kidnapped by mysterious assailants.
context:
Title: Courting Death Villain: You Dare Kidnap the Immortal's Daughter
Description: A young girl with immortal powers searches for a mother for her cultivator father, but gets kidnapped by mysterious assailants.

INT. MODERN BUILDING ENTRANCE - DAY

A SECURITY GUARD dozes against the wall.

SU KEKE, a little girl with double braids, wearing ancient-style clothing and round sunglasses, sits leisurely on a high platform with a blade of grass in her mouth.

SU KEKE (V.O.)
Dad's too busy cultivating all day. No way, I need to find myself a mom.

A black Mercedes speeds in and stops with a beautiful drift.

AN NING, a young woman in a black business suit with a cold demeanor, gets out of the car.

SU KEKE (V.O.)
Found Dad's destined woman.

SU KEKE leaps down from the high platform, her movements light and graceful like a fairy descending, landing gently.

EXT. COMMERCIAL STREET - DAY

AN NING and her maid XIAO LIAN walk down the street.

XIAO LIAN
Miss, the board is pressuring you again. They say a marriage alliance is the only way to save the company.

AN NING
I told you, I will not marry.

XIAO LIAN
He's a married man who vanished ten years ago. After his wife left, he took his daughter and sealed himself away. You have to let him go.

AN NING
I...

SU KEKE suddenly pops her head out between them, grinning.

SU KEKE
Beautiful sister! Looking for a husband? My dad just became available—you're exactly his type.

AN NING
(sternly)
Little friend, tell your father that child exploitation is a crime. Don't let me see you again.

AN NING and XIAO LIAN turn to leave.

SU KEKE
(shouting after them)
Hey, I'm not a scammer! My name is Su Keke, I live on Qinghua Mountain, and my dad is Su--

Suddenly, the jade pendant necklace around SU KEKE's neck glows with warning light, then shatters.
continuation:
SU KEKE
(surprised)
My life-bound object broke.

A black van screeches to a halt beside SU KEKE. Two men in black combat uniforms get out.

KIDNAPPER 1
Move.

The two kidnappers rush toward SU KEKE.

SU KEKE
Who are you?

SU KEKE easily dodges their attacks, kicks one into a nearby trash bin, and uses her inner force to blast the other back.

SU KEKE
(proudly)
You dare challenge me?

The KIDNAPPER LEADER steps out from behind the van, his presence overwhelming.

KIDNAPPER LEADER
Miss.

SU KEKE channels her inner force, but it shatters against him. He doesn't budge.

SU KEKE
(thinking)
That suppression... Martial Master realm.

SU KEKE immediately changes her expression, putting on an innocent smile, and runs toward the KIDNAPPER LEADER.

SU KEKE
Daddy, you're here!

She pretends to hug him.

KIDNAPPER LEADER
Petty tricks.

The KIDNAPPER LEADER grabs SU KEKE, lifts her up, and shoves her into the van.

SU KEKE
(sticking her head out the window, shouting)
Beautiful sister, save me!

In the distance, AN NING hears the cry and whips her head around.

AN NING
(angrily)
Human traffickers!

Energy fluctuations ripple around AN NING's body, her eyes flashing with recognition—and fury.

title: You Are the Mantis, I Am the Sparrow (Episode 41)
description: A woman is nearly killed by her brother-in-law after her sister's miscarriage, only to be reborn and given a second chance to change her fate.
context:
Title: You Are the Mantis, I Am the Sparrow (Episode 41)
Description: A woman is nearly killed by her brother-in-law after her sister's miscarriage, only to be reborn and given a second chance to change her fate.

INT. ROOM - NIGHT

WANG HU (O.S.)
You think you can erase her child with a single mistake?

SONG NUAN lies on the stone floor, gasping. WANG HU, in ceremonial armor, towers over her. LI QING stands in the shadows, avoiding her gaze.

SONG NUAN (V.O.)
They blame me for my sister's fall. For the life inside her. For the heir they would have killed me to protect.

WANG HU's boot presses down on her throat.

INT. THEATER - DAY (FLASHBACK)

SONG YUN YAN clutches the second-floor railing, eight months swollen. Her foot catches on a loose board. She tumbles forward, silk dress catching air.

SONG YUN YAN
(scream cuts short)

She lands at the bottom. Crimson spreads across marble.

INT. ROOM - NIGHT

LI QING
You think I didn't see your relief when she fell? This was always about envy.

SONG NUAN
(strangled)
I loved her. I would never—

LI QING
You kept her in the heat. You watched her beg. The seat I gave you became her death sentence.
continuation:
INT. ROOM - NIGHT (FLASHBACK)

LI QING drapes a mink stole over SONG NUAN's shoulders.

LI QING
First row. Just for you. I bribed three officials for this view.

SONG NUAN
But Yun Yan is with child. The second floor is so hot—

LI QING
She wanted to come. Let her appreciate the gesture.

INT. THEATER - DAY (FLASHBACK)

SONG YUN YAN leans over the second-floor railing, pale and sweating.

SONG YUN YAN
Sister, please. I feel faint.

SONG NUAN
(stares at her velvet seat)
This was his gift to me.

SONG YUN YAN
Just for the first act. Please.

SONG NUAN turns away.

INT. ROOM - NIGHT

LI QING draws his sword. The blade sings.

LI QING
Brother Wang. The family justice is yours to deliver.

He offers the hilt. WANG HU takes it.

The candlelight catches the steel as it rises.

EXT. THEATER ENTRANCE - NIGHT

Snow falls like ash. The opera's aria spills into the street:

OPERA SINGER (O.S.)
One life ends, another begins... the wheel turns blind...

SONG NUAN stands in the snow, looking bewildered. SONG YUN YAN walks up to her, eight months pregnant, very much alive.

SONG YUN YAN
Sister, why are you standing there in a daze? Let's go in and watch the opera.

SONG NUAN looks around, then at the Buddhist prayer beads in her hand—one bead is cracked, leaking faint golden light.

SONG NUAN (V.O.)
This is... I've been reborn. Reborn one hour before the fall.

title: You Said You'd Find Me
description: In 2009, a CEO mother and her young daughter are hunted through the mountains in a storm. The daughter sacrifices herself to save her mother.
context:
Title: You Said You'd Find Me
Description: In 2009, a CEO mother and her young daughter are hunted through the mountains in a storm. The daughter sacrifices herself to save her mother.

INT. JIANG FAMILY BACK MOUNTAIN - NIGHT

Torrential rain pours down, thunder rumbles. JIANG SHU (38, sharp features now haggard) runs frantically along a muddy mountain path in a torn black suit, soaked through. She clutches her daughter JIANG XIA (7, small but fierce).

PURSUER (O.S.)
Hurry up and find those two! If the Jiang family finds them first, we're finished!

Jiang Shu slips, slamming into a puddle with Jiang Xia. Her temple strikes a rock. Blood mixes with rainwater. Her grip loosens.

JIANG XIA
(anxious)
Mom! Your head--

Jiang Shu blinks hard, fighting unconsciousness.

INT. ABANDONED WAREHOUSE - DAY

FLASHBACK. Jiang Shu and Jiang Xia cower against a concrete wall as kidnappers close in. SCARFACE (40s, brutal, calculating) cracks his knuckles. Rain hammers a distant window.

SCARFACE
The boss says you don't leave here alive. Nothing personal—just business.

JIANG SHU
(angry and terrified)
I'm CEO of Jiang Corporation. My family will pay triple whatever you're getting.

SCARFACE
(leaning in)
Your own brother hired us, Mrs. CEO. Said you and the brat are blocking his inheritance.

He signals his men. They advance.

SCARFACE (CONT'D)
Take them to the mountain. Make it look like an accident.

INT. JIANG FAMILY BACK MOUNTAIN - NIGHT

Back to reality. Scarface leads several THUGS through the storm, flashlights cutting through the downpour.

THUG
(excitedly)
Two million! Boss promised two million for the Jiang heir and her kid!

SCARFACE
Shut up and search!
continuation:
INT. CAVE - NIGHT

Jiang Shu lies unconscious in a dark cave. Blood flows from her temple. Jiang Xia rips fabric from her own shirt, pressing it to her mother's wound.

JIANG XIA
(crying quietly)
Mommy... please...

Jiang Shu's eyes flutter open, unfocused.

JIANG SHU
(whispering)
Pain pain fly away... Mommy doesn't hurt anymore...

Her eyes roll back. She goes limp.

JIANG XIA
(crying louder)
Mom! Wake up! You promised you'd find me!

FOOTSTEPS approach outside. Flashlight beams dance near the entrance.

JIANG XIA (CONT'D)
(whispering)
You have to hide. Don't move.

She covers her mother with dry leaves and branches, then kisses her forehead.

EXT. MOUNTAIN ROAD - NIGHT

Three black sedans skid to a halt. JIANG FAMILY BODYGUARDS leap out, weapons drawn.

CHIEF BODYGUARD
(into walkie-talkie)
Fan out! Find them before the kidnappers do! Move!

The bodyguards storm up the mountain.

INT. CAVE - NIGHT

FLASHLIGHT beams pierce the darkness. Scarface's silhouette looms.

SCARFACE (O.S.)
Check every hole. They can't be far.

Jiang Xia's eyes widen. She looks at her unconscious mother, then at the jade pendant around her own neck—a family heirloom.

EXT. JIANG FAMILY BACK MOUNTAIN - NIGHT

Jiang Xia bursts from the cave, running perpendicular to her mother's location.

JIANG XIA
(shouting)
I'm here! Come get me!

Scarface and the Thugs wheel around. Rain drenches them all.

SCARFACE
(grinning viciously)
Smart little brat. But not smart enough.

He lunges, grabbing her neck. He rips the jade pendant from her, then throws her down a steep slope. She vanishes into the darkness with a scream.

SCARFACE (CONT'D)
She's gone. Find the mother—fast!

A THUG
(panicked)
Boss! Jiang family guards!

Flashlight beams sweep from another ridge—fifty yards away.

INT. CAVE - NIGHT

Jiang Shu's eyes snap open. She hears the commotion. Her fingers find the spot where Jiang Xia hid her. Empty. She sees light—her bodyguards.

She also sees something glinting in the mud near the cave entrance: the jade pendant.

CLOSE ON: Jiang Shu's bloodied hand clutching the pendant. Her face crumples.

JIANG SHU
(whispered)
You said you'd hide... not run.

She struggles to her feet, staring at where her daughter disappeared.

JIANG SHU (CONT'D)
(weak but determined)
You said you'd find me. Now I'll find you.

She staggers toward the slope as bodyguards rush in.

FADE OUT.

title: You Chose Your First Love, Why Cry When I Leave
description: A woman married a man for five years but never loved him, keeping her heart for her ex-boyfriend who abandoned her, until he returns.
context:
Title: You Chose Your First Love, Why Cry When I Leave
Description: A woman married a man for five years but never loved him, keeping her heart for her ex-boyfriend who abandoned her, until he returns.

INT. LUXURY MANSION LIVING ROOM - DAY

XU WANQING descends the spiral staircase, silk robe trailing, and freezes. JIANG CHEN stands at the window, garment steamer in hand, hovering over a brown suit on a mannequin.

XU WANQING
(sharp)
Jiang Chen.

She crosses the room in three strides, fingers closing around his wrist like a vise.

XU WANQING
The one thing I asked. The ONE thing.

JIANG CHEN
The lining was pulling. I know a tailor who--

XU WANQING
--isn't you. I told you before we signed the contract: this room, this closet, this suit, they don't exist to you.

JIANG CHEN
Five years. You think I'd forget which seams I'm allowed to touch?

XU WANQING
Then act like it.

She wrenches the steamer from his grip, sets it down with deliberate slowness.

XU WANQING
Professionals handle what matters. You handle what's left.

JIANG CHEN
There's less left every day.

XU WANQING's phone rings. She answers, turning her back to him.

XU WANQING
(into phone)
Hello? ... Slow down. ... He's what?

FLASHBACK - EXT. VILLA EXTERIOR - DAY (FIVE YEARS AGO)

Vintage color grade. XU WANQING, twenty-two and hollow-eyed, clutches a velvet ring box. SHU YAN adjusts his cufflinks, refusing to look at her.

XU WANQING
(crumbling)
I found the designer you liked. The one from Milan. Please. Just open it.

SHU YAN
Your father already opened my company books. He's reading them very carefully.

XU WANQING
So we run. We start over--

SHU YAN
--with your cut-off trust fund? With my employees' mortgages? This isn't a romance, Wanqing. It's a ransom note.

He pulls his arm free. She collapses onto the gravel, the ring box cracking open to reveal two simple gold bands.
continuation:
INT. LUXURY MANSION LIVING ROOM - DAY

XU WANQING grips the phone, knuckles white. JIANG CHEN watches from the periphery.

XU WANQING
(into phone)
Today? ... Yes, the house is exactly as you left it. Everything's preserved. ... Nothing's changed. ... No. Nothing.

She ends the call. Walks past JIANG CHEN without a glance. He picks up the steamer, fingers brushing the suit's lapel where a hidden repair stitch now holds the lining—his work, invisible.

FLASHBACK MONTAGE - INT. BAR - NIGHT (FIVE YEARS AGO)

JIANG CHEN on stage, fingers flying over guitar strings. Below, XU WANQING drains a tumbler, tears cutting through her makeup.

SHU YAN (V.O.)
It's a ransom note.

XU WANQING stumbles onto the stage, grabs the micstand.

XU WANQING
(loudly)
You. Marry me.

JIANG CHEN
(quietly)
You're drunk.

XU WANQING
Five million. One signature. Three years.

She slaps a cashier's check on his amp. The bar erupts. JIANG CHEN's eyes flick from the check to her wrecked face, to his own calloused hands.

CUT TO: A marriage certificate. Two photos—hers polished, his weary.

EXT. RESIDENTIAL AREA DOWNSTAIRS - NIGHT

JIANG CHEN stands across the street, watching XU WANQING emerge from SHU YAN's sedan, laughing too loudly. She doesn't look back.

JIANG CHEN pulls out his phone. A calendar alert glows: "CONTRACT ENDS - 30 DAYS." He pockets it, turns away. A sparkler sputters in a child's hand nearby, illuminating his face—resigned, but not broken.

title: Countdown to Love
description: A doctor experiences his final moments at a wedding, then finds himself transported 100 days into the past.
context:
Title: Countdown to Love
Description: A doctor experiences his final moments at a wedding, then finds himself transported 100 days into the past.

TITLE CARD

Black screen with white text: This is the last moment of my life.

COUNTDOWN TIMER

Countdown 100 Days to Say I Love You
Numbers rapidly count down from 100 to 1.

INT. WEDDING HALL - DAY

YE FAN, wearing a black suit, stands at the back of a crowded wedding hall. His face is ashen.

AT THE ALTAR, SHEN MENGNA in a wedding dress stands beside her GROOM. She sees Ye Fan and her breath catches.

YE FAN forces his way forward. He takes Shen Mengna's hand and places a ring on her finger.

YE FAN
(whispering)
Be happy. I'm sorry.

YE FAN turns and walks away.

SHEN MENGNA (V.O.)
Don't go. Please, turn around.

A drop of blood falls on the marble floor. Ye Fan clutches his chest.

SHEN MENGNA's bouquet falls to the ground.

YE FAN collapses.

SHEN MENGNA, holding up her wedding dress, runs toward him.

YE FAN lies on the ground, watching her through dimming vision.

YE FAN (V.O.)
I love you. Goodbye.

YE FAN closes his eyes.

TITLE CARD

Black screen with white text: 100 Days Earlier
continuation:
INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - DAY

The elevator doors open. SHEN'S FATHER leads a group of BODYGUARDS in black suits, walking out with an imposing presence.

SHEN'S FATHER and his entourage cross through the hospital lobby toward the consultation rooms. The nurses at the reception desk watch them in surprise.

INT. DOCTOR'S OFFICE - DAY

YE FAN, wearing a white coat, is examining a PATIENT.

YE FAN
Your condition is recovering very well.

PATIENT (wearing a mask)
(nods)

YE FAN
So, starting tomorrow—

Before he can finish, SHEN'S FATHER pushes the door open, interrupting them.

YE FAN
(looks up)
Who are you?

SHEN'S FATHER walks over to the PATIENT, pats his shoulder, pulls out a stack of cash from his pocket and stuffs it into the patient's hand.

SHEN'S FATHER
For your inconvenience. The chairman appreciates your cooperation.

The PATIENT takes the money, nods to Ye Fan, and exits.

YE FAN
(frowning)
That was a sick man.

SHEN'S FATHER
He's a rich man now. My father, however, needs his doctor.

SHEN'S FATHER walks to YE FAN's desk and leans down.

SHEN'S FATHER
I don't forget my debts.

SHEN'S FATHER straightens up and snaps his fingers. Two BODYGUARDS unfurl two large red banners.

BODYGUARDS (shouting in unison)
Doctor Su is strong! Doctor Su is great! Doctor Su's treatment is different! Accurate diagnosis, superb medical skills! Doctor Su is an angel in white!

YE FAN is amused by this display. He picks up his thermos from the desk.

YE FAN
(smiling)
Wrong doctor. But the effort's... memorable.

SHEN'S FATHER looks back at the banner, which reads "Doctor Ye is Strong."

SHEN'S FATHER
(laughs awkwardly)
The printer got ahead of themselves. The sentiment stands.

The two shake hands.

SHEN'S FATHER
Doctor Ye, you've given my father time. I won't forget it.

Suddenly, YE FAN's expression becomes pained. He feels dizzy, and his vision begins to blur. He covers his face with his hand, his body swaying as if seeing some kind of vision. He lifts his head, his eyes unfocused, nearly fainting.

YE FAN
(whispering)
The wedding... you're there...

title: Secretly Like You
description: A college student returns to find her childhood friend, only to discover he has moved on with someone else.
context:
Title: Secretly Like You
Description: A college student returns to find her childhood friend, only to discover he has moved on with someone else.

EXT. UNIVERSITY ROAD - DAY

CEN SHUHE steps onto campus, autumn leaves crunching underfoot. She clutches a worn book, scanning the quad with barely contained hope.

CEN SHUHE (V.O.)
My name is Cen Shuhe. I promised someone I'd return to Qingnan.

INT. LIBRARY - DAY

YOUNG JIANG YAN shows YOUNG CEN SHUHE a crystal ball. His palm is bandaged.

YOUNG JIANG YAN
Look how it holds the light.

YOUNG CEN SHUHE
Your hand...

YOUNG JIANG YAN
It's nothing. Now we have something permanent.

EXT. UNIVERSITY ROAD - DAY

CEN SHUHE quickens her pace, eyes scanning faces.

CEN SHUHE (V.O.)
He promised he'd wait.

INT. LIBRARY - DAY

YOUNG CEN SHUHE
What if I can't come back?

YOUNG JIANG YAN
Then we both remember. Five years. Qingnan. No matter what.
continuation:
EXT. UNIVERSITY ROAD - DAY

JIANG YAN, wearing a beige sweater, approaches. Their eyes meet. His face shutters closed—cold, distant. They pass in silence.

JIANG YAN (V.O.)
We promised to meet at Qingnan. To be together for life.

INT. LIBRARY - DAY

YOUNG JIANG YAN
This is our witness.

YOUNG CEN SHUHE
What if forgetting is easier?

Young CEN SHUHE turns away. Young JIANG YAN watches her, the crystal ball dull in his palm.

EXT. UNIVERSITY ROAD - DAY

CEN SHUHE stands frozen. FRIEND A and FRIEND B run over.

FRIEND A
Shuhe! You disappeared—

FRIEND B follows her gaze to JIANG YAN's retreating back.

FRIEND B
Jiang Yan. No wonder.

FRIEND A
Student council president. He barely talks to anyone.

FRIEND B
Except that girl from his department. They're always together.

FRIEND A
She's been chasing him since freshman year.

FRIEND B
He lets her hang around, at least.

A GIRL catches up to JIANG YAN, linking her arm through his. He doesn't pull away.

FRIEND A
Maybe he finally gave in.

FRIEND A turns to CEN SHUHE.

FRIEND A
Did you know him?

CEN SHUHE's fingers find the crystal ball in her pocket.

CEN SHUHE (V.O.)
I kept my promise. He kept his distance.

CEN SHUHE
We don't know each other.

She walks away. The friends exchange glances.

JIANG YAN stops at the corner, watching her leave. The GIRL beside him notices.

GIRL
Friends of yours?

JIANG YAN
No one.

He looks down at his hand, at the faint scar.

JIANG YAN (V.O.)
You came back. But you're not the girl who left.

title: Bringing Glory to the Ancestors
description: At a neglected family grave, a single mother's desperate attempt to teach her son about heritage ends in tragedy when he chases a stolen offering into a developer's construction site.
context:
Title: Bringing Glory to the Ancestors
Description: At a neglected family grave, a single mother's desperate attempt to teach her son about heritage ends in tragedy when he chases a stolen offering into a developer's construction site.

INT. ANCESTRAL GRAVE - DAY

A crumbling tombstone: "Li Yuan, 1889-1957." Weeds choke the neglected grave.

LIN MEI (30s, calloused hands, threadbare clothes) scrubs the stone while her son GLORY (8, hungry eyes) watches.

LIN MEI
(whispering a prayer)
...bless this worthless daughter... and her son...

GLORY
Mom, why'd you name me Glory?

LIN MEI
Because you're the last Li male. Your father died for that name.

GLORY
But what does it—

LIN MEI
It means you don't steal from the dead.

She pulls out a cheap jade pendant, ties it around his neck.

LIN MEI
It means you earn. Not beg.

She points to the offering plate—three withered apples.

LIN MEI
These are for them. Not us. Understand?

GLORY
(quietly)
But I'm hungry...

LIN MEI clutches her stomach, feeling it too. She stands, looks down the hill toward a construction site.

LIN MEI
Wait here. I'll find something.

She takes three steps away, turns back.

LIN MEI
Don't. Touch. Anything.

GLORY nods. Lin Mei disappears over the ridge. Glory waits... then grabs an apple. It slips through his fingers.
continuation:
EXT. HILLSIDE - DAY

MR. XIAO (60s, tailored suit, hollow eyes) surveys the hillside with ASSISTANT WANG.

ASSISTANT WANG
The Li family plot breaches our eastern boundary. That old well is a liability.

MR. XIAO
(quietly)
My father built his first factory on Li land. Debts unpaid.

He touches his chest—instinctively, where a pendant might hang. There's nothing.

MR. XIAO
Some liabilities... we keep.

An APPLE rolls past their feet. They turn.

EXT. FOREST - DAY

GLORY scrambles after the apple.

GLORY
(whispering)
Come back... come back...

He lunges, slips on loose soil, and vanishes over an edge. A distant THUD.

EXT. HILLSIDE - DAY

The SCREAM echoes. Mr. Xiao and Assistant Wang freeze.

MR. XIAO
Check the old well.

ASSISTANT WANG
But Mr. Xiao, the warning signs—

MR. XIAO
Now.

INT. DEEP PIT - DAY

Muddy water. Glory floats, unconscious. The jade pendant bobs beside him, its carved characters visible: GLORY.

EXT. FOREST - DAY

Assistant Wang peers into the well. His flashlight catches the pendant. He pulls out his phone.

ASSISTANT WANG
(into phone)
Mr. Xiao... it's a boy. And you're not going to believe what's around his neck.

The pendant gleams in the dark water.

FADE OUT.

title: The Whole Family Eavesdrops on the Miao Mother and Daughter's Thoughts
description: A Miao woman and her daughter search for the child's father while the family mysteriously hears their inner thoughts.
context:
Title: The Whole Family Eavesdrops on the Miao Mother and Daughter's Thoughts
Description: A Miao woman and her daughter search for the child's father while the family mysteriously hears their inner thoughts.

EXT. MOUNTAIN FOREST - DAY

YUN WANWAN, dressed in Miao ethnic clothing, sits cross-legged in meditation, surrounded by a blue aura. Dark clouds gather in the sky with lightning and thunder.

BAOBAO (O.S.)
Mommy, watch out!

A bolt of lightning strikes toward YUN WANWAN. BAOBAO descends from the sky holding a small umbrella, blocking the lightning strike in front of YUN WANWAN.

YUN WANWAN slowly descends to the ground.

BAOBAO
(in a childish voice)
Thanks, Baobao.

BAOBAO
You promised we'd find Daddy. We've been down the mountain for days, and you don't even know what he looks like!

YUN WANWAN
Seven years ago, my poison arts entered demonic deviation. Memories scattered like poison mist. But some marks... some marks the soul doesn't forget.

BAOBAO
What kind of mark?

YUN WANWAN
(touching Baobao's shoulder gently)
A cloud etched in spirit energy. Find the mark, find your father.

INT. BATHROOM - NIGHT

LU MINGXIU, shirtless, looks at the cloud-shaped mark on his shoulder in the mirror.

LU MINGXIU
(to himself)
Seven years. The mark remains.

FLASHBACK
continuation:
INT. STEAM-FILLED BATHROOM - NIGHT (SEVEN YEARS AGO)

LU MINGXIU stands under running water, disoriented.

LU MINGXIU
Who's there?

YUN WANWAN emerges from steam, her veil translucent, eyes fever-bright.

YUN WANWAN
Love poison courses through my veins. The cure... it's heat. Your heat.

LU MINGXIU
(dazed)
I don't understand--

YUN WANWAN
(pressing close, whispering)
Miao women bond for eternity. One touch seals fate.

Her fingertip glows azure. She traces the mark on his shoulder. It flares, then fades into his skin.

YUN WANWAN
Find me through this cloud.

END FLASHBACK

INT. ROOM - DAY

LU MINGXIU's phone rings.

LU MINGXIU
Mingyu? Slow down--

SISTER (V.O.) (sobbing)
Brother, Mom collapsed! City Hospital, now!

EXT. CITY STREET - DAY

YUN WANWAN and BAOBAO walk down the street.

YUN WANWAN
Baobao, use your sight. Find someone whose energy resonates with ours. Someone whose fate line crosses the cloud's path.

BAOBAO
But Mommy, the money--

YUN WANWAN
Survival first, honor second. We'll find a way to earn it honestly. Just... show me who glitters with fate and fortune.

BAOBAO's eyes emit a golden light as she looks at the vehicles passing on the road. An ordinary white SUV passes by, then a black SUV. Finally, a golden, gleaming Rolls-Royce appears.

BAOBAO
(excited)
Mommy, he's the one!

YUN WANWAN
(happy)
The cloud mark... it's responding!

INT. ROLLS-ROYCE - DAY

LU MINGXIU is driving. The cloud MARK on his shoulder suddenly burns. He winces, clutching it. Then -- distant VOICES echo in his mind, overlapping.

BAOBAO (V.O.)
Mommy, he's the one!

YUN WANWAN (V.O.)
The cloud mark... it's responding!

LU MINGXIU
(to himself, stunned)
Those voices... in my head?

He looks out, sees Yun Wanwan and Baobao on the sidewalk. Their eyes meet. Time seems to slow. The burning intensifies.

title: The Peasant Girl Who Won the Emperor's Heart
description: A flower gardener's daughter catches the eye of the emperor after a fateful encounter in the palace gardens, but her humble origins threaten their union.
context:
Title: The Peasant Girl Who Won the Emperor's Heart
Description: A flower gardener's daughter catches the eye of the emperor after a fateful encounter in the palace gardens, but her humble origins threaten their union.

EXT. IMPERIAL PALACE GARDEN - DAY

JIANG WANLI, wearing a plain cotton ruqun, carries a pot of azaleas through the garden, her face determined.

JIANG WANLI
(to herself)
If these azaleas please the Empress Dowager, perhaps Father's position will finally be secured.

She stumbles, gripping a stone lotus pedestal. The world spins. The pot falls from her grasp.

MONTAGE:

- CHEN FENGYING stirs a bowl of steaming tonic, worry etched on her face.

CHEN FENGYING
Ah Li, your father prepared this strength tonic. Drink it before you go to the palace.

JIANG WANLI
Thank you, Mother.

She drinks. The bitter liquid makes her wince.

END MONTAGE.

EXT. IMPERIAL PALACE GARDEN - CONTINUOUS

JIANG WANLI clutches her chest, vision blurring. A pair of strong arms catch her. XIAO JINGYUAN appears, dressed in fine but simple robes.

XIAO JINGYUAN
(concerned)
Miss, are you unwell?

JIANG WANLI
(weakly)
The tonic... something was wrong...

She collapses against him. He discreetly presses a jade pendant into her palm.

XIAO JINGYUAN
(whispering)
Hold this. I'll get you to safety.

He lifts her and carries her toward a secondary palace.
continuation:
INT. JINGREN PALACE SIDE CHAMBER - DAY

XIAO JINGYUAN lays JIANG WANLI on a couch. She stirs, their faces close.

JIANG WANLI
(groggy)
You... the western garden boy...

XIAO JINGYUAN
(smiling)
You remember.

He shows her a scar on his palm.

FADE TO BLACK.

INT. JINGREN PALACE SIDE CHAMBER - MORNING

JIANG WANLI wakes with a start. She finds the jade pendant in her hand. XIAO JINGYUAN sits nearby.

XIAO JINGYUAN
(softly)
You called me Ah Yuan in your sleep.

JIANG WANLI
I must go. My father will worry.

She rises and leaves quietly, clutching the pendant.

XIAO JINGYUAN
(quietly)
Wanli... ten years I've searched.

INT. CINING PALACE - DAY

EUNUCH
His Majesty arrives!

XIAO JINGYUAN, now in imperial yellow robes, enters and bows.

XIAO JINGYUAN
Mother Empress, this son seeks permission to take a consort.

EMPRESS DOWAGER OF DAXIA
Which family's daughter?

XIAO JINGYUAN
The imperial gardener Jiang Youde's daughter.

The Empress Dowager's smile freezes.

EMPRESS DOWAGER OF DAXIA
A gardener's daughter? The court will say you've lost your mind.

XIAO JINGYUAN
(places the jade pendant on the table)
She saved my life as a boy. I intend to elevate her family and demonstrate imperial grace to all common scholars.

EMPRESS DOWAGER OF DAXIA
(sighs)
You always did hide sentiment behind statecraft. Very well. But she must pass the Six Bureaus examination. I will not have an ill-prepared girl embarrassed in the Inner Court.

XIAO JINGYUAN
She'll outshine them all.

EXT. PALACE PATHWAY - DAY

PALACE MAID A
His Majesty demands the gardener's daughter face examination for consort.

PALACE MAID B
She won't survive a day against those palace sharks.

JIANG WANLI is nearby, trimming peonies. Her scissors slip. The jade pendant falls from her pocket.

JIANG WANLI (V.O.)
Ah Yuan... the Emperor? Then the western garden boy was a prince all along.

She stares at the pendant, then at the palace towers rising above.

title: Path of Survival in the Ice Prison
description: A man is betrayed by his business partner and left to die in a freezing refrigerated truck with only 60 hours to survive.
context:
Title: Path of Survival in the Ice Prison

Description: A man is betrayed by his business partner and left to die in a freezing refrigerated truck with only 60 hours to survive.

NARRATOR (V.O.)
Have you ever felt death breathe on your neck?

INT. REFRIGERATED TRUCK - NIGHT

Dark, freezing cold. XIAO YICHEN (30s) lies on the metal grate floor, frost crystallizing on his eyelashes. Blood seeps from his abdomen, freezing at the edges.

On the floor: an open music box playing a distorted lullaby, a diamond ring, a "Share Transfer Agreement" with Wang Yang's name on it, and a handwritten note.

A surveillance camera in the corner FLASHES red.

A red electronic timer displays: 60:00:00. It begins counting down.

ONE DAY AGO

INT. PRESS CONFERENCE VENUE - NIGHT

XIAO YICHEN stands before a pristine white refrigerated truck, beaming with pride.

XIAO YICHEN
--and with our patented steel alloy, the cargo hold reaches optimal temperature in under an hour. Tomorrow, I'll personally demonstrate its safety systems from inside.

EXT. OUTDOOR PARTY - NIGHT

Post-rehearsal celebration. WANG YANG (30s) obsessively scores a steak with surgical precision, his cutlery CLINKING like ice cracking.

LIU NINGNING and LIN YUE watch Xiao's presentation from the crowd.

XIAO YICHEN joins them, slipping his arm around Liu Ningning.

LIU NINGNING
You sure about tomorrow's stunt? It's reckless.

XIAO YICHEN
It's symbolic. I'm betting everything on this company. On us.

He subtly pats his jacket pocket where the ring box bulges.

LIN YUE
Rescue team just got called. Minor emergency. I'll check in later.

LIU NINGNING
I'll ride with you. Save us parking tomorrow.

She kisses Xiao's cheek.

LIU NINGNING
(to Wang Yang, calling out)
Don't let him drink too much!

WANG YANG waves without looking up from his bloody plate.
continuation:
EXT. OUTDOOR PARTY - LATER

Xiao stands alone near the truck, moonlight glinting off its surface. He opens the music box--a tiny ballerina spins. He smiles.

WANG YANG's shadow falls across him. A blade GLINTS.

XIAO YICHEN
(turning)
Yangzi? Thought you left--

WANG YANG drives the knife into Xiao's abdomen. No hesitation.

XIAO YICHEN
(gasping)
Why?

WANG YANG
(quiet, controlled)
You made me your co-pilot. But your name's on the patent. On the building. On everything.

XIAO YICHEN
The agreement... in the truck... full partnership...

WANG YANG
I signed it. With your blood.

He drags Xiao toward the truck's open doors.

WANG YANG (CONT'D)
Enjoy the demonstration. I'll be watching.

He shoves Xiao inside. The doors SLAM.

INT. REFRIGERATED TRUCK - NIGHT

Xiao wakes. The timer reads 58:47:12.

He spots the agreement--Wang Yang's signature drips red. The note reads: "You have 60 hours. Then the crusher. Ningning will never know."

Xiao's breath crystallizes. He crawls toward the door, leaving a crimson trail. He pounds weakly.

XIAO YICHEN
(whispered)
System override... emergency code...

He fumbles at a wall panel, fingers too numb. He collapses, eyes fixed on the surveillance camera.

XIAO YICHEN (V.O.)
He thinks I'll freeze. He doesn't know I installed a fail-safe.

Xiao forces his frozen hand into his blood-soaked pocket. retrieves his phone. Shattered.

He spots the music box. The ballerina's base--a USB key.

INT. CONTROL ROOM - NIGHT

WANG YANG watches multiple screens. Xiao's feed shows him motionless.

WANG YANG
(into phone)
It's done. Pick up the truck in three days.

INTERCUT with:

INT. REFRIGERATED TRUCK - NIGHT

Xiao pries the surveillance camera housing open. Inside: a manual override port.

He plugs the USB key in. The screen flickers. His own face appears--a pre-recorded message.

SCREEN XIAO YICHEN
If you're seeing this, the emergency protocol activated. Voice authorization required.

Xiao leans close to the camera, steam from his breath fogging the lens.

XIAO YICHEN
(strained)
Xiao Yichen. Authorization: Protect Ningning.

The screen flashes green. The timer accelerates--57:00:00 becomes 00:05:00.

Alarms BLARE. The temperature DROPS further. But the rear doors CLICK--unlocked.

Xiao crawls toward them as frostbite blackens his fingers.

EXT. REFRIGERATED TRUCK - NIGHT

The doors burst open. Xiao falls out, gasping. He's in a desolate warehouse district.

His phone--now functional from the system reboot--BUZZES. Five missed calls from LIN YUE.

VOICEMAIL (LIN YUE)
Xiao! Wang Yang's been embezzling. I traced the truck's GPS. I'm two minutes out.

Headlights SCREECH around the corner. A rescue van. Lin Yue at the wheel.

INT. REFRIGERATED TRUCK - NIGHT

Wang Yang, still in the control room, watches the empty truck. The doors swing in the wind.

The timer hits zero. The truck's refrigeration system DIES. Instead of crushing, it shuts down permanently.

A final message appears on his screen: "Fail-safe activated. All evidence uploaded to cloud. Recipient: Liu Ningning."

EXT. WAREHOUSE DISTRICT - NIGHT

Xiao lies in Lin Yue's arms as she wraps him in thermal blankets.

XIAO YICHEN
(whispering)
He wanted everything... but he never understood what I was building.

The music box lies open in the dirt. The ballerina still spins.

NARRATOR (V.O.)
Sometimes surviving means letting the cold take everything else.

FADE OUT.

title: Mr. Leng, Your Bodyguard is So Arrogant
description: A woman wakes up after being drugged by her sister, only to discover she's with the wrong man—a disciplined bodyguard who was in the wrong place at the wrong time.
context:
Title: Mr. Leng, Your Bodyguard is So Arrogant
Description: A woman wakes up after being drugged by her sister, only to discover she's with the wrong man—a disciplined bodyguard who was in the wrong place at the wrong time.

INT. HOTEL ROOM - DAWN

A man and QIU TIAN lie on a rumpled hotel bed. Men's and women's clothing are scattered across the floor. The room is dim, tinted gray by early morning light.

QIU TIAN slowly wakes, her expression pained. She sits up, adjusts her straps, and stares at the stranger beside her.

QIU TIAN (V.O.)
What happened last night?

FLASHBACK:

INT. HOTEL BAR - NIGHT

QIU TIAN stumbles away from the bar, clearly disoriented. LENG JUNSHAN, mid-thirties, muscular build, catches her in a dark suit with a security earpiece visible.

LENG JUNSHAN
(leaning close)
You're in no state to be alone. Let me get you to a room.

She clutches his arm, pupils dilated, as he guides her toward the elevator.

END FLASHBACK.

QIU TIAN (V.O.)
Where did this man come from?

Her phone on the nightstand BUZZES. Caller ID shows "YE ZI."
continuation:
INT. QIU TIAN'S APARTMENT - DAY

Sunlight streams through the blinds. QIU TIAN, now wearing a sports tank top, answers the phone with trembling hands.

QIU YE (O.S.)
Sis, thank God! You have to help me—

QIU TIAN
What kind of trouble did you get me into this time?

INT. PRIVATE CLUB - NIGHT (FLASHBACK)

QIU YE, in a sequined dress, sits on a velvet sofa. Across from her are GAO DAMING and his SUBORDINATES.

QIU YE
Brother Daming, my sister will pay off my debt. She always cleans up my messes.

GAO DAMING
(leaning forward)
I don't want money anymore. I want her.

GAO DAMING'S SUBORDINATE
Boss has a permanent suite at the Hilton. Top floor's cleared for a VIP client tonight. Very private.

GAO DAMING
(sliding a vial across the table)
GHB. She won't remember. Makes things... smoother.

QIU YE (V.O.)
Better her than me.

QIU YE
(to GAO DAMING)
She's more cooperative when she's had a few drinks.

She tips the liquid into a beer glass.

EXT. HILTON HOTEL - NIGHT

A black SUV pulls up. LENG JUNSHAN, wearing sunglasses and a sharp suit, steps out. A row of HOSTESSES in qipao dresses wait at the entrance.

HOTEL MANAGER
(bowing)
Mr. Leng, perfect timing. The Zhou family's security sweep is complete.

LENG JUNSHAN
My client arrives in three hours. I need the perimeter checked again.

LENG JUNSHAN walks expressionlessly toward the entrance, his movements precise, professional, and radiating quiet authority.

FADE OUT.

title: Phoenix Mountain Journey - Phoenix Cry, Lone Moon, Stars Fill the Sky
description: A centuries-old revenge unfolds as a cat spirit seeks vengeance against the descendants of an ancient empress who executed her former master.
context:
Title: Phoenix Mountain Journey - Phoenix Cry, Lone Moon, Stars Fill the Sky
Description: A centuries-old revenge unfolds as a cat spirit seeks vengeance against the descendants of an ancient empress who executed her former master.

EXT. MOUNTAIN PEAK - NIGHT

Mist swirls around jagged cliffs. MOONLIGHT slices through ancient cypress trees.

A SUBORDINATE (20s, wiry, face obscured by black cloth) kneels before a hooded figure.

SUBORDINATE
Master, the Third Prince has been found.

The figure lowers her hood. XUAN TIE (eternal 30s, silver-streaked hair, eyes like polished obsidian) stares into the valley below.

EXT. PALACE COURTYARD - DAY (FLASHBACK)

SUPER: "1,400 Years Ago - Phoenix Mountain Palace"

The DEMON EMPRESS (40s, robes of crimson and gold, jade crown) stands on vermilion steps. Below, GUARDS force CONSORT XIAO (30s, once-beautiful, now defiant in blood-stained silks) to her knees.

DEMON EMPRESS
You plotted against your Empress. Why?

CONSORT XIAO
(laughing; voice raw)
Why? Because you taught me—strike first, or be devoured.

The Empress's knuckles whiten on her scepter.

DEMON EMPRESS
Then learn this final lesson.

She raises a hand. The GUARDS' swords flash.

Consort Xiao collapses. Blood blossoms on the stone.

A gray CAT darts from the shadows, mewling. It nuzzles Consort Xiao's hand.

CONSORT XIAO (weakly)
Xuan Tie... avenge me.

She dies. The cat's eyes glow with sudden, unnatural intelligence. It releases a sound between yowl and human sob.

DEMON EMPRESS
Slaughter every cat in Phoenix City. Let none survive.
continuation:
EXT. MOUNTAIN PEAK - NIGHT (PRESENT DAY)

The gray cat watches from a granite outcrop, its gaze fixed on Xuan Tie.

XUAN TIE (V.O.)
Fourteen centuries, Mistress. Your descendants will pay in blood.

She crumples the paper in her fist. It ignites, turning to ash.

INT. LI XIAO AN'S APARTMENT - DAY

LI XIAO AN (25, lean, modern security uniform unbuttoned at the collar) sleeps fitfully on a worn sofa.

His hand twitches. Bronze light flickers at his fingertips.

EXT. ANCIENT COURTYARD - DAY

Li Xiao An, now in white training robes, flows through sword forms. Each movement precise, ethereal.

BLACK-CLOTHED ASSASSINS materialize from the bamboo grove. Ten. Twenty. Their blades hiss as they draw.

Li Xiao An spins, sword flashing. Steel meets steel. SPARKS fly.

He drops three assassins. A FOURTH unleashes a purple energy blast.

The wave strikes Li Xiao An's chest. He crashes through a wooden pillar, coughing blood.

An assassin raises a jade dagger for the killing stroke.

Purple light EXPLODES.

Xuan Tie stands between them, robes billowing. She flicks a finger. The assassins fly backward, slamming into stone walls.

She turns. Her eyes meet Li Xiao An's—confused, wounded.

XUAN TIE
(whisper)
The bloodline remains... unbroken.

Li Xiao An reaches for his sword. She steps on the blade.

XUAN TIE
But you are not ready to die yet, Third Prince.

She vanishes in a swirl of mist. The gray cat reappears on a nearby wall, watching.

Li Xiao An clutches his chest, where bruises form in the shape of cat's claws.

title: Phoenix Returns to Nest
description: A fisherman's daughter is taken away after helping rescue a drowning CEO, separating her from her mother on her birthday.
context:
Title: Phoenix Returns to Nest
Description: A fisherman's daughter is taken away after helping rescue a drowning CEO, separating her from her mother on her birthday.

INT. BEACH - DUSK

The sun sets across the beach. Small waves whisper against the shore.

Little girl ZHAO XIAOXI crouches in the wet sand, stacking smooth stones into a careful tower.

The distant THUMP of a helicopter rotor cuts through the quiet.

Her mother, fisherwoman XU XIU, rows her small boat to shore.

XU XIU
Xiaoxi!

Xiaoxi looks up and stands, smiling.

ZHAO XIAOXI
Mom!

She runs toward the water.

Xu Xiu gets off the boat, holding a string of freshly caught fish.

XU XIU
Good haul today.

ZHAO XIAOXI
Mom, you and Dad are so busy. Today is my birthday. Can you spend more time with me?

XU XIU
(softening)
Last catch of the season pays for your art classes. Then I'm yours all night. Deal?

ZHAO XIAOXI
(excited)
Deal!

XU XIU
Let's go home.

They clasp hands, walking up the beach.

The helicopter ENGINE SCREECHES overhead. A SHADOW passes.

Then—an EXPLOSION. The helicopter CRASHES into the sea, sending up a massive water plume.

Fishermen freeze.

On the churning water, a man, GU PEISHENG, struggles, gasping.

GU PEISHENG
Help... help...

Xu Xiu tenses, releasing Xiaoxi's hand.

ZHAO XIAOXI
(frightened)
Mom!

XU XIU
(firm)
Wait here.

She runs into the water, swimming powerfully.

GU PEISHENG
(sinking)
I can't... hold on...

Xu Xiu reaches him, grabs his collar.

XU XIU
Xiaoxi! The life ring!

Xiaoxi rushes to the boat, unhooks the life ring, throws it toward her mother.

The ring lands near them. Xu Xiu pushes it into Gu Peisheng's hands.

His fingers clasp it—then go limp. He sinks, pulling the ring down.

His hand SLIPS OFF. He disappears.

Xiaoxi sees her mother go under too.

She dives in without hesitation.
continuation:
INT. BEACH - MOMENTS LATER

Several black SUVs speed up and stop on the beach.

A group of BODYGUARDS in tactical gear rush out and into the water.

BODYGUARD A
Principal located! West side!

BODYGUARD B
Juvenile down! Not breathing!

They pull Gu Peisheng's limp body onto a rescue board. Another guard lifts Xiaoxi's small form.

BODYGUARD A
Any sign of her parents?

BODYGUARD B
Negative. She needs a hospital now. Witness protocol.

BODYGUARD A
Load them both!

The bodyguards carry Gu Peisheng and Xiaoxi to the SUVs. The convoy speeds away.

Xu Xiu staggers out of the water thirty yards down the beach, coughing. She sees the commotion, the departing vehicles.

She spots Xiaoxi's purple shirt in a bodyguard's arms.

XU XIU
(shouting)
XIAOXI! THAT'S MY DAUGHTER!

She sprints up the sand toward the road.

The last SUV disappears around the bend.

Xu Xiu runs to the road, stops. She's too late.

She turns, sees the crushed stone tower in the tire tracks.

XU XIU
(whispering)
Xiaoxi...

The screen flashes white and ends.

title: Phoenix Cry in the Palace
description: A concubine is murdered for her unborn child by a scheming imperial consort, but vows revenge as she dies and is mysteriously reborn.
context:
Title: Phoenix Cry in the Palace
Description: A concubine is murdered for her unborn child by a scheming imperial consort, but vows revenge as she dies and is mysteriously reborn.

INT. YIXIU PALACE - NIGHT

Thunder rattles the lattice windows. Palace lanterns sway.

GAO YAOFENG, Imperial Noble Consort, cradles a voodoo doll. A needle glints in her hand. Her smile is measured.

GAO YAOFENG
(softly)
Almost done.

INT. ANNEX CHAMBER - NIGHT

SU YUNROU lies bound to a birthing bed, full-term and struggling.

NANNY LI arranges surgical blades with cold precision.

NANNY LI
Early, but the method is sound. I've done it before.

INT. CORRIDOR - NIGHT

XIAO TAO thrashes between two GUARDS.

XIAO TAO
She's not even due yet—

NANNY LI appears, backhanding Xiao Tao across the mouth. The maid crumples.
continuation:
INT. ANNEX CHAMBER - NIGHT

Su Yunrou's eyes snap to the slamming door.

SU YUNROU
(to Gaoyaofeng)
The Emperor's heir—he'll know!

GAO YAOFENG glides forward, silk robes whispering.

GAO YAOFENG
Know what? That you died in childbirth? Tragic. But common.

GAO YAOFENG
(to Nanny Li)
Bring me the child. If it's a girl—you know what to do.

SU YUNROU
Elder sister, we share blood—

GAO YAOFENG seizes Su Yunrou's jaw, forcing cloth into her mouth.

GAO YAOFENG
Blood? You're father's shame. I brought you here because you reminded me of her. The late Empress. You dared to carry what I could not.

SU YUNROU
(sobbing)
I never wanted—

GAO YAOFENG
You have it. And now I do.

CONSORT SUN enters with a lacquered bowl.

CONSORT SUN
Kindness is just another word for blind here, Su Yunrou.

NANNY LI's blade rises. Falls.

A muffled scream——

A baby's thin cry.

NANNY LI wraps the infant in imperial yellow.

NANNY LI
A prince, Your Ladyship.

GAO YAOFENG takes the child. Su Yunrou reaches weakly.

SU YUNROU
My son...

CONSORT SUN forces the poison down. Su Yunrou convulses, blood on her lips. A final, bitter laugh.

EUNUCH (O.S.)
Concubine Su is gone. Prepare the rites.

SU YUNROU (V.O.)
I was clay. You fired me into porcelain. Next life, I will be the hammer.

EXT. PALACE ROOFTOP - NIGHT

Lightning forks. The palace glows white.

INT. GARDEN PAVILION - DAY

SU YUNROU, now thirteen, awakens with a gasp. She touches her flat stomach. Remembers.

SU YUNROU
(voice hardening)
Clay remembers the kiln.

She rises.

title: Merit Too Great Invites Suspicion, I Turn to Join Mobei
description: A war hero who helped a prince ascend the throne finds himself betrayed and stripped of power due to the emperor's suspicion and the court's jealousy.
context:
Title: Merit Too Great Invites Suspicion, I Turn to Join Mobei
Description: A war hero who helped a prince ascend the throne finds himself betrayed and stripped of power due to the emperor's suspicion and the court's jealousy.

EXT. OUTSIDE CITY GATE - DAY

A war scene. Flames dance across the battlefield. Corpses of both armies litter the scorched earth. The city walls loom in the distance.

SHAO XUJI (30s), in mud-splattered golden prince robes, is cornered against the city gate with his last dozen guards, surrounded by hundreds of rebel soldiers.

SHAO XUJI
(strained, desperate)
Li Zhen... you promised...

The sound of HOOFBEATS. LI ZHEN (late 20s), in ornate armor that bears the marks of countless battles, charges through the rebel flank on a white stallion. His spear moves with supernatural precision—a Fifth Rank warrior's power.

LI ZHEN
(shouting over the chaos)
I gave my word, Your Highness! Your throne awaits!

SHAO XUJI
(voice cracking with hope)
When this is done—when I wear the crown—you'll stand at my side. As we planned!

Li Zhen's spear blazes with blue energy. He cuts through the rebel forces like a scythe through wheat. The battle ends in moments. The remaining rebels flee.

The surviving soldiers of both sides kneel.

SOLDIERS
(in unison)
Long live Emperor Shao! Long live the Savior General!

SHAO XUJI laughs, the sound edged with hysterical relief. Then he notices Li Zhen swaying in his saddle.

SHAO XUJI
(rushing forward)
Li Zhen! Your wounds—

LI ZHEN
(gripping his chest, each word an effort)
The price... of using my core energy... Worth it... for your vow...

SHAO XUJI
(frantically)
I'll build you a temple! Make you Prime Minister! Anything—

Li Zhen topples from his horse. Shao Xuji catches him.

LI ZHEN
(whispering)
Just remember... we were friends... once...

Li Zhen loses consciousness.

SHAO XUJI (V.O.)
Thus Li Zhen became Prime Minister of Great Yu. Below one man, above ten thousand. That was the promise.
continuation:
INT. IMPERIAL PALACE HALL - DAY

ON SCREEN: THREE YEARS LATER

SHAO XUJI, now in imperial dragon robes, sits rigidly on the throne. His sister SHAO XUXUE stands to his right, her hand resting on a sword hilt. LI ZHEN, in Prime Minister's red robes, stands center hall. The markings on his armor have faded—he's clearly weakened.

Civil and military officials fill the hall. There's an undercurrent of whispers.

MINISTER ONE
(stepping forward, eyes downcast)
Prime Minister Li's reforms have centralized too much power. The regional lords... they speak of tyranny.

MINISTER TWO
His martial cultivation never returned after the battle. Yet he still commands the loyalty of two-thirds of our armies. The court... we fear what happens if he...

The ministers glance at each other, then at the Emperor's sister.

ALL MINISTERS
(kneeling in unison)
We humbly request Your Majesty reconsider the Prime Minister's... broad authorities. For the stability of the realm.

LI ZHEN (V.O.)
Five years since I transmigrated into this world. Three years since I made him Emperor. I've given everything—my cultivation, my health, my soul. And this is my dividend.

SHAO XUJI
(avoiding Li Zhen's eyes)
The court's concerns... they have merit. You'll retain your title, but... the military seal. Transfer it to the Princess Royal.

LI ZHEN
(quietly)
You're not asking for my seal. You're asking for my head wrapped in silk.

SHAO XUJI
(sharply)
I am your Emperor, Li Zhen. Not your debtor. Debts of gratitude... they have interest rates in politics.

SHAO XUXUE
(fingers tightening on her sword)
Husband, accept the grace. You've served your purpose. Don't make this... unpleasant.

Li Zhen looks at her, truly seeing her for the first time. The political bride who never shared his bed, only his title.

LI ZHEN
(to Shao Xuxue)
You were my wife in name. He was my brother in deed. I misjudged which bond was weaker.
