SHAO XUXUE
(drawing her sword, blue energy flaring)
You misjudged everything, transmigrator.

Her blade strikes faster than Li Zhen can react. He crumples, blood pooling beneath him. The ministers look away.

SHAO XUXUE
(looking down at him)
Fifth Rank warrior, reduced to a crippled administrator. You never belonged here.

Li Zhen's fingers twitch. His blood begins to glow faintly gold.

SYSTEM VOICE (V.O.)
Host status: Critical. Loyalty bonds: Severed. Life choice imminent. Activating...

title: The Yue Traitors Must Die
description: A beloved imperial consort's family is accused of treason. Her father dies in battle, and her brother is executed as a traitor while she watches helplessly.
context:
Title: The Yue Traitors Must Die
Description: A beloved imperial consort's family is accused of treason. Her father dies in battle, and her brother is executed as a traitor while she watches helplessly.

EXT. EXECUTION GROUND - DAY

The execution ground. Dust and silence. The EXECUTIONER's blade is a slice of winter sky. GENERAL YUE kneels center stage, bound, his wounds speaking of a trial held in secret.

MESSENGER (O.S.)
Consort Yue! The Emperor's edict is posted - the Duke fell at South Pass, and your house is declared traitor! Collusion with southern tribes!

YUE NANYAN enters the square, breathless, alone. Her imperial silks are torn, her jade hairpin missing. The CROWD sees her, and a ripple passes through them.

ONLOOKER A
The traitor's daughter dares to show her face.

ONLOOKER B
That face was on the Emperor's coin last year. How quickly metal melts.

ONLOOKER C
Let's see if she melts too. Tear the silk from her back!

ONLOOKER D (O.S.)
General's head to South Gate by dusk. The household wagons are already on the exile road.

MESSENGER (O.S.)
The palace gates are barred to you, Consort. The Emperor's guard said you're to learn "the weight of a name."

ONLOOKER E
Her name's worth less than the dirt she's crawling on.

ONLOOKER C
Dirt is too good for Yue blood.

YUE NANYAN crawls to her brother's side, not from weakness, but because her legs have turned to stone beneath her.

YUE NANYAN
(sobbing)
Brother.

GENERAL YUE
You climbed the garden wall. I told you that cherry tree wouldn't hold your weight.

YUE NANYAN
(kneeling, touching his face)
It broke. Like everything else.

GENERAL YUE
(trying for a smile)
Father's last dispatch had a message for you. He said: "Tell Yan'er the caves are full of stars." You understand?
continuation:
YUE NANYAN
The southern caves. The refugee children. You hid them.

GENERAL YUE
We hid them. That's your legacy now. Not this.

YUE NANYAN
I'll go to the Emperor. The maps, the battle reports—

GENERAL YUE
(cuts her off, voice hard)
The Emperor read those reports by candlelight last night. He wept while he signed the order. That's not a man who can be persuaded. That's a man who needs a villain.

SUPERVISING OFFICIAL
(throwing the token)
Time, General. The edict is specific.

YUE NANYAN
(screaming)
Wait! I need more time—

GENERAL YUE
(over his shoulder)
You have all the time I'm giving you. Live in it. Don't look back.

SOLDIERS move in. She clutches his arm until they pry her fingers loose.

GENERAL YUE
(straightening, voice ringing)
I, Yue Xiang, die today! But the maps my father made will still guide our soldiers. The children my brother hid will still breathe. Try to erase the Yue family - you'll just teach them how to hide better!

YUE NANYAN
(held by soldiers, suddenly still)
Let me watch. Let me see.

The EXECUTIONER raises the blade. It falls. Blood arcs across the sand, spattering YUE NANYAN's face. She doesn't close her eyes.

YUE NANYAN
(a soundless shape)

CROWD
(uneven, not a cheer)
So ends the traitor...

YUE NANYAN lies on the ground. The blood on her face begins to dry. Her eyes, which have known nothing but palace finery, now know the color of iron.

YUE NANYAN
(voice-over)
My father taught me to navigate by star maps. My brother taught me to navigate by honor. Today I learned the most important lesson: in the empire of the blind, the woman who remembers is queen. And I remember everything.

title: South Wind Towards Li
description: On a rainy night, Zhou Chuli discovers her boyfriend made a bet to seduce her, leading to a painful breakup and a mysterious figure watching from the shadows.
context:
Title: South Wind Towards Li
Description: On a rainy night, Zhou Chuli discovers her boyfriend made a bet to seduce her, leading to a painful breakup and a mysterious figure watching from the shadows.

EXT. RAINY NIGHT STREET - NIGHT

A torrential night. City neon lights bleed through rain-streaked windows.

A blue taxi stops at the wet curb.

A foot in black high heels steps onto the pavement, sinking into a puddle.

ZHOU CHULI, an elegant woman in a white trench coat, exits the taxi. She balances a blue umbrella in one hand while checking her phone with the other: a message from SHEN LI reads "Everyone's waiting for you."

FRIEND (V.O.)
Chuli, where are you? You're the only one from our class who hasn't arrived yet.

ZHOU CHULI
(anxiously)
Sorry, traffic was murder. I'm here now.

She pockets the phone and hurries toward a KTV entrance, her face showing traces of fatigue and apology.

INT. KTV PRIVATE ROOM - NIGHT

Inside the KTV room, colorful lights flash and music blares. A group of young men and women party around a table covered with bottles.

ZHOU CHULI reaches the door. It's cracked open.

SHEN'S FRIEND 1
(slurred)
Pay up, Brother Shen. Three days, just like you said.

BROTHER SHEN
(quietly)
Shut it.

SHEN'S FRIEND 2
He's actually ashamed! Never thought I'd see the day.

SHEN'S FRIEND 1
(louder, for the room)
"Zhou Chuli from the finance seminar? She's just a challenge." Your words, man.

Laughter. ZHOU CHULI's hand goes limp on the door handle.

SHEN'S FRIEND 2
At least she's hot. Even if she does just...lie there.

ZHOU CHULI stands outside, her face pale, expression shifting from shock to heartbreak, and finally to cold fury.

She turns to leave, then stops. Checks her phone one last time. Deletes every message from Shen.

She turns back, eyes determined, and walks into the room.
continuation:
INT. KTV PRIVATE ROOM - NIGHT

ZHOU CHULI walks up to BROTHER SHEN. The room falls silent.

ZHOU CHULI
(coldly)
Congratulations. You won.

BROTHER SHEN sees her, jumps up.

BROTHER SHEN
(panicking)
Chuli, let me explain—

ZHOU CHULI ignores him, picks up a glass of red wine from the table, and without hesitation splashes it in BROTHER SHEN's face.

BROTHER SHEN is drenched in wine, looking utterly disheveled. The entire room falls silent.

ZHOU CHULI
(resolutely)
We're done.

She turns and walks out of the room without looking back.

Inside the room, SHEN's friends exchange glances. BROTHER SHEN looks shocked and angry.

After a moment, BROTHER SHEN wipes his face with a napkin.

SHEN'S FRIEND 2
Brother Shen, should you go explain?

BROTHER SHEN
(angrily)
Explain what? She'll come back. They always do.

SHEN'S FRIEND 1
Then let's bet again. Brother Shen, do you dare?

BROTHER SHEN
(through gritted teeth)
I dare!

INT. KTV CORRIDOR - NIGHT

A man in a waiter's uniform hides in a corner, talking on his phone.

WAITER
(in a low voice)
Boss, it's done. Zhou Chuli knows everything.

EXT. RAINY NIGHT STREET - NIGHT

ZHOU CHULI stands alone in the heavy rain, water soaking her trench coat. She walks down the street in a daze, letting the rain wash over her.

INT. LUXURY CAR - NIGHT

Inside a luxury sedan, a man in a suit (BOSS) sits in the back seat, his face hidden in shadow. He holds his phone.

BOSS
(calmly)
Good.

He puts down the phone and through the rain-covered window sees ZHOU CHULI getting into a taxi.

BOSS
(to the driver)
Don't lose her.

FADE OUT.

title: The Misogynist Heartthrob Clings to Me
description: A desperate young woman faces rejection from her family after discovering she's pregnant, leading her to the edge, but a chance encounter with a powerful CEO two months earlier may have changed her fate.
context:
Title: The Misogynist Heartthrob Clings to Me
Description: A desperate young woman faces rejection from her family after discovering she's pregnant, leading her to the edge, but a chance encounter with a powerful CEO two months earlier may have changed her fate.

INT. ROOFTOP - DAY

ZHAO ZHAODI stands at the edge of the rooftop, her expression full of despair, clutching a medical test report in her hand.

MOTHER (V.O.)
Your brother's surgery is in two weeks. All that tuition money... it was our only choice.

FATHER (V.O.)
We'd have nothing left. You understand, don't you?

ZHAO ZHAODI walks step by step toward the edge of the rooftop railing, tears streaming down her face.

ZHAO ZHAODI
(choking up)
Why is survival always someone else's price to pay?

She clutches the test report tightly to her chest, closing her eyes in pain. The report slips from her hand and falls to the ground.

ON SCREEN: TWO MONTHS AGO
continuation:
EXT. UNIVERSITY ENTRANCE - DAY

The campus is bustling with people coming and going. ZHAO ZHAODI pulls her suitcase, wearing a backpack, and walks into the campus.

INT. SCHOOL LOBBY - DAY

YAN SHIHAO, wearing a black suit, walks through the lobby surrounded by a group of people. ZHAO ZHAODI happens to enter from the doorway. They pass each other, their eyes meeting briefly.

ON SCREEN: YAN SHIHAO, CHAIRMAN OF GU CORPORATION

YAN SHIHAO and his entourage walk out the door.

INT. NEW STUDENT REGISTRATION DESK - DAY

ZHAO ZHAODI waits in line at the registration desk. When it's her turn, she hands a bank card to the REGISTRATION TEACHER.

REGISTRATION TEACHER
(looking at the computer)
I'm showing insufficient funds on this card.

ZHAO ZHAODI
(surprised)
That's impossible. I deposited four thousand seven hundred myself. Could you try once more?

The REGISTRATION TEACHER takes the card and swipes it again.

REGISTRATION TEACHER
The balance is zero. The account was cleared out yesterday.

ZHAO ZHAODI
(whispering)
She promised she wouldn't. Not after I earned that scholarship...

MALE STUDENT
(waiting in line behind her)
You're Zhao Zhaodi, right? The scholarship poster girl? Thought your education was paid for.

FEMALE STUDENT
(next to the male student)
Maybe scholarships don't cover everything these days. Some of us have to work for it.

ZHAO ZHAODI lowers her head in embarrassment, picks up her belongings, and prepares to leave.

REGISTRATION TEACHER
Student, if you can provide proof of financial hardship by Friday, we have an emergency fund. Don't lose hope.

ZHAO ZHAODI turns back, tears in her eyes, a flicker of something other than despair on her face.

title: Attending the Emperor's Enthronement, the Empress Dowager is Drowned (Episode 41)
description: On the eve of his enthronement, the new Emperor awaits his mother's arrival—but the ambitious Empress-to-be, fearing political eclipse, moves to eliminate her rival before dawn.
context:
Title: Attending the Emperor's Enthronement, the Empress Dowager is Drowned (Episode 41)
Description: On the eve of his enthronement, the new Emperor awaits his mother's arrival—but the ambitious Empress-to-be, fearing political eclipse, moves to eliminate her rival before dawn.

INT. IMPERIAL PALACE INNER CHAMBER - NIGHT

EUNUCH CAO (O.S.)
Your Majesty—still at your desk?

EUNUCH CAO enters bearing a silk-wrapped dossier. He finds EMPEROR LONG staring at a weathered jade amulet.

EUNUCH CAO
The court astrologers have divined an auspicious hour. Tomorrow, the Mandate of Heaven passes to you. Yet the hour grows late...

EMPEROR LONG
(fingers tracing the amulet)
Ten years I've fought. Ten years I've measured each step toward this throne. But without her footsteps behind me, what do these steps matter?

EUNUCH CAO
Your honored mother...

EMPEROR LONG
During the great drought, when I was nine, she fed me from her own arm while the wealthy turned us away. When I raised the banner of rebellion, she sold the ancestral tablets to buy me a horse. Three New Years past, an assassin's blade meant for my neck found her shoulder instead. This empire... it belongs to her as much as me.

EUNUCH CAO
She will stand at your side tomorrow. The escort I personally selected—

EMPEROR LONG
—must be discreet. She despises ostentation. See that no fanfare marks her arrival. Let her enter as she once entered our hut: simply, with only the love she carries.

EUNUCH CAO
This old servant understands.

Eunuch Cao sets down the dossier—a roster of the new imperial consorts. His finger hovers beside one name: SU JINFENG.

EMPEROR LONG
You may withdraw.

EUNUCH CAO
(bowing)
May Your Majesty find peace this night.

EUNUCH CAO withdraws, his shadow lingering a moment against the paper doors.
continuation:
EXT. PALACE CORRIDOR - NIGHT

SU JINFENG walks with measured grace, her HANDMAIDENS trailing like silent kites.

SU JINFENG
He has not summoned me for fifteen nights. A future Empress cannot be invisible.

YUE QING
Perhaps His Majesty is preoccupied with the ceremony, my lady.

They pause before the inner chamber. Through the lattice, fragments drift: "...without her... what do these steps matter?" "...belongs to her as much as me."

SU JINFENG
(coldly)
Whom does he speak of?

XIAO YU
Surely Your Ladyship, the—

SU JINFENG
I've given his court my family's silver, my brother's army, my own youth. And he speaks of another "her"?

Her knuckles whiten against a lacquered box—tonic for the Emperor's fatigue.

SU JINFENG
(returning the way she came)
Summon my brother's captain. Not through official channels. Make it seem a routine patrol.

YUE QING
My lady, the risk—

SU JINFENG
The risk is in allowing another woman to hold the empire's heart while I hold only its titles. Find her. Delay her. Let the ceremony proceed without... interruption.

EXT. PALACE PATHWAY - DAWN MIST

EMPEROR LONG'S MOTHER walks with XIAO LIZI, both in plain travel-worn robes. Morning fog coils around their ankles.

XIAO LIZI
Old Madam, we should have waited for the formal procession. Your wound—

EMPEROR LONG'S MOTHER
—has healed enough. My son becomes Emperor at sunrise. A mother doesn't need trumpets to witness her child's tomorrow. She needs only to arrive.

They turn a corner. Before them, SU JINFENG stands with two handmaidens and four IMPERIAL GUARDS bearing her family crest.

SU JINFENG
(blocking the path)
This route is reserved for imperial family. State your purpose.

XIAO LIZI
Do you not recognize—

EMPEROR LONG'S MOTHER
(quietly, with dignity)
We are bound for the Hall of Supreme Harmony. As is our right.

SU JINFENG
(inspecting her)
Your right? Your clothes stink of common roads. Your hands show labor. Tell me—what sorcery makes Emperor Long mistake a peasant for a person of consequence?

She takes a step closer. The guards shift, hands to sword hilts.

SU JINFENG
(low, lethal)
I am Su Jinfeng. My father commands the eastern armies. My dowry built the northern fortresses. Who are you, to make him whisper your name in the dark?

EMPEROR LONG'S MOTHER
I am his mother.

The words hang like struck iron. Su Jinfeng's composure cracks—panic flickering beneath prestige.

SU JINFENG
(to the guards, voice rising)
Arrest these intruders! Spies, sent to disrupt the ceremony!

XIAO LIZI
Madness! She bears the Emperor's own seal—

SU JINFENG
—seal? Show me this seal.

EMPEROR LONG'S MOTHER
reaches for her satchel. Su JINFENG's hand flashes—no slap, but a shove. The mother stumbles backward. Her foot catches the pathway's edge.

She falls. Silently. The mist swallows the splash below.

XIAO LIZI's scream splits the dawn.

SU JINFENG stares at her own trembling hand, the sound of water still rippling in the silence.

title: Another Year of Soul-Breaking Night
description: A top AI scientist faces a massive cyber attack threatening her nation's technological sovereignty, forcing her to make an impossible choice between years of research and protecting core technology.
context:
Title: Another Year of Soul-Breaking Night
Description: A top AI scientist faces a massive cyber attack threatening her nation's technological sovereignty, forcing her to make an impossible choice between years of research and protecting core technology.

INT. HIGH-TECH LABORATORY - DAY

Red alarm lights flash urgently. Screens display red "ACCESS DENIED" messages.

FAST CUTS:
Scientists frantically typing on keyboards.
Green code scrolling rapidly on screens.
The entire laboratory in a state of high tension.

ON SCREEN: ZHENG NIANJIA, Chief Scientist, appears on monitor composed amidst chaos.

A MALE COLLEAGUE stands up from his seat in panic, rushing toward ZHENG NIANJIA, who studies a tablet.

MALE COLLEAGUE
(anxiously)
Chief Engineer Zheng, we can't hold on much longer! Eighty hours now, this exceeds normal human physiological limits! The attack—230 million requests per second. This is nation-state level. If they breach the kernel...

ZHENG NIANJIA
(coldly)
Return to your station.

The MALE COLLEAGUE looks reluctant but turns back.

ZHENG NIANJIA stands, tablet pressed to her chest, addresses the room.

ZHENG NIANJIA
Everyone. My father bled out in a lab in '03 building the prototype you're using. The WestTech embargo took his arm, not his work.

(beat)
This isn't about data. They want the skeleton—how our AI thinks. If they get that, we become obsolete.

She holds up her tablet. On it: a photo of her father, sleeves pinned, before a whiteboard.

ZHENG NIANJIA
We protect the method. Not the files.

The MALE COLLEAGUE and other colleagues are inspired, eyes becoming determined.

COLLEAGUES (V.O.)
The method. The method.

MONTAGE:
Team members working day and night, clock shadows spinning rapidly across the screen.

ZHENG NIANJIA looks exhausted, pressing her temples, frowning tightly.

ZHENG NIANJIA looks at the tablet in her hand, the screen showing the same photo.

FLASHBACK - INT. HUMBLE HOME - DAY

Young Nianjia sits at the table, looking at her FATHER with an injured arm in a bandage.

YOUNG NIANJIA
Dad, can't you rest?

FATHER takes out a notebook, pushes it toward her.

FATHER
The algorithm's yours now. Make it so they can't take it away.

Young Nianjia opens it, sees his handwriting.

YOUNG NIANJIA (V.O.)
Make it mine.

FATHER smiles with relief.

END FLASHBACK.
continuation:
INT. HIGH-TECH LABORATORY - DAY

Back to reality, ZHENG NIANJIA looks at the photo on the tablet, silently wipes away a nosebleed, her eyes even more resolute.

The alarm sounds again, more piercing.

MALE COLLEAGUE
(terrified)
Chief Engineer Zheng, our server, even the IP address has been locked!

FEMALE COLLEAGUE
(desperate)
The neural weights—five years of training. If we cut power, we lose everything!

ZHENG NIANJIA stands, expression resolute.

ZHENG NIANJIA
Cut the power.

She walks toward the emergency power cut button.

FEMALE COLLEAGUE
(turning around emotionally)
No, we can't cut the power! The server can't stop! Otherwise all our results will be destroyed! This is five years of our work!

ZHENG NIANJIA
(shouting)
Cut the power!

ZHENG NIANJIA
(calmly but firmly)
The architecture is in our heads. The data is just practice. We start over.

ZHENG NIANJIA walks to the emergency button, colleagues watching her in horror.

Tears in her eyes but expression resolute, she presses the red emergency stop button.

Colleagues' expressions are painful, desperate.

ZHENG NIANJIA closes her eyes, a tear falls.

VOICE (O.S.)
Chief Zheng. The Vice Minister is holding.

Zheng opens her eyes, already moving toward exit.

ZHENG NIANJIA
Tell him: the method is secure. Send whoever's still standing to the backup facility.

She exits. The dead lab behind her.

FADE OUT.

title: The Twin Plant Secret
description: A desperate man seeks a cursed medicine from a spectral innkeeper who harvests pain as payment, while pursued by the sorcerer who annihilated his clan.
context:
Title: The Twin Plant Secret
Description: A desperate man seeks a cursed medicine from a spectral innkeeper who harvests pain as payment, while pursued by the sorcerer who annihilated his clan.

INT. INN - NIGHT

A woman in embroidered silk robes (FEMALE INNKEEPER) fans herself with a crimson peacock feather fan. Between them, a metal cage holds a withered plant with twin stems.

A man (MAN) lies slumped, blood at his mouth, leg shattered. He smashes the cage against his wound.

MAN
(screaming into his sleeve)
Ahhh!

The Twin Plant's veins glow, absorbing blood. One stem unfurls a pale leaf.

FEMALE INNKEEPER
(smiling slightly)
The Feng clan's heir. Still so... thorough.

MAN
(gasping)
For my sister... what's one leg?

FEMALE INNKEEPER
From the looks of it, this isn't just about seeing her.

MAN
(through gritted teeth)
When the fruit blooms... I'll have the power. Power to kill you, Grand Sorcerer. For my clan.

The FEMALE INNKEEPER's fan stills. Sadness flickers across her face.

FEMALE INNKEEPER
(quietly)
Vengeance is a thirst the plant can't quench.

MAN
(weakly)
The medicine... can you give it to me now?

FEMALE INNKEEPER
That depends on whether they agree.

MAN
Who?

An invisible force strikes the MAN down. He coughs blood.

VOICE (O.S.)
Save us!

FEMALE INNKEEPER
Those who enter my Spirit Refuge are all exchange guests. Since they came for me, how could I stand by and do nothing?
continuation:
EXT. FOREST - NIGHT

Two figures in black robes race through moonlit cypress, swords humming with dark sigils.

INT. INN - CONTINUOUS

The two BLACK-ROBED FIGURES burst through paper doors, blades at the FEMALE INNKEEPER's neck. She calmly sips wine. The Twin Plant pulses behind her.

BLACK-ROBED FIGURE 1
We saw him come here. Sorcerer wants the Feng bloodline.

FEMALE INNKEEPER
Guests pay in coin or ki. You've brought neither.

Her eyes turn sharp. The phoenix tattoo on her shoulder glows. Crimson memory-threads surge from her body, entangling the figures. Their blades rust to dust.

BLACK-ROBED FIGURE 1
(terrified)
Spirit Weaver!

The threads pierce their armor, showing flickers: these men burning Feng scrolls, killing children. The plant drinks their agony.

BLACK-ROBED FIGURES
(screaming)
Ahhh!

FEMALE INNKEEPER
(whispering to the air)
Harming the loyal, aiding tyrants. Today I'll take your lives to honor the righteous!

The red energy consumes them. They collapse. The MAN watches, shocked.

BLACK-ROBED FIGURES
(pleading from the ground)
Save us, Grand Sorcerer!

A translucent white-haired man (GRAND SORCERER) appears. He absorbs the figures as black smoke into his phantom form.

FEMALE INNKEEPER
They were your men.

GRAND SORCERER
Those who fail have only one fate: death.

FEMALE INNKEEPER
You dare send a projection to my inn?

GRAND SORCERER
Sooner or later, I will claim you. But him...

The GRAND SORCERER's phantom hand grasps the MAN's throat, pulling him.

GRAND SORCERER
The Twin Plant's fruit is mine by pact. You know this.

FEMALE INNKEEPER
In my Refuge, only the house law binds.

She transforms into a blue firebird, diving at the SORCERER. He strikes; she twists. His palm blast shatters a pillar. The MAN is caught in the wave, slamming into the wall.

The two battle. Tables and chairs overturn. The MAN lies on the ground, his reopened blood streaming toward the plant. The second stem blooms silver.

The GRAND SORCERER strikes toward the FEMALE INNKEEPER. She dodges; the force hits the MAN.

The silver fruit hangs between them, pulsing. The SORCERER flickers, weakening.

GRAND SORCERER
(vanishing)
The fruit ripens. But can you harvest it before I return... in flesh?

The MAN crawls toward the plant, hand outstretched.

FADE OUT.

title: Forced Marriage
description: Two sisters are brutally coerced by their grandfather into marrying the sons of a wealthy village chief, leading to a desperate struggle for freedom.
context:
Title: Forced Marriage
Description: Two sisters are brutally coerced by their grandfather into marrying the sons of a wealthy village chief, leading to a desperate struggle for freedom.

INT. DILAPIDATED HOUSE - DAY

ELDER SISTER curls on the floor, blood on her face. YOUNGER SISTER shields her. GRANDFATHER raises a cane.

YOUNGER SISTER
Sister!

Cane strikes. ELDER SISTER jerks, silent.

ELDER SISTER
(strangled)
Run... back way...

GRANDFATHER
No way out. The Li family watches.

ELDER SISTER
(tears and blood)
Stop. I'll marry. Just stop.

GRANDFATHER stops.

YOUNGER SISTER helps ELDER SISTER sit, wipes her face.

YOUNGER SISTER
We need a doctor—

GRANDFATHER blocks the door.

GRANDFATHER
No. Tomorrow the matchmaker takes you.

YOUNGER SISTER
Takes us where?

ELDER SISTER
What marriage?

YOUNGER SISTER
I won't.

GRANDFATHER
(laughs)
To the village chief's sons.

ELDER SISTER
(whisper)
Grandfather... they're touched. Everyone whispers it.
continuation:
GRANDFATHER
They have land. You'll eat.

YOUNGER SISTER finds two red betrothal cards on the altar. She tears them.

GRANDFATHER
(roars)
You tear your future!

YOUNGER SISTER
(chin up)
You sold it.

GRANDFATHER
(grabs wrist)
Your father signed!

YOUNGER SISTER
(struggling)
Let him marry them!

GRANDFATHER shoves YOUNGER SISTER. ELDER SISTER catches her hand.

ELDER SISTER
(screams)
Lu Zhao! The roof tile!

EXT. OUTSIDE THE HOUSE - NIGHT

YOUNGER SISTER falls. Door slams. Lock clicks.

YOUNGER SISTER
(pounding)
She's bleeding! Open up!

GRANDFATHER
(through door)
She'll live. You'll marry.

YOUNGER SISTER
(desperate)
This is kidnapping! The police—

GRANDFATHER
(fading)
Police here are Li family too.

YOUNGER SISTER
(crying out)
Let me out! What right do you have to lock me up! What right!

title: Twin Storms
description: Two young brothers witness their guardian's murder and must survive a ruthless crime lord's hunt while protecting a valuable jade artifact.
context:
Title: Twin Storms
Description: Two young brothers witness their guardian's murder and must survive a ruthless crime lord's hunt while protecting a valuable jade artifact.

INT. STORAGE ROOM - NIGHT

Black and white footage.

Two young boys, CHI YAN (older brother) and CHI YUAN (younger brother), huddle in terror in the corner of a cramped wooden storage room. CHI YAN holds his brother, covering his mouth with his hand.

CHI YUANSHAN (O.S.)
Stay here. Not a sound. Whatever you hear.

INT. LUXURIOUS LIVING ROOM - NIGHT

CHI YUANSHAN, his face bruised, staggers into a dimly lit luxurious living room. He crouches down, his expression pained and vigilant.

JIN LIE sits on the sofa, looking at him with cold calculation. Another HENCHMAN stands beside him.

JIN LIE
Twenty years, Yuanshan. I gave you everything. You repay me with betrayal?

JIN LIE stands up and slowly walks toward CHI YUANSHAN.

JIN LIE
The Qilin Jade. Where is the certificate?

CHI YUANSHAN lifts his head, his face bearing scars and bloodstains, and laughs contemptuously.

CHI YUANSHAN
Ha ha ha...

CHI YUANSHAN
You think I'd trust you with the key to everything I love?

JIN LIE
Then I'll take it from those boys. They'll tell me.

CHI YUANSHAN, upon hearing this, flies into a rage.

CHI YUANSHAN
(roaring)
They're children!

Both men simultaneously draw guns, pointing them at each other.

CHI YUANSHAN
(shouting)
You already took everything else!

A gunshot rings out.

CHI YUANSHAN is shot, falls painfully onto the sofa, then rolls to the ground, dead.
continuation:
INT. STORAGE ROOM - NIGHT

CHI YAN and CHI YUAN hide in the storage room. Hearing the gunshot, their expressions become even more terrified.

INT. LUXURIOUS LIVING ROOM - NIGHT

JIN LIE's subordinate ZHOU YOU walks in.

ZHOU YOU
Boss.

JIN LIE crouches down to examine CHI YUANSHAN's body.

ZHOU YOU
Our men searched every corner. We didn't find those two little brats Chi Yan and Chi Yuan.

JIN LIE
Search the entire city. Only they might know the whereabouts of the Qilin Jade. Dump Chi Yuanshan's body in the harbor. Let the current erase him.

INT. STORAGE ROOM - NIGHT

The footage turns to color.

CHI YAN and CHI YUAN still hide in the storage room. CHI YAN takes a Qilin jade pendant from around his own neck and puts it around his brother CHI YUAN's neck.

CHI YAN
Our godfather gave me this to protect. Now you protect it.

CHI YUAN
(shaking his head, whispering)
Brother, I'm not leaving.

CHI YAN
I'll lead them away. You escape when you can. That's the only way.

CHI YUAN wants to cry. CHI YAN covers his mouth.

CHI YAN
Don't. Bite me instead.

CHI YUAN, with tears in his eyes, bites hard on his brother's arm, leaving a bloody tooth mark.

CHI YAN looks at the wound, then at his brother.

CHI YAN
I'll use this tooth mark to find you later. Ah Yuan, you must live well. We must avenge our godfather and restore the Chi family.

CHI YAN stands up, preparing to rush out.

CHI YAN
(shouting)
Here! I'm right here!

He runs out.

ZHOU YOU (O.S.)
Boss, I see the older one!

JIN LIE (O.S.)
Everyone chase him! The jade is on him!

CHI YUAN remains alone in the storage room, covering his mouth, crying in terror.

Golden text appears on screen: TO BE CONTINUED

title: Reborn to Stop Pleasing
description: A girl dies after being framed by her adopted sister and mistreated by her family. She is reborn five years earlier and vows never to seek their approval again.
context:
Title: Reborn to Stop Pleasing
Description: A girl dies after being framed by her adopted sister and mistreated by her family. She is reborn five years earlier and vows never to seek their approval again.

INT. LUXURY VILLA / STAIRCASE - DAY

Marble staircase gleams under crystal chandeliers. SONG YUWEI (16, school uniform, ponytail) clutches a perfect test paper, ascending carefully. SONG JIAOJIAO (17, black sequined dress) descends, a jade bracelet visible in her clutch.

They collide at the landing. The bracelet tumbles out, clattering on marble.

SONG YUWEI
(startled)
Mom's jade—

SONG JIAOJIAO
(coldly)
You saw nothing.

SONG YUWEI
(bending to retrieve it)
That's Mom's anniversary gift. She thought she lost it.

JIAOJIAO snatches it first, but YUWEI grabs her wrist.

SONG JIAOJIAO
(low, dangerous)
Let. Go.

She shoves. YUWEI stumbles backward, tumbling down the stairs. Her head cracks against the banister. Blood pools beneath her.

JIAOJIAO rushes down, crouching to watch YUWEI struggle.

SONG YUWEI
(gasping)
Please... Mom will know...
YUWEI's hand grasps JIAOJIAO's ankle.

SONG JIAOJIAO
(hissing)
You're staining my dress.

She shakes YUWEI off. The bracelet falls, shattering. JIAOJIAO's eyes narrow. She snatches a crystal figurine from a side table.

SONG JIAOJIAO
(whispering)
You've always broken everything you touch.

She strikes YUWEI's temple. YUWEI goes limp.

JIAOJIAO presses a shard of jade to her own forehead, slicing skin just as—
continuation:
INT. LUXURY VILLA / LIVING ROOM - DAY

The front door opens. DAD, MOM (CAI JIA), SONG ZHIXUAN (24, suit), and SONG ZHIRAN (21, denim jacket) enter.

Mom spots the staircase first.

MOM
(gasping)
Jiaojiao! Your face—

At the base of the stairs, JIAOJIAO cradles YUWEI's bloodied head, her own forehead bleeding.

SONG JIAOJIAO
(trembling voice)
I tried to stop her... she wanted to sell Mom's bracelet...

SONG YUWEI
(whispering)
No... she stole...

The family rushes over. ZHIRAN pushes YUWEI aside to lift JIAOJIAO.

SONG ZHIRAN
(to YUWEI)
What did you do now?

SONG ZHIXUAN
(examining JIAOJIAO's wound)
This is deep. Mother, call Dr. Chen.

MOM
(over her shoulder, to YUWEI)
The bracelet cost fifty thousand. Are you happy now?

YUWEI crawls toward them, leaving a bloody handprint on marble.

SONG YUWEI
Dad... I didn't...

DAD's face hardens. He steps over YUWEI to check JIAOJIAO.

DAD
(to JIAOJIAO)
Did she attack you with this?

He holds up the bloodied figurine.

SONG JIAOJIAO
(softly)
She said... if I told you, she'd make sure I regretted it.

SONG ZHIXUAN
(turning on YUWEI)
You threaten her? After everything?

SONG YUWEI
(choking)
The orphanage taught me to steal—wasn't that what you said last time?

MOM
(flinching)
Don't you dare bring that up.

SONG ZHIRAN
We took you in. This is how you repay us?

YUWEI's breath comes ragged. She looks at each face—no recognition, no doubt.

SONG YUWEI
(struggling)
I had... a perfect score... wanted to show you...

She reaches for the crumpled paper, now soaked in blood.

DAD
Enough! You've shamed this family for the last time.

He raises his hand. YUWEI doesn't flinch—just stares.

MOM
Stop. She's not worth it.

She turns her back. So do the brothers, forming a protective circle around JIAOJIAO.

YUWEI's hand drops. The paper floats from her fingers.

SONG YUWEI (V.O.)
Ten years of carrying their shame... and they never once looked back.

YUWEI's eyes fix on JIAOJIAO's smile—victorious, familiar.

SONG YUWEI (V.O.)
Next life... I'll stop looking too.

YUWEI's breathing stops. Her soul rises, watching them help JIAOJIAO to the sofa, leaving her body on cold marble.

INT. SONG FAMILY LIVING ROOM - DAY

SONG YUWEI's eyes snap open. She's in a rattan chair, sunlight streaming warm across her face. The same room, but the blood is gone. DAD reads his newspaper. MOM arranges flowers. ZHIXUAN types on his laptop. ZHIRAN scrolls his phone. JIAOJIAO lounges on the sofa.

SONG JIAOJIAO
(sighing)
Sister, I know you like Xiao Tianwang too, but stealing my lyrics for his contest? That's just sad.

YUWEI's hand flies to her temple—no wound. Her eyes widen as she spots the calendar: five years earlier.

SONG YUWEI (V.O.)
The day everything started.

She looks at her family, then at JIAOJIAO. Her fingers curl into fists, then slowly release.

SONG YUWEI sits frozen, the past and future colliding in her eyes.

TO BE CONTINUED

title: Rebellious Phase (Episode 34)
description: A tense family dinner escalates into a confrontation when a daughter refuses to accept her mother's new husband.
context:
Title: Rebellious Phase (Episode 34)
Description: A tense family dinner escalates into a confrontation when a daughter refuses to accept her mother's new husband.

INT. DINING ROOM - NIGHT

A family of three sits around the dinner table. The steaming food can't cut the chill between them.

LIU CILAN places a piece of chicken in her daughter's bowl.

LIU CILAN
The college entrance exam is in three weeks. You need protein.

LIN SU, eighteen, watches her mother's face as she moves it back.

LIN SU
So do you. Doctor's orders.

A beat. Then LIN SU sets down her chopsticks with a sharp click.

LIN SU
I'm not eating.

LIU CILAN
(angry)
What's gotten into you? Uncle Zhou spent all afternoon cooking. Sit down.

LIN SU
(pointing at ZHOU JIANCHEN)
Mom, you're defending him. Again.

LIU CILAN
(standing up, even more furious)
He's my husband. That makes him your father.

LIN SU
(sneering)
continuation:
My father? He's not even close.

LIU CILAN
If I say he's family, he's family. Now apologize.

LIU CILAN reaches for LIN SU's wrist. LIN SU jerks back.

ZHOU JIANCHEN
(standing up to mediate)
Susu, your mother's been through enough. Don't make this harder.

LIN SU
(shouting at ZHOU JIANCHEN)
You don't get to speak for her!

LIU CILAN
(trembling with anger)
How dare you—

The slap cracks through the room. LIU CILAN's hand hangs in mid-air, trembling.

LIU CILAN
(regretful)
Susu...

LIN SU
(covering her face, tearful)
You chose him. The man who let Dad die.

LIU CILAN gasps, clutches her chest, and collapses.

ZHOU JIANCHEN
(panicking)
Call 911! Now!

He catches LIU CILAN as she falls, his face white with terror.

title: Time-Jumping Fried Noodle King
description: A skilled noodle vendor defends his craft and gets transported to an ancient battlefield through a mysterious portal.
context:
Title: Time-Jumping Fried Noodle King
Description: A skilled noodle vendor defends his craft and gets transported to an ancient battlefield through a mysterious portal.

INT. STREET NOODLE STALL - DAY

LIN CHE stir-fries noodles with surgical precision. A faded photo of an elderly woman watches from his cart.

FEMALE CUSTOMER
Boss. One hundred servings. Nine minutes.

LIN CHE
Timer's running.

He taps his phone—an app reads "Master's Challenge: 09:00." A red envelope notification flashes.

LIN CHE puts in earbuds. Old-school hip-hop merges with the sizzle. He closes his eyes.

A VENDOR crashes into a table.

VENDOR (O.S.)
Lin! Dazhuang's coming—skipped every stall but yours!

Pedestrians evaporate. The FEMALE CUSTOMER melts into the crowd. LIN CHE doesn't flinch.

His phone BUZZES: 00:00. He slides the final portion into a box.

LIN CHE
(to the photo)
Done, Ma.

He looks up. WANG DAZHUANG and three HENCHMEN block his exit. DAZHUANG lifts the box, inhales.

WANG DAZHUANG
They call you legend.

He drops it. Noodles spray across pavement.

LIN CHE
That was my mother's recipe.

WANG DAZHUANG
Mama can't protect you now.
continuation:
LIN CHE's knuckles whiten. He exhales.

LIN CHE
She protected this neighborhood thirty years without paying parasites.

LIN CHE flips the wok—scalding oil arcs. He vaults the counter. Ladles become batons, strainer a shield, awning leverage. HENCHMEN drop. DAZHUANG crawls through noodles.

WANG DAZHUANG
(shouting)
After him!

WANG DAZHUANG and HENCHMEN scramble up. LIN CHE runs with his cart.

LIN CHE pushes. The dashboard—a jury-rigged tablet—SPOOLS with blue light. The red envelope vibrates again.

LIN CHE (V.O.)
Not now...

A PURPLE VORTEX erupts ahead. LIN CHE and cart rush in and disappear.

WANG DAZHUANG reaches the spot, stares at scorch marks.

WANG DAZHUANG
What is he?

EXT. ANCIENT BATTLEFIELD - DAY

The portal opens on a hillside. LIN CHE's cart drifts to a stop.

Below, QIN DYNASTY SOLDIERS battle SHADOW WARRIORS in black masks.

LIN CHE pokes his head out, stunned.

LIN CHE
What... what is this?

A BRIGHT LIGHT engulfs him. The takeout boxes GLOW.

LIN CHE
I'm just a cook!

FADE TO WHITE.

title: Confronting the Outrageous Sister-in-Law
description: A family faces an unexpected confrontation when a woman claims their son got her pregnant, but flashbacks reveal the demanding nature of the son's girlfriend during their first meeting.
context:
Title: Confronting the Outrageous Sister-in-Law
Description: A family faces an unexpected confrontation when a woman claims their son got her pregnant, but flashbacks reveal the demanding nature of the son's girlfriend during their first meeting.

INT. QIAO FAMILY LIVING ROOM - DAY

Violent banging sounds come from outside the door.

BAI ZHE (O.S.)
Everyone in the Qiao family, get the hell out here!

QIAO KELAN hears the noise and walks toward the door, looking puzzled.

QIAO KELAN
Who's making such a racket?

QIAO KELAN opens the door. BAI ZHE barges in with a group of people, pushing past her.

QIAO KELAN
What do you think you're doing?

QIAO FATHER and QIAO MOTHER emerge from the inner room.

QIAO FATHER
This is private property—who are you?

BAI MOTHER walks in, followed by BAI LU, who is visibly pregnant.

BAI MOTHER
Witness this outrage! The Qiao family's son got my daughter pregnant, and now he refuses to take responsibility! What kind of monsters are you?

QIAO MOTHER turns to her son QIAO MINGWEI, who's just appeared, her face pale.

QIAO MOTHER
Mingwei... please tell me this isn't true.

QIAO MINGWEI
Mom, it's complicated—

BAI ZHE
Complicated? My sister's been carrying your child for six months while you ghosted her!

QIAO KELAN steps forward, her voice steady.

QIAO KELAN
Please, everyone, let's discuss this civilly. If my brother is truly the father, we'll do right by your family. Miss Bai—

BAI LU
(coldly)
It's Lulu. That's what Mingwei called me when we were together.

QIAO KELAN
(faint recognition crossing her face)
Lulu. Of course.

BAI MOTHER
Don't try any tricks! My daughter's reputation is ruined!

CUT TO:
continuation:
INT. QIAO FAMILY LIVING ROOM - DAY (FLASHBACK)

QIAO KELAN, QIAO FATHER, and QIAO MOTHER sit on the sofa in a warm atmosphere. QIAO KELAN is styling her mother's hair.

QIAO MOTHER
(smiling at her reflection)
You always make me look ten years younger.

QIAO MOTHER
Kelan, Mingwei will be here with his girlfriend any minute. Did you prepare the hongbao?

QIAO KELAN
It's ready, Mom. Your three thousand is inside, and I added more to make it ten thousand and one—symbolizing that Mingwei found a one-in-ten-thousand girl. Everything's perfect.

QIAO FATHER
You shouldn't spend your money on this.

QIAO KELAN
Dad, Mingwei is my brother. What's mine is his. It's nothing.

The door opens. QIAO MINGWEI enters with LULU, who wears a designer handbag and assesses the room with barely concealed scrutiny.

QIAO MINGWEI
Dad, Mom—this is Bai Lu. Lulu, my sister Kelan.

QIAO KELAN
(warmly extending her hand)
Lulu, Mingwei's told us so much about you.

LULU
(vague smile, ignoring the hand)
Uncle, Auntie, I've been looking forward to meeting you. Mingwei says you live in the old district?

QIAO FATHER
Please, sit down.

They sit. LULU perches on the edge of the sofa, eyeing the furniture.

QIAO MOTHER
Kelan, the gift.

QIAO KELAN
Of course.

QIAO KELAN hands the red envelope to her mother.

QIAO MOTHER
(presenting it to LULU)
Lulu, a small token. We hope you'll feel welcomed into our family.

LULU accepts the envelope, feeling its weight. Her smile vanishes. She sets it on the table untouched.

LULU
(quietly, to MINGWEI)
Mingwei, did I do something wrong?

QIAO MINGWEI
What? No, why?

LULU
(tears welling)
Then why this... this insult? Back home, a first meeting gift starts at eighty-eight thousand. How can I show my face?

QIAO MOTHER
Eighty-eight—?

QIAO KELAN
(gently)
Lulu, customs vary. That's nearly a bride price in our city. Perhaps there's been a misunderstanding.

LULU
(standing)
There's no misunderstanding. Either your family respects me, or... or we have nothing more to discuss.

She heads toward the door. QIAO MINGWEI scrambles after her.

CUT TO:

INT. QIAO FAMILY LIVING ROOM - DAY

QIAO KELAN faces BAI LU, recognition hardening into resolve.

QIAO KELAN
Lulu, I remember now. And I remember you walked out that day over money. Before we discuss "responsibility," let's discuss paternity tests and why a woman who demanded eighty-eight thousand to exist in our lives is now demanding entry.

BAI LU's face drains of color. BAI ZHE looks between them, confused.

BAI ZHE
What are you talking about?

QIAO KELAN
I'm talking about a pattern. You want Qiao family money? You'll get Qiao family justice first.

QIAO MOTHER
Kelan's right. We Qiaos take responsibility—but not for lies.

BAI LU
(quietly)
The baby is Mingwei's. I swear—

QIAO KELAN
Then you'll have no objection to proving it. And to explaining why you disappeared for six months only to return with demands.

She pulls out her phone.

QIAO KELAN
Shall I call the hospital, or would you prefer to leave peacefully?

The silence stretches. BAI LU's hands tremble on her belly.

BAI LU
(whispering)
I... I need to think.

She turns and hurries out, her family following. The door slams. QIAO KELAN turns to her shell-shocked family.

QIAO KELAN
Mom, Dad, Mingwei—whatever this is, we'll face it together. But on our terms.

She puts a steadying hand on MINGWEI's shoulder as we—

FADE OUT.

title: My Daughter Protects the Mountains and Rivers
description: In a martial arts family with strict traditions, a young woman secretly practices forbidden techniques, revealing an extraordinary talent that surpasses even her celebrated brother.
context:
Title: My Daughter Protects the Mountains and Rivers
Description: In a martial arts family with strict traditions, a young woman secretly practices forbidden techniques, revealing an extraordinary talent that surpasses even her celebrated brother.

INT. MARTIAL ARTS SCHOOL COURTYARD - DAY

Opening with an intense martial arts montage. YE YAOZU demonstrates exceptional skill, sparring with fellow disciples, easily defeating them one by one. On the other side, YE LINGWEI crouches in a corner, scrubbing the stone floor. Her raw, calloused hands betray years of secret practice.

YE YAOZU defeats his last opponent, finishes his stance, and stands with pride.

YE YAOZU
Father, I am ready.

YE HONG stands on the steps, watching his son with satisfaction.

YE HONG (V.O.)
Ye Family Fist channels dantian power through inch force. Only true blood can master it.

The scene flashes to an old man with white hair and beard - YAN NANTIAN, watching from the shadows, his wine gourd frozen.

YE HONG
Yaozu. Show them.

YE YAOZU
Yes, Father.

YE YAOZU walks to a massive bronze bell in the center of the courtyard. He steadies his stance, gathers his strength, and strikes the bell with one punch.

SOUND
The bell rings out, resonant and lingering.

Everyone looks up. YAN NANTIAN's expression shifts. YE HONG shows a proud smile.

YE HONG
Ten years. Three rings. True talent.

YE LINGWEI (V.O.)
And if the blood runs through daughters too?

YE HONG
Everyone, dismissed.

The disciples bow and leave. YE LINGWEI watches them. When the courtyard empties, she stands and walks toward the bronze bell.
continuation:
EXT. MARTIAL ARTS SCHOOL COURTYARD - DAY

YE LINGWEI approaches the bronze bell, imitating her brother's movements.

YE LINGWEI
Power from the dantian, release with inch force!

She gathers her courage and punches the bell.

SOUND
At first, only a dull thud, then moments later, a weak but sustained humming sound emerges.

YAN NANTIAN hears this, suddenly opens his eyes wide, sits up straight, his face full of shock. YE LINGWEI looks at her fist, not disappointed - but terrified. GU XINROU walks over.

GU XINROU
Lingwei. The rules are iron. If anyone discovers you practicing, your hands and feet will be crippled. Your sister returns tomorrow with marriage prospects from the capital. Come.

YE LINGWEI
(snap turning)
Marriage?

GU XINROU
(softly dangerous)
The only future for daughters of Ye. Unless certain sounds are never made again.

YE LINGWEI looks back at the bell - a clear fist-shaped dent has appeared. She looks at her mother, then the dent, and follows. The camera moves to the bronze bell, revealing the dent.

YAN NANTIAN stands up, staring at the school.

YAN NANTIAN (V.O.)
Intent merging with energy, not following it. The old world trembles.

FADE OUT.

title: The Masked Heir Returns
description: After completing a ten-year mourning period in the mountains, a powerful family head descends to fulfill a marriage contract, only to face disrespect at the gates of his betrothed's estate.
context:
Title: The Masked Heir Returns
Description: After completing a ten-year mourning period in the mountains, a powerful family head descends to fulfill a marriage contract, only to face disrespect at the gates of his betrothed's estate.

MONTAGE

EXT. SCENIC ROAD - DAY

Fast-paced music plays.

A series of quick cuts:
- THE FEMALE SUBORDINATE in black tactical gear races a dirt bike through forest switchbacks.
- Aerial shot: she tears across a tea plantation, trajectory precise.
- She brakes hard, removes her helmet, consults a device.
- She accelerates toward the mountain shrine.

EXT. BAMBOO FOREST - DAY

The scene shifts, the atmosphere becomes solemn. Sunlight filters through the bamboo grove, ceremonial paper money drifting on the wind.

The FEMALE SUBORDINATE, now in black combat attire, kneels before the FAMILY HEAD, who wears traditional white mourning robes.

The FAMILY HEAD completes a memorial ritual before an ornate stone altar.

FEMALE SUBORDINATE
Family Head, the ten-year mourning period ends today. The families await your return.

FAMILY HEAD
(quietly, before the portrait)
Ten years of solitude. Grandfather's last wish demands I see this through.

The FAMILY HEAD rises, his sorrow hardening into resolve.

FAMILY HEAD
The Jiang family contract. I'll honor it—on my terms.

Close-up: The OLD FAMILY HEAD's portrait, weathered and watchful.
continuation:
EXT. LAKESIDE - DAY

The FAMILY HEAD, now in a sharp black suit, stands at the lakeside with the FEMALE SUBORDINATE.

FEMALE SUBORDINATE
The Liu and Chen families have accepted your return. The Jiang family... may be difficult.

FAMILY HEAD
(smiling faintly)
I prefer difficult.

FEMALE SUBORDINATE
Shall I prepare the customary gifts?

FAMILY HEAD
No. They'll have their heir. That's gift enough.

EXT. JIANG FAMILY GATE - DAY

The FAMILY HEAD approaches a massive, ornate gate. He presses the intercom.

A surly GATEKEEPER appears on the screen.

GATEKEEPER (V.O.)
Delivery entrance is around back.

FAMILY HEAD
I'm here for Miss Jiang. Regarding our engagement.

GATEKEEPER (V.O.)
(laughing)
Another one? Cute. Our Young Miss doesn't do blind dates, pretty boy.

The gate swings open. The bald GATEKEEPER emerges, rolling up his sleeves.

GATEKEEPER
Last chance to leave with your teeth.

FAMILY HEAD
You've confused me with someone who needs permission.

The GATEKEEPER lunges, throwing a heavy punch.

The FAMILY HEAD catches the fist effortlessly. His palm glows faintly red—a brief, impossible flicker. He pushes gently.

The GATEKEEPER is launched backward, slamming into the gate with a thunderous crash.

The FAMILY HEAD straightens his cuff, expression neutral.

From within the estate, a voice cracks like a whip.

VOICE (O.S.)
Who dares touch my gatekeeper!

title: Coaxing Her to Become Mrs. Huo
description: When CEO South Qiao discovers her husband's betrayal with a protégé she raised from poverty, she transforms devastation into a calculated power move.
context:
Title: Coaxing Her to Become Mrs. Huo
Description: When CEO South Qiao discovers her husband's betrayal with a protégé she raised from poverty, she transforms devastation into a calculated power move.

INT. COMPANY CORRIDOR - DAY

Fast-paced background music plays.

SOUTH QIAO (30s, sharp black suit, heels) strides across polished marble, phone in hand showing a photo of LU ZIHANG and SU KEKE entering a hotel. Her expression is stone-cold.

EMPLOYEE A
Good morning, President South.

EMPLOYEE B
Good morning, President South.

ON SCREEN: South Qiao - CEO of Huo Group

SOUTH QIAO doesn't break stride, heading directly to the president's office.

INT. PRESIDENT'S OFFICE - DAY

A silk blouse hangs from a chair. Red heels are kicked aside.

LU ZIHANG (30s, privileged charm) pulls intern SU KEKE (early 20s, doe-eyed) onto the desk.

ON SCREEN: Lu Zihang - South Qiao's Husband
ON SCREEN: Su Keke - Huo Group Intern

SU KEKE
(whispering)
The quarterly reports are right there. She could—

LU ZIHANG
South Qiao? She's in Singapore. And without the Huo family name, she'd be nothing.

LU ZIHANG leans in. The door SLAMS open. SOUTH QIAO stands frozen.

SOUTH QIAO
What a productive meeting.

LU ZIHANG
(stumbling back)
Your flight—

SOUTH QIAO
Was cancelled. Storms.
continuation:
SOUTH QIAO slaps SU KEKE. The crack echoes.

LU ZIHANG
Keke!

SOUTH QIAO
(pointing at SU KEKE)
Twelve years. Since you were twelve. I paid for your school, your mother's surgery, this internship. This is your gratitude?

LU ZIHANG
(shielding SU KEKE)
Take it out on me. Keke's innocent.

SOUTH QIAO turns and slaps LU ZIHANG.

SOUTH QIAO
Of course. LU ZIHANG, when you begged me to save Huo Group, you swore lifetime loyalty. Was that before or after you used my sponsorship money to buy her gifts?

LU ZIHANG
(covering his face, humiliated)
How dare you—Yes, I needed you then! But look at yourself. All power suits and profit margins. Where's the woman I married?

SU KEKE
(crying)
Sister South Qiao, I'm sorry. I tried not to... but he needs someone who sees him, not just his stocks.

LU ZIHANG
(comforting SU KEKE)
Don't apologize to the woman who made our marriage a business merger.

SOUTH QIAO
(in disbelief)
I made it a merger? I built your father's empire while you played—

SOUTH QIAO throws a document at LU ZIHANG.

SOUTH QIAO
Sign it. Three-year contract. I'll take Huo Group public, claim my shares, then we're done. Your private life becomes truly private.

LU ZIHANG
(shocked)
You've had this ready... You knew?

SOUTH QIAO
(eyes determined)
Since the day I stopped being your wife and became your CEO. I'll email you the board meeting details.

SOUTH QIAO turns, tears held back by sheer force of will, and exits decisively. LU ZIHANG and SU KEKE stand frozen in place, the document between them.

title: The Mute Girl Is Duode
description: A young boy is rescued from human traffickers, but the girl who saved him is lost.
context:
Title: The Mute Girl Is Duode
Description: A young boy is rescued from human traffickers, but the girl who saved him is lost.

INT. COURTYARD - DAY

LIANG XIAOJUN, a small boy with a face full of scars and blood at the corner of his mouth, has his face gripped by a hand.

HUMAN TRAFFICKER (O.S.)
Will you still run?

LIANG XIAOJUN
(in pain)
Stop hitting me!

The HUMAN TRAFFICKER, a middle-aged man with a vicious expression, stares at the camera.

HUMAN TRAFFICKER
Will you still run?

The HUMAN TRAFFICKER slaps LIANG XIAOJUN hard across the face.

ZHU XIAOBEI, a little girl, is locked in an iron cage, her face dirty, crying in terror. The cage door was damaged yesterday—she can force it open.

ZHU XIAOBEI
(crying out)
Stop hitting him!

The HUMAN TRAFFICKER grabs LIANG XIAOJUN by the neck, forcing him to drink something from a bowl.

HUMAN TRAFFICKER
Drink it!

LIANG XIAOJUN
(struggling)
I won't drink it!

HUMAN TRAFFICKER
Drink it!

LIANG XIAOJUN struggles and kicks the bowl over. The bowl hits the HUMAN TRAFFICKER in the face. Blood flows from the corner of the TRAFFICKER's eye, his expression becoming even more vicious.

HUMAN TRAFFICKER
You little bastard! I'll beat you to death today!

The HUMAN TRAFFICKER throws LIANG XIAOJUN to the ground and wraps his hands around his neck.

HUMAN TRAFFICKER
I'll strangle you! I must strangle you today! Strangle you!

ZHU XIAOBEI in the cage covers her head, crying out in despair. She shoves the weakened door.

ZHU XIAOBEI
Stop hitting him! Stop hitting him!
continuation:
ZHU XIAOBEI runs out of the cage and lunges at the HUMAN TRAFFICKER.

ZHU XIAOBEI
Stop hitting him!

HUMAN TRAFFICKER
Get away from me!

The HUMAN TRAFFICKER pushes ZHU XIAOBEI away.

HUMAN TRAFFICKER
You little bastard, I'll beat you to death!

ZHU XIAOBEI picks up a medicine jar from the ground, her eyes resolute. POISON for the guard dogs.

LIANG XIAOJUN (O.S.)
(weakly)
Don't drink it, Qianqian! Don't drink it!

ZHU XIAOBEI grabs the medicine jar and drinks all of its contents, then smashes the jar on the ground. A dog lies quietly in the cage, already sedated. ZHU XIAOBEI's expression shows pain as she watches LIANG XIAOJUN lose consciousness from being strangled.

ZHU XIAOBEI (V.O.)
I failed to protect you.

INT. HOSPITAL WARD - DAY

LIANG XIAOJUN lies in a hospital bed, his face covered with bruises. He wakes from a nightmare, screaming loudly.

LIANG XIAOJUN
I won't drink it! I won't drink it! I won't drink it!

MOTHER rushes over and holds him tightly.

MOTHER
(crying)
Don't be afraid, don't be afraid, Xiaojun, don't be afraid. Mommy is here, Mommy is here, Mommy is here.

MOTHER cups LIANG XIAOJUN's face, looking at him with heartache.

MOTHER
Son, it's okay now.

LIANG XIAOJUN
Mom, am I really saved?

LIANG XIAOJUN
What about Qianqian? Was Qianqian saved too?

MOTHER
(confused)
What Qianqian? When the police found you, you were alone. There was no one else.

LIANG XIAOJUN hears this news. His eyes instantly become hollow and filled with despair.

title: Village Tyranny
description: After her father's death, Shen Qian and her mute mother face a village bully who has forged a debt note, demanding payment or threatening to sell her to the mountains.
context:
Title: Village Tyranny
Description: After her father's death, Shen Qian and her mute mother face a village bully who has forged a debt note, demanding payment or threatening to sell her to the mountains.

EXT. VILLAGE PATH - NIGHT

A bright moon hangs in the cloudy night sky.

SHEN QIAN and her mother HAN JUAN look panicked, running frantically on the dark country road.

SHEN QIAN
(gasping for breath)
Mom, Liu Biao and the hospital clerk... they planned this together. Even if we borrow the money, he'll just raise the price again.

HAN JUAN stops, turns back to look at SHEN QIAN, her eyes full of despair.

SHEN QIAN
We can't stay in this village anymore.

HAN JUAN nods painfully.

INT. MOURNING HALL - DAY (SIX HOURS EARLIER)

A simple mourning hall. A black and white portrait of SHEN QIAN's father sits on a table with burning incense and candles in front.

SHEN QIAN and HAN JUAN wear white mourning clothes, kneeling on the ground, burning paper money in a basin.

SHEN QIAN
(voice low)
Mom... it's just us now.

HAN JUAN's face is covered in tears, shoulders trembling. SHEN QIAN gently touches her mother's hand. They sit in quiet grief.

The wooden door is kicked open. Village bully LIU BIAO swaggers in, his own clothes worn and patched.

LIU BIAO
(impatiently)
Enough with the crying already! Some of us have work to do.

SHEN QIAN and HAN JUAN stand up in terror.

SHEN QIAN
Uncle Liu, have you come to pay respects?

LIU BIAO
I'm here to collect a debt! Your father borrowed from me when he was sick. You think a funeral wipes the slate clean?

SHEN QIAN
(keeping her voice steady)
Before my father passed, I personally delivered the ten thousand yuan he owed you. You signed the repayment receipt.

LIU BIAO
(sneering)
That was the first loan. Who said it was the only one?

LIU BIAO pulls out a folded IOU from his pocket and unfolds it in front of the mother and daughter.
continuation:
LIU BIAO
See for yourself. Your father's own signature.

The IOU shows "one hundred thousand yuan" written clearly, the original "ten" altered with a careful extra zero.

SHEN QIAN
(shocked)
One hundred thousand? When could my father have borrowed—

LIU BIAO
Doesn't matter when! I have paper with his name. That's what matters in this village.

HAN JUAN frantically makes sign language, urgent gestures mixed with anguished sounds.

SHEN QIAN
(translating)
My father taught me: every debt must be repaid. But not every lie must be believed. Uncle Liu, the doctor's bills were barely covered by village aid. Where would we get a hundred thousand?

LIU BIAO
(laughing, but strained)
Ha! You think I enjoy being the bad guy? I have my own debts, girl. And they're coming due. He repaid ten thousand, he still owes ninety. Not a penny less!

SHEN QIAN
We have nothing left. The funeral took everything.

LIU BIAO
(eyes leering)
Pretty thing like you... always worth something. There's buyers in the mountains who don't ask questions about paperwork.

LIU BIAO moves forward to grab SHEN QIAN. HAN JUAN rushes forward to shield her daughter, frantically gesturing at LIU BIAO.

LIU BIAO
I don't have time for your hand-waving!

SHEN QIAN
(backing away)
Touch me and I'll scream. The whole village will hear.

LIU BIAO
Let them hear! I'm just collecting what's owed. Fair and square.

During the chaos, HAN JUAN has grabbed a mourning cloth and pricks her finger with a sewing needle from her sleeve. She writes quickly in blood: "We will repay. Don't take Qianqian." She holds it up, blocking her daughter.

LIU BIAO
(squinting)
What's this supposed to be?

LIU BIAO roughly pushes HAN JUAN aside and overturns the mourning hall table. The incense burner, candles, and portrait all crash to the ground.

SHEN QIAN
(screaming)
Mom!

LIU BIAO grabs SHEN QIAN's mourning clothes and drags her outside. In the chaos, HAN JUAN spots the scissors that fell when the table overturned. Her eyes become resolute. She picks them up and charges toward LIU BIAO.

ON SCREEN: TO BE CONTINUED

title: Good Deeds Bring Blessings
description: A family celebrates their daughter's scientific achievement, but a relative tries to take advantage of a home renovation opportunity.
context:
Title: Good Deeds Bring Blessings
Description: A family celebrates their daughter's scientific achievement, but a relative tries to take advantage of a home renovation opportunity.

INT. SU FAMILY LIVING ROOM - DAY

The muted television flickers. SU JIARONG's reflection shows in the dark screen—he's not watching.

NEWS ANCHOR (V.O.)
...Academician Su Yi'an's anti-cancer vaccine breakthrough. She departs tomorrow for Stockholm's Royal Academy...

SONG MINGZHU squeezes her daughter's hand, thumb tracing the calluses there.

SONG MINGZHU
Ten years in that lab. Finally, the world sees what I've always known.

The front door cracks open. SECRETARY SU MEILING slips through, holding a leather folder like a newborn.

SU MEILING
Chairman. Jinxiu Huating No. 1's deed transfer—finalized.

She sets the folder on the coffee table. Exits without waiting for acknowledgment.

SONG MINGZHU
(to Yi'an)
A place worth coming home to. After you've given so much.

SU YI'AN opens it. Her name on the deed. She closes it quickly—embarrassed by the wealth.

SU YI'AN
Mom, you didn't have to—

SU JIARONG
(eyes still on the dead screen)
Let your dad handle the renovation. Junhui called again yesterday. He's struggling.

SONG MINGZHU
Junhui? Last I heard, he couldn't tell marble from laminate.

SU JIARONG
He'll hire proper contractors. But the commission stays in family. That matters.

SU YI'AN
Dad, every forum I read says the same thing: "Never hire relatives." They'll cut corners because you'll "understand."

SONG MINGZHU
She's right. Call it what it is—charity disguised as business.

SU JIARONG's jaw tightens. He stands, walks to the window.

SU JIARONG
Fine. Your house. Your rules.

The suitcase wheels hum against tile. SONG MINGZHU kisses her husband's cheek—he doesn't turn.

SONG MINGZHU
(car door closing O.S.)
Text when you land.

The door swings shut. Silence hums.

A silhouette fills the doorway—WANG GUILAN, clutching a phone.
continuation:
WANG GUILAN
Jiarong! Junhui's crew is on standby. When do we start the demolition?

SU JIARONG spins. Guilt flashing, then something harder.

SU JIARONG
I told you—wait until my daughter left.

WANG GUILAN
(stepping inside)
She's your daughter. She'll do what you say.

SU JIARONG
This house is Mingzhu's gift. Not mine to give away.

WANG GUILAN
(phone screen glowing)
Funny. Yesterday you said a man's got to provide for his own bloodline.

She taps the screen. A voice memo plays—SU JIARONG's voice, slurred:

SU JIARONG (V.O.)
The renovation's yours. Yi'an doesn't need to know till it's done.

She smiles. Not friendly.

WANG GUILAN
So. Do we start Monday, or do I show Mingzhu how "reliable" her husband's promises are?

SU JIARONG stares at her. Then at the deed on the table. His daughter's name. His wife's power.

He reaches for his wallet. Counts out bills. The gesture humiliates him.

SU JIARONG
Five thousand. Advance.

WANG GUILAN
(laughing)
For a luxury villa? That's not even gas money for the crew.

SU JIARONG adds more. And more. Until his wallet is empty.

WANG GUILAN
(satisfied)
See? Family's always easiest to work with.

She pockets the cash. As she exits, her phone rings. She answers:

WANG GUILAN
Junhui? Start sourcing materials. And don't cheap out—we need this to look expensive.

The door closes. SU JIARONG stands alone, watching the news replay his daughter's achievement. The ticker scrolls: "Scientist's breakthrough saves millions."

He picks up the deed. Holds it to the light. His name appears nowhere—not on the house, not on her vaccine, not in her future.

The phone buzzes. A text from SONG MINGZHU: "Forgot to mention—security cameras were installed last week. App on your phone. Check vault footage."

SU JIARONG's thumb hovers over the app icon. Freezes.

FADE OUT.

title: Return of the Phoenix Daughter
description: Eighteen years after a prophecy, a young woman discovers her true identity as the lost heiress of the powerful Tuoba family on the day her husband returns to the village in glory.
context:
Title: Return of the Phoenix Daughter
Description: Eighteen years after a prophecy, a young woman discovers her true identity as the lost heiress of the powerful Tuoba family on the day her husband returns to the village in glory.

INT. TEMPLE - DAY

EIGHTEEN YEARS AGO

A MASTER in traditional robes clasps a young girl's jade pendant, his thumb pressing the phoenix seal.

MASTER
When the dragon returns, the phoenix will remember her wings.

The Master ties the pendant around the girl's neck with a red thread.

EXT. COMPANY BUILDING - DAY

EIGHTEEN YEARS LATER

A black Maybach stops. TUOBA AN, with silver temples, exits. BODYGUARDS bow.

BODYGUARDS
(in unison)
Chairman.

The MASTER, in plain modern clothes, holds a leather journal.

MASTER
Chairman Tuoba. Eighteen years I've searched our temple records.

He opens the journal to a sketch of the pendant.

TUOBA AN
The missing Miss Xiaoxiao...

MASTER
She's in Ye Family Village. Your demolition order includes her house.

The Master reveals three photos: a child's back with a butterfly birthmark, a young woman's neck wearing the pendant, a wedding photo.

TUOBA AN
(stunned)
She married? Who—

MASTER
The man returning there today as a 'big boss.' He left her behind.

ON SCREEN: TUOBA AN - ELDEST OF THE TUOBA FAMILY
continuation:
INT. OFFICE - DAY

TUOBA AN pours tea with trembling hands. An ASSISTANT proffers documents.

ASSISTANT
The village contracts are ready to sign.

TUOBA AN
Hold them. No one touches that land until I say so.

INT. CONCERT STAGE - NIGHT

TUOBA YUAN, leather jacket and shades, finishes a song. His phone buzzes—"XIAOXIAO FOUND"—he drops his mic.

ON SCREEN: TUOBA YUAN - THIRD OF THE TUOBA FAMILY

EXT. COMPANY BUILDING - DAY

TUOBA AN at the window, phone to his ear. The screen splits: TUOBA YUAN on his tour bus, TUOBA JIN in a boardroom.

TUOBA AN
We found her. In a village we were going to erase.

TUOBA YUAN
(furious)
Erase? That's our sister's home!

TUOBA JIN
(calm, dangerous)
Who kept her there?

INT. TUNNEL - NIGHT

Sports cars speed through, sirens wailing.

EXT. YE FAMILY VILLAGE STREET - DAY

ON SCREEN: YE FAMILY VILLAGE

Firecrackers pop. Drums thunder. Banner: "Welcome Big Boss Ye Zihao's Triumphant Return Home."

VILLAGERS surround WANG XIULI in a too-tight qipao.

NEIGHBOR
Auntie Xiuli, when you're riding in limousines, don't forget us!

WANG XIULI
(laughing too loud)
Forget? I'll send postcards from the penthouse! My son owns the factory that makes the cars!

EXT. YE FAMILY COURTYARD - DAY

ON SCREEN: WEN CHUXIA - ADOPTED DAUGHTER OF THE WEN FAMILY

WEN CHUXIA scrubs clothes, her hands raw. The pendant slips out—she tucks it back in fast.

A VILLAGE GIRL runs in.

VILLAGE GIRL
Sister Chuxia! Brother Zihao's here—at the village entrance!

WEN CHUXIA
(quietly)
Eighteen years... the Master said when the dragon returns—

She looks at the wedding qipao drying on the line.

EXT. VILLAGE ENTRANCE - DAY

Villagers cheer. WEN CHUXIA pushes through to WANG XIULI's side.

WANG XIULI's smile vanishes.

WEN CHUXIA
Mom.

WANG XIULI
(harshly)
Today is my son's victory. Not your place to stand here.

WEN CHUXIA
(quiet but firm)
My husband came home. Should I hide in the kitchen?

WANG XIULI
Know your place. He married you for luck before he left. Now his luck is made.

title: Doted Mom Searches for Dad with Kids
description: A young mother cast out by her master and penniless on the streets is pushed by her son to find his father for financial support.
context:
Title: Doted Mom Searches for Dad with Kids
Description: A young mother cast out by her master and penniless on the streets is pushed by her son to find his father for financial support.

INT. HOTEL BEDROOM - NIGHT (DREAM SEQUENCE)

Lyrical music dissolves into the background.

CLOSE-UP - TANG CHUYI's fingers trace the constellation of scars on ZHAN JINGXI's chest. ZHAN JINGXI lies motionless, eyes closed, white shirt unbuttoned.

TANG CHUYI leans down, her breath catching. A kiss, feather-light.

ZHAN JINGXI's eyes snap open. He captures her wrist—flips her beneath him in one practiced motion.

Their shadows merge on silk sheets.

EXT. PARK BENCH - DAY

TANG CHUYI wakes with a start on a bench, her martial robes frayed at the hem.

TANG XIAOYOU (O.S.)
Mommy, the pigeons are negotiating for your crumbs.

TANG CHUYI
(groggy)
Hmm?

TANG XIAOYOU shakes her shoulder, holding a crumpled lollipop wrapper.

TANG CHUYI (V.O.)
Five years. Why does that night still follow me?

TANG XIAOYOU
Last ration. We can split it, but my half has the flavor.

TANG CHUYI sits up, straightening her faded robes with stubborn pride.
continuation:
TANG CHUYI
Warriors don't split rations, Xiaoyou. They earn them.

TANG XIAOYOU
Grandma's letter said Uncle Cheng earns three meals a day. And a house with a roof.

TANG CHUYI
Your grandmother wants to trade me for stability. I'd rather starve.

TANG XIAOYOU
So... we find the man from your dream?

TANG CHUYI touches the jade pendant beneath her robes.

TANG CHUYI
The man who left this behind. The man with the penthouse. The man who—

TANG XIAOYOU
—doesn't know you exist. Or me.

TANG CHUYI stands, pulling him to his feet.

TANG CHUYI
Then we'll introduce ourselves. Cloud Sword Sect collects debts, not charity.

TANG XIAOYOU
(unwrapping the lollipop)
Shouldn't we eat first? For strength?

He offers it. She takes it, breaks it cleanly in half.

TANG CHUYI
For strength. Now let's go make your father buy us breakfast.

They walk toward the city skyline, sharing the candy between them.

title: The Pampered Junior Sister is Actually a Big Shot
description: Jiang Ruyi, the heir of the Divine Doctor, possesses extraordinary medical skills and hidden wealth. After being tricked by her master into descending the mountain, she becomes entangled with the injured CEO Fu Sinian.
context:
Title: The Pampered Junior Sister is Actually a Big Shot
Description: Jiang Ruyi, the heir of the Divine Doctor, possesses extraordinary medical skills and hidden wealth. After being tricked by her master into descending the mountain, she becomes entangled with the injured CEO Fu Sinian.

INT. MOUNTAIN COURTYARD - DAY

Dried herbs hang from rafters. JIANG RUYI (20s), plain robes, fingers a sprig of ginseng while studying a laptop screen. She sets it down and spreads a white cloth.

Her MASTER (70s, white beard) sleeps on a bamboo couch. Jiang Ruyi produces a silver needle.

She inserts the needle into his neck acupoint.

MASTER
(jolting awake)
The roast chicken—I mean, oh no!

JIANG RUYI
(calmly)
Neck's mobile now. Stop faking.

Master rotates his neck, then springs up with surprising agility.

MASTER
(gleeful)
Finally! That rheumatism had me sleeping like the dead. Heh.

He shuffles toward the laptop. Jiang Ruyi flicks a hairpin. It pins his sleeve to the doorpost. Master yanks free, sheepish.

MASTER
Mid-Autumn's coming. Your mother's family... they sent this.

He tosses her a gray cloth bundle. Inside: a folder labeled "Dingtian Pharmaceutical Group - Inheritance Claim."
continuation:
INT. MOUNTAIN COURTYARD - CONTINUOUS

Jiang Ruyi opens the folder. Her expression hardens.

JIANG RUYI
(quietly)
Father's company...

MASTER
(singsong)
Best deliver it in person!

She looks up, suspicious. A qi formation glows beneath her feet—Master's doing. She vanishes. The folder flutters down. Master catches it, his grin fading to worry.

MASTER
(mutters)
Better down there than hunted up here...

EXT. FOREST - NIGHT

FU SINIAN (30s, blood-soaked shirt) staggers, clutching his side. His ASSISTANT fights off BLACK-SUITED ASSAILANTS.

ASSISTANT
(panting)
President Fu, last one. Stay—shit!

A silver light CRASHES down. Jiang Ruyi materializes, coughing.

JIANG RUYI
That fraud used the mountain's teleportation array—

ASSISTANT
Whoever you are, stand down!

Jiang Ruyi turns. Fu Sinian lunges, seizing her from behind. His grip trembles.

FU SINIAN
(to Assistant)
Hostage. Stand back.

JIANG RUYI
(still)
Your lung is perforated. Six minutes until collapse.

Fu Sinian's arm slackens. She doesn't resist.

INT. COURTYARD - DAY

FLASHBACK: Young Jiang Ruyi (8) watches her father sign papers. He presses a jade pendant into her palm.

FATHER
(young Ruyi's memory)
Protect this, Ruyi. It's the key to everything.

The pendant matches a logo on the Dingtian folder.

EXT. FOREST - NIGHT

Back on Fu Sinian's bleeding arm around her throat. Jiang Ruyi touches his wrist, feeling his pulse.

JIANG RUYI
(softly)
Your qi is in chaos. Let me help, or you'll die before your rescue arrives.

The Assistant hesitates. Fu Sinian's vision blurs. Jiang Ruyi catches him as he collapses.

title: After Ten Years as a Backup, I Leave and She Cries
description: A wealthy heir is betrayed by the woman he loved for seven years, who conspired with her lover to destroy his family. After being killed, he is reborn to the day before their wedding.
context:
Title: After Ten Years as a Backup, I Leave and She Cries
Description: A wealthy heir is betrayed by the woman he loved for seven years, who conspired with her lover to destroy his family. After being killed, he is reborn to the day before their wedding.

INT. STREET - NIGHT

JIANG RAN, once-proud features now hollowed by hunger, claws open a red trash bin.

He extracts a steamed bun in a dirty plastic bag.

Sinking against a tree, he devours it with animal desperation.

A black sedan glides to a silent stop. ZHANG MUQING emerges, three BODYGUARDS flanking him. He opens the rear door.

LIU QING'AN steps out, white satin gown gleaming under streetlights. A diamond necklace—Jiang Ran's first anniversary gift—sparkles at her throat.

They approach. Jiang Ran's hand tightens on the bun.

ZHANG MUQING
The great Young Master Jiang. Scavenging for scraps.

JIANG RAN
(eyes on the necklace)
Qing'an...

LIU QING'AN
Don't. Don't look at me like you still own me.

ZHANG MUQING
He never owned you. He purchased you.

LIU QING'AN
(to Jiang Ran)
That ten-million bride price. The contract that saved my father's company. Did you really think that bought love?

JIANG RAN
(shaken)
You said... you needed time. I waited two years.

LIU QING'AN
Two years of playing the grateful wife while you played the generous husband. How convenient.

She kicks the bun from his hand. It rolls into the gutter.

LIU QING'AN
Every time you touched me, I thought of him. Every time you called me "Mrs. Jiang," I counted the days until I could make you pay for forcing me to betray him.

ZHANG MUQING
We didn't come for sentiment.

LIU QING'AN
No. We came to collect.

The bodyguards seize Jiang Ran's arms, forcing him to his knees.
continuation:
JIANG RAN
(struggling)
The Jiang Group fed your family when you were starving! I funded your patents, Muqing—your entire startup was built on my investment!

ZHANG MUQING
That wasn't investment. That was tribute.

Jiang Ran struggles. A bodyguard twists his arm—sickening CRACK.

JIANG RAN
(screaming)
Qing'an! Seven years—I loved you for seven years!

LIU QING'AN
(icy)
And I hated you for every single day.

She produces a USB drive.

LIU QING'AN
The files from your computer. The bidding documents. All me, Jiang Ran. While you slept, I built our future.

She drops the drive on his trembling body.

LIU QING'AN
Break his hands first. Then his legs. I want him to crawl when he sees our wedding photos.

Jiang Ran explodes with desperate strength, breaking free. He sprints—

Onto the road. A delivery truck BLARES its horn—

Impact. Jiang Ran crumples. Blood pools.

A WOMAN IN WHITE (30s, severe business suit) rushes from a building entrance.

WOMAN IN WHITE
(pressing his wound)
Jiang Ran! Stay with me!

His vision fades on her anguished face.

INT. LUXURY APARTMENT - DAY

Jiang Ran GASPS awake. Drenched in sweat.

He stares at his hands—clean, uncalloused. A gold Patek Philippe on his wrist.

On the laptop: a news broadcast. "Haicheng Financial Daily - October 25, 2017."

His phone BUZZES. A message from "Qing'an": "Tomorrow, my love. Can't wait to be Mrs. Jiang."

Jiang Ran touches his chest—no wound. He looks at the date again.

A slow, cold smile forms.

title: Reborn Heiress Seeks Revenge
description: After dying in a car accident orchestrated by her father and his mistress, a young woman is given a chance to return by a mysterious resurrection system to seek vengeance.
context:
Title: Reborn Heiress Seeks Revenge
Description: After dying in a car accident orchestrated by her father and his mistress, a young woman is given a chance to return by a mysterious resurrection system to seek vengeance.

INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - DAY

A young man clutches the unconscious WEN YAN (22) against his chest, sprinting through fluorescent-lit corridors. His dress shirt is soaked crimson. Nurses scramble.

YOUNG MAN
Doctor! She's crashing!

CLOSE-UP - WEN YAN's face: blood trickles from her temple, her lips parted in a silent gasp.

YOUNG MAN (V.O.)
(whispered, desperate)
Not like this. Not you too.

INT. PURE WHITE SPACE - DAY

WEN YAN lies on a seamless white platform, her hospital gown pristine. She jolts awake, gasping. No wound. No pain. Just endless white.

She touches her temple—finds only smooth skin.

WEN YAN (V.O.)
Mom... the brakes...

WEN YAN
(looking around, disoriented)
Hello?

A FIGURE materializes—TWELVE, wearing a featureless white suit, his face obscured by a shifting digital mask.

TWELVE
(hostile detected)

WEN YAN
What is this place?

TWELVE
A threshold. You're dead, Wen Yan. Three minutes ago, clinically. Your mother's been gone for seven.

WEN YAN
(staggering to her feet)
No. We were just in the car...

TWELVE
Your father's Mercedes T-boned you at the intersection. He'd cut your brake lines. The same accident is being reported as a tragic loss—mother and daughter—leaving him sole heir.

Wen Yan's breath hitches. She doesn't cry—yet. She goes very still.

WEN YAN
(quiet, dangerous)
Liang Mei.

TWELVE
And her children. Your stepbrother now runs Wen Corporation. Your stepsister is auctioning your mother's art collection tonight.

A tremor runs through Wen Yan's hands. She clenches them into fists.

WEN YAN
Then send me back.

TWELVE
I can't. You're legally deceased. Court approved. Burial plot selected.

WEN YAN
(frustrated)
continuation:
You're a resurrection system. Find a loophole.

TWELVE
Exactly. I don't resurrect bodies. I transplant consciousness. A new host. Someone recently deceased. Someone with access.

WEN YAN
(access?)

TWELVE
Liang Mei's daughter. Liang Xue'er. Overdose. Thirty minutes ago. They haven't found her body yet.

WEN YAN
(eyes narrowing)
Her daughter...

TWELVE
Host compatibility: 97%. Her social circle puts you at the auction tonight. At your father's side. But there's a cost.

WEN YAN
Anything.

TWELVE
You inherit her memories. Her guilt. Her addiction. The system suppresses it, but it's there. And if you fail—if they discover you—true death. For both of us.

Wen Yan looks down at her hands. They shimmer, becoming translucent.

WEN YAN
(softly)
Mom wanted me to live.

She looks up, and for the first time, her eyes are dry. Clear. Focused.

WEN YAN
Let's make them pay for both of us.

TWELVE
Transfer initiating. Don't forget—I'm in your head now. Your only ally.

Twelve's mask dissolves into a cascade of code that swirls around Wen Yan. The white space fractures.

INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - DAY [MEMORY]

Wen Yan's POV: The young man from before—her fiancé, SHENG—holding her dying body. His tears fall on her face.

SHENG (V.O.)
I'll find who did this. I swear.

The memory shatters. The white space implodes.

INT. LUXURY PENTHOUSE - NIGHT

WEN YAN'S EYES snap open. But they're not her eyes anymore. She looks at her reflection in a mirrored ceiling—Liang Xue'er's face, pale, with a fading foam at the corner of her mouth.

WEN YAN (V.O.)
(holding back panic)
Mom... give me strength.

She wipes the foam away. Stands. In the penthouse around her: designer clothes, a family photo—Liang Mei smiling with Chen Dongjie, their perfect family.

WEN YAN
(to herself, testing the voice)
Time for introductions.

She smiles. It's Liang Xue'er's smile. But the hatred behind it is pure Wen Yan.

FADE OUT.

title: The Concubine Enters, I Remarry and Become Empress
description: On her wedding night, a noblewoman's husband is summoned away by the palace. Three years later, he returns with a concubine and child, forcing her to make a life-changing decision.
context:
Title: The Concubine Enters, I Remarry and Become Empress
