LU ZHIXIA exits just as GU CIYUAN (President of Gu Corporation) turns the corner ahead, flanked by BODYGUARDS. His secretary LINA holds a tablet. MENG WAN'ER trails behind, phone in hand, eyes widening.

GU CIYUAN
Stop her.

The guards move forward. LU ZHIXIA freezes.

GU CIYUAN
(to Lina, low)
The tip was accurate. Get the security footage.

MENG WAN'ER
(stepping forward, voice saccharine)
Zhixia, I tried to stop you. Drugging Shen Ci like this—it'll destroy the Gu family's reputation.

From inside the room, SHEN CI's slurred voice:

SHEN CI (O.S.)
No... she didn't... we were just...

LINA
Sir, he's conscious. Should we call medical?

GU CIYUAN
(eyes on Lu Zhixia, cold)
Arrest him. Possession of controlled substances.

GU CIYUAN takes a step closer to LU ZHIXIA, his voice dropping.

GU CIYUAN
Tell me I was wrong about you.

LU ZHIXIA meets his gaze. Her hands tremble. She blinks—once, twice—tears welling despite her control.

INT. OUTDOORS - NIGHT (FLASHBACK)

ON SCREEN: The Previous Life

GU CIYUAN holds a younger LU ZHIXIA in his arms. Rain pours down. Her face is pale, blood on her lips.

GU CIYUAN (V.O.)
I found you too late. Always too late.

INT. CAR - NIGHT (FLASHBACK)

GU CIYUAN (V.O.)
If I'd been braver... would you have chosen me?

A hand goes limp. The car fills with engine exhaust.

END FLASHBACK.

INT. HOTEL CORRIDOR - PRESENT

GU CIYUAN
Lu Zhixia. Do you have anything to say?

LU ZHIXIA looks up at him, tears streaming down her face. She walks toward him, each step deliberate. The bodyguards shift uncertainly. MENG WAN'ER inhales sharply.

LU ZHIXIA stops before GU CIYUAN. She looks up at him—seeing him, truly seeing him, for the first time in both lives.

Under everyone's astonished gaze, LU ZHIXIA stands on her toes and kisses GU CIYUAN.

title: Young Zhang Bei (Episode 63)
description: A young prodigy of the Zhang family demonstrates his appraisal skills as a Japanese master arrives to challenge the Eight Great Families.
context:
Title: Young Zhang Bei (Episode 63)
Description: A young prodigy of the Zhang family demonstrates his appraisal skills as a Japanese master arrives to challenge the Eight Great Families.

EXT. ANCIENT TOWN - DAY

NEWS BROADCAST (V.O.)
Word spreads: Hikawa Daiyuu, master appraiser from across the sea, has returned to Great Xia with a declaration to test the Eight Great Families. Yesterday, he swept three houses in a single day, leaving none unbested.

QI ZHENGYANG walks along the streets, his calloused fingers twitching with quiet fury.

QI ZHENGYANG
This foreign thief's ambition grows bolder with every step on our soil.

NEWS BROADCAST (V.O.)
This very morning, Hikawa Daiyuu and his disciples entered Suzhou. Whispers say the Zhang family stands next in his path.

QI ZHENGYANG arrives at a courtyard where a growing crowd watches a lean young man at an antique-laden table.

ZHANG BEI threads a silk cord through two seals, pulling it taut. The seals dance—spinning, stopping, reversing—in a blur of controlled motion.

ONLOOKER A
Dragon Rope Circling Treasure... he's actually doing it.

ONLOOKER B
My grandfather spoke of this technique. Thought it was a legend.

ONLOOKER C
Can a child truly master what masters spend decades learning?

Qi Zhengyang's eyes narrow. This is a test.

QI ZHENGYANG
(calling out)
Han Dynasty goldsmiths left their copper hollow!

ZHANG BEI
(without looking up)
Hollow from trapped air during casting. Genuine seals should feel light above, heavy below.

The spinning seal trembles—ever so slightly—then rights itself. Zhang Bei smiles.

ZHANG BEI
This one spins too true. The forger made it solid.

He flicks his wrist. The seal arcs down and shatters against the table.

ONLOOKER D
Stone dust! It was only pressed clay!

ONLOOKER E
The boy saw through it mid-spin...

ONLOOKER A
Zhang family's legacy is safe.

ONLOOKER B
continuation:
(quieter, to his companion)
But at what cost? He hasn't slept in two days.

Qi Zhengyang steps forward, presenting an ebony box.

QI ZHENGYANG
For your art. Imperial-grade pearl powder—rare as dragon's breath.

ZHANG BEI
For my mother's brushes. She'll need another.

QI ZHENGYANG
(startled, then understanding)
You're preparing for a siege. Hikawa comes tomorrow.

ZHANG BEI
(softly)
She'll paint whether I win or lose. I'd rather she paints joy.

Qi Zhengyang produces a small silk pouch.

QI ZHENGYANG
Three-hundred-year-old saffron. For tea. For strength.

Zhang Bei leans close.

ZHANG BEI
(whispering)
Both seals were false. I broke the cheaper one to keep the crowd calm.

QI ZHENGYANG
(stunned)
The genuine danger hides in plain sight?

ZHANG BEI
(laughing, suddenly a boy again)
You need sharper eyes, old friend!

He sprints toward the alley, youthful energy restored. Qi Zhengyang stares at the remaining seal.

A distant GONG echoes—three sharp notes from the Zhang family compound.

SERVANT'S VOICE (V.O.)
Young Master! The Elder Council summons you! Now!

ZHANG BEI
(calling back)
Tell them I'm coming! And tell Mother the pearl powder is real!

He vanishes into the twisting lanes. Qi Zhengyang watches the retreating figure, his shock melting into something like hope.

QI ZHENGYANG
(to himself)
With this young general defending the Zhang family... Hikawa Daiyuu will find his iron plate. Heh heh heh...

He pockets the seal with a faint smile.

title: The Abandoned Girl
description: A young girl is left behind when her parents divorce, each refusing to take responsibility for her.
context:
Title: The Abandoned Girl
Description: A young girl is left behind when her parents divorce, each refusing to take responsibility for her.

INT. CIVIL AFFAIRS BUREAU - DAY

A young girl, SHEN WANQIU, wears a yellow floral shirt and stands alone, her expression carefully blank.

CLOSE-UP - A divorce certificate being stamped with "DIVORCED BY MUTUAL CONSENT."

CLERK (V.O.)
Your marriage is now terminated.

Shen Wanqiu's father, ZHAO JINBAO, and mother, GAO YUE, turn from the counter. Both glance at Wanqiu, then look away, pained.

SHEN WANQIU
(following)
Dad, Mom... can't we go home together?

GAO YUE
(quietly firm)
I can't breathe in that house anymore. You follow him.

ZHAO JINBAO
(defensive)
You wanted this. You take her.

GAO YUE
(angrily)
You never once went to her appointments!

ZHAO JINBAO
(sharp)
And you never missed a chance to remind me what she cost us!

They lock eyes—mutual resentment and guilt. Then they turn and walk in opposite directions, leaving SHEN WANQIU rooted in place.
continuation:
EXT. PARKING LOT - NIGHT

ZHAO JINBAO gets into a black sedan. Through the window, he looks back once. Then he drives away.

GAO YUE stands alone, trembling. She throws her purse down.

Suddenly, thunder crashes and heavy rain pours down.

SHEN WANQIU runs to GAO YUE and tugs her coat.

SHEN WANQIU
Mom, I'm scared.

GAO YUE turns. For a moment, her face softens. She hums a lullaby.

SHEN WANQIU
(confused)
Mom... I can't hear it. Not in my right ear.

The humming stops. GAO YUE's expression hardens—not with cruelty, but with a kind of breaking.

GAO YUE
(whispered)
Neither of us knows how to do this.

She walks to her white sedan. SHEN WANQIU follows.

SHEN WANQIU
Mom?

GAO YUE gets in and locks the doors. SHEN WANQIU runs to the window, pressing her palm to the glass.

SHEN WANQIU
(pleading)
Mom, please. I'll be good.

Inside, GAO YUE looks at the small hand. Her own hand mirrors it, stopping halfway. Her voice is flat.

GAO YUE
He left first. Why should I be the one to stay?

The car pulls away. SHEN WANQIU runs after it, slips, and falls into a puddle.

FLASHBACK AND VOICEOVER

SHEN WANQIU in slow motion. Underneath, fragmented memory:

ZHAO JINBAO (V.O.)
—another specialist bill I can't pay—

GAO YUE (V.O.)
—you missed the diagnosis again—

ZHAO JINBAO (V.O.)
—not my fault she was born this way—

GAO YUE (V.O.)
—she's eight years old, Jinbao—

ZHAO JINBAO (V.O.)
—some kids are just behind—

BACK TO REALITY

SHEN WANQIU lies in the downpour, soaked through. She curls into herself and hums the lullaby.

SHEN WANQIU
(quietly)
Don't abandon me... don't abandon me...

The rain intensifies. The humming continues, barely audible beneath the thunder.

title: Master Chuan's Sweet Wife with Good Fortune
description: A young woman working undercover to expose cheating husbands crosses paths with a wealthy CEO trying to escape his grandmother's matchmaking schemes.
context:
Title: Master Chuan's Sweet Wife with Good Fortune
Description: A young woman working undercover to expose cheating husbands crosses paths with a wealthy CEO trying to escape his grandmother's matchmaking schemes.

INT. BAR - NIGHT

A young woman (WU WANWEI) wearing a sailor school uniform walks into a stylishly decorated but empty bar. She has her hair in twin braids, looking innocent and pure.

A greasy middle-aged man (MR. LIU) sits by the bar counter in a striped suit. Seeing WU WANWEI, he reveals a greedy smile.

WU WANWEI walks up to him with a smile.

WU WANWEI
College Student

WU WANWEI
You're looking sharp, Mr. Liu.

MR. LIU
Mr. Liu

MR. LIU
(standing up with a laugh)
The view just got a whole lot better.

MR. LIU approaches, placing his hand inappropriately on WU WANWEI's shoulder, then sliding it to her waist, attempting to kiss her neck. WU WANWEI appears compliant on the surface, but her eyes flash with alertness—and something colder beneath.

A miniature camera hidden behind a bottle flashes a red light.

HENCHMAN (O.S.)
Mr. Liu! Your wife is pulling up!

MR. LIU is shocked and immediately releases WU WANWEI.

MR. LIU
Damn!

MR. LIU
(to WU WANWEI)
Wait here. I mean it.

MR. LIU runs off in panic. The smile on WU WANWEI's face immediately disappears, becoming cold and stern. She shudders once, then walks to the bar counter and retrieves the hidden camera.

A HENCHMAN walks over and discovers her action.

HENCHMAN
What's that? Hey—

The HENCHMAN grabs WU WANWEI's arm. WU WANWEI counters with an over-the-shoulder throw, slamming him hard to the ground.

HENCHMAN
(in pain)
You bitch—!

WU WANWEI turns and runs.

HENCHMAN
(struggling to his feet)
Don't let her leave! Now!
continuation:
EXT. CITY - DAY

Aerial shot of the city's towering skyscrapers piercing through morning mist.

INT. OFFICE - DAY

SHENG YANCHUAN, a handsome man wearing gold-rimmed glasses, sits at a luxurious desk reviewing documents. The weariness in his eyes contradicts his polished appearance.

SHENG YANCHUAN
Sheng Group CEO

SPECIAL ASSISTANT SUN rushes in hurriedly.

SPECIAL ASSISTANT SUN
Sheng Yanchuan's Assistant

SPECIAL ASSISTANT SUN
Mr. Sheng. The Old Madam's here—two candidates in tow. She's blocking all exits. Says this blind date is non-negotiable.

SHENG YANCHUAN puts down his pen and stands up, his jaw tight.

SHENG YANCHUAN
Delay her. I'll find my own exit.

SHENG YANCHUAN quickly leaves the office.

INT. SUBWAY STATION/SUBWAY CAR - DAY

WU WANWEI runs down the escalator breathlessly, entering the subway station. Two men chase after her relentlessly.

She rushes into a subway car about to close its doors. The two pursuing men are shut outside, only able to watch helplessly as the subway departs.

WU WANWEI breathes a sigh of relief and notices a yellow delivery worker's vest and helmet left on a seat. She quickly puts on the vest, helmet, and mask, disguising herself as a delivery worker.

The two men chasing her walk over from another car, searching for WU WANWEI in the car, but don't recognize her in disguise and walk right past.

The subway reaches the station and the doors open. WU WANWEI immediately gets off.

The two men react, but the doors have already closed. They're trapped on the train and can only angrily pound on the window.

HENCHMAN
(muffled)
We're not done!

WU WANWEI stands on the platform, watching the departing subway and waves goodbye, her hand trembling slightly.

INT. SUBWAY PLATFORM - DAY

WU WANWEI removes the delivery worker's equipment and takes out her phone to check. The screen displays a bank text message showing she has received a 3000 yuan transfer.

WU WANWEI
(talking to herself, hollow smile)
Another family saved.

She shows a satisfied smile that doesn't quite reach her eyes.

title: Return to the Homeland
description: A top scientist decides to go abroad to advance his research on controlled nuclear fusion, facing accusations of betrayal while believing he serves his country's greater interests.
context:
Title: Return to the Homeland
Description: A top scientist decides to go abroad to advance his research on controlled nuclear fusion, facing accusations of betrayal while believing he serves his country's greater interests.

EXT. DESERT RESEARCH BASE - DAY

In the vast desert stands a research base composed of prefabricated buildings, sandblasted and worn. Scavenged equipment parts lie beside a rusted perimeter fence. A faded DAXIA NATIONAL FLAG flaps tiredly in the hot wind.

INT. EXPERIMENT CONTROL ROOM - DAY

Red alarm lights flash. Scientists in white protective suits work frantically. A whiteboard in the corner shows 343 red X's - failed experiments.

Gu Sen (30s, intense, exhausted) watches the reactor through protective glass. His hands tremble slightly.

A scientist pulls down a massive circuit breaker with force.

The entire control room shakes violently. Equipment emits smoke. Scientists stumble.

Silence, except for the HISS of cooling systems shutting down.

Gu Sen stares at the dead reactor. His knuckles are white on the console.

GU SEN
(quietly)
The containment field collapsed at fourteen seconds.

PROFESSOR JIN (60s, fatherly, weary) removes his protective goggles. His face is etched with decades of disappointment.

PROFESSOR JIN
The power couplings failed again. Same as last month.

Gu Sen picks up a melted component from the floor.

GU SEN
Moguo solved this two years ago. Their alloy specifications are classified.

Wang Youde (40s, pragmatic, protective) steps forward, his boots crunching on glass.

WANG YOUDE
Emols University invited you. I saw the letter.

SENIOR BROTHER (Late 30s, loyal, anxious) glances between them.

SENIOR BROTHER
Joint research program. With tech sharing. But...

WANG YOUDE
But it's a trap. You go, you'll be their poster boy. "Defecting Daxian genius." I've seen it before.

PROFESSOR JIN
Gu Sen, your work is here. With us.

Gu Sen looks at the whiteboard. At the 343 failures.

GU SEN
My work is nuclear fusion. Not geography.

SENIOR BROTHER
(pleading)
Junior Brother, they'll call you a traitor. Your parents...

GU SEN
My parents survived the Energy Crisis of '28. They know what happens when Daxia falls behind.

Wang Youde slams his hand on a table.

WANG YOUDE
And when you come back with nothing? When they keep the real tech for themselves? You'll just be another dog who bit his own tail.

PROFESSOR JIN
That's enough!

The room falls silent.

PROFESSOR JIN
(thoughtfully, to himself)
continuation:
Forty years ago, I watched our first reactor fail. Same desert. Same excuses. "Make do." "Be patient." We lost a generation to those words.

He turns to Gu Sen, eyes sharp.

PROFESSOR JIN
What if they don't let you publish? What if you disappear into a Moguo lab for ten years?

GU SEN
Then I'll send every note, every failure, every hypothesis back to you. Through the private channels. Through the diplomatic pouch. Through any means.

Professor Jin pulls out an old notebook from his coat. Its pages are yellowed.

PROFESSOR JIN
I kept this from my own time abroad. Before the blockade tightened. The last viable exchange we had with Moguo.

He holds it out to Gu Sen.

PROFESSOR JIN
If I sponsor your appointment... if I accompany you as a visiting scholar... we retain Daxian oversight. Officially.

Gu Sen stares at him.

GU SEN
Professor, your reputation...

PROFESSOR JIN
My reputation is an old man's vanity. Your future is Daxia's future.

Wang Youde turns away, his jaw tight.

SENIOR BROTHER
Professor... you're risking everything.

PROFESSOR JIN
We already have.

(he looks around the broken room)
We risk everything every day we refuse to change.

Gu Sen takes the notebook. Their hands meet.

GU SEN
(softly)
Thank you.

Professor Jin squeezes his hand, then releases.

PROFESSOR JIN
The War God Hall will review this. They'll want assurances. Plausible deniability.

WANG YOUDE
(coldly)
They'll want a scapegoat if it fails.

PROFESSOR JIN
Then let me be the scapegoat. Gu Sen carries enough.

Gu Sen starts to protest. Professor Jin stops him with a look.

PROFESSOR JIN
Go home. Tell your parents you'll be teaching. Nothing more.

Gu Sen nods, clutching the notebook. He turns toward the door.

Wang Youde watches him go, his expression unreadable. He pulls out his phone, scrolls through headlines: "ANOTHER DAXIAN SCIENTIST MISSING ABROAD."

SENIOR BROTHER
(quietly)
What if he's right?

Wang Youde doesn't answer. He just pockets the phone.

FADE OUT.

END OF SCRIPT

title: Homecoming
description: After seven years building an empire in Africa, Li Xu returns to Yun City as one of the continent's most successful entrepreneurs, ready to repay his debts and confront the family he left behind.
context:
Title: Homecoming
Description: After seven years building an empire in Africa, Li Xu returns to Yun City as one of the continent's most successful entrepreneurs, ready to repay his debts and confront the family he left behind.

EXT. CITY BOULEVARD - DAY

A convoy of black luxury sedans glides through morning traffic. The vehicles move with precision, commanding the road.

The lead car turns toward a gleaming convention center.

EXT. CONVENTION CENTER PLAZA - DAY

MAYOR OF YUN CITY waits with local OFFICIALS and BUSINESS LEADERS. Bodyguards flank the reception line. The atmosphere is taut with expectation.

MAYOR OF YUN CITY
(to an aide, low)
This investment is everything. No mistakes today.

The convoy enters the plaza. Sunlight flashes off tinted windows.

Inside the car, LI XU touches a simple steel watch against his expensive cuff.

A YOUNG BYSTANDER films from the crowd's edge.

The cars stop. Bodyguards exit first. One opens Li Xu's door.

Li Xu emerges. Beige suit, sunglasses. He surveys the waiting officials like a stranger in his own hometown.

A WOMAN approaches with flowers.

MAYOR OF YUN CITY
(beaming)
Mr. Li! Yun City welcomes you. We've prepared a conference—

LI XU
(removes sunglasses)
Seven years.
(beat)
Before conferences, I see my mother. And my daughter.

The mayor's smile falters. He wasn't briefed on a child.

FLASHBACK
continuation:
EXT. OLD TRAIN PLATFORM - DAY

The image dissolves into memory.

YOUNG LI XU kneels on cracked concrete, travel bag beside him. His mother ZHANG GUIFANG holds a sleeping toddler—LI MEI. Uncle LI GUANGZU stands apart, arms crossed. Cousin LI XING hovers.

YOUNG LI XU
(to Li Guangzu)
Uncle. Please. Take care of them.

LI GUANGZU
Africa?
(snorts)
Send what you can. Don't dream too big.

YOUNG LI XU
(to his mother, voice breaking)
Mom... I'll make this right.

ZHANG GUIFANG
(holding back tears)
Just make it back.

Li Xu kisses his daughter's forehead. She stirs, reaches a small hand toward his face.

LI XING
Keep the phone charged, brother.

YOUNG LI XU
(stands)
I'll make you proud.

He walks toward the train. Doesn't look back.

END FLASHBACK

EXT. CONVENTION CENTER PLAZA - DAY

Li Xu stands motionless. The flowers remain unaccepted.

LI XU
(to Mayor)
The old district. Now.

Li Xu's hand tightens on the worn strap of his bag—the same simple bag, now leather-patched but intact.

His expression reveals nothing. But his knuckles are white with the weight of seven years.

title: The Matriarch Seeks Divorce (Episode 81)
description: A matriarch faces challenges from her husband's family as she prepares for his return home.
context:
Title: The Matriarch Seeks Divorce (Episode 81)
Description: A matriarch faces challenges from her husband's family as she prepares for his return home.

INT. MARQUIS MANOR MAIN HALL - DAY

CHU WANQING walks briskly into the main hall, her confident stride checking slightly when she sees Zhang Shi already at Grandmother's ear.

CHU WANQING
Grandmother, I heard my husband is coming back.

ZHANG SHI stands beside GRANDMOTHER, looking displeased.

ZHANG SHI
(coldly)
The Marquis is coming back. Here is the list. Look it over carefully and make the necessary arrangements to welcome the Marquis home.

LINGDANG steps forward to receive the list.

LINGDANG
(checking the list, surprised)
Replace the tiles and doors? We just replaced them during New Year's, and it hasn't even been half a year. And this menu, even a state banquet wouldn't be this extravagant.

ZHANG SHI
(suddenly steps forward and slaps LINGDANG)
Lowly dog!

LINGDANG
(covering her face, shocked--but her jaw sets)

ZHANG SHI
(sternly)
Is it your place to speak here?

GRANDMOTHER
(calmly)
Wanqing, this maid from your family home is far too insolent.
continuation:
ZHANG SHI
If she doesn't know her place, it doesn't matter. Just sell her off and replace her with someone who does.

CHU WANQING
(frozen for a breath, her voice tight)
Grandmother. Lingdang knows she was wrong.

CHU WANQING
(to LINGDANG)
Lingdang, apologize.

ZHANG SHI
Kneel down!

LINGDANG reluctantly kneels, her posture stiff with suppressed fury.

GRANDMOTHER
I won't hold it against an insolent maid. I'll just ask you this: should this money be spent or not?

CHU WANQING
(hesitating briefly, then--a faint, mirthless smile)
It should. A Marquis deserves a home that reflects his station.

GRANDMOTHER
Good that you know. Go make the preparations.

CHU WANQING
Yes.

CHU WANQING leaves with LINGDANG.

ZHANG SHI
(supporting GRANDMOTHER)
Truly, the master is reflected in the servant. A mere slave dares to talk back to the Grand Madam. She must have been influenced by Lady Chu. Merchant families are just so vulgar. You can't make silk from a sow's ear.

GRANDMOTHER
(cold smile)
No need to be anxious. Even if mud can't stick to the wall, it doesn't matter. Our Marquis Manor will soon welcome a true lady of noble birth. When that happens, she'll be more anxious than anyone.

title: Movie Queen, Your Husband's Persona Has Collapsed
description: A former award-winning actress is betrayed by her husband and his new star during a film shoot, leading to a tragic end in the snow.
context:
Title: Movie Queen, Your Husband's Persona Has Collapsed
Description: A former award-winning actress is betrayed by her husband and his new star during a film shoot, leading to a tragic end in the snow.

EXT. VILLA SNOW FIELD - NIGHT

Heavy snow falls. Outside a villa glowing with warm light, a vintage street lamp is covered in white snow.

A STUNT COORDINATOR falls from the second-floor balcony into a snowdrift, shouting about a faulty harness. The camera shakes.

A BEST FRIEND rushes out from the villa, chasing after MENG GE.

BEST FRIEND
Meng Ge, the medic said your hands can't grip in this cold!

MENG GE, wearing a thin dress, stands by a fire basin in the center of the snowy ground, holding a dagger, her expression empty.

MENG GE
Then I'll hold on tighter.

She stabs. The blade - weighted wrong, cold steel - sinks in before she can register. Shock floods her face.

MENG GE
(gasping)
...weighted...

The BEST FRIEND looks at her in horror, then at the crew already packing the last gear.

MENG GE lies in the snow, trembling.

DIRECTOR (O.S.)
Cut! Exterior unit wrapped! Report to main set!

The crew members finish loading, departing. The courtyard is silent.

MENG GE whispers weakly.

MENG GE
It was... supposed to be retractable...

XIA WAN and GU YUAN walk over sharing a black umbrella. XIA WAN wears a thick down jacket, her makeup exquisite.

XIA WAN
Sister's commitment to authenticity is... total.

MENG GE looks at them, comprehension replacing agony.

MENG GE
(struggling)
The accident rider... pays out personally...

GU YUAN crouches down, gently stroking MENG GE's cheek, his eyes cold.

GU YUAN
Death by misadventure. You're worth more to me dead than alive.

MENG GE
(in disbelief)
...ten years... for a payout?

GU YUAN
Don't take it personally. It's just insurance.

XIA WAN
We both thank you, Sister. For the legacy.

MENG GE
(agitated)
...my signature... forged?
continuation:
GU YUAN
Amended. You were medicated, remember?

MENG GE
(grief-stricken)
...my phone... records...

GU YUAN
We have it.

He holds up her phone - already wiped.

XIA WAN
Don't worry, Sister. We'll tell your story beautifully.

MENG GE
(weak smile)
...not my story... yours...

She taps her smartwatch - a livestream notification pops up on Gu Yuan's phone: "Meng Ge: Behind the Scenes" - 100K viewers.

GU YUAN
(quietly)
Cancel it.

XIA WAN
How?

GU YUAN
(to MENG GE)
End the stream.

MENG GE
(desperately)
Too late... it's in the cloud...

GU YUAN
Then we find it.

He stands, pulling Xia Wan away. They rush to their car, leaving her.

EXT. VILLA SNOW FIELD - LATER

SHEN NAN runs anxiously into the courtyard.

SHEN NAN
Xiao Ge!

He sees MENG GE's smartwatch, still streaming. He discovers her in the snow.

SHEN NAN rushes over and holds MENG GE in his arms.

SHEN NAN
Xiao Ge! Stay with me!

MENG GE slowly opens her eyes.

MENG GE
(barely breathing)
Shen Nan... did it save?

SHEN NAN
The stream? It's everywhere.

MENG GE
Then I didn't... lose everything...

After speaking, MENG GE's head tilts to the side, and she breathes her last.

FADE OUT.

title: Loop & Call Through Time
description: A mother receives a mysterious phone call from her deceased daughter five years in the past, giving her a chance to prevent the tragedy that took her child's life.
context:
Title: Loop & Call Through Time
Description: A mother receives a mysterious phone call from her deceased daughter five years in the past, giving her a chance to prevent the tragedy that took her child's life.

EXT. PSYCHOLOGY CONSULTATION ROOM - DAY

On screen: Year 2024.

SHEN QING sits at the table, a cracked phone clutched in white-knuckled fingers.

SHEN QING
She's been gone five years.

SHEN QING
(quietly)
I could've saved her. That night—

PROFESSOR YANG sits across from her, pen poised over a notepad.

PROFESSOR YANG
How?

SHEN QING places the dead phone on the table between them.

SHEN QING
This phone. It took me back. Five years—to that night.

PROFESSOR YANG
Miss Shen, you understand how that sounds.

INT. LIVING ROOM - NIGHT (FLASHBACK)

On screen: October 1, 2019, 21:55.

Little girl SHEN NIAN sits on the sofa, holding a doll, phone pressed tight.

SHEN NIAN
Mom, it's National Day. Everyone's home but us.
continuation:
INT. CONFERENCE ROOM - NIGHT (FLASHBACK)

SHEN QING, wearing professional attire, paces while talking on the phone. Colleagues wait in the background.

SHEN QING
I know, baby. Tomorrow—first thing.

INT. LIVING ROOM - NIGHT (FLASHBACK)

SHEN NIAN
But...

A shadow spills under the door, stretching across the carpet.

INT. CONFERENCE ROOM - NIGHT (FLASHBACK)

SHEN QING glances toward the meeting table.

SHEN QING
Meeting's starting. I have to go.

INT. LIVING ROOM - NIGHT (FLASHBACK)

SHEN NIAN
Mom, there's—

The call drops. SHEN NIAN stares at the dark hallway, doll squeezed tight. She steps forward.

The door bursts open. A man fills the frame.

SHEN NIAN
(softly)
...Daddy?

He lunges. The doll hits the floor.

SHEN NIAN
(screaming)
Mom! Mom!

On screen: 21:59.

INT. BEDROOM - NIGHT

SHEN QING wakes from a nightmare, gasping for air. On screen: October 1, 2024, 22:00.

Her HUSBAND is awakened.

HUSBAND
Same nightmare? It's been five years, Qing. Let me get you some water.

HUSBAND gets out of bed. SHEN QING sits up, clutching her smartphone—the wallpaper: SHEN NIAN's last school photo.

SHEN QING
(crying)
You'd be thirteen now. Almost as tall as me.

Suddenly, a childish ringtone sounds.

RINGTONE (V.O.)
Mom, your baby is calling, if you don't answer I'm going to be mad.

SHEN QING freezes. Following the sound, she searches through a storage box beside the bed. From a pile of stuffed animals, she finds the old phone. Its screen glows: incoming call from "Baby Niannian."

SHEN QING
(to herself)
Five years dead. Now it's ringing.

She answers with a trembling thumb.

SHEN QING
...Hello?

Her daughter's voice from five years ago comes through static.

SHEN NIAN (V.O.)
Mom, everyone else is on holiday for National Day, why aren't you coming home?

SHEN QING's face drains of color. The phone slips in her grip.

SHEN QING
(shocked)
Niannian?

title: Heartbeat Transgression
description: Jiang Qiao discovers her fiancé's betrayal at his birthday party, shattering her belief in their childhood engagement and perfect love.
context:
Title: Heartbeat Transgression
Description: Jiang Qiao discovers her fiancé's betrayal at his birthday party, shattering her belief in their childhood engagement and perfect love.

INT. BANQUET HALL - DAY

JIANG QIAO, dressed in an elegant gown, looks around the room.

JIANG QIAO (V.O.)
Twenty years of practice. I still can't tell if this necklace is a promise or a noose.

Several FEMALE GUESTS gather together, holding wine glasses and gossiping.

GUEST A
That heirloom's basically a down payment. Non-refundable.

GUEST B
Childhood engagement? More like a business contract with better PR.

GUEST C
They look right together, though. Shame about the rumors.

GUEST D
Hush. She's right there.

LIN YIN, Jiang Qiao's college classmate, holds a wine glass, watching the distance with complex emotions.

GUEST C
Must be nice. Marrying into that kind of security.

PEI YUNXIAO walks toward JIANG QIAO.

JIANG QIAO (V.O.)
Keep breathing. That's all happiness is anyway.

PEI YUNXIAO takes JIANG QIAO's hand. They walk together to center stage as GUESTS applaud.

PEI YUNXIAO and JIANG QIAO stand still. He waves to the GUESTS.

PEI YUNXIAO
Thank you all for celebrating today. On this occasion, I'm grateful to confirm what many have expected—Miss Jiang Qiao and I will marry this autumn.

GUESTS applaud again, offering congratulations.

GUEST A
Second Young Master Pei, always so traditional!

JIANG QIAO stands beside him, her expression gradually freezing.

The scene becomes dreamlike. Images of GUESTS raising their glasses in celebration overlap with JIANG QIAO's lonely figure.

JIANG QIAO (V.O.)
I thought I was building a life. Turns out I was just decorating a cage.

Tears well up in JIANG QIAO's eyes.
continuation:
EXT. BANQUET HALL GARDEN - NIGHT

JIANG QIAO stands alone in the garden, looking sad.

LIN YIN (O.S.)
Quite the performance. Though I wonder—were you acting for them, or yourself?

The camera turns to a corner where PEI YUNXIAO and LIN YIN are embracing intimately.

PEI YUNXIAO
She's starting to suspect. I saw her checking my phone.

LIN YIN
And yet you still invited me. How reckless.

PEI YUNXIAO
Father's watching. This has to look authentic.

LIN YIN
Authentic. Is that what we are?

PEI YUNXIAO
(quietly bitter)
She's a debt my father owes. You're the choice I made. Even if neither of you can ever know.

JIANG QIAO hides behind a tree, hearing the entire conversation, tears streaming down her face.

LIN YIN
Your little fiancée—what would she do if she found out?

PEI YUNXIAO
She'd stay. Where else would she go?

LIN YIN
You're so certain.

PEI YUNXIAO
I'm necessary.

They kiss—not passionate, but desperate. JIANG QIAO watches this scene in pain.

Suddenly, a hand covers JIANG QIAO's mouth from behind, and another hand covers her eyes. It's PEI ZHIHONG.

PEI ZHIHONG
(whispering)
You can confront them. Or survive them. Choose.

JIANG QIAO, teary-eyed, nods once.

PEI ZHIHONG removes his hands, putting an arm around JIANG QIAO's shoulder, leading her away.

In the distant corridor, two PAPARAZZI are frantically taking photos of PEI YUNXIAO and LIN YIN kissing with their cameras.

title: After Pregnancy! Crying Red Eyes! Miss Shen Won't Look Back (Episode 64)
description: A famous masked singer gives up her career to care for her blind husband, only to discover a shocking betrayal when his sight is restored.
context:
Title: After Pregnancy! Crying Red Eyes! Miss Shen Won't Look Back (Episode 64)
Description: A famous masked singer gives up her career to care for her blind husband, only to discover a shocking betrayal when his sight is restored.

INT. CONCERT STAGE - NIGHT

SHEN QINGYU wears a white wedding dress and an ornate white mask, singing emotionally under the spotlight. The background music is a melancholic song.

SHEN QINGYU
(singing)
Who makes your heart flutter, who makes your heart ache.

INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - DAY

THREE DAYS AGO

A DOCTOR and SHEN QINGYU stand at a ward door, looking through the round window.

DOCTOR
He's refusing treatment. Won't let anyone within six feet.

INT. HOSPITAL WARD - DAY

GU MINGXUAN sits in a wheelchair, his eyes and wrists wrapped in bandages, his head turned toward the window.

INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - DAY

The DOCTOR pushes GU MINGXUAN's wheelchair down the corridor. SHEN QINGYU follows, carrying a small whiteboard.

GU MINGXUAN
(coldly)
Get out. I don't want anyone.

SHEN QINGYU stops, writes quickly on the board, and holds it up: "I'm mute. Not a threat."

GU MINGXUAN
(furious)
I said GET OUT!

He swings his arm, knocking the whiteboard from SHEN QINGYU's hands.

INT. CONCERT STAGE - NIGHT

SHEN QINGYU's fingers tremble on the microphone as she continues singing.

INT. HOSPITAL WARD - NIGHT

SHEN QINGYU retrieves the whiteboard. She writes slowly, then holds it before GU MINGXUAN's bandaged eyes: "I'll be your eyes."

She takes his hand. He pulls away, but she gently persists, tracing letters on his palm.

INT. CONCERT STAGE - NIGHT

The song reaches its climax. The fans below go wild with cheers.

FANS
Diva! Diva!

SHEN QINGYU bows. The LED screen behind her displays: "The Final Note - Thank You."

FAN A
One more song! Please!

FAN B
We love you, whoever you are!

NARRATOR (news broadcast)
The mysterious diva vanishes. Her identity remains unknown.

On stage, SHEN QINGYU removes her mask, revealing her face only to the empty air above the audience. No cameras capture this moment. Tears fall.

SHEN QINGYU (V.O.)
Brother Pudding. Little Bottle Cap is coming home.
continuation:
EXT. PARK - DAY

SEVEN YEARS LATER

SHEN QINGYU wears a simple cotton dress, walking with a smile. Her daughter WEIWEI (6) skips beside her.

EXT. PLAZA - DAY

A group of fans hold up a giant poster: "The Masked Diva: 7 Years of Searching."

FAN C
Seven years and we still don't know her name!

FAN D
We'll keep looking. She's out there.

SHEN QINGYU stops at a distance, watching. Weiwei tugs her sleeve.

WEIWEI
Mommy, why are you staring? Do you like masked singers too?

SHEN QINGYU smiles, shakes her head. She pulls out a small notebook, writes: "Legends never fade."

She shows it to the fans as they pass.

FAN D
(nodding)
That's beautiful, thank you.

A fan hands Shen Qingyu a bunny ear headband.

FAN C
For good luck.

SHEN QINGYU accepts it, placing it on Weiwei's head.

EXT. PARK PATH - DAY

SHEN QINGYU and WEIWEI walk hand in hand. WEIWEI wears the bunny ears.

WEIWEI
Mommy, will Daddy really see us tomorrow?

SHEN QINGYU
(gently)
The doctor confirmed it three times.

WEIWEI
(happily)
Then he'll see me dance! And see YOU!

SHEN QINGYU's hand drifts to her belly. A small smile plays on her lips.

SHEN QINGYU (V.O.)
Seven years of silence. Tomorrow, I'll sing again.

EXT. PARK - OTHER SIDE - DAY

GU MINGXUAN stands in a sharp suit. A DOCTOR removes the final bandage.

WEIWEI
(pointing)
Look! Daddy's bandages are off!

GU MINGXUAN opens his eyes. Blinks. Focuses.

His gaze finds SHEN QINGYU and WEIWEI. His smile begins, then freezes.

He turns his head sharply. His face transforms—recognition, guilt, and something else.

He runs forward.

SHEN QINGYU moves toward him, happiness lighting her face.

GU MINGXUAN runs RIGHT PAST HER.

SHEN QINGYU and WEIWEI freeze.

GU MINGXUAN embraces a WOMAN and SMALL BOY (5) nearby.

SMALL BOY
Daddy! You can see!

SHEN QINGYU's smile shatters. Disbelief. Then a cold, terrible understanding.

GU MINGXUAN looks up, catches her eye across the distance. His face drains of color.

SHEN QINGYU (V.O.)
Seven years of silence. For a lie.

She turns away.

EXT. PARK PATH - DAY

SHEN QINGYU walks away, pulling WEIWEI with her. Her face is stone.

WEIWEI looks back.

WEIWEI
Mommy?

SHEN QINGYU doesn't answer. Just keeps walking. Resolute.

The bunny ear headband lies abandoned on the path.

title: Survival Guide for a Love-Brained Harem
description: A woman caught in palace intrigue realizes too late that she and her rival are merely pawns in a larger game orchestrated by the Empress.
context:
Title: Survival Guide for a Love-Brained Harem
Description: A woman caught in palace intrigue realizes too late that she and her rival are merely pawns in a larger game orchestrated by the Empress.

EXT. EXECUTION GROUND - DAY

CHENG XIAOXIAO, clothes stained with blood, bound by ropes, kneels on the ground with a desperate expression.

CHENG XIAOXIAO
(crying out)
I beg Your Majesty, in remembrance of our childhood friendship, spare the Cheng family!

CHENG LANG, also bound, kneels nearby.

CHENG LANG
Little sister, you need not do this! The Emperor listens to slander. This kind of foolish ruler does not deserve our Cheng family's loyalty!

Emperor ZHAO RIXING, wearing dragon robes, sits expressionless on the high platform.

Imperial Consort YA HUANYAO stands beside him, speaking to the Emperor.

YA HUANYAO
Your Majesty, although the Cheng family has committed grave crimes, Consort Ru grew up with you as childhood sweethearts. I humbly beg Your Majesty to spare the Cheng family.

ZHAO RIXING coldly picks up the execution token and throws it to the ground.

JAILER
(shouting)
The noon hour has arrived. Proceed with the execution!

The executioner raises his blade. Suddenly, YA HUANYAO leaps forward and blocks the blade aimed at CHENG XIAOXIAO. But the other executioner's blades fall on the rest of the Cheng family.

Blood splatters.

CHENG XIAOXIAO
(heartbroken)
No!

YA HUANYAO reveals a satisfied smile. ZHAO RIXING remains expressionless.

At the execution ground, CHENG LANG and the Cheng family members lie in pools of blood.
continuation:
INT. PRISON CELL - NIGHT

A bright moon hangs high in the night sky.

CHENG XIAOXIAO wakes up on a pile of dry straw, covered in wounds.

YA HUANYAO, dressed in luxurious red robes, slowly walks into the cell, letting out a cold laugh.

YA HUANYAO
(laughing softly)
Ha ha ha.

YA HUANYAO
(coldly)
Well, little sister...

CHENG XIAOXIAO
(angrily)
You wretch! You played the Empress's game to perfection. Was my family's death not enough?

YA HUANYAO
Consort Ru still doesn't see it? We are pieces on the same board. She who holds them wins.

CHENG XIAOXIAO
(shocked)
The Empress... she moves against me?

YA HUANYAO
The shadows warned you. You chose the sun.

CHENG XIAOXIAO
(grabbing YA HUANYAO's robe)
You held the blade for her! My brother's blood is on your hands!

YA HUANYAO
(eyes fierce)
Some debts must be paid in blood... even if mine spills last.

YA HUANYAO turns to leave, then turns back with a cruel smile on her face.

YA HUANYAO
Since the Empress wants you dead, I must fulfill her wish. Guards!

A JAILER enters, eyes lecherous.

JAILER
(grinning wickedly)
Since you're going to die anyway, why not let us brothers have some fun!

ANOTHER JAILER
Right!

title: Lovebrain Daughter Is Beyond Saving
description: A mother separated from her son during a desperate escape is reunited with him twelve years later, but tragedy strikes when her son-in-law's jealousy leads to a deadly accident.
context:
Title: Lovebrain Daughter Is Beyond Saving
Description: A mother separated from her son during a desperate escape is reunited with him twelve years later, but tragedy strikes when her son-in-law's jealousy leads to a deadly accident.

EXT. DARK FOREST - NIGHT

Rain hammers the canopy. CHANG HUAIYU sprints through mud with young LIU QINGHONG (6) and LIU ZHI (8), clutching a canvas bag. Flashlight beams stab through trees behind them.

DEBT COLLECTOR (V.O.)
Chang Huaiyu! Your husband's factory is bankrupt! The court order's clear—surrender the assets or face fraud charges!

CHANG HUAIYU stumbles, shielding the children. Three SILHOUETTES close in, wielding batons.

DEBT COLLECTOR
Spread out! Check every ditch!

CHANG HUAIYU presses against a fallen tree, her breath ragged. LIU QINGHONG whimpers.

LIU QINGHONG (YOUNG)
(whispering)
Mama, I'm scared...

CHANG HUAIYU
(quietly)
Hold my hand tight. Both of you.

She grips their hands. LIU ZHI's fingers slip in the mud.

LIU ZHI (YOUNG)
(struggling)
Mama, my hand—

A flashlight beam sweeps toward them. CHANG HUAIYU makes a split-second choice—she shoves LIU ZHI under the fallen tree's hollow.

CHANG HUAIYU
(urgent, low)
Stay down. Don't move.

LIU ZHI (YOUNG)
(protesting)
But—

CHANG HUAIYU
Trust Mama.

She breaks a jade pendant from her neck—it's already cracked in one corner. She presses the larger half into LIU ZHI's palm.

CHANG HUAIYU
(whispering)
Your grandmother's pendant. If we get separated... find the match. Now hide.

She covers him with wet leaves just as—

DEBT COLLECTOR (V.O.)
There! By the deadfall!

CHANG HUAIYU scoops up LIU QINGHONG and runs. The lights chase her. LIU ZHI watches through leaves, clutching the pendant, rain washing over him.

ON SCREEN: TWELVE YEARS LATER
continuation:
INT. HIGH-RISE OFFICE - DAY

Adult LIU ZHI (20) stands at the window, running his thumb over the jade half. His ASSISTANT enters, holding a tablet.

LIU ZHI
The investigation?

ASSISTANT
Closed. Your parents returned to Jiangcheng six years ago. They run a small brickworks. You have a sister—Liu Qinghong. Married last year.

The ASSISTANT shows a photo: a modest factory, a family dinner. LIU ZHI's hand trembles.

LIU ZHI
(softly)
They look... ordinary.

ASSISTANT
Sir, the debt was legitimate. Your father signed the bankruptcy papers himself. They weren't victims.

LIU ZHI
(turning away)
I was eight years old. I remember what I remember.

He pockets the jade.

EXT. BRICK FACTORY COURTYARD - DAY

LIU JIANGUO (60s) inspects a cracked brick. CHANG HUAIYU sorts invoices. LIU QINGHONG (18) helps. LI ZICHENG (25) carries water.

LIU JIANGUO
(tossing the brick aside)
This batch is useless. Zicheng, the kiln temperature's been off for weeks.

LI ZICHENG
(measured)
I'm still learning the controls, Dad.

LIU JIANGUO
Learning? You've been here two years. When I was your age—

LIU QINGHONG
(interrupting gently)
Dad, Zicheng's doing his best. The equipment is old.

CHANG HUAIYU
(quietly)
Jianguo, let it be.

LIU JIANGUO mutters, walking away. LI ZICHENG's smile fades. He fills cups, then stops behind a brick stack—structurally unsound, visibly wobbling. He stares at LIU JIANGUO's back.

LI ZICHENG
(under his breath)
Two years. Still the useless son-in-law.

He nudges a loose brick at the base. The stack creaks. He glances around—no one watching. He nudges it again, harder. A single brick topples from the top.

LIU QINGHONG
(looking up)
The stack—

CHANG HUAIYU
(shouting)
Jianguo! Move!

She shoves LIU JIANGUO clear. The stack collapses, bricks thundering down. CHANG HUAIYU stumbles. One brick strikes her temple. She falls, motionless, half-buried.

LIU QINGHONG
(screaming)
Mama!

LI ZICHENG stands frozen, water kettle still in hand.

THE END

title: Just When the Rain Falls
description: A mother's daughter dies while her husband, a doctor, abandons them to save his first love's daughter instead. She vows revenge.
context:
Title: Just When the Rain Falls
Description: A mother's daughter dies while her husband, a doctor, abandons them to save his first love's daughter instead. She vows revenge.

EXT. MILITARY TRAINING GROUND - DAWN

QING'ER, in white martial attire now stained with dust, drills her sword through the morning mist. Her strikes carry a precision that borders on fury.

QING'ER (V.O.)
My daughter died five days ago. By the time I carried her through the storm, there was no blood left to bleed. My husband—the physician sworn to heal—chose to save his first love's child instead.

QING'ER's blade slashes downward, splitting a training dummy clean through.

QING'ER
(whispering to the wind)
Fu Huai'an. Zhou Ran. Blood debts are paid in blood.

LIGHTNING flickers—not in the sky, but in her eyes.

CUT TO BLACK.

TITLE CARD: That Night

EXT. MOUNTAIN VILLAGE - MAIN ROAD - NIGHT

The landslide has reduced the village to rubble and screams. A wooden beam juts from the wreckage, its protruding nail dark with blood.

QING'ER stumbles through the dust, clutching her bleeding daughter AN'AN (7). The child's head lolls, a thin trickle of blood at her temple.

QING'ER
(voice cracking)
Her pulse—can you feel it?

FU HUAI'AN, his physician's sleeve torn, presses fingers to An'an neck. His face tightens with professional assessment.

FU HUAI'AN
Superficial head wound. Stable for now. But the pulse is thready—

A distant cry—feminine, familiar—echoes from below the ridge.

FU HUAI'AN
(turning instinctively)
Ranran's cottage was in the slide path.

QING'ER
(emotional subtext: don't you dare)
Huai'an...

FU HUAI'AN
(avoiding her eyes)
I'll triage and return. Ten minutes.

He grabs his kit. His boots are already moving.

JUN JUN (O.S.)
Uncle Doctor! Please!

QING'ER
(screams after him)
She's your daughter!

But he's vanished into the dust.
continuation:
EXT. ZHOU RAN'S COLLAPSED COTTAGE - NIGHT

FU HUAI'AN finds ZHOU RAN (40s, elegant even in ruin) clutching her daughter JUN JUN. Ran's arm is a mess of blood-soaked silk.

ZHOU RAN
Junjun first. Please.

FU HUAI'AN
(sweeping his light over the girl)
She's unmarked. Shocked, but—

JUN JUN
Mother's arm won't stop bleeding! I tried to tie it but—

FU HUAI'AN
(already cutting the sleeve)
Let me see.

The wound is deep. Not fatal, but arterial. Blood spurts with each heartbeat. His medical training kicks in—pressure, pressure, pressure.

ZHOU RAN
(weakly)
Go. Qing'er needs you...

FU HUAI'AN
(wrapping a tourniquet)
Pressure won't hold. I have to cauterize. Two minutes.

His V.O. is a whispered promise:

FU HUAI'AN (V.O.)
An'an, hold on. Two minutes.

EXT. MOUNTAIN VILLAGE - MAIN ROAD - NIGHT

QING'ER presses her sash to An'an head wound. The white fabric turns crimson. An'an eyes flutter.

AN'AN
Daddy promised... he'd fix me...

QING'ER
He will, sweetheart. He will.

But An'an's breathing has changed—shallow, uneven. The skull fracture is bleeding internally.

AN'AN
Why did Daddy... leave me?

QING'ER
(rocking her)
He didn't. He's coming back.

AN'AN
Cold, Mama...

The rain begins. Not a drizzle—a sudden, biblical pour.

QING'ER
(seeing the truth in her daughter's fading eyes)
No. No no no—

She lifts An'an. Runs. The mud sucks at her boots. The rain erases the path.

EXT. MEDICAL DISTRICT - NIGHT

QING'ER staggers down a street of shuttered clinics. Each door she hammers on is locked, dark.

QING'ER
(screaming over the storm)
Anyone! Apothecary! Midwife! Please!

Her fist leaves blood on the third door. No answer.

QING'ER
(collapsing)
I'll trade my life—just save hers...

An'an's head lolls against her shoulder. The rain washes them both clean.

FADE OUT.

title: Love Moves the Little Rose
description: A woman waits alone on her birthday, only to be reminded by her lover that she is merely a substitute for someone else.
context:
Title: Love Moves the Little Rose
Description: A woman waits alone on her birthday, only to be reminded by her lover that she is merely a substitute for someone else.

INT. UPSCALE RESTAURANT - NIGHT

ZHU YAO (28, elegant exhaustion) sits alone at a table with a birthday cake in front of her. She gazes out the window with a forlorn expression.

A WAITER approaches carrying a tray with a glass of water.

WAITER
Miss, it's nine o'clock. Would you like to order now?

ZHU YAO picks up the glass and takes a sip.

ZHU YAO
Not yet.

WAITER
Alright.

The WAITER turns and leaves.

ZHU YAO takes out her phone. The lock screen shows a photo of her with a man—arms around each other, but their eyes don't meet. The time reads 21:04. She unlocks the phone and sends the man a message.

PHONE SCREEN displays the message: "Are you coming?"

Soon, a reply comes back.

PHONE SCREEN displays the message: "Yangyang woke up. I'm staying with her tonight."

ZHU YAO's expression freezes. Tears well up in her eyes, and one tear slides down her cheek.

ZHU YAO (V.O.)
Three years. Same script. Different night.

CUT TO:

Another part of the restaurant. SHEN SHIWU (30, sharp suit) sits alone, drinking red wine pensively. He watches Zhu Yao's reflection in the mirror behind the bar.
continuation:
A FLOWER GIRL approaches SHEN SHIWU's table.

FLOWER GIRL
Last rose, mister?

SHEN SHIWU takes a red rose from the girl's basket and hands her money. The girl glances at Zhu Yao, understanding.

ZHU YAO looks down and continues typing on her phone.

PHONE SCREEN displays the message: "Thirty minutes. Please. It's my birthday."

As soon as the message is sent, a reply comes back immediately.

PHONE SCREEN displays the message: "Zhu Yao. Don't make me remind you what you signed."

ZHU YAO looks at the message, completely heartbroken.

At that moment, the FLOWER GIRL walks to ZHU YAO's table carrying her basket.

FLOWER GIRL
Miss.

ZHU YAO looks up and forces a smile.

ZHU YAO
I'm not buying roses, but thank you, little one.

The FLOWER GIRL takes a red rose from her basket and hands it to ZHU YAO.

FLOWER GIRL
He said... "You weren't really waiting for him."

ZHU YAO is stunned. She follows the girl's gaze.

SHEN SHIWU is at the front desk settling his bill. He leaves a business card by his glass, then turns and leaves the restaurant.

ON SCREEN: TO BE CONTINUED...

title: May You Be Well
description: A princess raised by the royal family volunteers for a political marriage to a distant land after the prince she loves chooses another, hiding her heartbreak behind duty.
context:
Title: May You Be Well
Description: A princess raised by the royal family volunteers for a political marriage to a distant land after the prince she loves chooses another, hiding her heartbreak behind duty.

INT. IMPERIAL PALACE THRONE ROOM - DAY

The EMPEROR sits on his throne, a sealed missive in his hands. JIANG NING kneels before him.

EMPEROR
Jiang Ning, Western Xia's latest raiding party was turned back at the border. Their Khan now offers peace... through marriage. You know what they are like. The cold, the harshness. Why would you offer yourself?

JIANG NING
Your Majesty took me in when I had nothing. This marriage brings peace without costing a true princess. It is my duty... and perhaps my only path forward.

EMPEROR
Your bond with the Crown Prince spans so many years. If you need time...

JIANG NING
Time changes nothing, Your Majesty. Action does.

EXT. OUTSIDE THE CITY - DAY

ON SCREEN: Fifteen days earlier

JIANG NING stands in the crowd, beaming as she clutches a handkerchief. Two PASSERSBY whisper behind her.

PASSERBY A
The Crown Prince returns victorious. His Majesty himself comes to greet him. Mark my words - he'll finally claim what's been his all these years.

PASSERBY B
One would think. Though I hear Minister Meng has been rather visible at court lately. And his daughter's dowry includes the northern garrison's loyalty.

The Crown Prince's procession thunders into view. PEI YAN, armor gleaming, reins his warhorse before the EMPEROR and assembled court.

JIANG NING darts forward, offering her handkerchief. PEI YAN's eyes meet hers briefly - then look away. He dismounts and kneels.

PEI YAN
Father Emperor, I ask but one reward for my service: your blessing to take a wife.

EMPEROR
Your patience these years has not gone unnoticed. Rise, my son, and claim...

PEI YAN
Minister Meng's daughter, Lanxin. As Crown Princess.

JIANG NING's handkerchief slips from her fingers. The crowd's murmur rises around her.

PASSERBY B
Beggar girl playing princess. Who would have her now?

PEI YAN rises, approaches Jiang Ning. He takes her hand - a final, false tenderness.

PEI YAN
(loud enough for all to hear)
She saved my life once. For that, she deserves honor. But the Crown Princess must be worthy of the throne. Blood tells, Father. And hers is common.

He drops her hand. Jiang Ning's tears fall silently.

EMPEROR
You dishonor her publicly? You dishonor yourself.

PEI YAN
I secure your empire. Minister Meng's support is worth more than nostalgia.
continuation:
INT. IMPERIAL PALACE THRONE ROOM - DAY

JIANG NING (V.O.)
Blood tells, he said. So let it speak elsewhere.

JIANG NING
Western Xia knows me only as a princess of the realm. My fluency in their tongue is a weapon no envoy carries. Let me be useful, Your Majesty. Let me be gone.

She bows low, her forehead to the ground. The Emperor studies her - seeing not a broken girl, but a strategist born.

EMPEROR
After the New Year. The decree will be sealed.

JIANG NING
One request, Your Majesty. Let the Crown Prince believe it is his idea. That I go because I am... in the way.

EMPEROR
You would protect his pride even now?

JIANG NING
I would protect the alliance. He need not know until I am beyond recall.

EXT. PALACE SIDE COURTYARD - DAY

MENG LANXIN practices archery with several HANDMAIDENS. Her precision is cold, mechanical.

HANDMAIDEN A
They say Princess Anning petitioned His Majesty.

HANDMAIDEN B
Her name hasn't even been cleared from the palace rolls. She could still make trouble...

MENG LANXIN (V.O.)
Trouble. Yes. The kind that whispers of sacrifice and makes princes feel guilt.

She spots JIANG NING walking with her attendants in the distance. Meng Lanxin draws, holds - then shifts her aim slightly.

The arrow whistles past Jiang Ning's face, embedding in a pillar. A warning. A message.

JIANG NING touches her unmarked cheek, understanding. She meets Meng Lanxin's gaze - and nods once, acknowledging the hit.

Without a word, Jiang Ning turns and walks on. The arrow remains quivering behind her.

title: I Am Not the World's Number One
description: Chu Ran, once the world's greatest martial artist, became a beggar after sealing away his powers following his wife's tragic death. When a woman with his late wife's face appears, his past resurfaces.
context:
Title: I Am Not the World's Number One
Description: Chu Ran, once the world's greatest martial artist, became a beggar after sealing away his powers following his wife's tragic death. When a woman with his late wife's face appears, his past resurfaces.

EXT. COURTYARD - DAY

An elderly STORYTELLER talks animatedly to several young BEGGARS. CHU RAN, a destitute beggar, lies on a pile of straw nearby, his hands trembling.

STORYTELLER
You ask me who is the strongest in the world? Who is the strongest in the world? That would be Chu Ran, the great hero Chu.

EXT. LAKESIDE/CLIFF - DAY (FLASHBACK)

CHU RAN, dressed in white robes, displays extraordinary martial arts skills, running across water and fighting numerous men in black.

STORYTELLER (V.O.)
Legend has it that Hero Chu mastered all martial arts by age thirteen, reached the transcendent realm at twenty, and was only one step away from shattering the void.

CHU RAN easily defeats several enemies, finally splitting a massive rock with his sword, carving the words "Number One Under Heaven."

STORYTELLER (V.O.)
Two years ago, at Meteor Immortal Cliff, he defeated the Four Absolutes and finally claimed the title of Number One Under Heaven.

EXT. COURTYARD - DAY

YOUNG BEGGAR A
What happened after that?

STORYTELLER
After that? After that, Hero Chu naturally ascended to the Immortal World. Or so they say.

CHU RAN
(weakly)
He did not ascend. He became a beggar.

YOUNG BEGGAR B
What kind of joke is that! With that kind of power, why would he become a beggar?

CHU RAN (V.O.)
That's because...
continuation:
EXT. LAKESIDE/CLIFF - NIGHT (FLASHBACK)

CHU RAN'S WIFE runs toward CHU RAN and embraces him, crying tears of joy.

CHU RAN'S WIFE
Chu Ran, you were gone so long. I was so afraid.

CHU RAN (V.O.)
Two years ago, after I defeated the Four Absolutes, my enemies didn't just want revenge. They wanted to destroy what I loved.

An ENEMY emerges from shadows with a crossbow. Chu Ran's guard is down. The BOLT flies—not at him, but at his wife. She sees it, and in that split second, pushes Chu Ran aside. The BOLT takes her in the chest.

Chu Ran catches her as she falls, his face transforming from joy to horror. He crushes the crossbow mechanism with a glance, killing the hidden archer instantly, but it's too late.

CHU RAN holds his dying wife, grief-stricken.

CHU RAN
Qingcheng... my qi can still save you—

CHU RAN'S WIFE
(weakly, blood on her lips)
No... promise me something. Promise you'll stop being their hero. Just... be a man who lives.

CHU RAN (V.O.)
I spent a lifetime conquering the heavens, but couldn't protect the one thing that made earth worth standing on.

CHU RAN
(broken)
Qingcheng...

CHU RAN (V.O.)
That night, I shattered my own cultivation. Every meridian. Every technique. I killed my power, not sealed it.

EXT. COURTYARD/STREET - DAY

A woman in black runs frantically into the courtyard, pursued by several WARRIORS. Her clothes are torn, but her bearing suggests nobility.

PURSUED WOMAN
Please! Help me!

MU FAMILY WARRIOR
Traitor! There's nowhere left to run!

YOUNG BEGGAR A
Those are the Mu family warriors! They don't leave witnesses!

The young BEGGARS and the STORYTELLER hurriedly flee. CHU RAN remains lying in place, his trembling hands clenched.

CHU RAN (INTERNAL MONOLOGUE)
Number One Under Heaven. What good is a title when I couldn't even save her? Let the world burn. I won't play their games anymore.

The PURSUED WOMAN is cornered. She stops and turns around, breathing hard. Her face is identical to CHU RAN'S deceased wife, down to the small scar above her left eyebrow. CHU RAN's eyes snap open. He stares, his face draining of color. His trembling hands go still.

CHU RAN
(shocked)
Wife?

title: After I Stopped Loving Her, My Cold Ex-Wife Cried
description: A devoted husband returns from France with a surprise for his wife on their tenth anniversary, only to discover a devastating betrayal.
context:
Title: After I Stopped Loving Her, My Cold Ex-Wife Cried
Description: A devoted husband returns from France with a surprise for his wife on their tenth anniversary, only to discover a devastating betrayal.

EXT. RESIDENTIAL STREET - DAY

A rainy day, the street is wet. LIN HUAI, a man in a trench coat, pulls a suitcase and holds a transparent umbrella, walking hurriedly.

LIN HUAI (V.O.)
Ten years today. Three months in Paris. She thinks I'm still there.

LIN HUAI wears wireless earbuds, on a phone call, smiling.

FRIEND (PHONE)
Lin Huai, you're back already?

LIN HUAI
Lang Lang signed the recommendation. No need to stay.

FRIEND (PHONE)
Three months busking at the opera? That's not devotion, that's a ghost story.

LIN HUAI
I'm home now. Talk later.

LIN HUAI removes his earbuds, ending the call. He looks ahead, his face glowing with anticipation.

LIN HUAI (V.O.)
She always said her music needed Paris. I finally gave it to her.

In LIN HUAI's line of sight appears a young man, SU HAN, wearing a blue jacket and holding a bouquet of flowers, talking on the phone.

SU HAN (PHONE)
See me? I flew back. Come down.

LIN HUAI watches SU HAN, somewhat curious.

SU HAN (V.O.)
Gu Nian, I've memorized every piece you love. Stop pretending.
continuation:
INT. OPEN SPACE DOWNSTAIRS - NIGHT (FLASHBACK)

Young SU HAN kneels on one knee, surrounded by candles arranged in a heart shape. He confesses to young GU NIAN.

SU HAN
Will you be with me?

GU NIAN
I...

FRIENDS (O.S.)
Together! Together! Together!

GU NIAN accepts the flowers, her eyes on someone outside the circle.

END FLASHBACK.

EXT. RESIDENTIAL STREET - DAY

LIN HUAI watches SU HAN in the distance, smiling and shaking his head.

LIN HUAI
(to himself)
Youth.

LIN HUAI takes out his phone, preparing to send a voice message to his wife.

LIN HUAI
(into the phone)
Honey, there's a guy downstairs with flowers...

Before he finishes, GU NIAN runs out of the building. She runs straight to SU HAN, and they embrace tightly.

GU NIAN
Why didn't you tell me?

SU HAN
I needed to see you first.

They gaze at each other, then kiss carefully, like a secret.

LIN HUAI stands not far away, witnessing everything. The umbrella slips from his hand and falls onto the wet ground. The smile on his face freezes, his eyes filled with shock and disbelief.

LIN HUAI
(shocked)
Honey?

The phone screen shows: "Recording..."

title: I Help the Empress Stabilize the Empire
description: A 21st-century ammunition engineer is transported to an ancient dynasty where he must serve as a eunuch in the Empress's palace while hiding his true identity.
context:
Title: I Help the Empress Stabilize the Empire
Description: A 21st-century ammunition engineer is transported to an ancient dynasty where he must serve as a eunuch in the Empress's palace while hiding his true identity.

INT. LABORATORY - DAY

A high-tech ammunition lab. Warning lights strobe. SENIOR ENGINEER ZHANG YI monitors glowing screens while LI TIANLE (26, sharp-eyed) preps a prototype.

ZHANG YI
Ready for velocity calibration. Tianle, final check on the propellant mix.

LI TIANLE
(grinning)
Optimized for stability. This batch won't combust prematurely—

The control panel erupts in sparks. Tianle lunges for the emergency shutdown but a blinding energy surge envelops him—

INT. EUNUCH'S QUARTERS - NIGHT

Lightning cracks through a window. LI TIANLE jolts awake on an ancient bed, spasming. He touches his temple—blood. Silk robes replace his lab coat.

He notices the eunuch's red uniform. His face drains.

LI TIANLE
(whisper)
No...

He checks himself frantically—exhales in relief.

LI TIANLE
(loud whisper)
Thank god.

A knock sounds at the door.

PALACE MAID (O.S.)
Eunuch Li! Her Majesty's bath is drawn. Don't keep her waiting.

LI TIANLE
(stalling)
Just—just preparing the oils!

PALACE MAID (O.S.)
The Empress tolerates many things. Tardiness isn't one.

Footsteps recede. Li Tianle paces, pressing his forehead.

LI TIANLE (V.O.)
Gunpowder equations I understand. Imperial protocol?

He spots a scroll: "Palace Conduct for Eunuchs." His engineer's eye scans it methodically.

LI TIANLE (V.O.)
Okay. Variables: one volatile Empress. Constant: my head on the block. Solution: survive tonight, escape tomorrow.
continuation:
INT. BATHHOUSE - NIGHT

Steam clouds the chamber. The EMPRESS (30s, steel in her eyes) soaks, flanked by silent maids. Li Tianle enters, tray balanced with surgical precision.

EMPRESS
Xiao Lizi. The towel.

LI TIANLE
(eyes averted)
Yes, Your Majesty.

He moves forward—his foot hits a wet patch. The tray flies. He grabs instinctively—hands land on her shoulders. The maid GASPS.

EMPRESS
(frozen fury)
You dare.

LI TIANLE
(voice cracking)
The coefficient of friction on wet cypress is—

EMPRESS
What?

LI TIANLE
(releasing her)
—nothing, Your Majesty. My profound apologies.

EMPRESS
Get out. Kneel in the courtyard until dawn.

LI TIANLE
(retreating)
Yes. Yes, of course.

EUNUCH WANG enters, bowing deeply.

EUNUCH WANG
Your Majesty, the Duke of Qi demands immediate audience. He brings... soldiers.

EMPRESS
(laughs bitterly)
Of course he does. Even my bath isn't sacred.

She rises, water dripping. A maid wraps her in silk. She glances at Li Tianle—her look sharpens.

EMPRESS
Bring the clumsy one. Let him witness what happens when men overstep.

A PALACE MAID walks to LI TIANLE's side and whispers urgently.

PALACE MAID
Follow. Now.

LI TIANLE
(quietly)
This is a containment breach. Worst kind.

He trails the procession, his engineer's mind already calculating angles of escape.

title: My Name is Ruan Tiantian & I Haven't Been a Villainess in Years
description: A delivery worker accidentally spills milk tea on a woman's designer bag, leading to an unexpected confrontation and a shocking discovery at home.
context:
Title: My Name is Ruan Tiantian & I Haven't Been a Villainess in Years
Description: A delivery worker accidentally spills milk tea on a woman's designer bag, leading to an unexpected confrontation and a shocking discovery at home.

EXT. STREET - DAY

A DELIVERY WORKER runs while talking on the phone.

DELIVERY WORKER
Almost there, almost there.

The DELIVERY WORKER carefully bumps into the WIFE, spilling milk tea on her and her designer bag.

DELIVERY WORKER
I'm sorry, I'm sorry.

WIFE
You blind idiot.

DELIVERY WORKER
I'm sorry, my order is about to be late.

WIFE
I don't care if it's late! If you damage something, you pay! If you don't pay, I'll sue! Pay up now!

DELIVERY WORKER
How much?

WIFE
Twenty-eight thousand!

DELIVERY WORKER
(shocked)
What? I... I don't have that much money. I can't afford such an expensive bag.

WIFE
That's for trying to run. The bag is fine. The Supreme Triple Milk Tea was eight yuan. Consider the rest a life lesson.

DELIVERY WORKER
(confused)
I don't understand—

WIFE
Pay the eight yuan and disappear.

The DELIVERY WORKER pays and runs off. The WIFE watches him, then pulls a fresh milk tea from her bag, pouring the remnants into it.
continuation:
INT. HOME - DAY

The WIFE returns home carrying the milk tea.

WIFE
Lao Hao, I'm back!

The WIFE pushes open the bedroom door and sees her HUSBAND with a MISTRESS in bed. She freezes, her expression shifting from shock to cold fury.

WIFE
(furious)
You bastard.

The WIFE throws the milk tea in her hand at them. Quick cuts show the HUSBAND being beaten.

The HUSBAND lies on the floor with a black eye and swollen face, a straw stuck in his nostril, moaning in pain.

The WIFE looks at her HUSBAND on the floor, then turns to the MISTRESS on the bed.

WIFE
Now it's your turn.

The MISTRESS stands up, revealing her pregnant belly, and raises her hand to stop her.

MISTRESS
I'm pregnant!

The WIFE freezes. The HUSBAND on the floor also shows a surprised expression.

HUSBAND
...What?

title: I Return to the 90s to Open a Hotpot Restaurant
description: A time-traveler buys a warm coat for his mother in 1990s, but gossip reveals a darker truth about his family loyalties.
context:
Title: I Return to the 90s to Open a Hotpot Restaurant
Description: A time-traveler buys a warm coat for his mother in 1990s, but gossip reveals a darker truth about his family loyalties.

INT. CLOTHING STORE - DAY

TIANHE walks into a bustling 1990s clothing store, glancing at the calendar: "1995."

TIANHE
Brother Zhang.

BROTHER ZHANG looks up from his newspaper.

BROTHER ZHANG
Tianhe! How's the hotpot restaurant?

TIANHE
Almost ready. Which coat is warmest?

BROTHER ZHANG
For your mother? These just came in.

Brother Zhang pulls out a black leather jacket and a red fleece coat. Tianhe's fingers trace the red fleece gently.

TIANHE
This one. Price?

BROTHER ZHANG
Thirty. Pure wool.

TIANHE
Perfect.

Tianhe pays, hugging the coat. He pulls out a notebook—"1995 Business Plan" visible.

TIANHE (V.O.)
Last timeline, Mom froze in rags. Not this time.

BROTHER ZHANG
Gift wrap?

TIANHE
She'll wear it home. Thanks.

Tianhe exits. Two customers approach the counter.

CUSTOMER 1
Always buying for his mother. Such a good son.

BROTHER ZHANG
(quietly, watching through window)
Last week his "mother" got a TV. My sister lives next door—she says his real mother wears newspapers in her shoes.

CUSTOMER 2
Maybe she needs it more?

BROTHER ZHANG
(shakes head)
The other mother. His real one hasn't seen him in a month.

CUSTOMER 1
(scoffing)
Another fool marrying the mistress and forgetting his own.
continuation:
EXT. VILLAGE STREET - DAY

TIANHE carries the coat and a bag labeled "Hotpot Spices." AUNTIE and AUNT notice.

AUNTIE
Tianhe! New supplies for your restaurant?

TIANHE
Mom's recipe. Getting it right this time.

AUNT
She must be proud.

TIANHE
She will be.

He walks on. The women's smiles fade.

AUNTIE
(quietly)
"Mom." He calls that woman Mom now.

AUNT
His real mother eats plain congee while he feeds them meat.

AUNTIE
(spitting)
Money makes you blind.

EXT. TIANHE'S FAMILY HOUSE - DAY

TIANHE approaches a modest shack. His MOTHER (60s) tends vegetables in thin, patched clothes.

TIANHE
Mom.

MOTHER
(startled)
Tianhe! I told you not to—

TIANHE
Try this.

He helps her into the red coat. It fits perfectly. She touches it, disbelieving.

MOTHER
This costs too much...

TIANHE
The restaurant's first profit. And...

He pulls out a photo: a new sign reading "TIANHE'S HOTPOT - MOM'S ORIGINAL RECIPE."

TIANHE (CONT'D)
You're the only chef I want. Opening next week.

MOTHER
(eyes watering)
The neighbors said...

TIANHE
Let them talk. When they taste your broth, they'll know which mother I've been learning from.

Mother clasps his hand, looking at the photo.

MOTHER
My foolish son... always planning ahead.

FADE OUT.

title: My Undercover Life in Ancient Times - The Tale of Lu Ding
description: A modern man accidentally travels back in time to ancient China and finds himself caught up in a revolutionary plot to infiltrate the palace.
context:
Title: My Undercover Life in Ancient Times - The Tale of Lu Ding
Description: A modern man accidentally travels back in time to ancient China and finds himself caught up in a revolutionary plot to infiltrate the palace.

INT. SWIMMING POOL - NIGHT

XIAO BAO mops the pool deck after hours. TWO WOMEN in bathing suits walk past, chatting.

One of the WOMEN suddenly spots him near a decorative fountain and screams.

WOMAN
(terrified)
Help! Intruder!

XIAO BAO startles, drops his mop. It strikes a hidden switch on the fountain base. A MECHANICAL WHIRR. The fountain splits open, revealing an ANCIENT BRONZE MIRROR.

XIAO BAO
What the—

He reaches for it, trips on the wet floor, and falls. As he collides with the mirror, BLINDING LIGHT engulfs the screen.

INT. QIANKUN HALL - NIGHT

XIAO BAO lies on cold stone floor. TORCHES flicker. MEN in ancient costumes hold torches, standing with serious expressions. Plaque above reads "Qiankun Hall." Banners reading "Overthrow Qian, Restore Zhou" and "Restore the Great Zhou" hang in front of the hall.

CHEN JINBEI stands before the crowd, speaking passionately.

CHEN JINBEI
The Qian Emperor's tyranny ends now! Qiankun Hall will restore the Great Zhou!

XIAO BAO scrambles up, patting himself in disbelief.

XIAO BAO (V.O.)
This isn't a set... this is real.

MEMBER A
(whispering to XIAO BAO)
Xiao Bao! Keep your voice down!

MEMBER B
(pointing at CHEN JINBEI)
Chen Jinbei, leader of Qiankun Hall.

MEMBER A
Today we're selecting the two hundred and fiftieth hero to go undercover in the palace.

MEMBER B
Two hundred and forty-nine have fallen. Keep your head down.

CHEN JINBEI
(shouting)
continuation:
Complete the great cause!

The crowd retreats, no one daring to come forward.

XIAO BAO (V.O.)
They think I'm Xiao Bao. According to history, Xiao Bao volunteers. But 249 people died. I'm not sticking my neck out.

CHEN JINBEI
Good! We'll do it the old way.

XIAO BAO (V.O.)
I'm a college student. I've got cheat codes. I know the plot. I'll grab a chair and sit this out.

Music plays. Everyone begins playing musical chairs. The music stops. Everyone has found a seat except XIAO BAO, who stands there dumbfounded.

XIAO BAO (V.O.)
(stunned)
Damn. Even ancient China is this competitive.

CHEN JINBEI
Hero, wait.

CHEN JINBEI walks up to XIAO BAO and excitedly grabs his shoulders.

CHEN JINBEI
In our Qiankun Hall, the previous two hundred and forty-nine palace undercover agents were all chosen by lottery. Today, finally, a hero has emerged!

XIAO BAO
(helplessly)
Please, there's been a mistake—

WANG CHUNHUA (V.O.)
Let him go!

A woman in red clothes with elaborate makeup—WANG CHUNHUA—walks in, waving a fan.

CHEN JINBEI
(warily)
State your business.

WANG CHUNHUA
Wang Chunhua of Yihong Brothel. You'd best remember my name.

XIAO BAO sees WANG CHUNHUA, his eyes light up with impossible recognition.

XIAO BAO
(surprised)
Mom?

Both WANG CHUNHUA and CHEN JINBEI freeze.

title: I Would Brave Thorns for You
description: A powerful CEO returns to his homeland after fifteen years to finally reunite with his long-lost younger sister, whose token has been discovered at a nightclub.
context:
Title: I Would Brave Thorns for You
Description: A powerful CEO returns to his homeland after fifteen years to finally reunite with his long-lost younger sister, whose token has been discovered at a nightclub.

INT. LAWN - DAY

SU YE descends from a helicopter, his composure absolute. A SUBORDINATE bolts forward, intercepting him.

MEN IN BLACK
Welcome back, President Su!

SUBORDINATE
(catching his breath)
Sir—the young miss's token. Platinum Bar.

The Subordinate extends a photograph. Su Ye's gloved fingers hesitate a millisecond before taking it.

SU YE (V.O.)
Ranran's whistle. I'd know it in my sleep.

SU YE
(to himself)
Fifteen years...

His jaw tightens imperceptibly.

SU YE
Mobilize everyone. And wake my brothers.

SUBORDINATE
All five, sir?

SU YE
Every single one. We bring her home tonight.

INT. OUTSIDE OPERATING ROOM - DAY

SU QI scrubs his hands at a sink, the water running red. He shuts it off with deliberate calm.

SU QI
(to himself)
Thirty hours. Worth it.

He turns to find a NURSE holding his phone.

NURSE
Urgent call, Doctor Su. It's about the patient in three.

SU QI
Tell them I've resigned as chief.
(softly)
I'm needed elsewhere.
continuation:
INT. FILMING LOCATION - DAY

SU XUN emerges from a sea of screaming fans, flawless. His AGENT trails behind.

AGENT
The sequel's been moved up! We shoot tomorrow—

SU XUN
(putting on sunglasses)
Cancel it.

AGENT
Your career—!

SU XUN
(smiling coldly)
My sister's been found. That's my career now.
(to the fans)
Family emergency. The permanent kind.

INT. AUCTION HOUSE - DAY

The AUCTIONEER's voice cracks with excitement.

AUCTIONEER
Six hundred million! Do I hear—?

SU ZHUOZE's voice cuts through, unhurried.

SU ZHUOZE
One billion. For everything.

Silence. He leans into the light.

SU ZHUOZE
My sister shouldn't have to choose.

INT. HALLWAY - DAY

SU LIN stands in a corridor of unconscious security personnel, adjusting his cufflinks.

SU LIN
(into phone)
Platinum Bar. Ownership transfer. Tonight.

He pockets the phone, addressing the groaning man at his feet.

SU LIN
Apologies for the mess.
(smoothly)
Family business. You understand.

INT. CAR - DAY

SU ZHE holds a creased photograph, his thumb wearing through the corner. The city blurs past.

ASSISTANT
Sixth Young Master... Miss Feifei's birthday. Platinum Bar. She's—persistent.

SU ZHE
(folding the photo with care)
Tell her I'm coming.
(quietly)
And that I'll be taking someone far more important with me.

title: A Son's Regret
description: A man prioritizes his father-in-law's birthday over his dying father's final wish, leading to devastating consequences.
context:
Title: A Son's Regret
Description: A man prioritizes his father-in-law's birthday over his dying father's final wish, leading to devastating consequences.

INT. STUDY - DAY

XU CHENGQI anxiously answers the phone, turning away from the celebration outside.

XU CHENGQI
Mom? I can barely hear you—what's wrong?

XU CHENGQI'S MOTHER (V.O.)
(strained)
Your father... hospital... hurry...

The call drops. Xu Chengqi stares at his phone, then heads for the door.

INT. LIVING ROOM - DAY

Balloons drift across the ceiling. The FATHER-IN-LAW, mid-70s, watches television in his birthday crown. LILIAN intercepts Xu Chengqi, her smile tightening.

LILIAN
Chengqi. Dad's cake is coming out. Where are you going?

XU CHENGQI
My father's in the hospital. That was my mother.

LILIAN
(glancing toward her father)
And we're in the middle of Dad's birthday. You promised him you'd be here.

XU CHENGQI
Lilian, this could be—he might not have long.

LILIAN
(quietly fierce)
My brother missed Dad's seventieth for a "work emergency." He cried for a week. I'm not doing that to him again. Not today.

XU CHENGQI
Please. Just let me go check—I'll be back in two hours.

LILIAN
If you walk out that door, don't bother coming back.

XU CHENGQI freezes. His hand on the doorknob. He looks back at his wife, then at his father-in-law. Slowly, he releases the knob and pulls out his phone.

XU CHENGQI
(into phone, voice hollow)
Mom. Tell Dad... I'll come tomorrow. For his birthday. First thing.

He ends the call.
continuation:
INT. BEDROOM - DAY

XU CHENGQI'S MOTHER tries calling back. It goes to voicemail. She lowers the phone, defeated.

INT. LIVING ROOM - DAY

XU CHENGQI returns to the table. The Father-in-Law studies him.

FATHER-IN-LAW
Change of plans?

XU CHENGQI
(quietly)
Family emergency. But it's... handled.

LILIAN and Xu Chengqi light candles. The Father-in-Law claps, alone.

LILIAN
(overly bright)
Make a wish, Dad!

ALL THREE
(singing, strained)
Happy birthday to you...

MONTAGE:

- In the living room, Lilian kisses her father's cheek as Xu Chengqi stares at his plate, the birthday song trailing off.
- In a crowded hospital corridor, XU CHENGQI'S MOTHER holds the phone to her husband's ear, tears streaming down her face.
- XU CHENGQI'S FATHER, oxygen mask fogging with each weak breath, hears the faint singing through the phone, his trembling hand clutching the blanket.

END MONTAGE.

INT. HOSPITAL ROOM - NIGHT

XU CHENGQI'S MOTHER ends the call. The phone slips through her fingers. Her husband's eyes find hers.

XU CHENGQI'S FATHER
(whisper)
...Chengqi?

XU CHENGQI'S MOTHER
(forcing a smile)
He's downstairs. Parking.

XU CHENGQI'S FATHER
The steamed buns... in the kitchen... he loved them... as a boy...

A final exhale. The heart monitor flatlines.

XU CHENGQI'S MOTHER
(scream whisper)
Changgeng! You promised you'd wait—Chengqi's almost here!

FLASHBACK:

XU CHENGQI'S FATHER
Chengqi. My birthday wish... see you blow out the candles... like when you were small.

XU CHENGQI (V.O.)
I'll be there, Dad. I promise.

END FLASHBACK.

INT. OLD HOUSE MAIN HALL - DAY

XU CHENGQI'S MOTHER arranges steaming buns before her husband's portrait—he's smiling in a field.

XU CHENGQI'S MOTHER
Your birthday, Changgeng. Your son... he's...

She can't finish.

EXT. OLD HOUSE ENTRANCE - DAY

An OLD NEIGHBOR opens the gate as XU CHENGQI'S MOTHER emerges with a basket of buns, still warm.

A car screeches to a halt. XU CHENGQI leaps out, tie askew.

XU CHENGQI
Mom—how is he?

He sees the buns. The basket. The black cloth on her arm.

XU CHENGQI
(softly)
...Where's Dad?

She doesn't answer. The buns steam between them in the cold morning air.

title: My Paper Boyfriend
description: A writer wakes up to find her fictional male protagonist has come to life in her bedroom.
context:
Title: My Paper Boyfriend
Description: A writer wakes up to find her fictional male protagonist has come to life in her bedroom.

INT. BEDROOM - NIGHT

A closed laptop sits on the desk. SU NANYAN, wearing pajamas, walks into the room, sits at the desk, and opens the computer.

SU NANYAN begins typing, text appearing on the screen.

ZHUANG YIN
Twenty-four. Finally seen.

SU NANYAN continues typing, her expression focused.

Cut to: SU NANYAN now wearing glasses, sitting comfortably on the bed typing on the computer, a sad smile on her face.

SU NANYAN (V.O.)
Same story. Different chapter.

SU NANYAN rests her chin on her hands, gazing at the computer screen, then sighs.

EXT. BEACH - DAY

Fast-cut montage. ZHUANG YIN, a handsome man, is surrounded by women on the beach. But his eyes are hollow. He plays volleyball mechanically. Sits alone with a drink, staring blankly.

INT. BEDROOM - DAY

Bright sunlight. SU NANYAN sleeps in bed. She turns over, her hand accidentally touching a man's body beside her. She jolts awake and sits up abruptly.

SU NANYAN
Ah!

ZHUANG YIN wakes with a start and sits up. SU NANYAN clutches the blanket tightly to her chest. They stare at each other in shock.

ZHUANG YIN
Who are you?

SU NANYAN
Why are you here?

ZHUANG YIN
What did you do to me?

SU NANYAN
I didn't! I was asleep!

ZHUANG YIN
Stop finishing my sentences! I'm trying to think!

He rubs his forehead, disoriented.
continuation:
ZHUANG YIN
The sheets are wrong. This isn't my penthouse.

SU NANYAN
