You don't have a penthouse. You have descriptions.

ZHUANG YIN
What?

SU NANYAN
(whisper)
Zhuang Yin.

Flashback in SU NANYAN's mind of the novel content she wrote, but the words are dissolving.

SU NANYAN (V.O.)
Zhuang Yin, twenty-four. CEO. Perfect. Paper-thin.

ZHUANG YIN
You wrote "unable to take care of himself." I remember typing it. Your fingers on my hands.

SU NANYAN
That's impossible.

ZHUANG YIN
So is being cold. But I am. So is being scared. But I am.

He looks at her—really looks. Not as an intruder.

ZHUANG YIN
Make me real. Or make me gone. But don't leave me half-written.

SU NANYAN
I can delete the files.

ZHUANG YIN
Or write what happens next. Not the fantasy. The version where I learn.

She reaches slowly for the laptop. He watches, not stopping her.

SU NANYAN
"Zhuang Yin didn't know how to be human. So he asked."

She looks at him. The words hang between them.

ZHUANG YIN
(quiet)
I'm asking.

ON SCREEN: TO BE CONTINUED

title: I Brought My Daughter Local Chickens, She Held My Funeral
description: A father's tragic loss and his struggle to raise his daughter, only to face betrayal and heartbreak.
context:
Title: I Brought My Daughter Local Chickens, She Held My Funeral
Description: A father's tragic loss and his struggle to raise his daughter, only to face betrayal and heartbreak.

EXT. FUNERAL HALL - DAY

The sound of mournful horns fills the air. A banner reading "In Solemn Mourning" hangs in the hall. LU YONGCHANG and his daughter LU YUEXI, both dressed in mourning clothes, kneel on the ground.

MASTER OF CEREMONIES
Filial sons and virtuous descendants, take your positions before the spirit.

Relatives and friends step forward one by one to bow.

MASTER OF CEREMONIES
First bow! Second bow! Third bow!

VILLAGER A (V.O.)
Lu Yongchang's life is so bitter. He finally had a daughter in his old age, and now his wife is gone and his leg is broken. How will he manage in the days to come?

LU YUEXI has an injury on her forehead, freshly bandaged. She looks up at her grieving father.

LU YUEXI
Dad... is Mom in pain anymore?

LU YONGCHANG can no longer control his emotions. He holds his daughter and breaks down crying.

INT. CONSTRUCTION SITE - DAY

Flashback to the past.

LU YUEXI sits by a pile of bricks at the construction site, drawing seriously. A chicken feather is tucked behind her ear.

LU YONGCHANG, drenched in sweat, carries cement bags in the distance, his steps unsteady.

COWORKER
Payday!

COWORKER
Old Lu, stop carrying! Time to collect your pay!

LU YONGCHANG
You guys go first. I'll carry two more bags.

LU YONGCHANG struggles to lift another bag. After a few steps, his legs give out and the cement bag falls to the ground, breaking open.

The FOREMAN walks over, looking displeased.

FOREMAN
What's going on? Can you do the job or not? If not, leave!

LU YONGCHANG
(urgently)
I can do it. You can't fire me. I still have a daughter to support—and chicks to buy!

LU YONGCHANG struggles and uses all his strength to pick up the broken cement bag, walking forward with difficulty.

LU YUEXI
Dad!

LU YONGCHANG puts down the cement bag, a smile appearing on his weary face.

LU YONGCHANG
Ah, my daughter!

LU YUEXI
(holding up a drawing)
Look at the big house I drew. That's you and Mom, and me. And chickens.

LU YONGCHANG looks at the drawing, tears in his eyes, deeply moved.

LU YONGCHANG
My daughter draws so well!

The FOREMAN walks over.

FOREMAN
I've told you so many times not to bring kids here. Why did you bring your daughter again? What kind of father are you?

LU YONGCHANG
(smiling apologetically)
It won't happen again. Look how well my daughter draws.

FOREMAN
(handing over money)
Here's your pay.

LU YONGCHANG
(taking the money)
Thank you, boss.

FOREMAN
Hey, wait. Old Zhang!

A worker throws over a large checkered woven bag. The FOREMAN catches it and hands it to LU YONGCHANG.

FOREMAN
Was going to throw it away. Give it to your daughter.

LU YONGCHANG is stunned, then bows gratefully.

LU YONGCHANG
Thank you, boss!

LU YONGCHANG opens the bag. Inside are some old clothes.

LU YONGCHANG
(to his daughter)
Daughter, look, we have new clothes to wear.

LU YUEXI
Dad, you worked so hard.

His daughter reaches out her small hand to wipe the sweat and dust from LU YONGCHANG's face.

LU YONGCHANG
(moved)
Yuexi, Dad will definitely give you a good life in the future.
continuation:
EXT. COUNTRY ROAD - DAY

LU YONGCHANG lets Yuexi ride on his shoulders. Father and daughter happily sing as they walk down the road.

LU YONGCHANG & LU YUEXI
(singing)
The dark sky hangs low, bright stars follow along...

LU YUEXI
Dad, I'm hungry.

EXT. STEAMED BUN SHOP - DAY

LU YONGCHANG brings Yuexi to a steamed bun shop.

LU YONGCHANG
Boss, two buns please.

BUN SHOP OWNER
Coming right up! Here you go, little girl.

LU YONGCHANG
Okay, good.

As LU YONGCHANG pays, he notices a little girl in ragged clothes with a dirty face (LU QINGYAO) sitting not far away, staring at them longingly. A scar marks her temple.

BUN SHOP OWNER
Ah, that little beggar has no parents. She'll starve to death sooner or later. So pitiful.

LU YONGCHANG looks at the little beggar, then at the change in his hand, his face showing compassion and sudden recognition.

LU YONGCHANG
Give me two more steamed buns... make that two more buns.

BUN SHOP OWNER
Right away.

LU YONGCHANG takes the buns and walks over to the little beggar, crouching down.

LU YONGCHANG
Little girl.

He hands the buns to the little beggar. She takes them and devours them hungrily.

LU YONGCHANG turns to leave with Yuexi. The little beggar silently follows behind them.

LU YUEXI
Dad, this sister is so pitiful. But we barely have enough.

LU YONGCHANG stops, turns back to look at the little beggar, struggling internally. He finally crouches down and asks gently.

LU YONGCHANG
Little girl, would you like to come home with us?

The little beggar hesitates, then nods vigorously, a shy smile appearing on her face.

LU YONGCHANG
(to Yuexi)
Yuexi, from now on you have an older sister.

Yuexi smiles, though her eyes hold a flicker of uncertainty.

LU YONGCHANG holds Yuexi with one hand and Qingyao with the other. The three of them walk home together.

title: New Year's Eve
description: On New Year's Eve, a wife catches her husband in bed with her best friend and demands a divorce, but the husband suspects it's all a setup orchestrated by her brother.
context:
Title: New Year's Eve
Description: On New Year's Eve, a wife catches her husband in bed with her best friend and demands a divorce, but the husband suspects it's all a setup orchestrated by her brother.

INT. BEDROOM - NIGHT

GU YANZHI and XIAOXIAO (YE XIAO's best friend) are asleep in bed, champagne glasses on the nightstand.

YE XIAO bursts in with brother YE XI and AUNT LIU.

YE XIAO yanks the blanket off.

YE XIAO
(barely controlled)
Happy New Year, husband. My best friend.

XIAOXIAO
(waking, panicked)
Xiaoxiao—wait—I don't remember—I was at the party—

YE XIAO
The party I threw for us.

YE XIAO grabs for XIAOXIAO. Chaos erupts.

XIAOXIAO
(covering herself)
I swear, there's something wrong with me—

YE XI
Sis, your medication. Remember your heart.

YE XIAO
(turning to GU YANZHI)
Sign it. Every page.

YE XIAO slams a document on GU YANZHI's chest.

GU YANZHI
(in disbelief)
Divorce papers?
continuation:
GU YANZHI flips through the document. "Divorce Agreement - Revised 12/30" is stamped on top.

GU YANZHI
(quietly)
You had them ready before tonight. Before you even knew.

GU YANZHI
(to YE XIAO)
Ten years. Did you ever believe in us?

YE XI
(stepping closer)
She believes in evidence. Right here, in our family home.

GU YANZHI
(to YE XI)
The emergency board meeting. Tomorrow morning. You need me out before then.

GU YANZHI
(to YE XIAO)
He's been planning this. Ask him about the shares.

YE XI
(nervously)
He's desperate, sis. Don't fall for it—

GU YANZHI
(grabs YE XI's collar)
Show her your phone. The texts.

GU YANZHI shoves YE XI against the wall, hand on his throat.

YE XI
(gasping)
You're insane!

YE XIAO
(pulling GU YANZHI back)
Stop! Stop—

YE XIAO freezes. A phone on the floor shows a message: "She's coming. Make it convincing."

title: Found the Wife - She's Dating on a Romance Show
description: A woman wakes up at her own funeral to find herself in another person's body, desperately searching for her lost child.
context:
Title: Found the Wife - She's Dating on a Romance Show
Description: A woman wakes up at her own funeral to find herself in another person's body, desperately searching for her lost child.

INT. FUNERAL HALL - DAY

The funeral hall is arranged with cold elegance, white roses surrounding an open casket. A banner reads: "Farewell to Su Shangjing."

A young woman, SU SHANGJING, dressed in white, lies in the casket. Her black and white portrait is placed in front.

GUESTS in black clothing bow under the direction of a MASTER OF CEREMONIES.

MASTER OF CEREMONIES
First bow.

MASTER OF CEREMONIES
Second bow.

CLOSE-UP - SU SHANGJING's hands folded on her chest. Her fingers twitch slightly.

A FEMALE GUEST's eyes widen in horror, pointing at the casket.

FEMALE GUEST A
She moved! The body moved!

Everyone looks over, their faces showing alarm.

CUT TO: FLASHBACK

INT. SHABBY BEDROOM - 2019 - DAY

GU YUNUO lies on a bed, giving birth. A MIDWIFE and LIN YUEE attend her.

MIDWIFE
Push! Harder!

LIN YUEE
That's it!

A baby's cry. GU YUNUO looks at the child, exhausted but relieved.

LIN YUEE's expression darkens. She grabs the child.

LIN YUEE
A bastard child with no father? I'll give it a real home.

GU YUNUO
(panicked)
Aunt Lin, no! My baby...

GU YUNUO struggles to reach her child.

GU YUNUO
Please... give him back...

LIN YUEE
(viciously)
You're not fit to be a mother!

LIN YUEE shoves GU YUNUO. Her head slams against the bedside table. Blood flows as she loses consciousness.

LIN YUEE
(to the child, calculating)
Mr. Lin pays well for baby boys.

BACK TO: PRESENT
continuation:
INT. FUNERAL HALL - DAY

The body's eyes snap open. She sits up abruptly.

SU SHANGJING (with GU YUNUO's consciousness)
My child!

The GUESTS scatter in terror, screaming.

GUESTS
(V.O.)
A ghost! A ghost!

YAN JINCHUAN stands in place, looking at her coldly.

YAN JINCHUAN
You really didn't die.

FEMALE GUEST B
(to her companion)
I thought when President Yan divorced her on that dating show, she'd at least have the decency to stay dead.

FEMALE GUEST A
She faked a pregnancy to trap him. Why not fake a suicide?

The woman clutches her head, her expression pained and confused.

SU SHANGJING
Where is this? Where is my child?

She stumbles toward Yan Jinchuan and grabs his arm.

YAN JINCHUAN
(shaking her off)
Su Shangjing, what trick is this?

SU SHANGJING
(desperate, confused)
Su Shangjing? No... I'm...

She looks down at her unfamiliar hands, then at the portrait.

SU SHANGJING
(whispering)
Who is Su Shangjing?

title: The Mom Who Braves All Odds
description: A martial arts master must choose between her sacred secret manual and her daughter's life when betrayed by her closest allies.
context:
Title: The Mom Who Braves All Odds
Description: A martial arts master must choose between her sacred secret manual and her daughter's life when betrayed by her closest allies.

EXT. ANCIENT FOREST - NIGHT

Ancient forest at night. Moonlight reveals a fallen monument. JIN YANCHUAN, masked, drops from the stone and blocks BAI XIUCHUN, in white warrior robes.

JIN YANCHUAN
The Biaoyue Manual. Last chance.

BAI XIUCHUN's stance is unreadable. JIN YANCHUAN attacks. Their exchange ends in three strikes. Bai Xiuchun's palm drops him.

JIN YANCHUAN
(gasping)
The Shadowless Hand...

BAI XIUCHUN
Not today.

Torchlight flares through trees. YING LENGYUE arrives with SUBORDINATES. In their crane's cargo net: GU HONG and daughter JIAJIA, bound.

JIAJIA
Mom!

BAI XIUCHUN
(shocked)
What is this?

SUBORDINATE
Hold!

GU HONG
(bleeding)
She poisoned Master. The manual can't—

YING LENGYUE
(icy)
Enough.

She snaps Gu Hong's neck. He falls.

JIAJIA
(screaming)
Dad!

BAI XIUCHUN
(whisper)
No...
continuation:
YING LENGYUE
Manual or daughter. Choose.

She squeezes Jiajia's shoulder. The girl bites back a cry.

YING LENGYUE
(to Jin Yanchuan)
Uncle. We've won.

She tosses an empty scroll case at Bai Xiuchun's feet.

YING LENGYUE
The Kunshan School ends tonight.

BAI XIUCHUN
(desperate)
Jiajia...

The crane lifts away. Darkness swallows their cries.

EXT. CEMETERY - DAY

Rain slashes across tombs. BAI XIUCHUN and QING HU stand before GU HONG's grave.

BAI XIUCHUN (V.O.)
They taught me to save thousands. Not one.

She pulls the Biaoyue Manual from her robes. Forces it into Qing Hu's hands.

BAI XIUCHUN (V.O.)
Kunshan is dead. Let its ghosts remember.

She touches the tombstone. Rain streams down her face.

BAI XIUCHUN
(to the storm)
Bai Xiuchun is dead.

EXT. WANGFU GUEST HOUSE - DAY

SUPER: FIFTEEN YEARS LATER

Mist clings to a courtyard. APENG practices Wing Chun on a wooden dummy. LIN JUNRU watches from above, sharp-eyed. She fingers a jade pendant.

LIN JUNRU
(quiet)
Jiajia would be twenty-four.

She tucks the pendant away. Descends into morning light.

title: Bringing a Prince to the Modern Era
description: A delivery girl accidentally travels to ancient times and brings a prince back to the modern world.
context:
Title: Bringing a Prince to the Modern Era
Description: A delivery girl accidentally travels to ancient times and brings a prince back to the modern world.

EXT. FILM STUDIO - DAY

On an open field, a yellow electric cart speeds past.

YE ZHAOXI (V.O.)
Two minutes left on the timer.

YE ZHAOXI, a girl wearing a yellow delivery uniform with twin ponytails, stops the cart and grabs the food delivery and her phone. A jade pendant hangs at her neck.

YE ZHAOXI (V.O.)
Last order. Rent's locked.

YE ZHAOXI runs into a large building.

INT. FILM STUDIO CORRIDOR - DAY

YE ZHAOXI sprints through the corridor, passing various actors in costume.

YE ZHAOXI
(dodging through)
Sorry—excuse me!

PASSERBY A
Watch it!

A woman's voice comes from one room.

WOMAN (O.S.)
Dongmei, what are you doing?

In another room, a girl climbs onto a windowsill.

GIRL
Burn, my youth!

YE ZHAOXI continues running forward, passing a simulated airplane cabin set.

FLIGHT ATTENDANT (O.S.)
Ladies and gentlemen, our plane is experiencing turbulence, please remain calm.

INT. AIRPLANE SIMULATION CABIN - DAY

The DIRECTOR sits in front of monitors, watching the flight attendant actress performing.

DIRECTOR
Cut! Who told you to act like that? Can you be more realistic? Do it again!

The DIRECTOR sees YE ZHAOXI at the door.

DIRECTOR
What are you doing?

YE ZHAOXI
I'm delivering food.

DIRECTOR
(impatiently)
Food? Get out!

YE ZHAOXI is driven out. She looks down at her phone.

YE ZHAOXI
(to herself)
Wrong address...

She notices a door marked "HISTORICAL SOUNDSTAGE B-3" and pushes through.
continuation:
INT. ANCIENT MILITARY TENT - DAY

The scene switches to an ancient battlefield, two armies at war.

ON SCREEN: 600 BC - KINGDOM OF DANZHU

Inside the military tent, PRINCE DANZHU wears armor, his back to a sand table. He turns around, his eyes resolute.

PRINCE DANZHU
(to the generals)
The Rong tribes raid our borders. We answer with steel. Today, Danzhu writes its legend!

GENERALS
Long live Danzhu! Long live the Prince!

Suddenly, YE ZHAOXI appears out of nowhere in the military tent. She looks around bewildered.

YE ZHAOXI
(quietly)
This is the spot.

The GENERALS and PRINCE DANZHU stare at her in shock.

YE ZHAOXI
(holding up the delivery bag)
Food delivery.

PRINCE DANZHU
Dismissed.

GENERALS
Yes!

The generals leave. Only PRINCE DANZHU and YE ZHAOXI remain in the tent.

YE ZHAOXI
(handing over the food)
Hello, your delivery has arrived. Remember to give me a five-star review.

She looks curiously at the sand table.

YE ZHAOXI
Wow, your crew made this map so detailed, really authentic. Where's the hidden camera? It's really well hidden.

She reaches out to touch PRINCE DANZHU's armor.

PRINCE DANZHU
(grabbing her hand)
Identify yourself. How did you enter this tent?

YE ZHAOXI
(in pain)
Dude, ow ow ow! Do all you actors get this into your roles?

PRINCE DANZHU restrains her, and they end up in an intimate position close together.

PRINCE DANZHU
If you don't answer, you're a spy.

YE ZHAOXI
Just because you're handsome doesn't mean you can do whatever you want! Are you harassing me? Let go!

PRINCE DANZHU
I have ways to make you talk.

INT. ANCIENT MILITARY TENT - CONTINUOUS

A black-clad ASSASSIN suddenly bursts in.

ASSASSIN
Prince Danzhu, die!

The ASSASSIN swings his blade. PRINCE DANZHU immediately shields YE ZHAOXI behind him. As he turns, the jade pendant on YE ZHAOXI's neck emits a brilliant light.

Space-time distorts, and they are both engulfed by the light.

EXT. OUTSIDE FILM STUDIO - DAY

The light fades. PRINCE DANZHU and YE ZHAOXI appear on a modern street. PRINCE DANZHU looks around in shock at the unfamiliar environment.

PRINCE DANZHU
What place is this?

YE ZHAOXI
(impatiently)
Are all the people in your crew like this? All this fighting and killing.

PRINCE DANZHU
Woman, I ask, you answer. How far is this place from Danzhu?

YE ZHAOXI
Danzhu? That was over two thousand years ago.

PRINCE DANZHU
(shocked)
You're saying Danzhu no longer exists?

YE ZHAOXI
Yeah. It's ancient history.

PRINCE DANZHU staggers back, unable to believe it.

PRINCE DANZHU
Two thousand years have already passed...

YE ZHAOXI looks at his devastated expression and freezes.

YE ZHAOXI
No way? You're really the Prince of Danzhu?

They look at each other. The pendant is now dark and lifeless. Both are in extreme shock.

title: Saving My Primitive Brother
description: A young woman wakes up injured in a deep forest with no memory, only to be saved from a bear attack by a mysterious wild man.
context:
Title: Saving My Primitive Brother
Description: A young woman wakes up injured in a deep forest with no memory, only to be saved from a bear attack by a mysterious wild man.

EXT. FOREST - DAY

Mist shrouds the ancient forest. Silence broken by dripping water.

A young woman (INJURED WOMAN), 25, lies on decaying leaves. Pink sports jacket torn. Blood on her forehead. A broken silver heart necklace.

Her eyes snap open. Pain. She sits up, gasping.

INJURED WOMAN (V.O.)
Breathe. Don't pass out. Move.

INJURED WOMAN
Where...? What happened to me?

She touches her temple—blood. No memories. Only survival.

INJURED WOMAN
I have to get out.

She forces herself up, staggers forward. Alert. Terrified.

A low GROWL. Close.

A massive BLACK BEAR emerges on hind legs. Seven feet tall.

The woman freezes. Backs into a deadfall—trapped.

The bear drops, CHARGES.
continuation:
She covers her face—

A blur. The WILD MAN—matted hair, scarred, draped in furs—grabs her waist, pulls her aside. She faints.

He lays her behind a massive oak.

The Wild Man grabs a dry branch, strikes it against a boulder—CRACK. He beats it against trees in a sharp rhythm.

The bear halts. Uncertain.

The Wild Man stands his ground, holding the branch like a torch.

The bear woofs, shakes its head, retreats into the forest.

The Wild Man watches until it's gone. A choked laugh escapes. He pounds his chest once.

He turns. The woman is conscious now, pressed against the oak.

Her eyes drop to his neck—an identical silver necklace, but whole. She clutches her broken one.

INJURED WOMAN
Who are you?

The Wild Man touches his necklace. Points at her, then himself.

INJURED WOMAN
The legend... Shennongjia wild man?

He tilts his head. Recognition wars with confusion. He extends a hand.

ON SCREEN: TO BE CONTINUED

title: People Who Can't Be Warmed Don't Need to Be Kept
description: A woman endures eight years with a boyfriend who prioritizes his "white moonlight" over her, even abandoning her on her birthday.
context:
Title: People Who Can't Be Warmed Don't Need to Be Kept
Description: A woman endures eight years with a boyfriend who prioritizes his "white moonlight" over her, even abandoning her on her birthday.

INT. HALLWAY - DAY

YE NINGYU and QIN RUNIAN stand together. YE NINGYU's expression is calm, practiced.

YE NINGYU (V.O.)
Eight years of learning to look away while he reaches for someone else. My boyfriend's "white moonlight"—the girl he could never forget. She gets his best smiles. I get the leftovers.

ZHANG KEKE jumps onto QIN RUNIAN's back from behind, wrapping her arms around his neck.

ZHANG KEKE
Penalty for being late! Ten push-ups with me on your back.

QIN RUNIAN
(doting)
You'll break me.

ZHANG KEKE
That's what you said last time.

ZHANG KEKE notices YE NINGYU. She stays on his back.

ZHANG KEKE
Oh. Ningyu. Didn't see you there. Brother Nian and I are just doing our usual. You don't mind, right?

YE NINGYU
(smiling faintly)
Why would I? You're family.

QIN RUNIAN's smile fades. He lowers ZHANG KEKE.

QIN RUNIAN
You're being dramatic.

ZHANG KEKE
We played that game months ago, this is just our thing. You're not still upset about your birthday yesterday, are you? I'll give him back, promise.

YE NINGYU
Keep him. I'm done sharing.
continuation:
INT. RESTAURANT - NIGHT

ONE DAY EARLIER

YE NINGYU wears a birthday crown, sitting before a cake with candles. She closes her eyes.

YE NINGYU
Please let this year be different.

QIN RUNIAN's phone RINGS. He checks it—ZHANG KEKE's photo lights the screen. He answers.

QIN RUNIAN
Keke? What's wrong?

ZHANG KEKE (O.S.)
(sobbing)
He left me. I can't—I don't know what to—

QIN RUNIAN
I'll be right there.

He stands to leave. YE NINGYU's hand catches his wrist.

YE NINGYU
Don't. Please.

QIN RUNIAN
She needs me.

YE NINGYU
I need you. It's my birthday.

QIN RUNIAN
(pulling away)
And she just had her heart broken. Don't be selfish.

YE NINGYU
If you walk out that door—

QIN RUNIAN
(furious, careless)
Stop acting like a child!

He knocks the birthday crown from YE NINGYU's head. It clatters to the floor. He leaves without looking back.

QIN RUNIAN
(into phone)
I'm coming, Keke. Stay on the line.

YE NINGYU watches him go. She picks up the crown. It bends in her hands.

YE NINGYU (V.O.)
Eight years. For this.

INT. APARTMENT - NIGHT

YE NINGYU places a box by the door. Inside: QIN RUNIAN's keys, a phone charger, their graduation photo. She surveys the apartment—his things stacked, hers already gone.

Her phone lights up. QIN RUNIAN calling. She declines. Blocks the number.

The birthday crown sits in the trash, glitter dulled.

YE NINGYU (V.O.)
The heart doesn't break. It calcifies. And then it walks away.

She exits. The door locks with a final CLICK.

title: After the Marriage Swap, My Sister Regrets Everything
description: A successful woman is murdered by her jealous sister at her award ceremony, only to be reborn one year earlier on the day of their arranged marriages, giving her a chance to change their fates.
context:
Title: After the Marriage Swap, My Sister Regrets Everything
Description: A successful woman is murdered by her jealous sister at her award ceremony, only to be reborn one year earlier on the day of their arranged marriages, giving her a chance to change their fates.

INT. AWARD CEREMONY VENUE - NIGHT

Golden confetti rains down. SU LI, elegant in a champagne gown, cradles the Entrepreneur of the Year trophy center stage, her smile genuine but tired.

SU LI (V.O.)
The day I reached the top. Finally.

SU LI traces the trophy's engraving—a moment of quiet triumph. Then her spine straightens. A familiar presence.

SU LI (V.O.)
She couldn't let me have even this.

SU XUE'ER emerges from the wings, stained trench coat over trembling shoulders, a kitchen knife glinting in her white-knuckled grip.

SU LI (V.O.)
My sister. Coming to collect what she thinks I stole.

SU LI's breath catches. She steps back, but the podium blocks her escape.

SU XUE'ER
(whispering, desperate)
It should have been mine.

She lunges. The blade sinks into SU LI's side. No scream—just a sharp exhale. SU LI clutches the wound, crimson blooming between her fingers. She collapses, the trophy clattering beside her.

SU XUE'ER stares at her bloody hands, a sob-choked laugh escaping.

A BODYGUARD vaults onstage, weapon drawn. One shot.

SU XUE'ER jerks, crumples beside her sister. Their eyes lock—one filled with regret, the other with resignation.

ON SCREEN: What if we could choose again?

The image fractures like shattered glass. Time rewinds.

EXT. WEDDING VENUE - DAY

One year earlier. A lavish garden wedding. SU LI and SU XUE'ER stand in identical gowns, but their postures tell different stories—SU LI rigid with duty, SU XUE'ER practically vibrating with anticipation.

SU LI (V.O.)
We stood here once. Before everything burned.

SU XUE'ER beams as she clasps the red silk with JI HAN ZHOU, the tech mogul in his wheelchair, his smile thin and unreadable.
continuation:
INT. HUMBLE WEDDING ROOM - DAY

SU LI sits beside JIANG HAO on a creaking bed, red double happiness peeling at the corners. He offers her tea with careful, calloused hands.

JIANG HAO
(quietly)
I'll make this right. Somehow.

SU LI studies his earnest face, almost believing him.

INT. BOARDROOM - NIGHT

JI HAN ZHOU's empire collapses. Bankers pound the table. SU XUE'ER barges in, hair wild, as a notification lights up her phone: ASSETS FROZEN.

INT. BURNING PENTHOUSE - NIGHT

Flames consume Ji Corporation's headquarters. SU XUE'ER claws at the window, watching her diamond bracelet melt into slag. She laughs, high and broken.

SU XUE'ER
(to the flames)
I chose this! I chose him!

EXT. SNOWY STREET - NIGHT

SU XUE'ER huddles in a designer coat turned inside-out, the label hidden. She shoves her last possession—a gold wedding band—at a street vendor, who tosses it back: "Fake."

INT. AWARD CEREMONY VENUE - DAY

JIANG HAO stands stage-side, filming SU LI's speech on his phone, pride and something like fear in his eyes. She catches his gaze mid-sentence, falters, then smiles for real.

INT. AWARD CEREMONY VENUE - NIGHT

Blood spreads across the stage. SU LI's vision tunnels. Her fingers find the trophy—cold, meaningless.

SU LI (V.O.)
Jiang Hao's empire. My empire. We built it from nothing. She destroyed it from spite.

The shattered glass effect intensifies.

INT. SU FAMILY LIVING ROOM - DAY

SU LI gasps, jerking upright on the sofa. White dress. Living parents. The scent of her mother's perfume—suffocatingly familiar.

SU MOTHER (O.S.)
—listening? Honestly, Su Li, you're so—

SU MOTHER and SU FATHER loom over her, faces rearranged into concerned masks.

SU MOTHER
That poor boy is waiting downstairs. You'll do as you're told.

SU FATHER
(tamping his pipe, not looking up)
Xue'er's made her choice. Don't embarrass us.

SU LI's knuckles whiten on the sofa arm. The phantom pain lingers.

SU LI (V.O.)
The fire. Jiang Hao's first algorithm. The date on the newspaper. All here. All real.

SU MOTHER
(leaning close, voice syrupy)
Be a good daughter. Your sister deserves this chance.

SU LI's eyes lift. Not to her mother—to the family portrait above the mantle. Her own face, carefully blurred in the background.

SU LI (V.O.)
Or maybe I deserve it.

SU LI stands. Her spine straightens with a deliberation that makes her parents exchange a glance.

SU LI
Let me marry Ji Han Zhou.

SU FATHER's pipe freezes mid-tamp. SU MOTHER's smile cracks.

SU XUE'ER appears in the doorway, pink dress too tight, victory already written on her face until she hears the words.

SU XUE'ER
What? No—I'll take Jiang Hao.

Her voice is too quick. Desperate. She catches herself, smooths her expression.

SU XUE'ER
(carefully, to her parents)
He's... more suitable. For me.

SU LI watches her sister twist the narrative. The trophy's phantom weight in her hand. The knife's phantom pain in her side.

SU LI
Then it's settled.

She extends her hand—not to her parents, to SU XUE'ER. A mirror of the red silk ritual.

SU LI
Sisters shouldn't fight over fate.

SU XUE'ER stares at the offered hand like it's a weapon.

title: After Letting Go, The Scumbag Begs Me For Forgiveness
description: A former heiress, now sick and destitute, confronts her ex-lover on his wedding day, seeking help for her illness while uncovering the truth of her downfall.
context:
Title: After Letting Go, The Scumbag Begs Me For Forgiveness
Description: A former heiress, now sick and destitute, confronts her ex-lover on his wedding day, seeking help for her illness while uncovering the truth of her downfall.

INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - DAY

MU NINGNING stumbles forward, her face pale, clutching a medical report. She gasps for breath as a passing patient nears—she flinches, crashing into the wall. Pain doubles her over. She leans there, trembling.

INT. DOCTOR'S OFFICE - DAY (FLASHBACK)

MU NINGNING sits across from the DOCTOR.

DOCTOR
Your balance is sixty thousand in arrears. The pharmacy won't release your ART.

MU NINGNING
(voice thin)
My mother's estate—

DOCTOR
—was liquidated two years ago. The hospital isn't a charity.

INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - DAY

MU NINGNING leans against the wall, a tear sliding down. She opens the report: "HIV Antibody Positive" in bold type. She crumples it, then forces it flat, smoothing the paper with obsessive care.

INT. NURSE STATION - DAY

MU NINGNING passes the nurse station. TWO NURSES gossip, not bothering to whisper.

NURSE A
That's Mu Ningning? The one whose mother built this wing?

NURSE B
Now look at her. AIDS, broke, and alone.

NURSE A
I heard she gave everything to some man.

NURSE B
The Horizon Group CEO. He Jingchen.

Mu Ningning freezes mid-step, then keeps walking.
continuation:
INT. HOSPITAL LOBBY - DAY

The TV broadcasts news. Photos of HE JINGCHEN and FANG JINGYI in evening wear.

NEWS ANCHOR (V.O.)
He Jingchen, Horizon Group's youngest billionaire, and fiancée Fang Jingyi prepare for their wedding at Wanhao Grand Hotel...

Mu Ningning watches from the shadows. She looks down at her phone—cracked screen, eviction notice in her texts. She twists the jade bracelet on her wrist, a gift from her mother. She doesn't take it off.

EXT. WEDDING HOTEL ENTRANCE - DAY

MU NINGNING approaches the service entrance. A BODYGUARD blocks her path.

BODYGUARD
Private event. Move along.

She tries to dart past. He shoves her back—she falls hard against a marble planter. Blood trickles from her palm.

The main doors open.

HE JINGCHEN and FANG JINGYI emerge—him in a suit, her in a silk robe over her wedding dress, phone in hand as if interrupted.

HE JINGCHEN
Mu Ningning?

MU NINGNING
(struggling up)
He Jingchen. Please. Just five minutes.

FANG JINGYI
(contemptuous)
She's here for money. Isn't that right?

MU NINGNING
The company transfer. You signed for my medical trust.

HE JINGCHEN
(leaning against the wall)
That trust was contingent on you remaining an employee. You quit, remember?

MU NINGNING
You told me to sign over my shares first. Then you'd marry me.

FANG JINGYI
And you believed him? How pathetic.

MU NINGNING
(to He Jingchen)
I have nothing left. Just lend me enough for the medication. I'll disappear.

HE JINGCHEN
Nothing left? You have your mother's jade.

Her hand flies to the bracelet.

HE JINGCHEN (CONT'D)
But that's not enough. You want my money, you earn it.

He takes out a black card. Waves it slowly.

HE JINGCHEN (CONT'D)
Kneel. Lick my shoe clean. Then we'll discuss your allowance.

Mu Ningning stares at him. For the first time, her tears stop. Something behind her eyes hardens.

Her knees begin to bend.

title: Educating Children Properly
description: A well-mannered woman and her elderly mother encounter a spoiled child and his enabling grandmother at a hotel, leading to escalating conflicts on Chinese New Year's Eve.
context:
Title: Educating Children Properly
Description: A well-mannered woman and her elderly mother encounter a spoiled child and his enabling grandmother at a hotel, leading to escalating conflicts on Chinese New Year's Eve.

INT. JINGCHENG GRAND HOTEL CORRIDOR - DAY

GU QINGCI (red coat, capable) supports her MOTHER (white coat, gentle) who is using a cane as they walk slowly down the polished corridor.

GU QINGCI
Mom, the doctor said not to rush.

MOTHER
(smiling, patting her hand)
I'm just happy to be out for New Year's.

CUI PENGPENG (red Tang suit) darts around the corner, toy gun in hand, cartoon mask askew. He barrels forward without looking.

CUI PENGPENG
(as he runs)
Bang! Bang! You're all—

He crashes into MOTHER's cane. MOTHER stumbles, her handbag slipping. GU QINGCI catches her just before she falls.

GU QINGCI
(steadies her mother, then turns)
Hey! Watch where you're—

She stops as CUI PENGPENG, mask now off, stares at them with wide, unapologetic eyes.

MOTHER
(breathing heavily)
Qingci, it's alright. He didn't mean—

CUI PENGPENG
(whining)
You blocked my way!

He spits on the carpet near GU QINGCI's feet. GU QINGCI's jaw tightens.

GU QINGCI
(low, controlled)
Apologize to my mother.

WANG YUFENG rushes over, immediately positioning herself between them.

WANG YUFENG
(to GU QINGCI, sharp)
For what? He was just playing! Your mother should watch her step.

MOTHER
(quietly firm)
It's Chinese New Year. Let's not...

She squeezes GU QINGCI's arm. GU QINGCI exhales slowly, helping her mother continue down the corridor.

WANG YUFENG mutters loud enough to hear.

WANG YUFENG
Some people have no holiday spirit.
continuation:
INT. HOTEL FRONT DESK - DAY

WANG YUFENG leans over the counter toward the HOTEL RECEPTIONIST, CUI PENGPENG picking at a complimentary candy display.

WANG YUFENG
The premium gift basket. I was promised it would be ready.

HOTEL RECEPTIONIST
(professional)
It's being prepared, madam. Please—

CRASH. The blue and white porcelain vase on the counter shatters at their feet. CUI PENGPENG stands frozen, hand still outstretched.

HOTEL RECEPTIONIST
(stiffens)
That was a Ming dynasty replica. Valued at 8,800 yuan.

WANG YUFENG
(grabs CUI PENGPENG's hand, inspecting it)
Are you hurt? Why do you put such fragile things where children can reach them?

HOTEL RECEPTIONIST
Madam, the vase was clearly—

WANG YUFENG
(cold smile)
He's six years old. The law says children under eight have no civil liability. Check your regulations.

She guides CUI PENGPENG away, leaving the receptionist pale with anger but motionless.

WANG YUFENG
(quietly to Pengpeng)
Grandma will handle it. Don't worry.

INT. HOTEL CORRIDOR - DAY

WANG YUFENG and CUI PENGPENG walk down another corridor lined with display shelves. CUI PENGPENG trails his hand along a ceramic tea set.

CUI PENGPENG
Grandma, are we in trouble?

WANG YUFENG
No, sweetie. Grandma protects you. Always.

Ahead, GU QINGCI and her MOTHER stand outside their private dining room. GU QINGCI is speaking quietly with the SERVER.

GU QINGCI
...and please, no peanuts. My mother is allergic.

MOTHER
(notices the boy)
Qingci, let it be.

But GU QINGCI has already turned, her expression changing. She watches as CUI PENGPENG, more hesitantly now, reaches for another object on the shelf. His hand pauses.

Their eyes meet—GU QINGCI's exhausted but unwavering, CUI PENGPENG's defiant but uncertain. WANG YUFENG follows his gaze, her protective mask flickering for a second.

The SERVER holds open the dining room door.

SERVER
Madam, your family is waiting.

GU QINGCI guides her mother inside, glancing back once more before the door closes softly.

WANG YUFENG stares at the closed door, then down at CUI PENGPENG, who has quietly withdrawn his hand from the shelf.

WANG YUFENG
(quieter than before)
Come on. Grandma's tired.

They walk away, CUI PENGPENG now holding her hand instead of the toy gun, his mask forgotten on the floor behind them.

title: Internet Cafe Chaos
description: A timid technician finds himself in an awkward situation with a flirtatious customer just as an earthquake strikes the internet cafe.
context:
Title: Internet Cafe Chaos
Description: A timid technician finds himself in an awkward situation with a flirtatious customer just as an earthquake strikes the internet cafe.

INT. INTERNET CAFE - DAY

XIAO PANG sits in front of a computer, rapidly typing on the keyboard. The screen displays a BIOS interface.

XIAO PANG (V.O.)
CPU temps in the red. Classic cooling failure.

A foot wearing black stockings and platform shoes suddenly props up on XIAO PANG's desk, startling him.

FEMALE CUSTOMER sits in a gaming chair, legs on the desk, watching XIAO PANG with amusement.

FEMALE CUSTOMER
My hero. How's the rescue mission going?

XIAO PANG
(nervous)
Working on it, almost done.

FEMALE CUSTOMER pulls her legs back, sees tissues on the desk, and picks them up.

FEMALE CUSTOMER
You're drenched. Let me help.

FEMALE CUSTOMER approaches XIAO PANG with the tissue to wipe his sweat. XIAO PANG quickly dodges.

XIAO PANG
(defensive)
I've got it.

XIAO PANG takes the tissue and wipes his sweat, continuing to work on the computer.

FEMALE CUSTOMER
So... you always this dedicated? Or is this just for me?

XIAO PANG
(avoiding eye contact)
Just... doing my job.

FEMALE CUSTOMER
Right. So no girlfriend waiting at home?

XIAO PANG
I... that's personal.

FEMALE CUSTOMER
(teasing)
Just curious. You seem so... untouchable.

XIAO PANG immediately stands up.

XIAO PANG
Actually, this unit needs a full replacement. I'll get you another station.

XIAO PANG turns to leave. FEMALE CUSTOMER grabs his arm.

FEMALE CUSTOMER
Wait! I like this one. Just finish what you started.
continuation:
INT. INTERNET CAFE FRONT DESK - DAY

MALE CUSTOMER pounds the front desk, complaining to the FEMALE BOSS.

MALE CUSTOMER
Eight disconnections! Where's your tech support?

FEMALE BOSS
Sorry, please wait a moment, I'll get someone to fix it for you right away.

MALE CUSTOMER
Hurry up!

FEMALE BOSS watches the MALE CUSTOMER walk away, impatiently shouting into the cafe.

FEMALE BOSS
Xiao Pang! Xiao Pang! Never know what he's doing all day, can't find him when you need him.

INT. INTERNET CAFE - DAY

XIAO PANG reluctantly returns to the FEMALE CUSTOMER's computer.

XIAO PANG
Alright, let me check if the cables underneath are plugged in properly.

XIAO PANG lies on the ground, crawling under the desk to check the wiring.

FEMALE BOSS walks over, looking around for XIAO PANG, then sees him under the desk.

FEMALE BOSS bends down, looking at XIAO PANG under the desk.

FEMALE BOSS
What are you doing?

XIAO PANG
(startled)
Behind schedule, I know!

FEMALE BOSS
(suspicious)
Fixing the computer by crawling under the desk? Get up right now, there's a customer over there with a computer problem.

XIAO PANG
Okay.

XIAO PANG is about to crawl out from under the desk when FEMALE CUSTOMER suddenly looks down, pretending to be alarmed as she covers her short skirt.

FEMALE CUSTOMER
(overreacting)
Hey! What are you—

FEMALE BOSS
(severe)
Xiao Pang, get up here!

XIAO PANG
(pleading)
It's not what it looks like!

FEMALE CUSTOMER
(flustered)
I didn't— I mean, he wasn't—

The entire cafe SHAKES. Monitors topple.

MALE CUSTOMER (O.S.)
Earthquake! Under the desks!

FEMALE CUSTOMER freezes. XIAO PANG grabs her wrist.

XIAO PANG
(authoritative)
Under. Now.

He pulls her down as the lights FLICKER OUT. Darkness, dust, and the sound of structural groans.

FADE TO BLACK.

title: Remarrying on My Wedding Day, Ex-Husband's Uncle Dotes on Me Alone
description: On her wedding day, the bride discovers her groom's infidelity on the big screen. She declares she will marry on the spot and seeks a new groom from the guests, leading to an unexpected turn of events.
context:
Title: Remarrying on My Wedding Day, Ex-Husband's Uncle Dotes on Me Alone
Description: On her wedding day, the bride discovers her groom's infidelity on the big screen. She declares she will marry on the spot and seeks a new groom from the guests, leading to an unexpected turn of events.

INT. HOTEL ROOM - DAY

LIN ZITAO and WU SHANSHAN tumble onto the bed, clothes askew.

LIN ZITAO
This young master will conquer you tonight.

WU SHANSHAN
(giggling)
Don't rush.

INT. WEDDING VENUE - DAY

The wedding venue is decorated lavishly. XIE WEI, in a white wedding dress, walks down the aisle with a bouquet. Her smile is genuine.

WEDDING MC (V.O.)
Distinguished guests, welcome to the wedding of Mr. Lin Zitao and Ms. Xie Wei. Let's welcome our beautiful bride!

Guests applaud.

WEDDING MC (V.O.)
And now, the groom!

The large screen flickers. Instead of a romantic video, LIVE FOOTAGE shows Lin Zitao and Wu Shanshan in the hotel room.

Xie Wei stops dead. The bouquet drops from her hands.

GUESTS (V.O.)
Is that real?
The groom's cheating?
On his wedding day?

On screen, Wu Shanshan looks directly into the camera.

WU SHANSHAN
He's mine, Xie Wei. Always has been.

Xie Wei stands frozen, then her expression shifts from shock to steel.

GUEST A
This wedding is finished.

GUEST B
The Xie family is humiliated.

Xie Wei bends down, picks up the microphone. Her hand trembles, then steadies.

XIE WEI
Today's wedding will proceed. The groom will not.

The guests erupt.

XIE WEI
I need a man. Right here, right now. Any single man willing to marry me—I'll say yes.
continuation:
TWO MEN rush the stage.

MAN #1
I volunteer!

MAN #2
Pick me!

A sharp whistle cuts through. YOUNG MASTER HUANG appears, shoving them aside.

YOUNG MASTER HUANG
You dare compete with me?

He strides to Xie Wei, leering.

YOUNG MASTER HUANG
Don't worry, darling. I'll take care of you.

He reaches for her face. Xie Wei jerks back.

XIE WEI
Don't touch me! I never chose you.

YOUNG MASTER HUANG
You're damaged goods. Who else would want you?

Some guests start chanting.

GUESTS
Marry him! Marry him!

Young Master Huang grabs Xie Wei's arm.

XIE WEI
Let go! Get off me!

GUEST C
That's Huang Daqian—the richest man here.

GUEST D
She's trading one hell for another.

YOUNG MASTER HUANG
(leaning in)
Give me a kiss, pretty—

Suddenly, LIN CHENGYI rushes forward and slams his fist into Young Master Huang's face.

Young Master Huang crumples.

LIN CHENGYI stands protectively before Xie Wei, adjusting his glasses.

LIN CHENGYI
This woman is marrying me.

Xie Wei stares up at him, breathless.

FADE OUT.

title: Beyond Saving
description: A woman discovers her husband has terminal leukemia, unaware that he believes she is the one dying.
context:
Title: Beyond Saving
Description: A woman discovers her husband has terminal leukemia, unaware that he believes she is the one dying.

INT. DOCTOR'S OFFICE - DAY

Doctor GU YICHEN sits at his desk, facing SU MINGXUE.

GU YICHEN
Your husband has leukemia. Terminal stage.

SU MINGXUE is shocked. A glass cup falls from her hand and shatters on the floor.

SU MINGXUE
What? Leukemia?

GU YICHEN
Yes, terminal stage leukemia. If he doesn't get a bone marrow transplant, he probably only has a week left.

SU MINGXUE
(muttering to herself)
Bone marrow transplant...
(urgently)
You mean if he gets a bone marrow transplant, he can live?

GU YICHEN
(nodding)
Yes.

SU MINGXUE
Then let's do the transplant! How much does it cost?

GU YICHEN
At least 600,000 yuan.

SU MINGXUE
(shocked)
Six... 600,000... Why so much?

SU MINGXUE
Yichen, please help me find suitable bone marrow. I'll go raise the money right now!

SU MINGXUE gets up to leave. GU YICHEN grabs her arm.

GU YICHEN
Wait!

GU YICHEN takes out a bank card.

GU YICHEN
I have 300,000 here. Take it first. No rush to pay it back.

SU MINGXUE
No, Yichen, this is too much. I can't accept it.

GU YICHEN
(grabbing SU MINGXUE's hand, pressing the card into it)
Mingxue! If you hadn't given up your job back then, this money would be nothing to you. Saving a life is what matters. Just take it.

SU MINGXUE
(moved)
Yichen... Thank you. I will definitely pay you back.

GU YICHEN
Mingxue, for three years I've wanted to ask you - was it really worth it? Giving up your million-yuan annual salary for Sun Hong?

FLASHBACK BEGINS:

In the scene, SU MINGXUE lies at a car accident site, covered in blood.

SUN HONG (V.O.)
Mingxue! Mingxue!

The scene cuts to a hospital room. SU MINGXUE has bandages wrapped around her head. SUN HONG sits by the bed, his face exhausted with worry.

SUN HONG
Mingxue, you're awake.

FLASHBACK ENDS.
continuation:
INT. DOCTOR'S OFFICE - DAY

SU MINGXUE
(bitter smile)
Of course it was. He saved my life back then. Now that he's in this situation, even if I have to sell everything I own, I'll save him.

GU YICHEN
Mingxue, back then, maybe...

SU MINGXUE
(interrupting)
Yichen, is it true what you said? If he has the surgery, he can live?

GU YICHEN
(hesitating briefly)
Yes.

GU YICHEN
The surgery requires registration. Let me take you to handle it.

INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - DAY

SUN HONG leans against the wall on his phone, his voice low and tense.

SUN HONG
(into phone)
She's still pushing for more tests. Thinks it's about her.
(listens)
No, she doesn't know. Just keep quiet for now.

He sees SU MINGXUE and GU YICHEN walking toward him. He ends the call.

SUN HONG
Mingxue!

SUN HONG rushes up to them.

SUN HONG
Another consultation?

SU MINGXUE
I wasn't feeling well.

SUN HONG
(to Gu Yichen)
And you need to hold her hand for that?

GU YICHEN
(withdrawing his hand)
I was helping her up.

SUN HONG
(turning to Mingxue)
Where's the report?

SU MINGXUE
Still processing.

Two NURSES walk by, one carrying a patient file.

NURSE A
Room 309's wife still doesn't know. Terminal AML.

NURSE B
Six hundred thousand yuan. They'll never raise it in time.

SUN HONG overhears the conversation. His expression changes drastically as he stares in shock at the direction SU MINGXUE left.

SUN HONG
(whispered)
309... that's my room...

He looks down at his phone. His lock screen shows their wedding photo.

He deletes a number from his call log: "Lawyer."

SUN HONG
(to himself)
What have I become...

title: If Only I Had Known
description: A woman who neglected her mother for years returns for her birthday, only to discover a tragic accident that changes everything.
context:
Title: If Only I Had Known
Description: A woman who neglected her mother for years returns for her birthday, only to discover a tragic accident that changes everything.

EXT. VILLAGE PATH - DAY

Quick cuts: An elderly woman (WANG HUIRU, 70s) falls to the ground, her head hitting a stone. Blood trickles from her temple.

WANG HUIRU
(whispering, disoriented)
Dalong... Xiaoting... the soup...

A college student (JIANG QINGYA, 20s) jogs along the path, stopping short at the sight. She rushes forward, kneeling.

JIANG QINGYA
(gasping)
Auntie Wang! Can you hear me?

Jiang Qingya's fingers tremble as she dials her phone.

WANG HUIRU
(mumbling)
Xiaoting's favorite... red dates...

JIANG QINGYA
(into phone, urgent)
Emergency? Village path east of Willow Creek. Elderly woman, head trauma, unconscious. Yes, immediately!

SIRENS wail in the distance, growing louder.

JIANG QINGYA
(squeezing Wang's hand)
Stay with me. They're coming. Your children need you.

The AMBULANCE screeches to a halt. DR. HU (40s) and a NURSE leap out.

DR. HU
Ma'am, move aside please.

Dr. Hu performs a rapid assessment, his expression grim.

DR. HU
(to Nurse)
GCS 8, possible epidural hematoma. Let's move. Sir, we need family contact.

JIANG QINGYA
I live nearby. I can sign, but please—save her first.

DR. HU
Get in.

INT. SEDAN - DAY

CHEN XIAOTING (35), polished nails gripping the wheel, navigates narrow village roads.

CHEN XIAOTING
(into bluetooth)
Brother, I'm literally five minutes away. Put Mom on, I'll apologize for being late.

CHEN DALONG (V.O.)
She's not answering. It's her birthday, Ting. She waited all morning.

CHEN XIAOTING
(exhaling sharply)
I know. I bought her that coat she wanted. And these cakes from Shanghai—cost a fortune. I'm trying, okay?

She checks her reflection, dabbing lipstick.

CHEN DALONG (V.O.)
Dad died waiting for us to come home. Don't let Mom—

CHEN XIAOTING
(cutting him off)
I'm here now. That's what matters.

The ambulance ROARS around a blind curve, directly toward her.

CHEN XIAOTING
(screaming)
Move! Move!

She jerks the wheel, mounting the embankment. Metal SCREECHES—her mirror rips off, smashing against the ambulance. The vehicle shudders to a halt.

CHEN XIAOTING
(clutching her bleeding hand)
You maniac!

She stumbles out, ready to scream, then freezes.

Through the ambulance's open rear doors, she sees Dr. Hu working frantically. The patient is tiny, frail. A flash of gray hair. A familiar sweater.

Her breath catches. The cake box tumbles from her hands.
continuation:
INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - DAY

Chen Xiaoting sprints after the gurney, blood dripping from her hand unnoticed.

CHEN XIAOTING
(panicked)
Mom? Mom! That's my mother!

DR. HU
(stern)
Wait here.

The double doors SLAM shut. Chen Dalong (40s) rushes in, breathless.

CHEN DALONG
Mom? Where is she? What happened?

CHEN XIAOTING
(whispering)
I saw her, Dalong. I saw her on that stretcher. The blood...

Her legs give way. He catches her.

CHEN DALONG
(to reception)
Our mother—Wang Huiru—just arrived. I'm her son.

RECEPTIONIST
Sir, the doctor needs consent for emergency craniotomy. Are you immediate family?

CHEN XIAOTING
(voice cracking)
I'm her daughter. I'll sign. I'll sign anything.

She grabs the forms, her designer handbag slipping from her shoulder.

INT. HOSPITAL WAITING ROOM - NIGHT

Four hours later. The brothersister sit in silence. Chen Xiaoting's nails are chipped, her coat stained with her own blood.

DR. HU enters, surgical cap in hand. They spring up.

DR. HU
She's stable. We relieved the pressure. But...

He pauses.

DR. HU (CONT'D)
Mrs. Wang signed a DNR three years ago. She has extensive cerebral hemorrhage. Even if she wakes, quality of life...

CHEN XIAOTING
(swaying)
Three years ago? When Dad died?

DR. HU
(nods)
She didn't want to burden her children. Said you'd moved to the city, had important lives.

Chen Xiaoting stumbles to a chair, the words a physical blow.

CHEN DALONG
(quietly)
We haven't been home in three years, Ting. Three birthdays we missed.

INT. HOSPITAL ROOM - NIGHT

Wang Huiru lies unconscious, monitors beeping softly. Chen Xiaoting sits at her bedside, holding her weathered hand.

CHEN XIAOTING
(trembling)
Mom... it's me. Xiaoting.

She produces the cake box, crushed and smeared.

CHEN XIAOTING (CONT'D)
I brought your favorite. Red bean. Just like you used to make.

A tear falls on their joined hands.

CHEN XIAOTING (CONT'D)
You called my name. You were waiting for me. And I... I almost hit the ambulance.

She reaches into her bag, pulling out a designer coat.

CHEN XIAOTING (CONT'D)
This? This doesn't matter. None of it matters.

She buries her face in her mother's arm.

CHEN XIAOTING (CONT'D)
Please. Just one more chance. Let me make the soup this time. Let me...

EXT. VILLAGE HOUSE - DAY (FLASHBACK)

A younger Wang Huiru stirs a pot, Chen Xiaoting (15) beside her.

WANG HUIRU
When I'm old, will you still make this for me?

YOUNG CHEN XIAOTING
Every single birthday, Mom. Promise.

INT. HOSPITAL ROOM - NIGHT

Chen Xiaoting looks at her mother, then at her own manicured hands. She begins picking at the nail polish, each chip a revelation.

CHEN XIAOTING
(to herself)
Every... single... birthday.

She curls up beside her mother, finally home.

title: Wings of Time
description: A pop diva and her producer are reborn into 1978 after a fatal car accident, where they must navigate new lives in a world decades before their own time.
context:
Title: Wings of Time
Description: A pop diva and her producer are reborn into 1978 after a fatal car accident, where they must navigate new lives in a world decades before their own time.

EXT. AWARD CEREMONY RED CARPET - NIGHT

Fans scream wildly, holding up banners with "SHEN WU" and "HEARTTHROB" written on them.

CLOSE UP: A pair of black high heels descending stairs.

SHEN WU, a pop diva, wears a gorgeous black evening gown. She elegantly walks down the stairs, smiling and waving to fans. She steps onto the red carpet. Flashbulbs pop constantly, fans cheer one after another.

INT. SEDAN - NIGHT

SHEN WU sits in the back seat, rubbing her temples, looking somewhat tired. Her manager and best friend XU YIN sits beside her.

XU YIN
(low, proud)
You did it, Xiao Wu. One year, and you own the stage. The critics who said you'd burn out can eat their words now.

SHEN WU
(softly)
The words are yours, Yin. Every lyric you bled onto paper. I just sang them loud enough for people to hear.

XU YIN
We built this together. No takebacks.

SHEN WU
(quiet vulnerability)
Promise me something. When we get to the afterparty, don't make me network. Just... let me breathe. With you.

XU YIN
(counting on fingers)
Three songs, two handshakes, one photo. Then I smuggle you out the back.

SHEN WU
Deal.

Suddenly, a large truck drives toward them head-on. Blinding lights illuminate the car interior. XU YIN instinctively grabs SHEN WU's hand.

XU YIN
(yelling)
Hold on—

SOUND EFFECT: Piercing brake sounds and violent collision.

INT. UNFAMILIAR ROOM - DAY

SHEN WU wakes up in a man's arms. She is wearing festive red clothing. The man is LU XUAN.

SHEN WU (V.O.)
(horrified realization)
These aren't my hands. This isn't my body. This is—

LU XUAN
(opening his eyes)
Shen Wu, what are you doing?

SHEN WU
(groggily)
Get up, hey you...

LU XUAN
Get up!

SHEN WU
(hugging tighter, mumbling)
No, no, no... if I wake up, I'm dead. We both are. Just let me—

LU XUAN
Shen Wu, Shen Wu!

LU XUAN pushes SHEN WU away forcefully. She falls from the bed to the floor.

LU XUAN
Shen Wu!

SHEN WU
(painfully)
That hurts. Dreams don't hurt like this.

SHEN WU looks around. The room has old-fashioned wooden furniture, with red double happiness paper cuts on the walls. The style is very dated.

SHEN WU
(confused)
Where... where is this? The set design is too detailed for a—

LU XUAN
(settling back on the bed, cold)
Save your performance for Lin Zhiyuan. You got what you wanted, didn't you? Ran from our wedding night straight into his arms.

LU XUAN pulls out a packed bundle from under the bed and throws it on the floor beside her.

LU XUAN
It's signed. Be gone by dawn.

SHEN WU
(shocked)
Educated youth? Divorce?
continuation:
EXT. NIGHT STREET - NIGHT

QUICK CUTS: SHEN WU runs through old streets carrying the bundle, expression panicked. A man chases behind her. Another man looks at her in horror.

SHEN WU (V.O.)
(deeper panic setting in)
I'm in a stranger's skin, running from a stranger's husband, in a world that shouldn't exist. Yin... where are you?

INT. UNFAMILIAR ROOM - DAY

SHEN WU sits on the edge of the bed, arms crossed over her chest, face full of disbelief.

SHEN WU (V.O.)
(cold dread pooling)
Traveling through time. That's not... that's not a thing. But I felt the truck hit us. I felt—

GIRL (O.S.)
Ah! Who are you?

SHEN WU is startled and turns around.

GIRL
Yin Yin! Yin Yin, something happened, Yin Yin!

A girl wearing a red sweater and green skirt rushes in. It's XU YIN's appearance—but younger, thinner, desperate.

SHEN WU
(running over, voice cracking)
Yin? Is that... you?

XU YIN
(grasping her hands)
Sister Shen! I woke up in this body and I knew—somehow I knew you'd be here. I ran every street in this damned town until—

SHEN WU
(urgent whisper)
The truck. The award. Did you—

XU YIN
(low voice, haunted)
I remember dying. I remember your hand in mine. And then... this.

The two embrace, shaking.

SHEN WU
(pulling back, studying her face)
You're seventeen. You look seventeen.

XU YIN
(mock laugh)
You're married. You look terrified.

SHEN WU
(quietly)
Ten years of life and death, so vast.

XU YIN
(whispering)
Five years of sound and death, so vast.

XU YIN
Sister!

SHEN WU
Sister!

The two embrace excitedly.

Their eyes fall on a calendar on the wall.

CLOSE UP: The calendar clearly shows the year "1978".

The two turn their heads simultaneously, looking at each other, faces filled with shock and fear.

SHEN WU & XU YIN
(in unison, V.O.)
We really traveled through time!

title: Time Agent
description: A terminally ill man attempts suicide after being abandoned by his girlfriend, but a mysterious Time Elder saves him and grants him a pocket watch that can extend life, see death countdowns, and manipulate time.
context:
Title: Time Agent
Description: A terminally ill man attempts suicide after being abandoned by his girlfriend, but a mysterious Time Elder saves him and grants him a pocket watch that can extend life, see death countdowns, and manipulate time.

NARRATOR (V.O.)
(Girlfriend's voice)
Li Yang, let's break up. I won't be with someone who has a terminal illness.

EXT. RAINY STREET - NIGHT

LI YANG, wearing a plaid shirt, staggers through the rain. He covers his mouth, coughing. A medical bracelet on his wrist.

EXT. ROOFTOP - NIGHT

LI YANG stands at the edge of the rooftop, blood at the corner of his mouth, his eyes hollow. Below, a crowd gathers, phones raised to record.

LI YANG looks down at the crowd, his expression anguished.

NARRATOR (V.O.)
(Girlfriend's voice)
Take a good look at yourself and see what you really are.

LI YANG (V.O.)
I gave you everything I had. I was truly blind.

LI YANG spreads his arms and falls backward, plummeting from the high-rise.
continuation:
EXT. STREET - NIGHT

Time suddenly stops. Everything and everyone on the street freezes. Flower petals from a man's hand hang suspended in mid-air. Popcorn from a girl's hand also stops in mid-air.

A ragged, white-haired TIME ELDER slowly walks toward the falling LI YANG.

The TIME ELDER extends his hand. LI YANG's body floats in the air, then is gently placed on the ground.

Time resumes. LI YANG lies on the ground, groaning in pain.

LI YANG
Ah!

LI YANG jolts awake and finds himself lying safely on the ground. Confused, he stands up and looks at the crowd around him.

LI YANG
What's going on?

The TIME ELDER walks up to him, holding a pocket watch.

TIME ELDER
Young man, since you paid for it, this pocket watch is yours.

LI YANG
Pocket watch?

EXT. STREET CORNER - NIGHT (FLASHBACK)

The TIME ELDER stops a distraught LI YANG.

TIME ELDER
Young man, want to buy something? This pocket watch is a good item. Only five hundred yuan.

LI YANG gives a bitter smile and pulls out all his cash from his pocket, handing it to the TIME ELDER.

LI YANG
Old man, this money doesn't mean anything to me anymore. I don't need the watch. You keep it.

LI YANG turns to leave.

EXT. STREET - NIGHT

The TIME ELDER holds the watch up. It glows softly.

TIME ELDER
It measures what you have left. Save a life, gain half a day. The rest will reveal itself.

The TIME ELDER places the pocket watch in LI YANG's hand and then disappears.

LI YANG looks at the pocket watch in his hand. The watch glows and forms a countdown on his arm: 06:59:59.

LI YANG stares in shock at the numbers on his arm, then looks at the crowd around him.

LI YANG
Old man!

LI YANG's ex-girlfriend appears in the crowd, looking at him with confusion.

ON SCREEN: TO BE CONTINUED

title: Longing Under the Bright Moon
description: A wealthy mother searches for her lost daughter while her son prepares to introduce his girlfriend, unaware of the connection that binds them.
context:
Title: Longing Under the Bright Moon
Description: A wealthy mother searches for her lost daughter while her son prepares to introduce his girlfriend, unaware of the connection that binds them.

INT. CHEN FAMILY MANSION - DAY

CHEN FENG sits on a luxurious sofa, a silver picture frame in her lap. She runs her thumb over the glass, lost in thought. After a moment, she sets it face-down on the cushion beside her.

CHEN NIANMING enters, loosening his tie. He notices the frame, hesitates.

CHEN NIANMING
Mom. I was hoping we could talk.

CHEN FENG
(quickly smoothing her expression)
Of course. About what?

She reaches for the frame, but Nianming sits beside her, blocking it.

CHEN NIANMING
I've been seeing someone. For two years now.

CHEN FENG's hand stills. She looks at him, hope flickering.

CHEN NIANMING
(gentle)
Not about Mingyue. The investigators haven't... there are no new leads.

The hope in CHEN FENG's eyes dims. She withdraws her hand, folds it in her lap.

CHEN FENG
I see.

A beat. She forces a smile.

CHEN FENG
But this... this is good news. Tell me about her.

CHEN NIANMING
Her name is Sisi. She's nothing like what you'd expect.

CHEN FENG
Meaning?

CHEN NIANMING
She's... herself. Not from our world. But she'll fit. I know she will.

CHEN FENG
(small smile)
You sound certain.

CHEN NIANMING
I am. Dinner tonight. Her father too.

CHEN FENG nods, glancing at the overturned frame.

CHEN FENG
Then we should prepare something appropriate.

CHEN AIMING enters with a fruit platter, notices the tension.

CHEN AIMING
Mom? Everything alright?

CHEN FENG
Your brother's finally bringing someone home.

CHEN AIMING
(to NIANMING, teasing)
Two years? You actually managed to keep a secret?

CHEN NIANMING
She's worth protecting.

CHEN FENG stands, her composure returning.

CHEN FENG
Aiming, help me with the jewelry safe. I want to find something suitable.

As they exit, CHEN FENG's gaze drifts back to the sofa. The overturned photo.

CHEN FENG (V.O.)
The right age now. Maybe even... no. Don't hope.
continuation:
INT. SISI'S HOME - DAY

A small, tidy apartment. LI XIANG, mid-fifties, rolls his shoulder with a wince as he reaches for a jar of ointment.

LI SISI enters, still in her work uniform, grocery bag in hand.

LI SISI
Dad, stop. You'll make it worse.

She sets the bag down, takes the jar. He lowers his hand, lets her take over.

LI XIANG
Just old bones. Doesn't take much.

LI SISI's fingers work gently, practiced. She says nothing, but her touch is careful.

LI XIANG
(quieter)
You're home early.

LI SISI
Swapped shifts. For tonight.

A pause. He studies her profile.

LI XIANG
You nervous?

LI SISI
(smiling)
Terrified.

LI XIANG
Good. Means you care.

He touches her hand briefly.

LI XIANG
Go get ready. I'll be fine.

LI SISI nods, but stays a moment longer, ensuring the patch is smooth.

MONTAGE

CHEN NIANMING is on the phone in his office, expression soft.

CHEN NIANMING
(on phone)
She wants everything to be perfect. Which means she's already planning.

LI SISI answers the phone at her workplace, keeping her voice low.

LI SISI
(on phone)
Tell her not to. Please. Just... normal.

CHEN NIANMING
(on phone)
I'll try. But 'normal' isn't really her specialty.

LI SISI
(on phone, laughing quietly)
I'll wear the dress then. The one you like.

CHEN NIANMING
(on phone)
The one I bought you? You said it was too much.

LI SISI
(on phone)
It is. But if it helps...

CHEN NIANMING
(on phone)
Just be you. That's what I need tonight.

LI SISI looks at her uniform, the name tag: "Li Sisi." She touches it.

LI SISI
(on phone)
I'll try.

She hangs up. The name tag catches the light.

title: The Ice Coffin
description: A woman whose family was destroyed by the Regent Prince undergoes a painful transformation in an ice coffin to seek revenge.
context:
Title: The Ice Coffin
Description: A woman whose family was destroyed by the Regent Prince undergoes a painful transformation in an ice coffin to seek revenge.

INT. GU PHYSICIAN IMMORTAL'S RESIDENCE - DAY

A woman in red, JIANG YINGYUE, walks barefoot on cold stone. White cloths inscribed with talismans hang like ghosts. The camera cuts—her hair turns snow-white in an instant.

GU PHYSICIAN IMMORTAL (V.O.)
Jade Maiden Water. Seven days and seven nights in the ice coffin. You'll emerge with restored youth... enough to walk into any palace unchallenged. But the pain will hollow you out. And after ten months, the price comes due.

INT. ICE COFFIN - DAY

JIANG YINGYUE lies in the coffin, white mist swirling. Her body convulses silently.

JIANG YINGYUE (V.O.)
They took everything.

She lies on red silk, her eyes empty. Blood trickles from her lip where she's bitten through.

JIANG YINGYUE (V.O.)
Three days ago, my husband was summoned to cook his famous Diaochan Tofu for the Regent's concubine...

FLASHBACK:

Her shadow writhes on the talisman cloths, contorted in agony.

ON SCREEN: THREE DAYS AGO
continuation:
INT. SU FAMILY COURTYARD - DAY

Peach blossoms drift. JIANG YINGYUE pushes her daughter SU JIUJIU on a swing.

SU JIUJIU
Higher, Mother!

SU JINCHENG enters with SU XU, carrying market baskets.

SU JINCHENG
My dear wife. The Regent's concubine requests my Diaochan Tofu.

SU XU
A hundred taels, Mother! Enough for your birthday jade pins.

SU JIUJIU
What about me, Father?

SU JINCHENG
(Laughing)
A gold lock for your dowry, little one.

He kisses JIANG YINGYUE's forehead. The family laughs together.

EXT. REGENT PRINCE'S MANSION - NIGHT

LIU YAN reclines on a silk couch. SU JINCHENG and SU XU kneel.

LIU YAN
Your wife cannot stand bean odor, yet loves your tofu?

SU JINCHENG
Yes, my lady. The technique removes the essence completely.

LIU YAN
(Sitting up)
The Prince values loyalty. A man who shares secrets with his wife shares them with his enemies.

She flicks a dagger. It embeds between them.

LIU YAN
Guards. Boil them until their secrets are gone.

GUARDS seize them. SU JINCHENG shields his son.

SU JINCHENG
Mercy! We've done nothing!

LIU YAN
You existed. That is crime enough.

ON SCREEN: TO BE CONTINUED

title: The Moon Shines on My Heart
description: A young wife says goodbye to her soldier husband who leaves for war just one month after their wedding. Thirty years later, a chance encounter at a hospital may reunite them.
context:
Title: The Moon Shines on My Heart
Description: A young wife says goodbye to her soldier husband who leaves for war just one month after their wedding. Thirty years later, a chance encounter at a hospital may reunite them.

INT. VILLAGE DIRT ROAD - DAY (THIRTY YEARS AGO)

A military truck loaded with young soldiers slowly drives along. Villagers wave goodbye from the roadside, emotions running high.

Young XIAO YUE (20s) grips the edge of the truck tightly, holding hands with her husband ZHOU GE (20s) on the truck, tears streaming down her face.

ZHOU GE
Xiao Yue, I'm sorry. Just one month after our wedding, I have to leave for the strait war. I've failed you.

XIAO YUE
(crying)
Zhou Ge, you must come back safe and sound.

ZHOU GE
Don't worry. We'll definitely win in six months. Six months from now, wait for me to come home.

The truck accelerates, forcing Xiao Yue to let go. She runs after the truck for a few steps, shouting loudly.

XIAO YUE
(shouting)
Zhou Ge! Zhou Ge! I haven't told you yet - you're going to be a father! It's twins! We'll have both a son and a daughter!

Zhou Ge on the truck leans out as far as he can, but due to the distance and noise, he can't hear clearly.

ZHOU GE
(shouting)
Xiao Yue, what did you say? I can't hear you!

The truck drives away. Xiao Yue stops running, caressing her belly, watching the departing truck, her face covered in tears.

DISSOLVE TO:

INT. XIAO YUE'S HOME - DAY

Elderly XIAO YUE (50s) busies herself in the kitchen, preparing a table full of delicious dishes. She wears a smile, seemingly anticipating something.

Her phone rings. Xiao Yue happily answers.

XIAO YUE
(on phone)
(happy)
Hello?

DAUGHTER XIAO XIAO (V.O.)
Mom? I hate to do this, but my boss just scheduled an emergency meeting for tonight. I tried everything to get out of it--

Xiao Yue's smile falters. She forces brightness into her voice.

XIAO YUE
(on phone)
It's okay, sweetie. Your career is important. We'll celebrate next weekend.

Xiao Yue hangs up, looking at the prepared feast. The phone rings again.

SON NIAN NIAN (V.O.)
Mom, I'm so sorry. Your grandson has a fever and Jun's working late. I can't bring him out in this weather--

XIAO YUE
(on phone)
Take care of my grandson. That's what matters. I'll save you both some mooncakes.

She ends the call, staring at her reflection in the window. Her dog TU DOU nudges her hand.

Later, Xiao Yue takes out a red marriage certificate from a drawer and gently opens it. She caresses the photo of her and Zhou Ge from their youth, then touches the well-worn edges.

She places it beside a framed photo of her children as toddlers, then looks at a newer photo of her grandchildren on the wall.
continuation:
INT. HOSPITAL LOBBY - DAY

Xiao Yue stands in front of a self-service registration machine, squinting at the screen. Her hands tremble slightly as she touches it.

A YOUNG MAN behind her shifts impatiently.

YOUNG MAN
Can you hurry up?

XIAO YUE
(flustered)
I'm trying... this new system confuses me.

YOUNG MAN
(sighs)
Then get your kids to help! Some of us have actual jobs to get back to.

XIAO YUE
(lowered voice)
They're busy.

She steps aside, clutching her hospital card. The young man brushes past.

Xiao Yue approaches a help desk instead, where a NURSE notices her.

INT. HOSPITAL INFUSION ROOM - DAY

Xiao Yue sits alone in a chair receiving an IV drip. The bag is nearly empty. She watches the drip chamber, tracking each drop.

Across the room, a HOSPITAL MAN (50s) - weathered face, graying hair - also sits with an IV. He glances at her.

Xiao Yue notices him. She stares. His profile, his posture...

Her breath catches. She studies his hands - one bears a faint scar across the knuckles.

FLASHBACK: Zhou Ge's hand, young and strong, that same scar from a childhood accident.

The Hospital Man feels her gaze and turns. Their eyes meet. He blinks, puzzled.

XIAO YUE
(whisper)
Zhou... Ge?

The man tilts his head. A flicker of something crosses his face - confusion, recognition, disbelief.

HOSPITAL MAN
(hoarse)
Do I... know you?

Xiao Yue trembles, tears filling her eyes. She touches her chest, then points to him.

XIAO YUE
It's me. Xiao Yue.

He stares. The IV alarm BEEPS beside him. Neither moves.

A NURSE approaches Xiao Yue.

NURSE
Ma'am, your drip's done.

The Nurse removes Xiao Yue's needle. Xiao Yue doesn't look away from the man.

The Nurse notices the tension, glances between them.

NURSE
(to Hospital Man)
Sir? Your bag's empty too.

He barely nods, still locked on Xiao Yue. The Nurse removes his needle.

When the Nurse leaves, silence stretches between them.

HOSPITAL MAN
(quiet, strained)
They told me... my family thought I was gone. I couldn't remember my name for twenty years. Only fragments.

XIAO YUE
(voice breaking)
We waited. I waited.

He looks down at his weathered hands. When he looks up, his eyes are wet.

HOSPITAL MAN
The twins?

Xiao Yue nods slowly, tears streaming down her face.

XIAO YUE
A son and a daughter. Both grown. Two grandchildren now.

She reaches into her bag with shaking hands and pulls out her phone. Shows him a photo of her family - her children, grandchildren.

His hand trembles as he reaches for the phone.

HOSPITAL MAN
(whisper)
I have a family.

XIAO YUE
You always did.

He hands back the phone. Their fingers brush. A lifetime passes in that touch.

HOSPITAL MAN
I'm staying with... someone who helped me. After the war injuries. But... may I see them? The children?

XIAO YUE
(softly)
They're your children too.

For the first time, a small, hesitant smile touches his lips.

HOSPITAL MAN
Mid-Autumn Festival is next week. I remember... you promised to wait.

XIAO YUE
I never stopped.

He nods, eyes glistening with resolve.

HOSPITAL MAN
Then... we still have time.

Xiao Yue looks at him - this stranger who is her husband. The tears on her face are no longer just of sorrow.

FADE OUT.

title: The Pearl's Promise
description: Gu Mingzhu, the Gu family's eldest daughter, finds herself in an unexpected encounter with Yan Jingcheng, the fourth young master of the Yan Group, leading to a night that changes everything.
context:
Title: The Pearl's Promise
Description: Gu Mingzhu, the Gu family's eldest daughter, finds herself in an unexpected encounter with Yan Jingcheng, the fourth young master of the Yan Group, leading to a night that changes everything.

INT. HOTEL SUITE - NIGHT

GU MINGZHU, the Gu family's eldest daughter, sits on the edge of a hotel bed in a simple white dress, clutching a pearl necklace. The city lights gleam through the window.

GU MINGZHU (V.O.)
The Wang family wants an answer by tomorrow. Mother's medical bills are due next week.

She places the necklace carefully on the nightstand and lies down, exhausted.

GU MINGZHU (V.O.)
Just one night of peace. That's all I ask.

She closes her eyes.

INT. BAR - NIGHT

Neon lights pulse. YAN JINGCHENG, the fourth young master of the Yan Group, sits alone, ignoring his buzzing phone. He pours another drink.

YAN JINGCHENG (V.O.)
Another merger negotiation. Another marriage they want to arrange for me.

He downs the glass and stands, swaying slightly.

INT. HOTEL CORRIDOR - NIGHT

YAN JINGCHENG fumbles with his key card at the door. The green light flashes. He enters.
continuation:
INT. HOTEL SUITE - CONTINUOUS

YAN JINGCHENG stops short. GU MINGZHU stirs on the bed, still in her white dress.

YAN JINGCHENG
(to himself)
Wrong room. Damn key cards.

He turns to leave, but his jacket catches the door handle. As he yanks it free, GU MINGZHU sits up with a start.

GU MINGZHU
Who—get out!

She grabs the nearest object—the pearl necklace—and flings it at him. He instinctively catches it and steps forward to return it.

YAN JINGCHENG
Wait, I—-

Her foot catches in the bedsheet. She falls backward, pulling him with her in a tangle of limbs. They land on the bed. The necklace drops between them.

The scene cuts away.

INT. HOTEL SUITE - DAY

Morning light filters through the curtains. YAN JINGCHENG sits on the sofa, head in his hands. GU MINGZHU emerges from behind the screen, her expression controlled fury.

YAN JINGCHENG
You can relax, Miss Gu. I have no interest in whatever scheme you're running.

GU MINGZHU
Scheme? This is my room. You broke in.

YAN JINGCHENG
The hotel made an error. But you certainly seemed...accommodating last night.

GU MINGZHU
Accommodating? I was defending myself.

YAN JINGCHENG
By pulling me into bed?

GU MINGZHU
By trying not to break my neck. Your technique needs work, Fourth Young Master.

She spots her pearl necklace on the floor and snatches it up.

GU MINGZHU
Keep your assumptions. And your distance.

She takes a business card from her bag and places it on the table.

GU MINGZHU
If you're worried about...complications, call this number. My lawyer deals with parasites.

She turns to leave.

YAN JINGCHENG
Parasites? That's rich coming from someone who practically gift-wrapped herself for the Wang merger.

GU MINGZHU freezes, then walks out without looking back.

YAN JINGCHENG notices something on the nightstand: a medical bill with her mother's name, stamped "URGENT." His expression shifts.

Secretary CHEN QING enters with a tablet.

CHEN QING
Fourth Young Master, the hotel confirms—this suite is registered to Gu Mingzhu. Your actual room is three floors up. And...the Wang family meeting is in two hours.

YAN JINGCHENG stares at the medical bill, then toward the door where GU MINGZHU disappeared.

title: Starlight Falls Into My Palm
description: A young woman is forced to marry a comatose heir in place of her employer's daughter, entering a world of wealth and secrets.
context:
Title: Starlight Falls Into My Palm
Description: A young woman is forced to marry a comatose heir in place of her employer's daughter, entering a world of wealth and secrets.

INT. CHEN FAMILY BEDROOM - DAY

Sunlight filters through heavy curtains. CHEN YUBAI lies motionless, breathing aided by subtle medical equipment. DR. JIANG reviews charts while a NURSE adjusts IV lines.

CHEN'S MOTHER (60s, elegant, fraying at the edges) hovers near the door. SECRETARY QIN stands impassively beside her.

DR. JIANG closes the file with a soft snap.

CHEN'S MOTHER
Dr. Jiang?

DR. JIANG
The vitals remain stable. But Madam... two years. The brain activity hasn't changed.

CHEN'S MOTHER
(quietly desperate)
So we're just waiting for his body to give up?

DR. JIANG
We're doing everything medically possible. Sometimes... there are limits.

The doctor exits. The nurse follows.

CHEN'S MOTHER stares at her son, then at the medical equipment keeping him alive. She touches a jade bracelet on her wrist—an heirloom.

CHEN'S MOTHER
(to herself)
The fortune-teller said... a wedding might shift his fate.

CHEN'S MOTHER
(to SECRETARY QIN)
The Song girl. The engagement our fathers made. Bring her.

SECRETARY QIN
Madam... the legalities—

CHEN'S MOTHER
A ceremony. That's all. Something to wake the universe. Make it happen.

SECRETARY QIN
Yes, Madam.

INT. SONG FAMILY LIVING ROOM - DAY

SONG YAYA (20, polished, terrified beneath the anger) paces like a caged animal. A vase crashes to the floor. Her parents watch from the sofa.

FATHER SONG
Yaya, the Chen family holds our debt. We have no choice.

SONG YAYA
Then let them take the house! I'm not spending my life tethered to a corpse!

MOTHER SONG
It's only symbolic. A year, then you can—

SONG YAYA
A year of my life, Mother! A year of being the widow who was never a wife!

MOTHER SONG
(to FATHER SONG)
What about Qiao Wanwan? Your late brother's illegitimate daughter. She owes us.

FATHER SONG
(rubbing his temples)
She looks enough like Yaya to pass. But if Chen's mother finds out...

MOTHER SONG
She won't. Wanwan knows what happens to her mother if she talks.

MOTHER SONG
(calling sharply)
Wanwan!

QIAO WANWAN (22, quiet eyes, contained fire) enters. She holds herself like someone used to being invisible.

QIAO WANWAN
Madam?

FATHER SONG
Your cousin's engagement. You'll stand in for her. Temporarily.

QIAO WANWAN
I'm not family enough to be family, but I'm family enough for this?

MOTHER SONG
Don't be clever. Your mother needs her medication. That expensive treatment.

QIAO WANWAN
(very still)
You're threatening my mother.

MOTHER SONG
I'm offering you a way to save her. And yourself.

QIAO WANWAN looks at SONG YAYA, who won't meet her eyes. Then at the shattered vase on the floor.

QIAO WANWAN
I'll need it in writing. My mother's care. Guaranteed.
continuation:
EXT. SONG FAMILY VILLA - DUSK

QIAO WANWAN, in a simple white dress that doesn't quite fit, kneels before SISTER QIAO (50s, frail but sharp).

SISTER QIAO
(trembling fingers on Wanwan's face)
You're lying. The Song girl would never let you—

QIAO WANWAN
(forcing a smile)
It's a job, Mom. Like being a caretaker. Just... in a nicer house.

SISTER QIAO
Wanwan...

SECRETARY QIN waits by the black car, face neutral.

SONG YAYA appears on the balcony above, clutching a wine glass. She raises it in a bitter toast.

SONG YAYA
Don't forget to send postcards from your new life.

QIAO WANWAN helps her mother stand, then walks to the car without looking back.

INT. CHEN FAMILY MANSION - NIGHT

QIAO WANWAN follows SECRETARY QIN through cavernous halls. Modern art clashes with ancestral portraits. Everything gleams with old money.

QIAO WANWAN (V.O.)
Rich enough to buy miracles. Desperate enough to try.

SECRETARY QIN stops at double doors.

SECRETARY QIN
He doesn't know you're coming. Or maybe he does. Who can say?

He opens the doors but doesn't enter.

INT. CHEN FAMILY BEDROOM - CONTINUOUS

QIAO WANWAN steps inside. The doors close behind her. She hears the LOCK CLICK.

She tries the handle. Locked.

She turns. The room is larger than her entire childhood home. And there, in the center, CHEN YUBAI.

She approaches slowly. Up close, he looks younger than his photographs. A faded scar cuts through his left eyebrow.

She notices his hand rests on top of the blanket. On impulse, she places her smaller hand near his—not touching, just... parallel.

QIAO WANWAN
(whisper)
They bought me to be your ghost bride. But I don't believe in ghosts.

She sits in the chair beside his bed. Outside, the city lights begin to flicker on.

QIAO WANWAN (V.O.)
Let them lock their doors. I've been a ghost my whole life.

FADE OUT.

title: Stars Guard the Moon
description: After a car accident leaves Mu Jin paralyzed, her best friend Song Yuqing stays by her side, but hidden betrayals lurk beneath the surface of loyalty.
context:
Title: Stars Guard the Moon
Description: After a car accident leaves Mu Jin paralyzed, her best friend Song Yuqing stays by her side, but hidden betrayals lurk beneath the surface of loyalty.

INT. CAR - DAY
