WANG LINGZHI
(without hesitation)
Swipe it.

STORE CLERK
(taking the card)
Of course.

CUSTOMER A and CUSTOMER B watch WANG LINGZHI's back.

CUSTOMER A
It's easy to judge.

CUSTOMER B
Harder to understand.

AT THE STORE ENTRANCE: An elderly woman in plain clothes, LIU FENLAN, looking anxious, is blocked by a SECURITY GUARD.

LIU FENLAN
(struggling)
Let me in! I'm Wang Lingzhi's mother!

WANG LINGZHI hears and turns around.

LIU FENLAN breaks free, runs to WANG LINGZHI, grabs her hand and kneels.

LIU FENLAN
(crying out)
Lingzhi, save your father! He needs fifty thousand for surgery, just fifty! The doctor said—

WANG LINGZHI
(disgustedly shaking off her hand)
I told you. I already paid that debt.

WANG LINGZHI coldly turns and leaves. LIU FENLAN cries on the ground. The STORE CLERKS and CUSTOMERS all stare in shock.

INT. BROADCAST STUDIO - DAY

The large screen displays everything that happened in the luxury goods store. The audience below and the GUESTS on stage all show expressions of shock and dismay.

title: Missing You for the Rest of My Life
description: A mother desperately tries to save her dying daughter after being abandoned by the boyfriend she once sacrificed everything for.
context:
Title: Missing You for the Rest of My Life
Description: A mother desperately tries to save her dying daughter after being abandoned by the boyfriend she once sacrificed everything for.

INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - DAY

A heart monitor BEEP pulses from within the room.

Through a small window, TANGTANG (20s) lies fragile, oxygen mask fogging with each shallow breath.

AUNT JIANG (50s) stands guard, hollow-eyed, clutching a crumpled medical bill: FINAL NOTICE.

FOOTSTEPS approach. She turns.

LIN WANTANG'S BOYFRIEND (30s) stops a few feet away, empty-handed.

AUNT JIANG
(quietly pleading)
Li Wei. The hospital's given us three days. Sixty thousand.

LIN WANTANG'S BOYFRIEND
I don't have it.

AUNT JIANG
(desperate)
You promised. You swore--

LIN WANTANG'S BOYFRIEND
I know what I said. I also know when to quit.

He pulls out a small box, sets it on a chair.

LIN WANTANG'S BOYFRIEND
Tell her I said goodbye.

AUNT JIANG
(sobbing)
When you were dying, she gave you a kidney. Her blood. Everything.

LIN WANTANG'S BOYFRIEND
That's why I'm in debt. Not love.

He walks away. AUNT JIANG grabs his sleeve.

AUNT JIANG
Don't you dare--

He pulls free. The motion sends her to her knees.

AUNT JIANG
(wailing)
She won't survive the week!

WANG CHUNLING (40s) rushes over, helps her up.

WANG CHUNLING
Cousin? What happened?

AUNT JIANG
(to WANG CHUNLING)
He's gone. And Tangtang's medicine money...

WANG CHUNLING
(quietly)
There's a man. Older. Wealthy. He'll pay two hundred thousand for a marriage. On paper only.

AUNT JIANG
(sharp)
What kind of man buys a wife?

WANG CHUNLING
The kind who doesn't ask questions.

AUNT JIANG looks through the window at Tangtang's still form.

AUNT JIANG
Where?
continuation:
EXT. PARKING LOT - DAY

A black luxury van pulls up. ZHANG QI steps out, opens the door.

Two MEN IN SUITS emerge, take positions flanking the entrance.

ZHUANG YUNSHENG (60s, granite-faced) steps out.

MEN IN SUITS
(in unison)
Chairman.

ZHUANG YUNSHENG
Wait in the van.

They comply. ZHANG QI closes the door.

INT. OFFICE - DAY

ZHUANG JING'AN (30s) struggles with leg braces in a wheelchair. ZHUANG YUNSHENG watches.

ZHUANG JING'AN
Dad, go to Switzerland. I'll manage.

ZHUANG YUNSHENG
You need legal authority for medical decisions. I found someone.

ZHUANG JING'AN
A hired wife?

ZHUANG YUNSHENG
A practical solution. Nothing more.

He helps adjust his son's brace.

EXT. PARKING LOT - DAY

ZHUANG YUNSHENG stands by the van with ZHANG QI.

ZHUANG YUNSHENG
Discretion is paramount. Jing'an cannot know it's contractual.

ZHANG QI
Understood, Chairman. The candidate arrives momentarily.

ZHUANG YUNSHENG
Description?

ZHANG QI
Khaki dress. Approximately forty-five. Riding a tricycle.

ZHUANG YUNSHENG
Alright. Leave us.

ZHANG QI bows and departs. ZHUANG YUNSHENG waits.

ZHUANG YUNSHENG
(to himself)
Khaki.

EXT. STREET - DAY

AUNT JIANG pedals a tricycle through traffic, khaki dress stained with sweat. Her phone is wedged between ear and shoulder.

WANG CHUNLING (V.O.)
Two hundred thousand, Auntie. Just sign. No one has to know.

AUNT JIANG (V.O.)
Tangtang, hold on.

She veers sharply, cutting across lanes.

EXT. PARKING LOT - DAY

ZHUANG YUNSHENG checks his watch.

A SCREECH of brakes. AUNT JIANG's tricycle wobbles into the lot, overloaded with cardboard boxes.

She's looking back over her shoulder, yelling at a car--

When she turns forward, ZHUANG YUNSHENG is directly in her path.

AUNT JIANG
(shouting)
Move! Move!

She yanks the handlebars. The tricycle tips.

ZHUANG YUNSHENG stumbles backward as the cargo bed swings toward him--

He falls back INTO the tricycle's cargo bed, landing among the boxes.

AUNT JIANG sprawls on the pavement.

They stare at each other, both stunned: him in the wreckage of her life, her at his polished shoes.

FADE OUT.

title: Untitled Script
description: A powerful family enforcer terrorizes a father into signing documents after killing his son, while the eldest son, a decorated military commander, prepares to return home.
context:
Title: Untitled Script
Description: A powerful family enforcer terrorizes a father into signing documents after killing his son, while the eldest son, a decorated military commander, prepares to return home.

INT. TANG FAMILY HOUSE - DAY

MR. HUO and several HENCHMEN burst into the Tang family home. The Tang family's younger son, TANG CHEN, is held by two henchmen, a knife at his throat. TANG FATHER (TANG SHUJIN) and TANG MOTHER (CHEN XIAOHUI) are restrained.

MR. HUO
(to TANG SHUJIN)
The deed to your fishing rights. Sign it now, or I take payment in blood.

TANG SHUJIN
(defiant)
You have no claim to those waters.

MR. HUO
(smiling)
I have ten men with blades. That's claim enough.

TANG CHEN struggles. The knife bites deeper.

CHEN XIAOHUI
(pleading)
Shujin, please—

TANG SHUJIN
(stalling)
My eldest son serves the Xiaolong Legion. He'll—----

MR. HUO
(laughs)
Your hero son is five years absent. I'm here today.

TANG CHEN
(through gritted teeth)
Father, don't—

MR. HUO nods. The henchman cuts TANG CHEN's throat. Blood spills. TANG CHEN collapses.

CHEN XIAOHUI
(screaming)

TANG SHUJIN
(anguished)
continuation:
Chen!

MR. HUO wipes blood from his face, unfazed.

MR. HUO
Now. About that signature. Your wife's blood next, or your ink?

He produces a scroll and presses it open. A henchman forces TANG SHUJIN's hand onto the paper.

TANG SHUJIN
(weeping)
I built that fleet... five generations...

MR. HUO
Then you should've built a better wall.

A henchman raises a stick against CHEN XIAOHUI.

TANG SHUJIN
(broken)
Stop! I'll sign...

He takes the pen with trembling fingers.

EXT. MILITARY CAMP - DAY

The Tang family's eldest son, TANG YUFENG, in military uniform, stands before his commander, ZHENG LONG. The Xiaolong Legion forms ranks behind them.

TANG YUFENG
Five years, Commander. Thank you.

ZHENG LONG
Your family earned this honor. Return with it.

A soldier, QIN HAO, kneels.

QIN HAO
Farewell, Commander Feng!

ALL SOLDIERS
(in unison)
Farewell, Commander Feng! Farewell, Commander Feng! Farewell, Commander Feng!

TANG YUFENG touches a jade pendant—his mother's gift. His eyes harden with purpose. He turns toward home.

title: Love Deepens with Time
description: A woman ends her five-year role as a stand-in lover and seeks freedom, but her former partner refuses to let her go.
context:
Title: Love Deepens with Time
Description: A woman ends her five-year role as a stand-in lover and seeks freedom, but her former partner refuses to let her go.

INT. HOTEL ROOM - NIGHT

Under purple lighting, the atmosphere is intimate.

JI MINGCHUAN reaches out his hand, his watch reading 23:47.

JI MINGCHUAN
Don't move.

JI MINGCHUAN covers YUN RUYAN's eyes with a black lace blindfold and leans down to kiss her. His thumb traces the edge of the fabric—a familiar ritual.

As music plays, the two interact intimately.

INT. HOTEL ROOM - DAY

JI MINGCHUAN wakes up in bed, adjusting his black shirt. He reaches for the other side—empty, cold.

YUN RUYAN sits on the bed behind him, fully dressed, a document folder beside her.

YUN RUYAN
Mr. Ji. Please settle the final payment.

JI MINGCHUAN
(contemptuously)
What final payment?

YUN RUYAN
Five years as Su Wenwen's substitute. The contract expires today. Let's not make this ugly.

JI MINGCHUAN stands up, takes out a bank card from his pocket, and extends it toward YUN RUYAN.

JI MINGCHUAN
This is ten million. I want to renew.

JI MINGCHUAN tosses the card onto the bed. It lands on her document folder.

JI MINGCHUAN
(over his shoulder)
You were never just a substitute.

He leaves the room. Yun Ruyan picks up the bank card, a mocking smile appearing at the corner of her mouth.

YUN RUYAN (V.O.)
Renew a ghost story? No, thank you.
continuation:
EXT. AIRPORT/CITY - DAY

YUN RUYAN, now wearing a fashionable denim outfit and sunglasses, pulls a yellow suitcase and leaves with confidence. Her reflection in the glass shows a woman unrecognizable to herself.

YUN RUYAN (V.O.)
Goodbye, Ji Mingchuan. And goodbye to the woman I was.

CLOSE-UP: YUN RUYAN deletes JI MINGCHUAN's contact from her phone. She deletes the backup. Then she removes the SIM card and drops it in a trash bin.

Establishing shot of the city at night.

INT. JI MINGCHUAN'S VILLA - DAY

JI MINGCHUAN, wearing a brown suit, returns home and looks around. Her absence is a physical weight.

JI MINGCHUAN
Uncle Ma! Where is Yun Ruyan?

The butler, UNCLE MA, walks over with a sealed envelope.

UNCLE MA
Miss Yun left early this morning. She asked me to give you this.

JI MINGCHUAN
(shocked)
She left?

Ji Mingchuan opens the envelope: inside is the bank card and his house key.

UNCLE MA
She said, 'Tell Mr. Ji the contract is fulfilled. Paid in full.'

JI MINGCHUAN sits on the sofa, takes out his phone, and makes a call. The call cannot connect.

PHONE PROMPT (V.O.)
The number you have dialed is temporarily unavailable.

JI MINGCHUAN dials again, but still gets a busy signal. He angrily puts down his phone.

JI MINGCHUAN
(through gritted teeth)
Yun Ruyan!

JI MINGCHUAN
(ordering Uncle Ma)
Find her. Not by force—find where she chose to go. And bring her back.

INT. BAR - NIGHT

YUN RUYAN arrives at a lively bar, her face showing the smile of newfound freedom. She sits alone, owning the space.

YUN RUYAN (V.O.)
Finally free. Tonight I drink for myself.

A man in a white Chinese-style shirt, JIANG JUN, walks toward her with two friends. He stops, studying her.

JIANG JUN
(flippantly)
Well, well. The real Yun Ruyan emerges.

YUN RUYAN stops and looks at him coldly. Her smile doesn't fade—it sharpens.

YUN RUYAN
And you're still chasing ghosts.

She raises her glass in mock salute.

YUN RUYAN
Careful, Jiang Jun. This one bites back.

title: The Betrayal
description: A musician is betrayed by his wife and manager, who exploit him through a reality show and steal his work.
context:
Title: The Betrayal
Description: A musician is betrayed by his wife and manager, who exploit him through a reality show and steal his work.

EXT. STREET - NIGHT

JI HENG and MENG LING run desperately ahead, pursued by a mob of REPORTERS and FANS.

PURSUER (O.S.)
There! By the corner!

PURSUER 1
That's him? The guy from "Unbroken Vows"? He looked taller on screen.

PURSUER 2
They just posted a reconciliation video an hour ago! Five million views and half the comments are calling it staged!

A FAN rushes from a rideshare, phone glowing.

FAN
We defended you for weeks! Was it all for merchandise sales?

REPORTERS and FANS surround JI HENG, shoving equipment in his face.

REPORTERS
(talking over each other)
Ji Heng! Your DMs leaked—Meng Ling's planning a livestream partnership? Your new song's copyright transfer is dated before the show even aired?

JI HENG retreats, shielding his face.

REPORTERS
(continuing)
The metadata doesn't lie, Mr. Ji! Was the entire show a pretext?

JI HENG
(breaking)
I trusted her! I thought—

JI HENG pushes through and flees.

REPORTER
Three-part question!
continuation:
INT. JI HENG'S HOUSE - NIGHT

JI HENG bursts through the door, collapsing on the sofa. He picks up the remote.

TV displays a freeze-frame from "Unbroken Vows"—him and Meng Ling in their kitchen, apparently reconciling. The caption reads: "Day 12: Healing Begins."

JI HENG (V.O.) (TV audio)
(quietly)
Once we finish these episodes... can we stop performing?

TV screen fills with comments: "Calculated." "Check the filing dates." "His songwriting credits are gone."

JI HENG
(agitated)
The episodes aren't even aired yet...

He throws the remote. It thunks against the TV frame.

MENG LING enters with YANG CHENG. Meng Ling carries a document folder.

YANG CHENG
(to Meng Ling)
The trending hashtag's holding steady. Good timing.

MENG LING
(to Ji Heng, measuring her words)
You ran. That was a mistake. We could've controlled the narrative.

JI HENG
(standing)
Controlled? You said this was about saving our marriage.

MENG LING sets the folder on the coffee table.

MENG LING
I am saving what's savable. The song's being released next week.

JI HENG
My song. The one I wrote about—

MENG LING
(interrupting)
The one you wrote while contractually employed. Read the amendment.

JI HENG flips through pages. His hands shake.

JI HENG
You signed this for me. Last month. You said it was a performance license for the show.

MENG LING
I said it was necessary for the show. The show is necessary for our brand.

YANG CHENG
(smoothly)
Your voice doesn't test as well as mine in the demo, Ji Heng. Be reasonable.

JI HENG
You... you sang the guide vocal...

MENG LING
We're a team. Your composition, Yang Cheng's platform. The residuals will keep us comfortable.

JI HENG
Us? There is no us!

MENG LING
There is when I sign the checks.

She raises her hand—not to strike, but to silence. He flinches. She lowers it, seeing his reaction. A beat of terrible clarity.

MENG LING
(quietly, finally)
Don't make this harder than it is.

YANG CHENG watches the power shift, satisfied.

title: Love at Life's Crossroads
description: A dedicated employee discovers her boss has blocked her on social media and credits her work to another woman, leading to a confrontation about stolen achievements and betrayal.
context:
Title: Love at Life's Crossroads
Description: A dedicated employee discovers her boss has blocked her on social media and credits her work to another woman, leading to a confrontation about stolen achievements and betrayal.

INT. OFFICE - NIGHT

A FEMALE COLLEAGUE approaches MU XIAN, who is working late at her desk.

FEMALE COLLEAGUE
Mu Xian, check Boss Huo's post. It's... exploded.

MU XIAN takes the phone, then checks her own, confusion hardening into suspicion.

MU XIAN
That's not showing up on my feed.

Screenshots of HUO YUCHEN and LIU JIAOJIAO's social media posts flash on screen.

HUO YUCHEN (V.O.)
Day 1,001 of knowing each other. A surprise arrives.

LIU JIAOJIAO (V.O.)
The most special day. Lucky to have you.

FEMALE COLLEAGUE
He blocked you. Look at that ring—must be six figures.

MU XIAN
(quietly)
Go home. I'll handle this.

FEMALE COLLEAGUE
Sister Mu...

MU XIAN
Please.

The FEMALE COLLEAGUE leaves. Mu Xian pulls up a file on her laptop: "Wanjing Deal - Final Negotiations." Her name is on every page. She slams the laptop shut.
continuation:
INT. OFFICE HALLWAY - MOMENTS LATER

MU XIAN sees HUO YUCHEN and LIU JIAOJIAO by the elevators.

LIU JIAOJIAO
Next time has to be even bigger.

HUO YUCHEN
Name it.

MU XIAN
Huo Yuchen. The Wanjing contract.

HUO YUCHEN
Jiaojiao closed it. Wire transfer's pending.

MU XIAN
I negotiated those terms. I have the proof from yesterday.

HUO YUCHEN
(coldly)
Every deal she closes, you claim. It's unprofessional jealousy.

LIU JIAOJIAO
(softly)
Sister Mu, if you need this win for your review...

HUO YUCHEN
Don't. She doesn't get to claim your work.

(to Mu Xian)
Tomorrow's celebration is mandatory. You'll draft the proposal. 8 AM. My desk.

INT. OFFICE - CONTINUOUS

LIU JIAOJIAO sets a water bottle on Mu Xian's desk.

LIU JIAOJIAO
Overtime, then party planning. You must be exhausted, Sister Mu. Might want to invest in better foundation tomorrow—for the photos.

Mu Xian's hand shakes. She grabs the bottle and splashes water in LIU JIAOJIAO's face.

LIU JIAOJIAO
(screams)
Ah!

She falls back against the desk.

HUO YUCHEN
(roaring)
What the hell is wrong with you?

HUO YUCHEN rushes over, catching Liu Jiaojiao.

LIU JIAOJIAO
(tearfully)
She saw the ring post, Boss Huo. I tried to apologize...

HUO YUCHEN
(to Mu Xian)
Over a diamond? She's the reason we're not bankrupt. Apologize. Now.

Mu Xian looks at her phone—still showing the blocked feed—then at the water dripping from her hand onto her name tag.

title: Wedding Night
description: On her wedding night, Jiang Yining faces the painful realization that her groom still loves another woman, despite her ninety-nine attempts to win his heart.
context:
Title: Wedding Night
Description: On her wedding night, Jiang Yining faces the painful realization that her groom still loves another woman, despite her ninety-nine attempts to win his heart.

TITLE CARD: WEDDING NIGHT

INT. BEDROOM - NIGHT

On a red wedding bed, JIANG YINING lies as LI XUN leans over her. His eyes are glazed, sleepwalking through ritual.

LI XUN
Xia Xia... don't leave me.

He kisses her—by rote, not passion. Suddenly, he gasps, clutching his chest. He collapses beside her, shuddering once, then still.

JIANG YINING
Li Xun?

She shakes him. His breathing is ragged but steady. After a long moment, she pulls a silk blanket over him and slips out of bed.
continuation:
INT. LIVING ROOM - NIGHT

JIANG YINING sits among wedding gifts. She opens a heart-shaped card: "Thinking of you, loving you, forever and ever. Li Xun."

LI XUN (V.O.)
Xia Xia, don't leave me.

The words echo. Her hands shake. A translucent interface materializes.

SYSTEM (V.O.)
Host, critical instability detected. Ning Xia's presence is corrupting the affection index.

JIANG YINING
(whisper)
Ninety-nine times...

SYSTEM (V.O.)
Current reading: forty-seven percent. Recommend timeline termination.

A tear falls, smudging the ink on "forever."

JIANG YINING
(V.O.)
I didn't stay for the conquest.

Footsteps. LI XUN stands in the doorway, pale but conscious. He sees her tears.

LI XUN
A Ning...

He crosses to her, kneels, takes her cold hands.

LI XUN
The room was too hot. I should have thought—tomorrow, humidifier. And I'll take you to Wansheng Hall. For the Seven Treasure Porridge. You asked about it once.

He stands, pulling her up. A pearl rolls from her sleeve into his palm. He stares at it—recognition flickering.

JIANG YINING
(V.O.)
System... I'm staying.

She places her hand in LI XUN's. The interface flickers out.

title: CEO Fu's Inescapable Love and Hate
description: Lin Yiyi, the second daughter of Tianjin Group, watches helplessly as her sister steals her groom on what was supposed to be her wedding day.
context:
Title: CEO Fu's Inescapable Love and Hate
Description: Lin Yiyi, the second daughter of Tianjin Group, watches helplessly as her sister steals her groom on what was supposed to be her wedding day.

INT. PARK - DAY

LIN YIYI sits beneath an ancient oak, her ivory wedding dress pooling around her. She stares at her phone, which displays a photo of FU JINGXUAN.

Her FRIEND, elegant in a crimson dress, kneels before her, visibly distressed.

FRIEND
Your sister's wearing your dress, marrying your man. And you're just... scrolling through memories?

LIN YIYI doesn't answer. A tear lands on her phone screen.

EXT. WEDDING VENUE - DAY

An outdoor ceremony is in progress.

The bride, LIN XIAOTONG, wears Lin Yiyi's custom gown and holds a bouquet, triumph in her eyes.

The groom, FU JINGXUAN, stands on stage in a black suit, his gaze fixed on the empty seat where Lin Yiyi should be.

In the guest seating area, FU JINGXUAN'S MOTHER watches with a sharp, expectant expression.

The OFFICIANT stands before the couple.

OFFICIANT
Mr. Fu Jingxuan, do you take Miss Lin Xiaotong as your lawfully wedded wife? In sickness and in health, for richer or poorer?

FU JINGXUAN remains silent, his eyes complex. He glances at his mother.

OFFICIANT
Mr. Fu?

FU JINGXUAN turns back to face LIN XIAOTONG. She gives him an expectant smile.

FU JINGXUAN
(after a weighted pause)
I do.

LIN XIAOTONG's face lights up with a victorious smile.
continuation:
INT. PARK - DAY

LIN YIYI'S FRIEND grasps her arm emotionally.

FRIEND
She forged the paperwork, Yiyi. Your mother approved it—called it "correcting a family mistake." Are you going to let their lies become your truth?

LIN YIYI finally looks up, devastation giving way to something colder.

LIN YIYI
What truth? That I was always the expendable daughter?

EXT. WEDDING VENUE - DAY

FU JINGXUAN and LIN XIAOTONG exchange rings. Petals fall from above.

The GUESTS applaud enthusiastically.

GUESTS (O.S.)
Kiss! Kiss! Kiss!

FU JINGXUAN and LIN XIAOTONG lock eyes amid the cheering, slowly leaning closer. He shuts his eyes.

EXT. ROAD - DAY

LIN YIYI breaks free and stumbles toward the road, her expression hollow.

A black sedan speeds toward her.

The piercing sound of brakes screeches.

LIN YIYI is struck and thrown into the air, landing heavily.

She lies on the asphalt, her dress stained, blood trickling from her mouth, eyes staring blankly.

FADE TO BLACK.

ON SCREEN: TO BE CONTINUED

title: Father's Secret
description: On a rainy night, a desperate mother fights to save her child from being sold by her gambling addict husband, while a delivery man with his own hidden trauma intervenes in the tragic confrontation.
context:
Title: Father's Secret
Description: On a rainy night, a desperate mother fights to save her child from being sold by her gambling addict husband, while a delivery man with his own hidden trauma intervenes in the tragic confrontation.

EXT. OUTDOOR STAIRCASE - NIGHT

Torrential rain pounds the concrete stairs. ZHANG HAO (30s, haggard, desperate) runs down holding a SWADDLED INFANT. SU MENG (28, bruised but unbroken) chases.

SU MENG
(screaming)
Hao, don't!

She catches him. They struggle over the crying baby.

ZHANG HAO
(roaring)
I'm his father!

SU MENG
That doesn't make this right!

ZHANG HAO
(shoving her)
I decide what's right!

SU MENG
(hysterically)
The gambling, the drinking, the beatings—I took it all. But not my son!

ZHANG HAO
Shut your mouth!

ZHANG HAO pushes SU MENG to the ground. She gasps, winded.

SU MENG
(crying, crawling forward)
Just wait... I'll get the money...

ZHANG HAO
(kicking her back)
I'll sell you first!

He turns to go. A delivery scooter idles at the top. SONG LI (40s, steady hands, haunted eyes) steps off.

SONG LI
How much?

ZHANG HAO stops. SU MENG looks up, rain masking her tears.

SU MENG
(kneeling)
I'll work triple shifts—sell my blood—

SONG LI
(descending)
The debt. How much?

ZHANG HAO
(glancing at the van below)
Twenty thousand. None of your business.

SONG LI
My daughter was taken five years ago. Same van.

SU MENG
(whispering)
You knew?

SONG LI
I deliver here daily. I see.

ZHANG HAO runs for the white van. SU MENG grabs his ankle.
continuation:
ZHANG HAO
Let go!

He kicks her again. SONG LI sprints down.

SONG LI
(shouting)
Stop!

Inside the van, MA QIANG (50s, tattooed hand) opens the door.

MA QIANG
Got the goods?

ZHANG HAO
(to MA QIANG)
Twenty. As promised.

MA QIANG
Hand him over.

SONG LI tackles ZHANG HAO. They fall. The baby FLIES from his arms—

SU MENG
dives, catching the infant, rolling to safety.

SONG LI and ZHANG HAO fight. SONG LI lands a punch.

ZHANG HAO
(viciously)
Who the hell are you?

SONG LI
Someone who made your mistake.

ZHANG HAO
I'm saving my family!

SONG LI
You're destroying three lives.

ZHANG HAO's face contorts—rage mixing with something like shame. He grabs SONG LI's hair, SLAMS his head toward the van's mirror. SONG LI twists. The mirror SHATTERS against ZHANG HAO's shoulder.

ZHANG HAO collapses, screaming. MA QIANG slams the van door.

MA QIANG
Too messy. Deal's off.

The van SPEEDS away. ZHANG HAO lies bleeding in the rain, conscious but broken. SU MENG crawls to him, their baby safe.

SU MENG
(whispering)
It's over, Hao.

ZHANG HAO stares at the sky, rain washing his face. SONG LI stands.

SONG LI
(softly)
She'd be eight now.

He mounts his scooter. SU MENG meets his eyes—gratitude, exhaustion. No words.

SONG LI rides off into the rain.

SU MENG looks down at ZHANG HAO, then at her baby. She pulls the infant closer, turning away.

ZHANG HAO reaches a trembling hand toward them, but it falls short.

Rain washes blood down the stairs.

END SCENE

title: A Father's Irredeemable Love
description: A general must choose between saving his daughter or protecting the young prince during a deadly ambush, making an agonizing decision that will haunt him forever.
context:
Title: A Father's Irredeemable Love
Description: A general must choose between saving his daughter or protecting the young prince during a deadly ambush, making an agonizing decision that will haunt him forever.

EXT. NIGHT SKY - NIGHT

A bright moon hangs in the cloudy night sky.

EMPEROR (V.O.)
Prince Ning's rebellion finds me dying, Qin Yi. I sent the boy to you, but traitors opened our gates. His life is now your sword to keep.

EXT. STREET/COURTYARD - NIGHT

The GENERAL fights fiercely against ASSASSINS in the night, blades flashing. He protects the young CROWN PRINCE, fighting his way through the siege.

EMPEROR (V.O.)
One spark to kindle a dynasty. One blade to guard it.

INT. RESIDENCE HALL - NIGHT

The battle continues inside the hall. The GENERAL moves skillfully, defeating several ASSASSINS.

Little XIAOXIAO hides behind a screen, clutching a wooden soldier doll.

An ASSASSIN seizes the GENERAL'S wife, WAN'ER.

GENERAL
(crying out)
Wan'er!

XIAOXIAO covers her mouth in fright.

The GENERAL rushes toward the ASSASSIN and strikes him down with one blow. He catches WAN'ER as she falls.

Bodies of ASSASSINS and servants lie scattered throughout the hall.

GENERAL
(anguished)
Hold on...

WAN'ER
(whispering)
Keep her... invisible...

WAN'ER finishes speaking, her hand falls limply, and she passes away.

GENERAL
(screaming)
Wan'er!

The GENERAL is overcome with grief, then frantically searches for his daughter.
continuation:
GENERAL
Xiaoxiao!

A SUBORDINATE rushes in with the young CROWN PRINCE, whose face is pale with terror.

SUBORDINATE
General! East gate has fallen!

GENERAL
The tunnel. Take him.

SUBORDINATE
They're cutting off the path!

The SUBORDINATE prepares to leave with the CROWN PRINCE. The GENERAL stays behind, engaging the incoming ASSASSINS in fierce combat.

XIAOXIAO runs out from her hiding place.

XIAOXIAO
(crying out)
Father!

XIAOXIAO stumbles on her mother's blood, falling at the foot of a toppled pillar.

ASSASSIN LEADER
The prince! He's escaping!

ASSASSINS close in on XIAOXIAO, trapping her against the pillar.

XIAOXIAO
(choking)
Father... please...

The GENERAL looks at his fallen daughter and the Crown Prince behind him, his heart torn with anguish.

GENERAL
(shouting)
Xiaoxiao! Stay down!

GENERAL
(whispered, not to her)
Forgive me...

The GENERAL resolutely turns around, pulls up the young CROWN PRINCE, and rushes out the door without looking back.

XIAOXIAO lies on the ground, desperately reaching out her hand, watching her father's departing figure.

XIAOXIAO
(barely audible)
Father...

The ASSASSINS raise their blades and surround the helpless XIAOXIAO.

title: Dad, I'm Waiting for You (Episode 37)
description: A mother donates her kidney to save her son, but the doctor chooses to save another child instead, leading to a heart-wrenching confrontation.
context:
Title: Dad, I'm Waiting for You (Episode 37)
Description: A mother donates her kidney to save her son, but the doctor chooses to save another child instead, leading to a heart-wrenching confrontation.

INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - DAY

Close-up of the "OPERATING ROOM" light sign illuminated.

Doctors and nurses push two gurneys quickly down the corridor. YAN LU sits in a wheelchair, IV pole attached, and her son NAN NAN lies on a separate bed, both wearing hospital gowns.

YAN LU
Wait.

YAN LU reaches out and grasps NAN NAN's hand on the adjacent gurney.

YAN LU
Nan Nan, Mom's kidney is on its way. You must be strong and survive, okay?

NAN NAN
(weakly)
Okay.

The two gurneys are pushed in different directions, their hands forced apart. YAN LU struggles to sit up but is unable.

INT. OPERATING ROOM - DAY

A nurse prepares a syringe.

GU TINGFENG, wearing a white coat, mask, and glasses, approaches NAN NAN lying on the operating table. He is the transplant director, not the surgeon.

GU TINGFENG
Don't be afraid. Dad's here.

Suddenly, the operating room door bursts open. Nurse LIU YIN rushes in pushing another gurney with a child, LE LE.

LIU YIN
(frantically)
Dr. Gu! Le Le's kidneys are failing. He's dying. There's a protocol emergency—both are O-negative matches!

LIU YIN notices the organ container on ice.

LIU YIN
That kidney could save Le Le!

GU TINGFENG
But the allocation committee approved it for Nan Nan.

LIU YIN
(crying and pleading)
Tingfeng, I'm begging you. Le Le is critical. He needs this now or he won't survive!

NAN NAN
(weakly)
Dad...

NAN NAN
Uncle Gu, I'm in pain. Save me.

GU TINGFENG looks at both children, caught in an agonizing choice.

GU TINGFENG
(to Nan Nan)
Nan Nan, be good. Le Le's condition is more critical by protocol. Dad will authorize Le Le first. You wait a little longer for Dad.

GU TINGFENG motions for NAN NAN to be moved to a gurney nearby. LIU YIN and other nurses immediately move LE LE onto the operating table.

NAN NAN
(crying out)
Dad! Dad! Dad!

Nurses wheel NAN NAN out of the operating room. The door slowly closes.
continuation:
INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - DAY

YAN LU leans weakly against the wall outside the operating room, waiting anxiously.

The operating room door opens. A nurse wheels out NAN NAN's gurney.

YAN LU
(struggling to stand)
Why are you out so quickly? Nan Nan?

NAN NAN
Mom, Dad gave the kidney to Le Le.

YAN LU
(shocked)
What?

YAN LU rushes to the operating room door, pounding on it.

YAN LU
Tingfeng! Tingfeng!

YAN LU looks through the small window in the door at the scene inside, crying out in anguish.

YAN LU
(hysterically)
Tingfeng! You made Nan Nan sacrifice again, just for her? For your past? Gu Tingfeng! Are you even human?

INT. HOSPITAL ROOM - DAY

YAN LU sits on the hospital bed. NAN NAN lies beside her, asleep. YAN LU is on the phone, looking haggard and angry.

GU TINGFENG (V.O.)
I'm with Le Le for his treatment. Whatever it is, handle it yourself.

YAN LU hangs up, her eyes filled with despair.

NAN NAN
(sleep talking)
Dad... Dad...

GU TINGFENG, wearing a white coat, walks into the room. YAN LU immediately gets out of bed and blocks him.

GU TINGFENG
Yan Lu, Le Le needs this anti-rejection medicine first. Let Nan Nan wait for the next batch.

GU TINGFENG places a medicine bottle in YAN LU's hand, then turns and leaves. YAN LU stares in disbelief at his departing figure.

INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - DAY

YAN LU clutches her abdominal wound, leaning against the wall in pain, slowly sinking down. Blood seeps through the bandage.

A nurse wheels NAN NAN's gurney past her.

NAN NAN
Mom...

YAN LU struggles to crawl toward him, reaching out to grab NAN NAN.

NAN NAN
Mom, don't cry.

YAN LU cannot reach NAN NAN's hand and watches helplessly as he is wheeled away.

YAN LU
(crying out)
Nan Nan!

YAN LU collapses on the floor, sobbing in despair.

title: A Civet Cat Cannot Replace the Crown Prince
description: A woman discovers her scheming relatives' plot to use a surrogate pregnancy to steal her family's fortune and takes action to stop them.
context:
Title: A Civet Cat Cannot Replace the Crown Prince
Description: A woman discovers her scheming relatives' plot to use a surrogate pregnancy to steal her family's fortune and takes action to stop them.

INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - DAY

MISS LIN, wearing a black trench coat, sunglasses, and a hat, walks determinedly through the long hospital corridor.

MISS LIN (V.O.)
Last time, I found the investigator's report too late. This time, I'm three steps ahead.

MISS LIN stops and looks at a wall-mounted doctor's introduction board, showing DOCTOR WANG LIN's photo and information.

MISS LIN (V.O.)
Zhao Lan thinks she'll carry the next Lin heir. Let her. Just not with my father's blood.

MISS LIN turns and pushes open a hospital room door.

INT. HOSPITAL ROOM - DAY

ZHAO LAN sits on the bed in a patient gown, clutching a small bag of belongings. Her brother ZHAO DAJUN sits on the adjacent bed, tension in his shoulders.

ZHAO DAJUN
You're certain? If Mrs. Lin finds out before—

ZHAO LAN
She won't. By the time she knows, I'll be carrying the family's future. Blood always wins.

ZHAO DAJUN
And the cousin? The real daughter?

ZHAO LAN
She's had her chance. No sons, only pride. Men like President Lin need heirs, not wives.

ZHAO LAN touches her stomach almost protectively.

ZHAO LAN
My whole life has been serving them. This time, they serve me.

ZHAO DAJUN
(quietly)
For our family's future.

ZHAO LAN
For our survival.

A NURSE enters the room.

NURSE
Patient Zhao Lan, bed 826. Doctor Wang is ready.

ZHAO DAJUN
(whispering)
Make it take root.

ZHAO LAN
It will. It has to.

ZHAO LAN is helped out by the NURSE.
continuation:
INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - DAY

ZHAO DAJUN waits anxiously outside the operating room, rubbing a jade ring. MISS LIN secretly observes him from behind a corner.

INT. DOCTOR'S OFFICE - DAY

MISS LIN stands before DOCTOR WANG LIN, holding a sealed medical container.

MISS LIN
Use this instead. It's the legitimate Lin heir's sample.

DOCTOR WANG LIN
Miss Lin, the protocol is clear. I cannot—

MISS LIN
(slides a file forward)
Your malpractice settlement last year. My family made it disappear. We can make it reappear.

DOCTOR WANG LIN
(hesitates)
This is different. This is fraud.

MISS LIN
What Zhao Lan intends is fraud. I'm correcting a bloodline. The choice is yours—disgrace or discretion.

MISS LIN produces a document with the Lin family seal.

DOCTOR WANG LIN
(quietly)
I need this in writing. For my protection.

MISS LIN
Of course. For the family records.

INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - DAY

DOCTOR WANG LIN, wearing surgical scrubs, walks out of the operating room.

DOCTOR WANG LIN
The procedure was successful. All implantation markers are positive.

ZHAO DAJUN
(overwhelmed, grasping the doctor's hand)
Thank you... you've given us everything.

MISS LIN watches coldly from a distance.

MISS LIN (V.O.)
They think they're planting a dynasty. They're just sowing their own exile.

Medical staff wheel ZHAO LAN out of the operating room on a hospital bed.

ZHAO DAJUN
Sis, it's done. You're going to be a mother.

ZHAO LAN
(weak but hopeful)
Finally... finally I belong in that family.

ZHAO DAJUN
Let's get you home. Rest for the future.

ZHAO LAN
Yes. Our future.

Joy and exhaustion mix on their faces.

title: Crime Hunter: No Escape (Episode 35)
description: A livestreamer plans to expose her abusive boyfriend's crimes, but an unexpected delivery leads to a dangerous situation.
context:
Title: Crime Hunter: No Escape (Episode 35)
Description: A livestreamer plans to expose her abusive boyfriend's crimes, but an unexpected delivery leads to a dangerous situation.

INT. LIVESTREAM ROOM - DAY

CHEN LINLIN livestreams a dance, her smile mechanical.

CHEN LINLIN
Babies, new outfit's en route. Any minute now.

EXT. STREET - NIGHT

Delivery driver LIN FENG bikes while watching CHEN LINLIN's livestream on his phone. He checks the delivery bag—label reads "Costume: Sexy Bunny."

LIN FENG
(to himself)
No way. Actually her?

His phone buzzes—timeout warning. He swerves into a building.

INT. LIVESTREAM ROOM - NIGHT

CHEN LINLIN speaks to the camera.

CHEN LINLIN
Be right back, lovelies. Quick try-on.

She ends the stream.
continuation:
INT. CHEN LINLIN'S HOME - NIGHT

Chen picks up a photo of her with boyfriend ZHAO LONGFEI. She rolls up her sleeve, revealing scars. She opens a box containing a USB drive.

CHEN LINLIN (V.O.)
One more hour. Then you're done.

She slams the photo face-down. Pounding at the door makes her drop the USB. It slides under the couch.

CHEN LINLIN
Who's there?

LIN FENG (O.S.)
Delivery!

INT. DOORWAY - NIGHT

Chen opens the door to Lin Feng.

CHEN LINLIN
You trying to break my door?

LIN FENG
Traffic. Here's your package.

He hands it over. She glances at him, then at the hallway security camera.

CHEN LINLIN
Wait. I need to inspect it.

LIN FENG
I should—

CHEN LINLIN
Two minutes. Or I complain.

She leaves the door open. Lin Feng steps inside.

INT. BEDROOM - NIGHT

Chen emerges in the bunny costume. Lin Feng stares. She checks the mirror.

CHEN LINLIN
Does it look defective?

LIN FENG
No.

She moves closer, backing him against the wall—her eyes flick to a blinking red light in a smoke detector.

CHEN LINLIN
You were never in this room.

The front door unlocks. Chen spins, panicked.

CHEN LINLIN
No. He's back.

LIN FENG looks shocked.

title: Mystic Sister Wants to Go Up the Mountain, Brothers Please Let Go
description: An orphan girl with a special fate must reunite with her lost family and find her destined partner to overcome a tribulation and ascend to immortality.
context:
Title: Mystic Sister Wants to Go Up the Mountain, Brothers Please Let Go
Description: An orphan girl with a special fate must reunite with her lost family and find her destined partner to overcome a tribulation and ascend to immortality.

INT. COURTYARD - DAY

Close-up shot of an antique-style lantern.

MASTER YUN LING, an old man with white hair and beard, wearing fashionable sunglasses and a Taoist robe, lounges leisurely in a chair in the courtyard, fanning himself.

He picks up a teacup and takes a sip.

MASTER YUN LING
(intoxicated)
Ah, excellent tea!

EXT. SKY/COURTYARD - DAY

Special effects shot. LING YA carries an unconscious man, SU TANG, on her shoulder. Surrounded by golden light, she descends from the sky and lands outside the courtyard.

LING YA carries SU TANG into the courtyard.

LING YA
(excitedly)
Master, I brought back a great treasure!

MASTER YUN LING
(startled, sitting up)
Oh my, put him down quickly! Gently, gently!

LING YA puts SU TANG on the ground. A white puppy named "WANGCAI" runs over. LING YA happily picks it up.

LING YA
Wangcai!

LING YA holds the dog and speaks to her master.

LING YA
Master, he can actually replenish my spiritual energy!

MASTER YUN LING
(surprised, removing his sunglasses)
What? He is your second brother. You two share a blood bond!

LING YA
(delighted)
Then won't I be able to ascend soon?

MASTER YUN LING
(dismissively pointing at SU TANG on the ground)
Rely on him? A hundred years wouldn't be enough!

MASTER YUN LING
(seriously)
Aiya, you encountered a lightning tribulation during your ascension because you have the fate of a solitary star. To break this curse, you need to reunite with your family to complete your kinship line, and then find your destined partner to fulfill your marriage line. Only by reversing your fate this way can you ascend smoothly!

LING YA
Master, who is my destined partner?

MASTER YUN LING
(calculating with his fingers)
Let me calculate.

MASTER YUN LING'S face suddenly changes drastically.

MASTER YUN LING
(panicked)
Oh no! Your destined one will die within three days! Only if you dual-cultivate with him can you save him!

LING YA
(shocked)
What?!

MASTER YUN LING
Aiya, quickly return to the Su family with your second brother to reunite with your relatives, and hurry to save your destined one!

LING YA
Then I'll wake him up right now!

LING YA prepares to cast a spell on SU TANG.

MASTER YUN LING
(hastily stopping her)
Aiya, no! He's been poisoned with Soul Confusion Poison! Even I would need weeks to cure it properly. Don't waste your energy.

MASTER YUN LING walks away, fanning himself.

LING YA
(thoughtfully)
Soul Confusion Poison?

LING YA suddenly thinks of something. Her eyes light up, and she turns and runs into the house.
continuation:
INT. ROOM - DAY

LING YA quickly searches through the bookshelf, pulls out an ancient text with "Essential Prescriptions from the Golden Cabinet" written on the cover.

LING YA
(happily)
Got it!

She opens the book and finds a page.

LING YA
Acupressure method.

EXT. COURTYARD - DAY

LING YA crouches beside the unconscious SU TANG, holding the book in one hand while gesturing at acupressure points on his body with the other.

LING YA
(pressing a point)
Hm? Wrong point?

She anxiously pats SU TANG.

LING YA
Wake up!

She tries pressing another point. SU TANG'S fingers twitch.

LING YA
(confused)
Hm? Wrong again? This shouldn't be. Isn't this what the book says?

LING YA tosses the book aside and decides to do it herself.

LING YA
Try again!

She frantically presses points all over SU TANG'S body, forcing spiritual energy through her fingertips to suppress the poison.

Black screen. Text displays: 2 HOURS LATER

SU TANG lies on the ground, his body twitching slightly.

INT. ANCESTRAL HALL - NIGHT

MASTER YUN LING meditates cross-legged in the ancestral hall. SU TANG slowly wakes up, leaning against the doorframe, looking dazed.

SU TANG
(weakly)
Who am I?

He shakily stands up and walks into the hall. At that moment, LING YA walks in carrying a large stone.

SU TANG
Excuse me, may I ask where this is?

LING YA
This is Yunling Temple. You fainted at the foot of the mountain. I brought you back.

SU TANG
(gratefully bowing)
Many thanks for saving my life, hero.

He straightens up, feeling something wrong with his entire body.

SU TANG
(painfully)
But why does my whole body hurt?

LING YA
(eyes darting away, guiltily)
It's not my fault! I mean, I don't know either.

SU TANG'S phone rings. He takes it out to answer.

SU TANG
Hello, Dad.

SU TAI'AN (V.O.)
You're out fooling around every day. Do you still want this family or not?

SU TANG
Dad, I fainted. This hero saved me.

SU TANG turns the phone camera toward LING YA. LING YA waves at the camera, showing a smile.

SU TAI'AN (V.O.)
Ah?

On the phone screen, SU TAI'AN sees LING YA'S face and his eyes widen in shock.

SU TAI'AN (V.O.)
Ah? This...

LING YA
(sudden sharp pain in her chest, whispering)
That voice...

FADE OUT.

title: The Secret of Rose
description: A mysterious woman named Rose arrives at an engagement party, revealing a dangerous connection to the groom that threatens to unravel everything.
context:
Title: The Secret of Rose
Description: A mysterious woman named Rose arrives at an engagement party, revealing a dangerous connection to the groom that threatens to unravel everything.

INT. UNKNOWN LOCATION - DAY

Close-up on ROSE, wearing a red dress, exquisite makeup, sharp eyes, and a mysterious smile at the corner of her mouth.

ROSE (V.O.)
Zi'an thinks he's the player. Let's see how he likes being played.

EXT. GARDEN PARTY - DAY

An outdoor engagement party is in progress. Guests chat in small groups.

MR. CHEN, wearing a black tailcoat and gold-rimmed glasses, appears restless in the crowd. He checks his phone, then spots something that makes his face pale.

MR. CHEN grabs ROSE by the arm and pulls her behind a backdrop printed with wedding photos.

MR. CHEN
(through gritted teeth)
I told you to stay away.

ROSE
(straightening his boutonniere)
And miss your big day? I'm her favorite guest.

MR. CHEN
(grabbing her hand)
Stop. Whatever you want—

In the distance, SU WANYING in a white wedding dress and her BRIDESMAIDS walk toward them.

ROSE
(leaning close, voice like honey)
She's coming. Smile, darling. Wouldn't want her to see you sweat.

MR. CHEN's expression tightens. He turns around in panic.

SU WANYING approaches.

MR. CHEN
(going to meet her, forced cheer)
Wanying.

ROSE steps forward first, embracing SU WANYING with genuine warmth.

ROSE
Finally! I almost thought you'd locked her in a tower, Zi'an.

SU WANYING
(delighted)
Rose! You made it.

ROSE
continuation:
Wouldn't miss it. Though your fiancé seems... nervous about my gift.

MR. CHEN
It's nothing, honey. Rose was just leaving.

SU WANYING
(to ROSE)
Ignore him. He's been a wreck all day. Stay—please.

ROSE
I'll be careful not to cause trouble.

MR. CHEN
(quietly desperate)
Wanying, the guests—

SU WANYING
(to MR. CHEN)
Go entertain them. We'll catch up.

MR. CHEN
It's better not to wander around, to avoid causing trouble.

ROSE
(looking at him, smile sharp)
Trouble finds me. Always has.

SU WANYING
(to ROSE)
Meet me later? There's something I want you to see.

ROSE
Wouldn't miss it.

SU WANYING and MR. CHEN leave. ROSE watches them, her smile fading. She touches a hidden object in her clutch.

INT. CORRIDOR - DAY

ROSE walks alone down a quiet corridor, her high heels clicking crisply. She stops at a door marked "STUDY."

She reaches for the handle, then hesitates. Listens.

ROSE
(under her breath)
Right on time.

As soon as the door opens a crack, a MAN WITH A KNIFE wearing a hat emerges from behind it, controls ROSE from behind, and holds a small knife to her neck.

MAN WITH A KNIFE
(whisper)
Shouldn't have come back.

ROSE's eyes become cold and alert. She doesn't struggle.

FADE OUT.

title: Are You Crazy! How Dare You Fire A Miracle Doctor
description: When Jiangzhou's richest man suffers a catastrophic stroke, a conflicted young TCM prodigy must risk his career and legacy to attempt a forbidden technique—knowing his intervention could either save a life or destroy his own.
context:
Title: Are You Crazy! How Dare You Fire A Miracle Doctor
Description: When Jiangzhou's richest man suffers a catastrophic stroke, a conflicted young TCM prodigy must risk his career and legacy to attempt a forbidden technique—knowing his intervention could either save a life or destroy his own.

INT. DOCTOR'S OFFICE - DAY

JIANG BEI (28), stethoscope around his neck, hunches over an ancient thread-bound book: "Nine Needles to Break Evil Spirits." A faded family photo peeks from the pages. 

His phone BUZZES urgently. On his computer, a news ticker scrolls silently: "BREAKING: Jiuzhou tycoon Chen Yi suffers massive stroke—critical condition."

NEWS ANCHOR (V.O.)
...sources confirm Mr. Chen's condition is deteriorating rapidly. Our top story: Medical emergency at Huacheng Sanatorium...

Jiang Bei silences his phone, hand trembling as he touches the book.

JIANG BEI
(whispering)
Forgive me, Grandfather.

EMERGENCY RESCUE MONTAGE:

- Red ambulance lights slice through rain-soaked streets.
- CHEN YI (60s) is wheeled into trauma bay, monitors flatlining.

NEWS ANCHOR (V.O.)
Chen Yi, listed in critical condition, has been admitted to Huacheng Sanatorium's elite neuro unit. Specialists have been mobilized...

INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - DAY

Medical staff sprint alongside the stretcher. CHEN XIAOLONG (30s), bespoke suit soaked with rain, jogs beside them.

CHEN XIAOLONG
(voice cracking, authoritative)
Save him. Whatever it costs—my father built this hospital wing. He doesn't get to die in it.

A NURSE gently restrains him as the OR doors swing shut. The "SURGERY IN PROGRESS" sign ignites.
continuation:
INT. OPERATING ROOM - DAY

Chaos. LEAD SURGEON (50s) studies a CT scan—white mass obscuring brain stem. Monitors chirp arrhythmically.

LEAD SURGEON
Bleed's too deep. Craniotomy's useless. Pressure's spiking—190 over 110.

FEMALE NURSE
What about thrombolytics?

LEAD SURGEON
He's already maxed. Last option is Dr. Jiang's technique, but—

The OR door hisses open.

Jiang Bei enters, shrugging on sterile scrubs, his medical box tucked under one arm. The staff part like water.

LEAD SURGEON
Dr. Jiang. We can't stabilize—

JIANG BEI
(interrupting, calm)
Vitals. CT.

He opens the red wooden box. Silver needles gleam under surgical lights. Chen Yi's monitor PINGS—pressure climbing.

Jiang Bei palpates Chen Yi's skull, eyes closed. His fingers find a point. He hesitates—a heartbeat of doubt.

FEMALE NURSE
(quietly, to colleague)
He's doing it blind?

LEAD SURGEON
(whispering)
Twenty years training. His family's technique predates this hospital.

Jiang Bei exhales. The needle sinks in—precise, surgical. A second. Third.

Monitors stabilize. Blood pressure drops: 140 over 85. Heart rate steadies.

FEMALE NURSE
(astonished)
Clot's resolving on the scan...

Jiang Bei closes his box, shoulders tight.

JIANG BEI
These needles maintain pressure equilibrium. Remove any within sixty minutes—

LEAD SURGEON
What happens?

JIANG BEI
(turning away)
Rebound hemorrhage. Instantaneous. The technique is... unforgiving.

He stops at the door, not looking back.

JIANG BEI (CONT'D)
And Doctor? My methods weren't in your protocol. If this goes wrong—I'm already fired.

The door closes. The staff stare at the needles—tiny, fragile, holding a life in balance.

title: White Moonlight Paradox
description: A woman is reborn and discovers her husband never loved her, but always loved Shen Zhizhi instead.
context:
Title: White Moonlight Paradox
Description: A woman is reborn and discovers her husband never loved her, but always loved Shen Zhizhi instead.

INT. LUXURY APARTMENT - NIGHT

RUAN WAN (28) sits by floor-to-ceiling windows, a fashionable denim jacket over silk pajamas. Her reflection shows a face that's died before.

RUAN WAN (V.O.)
I died screaming their names. Now I wake up three years earlier. Before Shen Zhizhi returns. Before my husband breaks me.

FLASHBACK:

Images flash: Ruan Wan crying over divorce papers. A man's hand pushing her away. Shen Zhizhi's triumphant smile. A car plunging off a cliff.

RUAN WAN (V.O.)
The clown. The placeholder. Their obstacle.

ON SCREEN: Character name - RUAN WAN.
continuation:
INT. CLUB HALLWAY - NIGHT

RUAN WAN walks expressionless, phone in hand - a photo of her husband with Shen Zhizhi. Her knuckles are white.

RICH HANDSOME MAN (O.S.)
Ignoring me now? Or did hubby finally confess?

She stops, hollow-eyed.

RICH HANDSOME MAN (O.S.)
You thought we wanted you? Every dinner, every gift - just to help Zhizhi test his devotion. And yours.

He laughs, cruel.

RICH HANDSOME MAN (O.S.)
She lands tomorrow. Your anniversary spot. You're not half what she is.

RUAN WAN closes her eyes, absorbing the insults. A tear falls.

Then she opens them, now cold and clear.

RUAN WAN
(internal monologue)
Three years head start. Let's see who laughs last.

RUAN WAN stares directly at the camera, her eyes filled with terrible clarity. She holds up her phone, deletes the contact: "Husband."

title: Heart Transplant Recipient
description: A young boy awaits a life-saving heart transplant while his mother's financial desperation threatens to cost him everything.
context:
Title: Heart Transplant Recipient
Description: A young boy awaits a life-saving heart transplant while his mother's financial desperation threatens to cost him everything.

INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - DAY

The camera rapidly pans across the crowd of hurried people in the hospital.

DOCTOR YUAN (V.O.)
This transplant recipient, Yu Zhengkai, is only an eight-year-old child. He's been waiting for a compatible heart for four years. You must safely deliver the heart to Second Hospital within two hours.

ZHANG HAORAN, a young man, carries a blue cooler marked "Human Organ Transport - Special Use" and runs anxiously through the corridor.

EXT. HOSPITAL PARKING LOT - DAY

ZHANG HAORAN runs to a white SUV and opens the trunk.

ZHANG HAORAN
(speaking into the air, as if on a phone call)
Don't worry, Doctor Yuan. I know this route well. It won't even take two hours.

He carefully places the cooler in the trunk. Close-up of the recipient information card on the box, with the name "Yu Zhengkai" written in the name field.

INT. HOSPITAL PARKING GARAGE - DAY

YU ZHENGKAI, an eight-year-old boy with a surgical scar visible above his collar, sits on a low concrete wall, listlessly kicking his feet. LIU WEN stands nearby, her back to him, speaking urgently into her phone.

LIU WEN
(into phone, desperate)
Three days. That's all I need. You can't cancel his coverage when we're this close.

YU ZHENGKAI watches a NURSE walk past pushing a wheelchair. A small stuffed animal tied to the chair catches his eye. He instinctively reaches toward it.

The NURSE stops, protective.

NURSE
Please don't touch the equipment, sweetie.

YU ZHENGKAI
(startled)
I just liked the—

LIU WEN wheels around, her anxiety manifesting as defensiveness.

LIU WEN
He's just a child! We're waiting for his appointment.

NURSE
There are better places to wait than a parking garage.
continuation:
LIU WEN
(exhausted, bitter)
The waiting room is full. The pharmacy is closed. Should we wait in the street?

YU ZHENGKAI suddenly clutches his chest, his face draining of color.

YU ZHENGKAI
(whispering)
Mom... something's wrong...

He slumps sideways. LIU WEN catches him.

LIU WEN
(panic shattering everything else)
Xiao Kai! Xiao Kai, look at me!

NURSE
(radioing immediately)
Code team, pediatric cardiac, parking garage level two.

INT. HOSPITAL OFFICE/CORRIDOR - DAY

DOCTOR WANG, a middle-aged doctor, is excitedly on the phone.

DOCTOR WANG
(into the phone)
Confirmed? Perfect. We're ready.

He hangs up and rushes out of the office to the nurses' station.

DOCTOR WANG
(to the NURSE)
Yu Zhengkai's heart is here. We need him in pre-op immediately. Page his mother.

NURSE
She's not responding to pages. I'll try her personal number.

The NURSE dials. We hear ringing.

INT. HOSPITAL PARKING GARAGE - DAY

Split screen.

On the left, LIU WEN holds YU ZHENGKAI as medical staff converge with a gurney and equipment. On the right, LIU WEN's phone, set on the concrete wall, lights up with "Hospital Surgery."

LIU WEN
(to NURSE)
Help him. Please, just help him.

The phone vibrates silently. The call goes unanswered as the code team surrounds them.

title: Yingying's Stratagem in the Martial Court
description: In the sixth year of the Wu Dynasty, a great drought strikes and barbarian tribes invade. A woman finds herself trapped in a war-torn border region, mistaken for a spy, and confronts the cold general she was forced to marry.
context:
Title: Yingying's Stratagem in the Martial Court
Description: In the sixth year of the Wu Dynasty, a great drought strikes and barbarian tribes invade. A woman finds herself trapped in a war-torn border region, mistaken for a spy, and confronts the cold general she was forced to marry.

EXT. NORTH MOUNTAIN PASS - DAY

NARRATOR (V.O.)
The sixth year of the Wu Dynasty. Drought cracks the earth. Barbarian hordes swallow the northern frontier. The court's coffers are empty—no grain, no reinforcements.

ZHAN BEICHENG, 28, armor scarred from a hundred battles, rides a gaunt black horse. Dark circles bruise his eyes. He leads a squadron of equally ragged soldiers through the gate.

He raises his spear—not in triumph, but a weary salute. His soldiers follow, their boots kicking up dust from a road that hasn't seen rain in months.

EXT. BORDER CITY - DAY

The city chokes on silence. A WOMAN hunches over a water barrel, scraping algae from the wood. Her child lies listless in the dirt, ribs visible through torn silk.

Mei'ER (V.O.)
I thought hunger had a sound. It doesn't. It's the absence of everything.

INT. PRISON CELL - DAY

MEI'ER, 24, lies in a dark cell. Her modern jeans and hoodie have been replaced by a torn hanfu, but her manicured nails remain spotless—impossibly clean.

She clutches her head, a migraine splitting her skull.

MEI'ER
(weakly)
Not a spy. I'm his wife. The General's—

A green light pulses from her jade pendant. MEI'ER gasps, her vision doubling—concrete walls flicker beneath the wooden bars. She swallows vomit.

MEI'ER
(panicked)
No. Not again. Not here—

She shakes the cell door. Rust flakes bite her palms.

MEI'ER
Is anyone there? Anyone!

FEMALE PRISONER (O.S.)
(listlessly)
Save your voice. Seven days since the last millet ration. If you want to live, sleep.

MEI'ER
(shocked)
Seven days?

Mei'er spots a rat corpse in the corner, its bones picked clean.

FLASHBACK TO:
continuation:
INT. MANOR - DAY

MEI'ER, dressed in designer silk, kneels before her FATHER, a tech magnate.

MEI'ER
Father, I've analyzed Zhan Beicheng's military records. His supply chain logistics are... elegant. I need to meet him.

FATHER
The Emperor's decree is sealed. But the border is death.

MEI'ER
Then I'll optimize it.

INT. WEDDING HALL - DAY

MEI'ER stands alone in red wedding robes. A HOUSEKEEPER holds a rooster.

HOUSEKEEPER
My son defends our last granary. Bow to the rooster, or return to your palace.

MEI'ER touches a hidden pocket in her sleeve—her smartphone, now useless. She bows.

MEI'ER (V.O.)
If the system won't come to me, I'll go to the system.

EXT. BORDER VILLAGE - DAY

MEI'ER, now in peasant disguise, sketches fortifications in the dirt with a stick. A SOLDIER grabs her wrist.

SOLDIER A
What are you mapping?

MEI'ER
I—I'm just drawing. I'm the General's—

SOLDIER B
Another spy. Take her to the cells.

INT. PRISON CELL - NIGHT

MEI'ER sits on straw, calculating. She tears a strip from her hem, ties it around her finger.

MEI'ER
(to herself)
Okay. Transmigrated into a side character. Check. System malfunctioning. Check. If I can trigger the exit protocol—

The cell door CREAKS open. TWO SOLDIERS enter, carrying a torch that sputters from tallow shortage.

SOLDIER A
General's interrogating prisoners tonight. You're next.

MEI'ER
Wait—my jade pendant. It's not—

SOLDIER B
Move.

They haul her up. Her pendant swings, catching the torchlight. It flickers green.

INT. GENERAL'S TENT - NIGHT

ZHAN BEICHENG pores over a map, marking supply routes with charcoal. His hands shake from exhaustion.

The soldiers push MEI'ER to her knees. Her pendant hits the dirt—GREEN LIGHT pulses.

ZHAN BEICHENG
(coldly, without looking up)
How many in your raiding party?

MEI'ER
I don't—I'm not a soldier. Look at my hands.

She extends her palms—soft, uncalloused.

ZHAN BEICHENG finally glances at her. His eyes narrow.

ZHAN BEICHENG
Then you're a court spy, testing my loyalty.

MEI'ER
No! I'm the woman you married by decree. I came to fix your logistics—

ZHAN BEICHENG
I have no wife. Drag her out.

Mei'er lunges. The pendant FLARES—

MEI'ER
(screaming)
I want to go home!

She VANISHES. The pendant clatters to the ground, smoking.

SOLDIER A stares at the empty space.

SOLDIER A
General...?

ZHAN BEICHENG picks up the pendant. It's warm. Through the smoke, he sees a faint image: MEI'ER, dressed strangely, in a room of glass and light.

The image flickers out.

FADE TO BLACK.

title: Peerless Hero - None Other Than Me
description: A disciple born without a dantian relies on sheer physical strength to defy fate and protect his sect from demonic forces.
context:
Title: Peerless Hero - None Other Than Me
Description: A disciple born without a dantian relies on sheer physical strength to defy fate and protect his sect from demonic forces.

INT. XUANTIAN SECT TRAINING GROUND - DAY

Morning mist burns off magnificent mountain ranges. On the training ground, QILIN practices palm strikes against a massive stone stele. Each impact leaves a faint imprint. His hands are scarred callouses.

QILIN
(shouting)
Ha!

The stele trembles. A fresh hairline crack appears.

FATTY runs over, breath ragged, and grabs Qilin's arm.

FATTY
Qilin, Gu Ming's coming. Now.

QILIN
Shakes him off, checking his wrist.
Let him.

FATTY
(desperate)
He's bringing Inner Court disciples. They'll do worse than last time. You remember last time.

QILIN
Looks at his scarred hands. At the stele covered in three years of his impact marks.
I remember every hit. That's why I'm done being a dummy.

FATTY
We can't cultivate, Qilin. No dantian, no future.

QILIN
Then I build my own path. Shangyan Academy selection is in three months.

FATTY
They'll never—

A purple energy wave strikes Fatty mid-sentence. He crashes to the ground, groaning.

QILIN
(shouting)
Er Pang!

QILIN rushes to him.

QILIN
Er Pang! Get up!

SENIOR BROTHER GU MING approaches with several disciples. Purple energy still crackles around his hand.

GU MING
(arrogant)
Who gave you permission to dodge?
continuation:
INT. XUANTIAN CANYON - DAY

Scene transition. XUANTIAN SECT DISCIPLES lie scattered across the canyon floor, defeated. Residual demonic energy sparks in the air.

DEMON SECT LEFT PROTECTOR LUOCHA stands triumphant, surrounded by red-black energy coils.

LUOCHA
(laughing)
Your Xuantian Sect is nothing. The Central Province belongs to the Demon Sect now.

She levitates higher, energy building.

XUANTIAN SECT SAINTESS SU ZHI lies on the ground, her sword shattered, face streaked with dirt and blood.

SU ZHI
(whispered)
Someone... save us...

A massive shadow falls. The Sacred Stone stele from the training ground plummets from the sky, rotating end-over-end. It strikes the ground before Luocha with meteoric impact.

The shockwave throws Luocha backward. Her demonic energy shatters like glass. She slams into the canyon wall.

DEMON SECT SUBORDINATE
(panicked)
Lord Luocha!

Several subordinates rush to help.

LUOCHA
(terrified, coughing blood)
There's no qi! That was just... pure force! Get me out of here!

The Demon Sect flees.

XUANTIAN ELDER CHEN YUAN and ELDER GU SEN stare at the embedded stele, then at the sky.

CHEN YUAN
Which master could launch a ten-ton stele a hundred miles?

GU SEN
(mystified)
No qi signature. None. How is that possible?

SU ZHI stands, limping toward the stele. She traces a familiar carving.

SU ZHI
This is our Sacred Stone. From the outer disciple grounds.

GU SEN
Incredible. To throw this with such force... without cultivation...

CHEN YUAN
When did we gain a monster disguised as a disciple?

SU ZHI
Her eyes shine with fierce hope.
Find him. Before he decides we're not worth saving.

title: Dare to Speak Your Secret
description: A woman is manipulated by her desperate brother into appearing on a live mediation show, where long-simmering family tensions erupt over a house, an unborn child, and a damning psychological accusation.
context:
Title: Dare to Speak Your Secret
Description: A woman is manipulated by her desperate brother into appearing on a live mediation show, where long-simmering family tensions erupt over a house, an unborn child, and a damning psychological accusation.

INT. TV STATION STUDIO - DAY

Lights flicker, the stage is beautifully decorated, and the audience seats are full.

The HOST stands center stage, holding a microphone.

HOST
Welcome everyone to "Dare to Speak Your Secret." Now, please welcome our guests—Mr. Wu Zhengyi, Miss Jia Zhenzhen, and Ms. Wu Haoyue.

In the audience, WU ZHENGYI and WU HAOYUE sit together. Hearing her name, WU HAOYUE freezes.

The audience applauds enthusiastically.

WU HAOYUE
(whispering to Wu Zhengyi)
Zhengyi. You told me this was a business special. "Support your brother's career."

WU ZHENGYI
(gripping her hand, voice low)
Sis, Zhenzhen's leaving me. She's booked the appointment. Just... tell her what she needs to hear.

WU HAOYUE
(eyes narrowing)
You brought me here to bargain?

WU ZHENGYI
(desperate)
On your niece's life. On what we used to be.

He slides down, kneeling. Cameras pivot.

WU ZHENGYI
(whispered)
Twenty-three years you raised me. Is this what you wanted?

WU HAOYUE
(tearful, bitter smile)
You think I wanted to be the villain in your life story?

A long beat. The studio holds its breath.

WU HAOYUE
continuation:
(quietly)
Get up. I'll speak.

WU ZHENGYI helps her up, steering her toward the stage.

HOST
Let's welcome this moment of reconciliation.

WU ZHENGYI and WU HAOYUE walk onto the stage. From the other side, a pregnant JIA ZHENZHEN appears, dry-eyed and resolute.

The three stand center stage.

HOST
(to Jia Zhenzhen)
Miss Jia, you've asked for emergency mediation. What will it take?

JIA ZHENZHEN
(hand on her belly)
I need to not bring my daughter into a house where love comes with a price tag.

HOST
Please, everyone sit.

They sit: Wu Zhengyi beside Jia Zhenzhen, Wu Haoyue across.

MALE EXPERT
Miss Jia, this is a safe space. The broadcast is live. What hasn't been said?

FEMALE EXPERT
And Ms. Wu—this began with property, but where does it end?

WU ZHENGYI
(gently to his wife)
Tell them, Zhenzhen. Tell them why you flinch when she enters a room.

JIA ZHENZHEN turns to Wu Haoyue. Her composure cracks.

JIA ZHENZHEN
Because she... because my therapist has a word for it. NPD. Narcissistic Personality Disorder. And I'm the one paying for her diagnosis.

JIA ZHENZHEN
(quieter, but clear)
I don't need the label. I need her to stop looking at me like I'm a thief who stole her brother and her house.

She wipes her eyes. Wu Haoyue sits motionless, but her jaw tightens—imperceptible, but there.

title: Meeting in Joy
description: A prince and his family are ambushed by assassins in a bamboo forest at night, leading to a desperate fight for survival and a tragic sacrifice.
context:
Title: Meeting in Joy
Description: A prince and his family are ambushed by assassins in a bamboo forest at night, leading to a desperate fight for survival and a tragic sacrifice.

EXT. BAMBOO FOREST PATH - NIGHT

Rain slashes through the bamboo forest. A carriage races along the flooded path, six black-clad ASSASSINS closing in.

ASSASSIN (O.S.)
Prince Jinming's head buys freedom! Kill the rest!

Inside the carriage, PRINCE XIE JINMING grips the reins, his expression grave.

FAN ZHU
The river ford is ahead! I can hold them at the narrows!

FAN ZHU spurs his horse back toward the assassins.

EXT. FOREST CLEARING - NIGHT

PRINCESS QING SHU runs through the forest carrying XIE YUTANG. Her foot catches a root—she twists, taking the impact on her shoulder. Three ASSASSINS fan out around them.

QING SHU
(shielding Tangtang)
Back.

XIE JINMING arrives just as an assassin lunges. Their swords clash. He engages them, but there are too many.

QING SHU scrambles behind a moss-covered boulder.

QING SHU
(whispered)
Our night market game. Silent as stone. Not a breath.

XIE YUTANG
(trembling)
No matter what?

QING SHU
No matter what.

QING SHU kisses Tangtang's forehead, then deliberately steps away from the boulder.

Elsewhere, XIE JINMING is outnumbered, his sleeve ripped and bloodied.

QING SHU spots an assassin circling toward the boulder. She grabs a fallen branch, swings it.

QING SHU
continuation:
Here! The princess is here!

The assassin turns. Behind him, another raises a crossbow at XIE JINMING's back.

QING SHU
Jinming! Behind you!

QING SHU lunges, tackling the crossbowman. The bolt grazes her. A third assassin's blade catches her side—she stumbles toward the cliff edge.

XIE JINMING
Qing Shu!

QING SHU looks from her bleeding husband to the assassins near Tangtang's boulder. Beyond the cliff, the river roars.

QING SHU
For Tangtang!

She sprints for the cliff, breaks free of grasping hands, and dives toward the white water.

XIE JINMING
QING SHU!

XIE JINMING frantically cuts down the assassins around him and rushes to the cliff edge. The river churns below.

FAN ZHU arrives.

FAN ZHU
Your Highness!

XIE JINMING
She dove for the river! Willow Bend!

FAN ZHU
I'll find her!

FAN ZHU immediately heads down the cliff with a rope.

EXT. RIVER SHALLOWS - DAWN

Dawn breaks. QING SHU lies unconscious on a sandbar, breathing shallow but steady.

A LITTLE GIRL prods her with a stick, then drops it in alarm.

LITTLE GIRL
Don't die! My mother knows herbs! I'll get her!

She splashes away through the reeds.

title: Untitled Screenplay
description: A disturbing night unfolds as a father forces his way into his daughter's room with sinister intentions.
context:
Title: Untitled Screenplay
Description: A disturbing night unfolds as a father forces his way into his daughter's room with sinister intentions.

INT. BEDROOM - NIGHT

A young woman (DAUGHTER, 20s) in a nightgown sits on the floor by the bed, urgently texting on her phone. The room is dimly lit.

SFX: Knocking sound

FATHER (O.S.)
Daughter, open the door.

SFX: Louder knocking

FATHER (O.S.)
Open the door. Now.

DAUGHTER
(urgently)
Dad, I'm sleeping.

FATHER (O.S.)
Don't lie. I know you're not.

SFX: Loud crash of door being kicked open

A middle-aged man in a suit (FATHER) enters, holding a prescription bottle. His expression flickers between concern and menace.

FATHER
You're hiding something. Having one of your spells?

FATHER pulls out a worn photograph.

FATHER
Your sister stopped believing me too.

DAUGHTER backs onto the bed, phone hidden.

DAUGHTER
(whispering)
That was different. You need to leave.

FATHER
(grinning)
Leave? I protect you. From everything.
continuation:
FATHER lunges, pinning her. DAUGHTER screams.

FATHER
She fought like this. Exact same way.

DAUGHTER kicks him hard in the chest.

FATHER
(groaning)
Ah! You think pain matters anymore?

FATHER grabs a pillow. The phone drops—screen shows: "911 ON WAY."

FATHER
Let me help you. Let me fix this.

FATHER presses the pillow hard against DAUGHTER's face. DAUGHTER struggles, then goes limp.

FATHER removes the pillow. DAUGHTER lies still.

FATHER
(shaking her)
Get up! You can't do this to me—get up!

FATHER drags her to the floor.

FATHER
Stop playing! Your sister played dead too!

He checks her pulse. His face drains of color.

FATHER
No. No no no.

FATHER drops the photograph and rushes out.

EXT. BRIDGE - DAY

A handsome man in a suit (GU QICHEN) holds a bouquet, checking his phone anxiously. Caption appears: GU QICHEN, Young Master of Gu Group.

INT. BEDROOM - NIGHT

DAUGHTER still lies on the floor, her fate uncertain. Her phone BUZZES: "Gu Qichen: almost there."

SFX: Heavy sound effect like a gunshot

title: The Real and Fake Heiress Returns
description: A woman is brought to the Tan family estate as a potential long-lost granddaughter, but faces suspicion and danger from the paranoid patriarch.
context:
Title: The Real and Fake Heiress Returns
Description: A woman is brought to the Tan family estate as a potential long-lost granddaughter, but faces suspicion and danger from the paranoid patriarch.

INT. TAN FAMILY LIVING ROOM - DAY

OLD MASTER TAN (70s, sharp-eyed, calculating) sits in his leather armchair. Beside him on the sofa is WEI LING (20s, nervous, the current "granddaughter" who arrived three months ago). A silver tea set sits untouched.

OLD MASTER TAN
(to Wei Ling)
Pour the tea. Let me see your hands tremble.

Before Wei Ling can respond, LEI CHANGPING (40s, slick, predatory) enters with CHEN YUN (20s, composed but with haunted eyes).

LEI CHANGPING
Old Master Tan. This is Chen Yun. Our genetic indicators are a 99.8% match.

CHEN YUN
(formal, controlled)
Grandfather.

WEI LING
(vehement, desperate)
Grandfather, she's lying! I saw her surveillance file—she was recruited from a debtor's prison!

OLD MASTER TAN
(to a servant)
The briefcase.

A SERVANT delivers a leather briefcase to Lei Changping. He opens it: stacks of pristine bills.

LEI CHANGPING
(satisfied)
Wise choice. She's all yours.

LEI CHANGPING turns to leave, but OLD MASTER TAN's voice freezes him.

OLD MASTER TAN
One month. If she survives, you'll receive ten times that.

LEI CHANGPING
(confused)
Survives?

OLD MASTER TAN
My last three "granddaughters" didn't.

LEI Changping's smile falters. He glances at Chen Yun, seeing her not as a commodity but as a potential corpse, then exits quickly.

Chen Yun steps forward, her hands visibly scarred. She kneels before Old Master Tan, her voice barely controlled.

CHEN YUN
Father died two years ago. His last words were about your birthday—he said you always wanted rain, but feared the ache in your joints. He kept a bottle of your favorite malt whiskey under his bed. Never opened it.

Wei Ling lunges forward, but two MAIDS materialize, holding her back.

WEI LING
(screaming)
He's testing you! None of it's real!
continuation:
OLD MASTER TAN
(to Chen Yun)
The whiskey was a decoy. The real test was whether you'd mention the daughter I actually lost. She drowned at seven.

Chen Yun's face goes pale—this detail wasn't in any file.

OLD MASTER TAN
(to the maids)
Remove the imitation.

A maid presses a chloroform-soaked cloth to Wei Ling's face. Her body goes limp.

OLD MASTER TAN
(to Chen Yun)
Stand up. Real heirs don't kneel for money.

CHEN YUN
(standing, voice steady)
Then give me something worth standing for.

OLD MASTER TAN
(cold laugh)
Ha. Zhang Jiaxin!

INT. STUDY - DAY

BUTLER ZHANG JIAXIN (50s, immaculate, unreadable) enters. The walls are lined with photos of girls at various ages—all suspected impostors, all crossed out with red X's.

ZHANG JIAXIN
Master.

OLD MASTER TAN
(hands over evidence bag)
Test this hair against my son's remains. Not the living tissue samples.

ZHANG JIAXIN
The ones in the sealed vault?

OLD MASTER TAN
If she's a plant, they'll have compromised the vault. This way, we see who prepared which lie.

On the desk: a photo of a seven-year-old girl in a yellow raincoat—the only uncrossed picture.

INT. HALLWAY - NIGHT

Zhang Jiaxin walks through the darkened corridor, now in a simple slip dress—her off-duty attire. She makes a phone call, her posture completely changed: relaxed, predatory.

ZHANG JIAXIN (V.O.)
The fifth one. She's different.

ZHANG JIAXIN
(into phone)
Miss Qin, the old man is running a parallel test. Should I intercept?

A beat. She listens, then smiles.

ZHANG JIAXIN
Understood. I'll make sure Chen Yun passes. After all, we need a real heiress to access the Tan Group shares.

title: Waking Up Five Years Later, Married to the Richest Heir
description: After waking from a coma, Lin Ci discovers she's lost five years of memory and is married to the powerful heir she once admired from afar.
context:
Title: Waking Up Five Years Later, Married to the Richest Heir
Description: After waking from a coma, Lin Ci discovers she's lost five years of memory and is married to the powerful heir she once admired from afar.

INT. SCHOOL PLAYGROUND - DAY

LIN CI (18 years old), wearing a school uniform, nervously holds a pink love letter in both hands.

LIN CI (V.O.)
Today, eighteen-year-old Lin Ci has decided to confess her feelings to her senior, Jiang He.

LIN CI smiles, walking across the playground full of anticipation.

FLASHBACK:

JIANG HE and Lin Ci's best friend LI SIQI embrace tightly on the steps.

LIN CI (V.O.)
But Jiang He and my best friend Li Siqi were hugging each other. I was betrayed by my best friend.

Back to reality, the smile on LIN CI's face disappears, replaced by shock and pain. The love letter slips from her hand and floats to the ground. She angrily throws the letter at the embracing couple.

INT. HOSPITAL ROOM - DAY

LIN CI (23 years old) suddenly wakes up from the hospital bed, bandages wrapped around her head, a look of terror on her face.

A DOCTOR enters the room.

DOCTOR
Young Madam, you're awake. How are you feeling?

LIN CI
(disoriented)
Young Madam? I'm Lin Ci. What happened to me?

LIN CI sees the electronic clock on the bedside table displaying "October 9, 2024." Her eyes widen in shock.

LIN CI (V.O.)
Isn't it 2019 now? How can it be 2024?

LIN CI
(to the Doctor)
You're saying I'm twenty-three now, and I aged five years in my sleep?

DOCTOR
You were in a coma. It appears so.

LIN CI
Who did I marry?

DOCTOR
Well, that's—

At this moment, LU BOCHUAN, a handsome man wearing a white coat, walks in. SUPER: LU BOCHUAN, HEIR OF THE LU FAMILY.

DOCTOR
(to Lu Bochuan)
Mr. Lu, the Young Madam is awake.

LIN CI (V.O.)
He's so handsome.

LIN CI
(to Lu Bochuan)
Are you Lu Bochuan? You're the one treating me, right?

LU BOCHUAN
(coldly)
Lin Ci, what are you trying to pull now?

DOCTOR
(to Lu Bochuan)
Mr. Lu, she's lost five years of memory. She doesn't remember you anymore.

LIN CI points at LU BOCHUAN in disbelief.
continuation:
LIN CI
Sir... I'm your wife?

LU BOCHUAN
That's right. I'm your husband of three years, Lu Bochuan. Also the husband you've hated for three years.

FLASHBACK:

LIN CI is grabbed by the arm by LU BOCHUAN. She struggles violently.

LIN CI (in flashback)
Go away, don't touch me!

Back in the hospital room, LIN CI's expression changes from shock to secret delight.

LIN CI (V.O.)
The big boss is my husband!

LIN CI looks at LU BOCHUAN shyly and happily.

LIN CI
(bashfully)
Honey... hug me.

The DOCTOR tactfully prepares to leave.

DOCTOR
Well... I won't disturb you two then.

LU BOCHUAN (V.O.)
She's actually willing to let me touch her.

LU BOCHUAN walks toward LIN CI and extends his hand. LIN CI also reaches out to touch him.

FLASHBACK:

A WOMAN questions LU BOCHUAN.

WOMAN (in flashback)
If it weren't to repay a debt of gratitude, would you have married Lin Ci?

LU BOCHUAN (in flashback)
No.

Another flashback, the WOMAN is hit by a car on the road.

Back in the hospital room, LIN CI suddenly clutches her head in severe pain.

LIN CI
Ah!

LU BOCHUAN
(anxiously)
Headache?

LIN CI (V.O.)
(chaotic images flash through her mind)
Affair... I thought this car accident... How is he just like Jiang He, the guy I blindly had a crush on in college? They're both scumbags. How is my taste always so bad?

LIN CI
(pushing Lu Bochuan away)
Don't touch me! I'm fine, perfectly fine!

LIN CI gets out of bed herself, but her body is weak.

LU BOCHUAN (V.O.)
Sure enough, even with amnesia, she won't let me touch her.

LIN CI's legs give way, she cries out and is about to fall.

LIN CI
Ah!

LU BOCHUAN immediately turns around, his eyes full of concern.

title: Marrying Behind My Boyfriend's Back After Eight Years
description: A woman discovers her boyfriend of eight years has grown distant with his new secretary, leading her to agree to an arranged marriage he knows nothing about.
context:
Title: Marrying Behind My Boyfriend's Back After Eight Years
Description: A woman discovers her boyfriend of eight years has grown distant with his new secretary, leading her to agree to an arranged marriage he knows nothing about.

INT. NUANNUAN'S APARTMENT - DAY

Close-up shot, a designer handbag sits on the sofa, next to an open suitcase.

NUANNUAN sits on the sofa, packing her luggage. Her phone BUZZES.

NUANNUAN picks up her phone to check.

The phone screen displays a message.

MOM (V.O.)
Nuannuan, the wedding's in two weeks. Gu Chuan sent these plans—which do you like?

NUANNUAN looks at her phone, her expression dejected.

NUANNUAN (O.S.)
I'm getting married, but my boyfriend of eight years doesn't know. He hired a new secretary last month. Yesterday, he ordered her a three-tier cream cake for her birthday. After eight years, he still "forgets" I'm allergic.

INT. A XIAO'S APARTMENT - NIGHT

FLASHBACK:

A XIAO and ZHANG YUYAN, wearing a white dress, laugh as they wipe cream from their faces.

ZHANG YUYAN (laughing)
You got me!

NUANNUAN walks in, stopping cold. The living room is decorated for a party.

A XIAO and ZHANG YUYAN freeze.

NUANNUAN
A Xiao. What's going on?

ZHANG YUYAN
We were just—

A XIAO lunges for napkins but slips. The cake in his hand flies—

Slow motion close-up, the cake smashes into NUANNUAN's face.

NUANNUAN staggers back, wiping cream from her eyes. She gasps.

A XIAO is laughing, but then realizes it's NUANNUAN. His smile freezes.

NUANNUAN tastes the cream. Her face changes. She starts coughing, struggling to breathe.

A XIAO
Nuannuan? I thought you were at your conference—

NUANNUAN clutches her chest and collapses to the floor.

A XIAO (panicking)
Nuannuan!

A XIAO rushes to support her.

ZHANG YUYAN (fearfully)
Is she...?

A XIAO (frantically)
Call 120! NOW!

ZHANG YUYAN
I'm calling!
continuation:
INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - NIGHT

The DOCTOR and NURSES rush down the corridor pushing NUANNUAN on a hospital bed. A XIAO follows alongside, looking anxious.

A XIAO
Please save her!

INT. HOSPITAL ROOM - DAY

NUANNUAN lies in the hospital bed, receiving an IV drip. A XIAO stands by the bed. The DOCTOR is speaking to him.

DOCTOR
