(whispered horror)
A... a jiangshi...

RUAN QINGXUAN
Jiang—what?

Ruan's head whips around. Her gaze lands on the memorial tablet: "Spirit Tablet of Deceased Daughter—RUAN QINGXUAN."

The name hits her like a second blow. The memories crystallize.

RUAN QINGXUAN
(softly, to herself)
Oh no. I've become... her.

Ningshuang scrambles free, crawling to clutch Ruan's hand.

NINGSHUANG
Second Miss! Your heart still beats! Thank the heavens—

Ruan stares at their joined hands. The girl's joy is so raw, so real. A stranger's devotion, now hers to bear.

RUAN QINGXUAN
(quiet, modern steel in her voice)
Alright then. Let's see what kind of tragedy this script really is.

title: The Gatekeeper
description: A veteran school security guard's final week becomes his most dangerous when a desperate fugitive threatens the children.
context:
Title: The Gatekeeper
Description: A veteran school security guard's final week becomes his most dangerous when a desperate fugitive threatens the children.

INT. SECURITY ROOM - DAY

A TV news broadcast is reporting a wanted notice.

NEWS ANCHOR (V.O.)
Police are searching for a dangerous fugitive in Wuyun City. The suspect is believed to be armed and authorities warn he may target schools. All security teams are on high alert.

Security guard UNCLE LI (60s, rubbing his knee) and his COLLEAGUE are eating while watching the news, their expressions grave. The school bell rings.

COLLEAGUE
School's out. Knee acting up again?

UNCLE LI
Last week before retirement. It's reminding me.

COLLEAGUE
Let's go.

They stand and walk out.

EXT. SCHOOL GATE - DAY

Children run happily out of the school gate.

LITTLE GIRL
Goodbye, Uncle Li!

UNCLE LI
Bye bye, be safe!

LITTLE BOY
Uncle Li, do you have any cigarette cards?

UNCLE LI
(bending down)
Did you get 100 on your test? You know the rule.

LITTLE BOY
I did.

The LITTLE BOY takes out a test paper with a perfect score from his backpack and hands it to UNCLE LI.

UNCLE LI
(taking the paper)
Perfect. That's worth celebrating.

He takes out a stack of cigarette cards from his pocket and hands them to the LITTLE BOY.

UNCLE LI
Here you go. Make good choices.

COLLEAGUE
(laughing)
continuation:
You're really going through with retirement? Who'll bribe these kids?

UNCLE LI
(smiling)
Maybe their parents will learn my methods.

CHILDREN gather around, pulling out perfect score test papers.

CHILDREN
I have one too! Me too!

UNCLE LI
(laughing)
Okay, okay, let me see. All hundreds? My last pack... take them, but find your parents first.

The children happily divide up the cigarette cards and run toward their parents waiting at the gate. In the crowd, a MAN watches with hollow eyes, hand trembling inside his coat.

UNCLE LI immediately becomes alert.

UNCLE LI
(quietly, to Colleague)
That one. Watch him.

The MAN pulls a knife and charges toward the children. The crowd screams. UNCLE LI quickly rushes forward and uses a practiced wrist-lock to subdue him within a few moves.

The MAN lies on the ground, sobbing, and lifts his shirt to reveal a crude bomb strapped to his body.

UNCLE LI
(shouting)
Everyone back! Now!

MAN
(crying, not laughing)
My boy... they wouldn't listen...

UNCLE LI sees the timer on the bomb counting down.

UNCLE LI
(to his colleague)
Scissors. Fourth drawer.

The COLLEAGUE sprints back to the security room to find scissors.

MAN
(barely conscious)
No one cared... no one...

The COLLEAGUE runs back with scissors. UNCLE LI takes the scissors and carefully cuts the tape, revealing simple wiring. His expression is focused but calm. He clips a wire. The timer stops.

Police sirens wail. Uncle Li sits back against the fence, exhausted, as parents clutch their children.

UNCLE LI
(to Colleague)
Still got it.

FADE OUT

title: Desert Island Treasure Hunt
description: After five years stranded on a deserted island, Chu Feng and his companions finally get a chance to find treasure and escape, but betrayal and a tsunami change everything.
context:
Title: Desert Island Treasure Hunt
Description: After five years stranded on a deserted island, Chu Feng and his companions finally get a chance to find treasure and escape, but betrayal and a tsunami change everything.

EXT. DESERT ISLAND BEACH - DAY

CHU FENG, QING YAO, and LIU RUYAN stand on rocks by the sea, watching the receding tide expose unfamiliar reef formations.

CHU FENG
The storm last month changed everything. If my readings are right, the base entrance should be accessible for the first time.

QING YAO
(quietly determined)
Then let's finish this.

CHU FENG
(to Liu Ruyan)
Wait here. If the tide turns, fire the signal.

LIU RUYAN
(touching his arm)
Chu Feng... be careful.

CHU FENG and QING YAO walk into the sea, put on diving masks, and submerge.

Liu Ruyan watches them disappear. She glances at the signal flare on her belt, her expression unreadable.

EXT. UNDERWATER - DAY

CHU FENG and QING YAO swim through murky depths, following a faint, pulsing light source.

QING YAO (V.O.)
Chu Feng, the pressure...

CHU FENG (V.O.)
Almost there. The base beacon is active.

They discover a sealed container embedded in the reef, covered in bio-luminescent algae.

QING YAO (V.O.)
Is that...?

CHU FENG (V.O.)
The evacuation kit. The boat's activation key is inside.

QING YAO (V.O.)
I'll secure it.

As QING YAO reaches for the container, LIU RUYAN swims into view from behind a rock formation—she's wearing a spare diving set.

CHU FENG (V.O.)
Ruyan? You followed us?

LIU RUYAN (V.O.)
I couldn't wait up there. Not after five years.

As CHU FENG turns back to help QING YAO, LIU RUYAN retrieves a pressure injector from her diving belt and presses it to his neck. Chu Feng convulses and goes limp.

LIU RUYAN (V.O.)
I'm sorry. But I can't do another year of this.

QING YAO (V.O.)
(screaming through water)
No!

QING YAO catches the unconscious CHU FENG as he sinks, sharing her oxygen.
continuation:
EXT. DESERT ISLAND BEACH - DAY

CHANG WEI and LIU RUYAN have dragged the container ashore. Inside: sealed rations, a satellite communicator, and an encrypted keycard.

CHANG WEI
The key still works. The evacuation boat is ours.

LIU RUYAN
(scanning the horizon)
Just the two of us. Like we planned.

CHU FENG staggers from the surf, carrying QING YAO who isn't breathing.

CHU FENG
(barely conscious)
Ruyan... what did you...

CHANG WEI rushes forward, disarming Chu Feng with a practiced strike.

LIU RUYAN
You were never meant to leave this island, Chu Feng. You know too much about what happened to the research team.

QING YAO
(gasping, waking)
She's been relaying our position... for months...

CHANG WEI
(laughing)
Months? Try years. The corporation's been waiting for the base to unlock.

LIU RUYAN
(to Chu Feng)
You were a useful guide. Nothing more.

CHU FENG
(roaring)
The research logs... you destroyed them...

He lunges, but Chang Wei easily subdues him.

QING YAO
Chu Feng, don't! She's not worth it!

CHANG WEI
Pathetic. You still think this is about betrayal? It's about survival.

A low rumble builds. The horizon darkens unnaturally.

QING YAO
(looking past them)
The reef pattern... it's wrong...

CHU FENG
(whispering)
The tide's reversing. Faster than I calculated.

LIU RUYAN
What are you talking about?

CHU FENG
The base wasn't just abandoned. It was submerged to contain the experiment.

A massive wall of water appears in the distance, moving impossibly fast.

CHANG WEI
Tsunami! Move!

CHU FENG grabs both their ankles with the last of his strength.

CHU FENG
(resolutely)
Containment protocol. We're all quarantined now.

QING YAO
Chu Feng, let go! Save yourself!

LIU RUYAN
(screaming)
You're insane!

CHU FENG
(to Qing Yao)
I already killed you once. Not again.

The wave crashes down.

EXT. DESERT ISLAND BEACH - DAY

CHU FENG lies alone on the beach, battered but alive.

CHU FENG (V.O.)
The experiment... it looped time. Every death sends me back. Qing Yao's died a hundred times. A thousand. I have to break the cycle.

INT. AIRPLANE CABIN - DAY

CHU FENG jolts awake in his seat, surrounded by normal passengers. He looks out the window at clear skies.

CHU FENG (V.O.)
Isn't this...?

He sees an electronic display above the cabin door showing "April 24, 2124 - Flight 447."

CHU FENG
(shocked, to himself)
April 24... the crash date. I've been reborn.

Chu Feng looks across the aisle. QING YAO sits there, alive and well, reading a tablet.

CHU FENG's face shows an expression of disbelief and determination.

FADE OUT.

title: Adorable Treasure Descends the Mountain
description: A gifted young girl raised by a Taoist master must descend the mountain to help a cold-hearted man inherit his family fortune to break her own curse and prevent chaos.
context:
Title: Adorable Treasure Descends the Mountain
Description: A gifted young girl raised by a Taoist master must descend the mountain to help a cold-hearted man inherit his family fortune to break her own curse and prevent chaos.

INT. COURTYARD - DAY

JIAOZI, a little girl with double buns and wearing a red belly warmer, blinks playfully.

CLOSE-UP - The red bead in JIAOZI's hand is crushed.

Wind and clouds surge in the mountains. Quick cuts.

EXT. FOREST - DAY

QINGYUE, a young woman also wearing double buns, looks around in panic.

QINGYUE
(shouting)
Jiaozi!

INT. PAVILION - DAY

JIAOZI forms hand seals, chanting, surrounded by golden magical effects.

JIAOZI
Heaven and earth without limits, Qiankun technique, urgent as the law commands!

The magical light flashes.

EXT. STONE STEPS - DAY

JIAOZI sits on the stone steps, guiltily munching on a giant dried fish.

QINGYUE runs over, out of breath and furious.

QINGYUE
Jiaozi! You actually ate Master's Qiankun Dragon Fish!

JIAOZI
(smiling weakly)
It was an accident...

JIAOZI throws away the fish and runs. QINGYUE chases after her.
continuation:
EXT. TEMPLE ENTRANCE - DAY

JIAOZI, now wearing white Taoist robes, peeks out from behind the door.

JIAOZI
(whispering)
Senior Sister.

QINGYUE walks over, holding a huge decorative rock with one hand.

QINGYUE
Master's been divining for hours. That bead you broke was sealing a karmic debt from your past life. Master is calculating how you can survive the backlash.

INT. MASTER'S ROOM - DAY

MASTER BAIMEI sits cross-legged, performing divination magic. He suddenly clutches his chest in pain, spits out blood, and his white hair instantly turns gray-blue.

BAIMEI
(painfully)
The karmic seal is shattered...

He shouts toward the door.

BAIMEI
Qingyue! Jiaozi! Come!

QINGYUE and JIAOZI rush into the room and kneel before BAIMEI.

QINGYUE/JIAOZI
Master!

BAIMEI
(seriously)
Jiaozi, listen. In four days, the karmic debt you carry will claim your life. Unless you descend the mountain and balance the scales.

JIAOZI
How? Tell me what to do!

BAIMEI
A man named Xiao Qianfan. In a past life, he shielded you from a catastrophe. You owe him a destiny. Now he refuses his inheritance, and his cousin will use that power for bloodshed. You must ensure he claims his rightful place. Only then will the scales balance.

QINGYUE
But Master, if he refuses his own fortune--

BAIMEI
This palm-leaf fan holds a fragment of his past life's vow. It may awaken what he has forgotten.

He throws the fan. Jiaozi catches it.

BAIMEI
Qingyue, watch over her. The path will be dangerous.

QINGYUE
Yes, Master.

JIAOZI picks up the fan, and they leave together.

INT. MASTER'S ROOM - DAY

After they leave, SENIOR BROTHER BUFAN appears in the corridor, his eyes sinister.

BUFAN
A little girl chosen over me? I'll make sure your journey is cut short.

BUFAN crushes a talisman. Outside, an explosion echoes.

EXT. MOUNTAIN CLIFF - DAY

A violent explosion rocks the cliff path.

EXT. CITY STREET - NIGHT

QINGYUE and JIAOZI walk on a city street, both wearing more modern clothing.

QINGYUE
Master said Xiao Qianfan was your protector in a past life. When you see him, trust what you feel.

Not far ahead, XIAO QIANFAN is surrounded and beaten by a group of MEN IN BLACK, lying on the ground with injuries on his face.

JIAOZI sees this scene and her mouth drops open in shock.

JIAOZI
My past-life bodyguard is getting his ass kicked!

title: Baby Cupid, Daddy Don't Run
description: A woman is betrayed by her sister and left for dead after discovering the truth about her pregnancy.
context:
Title: Baby Cupid, Daddy Don't Run
Description: A woman is betrayed by her sister and left for dead after discovering the truth about her pregnancy.

EXT. SUBURBAN ROAD - NIGHT

A black sedan and a white sedan lie twisted on the asphalt, headlights casting ghostly beams through smoke.

The black sedan's door hangs open. SU YUE, wearing a white dress, tumbles onto the pavement. Crimson blooms across the fabric. Blood streams from her forehead and the corner of her mouth.

SU YUE moans in pain, struggling against wreckage pinning her legs. Her fingers scrape the asphalt, leaving red trails.

A pair of black high heels CLICKS toward her. SU YUE lifts her head and sees her younger sister, SU LU, in a black lace dress.

SU YUE
(weakly)
Sister... save my child...

SU LU crosses her arms, looking down with a triumphant sneer. She lifts her foot and presses her stiletto into SU YUE's ribcage, grinding slowly.

SU YUE
(crying out)
Ah!

SU LU squats down and grabs SU YUE's chin.

SU LU
(mockingly)
Oh my, bleeding so much.

SU LU
Sister, aren't you a doctor? Why do you need me to save you?

SU YUE
(terrified)
What do you mean?

SU LU
You disgraced the family, carrying a bastard child. Dad said this child must die.

SU LU lifts her foot and drives it into SU YUE's abdomen.

SU YUE
(screaming)
Ah!

SU LU
You planned to birth this bastard. Tell me, don't you deserve to die?
continuation:
SU YUE
(crying)
This child is Lu Yi's... Lu Yi's!

SU LU
(scoffing)
You? Worthy? The child in my belly is Lu Yi's. That night, the man in your bed was a homeless man I found behind the hotel. I filmed it for Brother Lu. He wept.

SU YUE's pupils contract sharply, her face filled with shock and despair.

FLASHBACK - INT. HOTEL ROOM - DAY

SU YUE lies on the bed, seemingly drugged, unconscious. A half-empty water glass on the nightstand. Her phone shows missed calls from "Lu Yi."

FLASHBACK - INT. HOTEL CORRIDOR - DAY

SU LU stands at the door of room 908, on the phone, glancing down the empty hallway.

SU LU
(into phone)
Room 908. Take the money. Don't talk.

FLASHBACK - INT. HOTEL ROOM - DAY

A strange man wearing glasses enters the room and leans over the unconscious SU YUE.

END FLASHBACK - EXT. SUBURBAN ROAD - NIGHT

SU YUE completely breaks down, silent tears mixing with blood.

SU LU
(triumphantly)
Now you can die here with that bastard. And I'm going back to become Mrs. Lu.

SU LU turns and walks away, laughing.

SU YUE lies on the ground, her trembling hand on her belly.

SU YUE
(crying, to her belly)
Baby... baby... I won't let you die...

Her hand fumbles and touches a sharp glass shard from the headlight. Her eyes flash with determination. She picks it up.

SU YUE
(to her belly, whispering)
Be brave... for both of us...

She plunges the glass into her lower abdomen with a surgeon's precise, desperate incision. Blood gushes. She lets out a scream, then loses consciousness, her bloody hand cradling her belly in a final protective arc.

title: Cute Babies from the Future
description: A woman disrupts a billionaire's wedding to protest a demolition project, only to be followed by two children from the future claiming to be his offspring.
context:
Title: Cute Babies from the Future
Description: A woman disrupts a billionaire's wedding to protest a demolition project, only to be followed by two children from the future claiming to be his offspring.

INT. NEWS STUDIO - DAY

NEWS ANCHOR
According to our sources, the Qin-Su union tonight will activate demolition contracts for Dong Family Village within hours. This merger isn't just a marriage—it's a billion-dollar land acquisition personally greenlit by Elder Kun.

EXT. CAPITAL CITY HOTEL - DAY

A black Bentley arrives at the entrance. Two rows of BODYGUARDS in black suits bow in unison.

BODYGUARDS
(in unison)
Master Qin.

QIN HANCHENG emerges, his face controlled. Assistant LIN RONG checks a tablet showing a live feed.

LIN RONG
Master Qin, Wen Xingtong's filed an emergency injunction. She's chained herself to the medical facility at unit 7—her grandmother's oxygen machine is still running inside.

EXT. DONG FAMILY VILLAGE - DAY (FLASHBACK)

An excavator idles before a modest house. WEN XINGTONG sits on the porch steps, surrounded by REPORTERS, holding medical bills and a property deed.

WEN XINGTONG
This house is my grandmother's lungs. Qin Hancheng surveyed this land himself five years ago. He knows what's at stake.

She holds up a photo of a young Qin Hancheng volunteering at the village clinic, dated ten years prior.

EXT. CAPITAL CITY HOTEL - DAY

Qin pauses at the entrance, staring at the same photo on his phone before deleting it.

QIN HANCHENG
Tell the crew to wait on my order. No demolition until sunrise.

LIN RONG
But Elder Kun expects the contract to trigger at midnight—

QIN HANCHENG
I said wait.

INT. WEDDING VENUE - DAY

The EMCEE stands before a massive screen displaying the merger contract. QIN HANCHENG and SU QIANXIAO exchange rings.

EMCEE
As the final signature seals their partnership, let us celebrate the newlyweds.

Qin signs the contract with a tremor. Su notices.

SU QIANXIAO
(whispering)
Your hand is shaking, Master Qin. Cold feet or guilty conscience?

QIN HANCHENG
I don't regret decisions. I calculate outcomes.

A security radio chirps urgently. WEN XINGTONG's voice echoes.

WEN XINGTONG (O.S.)
Stop!

WEN XINGTONG appears at the stairs in a simple white dress, holding a property deed and a medical power-of-attorney document.

WEN XINGTONG
You can't sign what you don't legally own, Qin Hancheng. This deed and my grandmother's medical proxy predate your acquisition.

She projects the documents onto the screen, overlaying the merger contract.

MALE GUEST
That's the protester from the news!

FEMALE GUEST
Two brides? The Qin family name is finished.

WEN XINGTONG walks to the stage.
continuation:
WEN XINGTONG
Ten years ago, you promised to protect this land. I was stupid enough to believe the boy who bandaged my grandmother's wounds.

She slams the documents onto the signing table. The glass display case shatters.

WEN XINGTONG (V.O.)
If you want to bury your promise, you'll have to bury me with it.

FEMALE REPORTER
This is streaming live to five million viewers!

WEN XINGTONG begins to fake cry.

LIN RONG
(to security)
Contain this immediately.

SECURITY GUARDS advance. Cameras record every angle.

FEMALE REPORTER
Press access is protected by law!

SU QIANXIAO
(to Qin)
You surveyed that land yourself. You knew the medical facility was still operational.

QIN HANCHENG
(to Wen)
You're destroying your own future.

WEN XINGTONG
I'm saving my past.

The venue lights flicker. A low-frequency hum fills the air.

LIN RONG
Generator malfunction?

WEN XINGTONG
(surprised)
The medical equipment...?

FEMALE GUEST
(pointing at the ceiling)
The chandelier!

A silver sphere materializes and implodes silently on stage. When the light clears, GUO BAO and TANG BAO kneel in silver suits, each holding a holographic frame.

GUO BAO AND TANG BAO
Daddy!

GUO BAO
You promised Mommy you'd protect the village. We came to remind you.

TANG BAO
Before you make us orphans.

SU QIANXIAO
Qin Hancheng, you have a family?

WEN XINGTONG (V.O.)
...What?

The children run to Wen, hugging her legs.

TANG BAO
Mommy!

GUO BAO
Mommy!

TANG BAO
You did it. You stopped him.

GUO BAO
Mommy!

WEN XINGTONG looks at the holographic frame—showing herself, older, with these children and a thriving Dong Family Village behind them.

title: Binhai
description: A down-on-his-luck man faces rejection, betrayal, and loss on his birthday, leading to a fateful encounter with a fox spirit who offers him a chance to change his destiny.
context:
Title: Binhai
Description: A down-on-his-luck man faces rejection, betrayal, and loss on his birthday, leading to a fateful encounter with a fox spirit who offers him a chance to change his destiny.

INT. COMPANY LOBBY - DAY

A dozen JOB SEEKERS crowd the modern lobby, resumes in hand. ZHANG YE (30s, worn suit) sits apart, staring at his reflection in a window—practicing a smile that doesn't reach his eyes.

The HR MANAGER emerges, flanked by SECURITY.

HR MANAGER
Thank you all for your time. We've made our selections. Those not called, please see yourselves out.

Dispirited, the crowd shuffles toward the exit. Zhang Ye stays rooted, gripping his folder.

ZHANG YE
Sir, I've been waiting five hours. Could you just—five minutes?

HR MANAGER
( already walking away )
Decisions are final.

ZHANG YE
My mother—she's sick. I need this job.

The Manager pauses, then gestures to Security without looking back.

Zhang Ye is gently but firmly escorted out.

EXT. COMPANY ENTRANCE - DAY

The guards deposit Zhang Ye on the sidewalk. His resume folder spills, papers scattering.

SECURITY GUARD
Some doors just don't open, brother. Don't take it personal.

The guards retreat inside. Zhang Ye kneels, gathering papers as a light rain begins.

His PHONE BUZZES. "Mom" flashes on screen. He stares at it, lets it ring twice before answering—voice steady, practiced.

ZHANG YE
Hey, Mom.

ZHANG YE'S MOTHER (O.S.)
How did it go?

ZHANG YE
( forcing brightness )
Really well. They said they'd call this week.

ZHANG YE'S MOTHER (O.S.)
That's wonderful. You come home early, hear me? I made your favorite—stuffed lotus root. We'll celebrate properly.

ZHANG YE
(choking on the word)
...Yeah.

INT. ZHANG YE'S APARTMENT - DAY

Small, cluttered. LI QIAN (late 20s) lounges on the sofa, phone pressed to her ear, laughing—an intimate, familiar laugh.

LI QIAN
...he's always at those pathetic interviews. You know I can't remember the last time he actually—

She freezes. ZHANG YE'S MOTHER stands in the doorway, grocery bags slipping from her hands. A carton of eggs SMASHES on the floor.

ZHANG YE'S MOTHER
Qianqian... who were you talking to?

LI QIAN
(recovers, defensive)
You scared me! Why are you sneaking around?

ZHANG YE'S MOTHER
I heard you. On the phone. Who is 'he'?

Li Qian stands, smoothing her dress. A beat of silence. Then:

LI QIAN
Don't pretend you don't know. This life—this apartment, your medical bills—it's all on me now. Your son can't even keep a job for six months.

ZHANG YE'S MOTHER
(quietly)
He's trying.

LI QIAN
Trying? I see his bank statements. The interviews. The rejections. I'm drowning here, and you're both—just—sinking me faster.

She moves to leave. The older woman touches her arm.

ZHANG YE'S MOTHER
Please. We can—

Li Qian yanks free. The mother stumbles, catches herself on the counter.

LI QIAN
(cold)
I'm done being ashamed. I want my life back.

She grabs her purse and exits, slamming the door.
continuation:
INT. ZHANG YE'S APARTMENT - LATER

Zhang Ye enters. The apartment is dim. Li Qian sits at the kitchen table, a document waiting beside her packed suitcase.

ZHANG YE
Mom called. She's staying with Auntie tonight—what's going on?

LI QIAN
She fell. I didn't touch her. But while we're being honest...

She slides the document forward. "DIVORCE AGREEMENT."

ZHANG YE
You can't be serious.

LI QIAN
My lawyer drew it up. No contest, no alimony. Clean break.

ZHANG YE
(unfolding)
Where will you go?

LI QIAN
(stands)
Somewhere I don't have to pretend anymore.

Clipped FOOTSTEPS echo from the hallway. A man's silhouette passes the door window. Li Qian's eyes follow it, just for a second—but Zhang Ye catches it.

ZHANG YE
(low)
Him?

LI QIAN
At least he doesn't apologize for what he wants.

She leaves. Zhang Ye stares at the closed door. His gaze falls to a GIFT BOX on the counter—small, wrapped in newspaper.

He opens it: a modest cake, and a card in his mother's trembling hand.

ZHANG YE'S MOTHER (V.O.)
"Son—happy birthday. I'm proud of you, even when you're not. Eat something sweet. Love, Mom."

Zhang Ye touches the cake frosting with one finger. It comes away red. His hands are shaking.

EXT. BINHAI LAKE - NIGHT

Mist rises off black water. Zhang Ye sits on the bank, surrounded by empty bottles. He doesn't drink—just stares at his reflection.

ZHANG YE
(to himself)
Thirty-two years. Same face. Same story.

A small WHITE FOX emerges from the reeds, watching him with amber eyes. It approaches, tentative.

ZHANG YE
Hey, little guy. You hungry too?

He breaks off a corner of the cake from his pocket. The fox takes it delicately.

ZHANG YE
Yeah. Me too.

He stands, walks to the water's edge. The fox follows, whining softly. Zhang Ye looks down at the dark surface.

ZHANG YE
(whispers)
Just... tired.

He takes another step. The water touches his shoes.

The fox BARKS—once, sharp. Light blooms from it, fierce and silver. Zhang Ye shields his eyes. When he lowers his hand, a WOMAN stands there in white, fox-fire dancing around her fingertips.

FOX SPIRIT
You fed me. That debts a thread.

ZHANG YE
(stumbling back)
What—?

FOX SPIRIT
One wish, mortal. But threads cut both ways. The price... will be part of you.

ZHANG YE
(desperate, laughing)
Rich. I want to be rich. Powerful. So no one can—

FOX SPIRIT
(interrupting)
So you can become the one who looks away?

She smiles, knowing. The fox-fire flickers. Zhang Ye's bravado crumbles.

ZHANG YE
(quiet)
I want... I want to matter.

The Fox Spirit steps closer. Her fingers brush his chest.

FOX SPIRIT
Then we have a bargain.

FADE OUT.

ON SCREEN: TO BE CONTINUED

title: Master Bo's Rise Through His Son
description: A young maid is coerced into delivering drugged soup to a wealthy young master, leading to an unexpected night together and a life-changing consequence.
context:
Title: Master Bo's Rise Through His Son
Description: A young maid is coerced into delivering drugged soup to a wealthy young master, leading to an unexpected night together and a life-changing consequence.

INT. LUXURIOUS ROOM - NIGHT

Candlelight flickers. BO XIANGQIU, late twenties and sharp-featured in a black silk shirt, sits alone in a leather armchair, swirling a glass of red wine. A legal document lies on his lap—he's been staring at the same paragraph for minutes.

AN QIAN, nineteen, appears at the doorway holding a porcelain soup bowl, her expression hollow.

AN JINCAI, forty-five with a small mustache, intercepts her in the corridor. He produces a white pill and drops it into the steaming soup. It dissolves instantly.

AN JINCAI
(quietly, almost fatherly)
Your grandmother's surgery deposit—paid in full.
(leans closer)
He's had three bottles. He won't remember. You won't either.

He squeezes her shoulder and disappears. An Qian stares at the bowl, then forces herself forward.

AN QIAN
Young Master... your sobering soup.

BO XIANGQIU looks up, sets his wine down. He studies her trembling hands, her downcast eyes.

BO XIANGQIU
You're new.

AN QIAN
(whisper)
Two months.

Something in her voice makes him pause. He reaches for the bowl.

BO XIANGQIU
Then you should know—I don't bite.

He drinks it in three measured sips, holding her gaze. An Qian watches his throat work, her own constricting.

The wine glass suddenly tips—Bo jerks, trying to catch it. It shatters against the floor. Wine bleeds across marble. He grabs the chair arm, knuckles whitening.

BO XIANGQIU
continuation:
What the...

He stands, swaying. His eyes find An Qian's—confusion giving way to dawning horror.

BO XIANGQIU (CONT'D)
You...

An Qian backs away, but the bed blocks her path. She falls onto it as Bo staggers forward. He collapses onto the mattress, his body pinning hers. She goes rigid, a strangled sound escaping.

An Qian's hands push against his chest—futile. Bo's fingers find her wrist, his grip surprisingly gentle even as his consciousness fades.

BO XIANGQIU (CONT'D)
(slurred)
Don't... be afraid...

He leans down. The candlelight flickers out.

ON SCREEN: TWO MONTHS LATER

INT. MANSION LIVING ROOM - DAY

AN QIAN walks out of a room looking anxious, her hand hidden behind her back. Her uniform strains slightly at the waist.

MAN'S VOICE (O.S.)
Where is she?

AN QIAN
(responding hastily)
Coming!

She stops, turns the pregnancy test over with trembling fingers.

CLOSE-UP: Two stark red lines.

AN QIAN (V.O.)
(quiet, shattered)
Grandma's medicine is expensive. This costs more.

She lifts her head, staring at the door to Bo's wing. Her reflection ghosts in the polished wood—trapped in the same corridor, the same nightmare.

ON SCREEN: TO BE CONTINUED

title: Hidden in Day and Night
description: Qin Rong returns to Beicheng for work and is picked up by Zhang Henian, her father's second wife's brother, with whom she shares a complicated past.
context:
Title: Hidden in Day and Night
Description: Qin Rong returns to Beicheng for work and is picked up by Zhang Henian, her father's second wife's brother, with whom she shares a complicated past.

INT. BEDROOM - DAY (DREAM SEQUENCE)

Soft light. QIN RONG and ZHANG HENIAN embrace intimately.

ZHANG HENIAN leans close to QIN RONG's ear, whispering.

QIN RONG's fingers gently trace across ZHANG HENIAN's lips. They gaze deeply at each other, about to kiss.

CUT TO: The two kissing on a sofa, the atmosphere intimate.

FLIGHT ATTENDANT (O.S.)
Miss Qin.

INT. AIRPLANE CABIN - DAY

QIN RONG jolts awake, finding herself sitting on an airplane.

FLIGHT ATTENDANT
Miss Qin. The plane will be landing soon. Let me adjust your seat back for you.

QIN RONG
Thank you, I'll manage.

The FLIGHT ATTENDANT nods. QIN RONG adjusts the seat back herself, breathing a sigh of relief.

QIN RONG (V.O.)
Just a dream.

EXT. AIRPORT RUNWAY - DAY

An airplane lands smoothly on the runway.
continuation:
INT. AIRPORT TERMINAL - DAY

QIN RONG pulls a pink suitcase, walking through the bustling airport terminal.

QIN RONG (V.O.)
Beicheng. One year. His territory.

ZHANG HENIAN, wearing black camouflage and sunglasses, walks toward her. They meet in the crowd and stop.

ZHANG HENIAN
Have you been waiting long?

QIN RONG
No, just arrived.

ZHANG HENIAN
Let's go.

ZHANG HENIAN naturally places his hand over QIN RONG's hand on the suitcase handle. They push the suitcase together and leave.

QIN RONG
I'm sorry to trouble you.

ZHANG HENIAN
No need.

INT. CAR - DAY

ZHANG HENIAN drives. QIN RONG sits in the passenger seat, fastening her seatbelt.

QIN RONG (V.O.)
Father's second wife's brother. My uncle. But he and I...

FLASHBACK:

INT. LIVING ROOM - DAY

In a sunlit room, QIN RONG gently wipes ZHANG HENIAN's cheek as he lies on the sofa. The atmosphere between them is warm and intimate.

END FLASHBACK.

ZHANG HENIAN
Have you arranged a place to stay?

QIN RONG
I'll stay at a hotel first. The hospital will assign dormitories later.

ZHANG HENIAN
I have an apartment in the city center. Ten minutes from the hospital. You can stay there first.

QIN RONG
No need to trouble yourself.

ZHANG HENIAN
Your father arranged it. He told me to take care of you.

QIN RONG
What if your girlfriend comes over? It wouldn't be convenient.

ZHANG HENIAN
Who told you that?

QIN RONG
No one told me.

ZHANG HENIAN
You can stay there without worry. It won't be inconvenient.

QIN RONG
Then thank you, Uncle.

ZHANG HENIAN suddenly slams on the brakes. The car stops. He turns his head, staring sharply at QIN RONG.

ZHANG HENIAN
Qin Rong. What did you call me?

title: Sweet and Doting Snake Lord Husband
description: A woman betrayed by her sister and husband is reborn on the day of her coming-of-age ceremony, determined to seek revenge for the wrongs done to her in her past life.
context:
Title: Sweet and Doting Snake Lord Husband
Description: A woman betrayed by her sister and husband is reborn on the day of her coming-of-age ceremony, determined to seek revenge for the wrongs done to her in her past life.

EXT. GOLDEN SNAKE PALACE - NIGHT

Thunder and lightning crash across a storm-swept sky. Rain pours down in violent sheets. MAID A and MAID B sprint from the palace entrance, silk robes clinging to their skin.

MAID A
The Consort's delivering! The Snake Lord's wife is in labor!

MAID B
And Lady Jiao—both sisters at once! The physicians are divided!

INT. GOLDEN SNAKE PALACE - BIRTHING CHAMBER - NIGHT

LIN ZHAOZHAO (20s, golden-eyed) writhes on the birthing bed, drenched in sweat and agony. A luminous GOLDEN EGG materializes mid-air, humming with ancestral power.

LIN ZHAOZHAO
(screaming)

MAID A
(delighted)
A golden egg! First-rank—blessed!

The egg pulses with corrupt energy. Its luster drains, replaced by pitch black. The humming dies.

LIN ZHAOZHAO
(terrified)
It was golden. I saw it.

LONG BEICHEN (30s, regal) strides in. His gaze locks on the black egg. His jaw clenches, scales rippling beneath his skin.

LONG BEICHEN
(furious)
A black egg. Fifth-rank filth, from pure golden blood.

LIN ZHAOZHAO
Beichen, my lineage scores prove—

LONG BEICHEN strikes her with his palm. She crashes into the wall.
continuation:
INT. GREEN SNAKE PALACE - BIRTHING CHAMBER - NIGHT

LIN JIAO (20s, delicate) stands gracefully, showing no sign of strain. A perfect GOLDEN EGG rests in her hands.

LIN JIAO
(mocking)
Sister's auspice... so easily taken.

INT. GOLDEN SNAKE PALACE - BIRTHING CHAMBER - NIGHT

MAID B
(quietly, to Maid A)
The clan ranks gold, purple, green, white, black. This makes no genealogical sense.

LIN JIAO enters, cradling the golden egg.

LIN JIAO
(sympathetic)
Poor sister. Two golden serpents cannot birth black. Who was he? That white-scaled diplomat who visited last spring?

LIN ZHAOZHAO
You did this. The egg changed after birth—

LIN JIAO
(leaning close, whispering)
I swapped them. My black egg for your golden. Beichen's seed was always mine.

FLASHBACK: LONG BEICHEN and LIN JIAO passionately kissing, his golden aura flowing into her.

LIN ZHAOZHAO
(breaking)
Why? I loved you both—

LIN JIAO
You overshadowed me our entire lives. But Beichen prefers my gentle grace. And I prefer... your fertility.

LONG BEICHEN
Swallow this bastard egg. Taint your own body with your shame.

Lin Jiao casts a spell. The black egg flies toward Lin Zhaozhao's mouth, forcing itself down. She collapses, convulsing.

LONG BEICHEN
Guards. Ten Thousand Snakes Pit. No burial rites.

EXT. TEN THOUSAND SNAKES PIT - NIGHT

Guards hurl Lin Zhaozhao over the cliff edge. She plummets toward the writhing abyss.

LIN JIAO stands at the cliff edge, watching. Her form shimmers. A SCORPION TAIL briefly manifests, then vanishes.

LIN JIAO
Since you're dying anyway—I'm not a snake. Your parents adopted a scorpion spirit. I repaid their kindness by destroying their bloodline.

LIN ZHAOZHAO
(desperate, defiant)
I'll return. I'll make you pay in blood and venom!

INT. SNAKE CLAN GREAT HALL - DAY

Lin Zhaozhao's eyes SNAP OPEN. She stands in the ceremonial hall among NOBLE SNAKES. An ELDER holds a fertility-testing jade to the light.

ELDER
The coming-of-age rites begin. Let Nüwa reveal their breeding potential.

LIN ZHAOZHAO
(inner monologue)
Reborn. The day they tested my worth. Lin Jiao, Long Beichen—this time, I'll bury you in the pit you dug for me.

She turns. Lin Jiao stands beside her, smiling sweetly. Lin Zhaozhao's gaze burns with cold determination.

title: Year of the Snake: Counterattack (Episode 37)
description: A young woman is kidnapped and realizes too late that she should have listened to her boyfriend's warnings about trusting the wrong people.
context:
Title: Year of the Snake: Counterattack (Episode 37)
Description: A young woman is kidnapped and realizes too late that she should have listened to her boyfriend's warnings about trusting the wrong people.

INT. RUNDOWN WAREHOUSE - NIGHT

Darkness. The crunch of dry straw underfoot.

LIU GANG enters, pushing open a rusted metal door. It groans against the frame.

ZHOU XIAOXUE lies on a straw mat, bound and gagged, unconscious in a beige dress.

LIU GANG crouches beside her. His fingers tug at her dress collar.

ZHOU XIAOXUE's eyes snap open. Terror.

LIU GANG
Awake already? Good. Let's not waste the night.

She strains against the ropes, muffled screams escaping the gag.

ZHOU XIAOXUE (V.O.)
Du Bo's warnings echo. "Be careful who you trust." I laughed then. I don't laugh now.

LIU GANG
This won't take long.

ZHOU XIAOXUE (V.O.)
Jiaojiao's voice. The wine. The room spinning. If I had listened—

FLASHBACK BEGINS

INT. KTV HALLWAY - NIGHT

Neon lights flicker over HUANG JIAOJIAO and ZHOU XIAOXUE walking arm-in-arm.

HUANG JIAOJIAO
He's inside. Says he can connect you to that curator job.

ZHOU XIAOXUE
Du Bo doesn't like these places.

HUANG JIAOJIAO
Du Bo doesn't like anything that might set you free.

They laugh, disappearing into a private room.
continuation:
INT. KTV PRIVATE ROOM - NIGHT

Dim lights pulse. Bottles clutter the table.

A phone BUZZES on the table—"Du Bo" on the caller ID.

ZHOU XIAOXUE answers, turning away from the noise.

ZHOU XIAOXUE
Hey. I'm still at the library.

INT. KTV HALLWAY - NIGHT

DU BO stands at the end of a hallway, phone pressed to his ear.

DU BO
Xiaoxue, where are you?

INT. KTV PRIVATE ROOM - NIGHT

ZHOU XIAOXUE
(guiltily)
Working late.

DU BO (V.O.)
She's never lied before. Why now?

HUANG JIAOJIAO snatches the phone, ends the call.

HUANG JIAOJIAO
You're not his prisoner. Drink.

She pours whiskey into two glasses. Her body blocks Zhou's view as she slips powder into one.

HUANG JIAOJIAO
To new beginnings.

They drink. Zhou coughs—the liquor burns.

The door opens. LIAN FEI enters, sharp suit, predator's smile.

HUANG JIAOJIAO
Baby. Finally.

She hands him the second glass. They both watch Zhou.

ZHOU XIAOXUE
Jiaojiao... everything's tilting...

HUANG JIAOJIAO
(cold smile)
That's the good stuff.

ZHOU XIAOXUE
(speech slurring)
You... my friend...

HUANG JIAOJIAO
Friends don't let friends stay poor.

ZHOU XIAOXUE collapses. Her phone screen illuminates: "Payment received."

END FLASHBACK

INT. RUNDOWN WAREHOUSE - NIGHT

ZHOU XIAOXUE's breath steadies. She feels the rope knots.

LIU GANG
Your friend paid well. Said you were naive.

ZHOU XIAOXUE (V.O.)
If I survive this... I'll trust the quiet warnings more than loud promises. The love, not the lies.

She goes limp. Liu Gang relaxes his grip.

Her fingers find a loose nail in the floorboard.

ZHOU XIAOXUE (V.O.)
If.

title: Snake Year Fortune - Unstoppable Wedding
description: A wealthy heir marries against his mother's wishes, but his controlling mother and scheming friend have plans that could unravel everything.
context:
Title: Snake Year Fortune - Unstoppable Wedding
Description: A wealthy heir marries against his mother's wishes, but his controlling mother and scheming friend have plans that could unravel everything.

INT. WEDDING VENUE - DAY

Background music plays.

ON SCREEN: Chen Yihan, Wang Group Heir

CHEN HAN
Dad, Mom, please head upstairs. We'll be up for the tea ceremony shortly.

LIU'S MOTHER
It's too cold to wait out here.

LIU'S MOTHER
You're a thoughtful son-in-law.

ON SCREEN: Liu's Father, Liu Qianqian's Father

LIU'S FATHER
A son-in-law is half a son.

LIU'S MOTHER
Chen Han, we're entrusting our daughter to you now.

CHEN HAN
Mom, we're family. No need for formalities.

LIU'S FATHER
Go on then.

LIU'S FATHER
Let's go.

CHEN HAN stands alone, expression clouding. He checks his phone and makes a call.

INT. WANG GROUP OFFICE - DAY

ON SCREEN: Wang Group

ASSISTANT
The custom LV arrived this morning. They embossed our company logo as requested.

ON SCREEN: Wang Fang, Wang Group Chairman

WANG FANG
Subtle. Send our regards.

WANG FANG's phone rings. She answers it.

CHEN HAN (V.O.)
Mom... I'm married. Today.

WANG FANG
(ice in her voice)
Married.
continuation:
INT. VILLA LIVING ROOM - DAY (FLASHBACK)

ON SCREEN: Three Years Earlier

WANG FANG sits rigid at the dining table. CHEN HAN pulls a suitcase.

WANG FANG
You're leaving this family for a woman?

CHEN HAN
Mom, Qianqian loves me—not the Wang name. If you can't accept that, I'll build my own life.

INT. WANG GROUP OFFICE - DAY

ASSISTANT
Congratulations, Chairman.

WANG FANG
That girl plays a long game. But my son has chosen.
(rising)
Prepare the customary gifts. I'll fulfill my role.

ASSISTANT
Of course.

WANG FANG
(smoothing her jacket)
If she knows her place, I'll tolerate this. If not...
The Wang Group doesn't forgive mistakes.

EXT. COMPANY ENTRANCE - DAY

WANG FANG and her ASSISTANT exit, flanked by BODYGUARDS. They approach a Rolls-Royce.

WANG FANG
(getting into the car)
Set the GPS. We'll congratulate the couple.

INT. BADAO GROUP OFFICE - DAY

ON SCREEN: Badao Group

HU XIANG enters briskly, FEMALE SECRETARY trailing.

FEMALE SECRETARY
Sir, your three o'clock—

HU XIANG
Cancel it. Retrieve those black pearls from the vault.

FEMALE SECRETARY
The deep-sea pair you never sell?

HU XIANG
The Wang heir is marrying in our city. This gift buys us into their world. Move.

INT. WEDDING CAR - DAY

LIU QIANQIAN and bridesmaid ZHANG LIYA sit in the luxury sedan.

ON SCREEN: Liu Qianqian, Chen Han's Wife

ON SCREEN: Zhang Liya, Liu Qianqian's Best Friend

ZHANG LIYA
(glancing around)
Modest security, simple flowers... Qianqian, men test boundaries. We'll establish yours now. Follow my lead.

LIU QIANQIAN
(squeezing her hand)
You're always looking out for me. Best friends forever.

ZHANG LIYA
A reminder today saves years of headaches. Trust me.

LIU QIANQIAN
I do. Completely.

title: 2008 Yangcheng Train Station
description: During the 2008 Spring Festival travel rush, a family struggles to return home as a snowstorm causes train cancellations at Yangcheng Station.
context:
Title: 2008 Yangcheng Train Station
Description: During the 2008 Spring Festival travel rush, a family struggles to return home as a snowstorm causes train cancellations at Yangcheng Station.

INT. YANGCHENG TRAIN STATION - DAY

The train station hall is packed with people, a solid mass of bodies and baggage. YAZHI grips XUXU's hand tightly, scanning for NANNAN.

YAZHI
(anxiously)
Xuxu, hold on. Don't let go.

XUXU
Okay.

YAZHI
Nannan, here! Quickly!

NANNAN appears, backpack clutched to her chest.

NANNAN
Mom, they said Beijing is cancelled.

YAZHI
We're not Beijing. We're home.

Across the hall, ZHENGYANG waves tickets overhead.

ZHENGYANG
(shouting)
Yazhi! I got them!

YAZHI
All of them?

ZHENGYANG pushes closer, holding two tickets.

ZHENGYANG
Last two. Standing room only.

YAZHI
(confused)
But there's four--

ZHENGYANG
We'll sort it on the train. Now!

The loudspeaker crackles.

ANNOUNCER (V.O.)
Attention. Due to severe snow, all trains after 18:00 are cancelled. After 18:00 only.

The crowd erupts.

PASSERBY A
That's our train! 5:45!

PASSERBY B
No! My mother is waiting!

PASSENGER C
Five years. Five years I've saved.

ANNOUNCER (V.O.)
Trains before 18:00 depart as scheduled. Immediate boarding only.
continuation:
ZHENGYANG checks his watch.

ZHENGYANG
(shouting)
Five forty-two! Go!

They push forward.

A GUARD blocks the platform gate.

GUARD
Platform closed! Wait for next announcement!

PASSERBY D
Next announcement? Another year?

PASSERBY E
They can't stop us all! Push!

The crowd surges. The guard is shoved aside.

YAZHI
Nannan! Your hand!

NANNAN
Mom!

A shoulder, a suitcase, and their hands separate. Nannan stumbles.

XUXU
Sister!

ZHENGYANG
I've got her!

But the current pulls him forward with Xuxu.

YAZHI
(screaming)
Nannan! Nannan!

Nannan falls. Yazhi sees her on the floor through moving legs.

NANNAN
Mom! Mom!

Yazhi fights, immobilized by the crush.

YAZHI
(desperate)
She's just a child! Please!

The PA crackles. A whistle blows.

ANNOUNCER (V.O.)
Train K203, Platform 4. Final boarding. Now.

The crowd freezes. Then parts.

ZHENGYANG stands with Xuxu, his hand extended down to Nannan on the floor. He'd fought his way back.

ZHENGYANG
(breathless)
Yazhi. The tickets.

He holds them up. Two tickets. Four people. The choice hangs between them as the final call echoes. The guards are regrouping. The crowd is watching. Time has run out.

title: Pursued by the Empress, the Proud Princess Regrets (Episode 61)
description: In the waning days of the Great Qian Dynasty, a mysterious strategist known as Master Fulong aids five lords in establishing peace. Fifteen years later, as disaster strikes again, the daughter of one lord seeks his help once more.
context:
Title: Pursued by the Empress, the Proud Princess Regrets (Episode 61)
Description: In the waning days of the Great Qian Dynasty, a mysterious strategist known as Master Fulong aids five lords in establishing peace. Fifteen years later, as disaster strikes again, the daughter of one lord seeks his help once more.

MONTAGE - VARIOUS LOCATIONS - DAY

A grand palace silhouetted against a hazy, golden sky. Below, a sea of people gathers, their murmurs like distant thunder.

A man in royal red robes stands on a balcony, his face etched with worry.

NARRATOR (V.O.)
The Great Qian Dynasty breathed its dying breaths. While the emperor drowned in wine and poetry, the realm fractured. Six provinces. Six lords with six armies. And one name whispered in both hope and desperation: Master Fulong.

Red banners snap in the wind above a marching army. The palace burns—flames consuming gilded halls. People flee through smoke-choked courtyards. Soldiers march toward a city gate consumed by fire.

EXT. FULONG PAVILION - DAY

Three lords stand before a modest pavilion. XIA YUAN, King of Qianzhou—stoic, weathered—leads. They bow to MASTER FULONG, who reclines in a yellow rosewood chair, eyes closed, a silk fan resting on his chest.

XIA YUAN
Xia Yuan of Qianzhou humbly requests Master Fulong's counsel. Our orchards wither. Our people hunger.

LORD WEI
(impassioned)
Wei of Yuezhou begs the same. Our mines run dry, our treasuries empty.

LORD MU
(gravely)
Mu of Cangzhou reports pirate fleets blockade our harbors. Trade dies.

MASTER FULONG
(still as stone)
Rise. I have no interest in courts or titles. But I will give each of you one thread to pull. Follow it, and your peoples will survive the chaos.

XIA YUAN
We await your wisdom, Master.

MASTER FULONG
(eyes opening—clear, cutting)
Qianzhou's mountains hide a secret. Plant persimmons where the mist gathers at dawn. The soil remembers blood; feed it fruit instead. In seven years, your tribute will feed half the realm.

He writes on a scroll, seals it with wax.

MASTER FULONG (V.O.)
Yuezhou's gold is not in the earth—it's in the water. Build your furnaces where three rivers meet. The sediment yields more than any mine.

A second scroll. A third.

MASTER FULONG (V.O.)
Cangzhou fears the sea. Become the sea. Hollow your cliffs into ship-holds that breathe with the tide. The pirates will find no shore to land upon, only walls of water and stone.

The lords accept their scrolls like holy relics, bowing low.

XIA YUAN
This debt will not be forgotten, Master.

MASTER FULONG
(faint smile)
Debt is a human invention. Go, and do not return unless the sky itself falls.

The lords depart, their steps lighter.
continuation:
EXT. FULONG PAVILION - DAY

MASTER FULONG remains motionless. His attendant, ACAI—a sharp-eyed young woman—watches from the shadows.

MASTER FULONG
Acai. Are they truly gone?

ACAI
The last horse passed the valley gate three minutes ago.

MASTER FULONG snaps upright. The silk fan becomes a propeller in his hand, stirring the air. He stretches, rolls his shoulders, and the ancient gravity falls away like a discarded cloak.

MASTER FULONG
Three minutes? I was aiming for five. These old generals have better hearing than I credited.

He peels away the artificial wrinkles at his temples—prosthetic appliances. Beneath, his skin is unlined.

MASTER FULONG
And not a single one brought decent wine. Or company worth looking at.

ACAI
(smiling despite herself)
Shall I summon the jade table, Master?

MASTER FULONG
Absolutely. My kingdom for a proper skewer.

ACAI unfolds a sleek, lacquered table that seems too modern for the setting. On it: marinated chicken skewers, a bowl of spices. MASTER FULONG withdraws from his robe a gauntlet of burnished jade and gold—etched with glowing sigils that pulse like embers. He slips it on, and a controlled flame ignites from his palm.

ACAI
The lords would weep to see their legendary strategist... grilling.

MASTER FULONG
The greatest strategy is knowing what truly matters. Right now, that's caramelization.

He rotates a skewer precisely.

ACAI
(accepting a perfectly charred wing)
You haven't aged a day in fifteen years. The villagers say you made a pact with the mountain spirits.

MASTER FULONG
The mountain spirits wish they had my skincare routine. Let's just say... I was born in a different calendar.

ACAI
Different calendar?

MASTER FULONG
(gears shifting)
The kind where empires rise and fall faster than you can blink. I'm what happens when someone brings a map to a knife fight, Acai. The chosen one was busy, so they sent me instead.

He laughs—self-aware, not quite mocking. ACAI chews her chicken, processing.

NARRATOR (V.O.)
The scrolls were followed. Kingdoms rose. And the man who refused to rule became the axis upon which six realms turned.

INT. XIA YUAN'S BEDCHAMBER - NIGHT

TITLE CARD: FIFTEEN YEARS LATER - XIA KINGDOM IMPERIAL PALACE

Candles burn low. XIA YUAN, now white-haired and hollowed by illness, labors for breath. His daughter XIA YUNGE—mid-twenties, fierce, sleepless circles under her eyes—holds his hand between both of hers.

XIA YUNGE
Just rest, Father. I've doubled the granary rations. Su Yi from Qinke Academy arrives tomorrow.

XIA YUAN
(whispering, urgent)
Listen... the drought is no accident. The locusts... they're a symptom. Someone... wants our rivers.

His fingers tighten on hers.

XIA YUAN
Su Yi is brilliant, but he cannot see what I saw. You must find... the pavilion.

XIA YUNGE
(stiffening)
Father, you know I—

XIA YUAN
(interrupting)
Every night since you were twelve, you read his scroll by candlelight. Don't think I didn't know.

XIA YUNGE's mask cracks—just slightly.

XIA YUNGE
He was a myth. A story we told ourselves to feel less alone.

XIA YUAN
Myths don't age. You... you will need someone who doesn't play by the rules our enemies understand. Promise me... you'll ask.

A long silence. XIA YUNGE presses her forehead to her father's hand.

XIA YUNGE
I promise.

EXT. CITY GATE - DAY

XIA YUNGE, in practical riding leathers, mounts a white horse. Behind her: a lean retinue of guards, nothing ostentatious. Snow falls—not a flurry, but a warning.

XIA YUNGE
Qinke Academy first. Then... the mountain pass.

She gazes toward the horizon, where mist clings to distant peaks. The same mist from her father's stories.

XIA YUNGE
(to herself)
If you're real... you'd better be worth the wait.

She spurs her horse forward. The gates groan shut behind her.

title: After Being Abandoned for Treatment, I Rise Magnificently
description: A dying artist discovers her painting sold for millions, only to uncover her family's betrayal as she prepares for a triumphant return.
context:
Title: After Being Abandoned for Treatment, I Rise Magnificently
Description: A dying artist discovers her painting sold for millions, only to uncover her family's betrayal as she prepares for a triumphant return.

INT. AUCTION HOUSE - DAY

A packed auction hall. Auctioneer ZHAO MING commands the podium, gavel in hand.

ZHAO MING
Thirty million. Do I hear thirty-one?

Silence. ZHAO MING scans the room.

ZHAO MING
Going once. Going twice. Sold.

The gavel falls. Sparse applause. ZHOU YUSHENG sits mid-row, his subtle smile belying his excitement.

ZHAO MING
Lot 47: "I Love My Family" by Shengxia. Sold to Mr. Wang for thirty million.

Staff unveil the painting - a vibrant, emotionally charged canvas. The crowd murmurs appreciatively.

Zhou Yusheng discreetly texts on his phone.

INT. HOSPITAL WARD - DAY

A shared room. DOCTOR ZHAO XINYU reviews a chart at SHENG ANNUAN's bedside. The hospital gown swallows her frail frame.

ZHAO XINYU
The surgical window is closing, Ms. Sheng. We need the deposit by Friday.

SHENG ANNUAN
My husband's meeting with investors today. He promised...

ZHAO XINYU
I understand. But without confirmation, I have to schedule you for palliative chemo instead.

The doctor exits. Nurse LIU HUIMIN squeezes Sheng Annuan's shoulder before following.

Sheng Annuan stares at her phone - no messages from "Husband." She dials. It rings. And rings. She hangs up, trembling.

Her phone VIBRATES. Zhou Yusheng's name appears. She answers.
continuation:
SHENG ANNUAN
Yusheng?

ZHOU YUSHENG (V.O.)
Senior. Your piece just sold. Thirty million.

Sheng Annuan's breath catches. The patient in the next bed, LI XIN, glances over.

SHENG ANNUAN
That's... that's impossible.

ZHOU YUSHENG (V.O.)
The buyer, Mr. Wang, wants to host a retrospective. This weekend, Jiangnan. Says you're the most undervalued artist of our time.

SHENG ANNUAN
This weekend... I don't know if I'll...

ZHOU YUSHENG (V.O.)
We'll make it work. Get some rest. I'll bring the contract tomorrow.

SHENG ANNUAN
Thank you.

She lowers the phone, tears streaming silently.

INT. OLD APARTMENT HALLWAY - DAY

Sheng Annuan, in a worn cardigan, climbs the stairs slowly, her energy depleted but hope flickering.

SHENG ANNUAN (V.O.)
Thirty million. Enough to breathe again. To live. To give them everything...

She reaches her door - it's slightly ajar. Muffled VOICES from within.

MOTHER-IN-LAW (O.S.)
...won't suspect a thing. She'll sign whatever you put in front of her.

HUSBAND (O.S.)
The donation papers are ready. Tonight, after we tell her about the loan.

Sheng Annuan's hand freezes on the doorframe. The key slips from her fingers, silent on the worn carpet.

title: Layoff and Restructuring Plan
description: A new general manager implements strict rules on his first day, firing his own fiancée for sleeping at work, only to discover she was key to a major deal.
context:
Title: Layoff and Restructuring Plan
Description: A new general manager implements strict rules on his first day, firing his own fiancée for sleeping at work, only to discover she was key to a major deal.

INT. OFFICE - DAY

CHU TIANJIAO and WU MEIXUE walk into the office surrounded by a group of EMPLOYEES.

FEMALE EMPLOYEE
(whispering)
Manager Chu's here. Everyone, look sharp.

CHU TIANJIAO
I'm Chu Tianjiao. My rules: late, leaving early, sleeping on shift—fired immediately. No exceptions.

CHU TIANJIAO sees LIN XIAOXIAO sleeping at her desk, contract files scattered around her.

CHU TIANJIAO
Lin Xiaoxiao.

He raps on her desk. Lin Xiaoxiao lifts her head, groggy.

LIN XIAOXIAO
Tianjiao... five more minutes...

She starts to put her head down again.

CHU TIANJIAO
Sleeping during work hours?

COLLEAGUE A
Manager Chu, she's been on the General Qin deal three nights straight.

COLLEAGUE B
She's exhausted. Just ten minutes.

CHU TIANJIAO
I care about performance, not reasons.

COLLEAGUE B
She volunteered to fix the contract. For the company.

LIN XIAOXIAO
(to herself)
Never again. Not for this salary.

WU MEIXUE
Manager Chu, she's your fiancée. Perhaps in private?

CHU TIANJIAO
(to Wu Meixue)
Rules don't bend, Meixue. Not for anyone.

LIN XIAOXIAO
(sitting up, voice sharp)
You'd let her twist you like this? She's been undermining that deal for days.

WU MEIXUE
I'm defending you, Xiaoxiao. Don't be ungrateful.

LIN XIAOXIAO
Your "defense" is sarcasm wrapped in silk.

CHU TIANJIAO
Enough. Lin Xiaoxiao, clear your desk. You're dismissed.
continuation:
LIN XIAOXIAO
You're serious? Over this?

CHU TIANJIAO
I don't let personal matters interfere with business. Even fiancées aren't exempt.

LIN XIAOXIAO
Then consider our engagement void. Severance?

CHU TIANJIAO
(takes cash from pocket)
Two months. Take it.

He throws it on the desk. Lin Xiaoxiao stares at the money, then laughs bitterly.

LIN XIAOXIAO
Double happiness.

She sweeps her things into a bag, humming: "I gave my youth to summer..." She exits. Silence.

MANAGER LU
Manager Chu, Lin Xiaoxiao blocked the chairman. The Qin contract—she's the signatory.

WU MEIXUE
I'm her supervisor. I prepared the documents.

MANAGER LU
General Qin only negotiates with her. You're the report writer. She's the relationship. We're dead without her.

CHU TIANJIAO
Then we get her back. Now.

MANAGER LU
She left a message: "Tell Tianjiao the engagement and deal are canceled. He can explain to Daddy."

WU MEIXUE
She can't—my degree—

The CHAIRMAN and GENERAL QIN enter.

GENERAL QIN
Where's Miss Lin? We need signatures.

CHAIRMAN
Son, get your fiancée.

CHU TIANJIAO
Dad... Xiaoxiao...

CHAIRMAN
What did you do?

CHU TIANJIAO
I fired her. For sleeping.

The Chairman's face darkens. General Qin checks his watch.

GENERAL QIN
Then I suggest you unfire her. In twenty minutes. Or I leave.

CHAIRMAN
(low, dangerous)
You fired the woman who secured this merger? Explain.

FADE OUT.

title: Remember! I Am the Medicine God
description: A dedicated scientist spends three years developing a breakthrough cancer drug to fulfill his promise to his wife, only to return home and discover her betrayal.
context:
Title: Remember! I Am the Medicine God
Description: A dedicated scientist spends three years developing a breakthrough cancer drug to fulfill his promise to his wife, only to return home and discover her betrayal.

INT. LABORATORY - DAY

FAST CUTS: A modern city skyline at dawn. A laboratory window reflects Su Chen's exhausted face. Chemical reagents bubble in sophisticated instruments.

SU CHEN, early thirties with silvering hair at his temples, carefully drips a crimson solution into a crystalline chamber. The mixture glows faintly.

Around him, COLLEAGUES watch in hushed anticipation.

A laptop screen shows rotating DNA helices and data streams. A timer counts down: 00:00:10.

COMPUTER SCREEN (V.O.)
Final trial: Anti-cancer compound XR-7.

The countdown hits zero. Data spikes across the screen.

COMPUTER SCREEN (V.O.)
Test complete. All markers: Optimal.

The display reads: "XR-7 Clinical Trial - SUCCESS."

FEMALE COLLEAGUE A
(barely containing emotion)
It's... it's perfect.

FEMALE COLLEAGUE B
(to Su Chen, voice thick)
Three years. You actually did it.

MALE COLLEAGUE A
Director Su, this will save thousands.

OLD PROFESSOR
(quietly, with weight)
Your wife's company has its miracle.

SU CHEN touches the screen, his reflection overlapping the data. He whispers:

SU CHEN
For you, Ruoxue. For your mother.

CUT TO:

A wedding photo—SU CHEN and LIN RUOXUE, laughing—sits next to a legal document: "Asset Transfer Agreement."
continuation:
INT. BEDROOM - DAY

LIN RUOXUE, elegant but with hollow eyes, sits at the vanity. YOUNG MASTER JIANG (30s, predatory charm) appears behind her, placing hands on her shoulders.

LIN RUOXUE
The IPO hearings are Monday. If the valuation collapses...

YOUNG MASTER JIANG
(smoothly)
The Jiang Group's capital infusion is guaranteed. Your biotech firm will be the star of the market.

LIN RUOXUE
(still uncertain)
But without Su Chen's research...

YOUNG MASTER JIANG
You have my word. That's worth more than any three-year delusion.

He lifts the wedding photo, studies it.

YOUNG MASTER JIANG
He gave you promises. I give you certainty.

He sets it face-down. LIN RUOXUE watches, her throat working silently.

LIN RUOXUE
(soft, broken)
I can't wait anymore. The company, my mother's debt... I'm drowning.

YOUNG MASTER JIANG
Then let me be your life raft.

He draws her to the bed. She goes, not eagerly, but like someone surrendering to gravity.

The photo lies face-down, glass cracking beneath YOUNG MASTER JIANG's shoe.

INT. HOME HALLWAY - DAY

SU CHEN, in a tailored suit, clutches a briefcase and a temperature-controlled case. He almost rings the doorbell, then uses his key—surprised it's not changed.

SU CHEN (V.O.)
She doesn't know I'm home early. She doesn't know I brought her mother's cure... and her company's future.

He hears a soft moan from the bedroom. Freezes. Then moves, quiet and numb.

INT. BEDROOM - DAY

SU CHEN pushes the door open. The briefcase slips from his hand.

LIN RUOXUE and YOUNG MASTER JIANG entangled. She looks up, sees him.

Not contempt. Pure, raw horror.

LIN RUOXUE
(whisper)
Chen...

The temperature-controlled case hits the floor. A faint crack.

SU CHEN's face doesn't show pain. It shows nothing at all. The face of a man whose soul has just left his body.

FADE OUT.

title: The Phoenix's Return
description: A skilled healer saves a desperate woman from her abusive husband, unaware that a jade pendant will reconnect her to the palace and a forgotten past.
context:
Title: The Phoenix's Return
Description: A skilled healer saves a desperate woman from her abusive husband, unaware that a jade pendant will reconnect her to the palace and a forgotten past.

EXT. COURTYARD GATE - DAY

YUN'ER (O.S.)
Open the door, Yun'er!

YUN'ER frantically pounds on a tightly shut wooden door.

A fierce-looking THUG charges toward her.

THUG
(roaring)
You think you can hide?

YUN'ER turns, her face draining of color.

CHANG GE steps from the shadows, her movements fluid and practiced. She flings a handful of powder.

The THUG inhales, coughs violently, then stumbles, his hands clawing at his neck and arms.

CHANG GE
My own recipe. Feels like wasps beneath the skin. The antidote is timed.

The THUG drops to his knees, gasping.

THUG
(hoarse pleading)
Make it stop!

CHANG GE
Then listen carefully. You will forget Shen Yun'er's name. You will forget this town. If I see your face again, there is no second antidote.

She tosses a wrapped leaf onto the dirt. The THUG snatches it and chews desperately.

CHANG GE
Now crawl away.

The THUG staggers off. CHANG GE watches until he's gone, her jaw tight. She turns to the door, her expression softening almost imperceptibly.

INT. COURTYARD - DAY

YUN'ER peeks out, sees the empty street, and exhales sharply.

YUN'ER
You... you truly carry such poison?

CHANG GE
Only pepper and nettle. The fear does the rest.

YUN'ER
(quietly)
I thought—

CHANG GE
(interrupting)
You thought to use me as a shield. Again.

YUN'ER
(crying, voice cracking)
He's worse when he drinks. Look.

She pulls back her sleeve. Deep bruises pattern her arm, some old and yellowed, others fresh and dark.

YUN'ER
(touching her abdomen)
And now there's the child.

She sinks to her knees, gripping CHANG GE's hand.

YUN'ER
You promised. In the mountains, when we were barely twelve. You said if I ever needed—

FLASHBACK:
continuation:
EXT. WILDERNESS - DAY (WINTER)

Snow blankets the ground. Young CHANG GE, bloodied and unconscious, is sheltered by a crude lean-to. Young YUN'ER, chapped hands and hollow cheeks, presses snow to her wounds.

Young CHANG GE's eyes flutter open. She touches a rough wooden pendant at her neck.

YOUNG CHANG GE
(whisper)
You stayed.

YOUNG YUN'ER
We protect each other now.

END FLASHBACK.

INT. COURTYARD - DAY

CHANG GE stares at Yun'er. Her hand moves instinctively to her own throat, where a simple wooden pendant hangs.

CHANG GE
(softly)
The jade one is packed away. Safe.

YUN'ER
(nodding frantically)
Yes, yes. Just as you asked.

CHANG GE helps her up, decision made.

CHANG GE
Then we leave tonight. He'll return with friends.

YUN'ER
(weeping with relief)
The northern roads—

CHANG GE
Will take us to a new life. Come.

TITLE: FIVE YEARS LATER

EXT. HEALING HALL - DAY

Under the faded Healing Hall sign, TOWNSPEOPLE bow deeply.

TOWNSPEOPLE (V.O.)
Your hands have blessed this town.

INT. HEALING HALL - DAY

CHANG GE takes an elderly woman's pulse, her touch gentle.

CHANG GE
Xiao Shiliu, angelica root, two liang.

XIAO SHILIU (O.S.)
Already measured!

The boy, seven years old and quick-fingered, slides a packet onto the table.

CHANG GE
(approving)
And three liang of platycodon. You read my mind.

ELDERLY WOMAN
The boy learns your heart.

XIAO SHILIU beams.

XIAO SHILIU
Mother says healing is the only nobility that matters.

Everyone chuckles warmly.

YUN'ER enters, carrying a heavy tray. Her face is drawn, eyes hollow. She bumps an OLD MAN.

OLD MAN
Oh! Forgive me, lady—

YUN'ER
(sharp, exhausted)
Watch your step. Can't you see I'm—

She catches herself, shame flickering across her features.

CHANG GE
Yun'er. Rest.

YUN'ER
(curtly)
Rest doesn't pay our debts.

She disappears into the back room. XIAO SHILIU watches her go, his smile fading. He notices a crack in the wall panel. Prying it open, he finds a small cloth bundle.

INT. HEALING HALL - CONTINUOUS

XIAO SHILIU unwraps a carved white jade pendant, luminous and cool. He glances toward the back room, then slips it into his pocket.

INT. PAWN SHOP - DAY

XIAO SHILIU stands on his toes to reach the counter. He places the pendant down.

XIAO SHILIU
For my mother's medicine. How much?

The PAWN SHOP OWNER's breath catches. He turns the pendant over, finding a royal seal on the back.

PAWN SHOP OWNER
(carefully)
Thirty taels. For the craftsmanship.

He pushes the silver forward. XIAO SHILIU hesitates, then takes it.

INT. PALACE HALL - DAY

HIS HIGHNESS sits rigid, reviewing tax ledgers. A GUARD enters, kneeling.

GUARD
Your Highness. The pendant surfaced in a border village. With a woman matching the description. And a boy. The scholars calculate his age at seven years.

HIS HIGHNESS's hand stills. He looks up, his face a mask of old grief and sudden, terrible hope.

FADE OUT.

title: Who Is the Killer
description: A young thief breaks into an apartment to find the tenant murdered. When potential suspects arrive, he must hide among the dead to uncover the truth—or become the next victim.
context:
Title: Who Is the Killer
Description: A young thief breaks into an apartment to find the tenant murdered. When potential suspects arrive, he must hide among the dead to uncover the truth—or become the next victim.

INT. APARTMENT HALLWAY - DAY

A young man (THIEF), mid-20s, crouches in a corner, trembling. Blood on his hands—not his own. He wipes them frantically on his jeans.

THIEF (V.O.)
Shit shit shit. One lousy smash-and-grab. Now I'm standing in a fucking horror movie.

A middle-aged man in rumpled clothes (LANDLORD) appears at the open doorway, frowning at the damaged lock.

LANDLORD
Damn students. Always losing keys, then the super gets the bill.

LANDLORD pulls out his phone, scrolls, then shrugs.

LANDLORD
Text says she's visiting her mom till Sunday. Guess the rent can wait.

LANDLORD turns, already tapping a game on his phone, and ambles off.

THIEF lets out a shaky breath, pulling a crumpled PHOTO from his pocket—a selfie of XIAO LI with the Thief, both laughing at a noodle stand.

THIEF
I'm so sorry, Li. Should've known that tip was too good to be true.

THIEF stuffs the photo back, steels himself, and moves toward the bedroom door.
continuation:
INT. APARTMENT BEDROOM - DAY

XIAO LI (20s) lies on the bed, blood pooled beneath her. The room is tossed—drawers emptied, closet rifled.

THIEF kneels, head bowed—not prayer, but guilt.

THIEF
You remembered my name. Nobody does that.

Suddenly, the sound of keys opening the door comes from the entrance.

THIEF races back to the peephole.

Peephole view: A bald, burly man (ZHANG BIAO) in a bloody chef's apron, clutching a MEAT CLEAVER.

THIEF (V.O.)
Oh Christ. That's her uncle. The one she ran from.

Outside the door, ZHANG BIAO struggles with the key, cursing. It's the wrong one.

THIEF
(whispering)
He doesn't have the key. But I do...

THIEF pulls a HOUSE KEY from his pocket—the one he used to enter. His face hardens with realization.

ZHANG BIAO finally kicks the door open, splintering the frame. He storms in, cleaver raised.

THIEF dives under the bed just as ZHANG BIAO enters the bedroom.

INT. APARTMENT BEDROOM - CONTINUOUS

ZHANG BIAO stands over the body, breathing heavily.

ZHANG BIAO
Stupid girl. Should've given me the key to the safe. Now look at you.

Under the bed, THIEF covers his mouth, eyes wide open. He sees ZHANG BIAO's bloody work boots—identical to the prints near the window.

ZHANG BIAO
Where did you hide it?

ZHANG BIAO kneels, his knee cracking, and reaches under the bed frame. His hand brushes THIEF's sneaker.

THIEF's phone BUZZES—silent mode, but the screen lights up his face.

ZHANG BIAO freezes.

ZHANG BIAO
Someone's here.

ZHANG BIAO stands, takes one step back, then SLAMS the cleaver into the mattress above THIEF's head.

FADE OUT.

title: Who Says I'm a Poor Guy
description: A poor young man is coerced into a deal by a wealthy heiress who needs to meet charity requirements by giving him billions, only to have him return the money later.
context:
Title: Who Says I'm a Poor Guy
Description: A poor young man is coerced into a deal by a wealthy heiress who needs to meet charity requirements by giving him billions, only to have him return the money later.

INT. LU CORPORATION OFFICE - DAY

The POOR GUY sits rigid in a leather chair, hands clenched. The FEMALE LEAD stands at the floor-to-ceiling windows, back to him. Her ASSISTANT waits by a desk.

FEMALE LEAD
Your sister's medical bills. Three hundred thousand. Overdue.

The POOR GUY's jaw tightens.

POOR GUY
How did you—

FEMALE LEAD
(Turning, sliding a contract forward)
I need to disperse five billion from my trust. Charity requirement. I lose everything if I don't.

She studies him, her poise barely masking desperation.

FEMALE LEAD
Hold it for thirty days. One hundred million is yours. The rest comes back.

The POOR GUY stares at the black bank card on the desk.
continuation:
POOR GUY (V.O.)
One hundred million. Yaoyao's engagement gift. Mom's chemo. A life.

He picks up the pen, then stops.

POOR GUY
What's stopping me from keeping it all?

The FEMALE LEAD's smile is razor-thin.

FEMALE LEAD
The same thing stopping me from finding someone else. Mutual destruction.

She leans in, her voice low.

FEMALE LEAD
Sign. Save your family. We'll both get what we need.

The POOR GUY signs. The ASSISTANT slides the black card toward him.

FEMALE LEAD
Welcome to the Lu Corporation's charity program.

The Poor Guy takes the card—his hand steady, but his eyes show the weight of the bargain.

title: Scheming His Years
description: A young woman whose family was destroyed by gambling debts is forced into a dangerous deal to infiltrate a wealthy heir's life and sabotage his engagement.
context:
Title: Scheming His Years
Description: A young woman whose family was destroyed by gambling debts is forced into a dangerous deal to infiltrate a wealthy heir's life and sabotage his engagement.

INT. LUXURY APARTMENT - DAWN

SONG FANYIN, mid-20s with haunted eyes, stands by the floor-to-ceiling window in a silk nightgown. Behind her, GU MINGCHENG sleeps undisturbed in a bed that cost more than her father's debts.

SONG FANYIN (V.O.)
Three months ago, I watched my father burn our world. Tonight, I'm in his enemy's bed. Some debts you pay with money. Others, you pay with yourself.

INT. ABANDONED WAREHOUSE - NIGHT (FLASHBACK)

CREAKING metal. The smell of KEROSENE. SONG FANYIN'S FATHER, 50s and broken, slumps against a rusted barrel, photos scattered at his feet—family vacations, his daughter's graduation, all soaked in fuel.

SONG FANYIN'S FATHER
(whispering to the photos)
Gone. All gone. Can't even face her...

SONG FANYIN'S MOTHER, trembling, grabs his arm. He shoves her back so hard she hits the concrete.

SONG FANYIN'S MOTHER
(screaming)
The loan sharks took the house, not our daughter! We can start over!

He fumbles with a LIGHTER, thumb shaking over the wheel. SONG FANYIN, 22, crouched by the exit, phone in hand—she'd been calling for help. She lunges forward, but the WHOOSH of flames beats her. Heat blasts her back as the photos ignite like falling stars.

SONG FANYIN
DAD—NO!

She grabs her mother's arm, dragging her toward the metal door as fire licks the ceiling.

INT. HOSPITAL BURN UNIT - DAY

A HEART MONITOR beeps. SONG FANYIN wakes, bandages on her forearms. Ash still stains her jawline. She bolts upright.

SONG FANYIN
Mom?

A man in a tailored suit, WEN LIHAN, 40s and shark-eyed, stands by the window examining a charred business card. He doesn't turn.

WEN LIHAN
She's alive. For now.

SONG FANYIN
Who are you? Where—

WEN LIHAN
Your father's creditor. I came to collect. Found you instead.

He tosses the card onto her lap. Her father's handwriting: GU WENHAI GROUP - FINAL NOTICE.

WEN LIHAN
News is already calling it a tragedy. Not a crime.

He taps a tablet. A news video plays: flames consuming the warehouse.

NEWS BROADCAST (V.O.)
...local businessman apparently self-immolated after gambling losses. Wife and daughter in critical condition. Police rule it a suicide...

The screen freezes on SONG FANYIN'S FATHER'S face, twisted in the firelight.

SONG FANYIN
(throwing the tablet back)
Critical? Take me to her. NOW.
continuation:
INT. ICU WARD - CONTINUOUS

SONG FANYIN'S MOTHER lies unconscious, oxygen mask fogging with each shallow breath. A DOCTOR reviews charts, eyes tired.

DOCTOR
She inhaled too much smoke. Cardiac arrest. We stabilize with meds, but she needs bypass surgery within two weeks. Aftercare? Minimum six months. You're looking at half a million.

SONG FANYIN
(voice cracking)
I can—

WEN LIHAN
(interrupting, to the doctor)
Give us a moment.

The doctor nods, exiting. WEN LIHAN pulls out a phone, scrolling.

WEN LIHAN
Your father's debt: three point two million. Transfers to next of kin. Due in thirty days. This hospital? Files liens on burn victims' families. Standard practice.

SONG FANYIN
(staring at her mother's gray face)
You didn't save us out of kindness.

WEN LIHAN
I see potential. Waste bothers me.

He turns the phone toward her. A photo: GU MINGCHENG, 30s, handsome, laughing at a charity gala beside his fiancée.

WEN LIHAN
Gu Mingcheng. Wenhai Group's heir. His engagement to Yucheng Capital's daughter finalizes in three months. When that merger happens, certain people become... inconvenient. Permanently.

SONG FANYIN
You want me to be a homewrecker.

WEN LIHAN
I want you to be a delay. A complication. A woman from his past he can't resist.

SONG FANYIN
I went to community college. He summers in Monaco.

WEN LIHAN
You survived a fire for your mother. That kind of desperation? It's a skill.

He pockets the phone.

WEN LIHAN
Mandarin, Cantonese, English. Your transcripts say you're fluent. His fiancée only speaks money. You'll fit right in.

A beat. SONG FANYIN looks from her mother to the photo of GU MINGCHENG. Two different prisons.

SONG FANYIN
(quietly)
What if I can't?

WEN LIHAN
Then your mother moves to a hallway bed. The debt collectors find you. And I find someone else.

He places a key card on the bedside table.

WEN LIHAN
Apartment is furnished. Training starts Monday. You have one week to make him notice you.

He walks out. The heart monitor continues its steady beep. SONG FANYIN picks up the key card, her reflection in the dark window showing a ghost of who she was.

EXT. GU MINGCHENG'S PENTHOUSE BUILDING - NIGHT (BACK TO PRESENT)

City lights blur below. Inside, SONG FANYIN still watches GU MINGCHENG sleep. She touches the lighter burn on her palm—a perfect circle from her father's final gesture.

SONG FANYIN (V.O.)
One week to make him love me. Three months to destroy him. And every night, I wonder if I'm burning down his world... or just relighting mine.

title: Ghost Marriage
description: A disabled and supposedly cursed family patriarch arrives to claim his bride, only to discover her coffin is empty and she faked her death.
context:
Title: Ghost Marriage
Description: A disabled and supposedly cursed family patriarch arrives to claim his bride, only to discover her coffin is empty and she faked her death.

INT. MOURNING HALL - DAY

An open coffin sits in the center of the vast mourning hall, surrounded by white and yellow chrysanthemums. Ornate bridal clothes are arranged inside.

NARRATOR (V.O.)
The Mo Financial Conglomerate claims its bride today. But Zhao Yutang refused to be a sacrifice.

ZHAO XIYA kneels beside the coffin, supported by MRS. ZHAO. MASTER ZHAO hovers nearby, his grief feigned.

ZHAO XIYA
Elder Sister...

MASTER OF CEREMONIES
Guests, please observe silence for the deceased.

All bow their heads.

EXT. ZHAO FAMILY MANSION - DAY

A convoy of black vehicles drives into the estate. MO YEPO emerges from the lead Rolls-Royce, leaning on a cane, his presence commanding.

Subordinates line up with red-draped gift trays.

INT. MOURNING HALL - DAY

The Master of Ceremonies signals to close the coffin.

MASTER OF CEREMONIES
Seal the—

MO YEPO (O.S.)
Wait.

Mo Yepo enters. His men display the gifts. The room falls silent.

MO YEPO
I've come for my wife.

GUEST A
(softly)
The cursed patriarch... I heard—

Mo Yepo's stare cuts through the gossip. He approaches the coffin.

MASTER ZHAO
Mr. Mo, she's gone. Took her own life.

MO YEPO
(cold laugh)
A Zhao would never.

He lifts the lid. The coffin is empty. Gasps fill the hall.

MASTER ZHAO
Impossible—

MO YEPO
Find her. Now.

A subordinate exits.
continuation:
EXT. RAINY ROADSIDE - NIGHT

FLASHBACK:

ZHAO YUTANG stumbles through rain, clutching a torn red dress. She crashes into MO YEPO, who shelters her with an umbrella.

ZHAO YUTANG
(gasping)
Take this... help me...

She forces a jade pendant into his pocket. Mo Yepo lifts her.

INT. ROLLS-ROYCE - NIGHT

Mo Yepo sets her in the back seat. Zhao Yutang pulls him close, desperate.

ZHAO YUTANG
(whispering)
Help me disappear...

They kiss. The pendant falls between them.

BACK TO:

INT. MOURNING HALL - DAY

Among the mourners, ZHAO YUTANG in black lifts her head. Her eyes lock on Mo Yepo.

ZHAO YUTANG (V.O.)
The driver... why is he here?

She edges toward the door.

EXT. ZHAO FAMILY MANSION COURTYARD - DAY

Zhao Yutang rushes out and collides with Mo Yepo. The jade pendant hangs from his tie.

MO YEPO
Looking for this?

Zhao Yutang freezes, staring at the pendant in horror.

title: Penny Wise, Pound Foolish
description: A gold-medal teacher returns to her hometown after ten years to teach at her alma mater, but faces family members who take advantage of her father's small shop.
context:
Title: Penny Wise, Pound Foolish
Description: A gold-medal teacher returns to her hometown after ten years to teach at her alma mater, but faces family members who take advantage of her father's small shop.

INT. CONVENIENCE STORE - DAY

On the TV screen, gold-medal teacher SONG YUEYOU is being interviewed.

REPORTER (V.O.)
Teacher Song, every school you've taught at this year has seen improvements in enrollment and graduation rates without exception. Now prestigious schools from around the world are extending olive branches to you. Where do you plan to teach in the future?

SONG YUEYOU
(on TV)
I've already agreed to teach at Qiming Middle School. That's my alma mater.

REPORTER (V.O.)
Education for all, indeed.

In the convenience store, a GIRL watches the TV.

GIRL
Teacher Song's actually coming to our county? No way...

EXT. COUNTRY ROAD - DAY

SONG YUEYOU pulls her suitcase along a snow-covered road.

SONG YUEYOU (V.O.)
Ten years. The store looks exactly the same. I hope Dad's been taking care of himself.

INT. CONVENIENCE STORE - DAY

SONG YUEYOU enters the convenience store. Her father, SONG WEIMIN, is organizing goods with his back to her.

SONG WEIMIN
Whatever you want, help yourself.

SONG YUEYOU
I'm not buying anything.

SONG WEIMIN turns around, freezes for a moment, then joyfully recognizes his daughter.

SONG WEIMIN
My daughter's home!

He excitedly grabs his daughter's hands. His are calloused, rough.

SONG YUEYOU
Dad. I'm home for good.

SONG YUEYOU (V.O.)
He doesn't know yet. About the gold medal. About choosing Qiming over Beijing.

SONG WEIMIN
You've gotten thinner. Youyou, your timing is perfect—Grandma's eightieth birthday is soon. Now I have help.

SONG YUEYOU
Then I'll have good news for everyone at the banquet.

SONG WEIMIN
Yes! Watch the counter. I'll take your things to the back.
continuation:
SONG YUEYOU
Okay, Dad. Don't worry.

SONG WEIMIN pulls the suitcase into the back room. At that moment, ELDEST AUNT SONG CAIYING walks in.

SONG CAIYING
