Little brother! Got any new stock?

SONG CAIYING and several CUSTOMERS with her help themselves to snacks from the shelves and start eating them without paying.

SONG CAIYING sees SONG YUEYOU and approaches her.

SONG CAIYING
Youyou! Back from the city? Don't worry if you didn't save much. A woman's real career is marriage anyway.

SONG YUEYOU
Aunt. That's seven yuan for the snacks.

SONG CAIYING
(surprised)
What? I'm your own eldest aunt! Family doesn't split bills—money talk ruins relationships.

SONG YUEYOU
Small businesses can't survive on goodwill.

SONG CAIYING
(angry)
Your father never complained!

SONG YUEYOU
Because he's family. But I'm the accountant now.

SONG CAIYING
I'm supporting your father's business!

SONG CAIYING is too angry to speak. She throws the vegetables in her hand back into the box and turns to leave.

SONG CAIYING
(leaving)
Ungrateful girl.

SONG CAIYING picks up a vegetable, looks at it, then throws it down.

SONG CAIYING
These vegetables look wilted. I was doing you a favor.

SONG CAIYING storms out angrily. The CUSTOMERS, embarrassed, put their snacks back and follow.

SONG YUEYOU picks up the opened but undrunk beverage SONG CAIYING left behind and pours it out expressionlessly.

She turns to find SONG WEIMIN watching from the doorway.

SONG WEIMIN
You always had backbone.

SONG YUEYOU
I learned it from watching you carry this store alone.

She drops the empty bottle in the trash. The sound is final.

FADE OUT.

title: Longing for Moonlight, Regretting the Morning Sun
description: A man who gave everything to his beloved fiancée discovers her betrayal the night before their wedding, only to be reborn and given a second chance.
context:
Title: Longing for Moonlight, Regretting the Morning Sun
Description: A man who gave everything to his beloved fiancée discovers her betrayal the night before their wedding, only to be reborn and given a second chance.

INT. CAR - NIGHT

LIN ZE (V.O.)
They say love makes you blind. I built my whole world around Xu Ruoxi—gave her everything she asked for, and everything she didn't. Tomorrow, we're supposed to get married.

LIN ZE sits in the driver's seat, looking at a photo of XU RUOXI on his phone. He dials her number. It rings four times, then voicemail.

INT. KTV - NIGHT

A private room filled with laughter. XU RUOXI sits among friends, the light catching the diamond on her finger.

CUI YUANYUAN
To Ruoxi! May your last night of freedom be unforgettable.

ALL raise their glasses, the moment genuine.

FRIEND A
That ring is stunning. Lin Ze has taste.

CUI YUANYUAN
(gently)
He commissioned it months ago. Custom design—apparently cost a small fortune.

XU RUOXI
(small smile)
He's... generous.

Her phone BUZZES on the table. "Lin Ze" lights up the screen.

INT. CAR - NIGHT

LIN ZE (V.O.)
Generous. That's one word for it. I thought love meant giving until it hurts. I didn't know she'd be taking from someone else too.

INT. KTV - NIGHT

The party continues. A distinguished man, MENG TIANHAO, enters quietly. All eyes turn to him.

CUI YUANYUAN
(leaning to Ruoxi)
You didn't tell me he was back.

XU RUOXI stands, surprise and something else flickering across her face.

MENG TIANHAO
(raising his glass)
To your happiness, Ruoxi. I mean that.

XU RUOXI
Senior... I thought you were still in Berlin.

MENG TIANHAO
I was. But some things couldn't wait.

Their eyes hold. Her phone BUZZES again—Lin Ze. She silences it without looking.

MENG TIANHAO
You should answer. He'll worry.

XU RUOXI
(quietly)
He always worries.

She walks to the corner, answers.

INT. CAR / KTV - NIGHT (INTERCUT)

LIN ZE
Ruoxi? The office said you left hours ago.

XU RUOXI
I'm still in meetings. Can we not do this tonight?

LIN ZE
(slight pause)
You never miss calls. Not three in a row.

XU RUOXI
(defensive)
I'm trying to respect my team. Is that so hard to understand?

LIN ZE
I understand more than you think.

The line goes dead. Xu Ruoxi stares at her phone, a flicker of something like guilt crossing her face.
continuation:
INT. XU FAMILY HOME - DAY (FLASHBACK)

LIN ZE, wearing a suit, sits with XU RUOXI's parents. The atmosphere is businesslike.

ZHANG YAFANG
We want our daughter's future secured, Lin Ze. The ten million is... insurance. As is the property. You understand.

LIN ZE
I want Ruoxi to have everything she deserves.

He places a bank card on the table.

ZHANG YAFANG
(avoiding his eyes)
We... don't have much to offer in return. Family circumstances, you see.

LIN ZE
I didn't expect anything. I love your daughter.

XU RUOXI
(from doorway)
Mother, that's enough. Lin Ze, we have a conference call with your board in twenty minutes. Let's go.

Her voice is chilly, but her eyes don't quite meet his.

INT. LIN ZE'S HOME - DAY (FLASHBACK)

LIN ZE holds financial statements, his hands shaking slightly.

LIN ZE
Ruoxi, thirty million was moved from the subsidiary yesterday. Without board approval. Your signature is on it.

XU RUOXI
(pouring coffee)
Senior Meng's biotech firm needs bridge financing. He's good for it.

LIN ZE
He's been "good for it" for three years. Our investors are asking questions.

XU RUOXI
And I'm answering them. I'm still CFO, aren't I? While your father's in the hospital, someone has to make decisions.

LIN ZE
Not like this. Not behind my back.

XU RUOXI
(turning)
Everything I do is for this family. For us. You'd see that if you weren't so busy playing the wounded husband.

INT. LIN ZE'S HOME - DAY (LATER)

LIN ZE sits in silence, the divorce papers on the coffee table before him. The house feels hollow.

LIN ZE
Ten years. I built this life for you.

XU RUOXI
I never asked you to. I needed security. You needed... what? A trophy? A project? I was never just your wife, Lin Ze. I was your acquisition.

MENG TIANHAO (O.S.)
And a valuable one.

MENG TIANHAO enters, carrying a briefcase.

MENG TIANHAO
The transfer documents are signed. With Ruoxi's shares and proxy votes from her family, I'm now the majority stakeholder. This house, the company—they're mine.

LIN ZE
(voice hollow)
You were planning this from the beginning.

XU RUOXI
From the day we met. Senior saw the opportunity. I just... stopped fighting it.

LIN ZE
Why tell me now?

XU RUOXI
Because I want you to know it was never personal. It was always business.

LIN ZE stares at them both. Then, very slowly, he picks up a pen. His hand trembles as he signs. The moment the last stroke is complete, he goes very still. Then, without a word, he stands and walks toward the door.

MENG TIANHAO
Lin Ze—

LIN ZE stops, but doesn't turn.

LIN ZE
(quietly)
You were wrong, Ruoxi. It was always personal to me.

He walks out. The door clicks shut. Xu Ruoxi looks at the signed papers, and for the first time, something like doubt crosses her face.

INT. CAR - NIGHT (PRESENT)

LIN ZE gasps, gripping the steering wheel. The memory—so vivid, so real—fades. He touches his chest where the phantom pain still echoes.

LIN ZE (V.O.)
That life ended with a door closing. This one begins with one opening. I don't know how or why I'm back here. But I know one thing: the man who walked out of that house doesn't exist anymore.

He steps out of the car, his movements deliberate.

INT. KTV - NIGHT (PRESENT)

XU RUOXI and MENG TIANHAO sit apart, the distance between them charged.

XU RUOXI
You shouldn't have come back. Tomorrow, I'll be his wife in name.

MENG TIANHAO
And in truth?

XU RUOXI
(quietly)
The truth doesn't matter anymore. It died when my father lost everything in '08 and we had to rebuild on Lin Ze's charity.

MENG TIANHAO
This isn't charity, Ruoxi. This is strategy. And you're the key.

He leans closer. The crowd begins chanting.

FRIENDS
Kiss! Kiss! Kiss!

MENG TIANHAO's hand touches her face. Xu Ruoxi closes her eyes, conflict written across her features. Their lips are inches apart when—

The door opens. LIN ZE stands there, not the broken man they remember, but someone harder. His eyes lock with Xu Ruoxi's, then drift to Meng Tianhao.

The music continues, but the room goes silent.

XU RUOXI
(whisper)
Lin Ze...

LIN ZE
(quietly, dangerously)
Don't stop on my account. After all, it's just business, right?

FADE OUT.

title: Super Powered Baby Finds Daddy
description: A skilled assassin mother and her gifted daughter escape from a secret organization to find the child's father and seek a cure for her inherited condition.
context:
Title: Super Powered Baby Finds Daddy
Description: A skilled assassin mother and her gifted daughter escape from a secret organization to find the child's father and seek a cure for her inherited condition.

INT. DARK PAVILION - NIGHT

FAST CUTS of animated imagery: A wolf howling at the moon on a snowy mountain, an ancient tower glowing red, two girls running through streets, then leaping through the night sky.

The animation transitions to live action. YE GE and her daughter TANGTANG hold hands, their figures graceful as they leap from a rooftop and land in a traditional courtyard.

YE GE
Today we leave the Dark Pavilion behind. All of it.

YE GE crouches down, looking at TANGTANG tenderly.

TANGTANG
Mommy, can we find Daddy? Before the cold inside gets worse?

YE GE
(smiling)
That's why we're going.

TANGTANG
(happily)
Will he like my candies?

YE GE
He'll love them.

SFX: Motorcycle engines snarling closer.

TANGTANG
Mommy, someone's coming.

YE GE and TANGTANG quickly put on masks. Several motorcycles rush into the courtyard, surrounding them. ELDER RONG, the leader, gets off his bike. He wears clown makeup and has gray-white hair.

ELDER RONG
continuation:
(laughing maniacally)
The Pavilion's finest, running away with a child? You know the price of betrayal.

YE GE
I taught you everything. Even how to fail.

ELDER RONG
(laughing loudly)
Attack!

TANGTANG
Mommy, let me! Let them taste my candied hawthorn!

TANGTANG takes several spherical objects from her small bag and throws them forcefully at the motorcyclists. The spheres emit bright light upon impact, knocking the targets down.

ELDER RONG
(angrily)
Worthless.

TANGTANG proudly eats one of her "candied hawthorns." ELDER RONG, seeing this, prepares to attack personally.

YE GE
Tangtang, stand back!

YE GE steps forward, her body radiating golden light, transforming into a phoenix form. She engages in fierce combat with ELDER RONG. After several exchanges, YE GE defeats ELDER RONG.

The battle ends. YE GE withdraws her aura and removes her mask.

TANGTANG
Mommy, where are we going to find Daddy?

YE GE gently removes TANGTANG's mask.

YE GE
(eyes determined)
The Imperial Capital.

title: Freeloading Cousin
description: A struggling young man's act of kindness leads to an unexpected opportunity that could change his fortune forever.
context:
Title: Freeloading Cousin
Description: A struggling young man's act of kindness leads to an unexpected opportunity that could change his fortune forever.

INT. ROAST DUCK SHOP - DAY

COUSIN (20s, lean, quick-eyed) sweeps duck debris. His stomach RUMBLES. He glances at a GOLDEN CRISPY DUCK hanging by the counter.

DUCK SELLER (40s, weary) bags a duck for a CUSTOMER. The Customer pays with worn bills.

COUSIN'S eyes track the transaction. As the Customer turns, a piece of duck skin slides from the bag. In one fluid motion, Cousin catches it, pops it in his mouth.

DUCK SELLER
(catching him)
Hey! What're you doing?

COUSIN
(chewing, casual)
Cousin, just checking it's not spoiled.

DUCK SELLER
(snatching the broom)
Spoiled my ass. You work three days, you eat for free. Those are the rules.

COUSIN
(grinning)
Guess I'm still on day two, then.

EXT. COUSIN'S HOUSE ENTRANCE - DAY

Rain drizzles. GRANDPA (80s, frail but sharp) clutches a faded PHOTO of young Cousin with his parents.

OLDER COUSIN (30s, well-fed) and his WIFE hustle Grandpa toward a waiting car.

OLDER COUSIN
We're late. Let's go.

Grandpa turns back. Cousin stands in the doorway, holding a WARM BOILED EGG.

COUSIN
Grandpa. For the road.

Grandpa takes it. Their hands touch. The rain falls harder between them. Grandpa's mouth trembles, but no words come. He nods once, slow and heavy.

The car door SLAMS. Tail lights vanish into the gray downpour.

EXT. WAREHOUSE - DAY

Cousin hauls fifty-pound rice sacks. Sweat darkens his camo shirt. He stacks them with machine precision.

BOSS (50s, gruff) counts cash, then holds out THREE RED BILLS.

BOSS
Five days. No complaints.

Cousin takes the money. Counts it. Folds it carefully into his shoe.

COUSIN
Thank you, boss.

BOSS
(shrugging)
You earned it. Come back Monday.

EXT. OLD HOUSE - DAY

Cousin trudges up to a sagging wooden house. Paint peels like old skin. He stops on the steps, exhausted.

QIAN CAIQING (20s, beautiful despite threadbare clothes) sits on a stool, dabbing her lips with crushed petals for color. She spots him and smiles.

QIAN CAIQING
Tough day?

COUSIN
Forces a smile. Pulls out the three bills.

COUSIN
Got us something.

He produces a small BUNDLE: second-hand clothes. She unfolds a dress. The SEAM splits slightly.

QIAN CAIQING
(laughing despite herself)
Champion of the discount bins.

COUSIN
(defensive)
The vendor said it was last year's style—

QIAN CAIQING
(pressing finger to his lips)
Hush. It's perfect.

She holds it against her body, twirls. For a moment, they both forget the roof leaks.

COUSIN
Your mother called again?

QIAN CAIQING
(sighs)
She wants twenty thousand dowry. Or we wait another year.
continuation:
EXT. STREET - DAY

Cousin walks the crowded street in his warehouse camo. Billboards advertise LUXURY CARS, MANSIONS. He looks at his cracked phone screen: 86 RMB balance.

A siren WAILS in the distance.

EXT. ROAST DUCK SHOP - DAY

MR. WANG (60s, elegant but unassuming) guides MRS. WANG (50s, pregnant, radiant) toward the shop.

MR. WANG
The skin is crispier than the city hotels.

MRS. WANG
Then what are we waiting—

A SCREECH of tires. A DELIVERY VAN swerves toward them. Mr. Wang freezes.

Cousin, passing by, SHOVES them aside. The van's MIRROR clips his shoulder. He hits the ground hard.

Mrs. Wang screams. Blood pools beneath her.

MR. WANG
(frantic)
Someone call an ambulance!

COUSIN
(clutching his arm)
Hospital's two blocks. My tricycle's faster.

He points to a battered THREE-WHEELER with a cargo bed.

EXT. HOSPITAL - CONTINUOUS

Cousin pedals wildly through traffic, Mr. Wang cradling Mrs. Wang in back.

MR. WANG
(holding her bleeding head)
Stay with me. Please stay.

INT. HOSPITAL EMERGENCY ROOM - DAY

DOCTOR (40s, calm, urgent) and NURSES wheel Mrs. Wang away. Mr. Wang tries to follow. A NURSE stops him.

NURSE
Wait here.

MR. WANG
(to Cousin, trembling)
You saved us. Thank you.

COUSIN
(grimacing at his own cut)
She'll be okay. Strong lady.

MR. WANG
How can I ever—

COUSIN
Just doing what's right.

The Doctor emerges, pulling off bloody gloves.

DOCTOR
Mr. Wang? Your wife has severe internal bleeding. She needs AB negative. We have... one unit. We need three.

MR. WANG
I'll pay anything. Import it.

DOCTOR
No time. The nearest is two hours away.

COUSIN
(quietly)
I'm AB negative.

MR. WANG
(turning to him)
What?

COUSIN
Test me. If it matches, take it.

INT. HOSPITAL - BLOOD DRAW ROOM - DAY

Cousin lies on a bed, tube in his arm. Blood flows dark red into a bag. He watches it, pale.

Mr. Wang sits beside him, holds his other hand.

MR. WANG
I have no children. This baby was... our hope. Now I just want my wife.

COUSIN
You'll have both.

MR. WANG
Why are you doing this?

COUSIN
Someone once told me: when you can give, you give. That's all.

INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - LATER

Cousin stumbles out, arm bandaged. Mr. Wang supports him.

COUSIN
(weak smile)
You owe me a watermelon. The expensive kind.

MR. WANG
(laughs through tears)
I'll buy you the whole farm.

The Doctor reappears.

DOCTOR
She's stable. Your blood saved her.

MR. WANG
(to Cousin)
My name is Wang Dekuang. My home is empty. Too empty. If you ever need...

INT. HOSPITAL LOBBY - LATER

BUTLER LIN (50s, precise) arrives with TWO BODYGUARDS. He takes in Cousin's bloodied camo, the bandage.

BUTLER LIN
Mr. Wang? Is Madam—

MR. WANG
Stable. Thanks to this young man. Where's the village project file?

BUTLER LIN
(pulling out a TABLET)
Ready. But sir, the board—

MR. WANG
(to Cousin)
You understand hard work. You understand sacrifice. Our rural education initiative needs someone who's lived it. Not another MBA.

COUSIN
(confused)
Me? I barely finished high school.

MR. WANG
You finished life school. Top of your class. Try it. Three months. Paid.

BUTLER LIN
(softly, to Mr. Wang)
Sir, his background check—

MR. WANG
I know exactly who he is. The only person who mattered when my world was ending.

Butler Lin hesitates, then bows to Cousin.

BUTLER LIN
Young Master Wang. Welcome to Kuangshi Group.

COUSIN
(overwhelmed)
I just wanted the watermelon.

MR. WANG
(chuckling)
You'll get it. And maybe a future worth building.

ON SCREEN: FREELOADING COUSIN - END OF EPISODE ONE

title: Soft and Sweet Wife Is Hard to Coax
description: A delivery girl helps an elderly man at a luxury residential gate, not knowing he is the patriarch of the wealthy Jiang family who wants to matchmake her with his grandson.
context:
Title: Soft and Sweet Wife Is Hard to Coax
Description: A delivery girl helps an elderly man at a luxury residential gate, not knowing he is the patriarch of the wealthy Jiang family who wants to matchmake her with his grandson.

EXT. LUXURY RESIDENTIAL COMPLEX ENTRANCE - DAY

An elderly man (GRANDFATHER JIANG) stands at the gate, leaning on a cane. A SECURITY GUARD approaches him.

SECURITY GUARD
Sir, this is a private entrance. You need to wait by the visitor's bench.

GRANDFATHER JIANG
(smiling)
My grandson is coming. This shade is better for old bones.

SECURITY GUARD
(agitated)
Move, or I'll move you.

The SECURITY GUARD shoves GRANDFATHER JIANG's shoulder. He stumbles backward.

A delivery scooter speeds up. The rider, a young woman named HAN MOMO, catches GRANDFATHER JIANG mid-fall.

HAN MOMO
Grandpa! I've got you.

GRANDFATHER JIANG
(laughing and waving his hand)
Ha! Good catch.

HAN MOMO
(to the SECURITY GUARD)
He was just standing there. Why shove him?

SECURITY GUARD
Daily scam attempts. You think I don't recognize the playbook? Jiang family property.

HAN MOMO
You see scams. I see an elder you almost dropped.

SECURITY GUARD
(stuttering)
I was doing my job—

HAN MOMO
(turning to GRANDFATHER JIANG)
Any injuries?

GRANDFATHER JIANG
(smiling)
Not even a bruise. Young lady, you're quite righteous. What's your name?

HAN MOMO
Han Momo. Call me Momo.

GRANDFATHER JIANG
Momo. Spirited. My grandson lacks that.

HAN MOMO
(surprised)
Grandpa, I don't—

GRANDFATHER JIANG
Oh right, he's late. I'll introduce you.

HAN MOMO
(waving her hands)
No, no. I'm not marrying anyone. I have deliveries.

GRANDFATHER JIANG
continuation:
(nodding)
Focus is good.

HAN MOMO's phone rings. She answers, the screen cracked.

HAN MOMO
(on the phone)
At the gate. Two minutes.

She pockets the phone.

HAN MOMO
(to GRANDFATHER JIANG)
Gotta go. Here—

HAN MOMO tears a page from her notepad, scribbles, hands it to GRANDFATHER JIANG.

HAN MOMO
My number. If you need help.

GRANDFATHER JIANG
(taking the note)
You give this to old strangers?

HAN MOMO
(grinning)
You're not a stranger. You're family to someone.

HAN MOMO revs her scooter and rides away.

GRANDFATHER JIANG
Drive safely!

SECURITY GUARD
(impatiently)
She's gone. You need to leave too.

A black luxury car stops. JIANG BEICHEN steps out in a tailored suit, tie loosened, BODYGUARDS flanking him.

BODYGUARDS
(bowing)
Welcome back, sir.

The SECURITY GUARD's legs give out. He collapses.

SECURITY GUARD
(shocked)
Master Jiang... he's your—

JIANG BEICHEN
(weary)
Get up. Apologize.

GRANDFATHER JIANG
You missed her. Your future wife.

JIANG BEICHEN
(confused)
Grandpa, I flew in from Tokyo. What—

GRANDFATHER JIANG
(holding up the note)
She gave me this. Before she knew. Blind date. Now.

GRANDFATHER JIANG grabs JIANG BEICHEN's arm, dragging him.

JIANG BEICHEN
(being dragged)
Ahhh! Grandpa, no! Someone save me!

title: Resigning the Chief Minister
description: The dying Chief Minister Shen Qi calls for his wife Liu Mianmian, but an imperial edict after his death elevates his mistress to equal status, shocking his widow.
context:
Title: Resigning the Chief Minister
Description: The dying Chief Minister Shen Qi calls for his wife Liu Mianmian, but an imperial edict after his death elevates his mistress to equal status, shocking his widow.

INT. BEDROOM - NIGHT

Chief Minister SHEN QI lies in bed, his breath fading.

SHEN QI
(whispering)
Mianmian... the pendant...

Chief Minister's wife LIU MIANMIAN sits beside the bed, tears streaming down her face.

LIU MIANMIAN
(voice tight)
She already wears hers.

SHEN QI
(gasping)
Forgive... Mianmian...

SHEN QI finishes speaking, his hand drops, and he passes away.

LIU MIANMIAN
(in grief)
Shen Qi... I'm here...

LIU MIANMIAN holds SHEN QI's hand, sobbing uncontrollably.

LIU MIANMIAN
(crying out)
You gave me that name... you gave me that name...
continuation:
EXT. STREET - DAY

A funeral procession moves along the street, paper money fluttering in the air. LIU MIANMIAN, dressed in mourning clothes, walks at the front holding SHEN QI's memorial tablet, her expression hollow.

PASSERBY A (V.O.)
The Chief Minister's widow walks alone.

PASSERBY B (V.O.)
Strange—no male heir to lead the rites.

A MESSENGER rides up on horseback at full speed.

MESSENGER
(shouting)
Imperial edict has arrived!

A EUNUCH holding an imperial edict walks up to LIU MIANMIAN.

EUNUCH
Liu Mianmian, receive the edict.

LIU MIANMIAN, holding the memorial tablet, slowly kneels down.

EUNUCH
(unrolling the edict)
By the mandate of Heaven, the Emperor decrees: In recognition of Chief Minister Shen Qi's service, his deathbed petition is granted. His first wife Zhao MIANMIAN and second wife Liu Mianmian shall both hold equal status as wives. The eldest son, Shen Cheng of Zhao, inherits the estate. By this decree.

The surrounding crowd erupts in discussion.

PASSERBY C (V.O.)
A mistress elevated?

PASSERBY D (V.O.)
Both named Mianmian?

LIU MIANMIAN looks up in disbelief.

LIU MIANMIAN
(voice trembling)
Her name... was also Mianmian?

title: This Mom Is Not So Calm
description: An elderly mother, rejected by her children on a snowy night, collapses in despair and awakens in the 1970s, given a second chance to relive her life.
context:
Title: This Mom Is Not So Calm
Description: An elderly mother, rejected by her children on a snowy night, collapses in despair and awakens in the 1970s, given a second chance to relive her life.

EXT. XIANG BEI'S HOUSE - NIGHT

Heavy snow falls. Elderly XIA YUEE, leaning on a cane, knocks hard on the door.

XIA YUEE
Xiang Bei. It's your mother. Just for tonight. The doctor said—

The door opens a crack. XIANG BEI'S WIFE's face appears.

XIANG BEI'S WIFE
The doctor said you need rest. Not our problem. Third brother's turn.

She slams the door. XIA YUEE touches the eviction notice taped beside it, then turns away.

EXT. XIANG DONG'S HOUSE - NIGHT

XIA YUEE huddles against a door curtain, her voice weak.

XIA YUEE
Xiang Dong. Wen Ying. I brought the dumplings you like. I'll leave them—

WEN YING (O.S.)
We don't want your food! Go bother Xiang Nan. It's his month!

XIA YUEE
Wen Ying, I haven't eaten in two days. Just some hot water—

WEN YING (O.S.)
There's a tap at the bus station!

XIA YUEE collapses against the door, then forces herself to stand.
continuation:
EXT. ALLEY - NIGHT

XIA YUEE staggers between houses. Through a window, she sees a family having dinner. Her eyes blur.

YOUNG XIANG BEI (O.S.)
Mom! You promised!

She stops. At the alley's end, FOUR CHILDREN wave—her sons and daughter, ages 8-12, in patched 1970s clothes.

FLASHBACK TO:

INT. OLD HOUSE - DAY (1970S)

Young XIA YUEE (30s) darns socks by a coal stove. Four small children surround her, breath visible in the cold.

ELDEST SON
Mom, when I'm big, I'll buy you a house with heating. Promise.

YOUNG XIA YUEE
(smiling, hands raw)
You'll freeze first without mittens. Here—I finished yours.

She pulls tiny mittens from her pocket.

YOUNGEST SON
Mom, you always eat the burnt rice. I want you to have the good pieces.

YOUNG XIA YUEE
(ruffling his hair)
Mom likes the crunchy bits.

DAUGHTER
(quietly, touching Xia's scarred hand)
Does it hurt?

YOUNG XIA YUEE
Not when I'm with you.

BACK TO:

EXT. ALLEY - NIGHT

XIA YUEE runs toward the children, but her cane slips. She falls. Blood trickles from her forehead onto fresh snow.

Her hand reaches toward the phantom children.

XIA YUEE
(whispering)
You forgot... the promises...

Her eyes close. Snow begins to cover her.

INT. HOME IN THE 1970S - DAY

XIA YUEE gasps, jolting upright in bed. Her hands—smooth, young—fly to her face. She sees the patched quilt, the coal stove, the cramped room.

CHEN WEIJUN (40s) enters with a bowl of porridge.

CHEN WEIJUN
You fainted in the vegetable line. The neighbors carried you home.

He sets down the bowl. Xia Yuee stares at her children's mittens drying by the stove—identical to the ones she just dreamed.

XIA YUEE
(quietly, to herself)
No. Not this time.

She looks at the calendar: January 1976. Her jaw tightens.

FADE OUT.

title: What's Wrong With This Hotel - Episode 1
description: A hotel manager's fiancée is attacked by a masked intruder. Six months later, a young woman arrives at the hotel for a pool party, only to encounter her boyfriend working as a server.
context:
Title: What's Wrong With This Hotel - Episode 1
Description: A hotel manager's fiancée is attacked by a masked intruder. Six months later, a young woman arrives at the hotel for a pool party, only to encounter her boyfriend working as a server.

INT. HOTEL HALLWAY - NIGHT

YANG ZHIJIAN and HE SIQING stand together. YANG ZHIJIAN is the general manager of Guochao Hotel, HE SIQING is the chairman's daughter.

YANG ZHIJIAN
The quarterly reports can wait until morning. You've been here since dawn.

HE SIQING
(flipping through documents)
And let the board think I'm just a figurehead? I need these signatures tonight.

YANG ZHIJIAN
At least let me wait for you.

HE SIQING
Go home. Your mother's expecting us for dinner tomorrow. Can't have you exhausted.

YANG ZHIJIAN kisses HE SIQING's forehead, reluctant. He leaves. HE SIQING unlocks her office door.

INT. HOTEL ROOM - CONTINUOUS

HE SIQING enters the dark room, immediately sensing something wrong. Before she can react, a MASKED MAN emerges from the shadows, gloved hand clamping over her mouth, a blade glinting at her throat.

MASKED MAN
Cooperate, and you'll see him again.

HE SIQING's eyes flash with recognition. She bites down hard on his gloved hand, stumbles backward, grabbing a crystal paperweight. She swings it—misses. The MASKED MAN shoves her. Her temple cracks against the edge of the mahogany desk. She collapses, papers fluttering down around her like snow.

The MASKED MAN stares at her still body, breathing hard. He pulls out a phone, texts a single word: "Done."

SIX MONTHS LATER
continuation:
EXT. HOTEL BUILDING - DAY

The hotel gleams in morning light, a stark contrast to the night's violence.

INT. HOTEL LOBBY - DAY

SONG XIAOLING and her two best friends, FANGNI and LINGLING, walk into the hotel lobby.

FANGNI
(whispering)
I still can't believe we're actually here. Xiaoling, you're seriously connected.

SONG XIAOLING
(adjusting her designer sunglasses)
Connections are just relationships you haven't monetized yet.

LINGLING
So... survival strategy? Cheng's parties are notorious for those influencer types circling like sharks.

FANGNI
Speak for yourself. I've been practicing my laugh in the mirror for a week.

SONG XIAOLING
(smiling)
Don't worry. Sharks only attack when they smell blood. We, my dears, are perfume and opportunity.

They laugh, the sound echoing across the marble floor.

LINGLING
(hesitant)
What about... you know, your American boyfriend? The one you said is flying back soon?

SONG XIAOLING
Weixuan? Please. By the time he's back from his 'business trip,' I'll be in a whole different tax bracket.

FANGNI
(laughing)
You're terrifying. And I love it.

Lingling spots something, her smile faltering.

LINGLING
Xiaoling... is that—

FANGNI
(pointing)
Isn't that your boyfriend?

Across the lobby, HE WEIXUAN adjusts his hotel server uniform, tray in hand. His eyes meet SONG XIAOLING's. Hers widen, then narrow, calculating. His face drains of color.

SONG XIAOLING's expression freezes, but only for a heartbeat. She recovers, a slow, dangerous smile forming.

title: A Belated Confession
description: A successful CEO returns to his homeland after ten years and unexpectedly reunites with a woman from his past who has lost her memories of him.
context:
Title: A Belated Confession
Description: A successful CEO returns to his homeland after ten years and unexpectedly reunites with a woman from his past who has lost her memories of him.

EXT. AIRPORT RUNWAY - DAY

A private Gulfstream jet descends through afternoon haze.

EXT. HIGHWAY/CITY LANDSCAPE - DAY

A news broadcast plays over aerial footage of congested Imperial Capital.

NEWS ANCHOR (V.O.)
Imperial Capital Airport grounds all commercial flights for VIP arrival. President Gu Tingfei returns after a decade abroad.

INT. LUXURY SEDAN - DAY

GU TINGFEI (30s, immaculate suit, hollow eyes) studies a silver charm bracelet—tiny lotus pendants catching the light.

GU TINGFEI
(softly)
Ten years, Nan Yan. Are you still here?

SECRETARY FENG drives, professional.

SECRETARY FENG
President, hotel in ten minutes. President Zhang's banquet is confirmed. Also... your grandmother's office called regarding succession requirements.

GU TINGFEI
Marriage.

SECRETARY FENG
Her exact word was "ultimatum."

GU TINGFEI pockets the bracelet.

INT. HOTEL LOBBY - DAY

BODYGUARDS in formation. GU TINGFEI moves through, a man inspecting his kingdom.

BODYGUARDS
(bowing)
President Gu.

NAN YAN (late 20s, blazer, hurried) speed-walks while checking her phone. She clutches a portfolio.

They collide. GU TINGFEI catches her by the elbow. Papers scatter. A worn gold band drops, rolling across marble.

Their eyes meet—hers widen in shock, then blank confusion.

NAN YAN
(breathless)
Watch where you're—

SECRETARY FENG steps forward.

SECRETARY FENG
Do you realize who—

NAN YAN
(automatic apology)
Sorry, I'm late. Flight delays, client crisis—

She sees the ring. Panic crosses her face. She snatches it up.

NAN YAN
My ring—how did—

GU TINGFEI's eyes fix on the band.
continuation:
GU TINGFEI
Nan Yan.

NAN YAN
(steps back)
That's not my name. I'm—

She checks her phone: "Shen Group meeting MOVED to hotel. Emergency."

NAN YAN
I have to go. My client—

GU TINGFEI
You don't remember me.

NAN YAN
(flinches)
Should I?

A flicker—pain behind her eyes. She touches her temple.

NAN YAN
(whisper)
Why does my chest hurt?

She hurries toward elevators, ring clutched tight.

NAN YAN (V.O.)
That bracelet. I've dreamed it.

FLASHBACK:

EXT. STREET - NIGHT

Rain-slicked street. Headlights. A girl's hand, lotus bracelet sliding off. The screech. A scream muffled by thunder.

END FLASHBACK.

NAN YAN stops at elevators, breathing hard.

NAN YAN (V.O.)
Ten years of missing pieces.

She boards. Doors close.

INT. HOTEL LOBBY - DAY

SECRETARY FENG approaches GU TINGFEI.

SECRETARY FENG
President, your grandmother requires an answer by morning. The inheritance—

GU TINGFEI watches the elevator numbers climb.

GU TINGFEI
Draft a contract. I'll marry the woman who just left.

SECRETARY FENG
(stunned)
But you don't even know her name.

GU TINGFEI
She wears my grandmother's missing ring. She flinches when it rains. She'll remember.

(beat)

And I have ten years of empire to bargain with.

SECRETARY FENG stares as GU TINGFEI walks toward the banquet hall, determination in every step.

title: Retired and Spoiled by Three Sons
description: A sanitation worker mother is surprised when her three successful sons appear at her workplace to honor her.
context:
Title: Retired and Spoiled by Three Sons
Description: A sanitation worker mother is surprised when her three successful sons appear at her workplace to honor her.

INT. GARBAGE BAG - DAY

Close-up shot of calloused hands deftly separating plastic bottles from refuse, placing each in a canvas sack with practiced efficiency.

EXT. PARK PATH - DAY

LIU XIAOHONG, 58, in a faded red sanitation vest, works methodically. Her movements carry the quiet dignity of decades of labor.

A YOUNG MOTHER passes with her DAUGHTER, who points at a discarded toy.

YOUNG MOTHER
Don't touch that. Dirty.
(glancing at Liu)
See? That's why we keep studying.

The mother hurries away. Liu pauses briefly, then resumes her work, her expression weathered but unbroken.

She heaves a bag onto her tricycle. A "Qirong Village Elementary 40th Anniversary" flyer flutters from her pocket. She smooths it carefully.

LIU XIAOHONG
(to herself)
Can't be late. They want me to speak about... old times.

She mounts the trike. Her colleague ZHANG YAN, 60, approaches with a thermos.

ZHANG YAN
Xiaohong, stop. Try my daughter's new tea.

Liu slows. Zhang pours tea, her gold bracelet catching the morning light.

LIU XIAOHONG
That's lovely, Yan.

ZHANG YAN
(inspecting it)
She insisted. Said mothers should have something nice. How are your boys?

LIU XIAOHONG
Busy. They have their own lives.

ZHANG YAN
Sons. So capable, yet so distant.
(sipping tea)
At least mine visits every Sunday.

Liu smiles politely, a familiar wall behind her eyes.

LIU XIAOHONG
Every family is different.

The rumble of engines cuts through the morning quiet—first a motorcycle, then the purr of luxury vehicles approaching slowly.
continuation:
FU CHENGZHI, 28, athletic and impatient, stops his Ducati. He removes his helmet, scanning the area with nervous intensity.

From the Rolls-Royce emerges FU QINGSHI, 35, impeccably suited, every movement calculated. He carries a leather folio.

FU SUIYUN, 32, steps from the Range Rover in casual designer wear, a gentle smile already on his face.

Liu sees them. Her grip tightens on the handlebars. She tries to pedal away.

Two bodyguards approach—not blocking, but positioning themselves respectfully nearby, hands clasped.

The three sons walk forward as one, but each moves differently: Chengzhi with restless energy, Qingshi with deliberate authority, Suiyun with calm assurance.

They stop before her. Chengzhi speaks first, his voice rough with emotion.

FU CHENGZHI
Mom. Please. Just listen.

Liu looks up, her composure cracking.

FU QINGSHI
We know why you do this. We know you refused our money again.

He opens the folio, revealing legal documents.

FU QINGSHI
We established the foundation in your name. For sanitation workers. For dignity.

FU SUIYUN
(softly)
But we can't let them honor you today while you hide who you are.

He gestures toward the path, where STUDENTS and TEACHERS from the reunion are gathering, watching. Liu follows his gaze, seeing the community she served, the children she helped raise.

FU SUIYUN
Let us be your sons. Properly. Just this once.

Chengzhi kneels, gently taking his mother's gloved hands.

FU CHENGZHI
The world should know. Not that we're rich. But that you're proud.

Liu's eyes fill. She looks at her three sons—so different, yet so united in this moment. She nods, almost imperceptibly.

ZHANG YAN watches from the sidelines, her tea forgotten, as the school group begins to applaud.

LIU XIAOHONG
(whispering)
You always were too much trouble.

She lets Chengzhi help her from the tricycle. Qingshi removes his suit jacket, draping it over her shoulders. Suiyun picks up her canvas sack.

Together, the four of them walk toward the waiting school celebration as the bodyguards begin loading her equipment into the vehicles with surprising care.

FADE OUT.

title: Asia-Pacific Cup Final
description: A star footballer wins the championship but exposes match-fixing, only to be betrayed by his wife and agent who destroy his career.
context:
Title: Asia-Pacific Cup Final
Description: A star footballer wins the championship but exposes match-fixing, only to be betrayed by his wife and agent who destroy his career.

INT. FOOTBALL STADIUM - NIGHT

Seventy thousand souls hold their breath. Floodlights bleach the night sky. Zhang Ran, 28, Daxia's prodigal son, receives the ball at midfield.

COMMENTATOR (V.O.)
(voice cracking)
Twenty seconds left... Ran has nowhere to go... three defenders closing...

The stadium's roar muffles to a pulse in Zhang Ran's ears. He doesn't see the defenders—he sees the text message from this morning: "Lose or lose everything." He cuts left, then right, gravity-defying. Blue flame seems to trail his boots.

ZHANG RAN
(under his breath)
Not like this.

He strikes. The ball SCREAMS through the air, a comet of pent-up fury. The keeper stretches—fingertips brush leather—but it erupts into the net.

COMMENTATOR (V.O.)
(screaming)
GOALLLL! Zhang Ran! In the 94th minute! Daxia are champions!

Teammates SWARM him, but Zhang Ran stares straight up at the stadium lights, tears streaming down his face. Not joy. Relief. Defiance.

INT. PRESS CONFERENCE VENUE - DAY

Flashes STROBE like gunfire. Zhang Ran stands at the podium, trophy gleaming beside him. Charles, 60s, silver-haired, adjusts his FIFA lapel pin.

CHARLES
The integrity of our sport remains paramount. Mr. Ran, your performance was... extraordinary.

WORLD FOOTBALL ASSOCIATION FIRST DIRECTOR
We are honored to recognize Daxia's first champion in the modern era.

The Director extends a hand. Zhang Ran hesitates—just a beat—then shakes it. A reporter's phone BUZZES. Another checks his screen. Whispers ripple through the room.

REPORTER #1
Zhang Ran! Your contract's up—what's next for—

ZHANG RAN
Today is my last day as a professional footballer.

The room goes silent. Charles' smile freezes.

ZHANG RAN
(gripping the podium)
The Daxia Football Association and my agent, Fang Gu, attempted to fix this match. I have evidence. Financial records. Audio recordings.

REPORTER #2
(standing)
Where's the evidence? This is a serious accusation!

ZHANG RAN
It will be delivered to international authorities by end of business today. I cannot be part of a sport where a championship can be bought.

Cameras surge forward. Security rushes the stage. In the chaos, Zhang Ran locks eyes with a man in the back—FANG GU, 40, shark-eyed, already walking toward the exit.
continuation:
INT. UNDERGROUND PARKING GARAGE - NIGHT

Zhang Ran exits the elevator, trophy case in hand. His phone shows 47 missed calls. The garage is deserted except for his Maserati—fitted with a club parking pass.

FOOTSTEPS echo. Fang Gu emerges from behind a pillar, flanked by two bodyguards.

FANG GU
(smiling)
You couldn't just take the win, could you? The association was prepared to make you a god.

ZHANG RAN
They wanted me to be a puppet.

FANG GU
Puppets don't get mansions. Puppets don't get their wife's gallery funded.

ZHANG RAN
What?

LIU YITONG, 30, elegant in a silk blouse, steps from the shadows. She doesn't look at Zhang Ran. She looks at Fang Gu.

LIU YITONG
I told you he'd crack. Too much integrity. Very inconvenient.

ZHANG RAN
Yitong...?

She finally turns to him—her expression is pity, not guilt.

LIU YITONG
The Daxia Contemporary Art Museum wants me as curator. Fang made it happen. You made fourteen million a year kicking a ball. He made that in a weekend. That's the math, Ran.

FANG GU
(to Zhang Ran)
The evidence you think you have? It's already been edited. By your wife. She's quite good with computers.

Zhang Ran's grip tightens on the trophy case until his knuckles whiten.

FANG GU
But we can't have you running around playing whistleblower.

The bodyguards move forward—then stop. Fang Gu pulls out a vial of pills, shakes them like a maraca.

FANG GU
Olympic-grade anabolic steroids. Found in your locker. Your bloodstream. Your child's baby formula. That's a nasty custody battle waiting to happen.

ZHANG RAN
(low, dangerous)
Leave my son out of this.

FANG GU
Or what? You'll tweet about it?

He nods. The bodyguards seize Zhang Ran. One produces a syringe.

FANG GU
Just a small dose to make the story stick. You'll be asleep when the police arrive. Very tragic—Football King, couldn't handle the pressure, turned to chemicals.

Liu Yitong watches as they force Zhang Ran's mouth open. The pills rattle down his throat. He gags, struggles.

LIU YITONG
(quietly)
Don't fight. Xiaofan will still have his father. Just... not the one who plays football.

Fang Gu crouches, watching Zhang Ran convulse on the concrete, foam at his lips.

FANG GU
There never was a Football King. Only a ball-kicker who forgot his place.

He stands, wipes his shoes on Zhang Ran's jersey, and walks away. Liu Yitong follows, not looking back.

INT. NEWS STUDIO - DAY

The news anchor speaks with practiced solemnity. Behind her, Zhang Ran's face—eyes closed, being carried on a stretcher.

NEWS ANCHOR
Breaking: Daxia's football hero Zhang Ran hospitalized after acute drug overdose. Police sources confirm illicit substances found at his residence. The Football Association has stripped his title pending investigation. His career—his legacy—now hangs in the balance.

title: Transmigrated as Regent Prince
description: A mistreated office worker is knocked unconscious during a confrontation with his abusive boss and wakes up in ancient times as a powerful Regent Prince.
context:
Title: Transmigrated as Regent Prince
Description: A mistreated office worker is knocked unconscious during a confrontation with his abusive boss and wakes up in ancient times as a powerful Regent Prince.

TITLE CARD

INT. OFFICE HALLWAY - MORNING

ZHANG JI (28, rumpled suit, exhaustion in his eyes) checks his phone: 7:58 AM. A calendar notification spells "MOM'S SURGERY - Payment Due."

He sprints.

INT. OFFICE - CONTINUOUS

ZHAO LI (35, sharp suit, impeccable) sits at her glass desk. She doesn't look up when Zhang Ji enters, breathless.

ZHANG JI
(placing a folder down)
The market analysis. Before eight.

ZHAO LI
(flicking a speck from her desk)
Color-coded tabs, Zhang Ji. This isn't kindergarten.

ZHANG JI
You never specified—

ZHAO LI
(leaning forward)
I shouldn't have to. That's why you're you, and I'm me.

She pushes a deduction form: "-¥2,000." Zhang Ji's fingers tremble.

ZHANG JI
(very quiet)
My mother's medication...

ZHAO LI
(turning to her mirror)
Your personal life is not company property.

She applies lipstick. In the reflection, his face hovers beside hers—ghostly, erased.

ZHAO LI (CONT'D)
Powerless people have powerless problems. Now leave. You're staining my carpet.

Zhang Ji looks down—his worn shoes on pristine white carpet. He looks at his reflection in the dark monitor—hollow-eyed, invisible.

He slams his palm on the desk—not at her, but at the reflection. The mirror jumps. Zhao Li shrieks, lipstick streaking her face.

ZHANG JI
(stumbling back)
I didn't—

His head cracks against the steel filing cabinet. He collapses, unconscious. Blood trickles onto the white carpet.

TRANSITION TO ANCIENT BATTLEFIELD MONTAGE

War drums thunder through mist. SOLDIERS charge. A PRINCE on horseback raises his sword. The banner reads: "GREAT CHU."
continuation:
INT. REGENT PRINCE'S MANSION - DAY

ON SCREEN: Regent Prince's Mansion

ZHANG JI lies on a lacquered bed, eyes fluttering open. He wears crimson robes, embroidered with golden dragons. His hands—calloused, sword-worn—touch silk.

ON SCREEN: ZHANG JI - Regent Prince

He sits up, disoriented. The air smells of sandalwood and snow. His gaze lands on a bronze mirror—an unfamiliar face, his own eyes but older, harder.

On the bedside: a jade seal, heavy with authority. A scroll: "Regent's Edict—Power Over All Court Affairs."

ZHANG JI
(whisper, to himself)
...transmigrated?

Through the window, ARMORED GUARDS pass in formation. Their COMMANDER salutes him—a gesture of absolute loyalty.

Zhang Ji looks at his reflection. He tries on the proud smile from his fantasies. It feels like a mask.

He touches his temple—no wound. But the memory of Zhao Li's voice echoes: "Powerless people have powerless problems."

Now he has power. Infinite power. The thought doesn't bring joy—only the cold weight of the jade seal in his palm.

He closes his eyes. For a moment, he misses being invisible.

END SCENE

title: A Long-Awaited Promise
description: A schoolgirl vandalizing a car in a parking garage has an unexpected encounter with the car's owner, a celebrity fleeing from fans.
context:
Title: A Long-Awaited Promise
Description: A schoolgirl vandalizing a car in a parking garage has an unexpected encounter with the car's owner, a celebrity fleeing from fans.

INT. UNDERGROUND PARKING GARAGE - NIGHT

A black motorcycle screeches to a halt.

LIN LEYAO, a girl wearing a school uniform and a baseball cap, gets off the bike and shakes out her long hair. Her expression is cold as she walks toward an orange convertible sports car parked nearby.

She takes out a white marker from her bag and crouches in front of the car.

LIN LEYAO (V.O.)
You black-hearted boss, this is what you get for breaking my father's contract.

She begins to graffiti on the hood of the car.

EXT. COMMERCIAL BUILDING - NIGHT

SHANGGUAN YUNHAO, a young man wearing a bucket hat and sunglasses, walks out of the building flanked by two BODYGUARDS.

A large crowd of FANS swarms forward, screaming frantically.

FANS
(screaming)
He's here, he's here! Shangguan Yunhao! Shangguan Yunhao!

The BODYGUARDS struggle to hold back the fans, clearing a path for SHANGGUAN YUNHAO.

BODYGUARD
Make way, make way!

SHANGGUAN YUNHAO
Where are my parents?

BODYGUARD
They're in a meeting. Your mother is preparing dinner. Your stepmother is in the parking garage—with your car.

SHANGGUAN YUNHAO
(impatiently)
Don't follow me.

He pushes through the crowd, heading toward the parking garage.
continuation:
INT. UNDERGROUND PARKING GARAGE - NIGHT

LIN LEYAO is still focused on vandalizing the car.

SHANGGUAN YUNHAO enters the parking garage and sees the scene. He freezes. He removes his sunglasses, staring in disbelief.

He takes out his phone and snaps a photo of LIN LEYAO.

LIN LEYAO senses someone's presence and turns around alertly, seeing SHANGGUAN YUNHAO.

LIN LEYAO
Don't interfere.

SHANGGUAN YUNHAO
This is my car.

LIN LEYAO
(shocked)
Yours?

SHANGGUAN YUNHAO presses the car key. The convertible top automatically closes. LIN LEYAO jumps in fright and awkwardly stands up.

LIN LEYAO
(stammering)
This car... if you just touch up the paint, it shouldn't cost that much, right?

SHANGGUAN YUNHAO
You—

FANS (O.S.)
Yunhao! Shangguan Yunhao! That person up ahead looks like him! Over there!

SHANGGUAN YUNHAO sees the fans chasing after him. He pulls LIN LEYAO toward him and kisses her.

LIN LEYAO's eyes widen in shock.

The FANS catch up and see the two kissing. They stop in their tracks.

FANS
Catch up to him! Don't run away, Yunhao!

SHANGGUAN YUNHAO breaks the kiss and looks at LIN LEYAO, his eyes signaling her.

The FANS are still watching from a distance.

SHANGGUAN YUNHAO
(to LIN LEYAO)
Get in the car.

He pulls LIN LEYAO into the passenger seat. He picks up her bag from the ground and gets into the driver's seat himself.

FANS
Shangguan Yunhao, don't let him escape! Quick, quick, quick! They're over there! He got away again!

SHANGGUAN YUNHAO starts the car and speeds out of the parking garage with LIN LEYAO.

title: Return of the Dragon King
description: A legendary Dragon King loses his wife to terrorists and abandons his power to live in mourning, seeking vengeance against the Death God organization.
context:
Title: Return of the Dragon King
Description: A legendary Dragon King loses his wife to terrorists and abandons his power to live in mourning, seeking vengeance against the Death God organization.

EXT. CEMETERY - DAY

A crude wooden tombstone stands in the wilderness, inscribed with "Tomb of Beloved Wife Shen Wenwan."

LI PING'AN, in tattered clothes and unshaven, kneels before the grave, holding a wine flask. He pours a last drop onto the earth.

LI PING'AN
(quietly)
Every day I tell myself I'm done. And every night... I see you.

He touches the tombstone, then pulls his hand back as if burned.

LI PING'AN
(whispering)
I'm sorry.

His shoulders tremble, but he makes no sound.

DISSOLVE TO:

INT. ABANDONED BUILDING - DAY (THREE YEARS AGO)

SUPER: THREE YEARS AGO

The PRODIGY DRAGON KING (LI PING'AN) in black armor, sword at the DEMON KING's throat. Around them, defeated terrorists.

PRODIGY DRAGON KING
Your stronghold is dust. Your men are gone. End this.

DEMON KING's mask is cracked, blood seeping through. He coughs a laugh.

DEMON KING
You think this is the end? We knew you'd come. Death God knows your true weakness.

The Dragon King's grip tightens.

PRODIGY DRAGON KING
What did you do?

DEMON KING
(gasping)
Three squads. Fire Mountain Village. By the time you hear this... she's already ash.

The Dragon King's sword clatters to the ground. He grabs the Demon King by the throat.

PRODIGY DRAGON KING
(voice deadly quiet)
Liar.

DEMON KING
(strangled)
Check... your phone. The Death God organization... will be waiting.

The Prodigy Dragon King's palm strikes. The Demon King disintegrates.

PRODIGY DRAGON KING
Bastard! Go to hell!
continuation:
EXT. HIGHWAY - DAY

LI PING'AN's SUV screams to a halt at the village edge. He stumbles out, armor half-removed, phone showing fifteen missed calls.

EXT. FIRE MOUNTAIN VILLAGE - DAY

BING FENG meets him halfway, her expression saying everything. Behind her, Shen Wenwan's body lies covered.

LI PING'AN
(stumbling)
No. No, I ordered—

BING FENG
They were waiting. They knew our response time.

LI PING'AN pushes past her to the body. He pulls back the cloth. Sees the gold ring on her finger, the one he gave her before he left.

LI PING'AN
(voice hollow)
I told her she was safe. I promised.

He doesn't roar. He goes still, like something inside him has snapped.

EXT. CEMETERY - DAY (THREE YEARS AGO)

LI PING'AN digs the grave himself, places the wooden marker, then buries his Dragon King insignia at its foot. Subordinates watch from a distance.

EXT. CEMETERY - DAY (PRESENT)

LI PING'AN takes out his phone to make a call.

LI PING'AN
Dragon King hotline, transfer to Office Number One. Immediately issue the directive: activate the global Underground Dragon, exterminate the Death God organization.

OFFICE NUMBER ONE (V.O.)
Office Number One, directive received. Activating Underground Dragon, exterminating Death God.

MONTAGE: Rapid cuts of battle sequences across the globe. Underground forces mobilize, launching a comprehensive extermination operation against the Death God organization. Gunfire, explosions, flames shooting into the sky. Each team bears the dragon-and-sword insignia.

INT. OFFICE - DAY

The CHIEF watches the operations on wall screens. LI PING'AN enters in civilian clothes, face unreadable.

CHIEF
You're burning the network you built. For what? More blood won't bring her back.

LI PING'AN
It'll make sure no one else has to dig a grave like mine.

CHIEF
Your title... your power... you'll lose everything.

LI PING'AN
I already did.

The Chief hands him an envelope.

CHIEF
Her parents found this. She wrote it the week she died.

LI PING'AN takes it, doesn't open it.

LI PING'AN
When it's finished.

He turns to leave.

CHIEF
Ping'an... you can't outrun what you are.

LI PING'AN
(over his shoulder)
I'm not running. I'm just a husband keeping his promises.

He walks out, the envelope gripped tight. Through the window, we see him stop in the courtyard, looking at the sky—finally free of the weight, but utterly alone.

FADE OUT.

title: Domestic Violence Confrontation
description: A police captain visits a household after reports of domestic abuse, where a battered wife finally reaches her breaking point and decides to fight back against her violent husband.
context:
Title: Domestic Violence Confrontation
Description: A police captain visits a household after reports of domestic abuse, where a battered wife finally reaches her breaking point and decides to fight back against her violent husband.

INT. APARTMENT - DAY

CAPTAIN FENG stands at the door, clipboard in hand.

CAPTAIN FENG
Third call this month, Mr. Xiang. Explain.

XIANG SHIREN
(leaning against the frame)
Domestic bliss, Captain. Neighbors wouldn't understand.

AN NING emerges, bruised, holding DUODUO.

CAPTAIN FENG
Mrs. Xiang. What happened?

AN NING
(pointing)
He hit me. Again.

XIANG SHIREN
(before Feng can respond)
Captain, couples argue. It's normal.

CAPTAIN FENG
(interrupting)
It's not normal when we respond three times. I'm filing a report. Next time, charges are automatic.

He hands An Ning a card.

CAPTAIN FENG
Shelter. Use it.

Captain Feng leaves. Xiang Shiren locks the door, drops the smile.

XIANG SHIREN
You think that card helps?

AN NING
It proves you lie.

XIANG SHIREN slaps her.

AN NING
That's assault.

XIANG SHIREN
(grabs belt)
You want to report me?

DUODUO rushes forward.

DUODUO
Stop!

XIANG SHIREN kicks her away.
continuation:
AN NING
Duoduo!

AN NING rushes to her daughter.

AN NING
(turning, resolute)
I've had enough. I want a divorce.

XIANG SHIREN
What?

He grabs her collar.

XIANG SHIREN
Divorce? You think you can?

AN NING
I know I must.

XIANG SHIREN slaps her again.

AN NING
(tears streaming)
I protected you for Duoduo. But a leopard can't change spots. So either you kill me, or I'm divorcing you.

XIANG SHIREN
(grabs throat)
You want to die?

DUODUO bites his hand.

XIANG SHIREN
(screams)
You little—

AN NING
(grabs knife)
Let her go!

XIANG SHIREN
You dare?

AN NING
I dare. Because I'm done.

XIANG SHIREN
You don't have the guts.

AN NING
Watch me.

He lunges.

AN NING
(screams)
You forced this!

She charges, knife raised.

title: Return to the 70s to Find You
description: A woman trapped in an abusive marriage is killed by her ex-husband in 2024, only to wake up in the 1970s with a chance to reunite with her daughter.
context:
Title: Return to the 70s to Find You
Description: A woman trapped in an abusive marriage is killed by her ex-husband in 2024, only to wake up in the 1970s with a chance to reunite with her daughter.

INT. ZHAO LINGLING'S HOME - NIGHT

ON SCREEN: 2024 - ZHAO LINGLING'S HOME

A stormy night with thunder and lightning. A man kicks the door open.

LI YONG (O.S.)
Lingling! Don't make me break it down!

ZHAO LINGLING, with injuries on her face, huddles in the corner holding her daughter TANGTANG in terror.

LI YONG, wearing rumpled pajamas, paces around the messy living room. He picks up a wedding photo from the mantle, stares at it, then hurls it to the ground. Glass shatters.

LI YONG crushes the frame under his heel.

He pours wine into a glass, drinks. His eyes never leave Lingling.

LI YONG
You really thought a piece of paper would keep me out?

ZHAO LINGLING
The court order was clear. You're not supposed to be here.

LI YONG
Court order. (scoffs) You're still wearing my ring in that picture.

TANGTANG (whispering)
Mommy, I'm scared.

ZHAO LINGLING (quietly)
I know, baby. Just look at me. Only me.

LI YONG drains his glass, sets it down with a sharp click.

LI YONG
You took everything. The house. My daughter.

He picks up Tangtang's doll from the sofa, examines it.

LI YONG
What did you tell her? That Daddy's the monster?

TANGTANG (small, fierce)
You are a monster! You hurt Mommy!

LI YONG's expression darkens. He drops the doll, grabs Tangtang's arm.
continuation:
LI YONG
Come here.

ZHAO LINGLING
Li Yong, she's just a child!

LI YONG yanks Tangtang toward him, then shoves her away. Tangtang's head hits the coffee table. She slumps, unconscious.

ZHAO LINGLING (screaming)
Tangtang!

ZHAO LINGLING lunges. LI YONG catches her throat.

LI YONG
You think you can erase me? From her life? From your life?

They struggle toward the staircase. LI YONG's grip tightens.

LI YONG
Let's see you try to leave now.

He pushes. They fall.

ZHAO LINGLING's hand reaches desperately toward Tangtang as they tumble down.

MONTAGE

Images rapidly rewind. Calendar pages flip backward: 2021, 2016, 2008, 1995, 1987... Each date dissolves into older textures—wood grain, faded fabric, yellowed photographs.

INT. 1970S ROOM - DAY

ON SCREEN: THE 1970S - ZHAO LINGLING'S HOME

ZHAO LINGLING jolts awake—gasping, hand flying to her throat. Air comes easy. She stares at her hands. Smooth. Unblemished.

She looks around: peeling wallpaper, wooden dresser, a calendar showing 1978.

ZHAO LINGLING (breathing hard)
Tangtang...?

She spots a photo frame on the nightstand. Her younger self smiles back, holding a toddler—unmistakably Tangtang.

ZHAO LINGLING (V.O.)
1978. I remember this room. But I remember it differently.

She touches her face—no scars. Her hair is longer.

ZHAO LINGLING (V.O.)
Unless... Tangtang?

She clutches the photo to her chest, a sob escaping—joy and terror mixed.

title: Return to the Eighties: Protecting My Mute Wife
description: A man is reborn to 1981, determined to prevent the tragedy of his beloved being sold to a fool.
context:
Title: Return to the Eighties: Protecting My Mute Wife
Description: A man is reborn to 1981, determined to prevent the tragedy of his beloved being sold to a fool.

INT. SIMPLE BEDROOM - DAY

CHEN MO (20s) bolts awake, gasping. He stares at his hands—unlined, strong. His eyes sweep the room in disbelief.

CLOSE-UP: A red "double happiness" paper-cut, sun-bleached on the window.

CLOSE-UP: The same character warps on the old wardrobe mirror.

CLOSE-UP: The calendar: "April 1981."

CHEN MO (V.O.)
April 15th, 1981. I'm back.

KNOCKING at the door.

VILLAGER (O.S.)
Groom! The matchmaker's waiting!

CHEN MO
(whisper)
Groom?

CHEN MO (V.O.)
Last life, I brought betrothal gifts today. They sold Meng Ying by dusk.

He swings his legs off the bed, fists clenching.
continuation:
INT. BRIDAL ROOM - DAY

Red silk drapes the vanity. SISTER (20s) fixes her wedding earrings while FOSTER MOTHER (50s) counts cash. MENG YING (18, bruised) hovers near the wall, voice barely a whisper.

SISTER shoves MENG YING hard.

SISTER
Stay in your shadow. Don't you dare take what's mine.

MENG YING
(whispered)
What did I take?

SISTER
Everything you touch.

FOSTER MOTHER
(points without looking)
Food, clothes, husband—all hers. You exist to work.

MENG YING
(tears falling)
Please... just be kind to Chen Mo.

SISTER laughs, sharp and delighted.

SISTER
Don't worry about him. Mom took Zhao family's betrothal. Triple the amount. You're theirs now—their idiot son's reward.

She waves a red envelope with Zhao seal.

MENG YING
(tries to run)
I won't—

FOSTER MOTHER snatches her wrist, slaps her.

FOSTER MOTHER
You will. You're voiceless. No one will hear you scream.

VOICE (O.S.)
The groom has arrived!

EXT. COURTYARD - DAY

Lanterns sway over banquet tables. GUESTS murmur as CHEN MO enters with VILLAGERS carrying betrothal gifts. He scans the windows, sees a shadow struggling.

CLOSE-UP: CHEN MO's eyes—hard, certain, burning.

He takes one deliberate step forward. The courtyard falls silent.

title: A Life of Regret
description: A desperate father, crushed by medical debt, pushes his wife too far in a drunken rage over their daughter's treatment money, leading to tragedy and unbearable remorse.
context:
Title: A Life of Regret
Description: A desperate father, crushed by medical debt, pushes his wife too far in a drunken rage over their daughter's treatment money, leading to tragedy and unbearable remorse.

INT. LIVING ROOM - NIGHT

Medical bills cover the coffee table beside a child's crayon drawing. LIN QIANYU crouches among pill bottles, sorting them into a bag.

SHEN CHUAN slumps on the sofa, crushing an empty can in his fist.

The room smells of stale beer and antiseptic.

SHEN CHUAN
(mutters)
Two hundred thousand. Just like that.

LIN QIANYU
(quietly)
The coordinator called. They found a 9/10 match.

SHEN CHUAN
And?

LIN QIANYU
We have to wire the deposit by noon. The donor's ready.

SHEN CHUAN
Wire it. With what?

He grabs his jacket, fumbles inside.

SHEN CHUAN
The card. Give it.

LIN QIANYU
(desperately calm)
That's Niannian's protocol money. Experimental.

SHEN CHUAN
My cousin's guy can get us in. 48 hours.
continuation:
LIN QIANYU
It's not a table game.

SHEN CHUAN kicks the table. Bills scatter.

SHEN CHUAN
It's math! Double it or bury her!

NIANNIAN appears in the hallway, clutching a rabbit.

NIANNIAN
(whisper)
Daddy, you're loud.

LIN QIANYU
Go back to bed, baby.

SHEN CHUAN
Even she knows—

He lunges for her purse. LIN QIANYU pulls back. He shoves. She trips over the trash bag, head cracking the table edge. She goes still.

A pill bottle rolls across the floor.

NIANNIAN
Mommy. Wake up. Wake up now.

INT. BEDROOM - NIGHT

SHEN CHUAN sits on the stripped mattress, holding the crayon drawing. Police lights pulse through curtains.

SHEN CHUAN
(whisper)
We were supposed to be three.

He folds the drawing. Police radio CHATTER grows louder. It falls from his fingers.

A KNOCK on the front door.

title: Rebirth: Grandma's Regret Comes Too Late
description: A woman betrayed by her family is given a second chance at life after dying from neglect, determined to make those who wronged her pay.
context:
Title: Rebirth: Grandma's Regret Comes Too Late
Description: A woman betrayed by her family is given a second chance at life after dying from neglect, determined to make those who wronged her pay.

INT. HOSPITAL WARD - DAY

Close-up, the heart monitor beeps steadily.

ZHENG PANPAN lies in the hospital bed, pale-faced, wearing an oxygen nasal tube, unconscious.

A DOCTOR holds a surgical consent form, speaking to her FATHER, GRANDMOTHER, and ZHENG LAIYOU gathered around the bed.

DOCTOR
The patient suffered massive hemorrhaging from a miscarriage. She must have surgery immediately. Please sign.

FATHER
(hesitantly)
Um, how much will this cost?

DOCTOR
Ten to twenty thousand yuan.

FATHER looks troubled. GRANDMOTHER snatches the consent form.

GRANDMOTHER
(eyes wide)
That expensive!

GRANDMOTHER angrily tears the surgical consent form to shreds, letting the pieces fall like confetti.

ZHENG PANPAN (V.O.)
(weakly)
These are my relatives.

DOCTOR
(shocked)
Isn't this patient your own granddaughter?

ZHENG PANPAN (V.O.)
Just like the name they gave me, an endless waiting that never mattered.

FATHER
We refuse the surgery.

ZHENG PANPAN (V.O.)
Even my half-brother from the same father.

GRANDMOTHER
Her husband doesn't even care about her, why should I bother!

FATHER
(to the DOCTOR)
Um, when she's gone, just notify us. We'll need a death certificate to handle the funeral expenses.

DOCTOR
(in disbelief)
The patient has a very good chance of survival, and you're just giving up like this?
continuation:
ZHENG LAIYOU
(leaning to FATHER's ear)
Dad, I checked her company insurance. Natural causes pay double. Plus her apartment...

GRANDMOTHER's eyes light up upon hearing this. She immediately changes her expression and smiles.

GRANDMOTHER
Then hurry to the insurance company and ask. Get the money out and buy my good grandson a new car.

FATHER
(excitedly)
Right, let's go, go, go, go!

The family of three leaves cheerfully.

The heart monitor suddenly sounds an urgent alarm, the heart rate becomes a flat line.

DOCTOR
(shouting)
Quick, resuscitate immediately!

The DOCTOR and NURSES rush forward, performing CPR and defibrillation on ZHENG PANPAN.

ZHENG PANPAN (V.O.)
If life could start over, I would remember everything. And I would make each of you pay.

A rapidly reversing clock appears on screen.

INT. ZHENG FAMILY LIVING ROOM - DAY

ZHENG PANPAN is asleep at her desk.

ZHENG PANPAN (V.O.)
(echoing)
If life could start over... If life could start over...

ZHENG PANPAN suddenly wakes up, looking around in confusion.

ZHENG PANPAN (V.O.)
This is... home?

GRANDMOTHER storms in angrily.

GRANDMOTHER
You money-losing wretch! These dishes aren't washed, waiting for maggots to grow?

GRANDMOTHER roughly grabs ZHENG PANPAN's arm and yanks her up.

ZHENG PANPAN
(in pain)
Ow!

ZHENG PANPAN looks at GRANDMOTHER's vicious face, then sees her FATHER on the sofa in the distance, leisurely playing on his phone, completely indifferent to the situation. Her eyes sharpen, understanding dawns.

ZHENG PANPAN (V.O.)
I've been reborn.

title: Reborn: I Will Not Marry You, Your Highness
description: After destroying her life for unrequited love, a noblewoman is reborn to the moment before her downfall.
context:
Title: Reborn: I Will Not Marry You, Your Highness
Description: After destroying her life for unrequited love, a noblewoman is reborn to the moment before her downfall.

INT. SHEN AN'AN'S ROOM - NIGHT

SHEN AN'AN sits at a table, deathly pale. Blood stains her lips. She coughs, crimson spreading across the letter before her.

Her MAID (MO XIANG) hurries forward to support her.

MAID
Miss, you're so ill. The Fourth Prince should be here. I'll bring him, even if I must drag him from his chambers.

SHEN AN'AN stops her.

SHEN AN'AN
Let him be. I forced this marriage, tore him from his beloved. Five years of loathing is enough. In death, I set him free.

MONTAGE:

- SHEN AN'AN in a red wedding dress, shoved to her knees.
- SHEN AN'AN hurls a porcelain bowl, it shatters against painted doors.

SHEN AN'AN (V.O.)
Where is he? I sent you to fetch the Fourth Prince!

- SHEN AN'AN kneels among broken fragments, clutching a torn love token.

SHEN AN'AN (V.O.)
Tell him I'm hurt. Tell him to come.

- SHEN AN'AN in white robes points at a cowering woman.

SHEN AN'AN (V.O.)
Vixen! You dare seduce the Fourth Prince?

- XIAO YUAN grabs SHEN AN'AN'S wrist, casts her aside.

END MONTAGE.
continuation:
INT. SHEN AN'AN'S ROOM - NIGHT

SHEN AN'AN weeps in her MAID'S arms.

SHEN AN'AN
I became poison, Mo Xiang. Twisted by love I never earned. And my family... Father threw away his career, his honor--all for his monstrous daughter.

SHEN AN'AN
(grabbing the MAID'S hand)
Tell me, do they hate me? In their quiet moments, do they wish I'd never been born?

MAID
(choking up)
They love you, Miss. Always.

SHEN AN'AN
Then tell them... I'm sorry. And tell Xiao Yuan--if I could begin again, I would never marry him.

SHEN AN'AN collapses. The MAID screams.

MAID
Miss! Miss!

TRANSITION:

The world spins, twisting into a tunnel of light and shadow.

INT. PALACE BANQUET HALL - DAY

SHEN AN'AN jolts awake at a magnificent banquet. She blinks, disoriented.

Her PARENTS sit together, alive and smiling, not far away.

Dancers perform in the center. An OFFICIAL raises his cup.

OFFICIAL
Congratulations to the Fourth Prince on suppressing the bandits!

SHEN AN'AN follows his voice to XIAO YUAN, young and proud, accepting praise.

SHEN AN'AN
(internal)
The banquet. Five years ago. Have I been... reborn?

SHEN AN'AN looks at her unblemished hands. A small, sharp smile forms--disbelief and possibility warring in her eyes.

FADE OUT.

title: Reborn as a Mystic Heiress: My Ex Cries
description: A woman who sacrificed everything for her lover is betrayed and left brain-dead, only to awaken with mysterious powers after a celestial tribulation scene appears on the moon.
context:
Title: Reborn as a Mystic Heiress: My Ex Cries
Description: A woman who sacrificed everything for her lover is betrayed and left brain-dead, only to awaken with mysterious powers after a celestial tribulation scene appears on the moon.

INT. HOSPITAL ROOM - DAY

FENG QIAO'AN stands by the hospital bed, looking at the unconscious YE ZHIQIU.

FENG QIAO'AN (V.O.)
Still breathing. What a disappointment.

A television in the room is broadcasting the news.

NEWS ANCHOR (V.O.)
The Shenlong satellite has transmitted the latest images from the moon, showing what appears to be a mythical tribulation scene.

On the TV screen, a woman in ancient costume (YE ZHIQIU) is undergoing tribulation. She looks anguished, finally coughing up blood and collapsing, transforming into a golden light.

Back in the hospital room, a DOCTOR and NURSE are talking with FENG QIAO'AN.

NURSE
Doctor, any change?

DOCTOR
Medically speaking, the probability of recovering from brain death is almost zero.

FENG QIAO'AN takes out a black bank card and slips it into the DOCTOR's pocket.

FENG QIAO'AN
I will cover all treatment costs for this patient. Please think of something.

DOCTOR
(taking the card)
We will do our best to save her.

The DOCTOR and NURSE leave. FENG QIAO'AN looks at YE ZHIQIU.

FENG QIAO'AN (V.O.)
A dead ex-lover brings questions. A sleeping one... just vanishes.

FENG QIAO'AN turns to leave, but then returns and picks up a lunch box.
continuation:
EXT. STREET - NIGHT (FLASHBACK)

A rainy night. Young YE ZHIQIU and FENG QIAO'AN share an umbrella. YE ZHIQIU hands FENG QIAO'AN a lunch box filled with cash.

YE ZHIQIU
My overtime pay. For your MBA application.

FENG QIAO'AN
Zhiqiu...

YE ZHIQIU
Just come back to me.

INT. CAFE - DAY (FLASHBACK)

FENG QIAO'AN is dressed elegantly, sitting across from an anxious YE ZHIQIU.

FENG QIAO'AN
The Lu family is reviewing my proposal. I can't have complications now.

FENG QIAO'AN pushes papers in front of YE ZHIQIU.

YE ZHIQIU
(sliding a paper across)
Is this... complicated?

FENG QIAO'AN unfolds it: a pregnancy test report. His expression changes drastically. He pulls out a bank card from his pocket.

FENG QIAO'AN
One million. Take care of it.

INT. BATHROOM - DAY (FLASHBACK)

YE ZHIQIU is soaking wet, collapsed on the bathroom floor. Her wrist shows self-inflicted wounds, blood stains everywhere.

DOCTOR (V.O.)
Miss Ye, overwork not only caused your miscarriage, but you've also developed severe pelvic inflammation. You may be infertile for life. Where is the baby's father?

YE ZHIQIU collapses on the floor in despair.

INT. HOSPITAL ROOM - DAY

FENG QIAO'AN scoops up liquid food with a spoon, trying to feed the unconscious YE ZHIQIU.

FENG QIAO'AN
Drink.

FENG QIAO'AN (V.O.)
I built everything. You don't get to ruin it.

FENG QIAO'AN
(impatiently)
Drink.

He shoves the spoon. Liquid dribbles from her mouth.

FENG QIAO'AN
(harshly)
Drink it!

Suddenly, YE ZHIQIU's eyes snap open, her pupils turning pure white. An invisible force overwhelms FENG QIAO'AN.

The lunch box trembles, then lifts off the table, hovering.

FENG QIAO'AN shows a terrified expression.

FADE OUT.

title: Reborn Chubby Wife's Counterattack - The General Can't Handle It
description: A modern scientist dies in an explosion and is reborn into the body of a betrayed bride on her wedding day, seeking revenge against her unfaithful fiancé.
context:
Title: Reborn Chubby Wife's Counterattack - The General Can't Handle It
Description: A modern scientist dies in an explosion and is reborn into the body of a betrayed bride on her wedding day, seeking revenge against her unfaithful fiancé.

EXT. SHEN RESIDENCE - DAY

Festive music spills from the courtyard. Red petals drift across a plaque: "Shen Residence."

SHEN YIRAN, resplendent in wedding red, extends a hand toward the bridal sedan.

SERVANT
The bride approaches!

GUEST #1
What a match!

GUEST #2
May they prosper!

Shen Yiran's smile freezes. The music warps, discordant.

From the sedan, a figure in bridal red emerges—TANG WANQING, cleavers glinting in each hand. Her eyes lock onto Shen Yiran like a predator.

GUEST #2
(whispering)
Is that...?

The crowd recoils. A child drops wedding candy.

YOUNG GIRL
Mama, knives!

SHEN YIRAN
(tight smile cracking)
Guards. Restrain her.

Two servants lunge. Tang Wanqing sidesteps, her bulk becoming grace—physics repurposed.
continuation:
INT. TANG FAMILY MEDICAL LAB - DAY

Modern lab. MODERN TANG WANQING examines a black pill.

MODERN TANG WANQING (V.O.)
Subject 247. Success rate: 99.8%. Just one final—

The explosion rips through. Whiteout.

EXT. SHEN RESIDENCE - DAY

Tang Wanqing stares at her hands—smaller, softer, holding blades she never trained with.

TANG WANQING (V.O.)
New variables. Foreign architecture. Period clothing. Calculating—

She winces, memories cramming into her skull like corrupted data.

TANG WANQING
(gasping)
System overload...

INT. BEDROOM - NIGHT (MEMORY)

Shadows. SHEN YIRAN and TANG WANYU entwined.

TANG WANYU
She'll be the hunter's problem by dawn. Then nothing stands between us.

SHEN YIRAN
Your sister's face when she saw us... shame she had to learn this way.

A door crashes open. ORIGINAL TANG WANQING stands there, trembling.

ORIGINAL TANG WANQING
(voice breaking)
How could you?

MADAM LIU materializes, stick already rising.

MADAM LIU
You brought this on yourself, girl.

The stick falls. The memory glitches—pain, then nothing.

EXT. SHEN RESIDENCE - DAY

Tang Wanqing's eyes snap open. Her grip tightens on the cleavers.

TANG WANQING
(cold, precise)
Shen Yiran. Your equation is fatally imbalanced.

Shen Yiran's face drains of color. His hand reaches for a sword that isn't there.

title: Dark Side of the Moon
description: In the year 2090, Martial God Wang Xian leads humanity's final stand against invading six-winged angels on the moon's far side, only to be reborn decades earlier with a chance to save the woman who believed in him.
context:
Title: Dark Side of the Moon
Description: In the year 2090, Martial God Wang Xian leads humanity's final stand against invading six-winged angels on the moon's far side, only to be reborn decades earlier with a chance to save the woman who believed in him.

INT. DARK SIDE OF THE MOON - DAY

ON SCREEN:
New Martial Calendar 2090
Six-Winged Angel invaders attack
Martial God Wang Xian leads humanity's elite
Final battle on the dark side of the moon

WANG XIAN (Human Martial God), covered in wounds, lies beside a crater on the lunar surface.

MICHAEL (Six-Winged Angel)'s holographic image appears, hovering in the air.

MICHAEL
Wang Xian, your race's elite are all dead. You struggle on just to save those ants on Earth. Is it worth it?

WANG XIAN doesn't answer. He struggles to pull out a photo card from his chest.

FLASHBACK

INT. INDOOR ROOM - DAY

YE MIYUE (Martial Academy Beauty) smiles at the camera.

YE MIYUE (V.O.)
Wang Xian, one day, you will become a Martial God.

END FLASHBACK

WANG XIAN looks at the card in his hand with Ye Miyue's writing on it. He shows a slight smile, then his eyes become determined. He grips the card tightly and struggles to stand.

WANG XIAN
In my days of weakness, only Ye Miyue believed that a waste like me could become a Martial God. Though she has died, this Earth is our eternal home, and of course it's worth protecting!

WANG XIAN extends his hand. A futuristic sword burning with red light flies into his grasp.

MICHAEL
(laughing)
Hahaha, you're so gravely injured, yet you still want to stop my race's conquest?

WANG XIAN grips his sword horizontally, gathering energy.

WANG XIAN
Death is nothing!

WANG XIAN's body explodes with powerful energy, instantly transforming into a silver high-tech battle armor with energy wings spreading from his back.

MICHAEL
Seeking death!

MICHAEL also transforms into red battle armor, spreading six metal wings, engaging Wang Xian in fierce combat on the lunar surface.

Their energies collide, light effects burst everywhere, and surrounding meteorites and ship wreckage are shattered by the energy waves.

WANG XIAN
Martial Way, Ultimate Ascension!

WANG XIAN unleashes even greater power, swinging a world-destroying sword strike. A massive sword energy sweeps across the entire battlefield, cleaving through Michael and her ship together, triggering a massive explosion.

After the explosion, a huge fissure appears on the lunar surface.

WANG XIAN in battle armor stands in place, extending his hand, watching as his body gradually dissolves into points of starlight.

WANG XIAN
(softly)
Miyue, this world... I protected it.

WANG XIAN completely dissolves into light particles and vanishes.
continuation:
INT. UNKNOWN SPACE - DAY

WANG XIAN jolts awake, finding himself lying on the floor of a modern-style room, wearing athletic clothes.

INT. NORTH FIST MARTIAL HALL - DAY

WANG XIAN sits on the floor of a futuristic training room, looking bewildered.

WANG DABIAO (Third Uncle) and a SERVICE ROBOT stand before him.

WANG DABIAO
Brat, get up!

WANG XIAN
(astonished)
Third Uncle?

WANG XIAN stands up, looking at Wang Dabiao in shock.

WANG XIAN
Third Uncle, weren't your eyes blinded?

WANG DABIAO
(laughing and patting him)
Hey, what nonsense are you talking about!

WANG XIAN
(confused)
That's not right. Weren't your eyes blinded during the alien planet campaign?

ROBOT
Hello Wang Xian, welcome to New Martial Calendar December 1st, 2024. This is North Fist Martial Hall.

WANG XIAN
(shocked)
New Martial Calendar Year 24? I've been... reborn? December 1st—this is the day Ye Miyue died!

FLASHBACK

EXT. RUINS - DAY

YE MIYUE lies in the ruins after an explosion, already dead.

ON SCREEN: Qin City suffered an S-class beast attack. Streets exploded. Ye Miyue died as a result.

END FLASHBACK

WANG XIAN
(internal)
In this life, I must save her!

WANG DABIAO
(putting his arm around Wang Xian's shoulder)
What are you thinking about, Xiao Xian? Third Uncle arranged a massage for you.

WANG XIAN
(breaking free)
Third Uncle, I have urgent business. You go yourself.

WANG DABIAO
(forcibly pulling him along)
Come on, come on, hurry!

WANG DABIAO pushes WANG XIAN into a room.

INT. MASSAGE ROOM - DAY

WANG XIAN is pushed into a dimly lit room.

WANG XIAN
(impatiently)
Third Uncle, I really have urgent business!

The door opens. YE MIYUE walks in wearing a school uniform.

YE MIYUE
Hello, I'm Masseuse Number 8.

WANG XIAN sees YE MIYUE and freezes instantly.

WANG XIAN
(shocked)
It's you?

title: Reunion: CEO Fu's Eyes Reddened, Humbly Confessing Love in the Rain
description: At a reunion party, Lin Ran encounters her ex-boyfriend Fu Xingjian, who used her as a tool to get close to his true love years ago, now a billionaire CEO.
context:
Title: Reunion: CEO Fu's Eyes Reddened, Humbly Confessing Love in the Rain
Description: At a reunion party, Lin Ran encounters her ex-boyfriend Fu Xingjian, who used her as a tool to get close to his true love years ago, now a billionaire CEO.

INT. PARTY PRIVATE ROOM - NIGHT

City lights streak across floor-to-ceiling windows. Young men and women drink and chat in a luxurious private room, the atmosphere lively.

LIN RAN, in a white suit, enters. She smooths her blazer, a habit when nervous.

ZHUO TING
Lin Ran!

ZHUO TING rushes over with a wine glass.

ZHUO TING
You made it.

She hands Lin Ran the glass, pulling her toward the sofa area.

ZHUO TING
(quietly)
Scoop just came in. Fu Xingjian's on his way.

LIN RAN
Six years abroad. Probably married with kids by now.

ZHUO TING
He chased Yao Ning there. Stayed six whole years.

ZHUO TING
(fingers tightening on her own glass)
Made you his stepping stone. You couldn't hold your head up in front of the whole school.

LIN RAN
Bad people don't always get bad karma.

ZHUO TING
Now he's Yutou Group's CEO. Worth billions.

LIN RAN
(pats Zhuo Ting's hand)
Ancient history. My 996 boss won't even let me have a ghost.

She checks her phone—three urgent messages light up the screen.

LIN RAN
Half a day off and they're already hunting me.
continuation:
ZHUO TING
Evil capitalists.

The door opens. FU XINGJIAN, black suit, gold-rimmed glasses, stands in the doorway. The room quiets.

CLASSMATE A
Fu Xingjian! Everyone stand up!

Everyone stands up to greet him.

CLASSMATE B
CEO Fu, it's been six years. Didn't expect you'd remember us.

CLASSMATE A
Yes, yes, CEO Fu, please come in. Here.

CLASSMATE A hands FU XINGJIAN a glass of wine.

FU XINGJIAN
(taking the glass)
Tonight I'm just a classmate. Enjoy yourselves.

CLASSMATE A
CEO Fu is so generous! Everyone applaud!

Everyone applauds and cheers.

ZHUO TING
(disdainfully)
A capitalist performing humility.

ZHUO TING glances at Lin Ran—her knuckles are white around the wine glass.

ZHUO TING
Let's go.

LIN RAN
And give him that power?

ZHUO TING
He's coming.

FU XINGJIAN walks up to Lin Ran and stops.
