FU XINGJIAN
Lin Ran. Long time no see.

Lin Ran looks up, meeting his gaze. She doesn't blink.

title: Reunited, His Love Remains True & Loving You is a Lonely Heart's Secret
description: A young woman's first love is torn apart by family tragedy and class differences, forcing her to make a heartbreaking choice.
context:
Title: Reunited, His Love Remains True & Loving You is a Lonely Heart's Secret
Description: A young woman's first love is torn apart by family tragedy and class differences, forcing her to make a heartbreaking choice.

INT. BASKETBALL COURT - DAY

A basketball flies toward SHEN NANCHU, who is walking.

HUO SHIYAN
Watch out!

HUO SHIYAN rushes over and catches the ball before it hits SHEN NANCHU. Their eyes meet, time seems to stand still.

SHEN NANCHU (V.O.)
That year I first met Huo Shiyan. From then on, he illuminated my entire youth.

MONTAGE

- Huo Shiyan carries Shen Nanchu on his back, running across the field, both laughing happily.
- The two fall onto the grass, laughing and playing.

EXT. GRASS FIELD - NIGHT

SHEN NANCHU and HUO SHIYAN sit side by side watching the night sky. A shooting star streaks across.

SHEN NANCHU
Look, make a wish, make a wish!

They immediately close their eyes and clasp their hands together to make wishes.

SHEN NANCHU/HUO SHIYAN (in unison)
I hope that in the future, Huo Shiyan/Shen Nanchu will be together.

They open their eyes and smile at each other.

INT. BEDROOM - DUSK

Five years later. SHEN NANCHU (23) wears a simple white dress, talking on an old phone.

SHEN NANCHU
(into phone)
I'm wearing the dress you sent. See you at the bridge.

She hangs up. Her STEPFATHER bursts in, reeking of alcohol.

HUO SHIYAN (O.S.)
(through phone)
Nanchu? The signal...

INT. LIVING ROOM - DUSK

STEPFATHER points at SHEN NANCHU, furious.

STEPFATHER
You stole from my drawer for that pretty boy! When I married your mother, I took on two parasites!

STEPFATHER grabs her arm. MOTHER rushes over.

MOTHER
She used her scholarship money! Let her go!

STEPFATHER
(to Mother)
Stay out of this!

He shoves MOTHER. She stumbles, knocks over a faulty SPACE HEATER. Sparks fly. STEPFATHER trips on the cord, falls. Curtains ignite.
continuation:
INT. BURNING LIVING ROOM - CONTINUOUS

SHEN NANCHU crawls through smoke toward her unconscious MOTHER.

SHEN NANCHU
(coughing)
Mom... please...

She drags MOTHER toward the door as flames grow.

EXT. HOSPITAL - NIGHT

Shen Nanchu's torn dress flaps in the wind as she stares at the building.

INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - NIGHT

SHEN NANCHU, dress bloodstained from carrying her mother, waits. A DOCTOR approaches.

DOCTOR
Your mother has third-degree burns. She'll need months of intensive care.

SHEN NANCHU
How much?

DOCTOR
At least two hundred thousand. Upfront.

The DOCTOR leaves. Shen Nanchu slides down the wall, trembling. GRANDFATHER HUO (70s, impeccable suit) appears with two BODYGUARDS.

GRANDFATHER HUO
Miss Shen. I'm Huo Shiyan's grandfather.

SHEN NANCHU stands, wiping her face.

SHEN NANCHU
Sir.

GRANDFATHER HUO
Shiyan is preparing his proposal. Our family has already chosen his fiancée. A suitable girl.

He produces a black bank card.

GRANDFATHER HUO
Five hundred thousand. For your mother's treatment. And your silence.

SHEN NANCHU stares at the card. Then at the emergency room doors.

SHEN NANCHU (V.O.)
That was the moment I learned love was a luxury I couldn't afford.

She reaches for the card. Her hand shakes.

INT. BRIDGE - NIGHT (FLASHBACK)

Huo Shiyan waits with flowers, checking his phone.

EXT. TRAIN STATION - DAWN

Shen Nanchu boards a train, the card clutched in her hand. She turns off her phone.

INT. HUO FAMILY MANSION - NIGHT (PRESENT)

Huo Shiyan (28, hardened) pours whiskey. His phone shows a photo: Shen Nanchu in the white dress.

HUO SHIYAN
(to himself)
Five years, Nanchu. You vanished without a word.

A BODYGUARD enters.

BODYGUARD
Sir, we found her. She's working at a coastal hospital.

Huo Shiyan's glass shatters against the floor.

INT. HOSPITAL WARD - DAY

Shen Nanchu (28, tired) changes a patient's bandages. She looks up. HUO SHIYAN stands in the doorway.

SHEN NANCHU
(voice breaking)
You shouldn't have come.

HUO SHIYAN
You left me a corpse. I came back for the truth.

He holds up the black card, now cracked in half.

HUO SHIYAN
Did you ever love me? Or was it always about the price?

Shen Nanchu meets his eyes. She reaches for her locket, opens it: a photo of them on the grass field.

SHEN NANCHU
I loved you enough to become someone you could hate.

The patient MONITOR BEEPING intensifies. Shen Nanchu turns back to her work, but her hand finds his wrist, just for a moment.

FADE OUT.

title: Daughter Shines After Double Ninth Festival
description: A mother mourns her daughter who was betrayed and driven to jump off a cliff five years ago, as painful memories resurface during the Double Ninth Festival.
context:
Title: Daughter Shines After Double Ninth Festival
Description: A mother mourns her daughter who was betrayed and driven to jump off a cliff five years ago, as painful memories resurface during the Double Ninth Festival.

INT. OLD DILAPIDATED HOUSE - DAY

The camera pans across a rundown farmhouse courtyard.

Cut to the interior, where a simple memorial altar displays a black and white portrait of YANG QIQI. ZHANG CHUNLING (Yang Qiqi's mother) is burning incense, her expression filled with sorrow.

ZHANG CHUNLING (V.O.)
Qiqi, time hasn't moved since you left.

ZHANG CHUNLING's tears stream down her face.

ZHANG CHUNLING
It's Double Ninth again.

INT. BEDROOM - NIGHT (FIVE YEARS AGO - FLASHBACK)

YANG QIQI awakens on a bed, disoriented, as a MAN photographs her. She clutches her torn blouse.

YANG QIQI
What did you do? Lili, why?

A phone on the nightstand shows photos uploading.

EXT. CLIFF EDGE - DAY (FIVE YEARS AGO - FLASHBACK)

ZHANG CHUNLING (V.O.)
Your best friend set the trap. Loans you never took. Photos you never knew.

YANG QIQI stands at the cliff edge, surrounded by LOAN SHARKS. She holds her phone, speaking, her expression desperate.

ZHANG CHUNLING (V.O.)
She emptied our accounts. Said it wasn't enough.

ZHANG CHUNLING (on the phone, crying out)
Qiqi, I sent the funeral savings! It's all I have!

YANG QIQI (into the phone, crying)
Mom, you and Dad are my world. Forgive me.

YANG QIQI hangs up the phone, her eyes resolute.
continuation:
EXT. NEAR THE CLIFF - DAY (FIVE YEARS AGO - FLASHBACK)

ZHANG CHUNLING and YANG GUOXIANG (Yang Qiqi's father) run frantically toward the cliff edge.

ZHANG CHUNLING
(heart-wrenching scream)
Qiqi! Don't!

YANG GUOXIANG
(heart-wrenching scream)
Qiqi! Please, no!

ZHANG CHUNLING
(heart-wrenching scream)
Qiqi!

ZHANG CHUNLING and YANG GUOXIANG reach the cliff edge, collapsing to the ground in anguish, looking down.

ZHANG CHUNLING
(crying out)
My baby girl...

EXT. CLIFF EDGE - DAY (FIVE YEARS AGO - FLASHBACK)

LIN LILI (Yang Qiqi's best friend) stands nearby, watching everything with contempt.

LIN LILI
Just photos. Can't face the shame? Pathetic.

LIN LILI takes out her phone, the screen displaying "Successfully transferred 80,000.00 yuan." She laughs triumphantly.

LIN LILI
Perfect! Their life savings and funeral money. All mine.

END FLASHBACK.

INT. OLD DILAPIDATED HOUSE - DAY (PRESENT)

ZHANG CHUNLING kneels before the memorial altar, sobbing uncontrollably.

ZHANG CHUNLING
We were helpless then. But not now.

A NEIGHBOR WOMAN rushes in, panicked.

NEIGHBOR
Chunling, something terrible happened! Your Guoxiang scattered paper money in Erniu's orchard, and Erniu has tied him up!

ZHANG CHUNLING
(shocked)
Guoxiang...

ZHANG CHUNLING's eyes widen in terror.

title: The Canary's Counterattack
description: Su Hui, kept as a caged canary by the powerful Shen Yan, is captured after her 99th escape attempt. Threatened with her sister's safety, she vows revenge.
context:
Title: The Canary's Counterattack
Description: Su Hui, kept as a caged canary by the powerful Shen Yan, is captured after her 99th escape attempt. Threatened with her sister's safety, she vows revenge.

INT. LUXURIOUS VILLA HALL - NIGHT

SU HUI sits disheveled on the polished marble, soaking wet, eyes hollow with defeat. Two BODYGUARDS in black flank her like silent sentinels.

SU HUI (V.O.)
A caged canary. That's what I am. That's what he made me.

A series of quick flashback shots:
- SU HUI sprints through torrential rain, headlights blazing.
- Bodyguards tackle her into the mud.
- She's dragged back, fingers clawing at the asphalt.

SU HUI (V.O.)
Ninety-nine attempts. Ninety-nine failures.

SU HUI (in flashback)
(screaming)
Let me go! Let me GO!

The shot returns to reality. SU HUI's jaw tightens.

SU HUI (V.O.)
But a cage is still a cage.

SHEN YAN walks in from the rain surrounded by bodyguards. He wears a suit and gold-rimmed glasses, his expression cold. He walks up to SU HUI, crouches down, and grabs her chin.

SHEN YAN
Why did you run?

SU HUI raises her head, her eyes full of hatred.

SU HUI
You destroyed my family, forced me to drop out, made me your secret while you got engaged. And you ask why?

SHEN YAN stands up and signals to the bodyguards.

SU HUI
(terrified)
No!

The bodyguards push in a trembling young girl (SISTER).

SU HUI
(shouting)
Let her go!

SISTER
(crying)
Sister, don't worry about me! Sister, run! Sister, don't worry about me, just run!

SU HUI
(struggling)
Let go! Let me go! Sister!

SHEN YAN
(coldly)
I won't hurt her.

SHEN YAN walks up to SISTER and examines her face.

SHEN YAN
(to bodyguards)
Let her go.

SHEN YAN
These eyes, nose, mouth - she looks so much like you.
continuation:
SISTER
(afraid)
No, please...

SHEN YAN
Too bad her eyes can't see. But that's good - she won't run around like you do.

SISTER
(crying out)
No!

SHEN YAN
Using her as your replacement would be a good choice.

SHEN YAN
(mimes a cutting motion)
So fragile.

SISTER
(screaming)
Please, no!

SU HUI
(shouting desperately)
Stop! I'll stay— just don't hurt her!

SU HUI
(compromising)
You want me to stay, right? I will! Just don't touch my sister!

SHEN YAN
(smiling)
Good. Then it's settled.

SU HUI rushes over and hugs SISTER.

SISTER
(crying)
Don't trade yourself! Just run!

SHEN YAN
Take her away.

The bodyguards drag SISTER away.

SISTER
(shouting as she's dragged away)
Sister! Don't let him win!

SU HUI
(chasing after)
Where are you taking her? Let her go!

SHEN YAN grabs SU HUI's arm and pulls her back.

SHEN YAN
As long as you stay here obediently, your sister will be fine.

SHEN YAN roughly pushes SU HUI onto the living room sofa and leans over her.

SU HUI
(struggling)
Let me go! Let me go!

SU HUI
(through gritted teeth)
Shen Yan! You killed my foster father, humiliated us. I'll make you live a life worse than death!

While struggling, SU HUI's hand quietly reaches into SHEN YAN's suit pocket, touches something, and grips it tightly. Her eyes flash with cold determination.

title: Iron Fist Mom's Search for Her Daughter
description: A mother's desperate search for her kidnapped daughter leads her into a dangerous confrontation with a human trafficking ring.
context:
Title: Iron Fist Mom's Search for Her Daughter
Description: A mother's desperate search for her kidnapped daughter leads her into a dangerous confrontation with a human trafficking ring.

INT. ABANDONED BUILDING - NIGHT

XIAO YA (17, exhausted) runs through debris-strewn corridors. Flashlight beams cut through darkness behind her.

The TRAFFICKER OLD WOMAN (60s, sharp eyes) blocks the corridor's end with two HENCHMEN.

TRAFFICKER OLD WOMAN
End of the line, little rabbit.

A HENCHMAN lunges. XIAO YA swings a metal pipe—hits his knee. He drops. She vaults through a doorway.

INT. ABANDONED BUILDING - GROUND FLOOR - CONTINUOUS

XIAO YA crashes into a flooded room. She scrambles toward a broken window.

The TRAFFICKER BOSS steps through the window opening, scarred face lit by moonlight.

TRAFFICKER BOSS
Ducks that fly through windows
break their wings.

He catches her wrist. Twists. XIAO YA screams.

The TRAFFICKER OLD WOMAN appears, breathing hard.

TRAFFICKER OLD WOMAN
Buyers land in three hours.

TRAFFICKER BOSS
Then we deliver quality.

He examines XIAO YA's face as she loses consciousness. Two HENCHMEN drag her away.

EXT. LUXURY MANSION - NIGHT

A Rolls-Royce stops at mansion steps. BODYGUARDS block REPORTERS.

YUN ZHENHAI (70s, silk suit) sits in the wheelchair, pushed by MO HANBING (30s, calm). His son XIN ZICHEN and bodyguard ALI follow.

REPORTER
Mr. Yun! Xiao Ya Zhang's mother
says police are demanding bribes.
Your foundation promised action.

YUN ZHENHAI
(smiling)
We donated five million to the
anti-trafficking unit. Trust the
professionals.

REPORTERS
Mr. Yun! Mr. Yun!

BODYGUARDS block them. Yun Zhenhai is helped into the mansion. The door closes.
continuation:
INT. MODEST HOME - NIGHT

XIAO YA'S MOTHER (40s, calloused hands) stares at her phone. XIAO YA'S FATHER (45s) sits at the table, a bottle between them.

XIAO YA'S MOTHER
You told her she was your greatest
disappointment.

XIAO YA'S FATHER
I told her to respect her curfew.

XIAO YA'S MOTHER
(angrily)
She's missing because of you!

She kicks the table over. Food spills. XIAO YA'S FATHER jumps back.

XIAO YA'S MOTHER
(grabbing his collar)
If you'd been a father—

XIAO YA'S FATHER
(pushing her away)
Breaking things won't bring her back!

XIAO YA'S MOTHER
(furious)
Waiting will?

She picks up a photo of XIAO YA holding a martial arts trophy.

XIAO YA'S MOTHER
Police want money. I want my
daughter.

She straps a knife sheath to her ankle.

XIAO YA'S MOTHER
You wait. I'm going to find the
people who actually know.

She pulls on a leather jacket: "IRON FIST GYM."

XIAO YA'S MOTHER
Don't follow me.

She walks out. The door hangs open.

XIAO YA'S FATHER looks at the photo. Pours out the wine.

INT. UNKNOWN LOCATION - NIGHT

XIAO YA wakes, bound to a chair. Across the room, GIRLS sit in cages.

The TRAFFICKER OLD WOMAN enters with a bowl of congee.

TRAFFICKER OLD WOMAN
Eat. Buyers pay more for healthy.

XIAO YA
(weak)
My mother will find me.

TRAFFICKER OLD WOMAN
(amused)
They all say that.

She tries to feed her. XIAO YA turns away.

TRAFFICKER OLD WOMAN
(sighs)
Stubborn ones cost us profit.

She leaves. XIAO YA works at her ropes.

Through a crack: moonlight. And footsteps. Running.

FADE TO BLACK.

title: The Seventh Son of the Northern King
description: After three years of brutal war, the youngest son of the Northern King emerges as the sole survivor of his family and a legendary warrior who turned the tide of battle.
context:
Title: The Seventh Son of the Northern King
Description: After three years of brutal war, the youngest son of the Northern King emerges as the sole survivor of his family and a legendary warrior who turned the tide of battle.

EXT. BATTLEFIELD - DAY

A scorched wasteland. Smoldering siege towers leak black smoke. Rain hammers down on a field of corpses. The Wu banners, soaked and tattered, flutter like dying birds.

Through the downpour, QIN CHUAN (25), silver-white armor dented and bloodstained, fights THREE ENEMY SOLDIERS. His movements are economical, brutal. He kills them, then stumbles against a broken war chariot.

He rips off his helmet. His face is hollow, eyes staring at the carnage. On his chest plate, six identical family crests are etched beside his own - each one scarred by a blade strike.

A WHITE HORSE nuzzles his shoulder. He mounts, gripping a bloodied spear.

QIN CHUAN
(voice raw)
I am all that remains.

His army - what's left of it - gathers behind him. Wounded, exhausted, but alive.

QIN CHUAN
(shouting)
For the fallen!

WU GENERAL
For the fallen!

SOLDIERS
(weak chorus)
For the fallen!

Qin Chuan raises his spear. The setting sun breaks through the storm, casting his shadow across the field of dead.
continuation:
INT. IMPERIAL PALACE THRONE ROOM - DAY

Silence. The EMPEROR (60s), jade crown gleaming, reads a bamboo scroll. His face betrays nothing.

EUNUCH CAO (50s), gaunt and watchful, stands beside the PRINCESS (22), who clutches her silk sleeves.

EMPEROR OF GREAT WU
The Northern King's bloodline... extinguished. All but one.

EUNUCH CAO
A heavy price, Your Majesty. But victory is ours.

PRINCESS
(finding her voice)
Father. Qin Chuan saved Great Wu. We must honor that.

EMPEROR OF GREAT WU
(studying his daughter)
Honor must be measured carefully. Power even more so.

GUARD (O.S.)
Your Majesty, Qin Chuan requests an audience.

A beat. The Emperor rolls the victory scroll shut.

EMPEROR OF GREAT WU
Let him come. Let us see what the war has left us.

EUNUCH CAO
(loudly)
Summon Qin Chuan!

EXT. BATTLEFIELD - DAY

Qin Chuan's horse picks its way through the dead. He stops at the body of the ENEMY GENERAL, still clutching a broken standard.

Fingers trembling, he pries a jade pendant from the dead man's hand. Six identical pendants already hang at his belt.

He doesn't look back.

INT. IMPERIAL PALACE THRONE ROOM - DAY

The doors open. Qin Chuan enters, still in his battle armor, the pouch at his belt. His boots leave mud on the polished marble. Blood and rain drip from his spear.

The Princess takes a step forward, then stops. The Emperor's eyes narrow at the pouch, the six crests on Qin Chuan's armor.

Qin Chuan meets the Emperor's gaze. No joy. No pride. Only the weight of what he carries.

The throne room feels very far from the battlefield. And yet, the war is not done with any of them.

title: Elder Brother as Father
description: A young boy desperately tries to find a home for his sister after their parents' death, flashing back to a tragic family dinner one month prior.
context:
Title: Elder Brother as Father
Description: A young boy desperately tries to find a home for his sister after their parents' death, flashing back to a tragic family dinner one month prior.

EXT. COUNTRY ROAD - DAY

CHEN DACHUN and CHEN WENWEN kneel before a silver sedan, kowtowing to a well-dressed MAN and WOMAN loading luggage.

CHEN DACHUN
(voice cracking)
She's all I have left. I can't keep her safe anymore.

MAN
Jesus Christ... stand up, kid. We're not—where are your relatives?

CHEN DACHUN
Dead. All of them. Please. She'll be no trouble.

WOMAN
(softening)
How old are you?

CHEN DACHUN
Twelve. Too young to work. Too young to be her father.

The woman crouches, studying Wenwen's face. Dachun pulls a small locket from his pocket.

CHEN DACHUN
(continuing)
This is our mother's. So she won't forget.

He presses the locket into Wenwen's palm, forcing her fingers closed.

CUT TO:

Black screen with white text: ONE MONTH AGO

EXT. FARMHOUSE COURTYARD - NIGHT

Fireflies drift through twilight. CHEN DACHUN helps his younger siblings—CHEN BIN and CHEN XIAOYUN—catch them in jars.

MOTHER (O.S.)
Dachun! Bring them in. The chicken's getting cold.

CHEN DACHUN
Last one, Mom!

He lets the firefly go. The children sprint inside.
continuation:
INT. FARMHOUSE - NIGHT

Oil lamp light flickers across a modest feast—vegetables, peanuts, and one steamed chicken. FATHER bounces CHEN XIAOYUN on his knee.

CHEN XIAOYUN
Mom only cooks chicken on special days! I want the drumstick.

CHEN BIN
Me too! I called it first!

CHEN DACHUN
(cutting calmly)
Drumsticks go to the youngest. That's the rule.

FATHER winks at Dachun, mouthing "good man."

MOTHER
Dachun, you're the oldest. You know what everyone needs.

CHEN DACHUN
Yes, Mom.

He tears the drumsticks, placing them on Bin and Xiaoyun's bowls.

CHEN DACHUN
(to CHEN WENWEN)
Second sister?

CHEN WENWEN
The wing tip. It has the best flavor. Mom always says so.

Dachun smiles, separating the wing tips for his parents' bowls.

CHEN DACHUN
Here. The best parts.

FATHER
You eat them. Dad's happy with peanuts.

MOTHER
And Mom loves vegetables. You eat.

CHEN DACHUN
(lowering his voice)
Please. I divided them already.

FATHER's eyes glisten. He squeezes MOTHER's hand.

FATHER
Our boy's growing up too fast.

MOTHER winces, touching her temple briefly, but forces a smile.

MOTHER
Then let's eat before it gets cold.

They raise their chopsticks. MOTHER sways. Her bowl slips.

FATHER
Wife?

She seizes, chair tipping back, and crashes to the floor.

CHEN WENWEN
Mom!

FATHER catches her head, shouting toward the door.

FATHER
Dachun—get Doctor Li! Now!

Dachun freezes, staring at MOTHER's pale face. Wenwen yanks his arm.

CHEN WENWEN
Go!

He bolts out the door. The remaining children collapse around MOTHER, wailing.

CUT TO:

EXT. FARMHOUSE - NIGHT (CONTINUOUS)

Dachun sprints down the dirt path, clutching the chicken wing he grabbed from MOTHER's bowl. His shadow stretches long under the moonlight.

FATHER (V.O.)
You eat, you eat.

The wing trembles in his fist. He runs faster, tears flying behind him.

title: The Gu Family Manor
description: A mysterious opera singer arrives at the Gu family estate, harboring a dark secret connected to the family's past crimes.
context:
Title: The Gu Family Manor
Description: A mysterious opera singer arrives at the Gu family estate, harboring a dark secret connected to the family's past crimes.

EXT. GU FAMILY MANOR - NIGHT

Night envelops the Jiangnan water town-style Gu family manor. Lantern light reflects on the river surface, rippling like shattered amber.

GU JINGSHEN (30s), in a crisp suit and gold-rimmed glasses, stands by the roadside, watching servants unload luggage from a boat. His expression sharpens.

GU JINGSHEN
(to passing SERVANT)
Expecting royalty?

The SERVANT freezes, two suitcases in hand, and bows deeply.

SERVANT
Second Young Master. The eldest young master has... entertainment from South Street. For a private engagement.

GU JINGSHEN
(expressionless)
How novel. You may go.

SERVANT
Yes, sir.

The SERVANT scurries away. Gu Jingshen adjusts his glasses, his reflection ghosting across the dark water.

INT. GU FAMILY MANOR - NIGHT - CONTINUOUS

QIN YINYIN (mid-20s), in a sapphire qipao trimmed with mink, emerges from the vermillion gate. Each step measured, deliberate. She moves like smoke.

From a shadowed corridor, GU JINGSHEN observes, notebook in hand.

Qin Yinyin crosses the courtyard. GU HAIJIAN (30s) rushes to meet her, pulling her into an eager embrace. During the kiss, Qin Yinyin's eyes drift open—locked on Gu Jingshen's distant figure. Her lips curve fractionally.

GU JINGSHEN
(quietly, to himself)
Interesting.

He makes a note.
continuation:
EXT. GU FAMILY MANOR COURTYARD - NIGHT

GU HAIJIAN leads Qin Yinyin toward the main hall.

LI LAN (50s), the Gu family matriarch, materializes from the shadows in a black silk qipao, jade bracelets clicking.

GU HAIJIAN
(startled)
Mother. You're still awake.

LI LAN
(fixing Qin Yinyin with a glare)
The night air carries... cheap perfume.

GU HAIJIAN
(defensively)
This is Miss Qin Yinyin. Huayue Tower's premiere performer.

Qin Yinyin offers the slightest nod, her smile a mask.

LI LAN
(circling her slowly)
Familiar. Have I seen you perform?

QIN YINYIN
(calmly)
I doubt Madam Gu would frequent such establishments.

LI LAN
(frostily)
Impertinent.

She turns on her heel, disappearing into the darkness. Qin Yinyin's smile vanishes. Her hand trembles—briefly.

FLASHBACK TO:

EXT. DILAPIDATED HUT - NIGHT

Rain hammers a lean-to by the river. LU YUNLAN (30s) pulls YI CHI (8) into a hidden crawlspace beneath the floorboards.

LU YUNLAN
(whispered urgency)
No matter what you hear, Yi Chi. Not a sound.

YI CHI
(silent tears)
Mother...

Lu Yunlan kisses her forehead, then slides the boards shut.

The door explodes inward. A younger LI LAN (30s) in white silk stands silhouetted, flanked by SERVANTS with clubs.

LI LAN
Where is she?

LU YUNLAN
(on her knees)
She's gone. I sent her away—

LI LAN
Liar.

A SERVANT's club descends. The sound of impact is muffled by rain.

Lu Yunlan crumples, gasping.

SERVANT
Madam—she breathes.

LI LAN
(adjusting her collar)
The river doesn't care.

She snaps her fingers. The SERVANTS drag Lu Yunlan toward the door.

LI LAN
(to another SERVANT)
Find the girl. Use the dogs.

Under the floorboards, Yi Chi bites her knuckle until it bleeds.

BACK TO:

EXT. GU FAMILY MANOR COURTYARD - NIGHT

Qin Yinyin touches her scarred knuckle, the memory fading. She looks up at the manor's dark windows.

QIN YINYIN (V.O.)
You wouldn't remember. You never do.

She straightens her mink coat and walks toward the main hall, each step a quiet promise.

title: Flash Marriage CEO, Don't Spoil Me
description: A woman's wedding day turns into a nightmare when her groom betrays her with her best friend, only for a mysterious elderly man to intervene.
context:
Title: Flash Marriage CEO, Don't Spoil Me
Description: A woman's wedding day turns into a nightmare when her groom betrays her with her best friend, only for a mysterious elderly man to intervene.

INT. WEDDING VENUE - DAY

The wedding doors slowly open.

OFFICIANT (O.S.)
Please welcome the bride.

AN RAN, wearing a white wedding dress and holding a bouquet, walks into the wedding venue. Her smile trembles at the edges.

AN RAN walks toward the groom TANG QINGYUN standing on stage. He steps down, takes the bouquet from her hands, turns, and extends it to—

JI TONG, appearing beside him in an ivory dress, accepts it with a gloved hand.

AN RAN
(shocked)
Ji Tong? This is my wedding!

JI TONG
(smoothly)
Not anymore.

TANG QINGYUN
An Ran, time to wake up. Did you think I'd marry a poor wretch like you? Six months of devotion for that loan. Consider it payment rendered.

AN RAN
(quiet fury)
You committed fraud.

JI TONG
The documents are signed, the house is collateral. Do you want to stay for the ceremony?

AN RAN
Shut up!

TANG QINGYUN
(stepping between them)
We're family now. When is it your turn to interrupt?
continuation:
TANG QINGYUN raises his hand. An Ran doesn't flinch. He smirks and lowers it.

TANG QINGYUN
You have no place here.

AN RAN
(voice shaking)
No place? I mortgaged my parents' house! I paid for this wedding! I gave you everything!

TANG QINGYUN
All voluntary.

TANG'S MOTHER rises from her seat.

TANG'S MOTHER
The Tang family needs a proper daughter-in-law. Not some barren charity case with delusions.

AN RAN
(stumbling back)
You people—

TANG'S MOTHER
No money, no family, no future. Who would want you now?

OLD MASTER (O.S.)
I would.

The wedding doors open again. An OLD MASTER in a white Tang suit, holding a cane, walks in with measured steps.

OLD MASTER
(to the room)
This wedding is void. The debt, however...

He looks at An Ran. Something flickers—recognition? Promise?

OLD MASTER
...has only just begun to be repaid.

He extends his hand.

OLD MASTER
Miss An. Shall we?

title: Flash Marriage Partner is From a Wealthy Family
description: A wealthy chairman's adopted daughter tries to find him a suitable partner, leading to an unexpected encounter with a kind street vendor.
context:
Title: Flash Marriage Partner is From a Wealthy Family
Description: A wealthy chairman's adopted daughter tries to find him a suitable partner, leading to an unexpected encounter with a kind street vendor.

EXT. GROUP ENTRANCE - DAY

Two black sedans drive through the gate of a luxurious estate.

LEI ZHIYUAN, a middle-aged man in a suit, gets out of the car. ON SCREEN: Lei Zhiyuan, Chairman of Lei Group.

A group of BODYGUARDS in black suits stand in two rows, bowing to LEI ZHIYUAN.

BODYGUARDS (in unison)
Chairman.

LEI ZHIYUAN adjusts his suit and walks into the building with the bodyguards.

INT. CHAIRMAN'S OFFICE - DAY

LEI ZHIYUAN sits at his desk working.

LEI MENGJIE, a young and beautiful girl, pushes the door open with purpose. ON SCREEN: Lei Mengjie, Lei Zhiyuan's Adopted Daughter.

LEI MENGJIE
Dad.

LEI ZHIYUAN
(looking up with a tired smile)
You're persistent, daughter.

LEI MENGJIE
(holding a stack of photos of women)
Seventeen prospects. Which one deserves you?

LEI ZHIYUAN
(glancing at the photos dismissively)
They lack authenticity.

LEI ZHIYUAN
But you, you're already 28. When will you prioritize your own future?

LEI MENGJIE
I told you, our fates are linked.

LEI ZHIYUAN
A standoff, then.

LEI MENGJIE
(pouting, but determined)

LEI ZHIYUAN
(laughing helplessly)
You leave me no choice. I'll engage with the process.

LEI MENGJIE
(immediately brightening)
Your word?

LEI MENGJIE turns and walks away.

LEI ZHIYUAN
Wait—

LEI MENGJIE (O.S.)
Bye, Dad!

LEI ZHIYUAN
(sighing)
That girl will be the death of me.
continuation:
EXT. ROADSIDE - DAY

LEI MENGJIE gets out of her white sedan and closes the door.

She suddenly notices the flower bed by the roadside, her expression changes, and she begins having difficulty breathing.

LEI MENGJIE
Why are there so many flowers here? Where's my asthma medicine?

She frantically searches through her bag, her body swaying, breathing rapidly. Her inhaler is empty. She drops her bag on the ground, and the useless inhaler rolls out, landing several meters away.

LEI MENGJIE falls to the ground, struggling to crawl toward the inhaler.

LEI MENGJIE
(whispered)
Help... please... save... me...

A middle-aged woman, SHI XIAOXIU, carrying large and small bags, passes by and sees LEI MENGJIE on the ground. ON SCREEN: Shi Xiaoxiu, Street Vendor.

SHI XIAOXIU immediately puts down her luggage and rushes over, pulling a spare inhaler from her own purse, helping LEI MENGJIE up.

SHI XIAOXIU
Easy, child. Breathe.

SHI XIAOXIU puts the inhaler in LEI MENGJIE's mouth, helping her inhale the medicine.

SHI XIAOXIU
Better now?

LEI MENGJIE's breathing gradually stabilizes, and she looks at SHI XIAOXIU with gratitude and dawning recognition.

SHI XIAOXIU
(gently)
There. You're safe.

SHI XIAOXIU helps LEI MENGJIE up, and LEI MENGJIE stands. SHI XIAOXIU turns to get her luggage.

LEI MENGJIE runs over to help.

LEI MENGJIE
Auntie... your kindness is rare. My father—

SHI XIAOXIU
(laughing, but moved)
I have a grandson waiting.

LEI MENGJIE
(pulling her back)
A contact. Nothing more. Until you're ready.

SHI XIAOXIU
(amused)
You're an unusual girl.

The two take out their phones and add each other on WeChat.

INT. APARTMENT ENTRANCE - DAY

SHI XIAOXIU's son LI DAPENG opens the door. ON SCREEN: Li Dapeng, Shi Xiaoxiu's Son.

LI DAPENG
Mom!

SHI XIAOXIU walks in carrying large and small bags.

LI DAPENG
Come in.

SHI XIAOXIU
(looking around)
Oh my, son, your wedding apartment is really nice!

INT. LIVING ROOM - DAY

Daughter-in-law ZHU XINYI sits on the sofa, looking displeased as they enter. ON SCREEN: Zhu Xinyi, Shi Xiaoxiu's Daughter-in-law.

SHI XIAOXIU puts a large bag on the floor and takes out a big plate of farm eggs.

SHI XIAOXIU
(beaming)
Auntie Liu's finest eggs—for your recovery, daughter-in-law. Perfect nutrition.

She hands the eggs toward ZHU XINYI.

ZHU XINYI suddenly stands up and knocks the plate of eggs to the ground. The eggs break all over the floor.

ZHU XINYI
(disgusted, voice cracking)
What kind of cheap stuff are you bringing into my house! So dirty!

SHI XIAOXIU freezes in place, her face full of shock and familiar hurt.

title: The Long Road Home on New Year's Eve
description: A pregnant woman's journey home for the New Year is disrupted when an entitled grandmother and her grandson take her seat on the high-speed train.
context:
Title: The Long Road Home on New Year's Eve
Description: A pregnant woman's journey home for the New Year is disrupted when an entitled grandmother and her grandson take her seat on the high-speed train.

INT. HIGH-SPEED RAIL STATION - DAY

LIN SHAN (28, pregnant, pale but determined) clutches a red envelope as her father adjusts her scarf. She slips the envelope into her bag—revealing a medical file peeks out.

LIN SHAN
I'll be back before the baby's born. Promise.

LIN SHAN'S FATHER
Your blood pressure medication—top pocket. Don't forget.

He taps her jacket. She nods, eyes glistening.

LIN SHAN
You take your heart pills. I'll call when I arrive.

She turns, pulling her small suitcase. Her father doesn't move, watching until she disappears through the gate.

INT. HIGH-SPEED TRAIN CAR - DAY

LIN SHAN steadies herself against a seat, breathing hard. She checks her phone—gestational diabetes meal reminder flashes. She dials.

LIN SHAN
(on phone)
Hey. Made it on.

INT. CEO'S OFFICE - DAY

XU WEI (40s) watches snowfall through the window, phone to his ear. His assistant Wu Chuan enters with documents, hesitates.

XU WEI
(on phone)
You sound exhausted. The second ticket—did they honor it?

INT. HIGH-SPEED TRAIN CAR - DAY

LIN SHAN
(on phone)
It's fine. Two seats, less nausea. I'll sleep most of the way.

She glances at her watch—30 minutes until departure. Passengers still boarding.

LIN SHAN
(on phone)
Gotta go. Love you.

She ends the call. A commotion at the car door—

WU SHUANGHUA (60s, aggressively anxious) drags a large red gift box and WU XIAOYUAN (7, headphones on, stimming with a fidget spinner). A CONDUCTOR blocks them.

CONDUCTOR
Ma'am, this is Business Class. Your tickets are Economy.

WU SHUANGHUA
My son bought these! Special seats for my grandson—he's sensitive!

She flashes tickets. The conductor checks—confused. Wu Shuanghua shoves past.

WU SHUANGHUA (cont'd)
Don't touch him! He has a doctor's note!

She spots Lin Shan's two adjacent seats—one with a medical cushion, one empty.

WU SHUANGHUA (cont'd)
Xiaoyuan! Here! Sit!

She dumps the gift box on the medical cushion, pushing Lin Shan's bag aside. Xiaoyuan curls into the empty seat, still spinning.

LIN SHAN
(quietly firm)
Excuse me. That's my seat. Both of them.

WU SHUANGHUA
(Not looking up, arranging bags)
Train's full. You can sit anywhere. Young people are so entitled.

LIN SHAN
I bought two tickets. This one—

She touches the medical cushion.

LIN SHAN
—is for my condition.

WU SHUANGHUA
(Barking laugh)
Condition? My grandson has autism! He needs space! You look fine.
continuation:
She gestures at Lin Shan's belly with contempt.

WU SHUANGHUA (cont'd)
Pregnant women ride standing all the time. Where's your manners?

A BUSINESSMAN across the aisle looks up from his laptop.

BUSINESSMAN
Ma'am, she has the ticket.

WU SHUANGHUA
(Snarling)
You stay out! My son is General Manager of—

She catches herself, looks around conspiratorially.

WU SHUANGHUA (cont'd)
(Whispering harshly to Lin Shan)
My son's boss loves children. This gift? Jade for his newborn. One word from you and I throw your bag out the window. Choose.

Lin Shan glances at the gift box—imperial quality, expensive. She looks at Xiaoyuan, who has begun rocking, humming. Her hand goes to her blood pressure monitor in her pocket.

LIN SHAN
(Dead calm)
That's assault. And that seat is mine.

She reaches for her bag. Wu Shuanghua grabs her wrist—surprisingly strong. Xiaoyuan's fidget spinner falls, clattering. He begins to moan, a rising sound.

WU SHUANGHUA
(Panicking now)
See? You triggered him! Fix this! Give him your seat!

The Businessman stands. Others look over. The conductor approaches.

LIN SHAN
(To conductor, steady)
I need my seat. And my medical bag. Now.

The conductor sees Lin Shan's ticket—two seats, medical note attached. He reaches for Wu Shuanghua.

CONDUCTOR
Ma'am, you need to move—

WU SHUANGHUA
(Voice breaking, not anger—desperation)
Please. My son's whole life depends on this meeting. The jade, the boy—it's all we have. She can have any other seat!

She clutches the gift box like a shield. Xiaoyuan's moaning gets louder. The whole car watches.

LIN SHAN
(Quietly, to Wu Shuanghua)
Your son's promotion matters more than my baby's safety?

WU SHUANGHUA
(Tears now)
You can try again. My son only gets one chance.

Lin Shan's face changes—recognition of something. She looks at the medical file in her bag, then at the desperate woman.

LIN SHAN
(To conductor)
Is there an empty seat in First Class?

CONDUCTOR
One. Last minute cancellation.

LIN SHAN
(Nodding)
Upgrade her. Charge my card.

She pulls out her credit card. The car goes silent. Wu Shuanghua stares, uncomprehending.

WU SHUANGHUA
What?

LIN SHAN
(Picking up Xiaoyuan's spinner, handing it to him)
Your son's future isn't worth a seat. It's worth two. Go.

She gestures to the conductor. He takes the card, leads the stunned Wu Shuanghua away. Xiaoyuan follows, looking back at Lin Shan.

LIN SHAN
(To the Businessman)
Could you help me with my bag?

She sinks into her seat, trembling, and pulls out her blood pressure monitor. The numbers flash high. She swallows a pill, alone in the crowded car.

FADE OUT.

title: Blood Awakening
description: A woman reborn with memories of two lifetimes seeks to reclaim what was stolen and avenge her father's death.
context:
Title: Blood Awakening
Description: A woman reborn with memories of two lifetimes seeks to reclaim what was stolen and avenge her father's death.

EXT. MAGNIFICENT TEMPLE - DAY

The camera overlooks a temple complex where a golden Buddha fountain flows. Incense smoke snakes upward with the Buddhist chants.

ZENG BAILU (V.O.)
Two lifetimes as one. The temple taught me patience. This life won't.

The camera cuts to the Buddha's weathered stone hand. ZENG BAILU, black leather over saffron robes, traces the carvings.

ZENG BAILU (V.O.)
You took his company. His name. His grave.

ZENG BAILU stands on the temple balcony, overlooking the city's industrial district below.

ZENG BAILU (V.O.)
Father, watch me return what was stolen. In both our names.
continuation:
EXT. WATERFRONT ROOFTOP - SUNSET

ZHANG TIANYI, 30s, bespoke suit, walks toward ZENG BAILU who stands at the edge. ZENG BAILU turns a JADE BEAD between her fingers.

ZENG BAILU
You traced my father's shell companies and hacked his sealed records. But you didn't find the ring.

ZHANG TIANYI
Miss Zeng, I'm only securing your inheritance. As agreed.

ZENG BAILU
Stop acting. Do you think I'm a fool?

ZENG BAILU laughs, cold as the wind.

ZENG BAILU
You're after the Master's Token Ring.

ZHANG TIANYI
Ring? I've never heard of it.

ZENG BAILU
Today, I expose you. Starting with how you knew where to dig.

ZHANG TIANYI's expression shatters, revealing something feral.

ZHANG TIANYI
Zeng Bailu, die!

ZHANG TIANYI rushes her, fist cocked. ZENG BAILU traps his wrist, the jade bead glowing between her fingers. She drives her boot toward camera. FRAME FREEZES on the bead's crimson light.

title: The Sacred Blood
description: A desperate mother learns of a child's miraculous healing blood and makes a tragic choice to save her own dying daughter.
context:
Title: The Sacred Blood
Description: A desperate mother learns of a child's miraculous healing blood and makes a tragic choice to save her own dying daughter.

INT. TEMPLE ENTRANCE - NIGHT

Thunder rumbles.

WANG PO, clutching a feverish child, staggers up the temple steps.

WANG PO
(hoarse)
Please! Anyone! My child—

A SERVANT opens the door, blocking her way.

SERVANT
No beggars! The Holy Mother prays within—disturb her at your peril!

WANG PO
But she'll die!

The servant shoves. Wang Po's grip slips. The child starts to fall—

A slender hand catches the child's arm.

HE NANWAN, the Lady of Zhenguo Marquis Manor, stands in the doorway, handmaidens holding umbrellas.

HE NANWAN
Let them in.

WANG PO
(whispering)
Thank you...

EXT. TEMPLE COURTYARD - NIGHT

The rain lessens.

GU BAOZHU (8), the Marquis's youngest, pricks her finger on a withered lotus pot. One drop of blood falls. The plant erupts into bloom.

GU BAOZHU
Mother! It worked!

She runs to He Nanwan.

HE NANWAN
(taking her hand)
Your gift is sacred, Baozhu. Never wasted.

She ties a silk ribbon around the wound.

GU BAOZHEN (10) approaches with a silver bell.

GU BAOZHEN
Your token, sister. The Miao bells protect us.

She fastens the bell around Baozhu's neck.

MARQUIS
(from the doorway)
Girls, inside. Now.

GU BAOZHEN
Father, does my blood heal too?

MARQUIS
Both you carry the gift. But it requires willing sacrifice—not theft.

HE NANWAN
You cannot force a miracle.

Wang Po, hidden behind a lantern, hears. She looks at her own child, limp in her arms. Her face hardens.
continuation:
INT. GIRLS' BEDROOM - NIGHT

Moonlight through paper windows.

Gu Baozhu and Gu Baozhen sleep, silver bells on their pillows.

Wang Po slips through the window, a cloth in one hand, a jade vial in the other.

GU BAOZHEN
(groggy)
Baozhu...?

She sits up. Sees the figure.

GU BAOZHEN
Who—

Wang Po lunges for Baozhen, clamps the cloth over her mouth. Their eyes meet—terror meets desperation. Wang Po's resolve wavers.

GU BAOZHU
(sitting up)
Jiejie? What's—

She sees.

GU BAOZHU
(screaming)
MOTHER!

Wang Po releases Baozhen—unconscious but breathing. She snatches Baozhu instead, lighter to carry. She runs.

GU BAOZHU
(kicking)
Let me go!

EXT. TEMPLE COURTYARD - NIGHT

Gu Baozhen stumbles out, gasping.

GU BAOZHEN
(croaking)
Mother... She took Baozhu... Wanted her blood...

He Nanwan bursts from the temple, face white. She sees the open window, empty bed. Thunder cracks.

HE NANWAN
(whisper, then shout)
Sound the alarm! The Holy Maiden is taken!

Torches flare. The hunt begins.

title: Zero Degree Ambiguity
description: A couple bound by a marriage of convenience struggles with their conflicting emotions as physical attraction complicates their agreement to stay distant.
context:
Title: Zero Degree Ambiguity
Description: A couple bound by a marriage of convenience struggles with their conflicting emotions as physical attraction complicates their agreement to stay distant.

INT. BEDROOM - NIGHT

A projection screen displays a romantic movie. On screen, a man and woman are kissing.

MOVIE FEMALE VOICE (V.O.)
This is a mistake. We're not supposed to—

MOVIE MALE VOICE (V.O.)
I know. Tell me you don't feel it too.

CUT TO:

WEN XUAN lies on the bed, hugging a pillow, watching.

WEN XUAN
(to herself)
Forty episodes for that.

JIAN YUCHEN appears at the door, pulling a suitcase. He looks exhausted.

WEN XUAN sees him and tenses.

WEN XUAN
You're back.

JIAN YUCHEN
The deal closed early.

He notices the screen. A beat.

JIAN YUCHEN
Our blueprint?

WEN XUAN
Background noise.

JIAN YUCHEN removes his jacket, folds it.

JIAN YUCHEN
Guest bathroom's leaking.

WEN XUAN
Maintenance comes tomorrow.

JIAN YUCHEN
Then I'll use this one.

He unbuttons his cuffs. WEN XUAN grips her pillow.

WEN XUAN
continuation:
I'll go.

JIAN YUCHEN
Stay.

He sits on the bed's edge, tugs the blanket lightly.

WEN XUAN
The contract—

JIAN YUCHEN
I wrote every clause.

Movie dialogue swells.

MOVIE FEMALE VOICE (V.O.)
We promised simplicity.

MOVIE MALE VOICE (V.O.)
We lied.

JIAN YUCHEN's fingers brush hers. She doesn't move.

JIAN YUCHEN
Three weeks. No messages.

WEN XUAN
You didn't either.

JIAN YUCHEN
I wrote twelve. Deleted them all.

She searches his face.

WEN XUAN
This is how deals collapse.

JIAN YUCHEN
Let's renegotiate.

He leans in. She could pull back. She doesn't.

WEN XUAN
Distance. Autonomy.

JIAN YUCHEN
Void the contract.

He kisses her. She meets him halfway.

The camera pans to their wedding photo—crooked.

ON SCREEN: TO BE CONTINUED

title: Shock, Poor Wife is Actually a High-Born Heiress
description: A woman endures humiliation in her husband's family, unaware of her true identity as a wealthy heiress, until fate intervenes.
context:
Title: Shock, Poor Wife is Actually a High-Born Heiress
Description: A woman endures humiliation in her husband's family, unaware of her true identity as a wealthy heiress, until fate intervenes.

INT. BEDROOM - NIGHT

ZHENG JIAMING and LAN XIN are intimately embracing.

ZHENG JIAMING
Lan Xin, you make me feel alive again.

LAN XIN
Your wife—does she suspect?

ZHENG JIAMING
Gu Wan? She's too busy scrubbing floors to notice anything. I married her out of pity, but she's been nothing but dead weight.

LAN XIN
Still, three years...

ZHENG JIAMING
Three years of charity. She should be grateful I haven't sent her back to that village.

EXT. STREET - DAY

GU WAN tends to a small herbal medicine stall. A CUSTOMER examines her goods.

PASSERBY (O.S.)
The city patrol is coming!

GU WAN
(to a customer)
Sir, you haven't paid yet—three yuan for the ginseng!

The customer disappears into the crowd. GU WAN scrambles to pack her wares into a worn satchel. Her hands move with practiced urgency.
continuation:
EXT. PARK - DAY

GU WAN sits on a bench, catching her breath. She counts crumpled bills in her palm—clearly insufficient.

GU WAN
(quietly)
Dr. Chen's consultation fee... and Jiaming's mother needs her heart medicine. There has to be a way.

She touches a simple silver locket around her neck—her only jewelry.

ZHENG HUANHUAN strides by with two friends, carrying shopping bags from designer stores. She stops, recognizing GU WAN.

ZHENG HUANHUAN
(tilting her sunglasses down)
Well, well. The charity case is playing shopkeeper now? How delightfully desperate.

GU WAN
(standing)
Zheng Huanhuan. I was properly married into this family. I kept your household running when your mother was ill.

ZHENG HUANHUAN
(clicking her tongue)
A maid's work. Nothing more.

She signals to her friends. They block GU WAN's path.

HUANHUAN'S FRIEND 1
Sister Huan, is this really your sister-in-law? She looks... provincial.

ZHENG HUANHUAN
Let me educate you. This is what happens when my brother tries to be noble. He saved her from poverty, and this is her contribution—embarrassing us in public parks.

She snatches GU WAN's satchel and dumps the carefully wrapped herbs onto the ground.

ZHENG HUANHUAN
Let's see what trash you've been peddling.

GU WAN
(trying to retrieve them)
Those took weeks to harvest!

ZHENG HUANHUAN
(coldly)
And they're worth exactly what you are. Nothing.

She grinds one package under her heel. GU WAN freezes, her hands trembling—not with fear, but restrained fury.

GU WAN
(low voice)
I am still your brother's wife.

ZHENG HUANHUAN
A title, not a truth. Remember your place.

HUANHUAN'S FRIEND 2
Maybe we should help her find her "place." The service entrance is that way.

They laugh. GU WAN meets their eyes steadily, a quiet dignity in her bearing that seems out of place with her worn clothes.

Suddenly, a convoy of three luxury SUVs pulls up. Black-suited bodyguards emerge, scanning the area. One approaches, his eyes fixed on GU WAN's locket.

SENIOR GUARD
(to GU WAN, formally)
Miss. We've been searching for three years. Your grandfather's estate awaits your return.

ZHENG HUANHUAN
(stunned)
What did you call her?

The Senior Guard turns to her with a look of ice.

SENIOR GUARD
Step away from the heir to the Gu Fortune. Now.

title: Mr. Huo, Your Wife is the Real Boss
description: Two strangers fleeing their arranged marriages collide, literally, leading to an unexpected connection and a case of mistaken identity.
context:
Title: Mr. Huo, Your Wife is the Real Boss
Description: Two strangers fleeing their arranged marriages collide, literally, leading to an unexpected connection and a case of mistaken identity.

INT. CORRIDOR - DAY

HUO XINGZHOU (29, sharp suit, jaw set) walks quickly through the corridor, three BODYGUARDS trailing behind—until he suddenly sprints for the exit.

BODYGUARD
Young Master Huo! The ceremony!

EXT. CITY STREET - DAY

JIANG YAN (27, leather jacket, disheveled wedding updo) walks down the street, checking over her shoulder every few steps.

JIANG YAN (V.O.)
Four minutes until they find the mannequin. I need a miracle.

A MOTORCYCLE roars toward her. Jiang Yan steps into the crosswalk without looking—the bike SCREECHES, stopping inches away.

The rider, HUO XINGZHOU (helmeted), spots THREE BLACK SEDANS turning the corner behind her.

JIANG YAN
(no hesitation)
Drive. Now.

She grabs the spare helmet, mounts the bike. The motorcycle PEELS OUT as the sedans screech to a halt.

BODYGUARD
(into radio)
Targets acquired. Miss Jiang is with the heir.

TRANSITION: Ten minutes earlier

INT. WEDDING VENUE - DAY

The EMCEE beams at the full venue.

EMCEE
Welcome the bride and groom!

The "BRIDE" stumbles—veil slips, revealing ASSISTANT XU in a wig.

ASSISTANT XU
She promised this wouldn't go viral!

GRANDFATHER JIANG
(rocketing to his feet)
Where is my granddaughter?!

MADAME HUO
(yanks the groom's mask)
And where is my son?

It's the BEST MAN, sweating.

BEST MAN
Huo Xingzhou left on his motorcycle.

MADAME HUO
(into phone)
Intercept them. They must not meet.
continuation:
EXT. HIGHWAY - DAY

The motorcycle weaves through traffic, sedans closing in.

JIANG YAN
(over the wind)
They're boxing us!

HUO XINGZHOU
Then we go where cars can't.

He swerves onto a construction ramp. The bike bounces wildly—Jiang Yan's arms lock around his waist.

A sedan tries to follow, bottoms out. The bike hits gravel.

They tumble. Jiang Yan lands hard, helmet striking Huo Xingzhou's. Faceplates slam together—through scratched polycarbonate, they're nose to nose.

JIANG YAN (V.O.)
...oh.

She scrambles up, breathing hard.

INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - NIGHT

DOCTORS wheel Huo Xingzhou—bandaged, unconscious—into a bay. Jiang Yan jogs alongside.

JIANG YAN
Will he—

DOCTOR
Concussion, compound fracture. Twenty-four hour hold.

NURSE
(handing a tray)
His personal effects. Are you family?

JIANG YAN
I... no. I just—

She spots his wallet. Inside: a formal portrait of herself, from the engagement album she'd refused to pose for.

NURSE
(seeing her expression)
Room 407. You can sign as "close contact."

The Nurse exits. Jiang Yan stares at the unconscious man, then at his wedding band—identical to the one she'd thrown in a fountain hours ago.

JIANG YAN
(softly)
So you were running from me.

She reaches for the gauze on his forehead, hesitates.

FADE OUT.

title: The Mu Manor's Daughter's Wedding
description: A noble family's daughter marries and leaves home to travel to the capital, bidding farewell to her beloved family.
context:
Title: The Mu Manor's Daughter's Wedding
Description: A noble family's daughter marries and leaves home to travel to the capital, bidding farewell to her beloved family.

INT. MU ROYAL MANOR - DAY

The plaque of the Mu Royal Manor hangs high, the atmosphere solemn yet tinged with the sadness of parting.

MU CHANGXUAN wears a magnificent red wedding dress, a phoenix crown on her head, her features exquisite, but her eyes filled with reluctance to leave her family.

MU CHANGXUAN'S FATHER holds his daughter's hand, pressing the sword callus on her palm.

MU CHANGXUAN'S FATHER
Shengjing is not our Northwest. Shen Yan is a good man, but your temper is a blade. Sheathe it wisely.

MU CHANGXUAN (eyes brimming with tears)
Father, who will remind me to wear my cloak?

MU CHANGXUAN'S MOTHER adjusts the phoenix crown.

MU CHANGXUAN'S MOTHER
Your father checked the dowry list seven times. Write to us. Not just the good parts.

MU CHANGXUAN
Father, Mother, Brothers... Xuan'er is leaving. You must all take care.

MU JING, Mu Changxuan's eldest brother, has a serious expression.

MU JING
Imperial decree binds us to the Northwest. Not even for your wedding. Do not forgive us.

SECOND BROTHER offers a small falcon bell.

SECOND BROTHER
The capital speaks in whispers. Ring this at the northern gate.

THIRD BROTHER cracks his knuckles.

THIRD BROTHER
If Shen Yan forgets that elbow strike—remind him.

MU CHANGXUAN, hearing this, smiles through her tears.
continuation:
MU CHANGXUAN
Third Brother... the grain sacks are terrified of me now.

A shout comes from the distance.

SERVANT (O.S.)
The wedding procession has arrived!

MU CHANGXUAN'S FATHER holds back his tears, picks up the red veil, and places it over his daughter's head.

MU CHANGXUAN'S FATHER
Go.

MU JING takes his sister's hand and escorts her out.

EXT. MU ROYAL MANOR ENTRANCE - DAY

The wedding procession is already waiting at the entrance. The groom SHEN YAN wears red wedding attire, riding on a tall horse, looking heroic and imposing.

MU JING places his sister's hand into SHEN YAN'S hand. SHEN YAN takes MU CHANGXUAN'S hand and gently lifts a corner of her veil.

MU CHANGXUAN (playfully)
Trade me places. I'll take the horse.

MU CHANGXUAN'S FATHER (O.S.)
Xuan'er!

SHEN YAN
Cover it. Quickly now.

MU CHANGXUAN
Then next time, I'm the groom.

SHEN YAN
And I'd choose you anyway.

MU CHANGXUAN
Mm.

SHEN YAN replaces her veil properly, takes her hand, and walks toward the festive wedding sedan chair. The Mu family stands at the entrance, watching them depart, their eyes filled with blessings and reluctance.

title: Listening to My Daughter's Thoughts Made Me a Landlady
description: A young mother who can hear her newborn daughter's thoughts discovers her baby has superpowers and uses them to fight back against her scheming family.
context:
Title: Listening to My Daughter's Thoughts Made Me a Landlady
Description: A young mother who can hear her newborn daughter's thoughts discovers her baby has superpowers and uses them to fight back against her scheming family.

INT. LIN FAMILY VILLA - NIGHT (FLASHBACK)

A stormy night. Dark clouds cover the city sky. Rain lashes against windows.

NEWS BROADCAST (V.O.)
The National Meteorological Center warns of severe storms tonight, with potential power outages. Citizens should remain indoors while crews work to restore services.

A PREGNANT WOMAN lies in a pool of blood on the marble floor, cradling her belly. Her breathing is shallow. This is LIN MENG'S MOTHER.

PREGNANT WOMAN
(whispering)
I'll protect you... I'll bring you safely into this world...

Her hand slips. Lightning flashes.

EXT. CITY STREET - NIGHT (FLASHBACK)

An ambulance speeds through the downpour, sirens wailing.

INT. HOSPITAL DELIVERY ROOM - DAY

LIN MENG (25) lies on the delivery bed, drenched in sweat, pushing through exhaustion.

DOCTOR
One more push, Lin. You're almost there.

A newborn's cry echoes through the room.

DOCTOR
Congratulations. It's a girl.

LIN MENG collapses back, tears of relief streaming down her face as a NURSE places the baby on her chest.

INT. PRIVATE HOSPITAL ROOM - DAY

LIN MENG, in a hospital gown, sits on the bed cradling her daughter LIN XIXI. She touches the baby's tiny fingers.

LIN MENG
(softly)
You chose me. And I'll be the mother you deserve.

The door swings open. LIN ZHIWEI (50s, worn suit) enters with WANG AIJUN (40s, designer handbag) and LIN YANRAN (22, smug expression).

LIN YANRAN
(leering)
Already popped out a bastard? How efficient.

LIN MENG
(eyes flashing)
My daughter is not a bastard.

WANG AIJUN
You don't even know the father's name. What would you call it?

FLASHBACK BEGINS:
continuation:
INT. KTV PRIVATE ROOM - NIGHT

LIN MENG struggles against a SHADOWY FIGURE pinning her to a sofa.

LIN MENG
Let go! I was just delivering documents—

The scene cuts away.

FLASHBACK ENDS.

INT. PRIVATE HOSPITAL ROOM - DAY

LIN MENG
(to Lin Yanran)
You sent me there that night. You set me up.

WANG AIJUN steps forward and SNATCHES the baby from Lin Meng's arms.

LIN MENG
(frantic)
Give her back! Give her back!

LIN YANRAN slaps a document onto the bed tray.

LIN YANRAN
Sign the gift agreement for the old house, and you can keep your mistake.

LIN MENG scans the document: "Property Gift Agreement - 47 Lin Family Lane."

LIN MENG
(voice cracking)
This is all Mom left me. You're taking that too?

LIN YANRAN
Mom and I are the real Lin family now. We deserve what's ours. Right, Dad?

LIN ZHIWEI
(avoiding eye contact)
Just sign it, Meng. Keep the peace.

LIN MENG
(desperate)
You're using my daughter as leverage?

LIN YANRAN
Sign, or I drop her at the police station. Abandoned.

WANG AIJUN shakes the baby slightly. Lin Xixi begins to CRY.

LIN MENG
(breaking)
No—okay! I'll sign!

Lin Meng grabs the pen, hand shaking. She touches the paper.

LIN XIXI (V.O.)
Mommy. Don't sign. Please.

LIN MENG stops. Freezes. Looks around.

LIN MENG
...What?

LIN XIXI (V.O.)
It's me, Mommy. Listen.

LIN YANRAN
What's the hold-up? Sign!

Lin Meng stares at her daughter. Lin Xixi stops crying. Their eyes lock. Lin Meng's expression hardens.

She RIPS the document in half.

LIN MENG
No.

LIN XIXI (V.O.)
Bad woman. Hurt Mommy. Now you pay.

A faint BLUE LIGHT pulses from Lin Xixi's blanket, streaking toward Lin Yanran. Lin Yanran DOUBLES OVER, clutching her stomach.

LIN YANRAN
(gasping)
Mom—my stomach—

WANG AIJUN
What is it?

Lin Yanran GAGS, a wave of nausea hitting her. She stumbles.

LIN ZHIWEI
(stepping back)
Yanran, you're green. Get to the bathroom.

Lin Yanran sprints for the door, a hand clamped over her mouth. Lin Meng watches, eyes wide, a small smile forming.

LIN YANRAN
(at the door, voice muffled)
This isn't over!

Wang Aijun shoves the baby back into Lin Meng's arms.

WANG AIJUN
(hissing)
Take your brat and get out. This room isn't free.

LIN XIXI (V.O.)
Ouch. No manners, Grandma.

LIN MENG
(to Wang Aijun)
You can't kick me out—I'm still admitted.

WANG AIJUN
Your chart says discharged. Now.

Wang Aijun pushes Lin Meng toward the door. Lin Xixi begins to CRY again.

LIN MENG
(cradling Xixi)
Okay. We're leaving. We're leaving.

INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - DAY

Lin Meng, barefoot in her hospital gown, carries Lin Xixi through the fluorescent-lit hallway.

LIN XIXI (V.O.)
Don't cry, Mommy. Your love woke me up. Now I'll protect you. We'll be okay.

ON SCREEN: TO BE CONTINUED

title: Young Master Gu's Pampered Little Wife (Episode 1 of 80)
description: A woman wakes up to discover she's been betrayed by her fiancé and cousin on her wedding day, and learns the terrible truth about her past.
context:
Title: Young Master Gu's Pampered Little Wife (Episode 1 of 80)
Description: A woman wakes up to discover she's been betrayed by her fiancé and cousin on her wedding day, and learns the terrible truth about her past.

INT. HOTEL BEDROOM - NIGHT

QIAO NUAN lies on the bed, her eyes fluttering open. A shirtless MAN leans over her, his face obscured, trailing kisses along her collarbone.

QIAO NUAN (V.O.)
(whispered, fragmented)
Dead... I was supposed to be...

MAN
You wanted this, Qiao Nuan. Remember that.

He continues, but Qiao Nuan's body remains rigid, unresponsive.

INT. LIVING ROOM - DAY

ON SCREEN: On the wedding day, having an affair with the bride's cousin

YOUAN (the fiancé) reclines on the sofa. The COUSIN curls in his lap, toying with his tie.

COUSIN
(softly, teasing)
She's still your wife, Brother Youan. For the next hour, at least.

YOUAN
A cripple who can't even walk down the aisle? Hardly a wife.

COUSIN
And the baby she lost? Was that... inconvenient?

YOUAN
The car accident solved two problems at once. Be grateful.

The Cousin smiles, leaning in to kiss him.
continuation:
QIAO NUAN (O.S.)
(filtered, as if underwater)
Brother Youan...?

The couple freezes. QIAO NUAN sits in her wheelchair in the doorway, veil askew, hands trembling on the wheels.

QIAO NUAN
(whisper)
What did you say... about the accident?

YOUAN
(exchanging look with Cousin)
You're early.

COUSIN
(standing smoothly)
Let me help you freshen up before the ceremony.

She takes a step toward Qiao Nuan.

INT. BATHROOM - DAY

QIAO NUAN gasps awake, submerged in bathtub water. She thrashes upward, coughing.

QIAO NUAN
(choking)
No—stop—

The COUSIN stands over the tub, holding a hair dryer, its plug near the water.

COUSIN
(calmly)
Don't worry. It'll look like an accident. Again.

She reaches for the plug.

ON SCREEN: TO BE CONTINUED

title: Betrayal and Truth
description: A woman discovers her husband's affair and a shocking secret about her son's true parentage.
context:
Title: Betrayal and Truth
Description: A woman discovers her husband's affair and a shocking secret about her son's true parentage.

INT. MODERN APARTMENT - NIGHT

Dim lamplight cuts through silence. ZHANG BO (45, immaculate suit, predator's patience) holds his phone. LINLIN (28, sharp edges, hungry eyes) drifts toward the door. YAO YAO (42, trembling resilience) hides under the dining table, knuckles white against the floor.

ZHANG BO
(into phone, smooth)
Yao Yao. Stop panicking. She's probably walking home. One missed call from half an hour ago isn't a crisis.

He pockets the phone. Moves to Linlin. Fingers trace her waist, familiar.

LINLIN
(quiet, venomous)
Dead weight cow...

ZHANG BO
She'll return for her phone. Let's not be here.

LINLIN
(coquettish edge)
You're wicked.

He guides her toward the door, arm possessive at her waist. Yao Yao begins crawling out, panicked. Her knee KNOCKS a chair leg.

Freeze. Zhang Bo's head turns. He moves back, crouches, peers under the table. His eyes find hers.

ZHANG BO
(soft, lethal)
Come out.

Yao Yao emerges. Stands. Her back finds the wall. No escape.
continuation:
ZHANG BO
If Linlin hadn't noticed your slippers missing from the entrance, I wouldn't have known.

YAO YAO
(crying, but sharp)
You cheat and you hunt me? Zhang Bo, this is my home.

ZHANG BO
(contemptuous)
Trash I lifted from poverty. Don't forget—your son breathes because I pay for it.

LINLIN
(from doorway)
That private suite costs more than your existence.

YAO YAO
(stands taller)
He's your son. Your blood. You wouldn't abandon him.

ZHANG BO
(sneering)
That bastard? Worthy? Six years ago, I drugged your wine. You vanished. Returned pregnant.

He slaps her. Hard. Her head snaps. When she looks back, something is shattered behind her eyes.

ZHANG BO
You made me a fool. You owe me everything.

Yao Yao covers her face. Stares at him. Shock calcifies into horror.

YAO YAO (V.O.)
Drugged... another man... that night... wasn't him?

Her face fills with disbelief.

title: Bound Betrayal
description: A woman in white awakens to find herself captive in a twisted plot orchestrated by her husband's obsessed admirer.
context:
Title: Bound Betrayal
Description: A woman in white awakens to find herself captive in a twisted plot orchestrated by her husband's obsessed admirer.

INT. BEDROOM - DAY

A woman in white lies on the floor beside the bed, her hands bound behind her back. She awakens gradually, confusion hardening into guarded awareness.

WOMAN IN WHITE
(hushed)
Is anyone there?

The bedroom door opens. SHANG XUE enters in a black dress.

SHANG XUE
You're awake sooner than expected.

WOMAN IN WHITE
(measured)
Shang Xue. I hoped I was wrong.

SHANG XUE
(smiling without warmth)
Don't worry. As long as you obey, I won't take your life.

WOMAN IN WHITE
(quietly fierce)
What does obedience look like today?

SHANG XUE produces a small vial, rolling it between her fingers.

SHANG XUE
Something to blur the lines between loyalty and instinct. When Yuchen sees the footage, he'll question everything he thought he knew about his perfect wife.

WOMAN IN WHITE
(struggling)
Don't come near me.

SHANG XUE steps forward and grips the Woman's jaw, vial ready.

SHANG XUE
I was his family. Before you made him choose propriety over blood. Swallow it. After he sees what you become, he won't want the reminder.

WOMAN IN WHITE
(steady)
The staff know I'm here. Any minute—
continuation:
SHANG XUE
(mocking)
The staff are enjoying their unexpected holiday. Your husband's orders.

A suited man (SUITED MAN) appears in the doorway.

SHANG XUE
(to SUITED MAN)
Mark the time. Authentic timestamps.

SUITED MAN
(nodding)
Camera's rolling.

SHANG XUE
Make it convincing. Nothing that leaves evidence.

The Suited Man approaches, removing his cufflinks with methodical precision. A phone on the dresser captures the scene.

WOMAN IN WHITE
(coldly)
He's paying you for performance, not improvisation. What's your actual price?

SUITED MAN
(pausing)
Some performances are their own reward.

WOMAN IN WHITE
(lower, urgent)
Triple. Before she pays you at all. Account numbers in my purse—check the lining.

The Suited Man hesitates, his eyes flickering toward the door.

SHANG XUE
(from across the room)
Don't entertain her games.

WOMAN IN WHITE
(to Suited Man)
She's already shown you you're disposable. Are you?

The Suited Man's hand stops mid-reach.

ON SCREEN: TO BE CONTINUED

title: My Cold Ex-Husband Pursues Me
description: A woman believed to be simple-minded marries a wealthy man, only to be betrayed and divorced while pregnant. After an accident, she awakens to her true identity.
context:
Title: My Cold Ex-Husband Pursues Me
Description: A woman believed to be simple-minded marries a wealthy man, only to be betrayed and divorced while pregnant. After an accident, she awakens to her true identity.

INT. WEDDING CHAMBER - DAY

A sumptuous Chinese bridal chamber. QIN NIANAN (20s), radiant in red silk, sits veiled on the marriage bed. Her fingers tremble slightly as she unwraps a candy.

MAID A
(arranging dowry)
Never thought I'd see Master Qin wed the... the simple one. Not with Miss Wanqing waiting.

MAID B
(urgent whisper)
Old Madam's dying wish. Said the girl's birth chart could save him. Now she's gone, he's stuck with it.

A candy slips from Nianan's grasp, rolling across polished floorboards.

The chamber door swings open. QIN WANGYAN (30s) enters, ceremonial robes hanging from his broad frame like armor. His gaze fixes on the veiled figure.

He lifts the red silk. Beneath it: Nianan's face—ethereal, unreadable, a porcelain mask of calm.

QIN WANGYAN's fingers brush hers. Nianan looks up, eyes impossibly clear. She offers the candy with the solemnity of a sacred rite.

QIN NIANAN
(softly)
Sweet. Like you might be.

QIN WANGYAN studies the offering. Something passes across his face—too quick to name. He leans in, kissing her deeply, almost desperately.

QIN WANGYAN
(against her lips)
Sweet.

QIN NIANAN
Sweeter than what you'll taste tomorrow.

QIN WANGYAN
(whisper)
Foolish girl.

CUT TO:

ON SCREEN: TEN MONTHS LATER
continuation:
INT. QIN FAMILY STUDY - DAY

Nianan, nine months pregnant, perches on the arm of Wangyan's chair, guiding his hand over her belly.

QIN NIANAN
(laughing)
There—did you feel? He knows his father.

QIN WANGYAN
(stiffly)
You're both fools, then.

QIN NIANAN
(undimmed)
The best kind.

QIN WANGYAN
Are you obedient?

QIN NIANAN
(earnest)
Always for you.

QIN WANGYAN slides a document across the desk. His signature already bleeds across the final page—a violent slash of ink.

QIN WANGYAN
Then sign this. For the child's future.

Nianan picks up the pen, studies the characters without comprehension. She draws each stroke of her name with a child's careful art.

QIN WANGYAN watches, jaw tight, fists tighter.

QIN WANGYAN
Qin Chao.

QIN CHAO (O.S.)
Master?

QIN WANGYAN
Take her to the estate. Tonight.

QIN NIANAN
(confusion dawning)
The mountain house? I'll wait for you there?

QIN CHAO enters—built like a vault, eyes like a grave. He takes Nianan's elbow.

QIN NIANAN
(struggling)
Wangyan, you said—you promised we'd be a family—

QIN WANGYAN turns to the window, showing only his reflection.

QIN WANGYAN
(to the glass)
I promised my grandmother I'd try. I never promised to succeed.

QIN CHAO hauls the sobbing Nianan out. Her candy tin falls from her pocket, scattering sweets across the threshold.

INT. BLACK LUXURY SUV - RAINY NIGHT

Nianan presses against the window, rain streaming down glass like tears. Her hands cradle her belly.

QIN NIANAN
(whispering a mantra)
Three days. He'll need three days to miss me. Then he'll come.

Headlights behind them—too close, too fast.

The crash is a scream of metal. The world tumbles. Glass explodes. Nianan's head cracks against the window.

SOUND EFFECT:
Piercing brake screech. Bone-crunching impact.

Blood ribbons down her face. In the shattered rearview, the other car reverses, vanishes into darkness.

QIN NIANAN (V.O.)
The candy taste. Blood taste. I remember—

MONTAGE FLASHES:
—A little girl in designer clothes, crying "I want my candy!"
—A woman's voice: "Never say your real name."
—Signing the divorce paper, the characters suddenly legible, suddenly obscene.
—Wangyan's kiss, his guilt, her knowing.

QIN NIANAN opens her eyes in the wreckage. Her gaze focuses—razor-sharp.

She touches her bloodied temple, smiles a predator's smile.

QIN NIANAN
(weak but venomous)
Shen. Yinyin. You forgot the family motto, little fool: never trust a Qin.

She spits blood. Her hand finds a surviving candy, crushes it in her fist.

THE END

title: The Devil Lawyer's Retribution
description: A ruthless defense attorney who never loses a case wins freedom for a murderer, only to face tragic consequences that force him to confront the moral cost of his victories.
context:
Title: The Devil Lawyer's Retribution
Description: A ruthless defense attorney who never loses a case wins freedom for a murderer, only to face tragic consequences that force him to confront the moral cost of his victories.

INT. COURTROOM - DAY

JUDGE
The prosecution has failed to prove guilt beyond reasonable doubt. The defendant is acquitted of all charges.

The JUDGE strikes the gavel.

The DEFENDANT's handcuffs are removed. He smirks at the prosecution table.

PLAINTIFF 1 (pointing at SEAN, voice breaking)
You did this. You twisted the truth!

PLAINTIFF 2 (to the DEFENDANT)
You'll answer for this someday.

SEAN (gathering documents)
The jury made their decision. That's how justice works.

DEFENDANT rises, straightens his jacket. He leans close to SEAN.

DEFENDANT
(quietly)
Told you I'd see you on the outside. Same time next year?

DEFENDANT exits with his attorney.

EXT. COURTHOUSE STEPS - DAY

SEAN exits, immediately surrounded by REPORTERS and PROTESTERS.

REPORTER
Seventy-eighth murder acquittal. What's your secret?

REPORTER 2
How do you sleep at night?

PROTESTERS (overlapping)
Killer! Devil! Blood money!

SEAN checks his phone: three missed calls from the hospital.

REPORTER 3
Any comment on your nickname?

SEAN
(looking past them)
No comment.

A PROTESTER spits near his feet.

PROTESTER
You think you're above the law?

SEAN's phone rings. He answers.

SEAN
(barked)
What?

DOCTOR (V.O.)
Mr. Sean, your wife is in emergency surgery. You need to come now.

SEAN
(paling)
The baby?

DOCTOR (V.O.)
Hurry.

SEAN pushes through the crowd and runs.
continuation:
INT. HOSPITAL ROOM - DAY

SEAN bursts in. LIN XIAO lies still, an oxygen mask on her face. The room hums with equipment.

SEAN
(softly)
Xiao?

LIN XIAO's eyes flutter open. She removes her mask with trembling fingers.

LIN XIAO
(whisper)
You missed it.

SEAN
I'm here now. That's what matters.

LIN XIAO
Our daughter... perfect. Dark hair like yours.

SEAN
(pause)
Where is she?

LIN XIAO
I lost too much blood. They tried. I waited...

SEAN
(frantic)
For what?

LIN XIAO
For you.

The words hang. SEAN stares, stricken.

LIN XIAO
Promise me... next case... make it someone who deserves you.

Her hand drops. The heart monitor's beep slows.

SEAN
No. Stay with me. Xiao!

The monitor's tone goes continuous.

DOCTOR rushes in, checks vitals, then stops.

DOCTOR
(quietly)
She's gone.

SEAN
You didn't—how could you not—

He breaks off, seeing the doctor's expression. He turns back to the bed.

SEAN
(to himself)
I silenced my phone.

QUICK FLASHES:
- PLAINTIFF 1's tear-streaked face.
- The DEFENDANT's parting wink.
- SEAN's own hands, turning off his phone before closing arguments.

A NURSE pulls a white sheet over LIN XIAO's face.

SEAN remains frozen beside the bed, surrounded by machines that no longer need to beep.

title: The Phoenix's Shocking Turn
description: Empress Xiao Yuhuan practices a secret technique to maintain the Emperor's favor, but her position is threatened when he brings another woman to his private chambers.
context:
Title: The Phoenix's Shocking Turn
Description: Empress Xiao Yuhuan practices a secret technique to maintain the Emperor's favor, but her position is threatened when he brings another woman to his private chambers.

INT. XIAO YUHUAN'S PALACE - DAY

Close-up shot: A hand places several brown eggs on an exquisite cushion.

EUNUCH (V.O.)
Her Majesty is practicing. Everyone withdraw.

XIAO YUHUAN, dressed in luxurious red robes, kneels on a prayer mat, attended by two PALACE MAIDS. She picks up a piece of red paper, skillfully unfolds it into a fan, then closes it and sets it aside.

CAIWEI picks up an egg, examining it with delight.

CAIWEI
Your Majesty, each one is perfect. The Emperor hasn't visited another consort in weeks.

XIAO YUHUAN
(eyes closed, focused)
The ritual binds his heart, but it cannot give me what I truly need. Fifteen years, and still no child. Without a son, these eggs are just... shells.

She touches her abdomen briefly, a flicker of vulnerability crossing her face before it hardens.

A PALACE MAID rushes in frantically and kneels on the ground.

PALACE MAID
Your Majesty! A woman entered the Hall of Mental Cultivation with His Majesty—she's been there since noon!

XIAO YUHUAN
(shocked, rising)
What?

CAIWEI
Your Majesty, he's never allowed anyone inside his private chambers, not even—

XIAO YUHUAN
(furious, but controlled)
I know what it means. He hasn't just taken a new concubine. He's given her a key.
continuation:
XIAO YUHUAN
Did you see her face?

PALACE MAID
She wears the jade pendant of the southern tribute dancers, Your Majesty. They arrived last month.

CAIWEI
(whispering)
The ones trained in the arts of illusion...

EUNUCH XIAO FUZI walks briskly into the hall and bows respectfully, his expression grave.

XIAO FUZI
Your Majesty, the Office of Imperial Bedchamber confirms: His Majesty will not receive you tonight. He has... requested privacy.

XIAO YUHUAN stands motionless. The tea cup beside her trembles from her shaking hand. She deliberately picks it up, studies it, then drops it. The shattering echoes through the silent hall.

She walks slowly to the window, her back to the servants. Her voice drops to a whisper.

XIAO YUHUAN
So. All the spells, all the offerings... broken by a dancing girl.

She turns, her face a mask of cold fury, but her eyes glisten with tears she refuses to shed.

XIAO YUHUAN
(to CAIWEI)
Bring me the book from the Western merchant. The one I told you to burn. And have the chief astrologer attend me at dawn.

She looks at the broken cup on the floor, then at the eggs on the cushion.

XIAO YUHUAN
(softly, to herself)
Shells can be broken. So can spells. And so can empresses... if they don't learn new tricks.

She sweeps past the kneeling servants, her robes flowing like blood, leaving them in fearful silence.

FADE OUT.

title: Dragon Son and Phoenix Daughter Honor the Supreme
description: Twenty years after making childhood promises to buy their mother a big house, twin siblings have secretly become the nation's richest tycoon and most powerful war god, while pretending to work as a security guard and a janitor.
context:
Title: Dragon Son and Phoenix Daughter Honor the Supreme
Description: Twenty years after making childhood promises to buy their mother a big house, twin siblings have secretly become the nation's richest tycoon and most powerful war god, while pretending to work as a security guard and a janitor.

INT. HOME - DAY

Time returns to 2003.

SHEN WANYING sits on the sofa with young LI YUNXIAO and LI YUNXUE, twin siblings. On the table in front of them are two small cakes with candles.

SHEN WANYING
Alright, now you two can close your eyes and make a wish.

The siblings obediently close their eyes and put their hands together.

LI YUNXIAO (CHILDHOOD)
I hope when I grow up, I'll earn lots and lots of money and buy Mom a big 100-square-meter house.

LI YUNXUE (CHILDHOOD)
I also hope I'll earn lots and lots of money and buy Mom a 200-square-meter house.

LI YUNXIAO (CHILDHOOD)
(opening his eyes, displeased)
Mom, she's doing it on purpose! Then I'll buy a 300-square-meter one!

LI YUNXUE (CHILDHOOD)
Hmph, then I'll buy a 400-square-meter one!

LI YUNXIAO (CHILDHOOD)
I'll buy 500 square meters!

LI YUNXUE (CHILDHOOD)
600 square meters!

LI YUNXIAO (CHILDHOOD)
700 square meters!

LI YUNXUE (CHILDHOOD)
800 square meters!

LI YUNXIAO (CHILDHOOD)
900 square meters!

SHEN WANYING watches them argue with a loving smile.
continuation:
EXT. STREET - DAY

SUPER: "Twenty Years Later"

Adult LI YUNXIAO, wearing a security guard uniform, patrols the street.

SUPER: LI YUNXIAO - Security Guard

He sees a girl in a janitor's uniform sweeping the ground ahead.

LI YUNXIAO
Yunxue!

The girl turns around. It's adult LI YUNXUE.

SUPER: LI YUNXUE - Janitor

EXT. STEPS - DAY

The siblings sit on the steps, resting and eating. LI YUNXUE holds a food container and hands it to LI YUNXIAO.

LI YUNXUE
Brother, this is the spicy hot pot I just made today. Eat it while it's hot.

LI YUNXIAO smiles and takes it, then hands his own lunch box to his sister.

LI YUNXIAO
This is fried rice I made myself. Here, you eat it.

LI YUNXUE
Brother, I'm not hungry. You eat it yourself.

LI YUNXIAO
We both skipped breakfast again. Let's eat together.

LI YUNXIAO puts both containers together.

LI YUNXIAO
Let's do it like when we were kids. I'll count.

The siblings each prepare to eat.

LI YUNXIAO
One, two, three!

LI YUNXIAO quickly devours the spicy hot pot in big bites, while LI YUNXUE calmly eats the fried rice.

INT. LUXURY HOTEL - DAY

The scene switches to an extremely luxurious setting.

SUPER: Phoenix Commerce Association

LI YUNXUE wears a gorgeous black gown, sitting at the head of a dining table. She is the President of the Phoenix Commerce Association.

Four middle-aged men walk forward and bow to her in unison.

ZHOU RUNHAI
Zhou Runhai, Head of the Zhou Family of Upper Capital.

WU SANKUO
Wu Sankuo, Head of the Wu Family.

ZHENG LETIAN
Zheng Letian of the Zheng Family.

WANG SIKONG
Wang Sikong of the Wang Family.

ALL FOUR (in unison)
The Four Great Families of Upper Capital pay respects to Miss Li, the richest person!

The scene switches to LI YUNXIAO's side.

SUPER: First-Class Command Center

LI YUNXIAO wears a sharp suit, sitting at the head of another long table. He is the Crimson Flame King of Great Xia.

Four young women dressed in different styles walk forward and bow to LI YUNXIAO.

VERMILLION BIRD WAR GOD
Dead tree meets spring, Vermillion Bird.

AZURE DRAGON WAR GOD
Midsummer's peak heat, Azure Dragon.

WHITE TIGER WAR GOD
Hundred years, thousand autumns, White Tiger.

BLACK TORTOISE WAR GOD
Deep winter's cold, Black Tortoise.

ALL FOUR WOMEN (in unison)
The Four Great War Gods of Great Xia pay respects to Master!

SPLIT SCREEN

LI YUNXIAO and LI YUNXUE each reveal expressions of authority. Simultaneously, they both glance at their phones and soften—Mom's dinner reminder.

FADE TO BLACK.

THE END

title: Return of the Dragon Lady
description: Zhong Yan (Dragon Lady of the Zhong family) holds her mother's portrait, vowing revenge, while her best friend Ye Bei and boyfriend Lu Jiao betray her in an ancient tower courtyard.
context:
Title: Return of the Dragon Lady
Description: Zhong Yan (Dragon Lady of the Zhong family) holds her mother's portrait, vowing revenge, while her best friend Ye Bei and boyfriend Lu Jiao betray her in an ancient tower courtyard.

EXT. ANCIENT TOWER COURTYARD - DAY

ZHONG YAN holds her mother's portrait, her eyes filled with sorrow and determination.

ZHONG YAN
Mother, I will avenge you.

YE BEI and LU JIAO stand nearby, watching ZHONG YAN with cold precision.

YE BEI
The debt is overdue, Yan. My family won't wait for courts anymore.

ZHONG YAN
Bei, we grew up together. Your mother and mine—

YE BEI
(interrupting)
Built an empire. Then yours destroyed mine. The USB drive, Yan. Hand it over.

ZHONG YAN
(taking it out)
These are your father's illegal accounts. One copy goes public if you touch me.

LU JIAO
Yan, give it to me. I'll negotiate for you.

ZHONG YAN
continuation:
(hand trembling)
You swear?

LU JIAO
I swear.

LU JIAO takes the USB drive, then drops it, crushing it under his boot.

LU JIAO
I'm sorry. I really am.

He steps hard on ZHONG YAN's foot, pinning her.

ZHONG YAN
(gasping in pain)
Lu Jiao!

YE BEI
(to the MYSTERIOUS MAN)
The pendant. It's worth more than the debt. Take it.

The MYSTERIOUS MAN moves forward.

ZHONG YAN
(struggling)
No! It's all I have left of her—

Lightning cracks the sky. The jade pendant around ZHONG YAN's neck erupts in blinding crimson light.

YE BEI, LU JIAO, and the MYSTERIOUS MAN shield their eyes as the light intensifies.
